chapters.title: Chapter 1003: : Humanoid Monster
chapters.body:
Chapter 1003: : Humanoid Monster

The bitter heart felt extremely strenuous.

He faced such a strong opponent solo for the first time, but they didn't have a stronger armored division present, he could only come out.

The style of the long dress is light and elegant, and he was born in a wild, but not weak.

Strong pressure is coming.

They can't fail anymore. After the leadership fails, there are now four games left. Once he loses here, the god-level civilization they face will only win with a complete victory.

The tremendous pressure made him dare not relax in the slightest.

In the super state, the combat consciousness depicts the movement trajectory of the long clothes, this trajectory is erratic, even he is very surprised.

The attack of the long clothes is getting faster and faster.

Unable to attack, he passively dodges and looks extremely embarrassed in the high air, but he is not injured. With concentration, he can still detect the direction of danger and the attack trajectory of the long clothes.

He wants to win this battle.

With this belief, his face became solemn.

The pressure in my mind is increasing.

In the hands of the orcs, the **** king rescued all their tribesmen, gave them all their tribes an education and an incomparable good life, which they could not even imagine.

He was the one who was rescued. In order to be the guardian of the king, he stood out from the competition among hundreds of millions of bitter youths.

It can be said that God King is their strongest belief.

For the bitter people, the honor of the king is more important than their lives. This is also the reason why the commander would rather risk death to hurt Emperor Wu.

They have the will to die but not to live, but they must never shame the king.

Huh!

The severe pain in the abdomen made him more stressed.

Slashed through the belly of the battle armor by a long knife, the blade touched the flesh and blood. The battle armor was restored to its original state under the repair of the nano robot, but the wound on the abdomen was still bleeding.

The second and third wounds appeared one after another.

The severe pain made him feel vigorous.

In his eyes, the movement route of the long clothes became clearer.

A sense of sublimation rises from the painful heart.

Fighting consciousness seems to have entered the next stage.

Everything in front of him, as if the lens is focused, the movement of the long clothes is slower in his eyes, and it is also much clearer.

"drink!"

With a loud shout, the long spear in painstakingly stabbed to the left. The face of the long coat that had just twisted his body in mid-air changed slightly, the front engine of the battle armor started, and he squatted in mid-air, unexpectedly changing his moves, causing the rhythm of the long coat to be chaotic.

Almost without thinking, withdrew and retire.

A trivial stab illustrates a lot of problems.

"Sure enough, you can see through the combat actions. This should be your special ability." The long clothes rarely said, and some admiration: "All guards have the same ability, or you are a god-level race, the ability can be inherited, or it is developed after tomorrow. Then your super energy development technology must be very advanced."

The sound of a whisper spread on the public channel, shocking the lives of the onlookers.

As Changyi said, if Chen Mo's guards have the same special abilities, either they are god-level races with heritable abilities, or they have special ability development techniques.

Either way, it is very scary.

At present, there are only seven races with heritable abilities, which are the seven god-level civilizations.

If it is the first case, then the eighth largest god-level race is them.

But if it were the second case, it meant that Chen Mo had the infinitely creating skills for soldiers with the same special abilities, which was countless times more terrifying than a god-level race.

Once the full-scale war between the two sides begins, the opponent's soldiers all have the same special ability to assist in combat, which is almost invincible. The population of God-level races is also limited, and the soldiers that this technology can create are unlimited.

...

Zi Yun's face was cold and her mind was unprecedentedly concentrated. In her eyes, all the lives around him are like a mass of energy, which can be controlled by her at will.

An intangible idea spread out, centering on Zi Yun. Quickly spread.

The lives onlookers over the Tianxing Tablet Forest suddenly felt a collective sense of heart palpitations, and the brain was in a trance, as if someone was about to strangle the neck.

"Huh?" Tong Qing was taken aback for a while, looking in the direction of Zi Yun, with undisguised surprise in her eyes.

"What's the matter? Speaker?" Tara asked.

"Found an interesting thing." Tong Qing said lightly.

Zidi looked at Zi Yun and expressed great interest: "It seems that Ziwei civilization has produced a remarkable seed, and I don't know if the old fellow Zijunzhi has discovered it."

Chen Mo also looked in Zi Yun's direction, calmly.

The other beings didn't know what was going on, and they still watched the battle on the field nervously.

When Zi Yun's thought wave touched Mo Nu's body, her purple eyes tightened. The wave of thoughts tightened instantly like the hand of God, and fell into the consciousness of Mo Girl, trying to restrain her consciousness.

When the thought of control restrained Mo Nui, Zi Yun's cold expression suddenly changed suddenly.

This thought is like twisting silk, entwining Mo Nu's consciousness.

At that moment, Mo Nu's consciousness melted like a snowman hitting flames, spreading like a cloud, wrapping her thoughts, and then destroying.

From beginning to end, Mo Nu's expression was as quiet as water.

This is impossible.

Zi Yun almost exclaimed, confused.

He considers himself a killer-like method, like punching cotton, but also hitting the silver needle in the cotton, completely hitting the nemesis.

[Mind Control] It is consciousness that binds.

No life has ever changed consciousness. For the first time, she saw a life that could completely control her consciousness.

This is beyond her understanding.

"Why doesn't Zi Yun move?" Tara looked at the high-altitude battlefield, somewhat puzzled.

Tong Qing was a little moved, and said solemnly: "The highest ability of Ziwei civilization [Mind Control]."

Seeing Hitomi Qing's expression, Tara became even more curious: "Is this ability strong?"

"Mind Control] This kind of ability, I know, there is only one." Tong Qing looked in the direction of Zidi, and found that Zidi was also looking at him. The two were just touching and turned away.

"If Ziwei Civilization wins the round, the Speaker does not need to play."

"It's not that simple. The female assistant next to Chen Mo is very mysterious, like a black hole, so people can't see through. It's too early to tell the outcome."

Tong Qing glanced at Chen Mo in a blink of an eye. He didn't think that Chen Mo was so easy to agree to this gambling fight because he wanted to find himself a step down.

The high-altitude battle is heating up.

The fighting spike in Mo Nui's hand flashed with the faint blue of a short-pulse laser at the tip, and it could easily penetrate the battle armor with just one spike.

Armored combat, more often than not, it is a one-shot kill.

Zi Yun's [Mind Control] always falls on her body, like sugar silk meeting clear water, quickly dissolving without any influence.

The speed increased, she did not leave her hands, her body disappeared instantly and appeared behind Zi Yun.

It was determined that [Mind Control] completely failed for Mo Nu. Zi Yun was in chaos, and no longer tried to control Mo Nu. The armor engine broke out, and only heard a sound burst and disappeared in place.

...

Shi Min's pressure is not lower than Zi Yun's, Jing Ge's fighting style is what he has seen in his life.

It was fierce and ruthless, upright but very strange.

The opponent can see through his movements, backhand attacks, and always give him the most deadly threat in the most tricky way. This is the first time he has encountered such a difficult opponent.

After almost suffering a big loss at the beginning, Shimin no longer dared to relax anymore, waving a silver spear in his hand, like the **** of war in the world, with the tip of the spear dragging a phantom and thrusting forward.

Jing Ge arched his legs and stepped on the volley. The engine broke out instantly, and his figure disappeared quickly.

Bang!

With a muffled sound, Lion Min's arm was hit by a planet, and the silver spear shot out.

Jing Ge appeared under his right rib at a tricky angle. The moment he kicked his arm, the armor flipped, and the backhand waved, the action was done in one go, and the fighting thorn in his hand was coming to his heart.

High in the sky, the change caused Shi Ming's heart to sink. From the beginning, he knew Jing Ge was not weak. But now he discovered that Jing Ge's fighting methods made him feel unparalleled pressure.

The opponent's movements are both rigid and soft, when fierce, like a giant beast pressing on top, when weird, like a dark wolf in the dark.

The opponent's attack blocked his retreat, and it was too late to retreat. The fighting thorns got closer and closer, and the danger felt like a planetary pressure.

drink!

Shi Min shouted, his body twisted to the limit.

The fighting stab pierced his armor and pierced his arm like a sharp blade falling into tofu.

The severe pain made Lion Min's spirits shocked, enduring the pain, sweeping on Jing Ge's hand, opening his palm holding the fighting thorn, his right leg bends slightly, the engine that broke out instantly, whip legs horizontally in the air, sweeping in Jing Ge's ribs.

Jing Ge's figure flew sharply, and fell to the Tianxing Stele Forest, smashing the picture tablet, dragging a long trace in the ground.

Huh!

Shi Ming forcibly tore off the fighting stab from his arm, causing the scalp of the onlookers to numb.

To be the number one master of the White Star Civilization, Shimin is among the strongest, but even so, he is still injured. What kind of opponent does he face?

The nano robot filled the pierced place of the battle armor, and Shi Ming looked at Jing Ge solemnly.

He hadn't been injured for many years, and Jing Ge put him under tremendous pressure.

Jing Ge flew into the air and stopped steadily. The shape of the battle armor changed. On his shoulders, elbows, knees, and the back of his hands, sharp fighting thorns floated, and the sharp blue light dotted, like a ferocious human-shaped monster standing in the air.

The weapons of both sides are lost, and the next is real melee combat.

Seeing Jing Ge at this moment, Shi Ming's face changed slightly.

He felt that he was being spotted by the giant beast.

chapters.title: Chapter 1004: ：Mo Nu’S [Heaven And Earth Live Together]
chapters.body:
Chapter 1004: ：Mo Nu’S [Heaven And Earth Live Together]

The battle in the air was unexpected, and the black pupils were narrowed, sharp as blades.

He asked a trace of impropriety. Looking at the situation in front of him, the outcome of this gambling battle was really uncertain. Jing Ge's strength surpassed the imagination of all onlookers.

Judging from the battle on the spot, even if he faced Jing Ge, he might not necessarily win.

The fighting style of this life is very unique.

Tong Qing looked at Chen Mo, this young life was beyond his expectations time and time again.

...

The long clothes are not going to continue to drag.

The painful heart is now a dozen knives in his body, and he is still persisting.

His abilities have reached the limit, and the will and resilience of these guards are what he has seen in his life. After a short fight, he couldn't help showing respect to the guards.

Judging from his judgment, the painful heart is just a position like a captain in the guard.

The bitter dragon blocking Thunder, and the bitter Yao who confronted Emperor Wu, should be the general and deputy of the guard regiment.

But even if he was just a captain, it still shocked him.

During the battle, he could clearly feel the painstaking heart improving, and the progress was very fast in the battle.

Whether it was Lei Ting vs. Kulong, or Wudi vs. Ku Yao, or his current heart for pain. Three battles, three guards, the same style, the same terrible will.

This is definitely not accidental.

It's that Chen Mo's entire guard group is like this.

This kind of enemy is terrible. Once caught a little chance, it is like a wild beast. Even if it is weaker than the enemy, it can still tear a piece of flesh and blood from the enemy at all costs.

Emperor Wu is a lesson.

He definitely does not want to be an enemy of this kind of opponent.

The speed of the long dress was so fast that it flickered to the side of the bitter heart.

This is a flaw.

Although the bitter heart is not afraid of death, and the special ability of auxiliary combat is also strong, but the weakness is also obvious. There is still some distance from the top hand of the armor technique.

He is a lone ranger, and he doesn't have the strict and systematic combat skills training like the god-level civilization, but he is not weak in actual combat.

In actual combat, some skills are naturally mastered and form their own style.

Huh!

With a wave of his hand, the long knife was cut down, bringing out a harsh howling in the atmosphere.

ended.

The long knife and ribs cut through the battle armor without hindrance, and cut half of the painful heart.

Humph! With a painful grunt, half of his body could not move, and the long-clothed sword came over again.

Lost.

Painfully closed his eyes, but still failed to win this game.

When the battle was over, the long clothes withdrew.

The two guards will go out and will fall in the air and drag them back to the team for treatment. The long clothes didn't kill him, so the painful heart was only severely injured and didn't die.

The Universe Alliance won the second game.

"It's a pity, if Chen Mo uses two weak players to fight against the strong ones, using those two masters against Emperor Wu and Changyi, they can win two rounds." An onlooker and a nearby friend said .

"Take a coincidence? It feels like Chen Mo doesn't care about the victory or defeat of Emperor Wu and Changyi. They just want to defeat God-level civilization upright."

"Can't win, Tongqing is an insurmountable black hole."

"Winning a round is also winning. No one dares to laugh at him. One force, against the three god-level civilizations of the Universe Alliance, and countless advanced civilizations without stage fright, they won from the beginning."

"..."

At the beginning, some people laughed at Chen Mo. As the battle progressed, they laughed and shut up immediately. The lives onlookers admired Chen Mo's tenacity.

Regardless of the outcome of this battle, Chen Mo won.

...

Shi Ming had no time to think about it, and Jing Ge's figure appeared not far from him.

The fighting thorn on Jing Ge's battle armor was slightly hideous, and the tip was blazing with the blazing pulse of a short-pulse laser, killing infinitely.

Neither side held a weapon, Jing Ge's style was completely different.

The strange fighting skills are missing, and they completely show a powerful and unparalleled style, and they are attacking like a storm. His fists, shoulders, elbows, knees, every part of his body are his weapons.

Lion Min felt the cells of his body tremble, like a prey being watched by a giant beast, and a sense of danger swept through his body and enveloped it. This feeling appeared last time when Shi Ganxing faced Dan.

In a close attack, the attacking parts of the opponent's body are all over the fighting stabs, and Shimin dare not to harden it, otherwise he would be seriously injured by the fighting stabs.

boom!

The atmosphere exploded, arousing a water vapor, and dissipating all around.

Shi Min's heart became more dignified, and the blood in his body boiled to the extreme.

The opponent is an expert in hand-to-hand combat, and the attack is unreasonable and fierce. Once the opponent seizes the opportunity close, he will undoubtedly lose.

The more dangerous it is, the more exciting Shimin feels.

As the number one master of the White Star Civilization, he has long been among the strongest, and his opponents are not many in the universe. Now an unknown life is emerging, and the pressure on him makes him excited.

He came from an ordinary background, from the academy, to the warhead, and now to the status of the top master of the White Star civilization.

Because his wife has appreciated him since he was weak, now he is close to his wife.

I saw white heat emerging between his flesh and blood. In the state of wild beastization, his body's abilities were stimulated to the extreme. The blood flow speed was extremely fast, and it shuttled between the muscles and flesh, as if magma was flowing, and the skin could be See the fiery red fluorescence.

On the tips of his armor fingers and feet, claw blades floated, sharp and unparalleled, blue light and cold.

"You are very strong. It is the strongest life I have ever encountered except Tongqing and Dan. It's been a long time since there was such a big pressure, let me see your limits." Shi Ming said loudly.

Jing Ge did not speak, but fists responded.

Shi Min flashed abruptly, able to avoid Jing Ge's attack. Before he could react, a black shadow fist came straight towards him.

Snapped!

Slap Jing Ge's arm away, Lion Min changed his palm to grasp, and drew towards Jing Ge's heart.

The fierce murderous aura filled the sky.

So strong!

Lion Min has a big heart.

He still doesn't know Jing Ge's name, but his brave fighting style is branded deep in his mind.

Suddenly, a cry of exclamation swept across the sky over the Tianxing Tablet Forest.

Shi Ming called the battle armor's vision, and his pupils shrank.

In the sky above the Star Stele Forest, Mo Nu and Zi Yun were stuck together, a fighting thorn that penetrated through Mo Nu's heart and sank into Zi Yun's heart.

Heaven and earth live together.

This suicidal fighting technique only happens to god-level beings who have high-level immortality, and they need to hate themselves very much.

Now he sees it again.

The purple blade in Zi Yun's hand came out of Mo Nu's chest.

The two froze in midair.

Huh!

The ink girl abruptly pulled out the fighting thorn, and purple rhyme and purple fluorescent blood sprayed on the ink girl's back, dyeing the paint on the back completely purple.

Under the battle armor, Zi Yun vomited a mouthful of blood, looking incredible.

Pulling off the sword blade Zi Yun inserted into her body, Mo Nu stopped in mid-air, and slowly recovered after the blue gloom of the wounds on her chest and heart lit up.

The damage of the armor was repaired by the nano-robot, and everything was restored as before, and it seemed to have no influence or weakness from beginning to end.

"The high-level immortal body, teleportation, spatial ability, how many abilities does this female human have?"

"How strong is she."

"The Ziwei civilization actually lost."

Unbelievable sounds of discussion spread among the onlookers, who thought that the most stable battle, the genius of the Ziwei civilization represented defeat.

Mo Girl's terrifying recovery ability made the onlookers feel incredible.

The heart can recover in such a short period of time, indicating that the stage of development of the immortal body is already high. This is almost invincible. Is it necessary to destroy her brain and dismember her body to win her?

Zi Yun's purple eyes are dim.

She lost.

The heart is broken, and if there is no high-level immortal body, even if she is a god-level life, she can maintain her body without dying immediately, but her combat power will be lost.

She was extremely confident of her own strength, and she was defeated under the eyes of all beings in the universe.

Lion Min's heart sinks [anonymous novel www.wmxs.info].

He didn't think that Zi Yun was too weak to fail. He clearly felt the brief palpitations in the battle just now, like the legendary [Mind Control].

In the history of the crape myrtle civilization, there is a legendary life with mind control, and he is not sure that he will win by saying lightly.

The strongest representative of Ziwei civilization failed. This is not the first one. There is thunder before it. This means that Chen Mo has now won two god-level civilizations. If he loses again, he will be the third.

The prestige of a god-level civilization will be trampled to death by Chen Mo in this battle.

He cannot be defeated.

Lion Min's expression returned to normal, and he suddenly disappeared from the place with a soft utterance.

chapters.title: Chapter 1005: : Chen Mo Vs Hitomi
chapters.body:
Chapter 1005: : Chen Mo Vs Hitomi

The battle became more and more intense, and the sound of metal collision spread throughout the center of the Star Stele Forest. In the forest of steles, hundreds of pictures of steles fell down, and traces were cut away, leaving broken walls and ruins.

The battlefield goes from the sky to the forest of star steles.

All lives were quiet, and respect came to life.

In the era of rampant thermal weapons, such a strong close fight has not appeared for a long time. This is a battle between the strongest.

boom!

The two in the air are separated again.

Almost at the same time, bending the legs, the engines on the feet and back exploded, and the two flew out like a slingshot in the sky, and bumped together again.

Jing Ge was calm and turned a blind eye to the claw marks on his body. He stood on one leg and bends his right leg. As he bowed his bow, the engine under his feet exploded and accelerated, and his leg slammed into Lion Min's body like a slingshot.

All in one go.

boom!

With a shocking whip leg, a sound exploded in the air. Lion Min was kicked like an iron ball, kicked by Jing Ge, shot at the Star Forest Forest below, smashed ten picture tablets, and dragged hundreds of meters on the ground. .

Jing Ge's stature was stubborn, with his head down, his legs bent, and the sole engine exploded at the same time, disappearing in place, shooting at the location where Lion Min stopped like a rocket.

Keng~~ch!

The sound of two metal tears spread, and the battle under the Star Stele Forest weakened, and time seemed to stop.

The smoke is gone.

Jing Ge and Shi Ming stood on the fallen stele, and the ground around them split like a spider web.

On Jing Ge's battle armor, there are claw marks, chest, abdomen, back, arms and so on.

The most serious claw mark spreads vertically from the left shoulder to the waist. There are four claw marks, half-finger deep. Through the broken flesh and blood, you can see the powerful beating heart inside.

The dark red with fluorescent blood flowed down the armor, soaking half of his body.

Seeing this situation, onlookers' scalp numb.

Opposite him, Shi Ming stayed motionless, looking up at Jing Ge, his eyes full of admiration.

His wound was not as hideous as Jing Ge, but in the chest, a thumb-sized hole, trickling blood flowing like spring water, converged into a stream along the armor at his feet, and flowed into a small depression, forming a small hole. Blood puddles.

The helmet of Shimin's battle armor opened, he vomited a mouthful of blood, his face was wilted, and the process of the battle flashed in his mind.

His wound was small, but his heart was pierced by a fighting thorn, and he lost his fighting power.

"Lost."

Motivated the broken armor to slowly lift into the air, the moment Jing Ge appeared in the sky, an exclamation erupted in the field.

Huh huh...

A dozen figures flew out of the guard group of the White Star Civilization, and walked towards the place where the two had fought just now. Upon seeing this, the guards left the team one after another, arrived at Jing Ge's side, surrounded him round and round, and protected him in the center.

When the **** of the White Star Civilization escorted the unconscious Lion Min to fly up, the scene became deadly and his eyes fell on Chen Mo.

"Uncle Lion, is he okay?" Hu Bing stepped forward and looked at the blood-stained Lion Min with solemn expression.

"Madam, Lord Shimin's heart was pierced. There is no life-threatening, and he can recover soon." A subordinate asked the guards to send the medical machine over and began to treat Shimin.

Hearing that Shi Ming was okay, Hu Bingxin secretly breathed a sigh of relief and looked up in Chen Mo's direction.

Now the smell of gunpowder has become strong.

The two god-level civilizations were defeated in their hands, plus the Thor civilization at the beginning, defeating the strongest of the three god-level civilizations.

In this battle, Chen Mo became famous.

The fierceness of the battle just now was beyond imagination, and the strongest of the White Star civilization just lost.

Are Chen Mo's subordinates so strong?

No wonder Chen Mo dared to agree to face the gambling battle of the three god-level civilizations, not looking for a step early, but having the confidence of the strongest.

The onlookers no longer dared to taunt.

Put them in the position of Chen Mo, they don't even have the qualifications to look at others.

After winning two games in a row, the haze of defeat at the beginning was wiped out. All the guards on this side were happy, and morale rose unprecedentedly.

At this moment, the faint voice spread on the public channel.

"I didn't expect you to reach this point."

Tongqing stepped forward, and the aura spread instantly, causing the black pupil civilization side to be shocked. Every guard was excited and stared at his back with respect.

For the other onlookers, there was a pin on the head of the heart.

Excited shouts are endless.

In this regard, Chen Mo was unmoved and slowly stepped forward.

He and Tong Qing looked at each other, the wind was light and the clouds were calm.

The atmosphere at the scene seemed to freeze, and the atmosphere was extremely suppressed, making the onlookers sighed and dared not Panasonic.

The armor was painted in black, and the pupils of his eyes were a little weird. He was standing empty, and his whole body exuded an aura. It seemed that the world was going to be centered on him. This was Tongqing.

One of the most well-deserved people at present, the object of countless lives worship and awe.

He and Chen Mo looked at each other calmly, but did not seem to put Chen Mo in their eyes.

"Giving up, maybe it's good for you." Tong Qing said lightly, with a hint of command in his voice.

"You really value yourself." Chen Mo responded coldly.

The two sides are fighting for momentum, this kind of scene that the whole universe pays attention to, it is impossible for Chen Mo to let Tongqing have the upper hand. As Zhao Min said, when necessary, they need to fight.

Even if it is a fight.

hiss!

Onlookers heard the two extremely plain conversations in the public channel and couldn't help taking a breath.

"Does he look down on Tong Qing?"

"Is he crazy?"

"For the sake of face, ask for hardships and be extremely arrogant."

"This kind of grandstander is also worthy of being Hitomi's opponent? A joke."

"..."

Some lives screamed, angrily.

"Looking for death." Chen Mo was unmoved by the curse, but Shenwei couldn't help it, and Ku Yao shot a shot into the sky.

At this moment, the faces of all onlookers changed drastically.

boom!

The anti-matter bomb exploded high in the sky, erupting a huge fire ball, shining light across the entire Star Stele Forest, and a huge wave of air surged down, stirring up gusts in the Star Stele Forest.

At this moment, all the officers of the Planetary Security Agency were extremely nervous with their anti-matter muzzles facing the guards.

"Stop it." Gailuo shouted, and looked at Kuyao: "What do you mean? He said he didn't use anti-matter bombs."

Kuyao ignored Gailuo, scanned a circle among the onlookers, and snorted. All the guards equipped with anti-matter bombs pointed their guns at the crowd.

"If you have the ability, come out and fight. Don't be incompetent and bark in a rage. If you have a bad mouth, I don't mind shooting a circle in the crowd with a bad mouth. The **** king has a good temper, and we have a bad temper. The person who insults the **** king will die."

Although he hasn't fully recovered from his injury, his mouth is full of breath.

"Kill." All the guards shouted.

Kill chickens infinitely.

For a time, countless onlookers held their breath on their necks.

They could feel Ku Yao's murderous aura, this guy really dared to shoot, and a round of blasting exploded, the Tianxing stele forest would definitely turn to ashes, maybe the entire Mu's Tianxing would be destroyed.

"Everyone shut up." Gai Luo yelled coldly.

Gai Luo's expression was ugly, but he did not dare to let the policemen shoot. Once they were irritated, he could not guarantee that these fanatical guards would really destroy Mu's Sky Star.

The atmosphere was extremely suppressed, and the onlookers were suffocating in their hearts, extremely angry.

"What about scolding? It's a person who doesn't live or die."

A consistent voice appeared on the public channel, and all beings looked at the beings who spoke.

Mo Nu took a step calmly and disappeared in the same place, reappearing in the same place within two seconds. Looking at the life just now, a blood hole appeared from the brain to the forehead, and the body was still twitching, falling from the air.

And the fighting thorn in Mo Nuo's hand, the blood has not yet dried.

The life on the court just about to speak, like a drake with his neck strangled, is extremely uncomfortable.

"If you talk nonsense again, don't need them to do it, I will kill you first." Gai Luo was also annoyed by this group of onlookers who didn't think it was a big deal. Other people's guns could destroy the world, and they need to find excitement.

"bring it on."

Tong Qing turned a blind eye to what had just happened, hummed coldly, broke the calm, and disappeared in place.

chapters.title: Chapter 1006: : You Are A Good Opponent
chapters.body:
Chapter 1006: : You Are A Good Opponent

Chen Mo's pupils shrank, not afraid.

He was also the strongest now, and he didn't have any timidity towards Tong Qing. He was curious about how strong this being known as the strongest being in the universe was.

Chen Mo was in midair, bending his legs as if he was flat on the ground, and kicked, the engine of the battle armor's legs exploded and his figure flew out.

Between static and dynamic, the time is extremely short, accompanied by sonic boom, giving people a strong visual shock.

Chen Mo in extreme speed, his body arched again and entered a super state.

"drink."

The long spear in his hand lit up, and the blue gloomy light spread out on the tip of the spear, as if it could distort the space, wafting layers of twisted water vapor.

The indomitable momentum.

The gun shadow dragged its long tail, like a dragon, with the end buzzing, seemingly excited.

His pupils shrank sharply, and he snorted, with appreciation: "Yes."

He raised the sword in his hand and waved it.

Hiss...

The shrill sound spread, making people shudder.

The attention of onlookers is unconsciously attracted.

Before the two touched, the long sword in Tongqing's hand was retracted, and his side kicked, the engine exploded and disappeared in place, followed by two explosions.

The top combat skills, the ‘V’ folds, and in the blink of an eye, the pupil appears behind Chen Mo, and the sword is cut down. Chen Mo didn't react slowly, forcibly twisting his body to dodge.

Slashing defeated, Tong Qing's body turned around in the air with his left leg as the center, his waist twisted, and his right leg was whip-shaped, sweeping across Chen Mo's abdomen in a sweeping force.

boom!

Chen Mo shot and fell like a bullet, smashing the map monument below, arousing a cloud of smoke and dust, and shouting constantly.

One shot is full force, which is very visually shocking.

There was no movement in the smoke and dust underground, and onlookers craned their necks, hoping to see the situation clearly.

After another while, when everyone thought it was over, the exclamation broke out.

Chen Mo didn't know when he appeared on Tongqing's side, the long spear in his hand flashed with a blue light, piercing his waist.

Teleport?

Four words flashed in the onlookers' minds. They couldn't see how Chen Mo appeared next to Tong Qing, only special abilities moved instantaneously.

Tongqing's expression moved slightly, and his body flickered, avoiding the tip of the gun. The castration remained unabated, Chen Mo twisted and kicked Tongqing's waist. The moment his leg approached Tongqing, the engine exploded, impacting Tongqing's waist with explosive energy, and Chen Mo's body flew in the opposite direction.

Before Tong Qing could stand still, Chen Mo's body disappeared again and appeared behind Tong Qing.

At the moment when the tip of the gun was close to Tongqing, Tongqing's back seemed to grow eyes, suddenly turning, the long sword in his hand was cut towards Chen Mo's neck.

The engine on Chen Mo's shoulders swiftly moved, his body fell like a tumbler, and the long sword slashed across his head.

The battle in the air provoked bursts of exclamation.

Emperor Wu and the others were all dignified. Judging from the current situation, the two sides are not in the wind. Tongqing displayed the top combat skills of the smooth and flowing water, which is dazzling, and the methods shown by Chen Mo are also unexpected.

The battle of the strong at this stage, winning or losing is only a moment.

If the details are not dealt with properly in the battle, then it will definitely lose.

The fighting skills of the two sides are essentially different.

The style of the two is also obvious.

Hitomi is completely a powerful combat technique and perfect handling of combat details. He has both offensive and defensive capabilities. He moves smoothly, calmly, and a pure skill. And Chen Mo is the representative of special ability assistance, his instant mobility ability is unexpected, making up for his weakness in technique and detail.

Onlookers only now discovered that Chen Mo was not as weak as they thought, and his abilities even exceeded their imagination.

The mocker just now has shut up, and dare not speak again.

They are not qualified to speak, and in this scenario, they are even cut off after three rounds.

Chen Mo's attention at the moment was unprecedentedly concentrated, and his superstate was at its extreme. His mind was clear, and any details of his movements were formed in his mind. He could even feel everything in front of and behind him.

This is the strongest of the universe!

Chen Mo's calm eyes were full of fighting spirit.

He straightened his right hand, and the engines of his hands and legs moved in the opposite direction, as if grabbing an invisible horizontal bar in the air, turning around in the air, kicking his feet on Tongqing's elbows.

Air combat is different from ground combat, but has similarities with space combat. As long as the opponent's weaknesses are discovered, all eight quadrants can attack, but the planet's gravity affects the two combat states.

Tong Qing did not expect Chen Mo to make this move, and the expression under the armor was slightly surprised.

boom!

The sound exploded, and the two sides quickly separated and stopped in the air.

"You are a good opponent." Tong Qing's voice was calm, not fluctuating because of Chen Mo's strength.

"You are not bad."

"After Dan, I haven't felt this way for a long time."

Hitomi Qingsong loosened his neck, arched his legs and body, showing a rare offensive posture.

boom!

...

Yang Siqingyue sat in the strategic meeting room, staring blankly at the battle in the holographic projection.

This battle is a live broadcast of the battle over the Tianxing Monument Forest. The entire universe is paying attention, and as Chen Mo's base camp, it is impossible for them not to care about it here.

All the high-levels in the headquarters gathered in the strategic meeting room and watched the battle progress.

"I didn't expect the boss to be so strong." Yang Siqingyue said.

Many of them nodded silently.

They knew that the boss was not weak and would train with Jing Ge, but he rarely shot. They never thought that their boss would actually be able to fight against a figure like Tong Qing who is famous for his force without falling behind.

Wushuang sister and brother looked at his father with admiring eyes.

"There are still many things you didn't expect." Lan squinted her eyes and tapped her fingers on the table.

"Now the main galaxy of Mu's Sky Star is closed, should we send troops to support it?" Zhu He asked.

"No, the Mu family is closed. In order to prevent the main star of the Mu family from being destroyed in the war, the Mu family urgently activated their blockade privileges. There is the most valuable civilization property of the universe civilization. Although it is destroyed, it can be rebuilt. But the meaning is different," Lan said.

"Once the blockade is unlocked?"

"Don't worry, the boss can't die. Madam is calmer than me." Lan said.

Everyone looked at Xiao Yu and found that Xiao Yu was indeed worried, but he realized that he was very calm and seemed not afraid to worry about the boss.

Chen Mo and Mo Nu have quantum bodies, and Xiao Yu is not worried about their safety: "I'm worried about Sister Zhao Min. If the fight is fully launched, Sister Zhao Min has the lowest force value and is easily affected."

"Mom, you just came back soon, don't you use the same method to send Aunt Min back?" asked quietly and anonymously.

"It can be sent back, but the space is blocked. It will take time. Your Aunt Mo is not comfortable with that kind of space ability. The situation there now has no time at all, and they will not watch Mo Girl tear away the space and escape. "Xiao Yu explained.

This is the answer Mo Nu gave her.

Now I can only wait here anxiously.

Suddenly, an exclamation broke out in the conference room.

...

"Is this the leader of the marching ant group? So strong." Ming Ah was shocked when he saw the battle in the screen.

A strong person may not explain the problem, but there is more than one opponent.

He is a general star, and what he sees is deeper than ordinary life.

The quality of the Shenwei is unique, and he can guarantee that choosing 800 soldiers from his warhead may not be better than the Shenwei.

You know, the warhead of Ming A is the most elite warhead in the civilization civilization.

The situation of the Shenwei shows that there is a general star in the marching ant group, and the training is not weaker than him, so that such a perfect soldier can be trained.

If so, then the marching ant group may be more terrifying than he thought.

Thinking of Mingyue's tragic death under the hands of the marching ant group, Ming'a's face fell. The Hongqiao of the Sloan Great Wall has been attacking, but in vain, such a strong opponent, I am afraid that he wants revenge, and the difficulty is not low.

Suddenly, a voice interrupted the hatred in his eyes.

"Master Ming, the patriarch would like to please."

chapters.title: Chapter 1007: : Hitomi'S Ability
chapters.body:
Chapter 1007: : Hitomi'S Ability

The collision in the sky resembled Hong Zhong Dalu, as if echoing in the hearts of the onlookers, every sound was trembling, making the scalp numb.

They stared at the battlefield in the air, the atmosphere did not dare to breathe, time seemed to stop.

Chen Mo and Tong Qing are entangled together, their movements are so fast that they can hardly be separated by the naked eye.

Hitomi takes the initiative, showing a rare offensive posture, like a violent storm, stirring up stormy waves. For a time, the pupil Qing in the sky faintly had the upper hand.

It's been a long time since I saw Tong Qing make a move, maybe he had fought Dan on Shi Ganxing, but the outside world didn't know the specific situation.

Snapped! Sputtering sparks appeared on the two weapons. The moment the two weapons collided, they broke instantly and the short pulse laser was extinguished. Immediately afterwards, the two flew upside down at the same time and stopped in the air.

Chen Mo raised his head and saw the battle armor on his body. Fighting stabs appeared on the elbows, knees, shoulders and fists. The shape was similar to Jing Ge's just now. The black and red painted battle armor floated in the air, looking like a **** of war. Come to the world.

At the same time, a sharp look flashed in Tong Qing's eyes.

Raising his right hand, a sharp edge appeared in his hand.

The two have the same momentum, like the confrontation between two gods of war, becoming the focus of heaven and earth.

Under the Star Stele Forest, no onlookers dared to speak out.

Every audience has a shock on their faces, and their minds are echoing the scenes of the two fighting. The masters on the field became calm, re-examining Chen Mo's strength, between offense and defense, seemingly relaxed, but crisis-ridden.

The momentum is invisible.

The two moved at the same time, just like two wild beasts, they were hitting each other at an extremely fast speed.

In just an instant, both flew again.

Once up and down, Tongqing's battle armor fell toward the Star Stele Forest, smashing dozens of steles and leaving long traces on the ground.

Hitomi turned over in the air, his legs bent, and when the engine exploded, he kicked and flew downwards like a bullet.

The shocking scene stirred the hearts of every onlooker.

The collision sound appeared under the Star Stele Forest, and the aroused smoke covered the battlefield of the two. Onlookers could only rely on radar detection to restore the scene inside.

The forest of steles continued to fall, and the range of smoke and dust continued to expand.

The turbulent smoke and the sound of collision are intense in the depiction.

Not long after, the two figures flew out of the inside again, with their long tails, and when they stopped in the air, they rushed towards each other again, without any intention of stopping.

Looking back at this time, Chen Mo's battle armor had some scratches and blood stains on his shoulders, but the wounds of the battle armor had long been repaired by the nano robot.

Tong Qing squinted his eyes and kept making new judgments on Chen Mo.

He was extremely surprised.

He stabbed Chen Mo three times a moment ago. After Chen Mo's wound was only flashing with blue light, it was as if there was nothing wrong with him, and the armor was filled by the nano robot.

This situation happened to Mo Nu just now.

It is immortal again.

Just now Mo Nuo used the method of dying of the same to yin Zi Yun, and he could see clearly.

Life with a high-stage immortal body can truly defeat them by destroying the opponent's brain, separating their heads, or destroying the energy furnace of the opponent's battle armor.

Since becoming the Xeon, he has not had many opportunities to do it. The last time he did it, he played against Dan in Shi Ganxing. The strongest belongs to the top group in the universe. There are not many lives that dare to fight with him, and he does not need to fight in ordinary battles.

Although he doesn't do it often, his training never relaxes.

Teleportation, immortality, and the ability to escape into nothingness.

He is also a special multi-ability person.

Chen Mo's weirdness made him feel a little pressure, and also raised his great interest.

Why are Chen Mo and his assistants all multi-abilities? The abilities are still so special?

Is it his superpower development technology? still is……

The secret of Mu Shi Tianxing?

He was uncertain.

If it is caused by the super power development technology that Chen Mo has mastered, it means that the other party's super power development technology has reached a very advanced stage, and it is advanced by all civilizations in the universe.

And what if it is the secret of Mu's Tianxing suicide note?

This thought flashed through Tong Qing's mind, and an imperceptible look burst into his eyes.

The secret of life in the fourth dimension?

Thinking of this, Tongqing's eyes narrowed and her aura became cold and harsh. He must win the Tianxing suicide note, and he must also win this battle. Now that Chen Mo has an immortal body, if he wants to win, it means that he has to choose the means to deal with Chen Mo again.

...

The pupil was green and calm, but Chen Mo was embarrassed a lot.

The three blades in his body just pierced into the body. If it wasn't for a special body, he would definitely be seriously injured. Now the armor is covered with dust, the paint is broken, and it doesn't look good.

However, it also stimulated his desire for victory and defeat. Under the agitation of his consciousness, a faint blue light appeared in his body, beating irregularly in his body, endlessly.

"I have only seen a life with so many special abilities in my life, is it the secret of Tian Xing's suicide note?" Tong Qing's voice was full of admiration and questions.

In this regard, Chen Mo did not answer him.

Tong Qing looked surprised, but was digging a hole for him.

When the onlookers heard these words, their eyes burst into inexplicable expressions.

Chen Mo and Mo Nu have special abilities, which was just shown.

Why are only Chen Mo and Mo Girl special?

When Tong Qing reminded them, they had to be suspicious, because only Chen Mo and Mo Nu had seen the secret left by Mu's Sky Star. That being said, there is a reason why Chen Mo is so strong in guarding the secret of Tian Xing's suicide note.

He wants to swallow the secret inside?

Just one or two sentences made him suspicious of the civilization of the universe. This being able to stand in this position is indeed not simple.

Chen Mo looked directly at Tongqing: "Guess?"

To Chen Mo's answer, Hitomi smiled, and did not choose to attack, staring at him, and said: "If you run out of means, you still can't beat me. It is good for everyone to admit defeat and hand over Tianxing's suicide note."

Tong Qing had the upper hand and did not give Chen Mo a chance in psychological warfare.

He faintly perceives that Chen Mo's specialization is likely to be related to the fourth-dimensional life [biquga.vip], but he can feel that Chen Mo has not been thoroughly familiar with his abilities.

The secret of life in the fourth dimension.

This secret made Tong Qing's heart hot.

Only by winning this secret, he can evolve to a higher dimensional life, and his life and strength will be improved. Now he can't wait to know the contents of Tian Xing's suicide note.

"If the first person only defeats the opponent by lip service, then this first person is nothing more than that."

A slightly mocking voice spread on the public channel, making the life heard secretly speechless.

"Haha, it seems that we must be serious." Tong Qing's eyes were slightly cold, and he smiled, his body tensed, and an inexplicable momentum spread.

The onlookers remained unchanged.

I saw the pupil green in the sky, his body began to rise, and the armor also changed with his body. If you can see the body under the battle armor, you can definitely see the magic marks of his body's eyes, which are flowing fast, like the eyes of a demon god, opening and awakening in the dark.

The black pupil civilization has a powerful body, which is comparable to the thunder body of the Thor civilization in addition to the meditation civilization.

The most powerful life in the history of the Black Eye civilization is just a body, capable of withstanding sub-light bursts and smashing planets.

In addition, the blue pupils of the pupils contained black gloomy light, which was true, it was black gloomy light.

The eyes of the black pupil civilization are the most special eye pupils in the universe and the origin of the black pupil civilization. Duplicating actions, piercing people's hearts, fascinating, all kinds of abilities, so that the life of the black pupil civilization awakening ability has unparalleled strength.

And Tong Qing is one of the best.

In Chen Mo's eyes, he seemed to be able to feel this giant beast rising instantly.

chapters.title: Chapter 1008: : The Terrifying Energy In Chen Mo
chapters.body:
Chapter 1008: : The Terrifying Energy In Chen Mo

I haven't felt this way for a long time.

Since becoming famous, he has few opportunities to do something, and there are few lives that can make him truly serious. Dan is one, and he died in Shi Ganxing. Now Chen Mo is the second.

Long-lost power is released.

Chen Mo gave him a stronger feeling than Dan.

The black-painted battle armor, the eye pupil magic pattern is very strange, like the gaze of an abyss behemoth. The moment the body was shaped, Tongqing let out a long roar, turned into an afterimage, and disappeared into the air.

With a move, all the power in Tong Qing's body was restrained and released.

His pupils were covered with black light, and his body became tough and tough, and the colored pupil lines on his skin, the light flowing, were extremely mysterious.

Appeared in front of Chen Mo instantly.

A powerful aura rushed towards him, with an invincible aura, breaking through the speed of sound. When he appeared, the sonic boom had not yet spread.

Fists raised, and the long blade in his hand shone with gloom. In a blink of an eye, the endless momentum turned into murderous aura, like an abyss behemoth opened its mouth, vowing to swallow it down.

The pupil is full of firepower, it is hard to see outside.

Such a fierce side is quite different from his image of relative affinity to the outside world, and it is shocking.

Every movement of his surpasses the speed of sound, seeing the shape first, and then hearing the sound, like thunderstorms in the storm.

Any punch, as long as it is hit, has a huge impact, and his hand has a long blade with a short pulse laser that can penetrate the body.

In a master fight, if there is any negligence, the winner can be determined in an instant, and life and death can be determined.

Chen Mo's calm eyes contained a little caution, but he did not panic. It seemed that everything in front of him was within his expectation.

The body is constantly twisting, and the hands and legs are linked to react, dodge and resist. His movements are very fast, with a sense of beauty in the fast, every movement is very natural, and there is no panic.

As Chen Mo calmed down, his attention was concentrated as never before, and his eyes were slower when his pupils were fast to the extreme.

The atmosphere became deadly silent, only the sound of high-altitude fighting and collisions, and the life below opened his mouth, unable to describe the shock of his heart.

"You are very good." Tongqing's temperatureless black pupil flickered slightly, with shock.

Chen Mo's speed is not inferior to him.

At his stage, the top powerhouses with extraordinary insights and eyes can be compared, and they have a general judgment of the opponent's strength with the actions shown in only one round.

But Chen Mo felt different to him.

Like a bottomless pit, strong when it is strong, never know where his limit is.

Hitomi's natural way is powerful, and he is also on guard when attacking.

Chen Mo's abilities are very strange, the body is the same, there is no limit, the limbs are linked, the movements are different but accurate, like individuals with independent thinking consciousness.

He felt like he was fighting two people, or even four people.

This strange situation prevented him from seeing Chen Mo's details.

He is growing!

This absurd idea emerged in Tong Qing's mind.

Recalling the process from the moment he fought with Chen Mo to the present, he seemed to see Chen Mo from a small raft that was awkward in the storm to a giant ship riding the wind and waves.

Real growth.

He couldn't imagine that a life could grow so big in such a short time.

Suddenly, Tong Qing felt a sense of danger emerging from behind, Chen Mo's body disappeared in front of his eyes, teleporting behind him, and the fighting thorn of the battle armor was coming to his heart.

"Humph." Tong Qing snorted coldly, his body twisted and his legs swept against Chen Mo's waist.

In just an instant, Chen Mo flew away, disappeared and appeared behind him again. When Tong Qing's new power was not achieved, his legs were swept off, and he responded with a whip.

Mutual exchange.

The sky becomes the center of the storm.

Wow!

The sound of the celestial map stele breaking and breaking from time to time sounded, and the stele forest became a mess. Every once in a while, a deep impact crater appeared, as if a meteorite rain fell and was devastated. Smoke and dust emerged, accompanied by horrible crashes, each beating in my heart.

Tongqing's face was solemn, but his movements were not slow.

He never underestimated Chen Mo, but he did not expect to underestimate it.

The battle armor was scarred, but it did not affect him. The initiative to attack is still in his hands. Raindrop attacks constantly test the limits of Chen Mo's defense. Each punch is accompanied by a sonic boom, arousing fog, and the storm condenses. .

very scary.

This is the inner activity of all onlookers.

Fighting of this intensity surpassed their image.

Even Thunder, who has been chasing Tongqing, saw this situation, and the corners of his mouth were bitter.

In this state, he could not hold on for that long.

The super state activated by special abilities is particularly serious for mental consumption. After use, fatigue will appear. This is also the reason why super powers are only used as assistance.

In the case of long-term battles, battle armor is the mainstream, super powers to maintain the battle, and the spirit can not be consumed.

But now, two enchanting beings have fought such a terrifying battle here.

This kind of scene is not lost to the famous battles in history.

Emperor Wu looked up at the battlefield in the air, and he finally understood why at the opening ceremony, the god-level civilization invited Chen Mo to go up, not to mention the power behind it, they sighed at their inferior strength.

This is the battle between the strongest.

...

Chen Mo is in a strange state.

The various molecules in his body are beating, appearing and disappearing, very regular, as if the quantum in his body is breathing.

At the same time, a steady stream of energy is derived.

Consciousness is spread all over his body, and he can even see every quantum that makes up the body beating in entanglement, and at the same time distracted to cope with the blue eyes.

Consciousness is the fourth dimension of matter.

This sentence flashed in Chen Mo's mind, he was in a very strange state.

He saw every atom outside the body, the atoms of the armor material, and the atoms in the surrounding atmosphere, as if cheering, as if as long as he had a command, everything around him would obey his command.

He is like the lord of everything.

In his body, the energy is becoming infinitely large, and it is produced out of thin air. With the change of consciousness, the energy of the consciousness will be as large as the imagination, which is more powerful than the energy of the universe.

Chen Mo has a feeling that he can easily destroy the entire planet.

It is a pity that he still has no way to control this kind of energy generated out of thin air.

However, part of it can be mobilized. It only needs to slowly try to mobilize more energy in the future.

Chen Mo tried to stir the molecules of the surrounding atmosphere with his consciousness.

Around him, a small whirlwind began to blow, which was not obvious from the beginning, and then became bigger and bigger. Above the Star Stele Forest, the wind is surging.

Hitomi noticed the special changes around her body, and her expression was extremely solemn.

Intuition tells him that this kind of change is absolutely extraordinary, and Chen Mo gives him a sense of depression and danger. This sense of danger is very clear and there is absolutely nothing wrong with it.

Suddenly, an alarm sounded, making Tongqing suddenly change color.

The battle armor’s radar showed that Chen Mo’s energy exceeded the standard, beyond the range of battle armor detection, which meant that the opponent could destroy the planet or even the galaxy at any time.

Is this the energy a life should have?

In just an instant, the energy response disappeared, and the alert of the battle armor returned to normal, as if nothing had happened just now.

"what happened?"

Not only Tongqing, but the other beings on the field have the same questions.

Is Chen Mo's terror energy reaction that only appeared instantaneously, is it fake? Or are their armors broken?

The failure of a battle armor radar is understandable, but the strength of all battle armor radars is obviously impossible.

Moreover, the changing wind and clouds over the Tianxing Stele Forest, as well as the swirling atmosphere, are absolutely true. They have special abilities to influence such changes.

"It's abnormal."

Zidi was standing in the air, looking up at Chen Mo's figure. With just one sentence, he recovered his calm and calmly watched the battle on the spot. As for the Tianxing suicide note in his hand, he seemed not interested in reading it.

"Does he have an energy compression weapon?" Hu Bingxin looked at Shi Min beside him in doubt.

Thunder's expression changed drastically. He knew that it was not an illusion or a machine malfunction, but a real existence. The energy signal just now was the signal from Chen Mo's body.

This kind of signal cannot be faked, because when the life of the Thor civilization uses the thunder body, the energy of the body will also increase sharply, just like the signal sent by Chen Mo just now.

It's just that their thunder body compares with the energy response of Chen Mo's body just now, a dust in the universe.

Zi Yun's body trembled. At that moment, she stimulated her ability to control her mind. When she wanted to see what happened, it was as terrifying as she was strangling her throat by the **** of death. An invisible hand strangling her consciousness, she felt that she was facing an extremely huge The gaze of a terrifying life.

"Fortunately, the teacher told us not to be an enemy of him."

Shuiling had heart palpitations.

They have the ability of a prophet, and their perception at that moment is clearest. When the kind of energy signal in Chen Mo appeared, she could predict several results in her mind, and they disappeared in a flash, and finally the palpitations were stopped, and it was all right.

The entire planet was almost destroyed.

Frightened her into a cold sweat.

Suddenly, a suspicious murmur appeared on the public channel of the universe: "Is the energy in his body related to the fourth-dimensional life?"

chapters.title: Chapter 1009: : The Rule Of The Fourth Dimension: Energy Is Not Conserved?
chapters.body:
Chapter 1009: : The Rule Of The Fourth Dimension: Energy Is Not Conserved?

The sound is not loud, but it appears like thunder on the ground, and the words of shocking dreams.

The fourth dimension of life.

Except for this unknown life, they couldn't think of other reasons that gave a life such a huge amount of energy.

"impossible."

"Nothing is impossible, his power is too weird, so many special abilities, which have never appeared in the history of cosmic civilization."

"The law of conservation of energy, even if every atom is exploded and annihilated, it is impossible to have as much energy as the radar just showed."

"You use the conservation of energy to explain the superpower to me?"

"The rules of the fourth dimension do not necessarily follow the physical rules of our existing universe system."

The discussion appeared, and some physics researchers were very interested in it. They wished to catch Chen Mo to study it, but unfortunately they dare not go there now.

However, the speculation about that mysterious energy has not stopped.

"Is it really related to the fourth-dimensional life?" Hu Bing's eyes flickered, falling on the book in Zidi's hands.

Is it really that book that allowed Chen Mo to touch the secret of life in the fourth dimension?

Hu Bingxin hesitated, then looked at Chen Mo in the battle.

Ordinary beings are watching the battle between Chen Mo and Tongqing. The lives of top civilizations and god-level civilizations are focused on the book in the hands of Zidi. But no life dared to grab something, grab something in the hands of Zidi, unless it is fatal.

Chen Mo and Tong Qing's fierce duel, far beyond the height of the previous few games, changed rapidly. In the battle armor they only saw, they had never seen such a picture.

Even so, they still feel that both sides have not reached the limit.

Chen Mo's mystery and pupils are strong, forming a sharp contrast in mid-air, and the demeanor of the strongest is vividly displayed in the sky above the Star Stele Forest. All the excitement and shock finally turned into a yearning wonder.

Tong Qing's aura was rising, like a wild beast, with a majestic atmosphere, trying to overthrow the entire Tianxing Stele Forest.

Chen Mo's body seemed to be stimulated. Every quantum was beating like a blazing firework, and a steady stream of power was generated out of thin air, converging into threads, and permeating every corner of his body.

One fierce and brave, one strange and mysterious, one relaxing, moving and static, the collision between the two sides is like the overturning of ice water and magma, boiling fiercely.

The battlefield has expanded tenfold unconsciously, and the Star Stele Forest, which has endured hundreds of millions of years of wind and rain, is as fragile as tofu between their collisions, and there are broken walls and ruins everywhere.

Chen Mo was temporarily suppressed. He didn't know how many times he had been injured, how many times he had been cut open by Tongqing's sharp blade, and every time he was injured, his body recovered instantly, and his armor was repaired under the nanorobot.

However, as the battle continued, Chen Mo was injured less and less, but Tongqing's armor began to appear scars, and the originally suppressed balance began to be moved.

The resilience of the quantum physical horror is fully demonstrated at this moment. As Chen Mo's consciousness becomes stronger, he feels that the strength of his body is getting stronger.

It is climbing almost at a speed that can be felt.

When the control of consciousness becomes stronger, his body will naturally generate a kind of energy, which fills every corner.

If they could see Chen Mo's body clearly at this moment, they would be surprised to find that every quantum is like a boiling ball, and every beating will be accompanied by unknown energy derived from nothingness.

This kind of energy is produced out of thin air, coming from the beating void of consciousness, as if it does not belong to the energy of this universe.

Perceiving the source of power in his body, Chen Mo immediately condensed his consciousness, suppressed all doubts, carefully experienced this ever-increasing energy, and then controlled it.

Maybe you can take the initiative to open its floodgates.

With a move of Chen Mo's heart, all the beating quanta in the body seemed to pause for an instant, and in the next instant, they disappeared and reappeared, deriving energy several times higher than before.

It works.

Perceiving the higher energy, Chen Mo was overjoyed. The greater the derived power, the greater the power he can control and the faster his speed. This is what he wants most.

By constantly opening the gates in this way, he can control the majestic and endless energy in his body like the sea of stars.

The opportunity is here.

At the moment the energy exploded in his body, Chen Mo could obviously feel that the speed of the pupil green slowed down. It's not that Tongqing has slowed down, but he has become faster. The suppressed battle caused him to backhand in an instant, and began to pull back the suppressed point of weakness again.

The method of controlling energy in the body discovered at this time is no different to Chen Mo.

Carefully controlling and letting go of the energy inside the body, Chen Mo was multi-tasking, but he was comfortable. But because he just touched the threshold to control the energy in his body, his consciousness was cautious in the process of amplifying the energy.

As long as this situation persists, his suppressed balance will recover little by little. At this time, he can't let go of the restraints, otherwise he will only mess up his position.

His body also breathed flickeringly with the blue faint light, and every ‘breath’ was accompanied by the release of energy.

The fighting between the two sides became more intense, but Chen Mo did not have a sense of difficulty. With the continuous adaptation of Chen Mo's body, these energies quickly became docile and controllable, allowing them to be suppressed and spread freely in the body.

The coverage of the battle armor made it impossible for outsiders to notice the changes in Chen Mo's body, and the energy growth was also unknowingly. Compared with the fierce battle and the terrifying energy that had not been controlled just now, this change was also insignificant.

The attention of the onlookers was all attracted by the nearly tragic battle between Chen Mo and Tong Qing.

But one person is very clear about Chen Mo's changes.

The strength and speed of Tong Qing showed up to a high level. However, Chen Mo was always able to follow him slowly. Although not as fast as him, it seemed like a stream of water, endless.

The continuous energy seems to be rooted in Chen Mo, growing wildly.

That kind of feeling made her unable to see the end of Chen Mo's strength and speed, the kind of gaze that couldn't detect the abyss.

This kind of opponent is terrible.

What caused the continuous energy in Chen Mo's body to be on the field out of thin air?

His eyes were full of shock and solemnity.

A mysterious phenomenon that completely violates the existing physical basic system.

Even if it is superpower, it is maintained by its own consciousness and will and body energy, but Chen Mo's situation is unreasonable.

If he hadn't seen it in person, he would never believe that this happened.

The energy generated out of thin air, this energy seems to come from the void, and then flows into Chen Mo's body to release it, making him like a spring in the air, with a steady stream of water coming from nowhere, incredible.

Is this really related to the fourth dimension of life?

This thought flashed through Hitomi's mind and became an affirmative sentence.

Only the unknown and mysterious fourth-dimensional life can appear this kind of anti-physical basic system, otherwise the explanation will not work.

He now firmly believes that Chen Mo may have touched the secret of life in the fourth dimension.

In this case, the battle is dangerous.

However, looking at the speed at which Chen Mo controls the energy, it should have been under his control not long ago. It just opened a little crack in the door, but didn't really open the door.

The height of the battlefield is getting higher and higher, from the original one hundred meters high to one thousand meters high, and then to ten thousand meters high. Now it is one hundred thousand meters high. The restraining force of the atmosphere is reduced, and the movements are fast and terrifying.

Tong Qing did not expect that one day, he would hit this point with a life who had just become famous.

After ridiculing himself, Tongqing's expression became serious, and the dark pupils were even more dim. During the battle, Tongqing's hand movements began to change.

In this case, he no longer needs to keep it.

Recalling the process of her own growth, Tong Qing's heart was surging.

In the battlefield, Tong Qing let out a soft utter, spread his five fingers, turning his fists into palms.

It should also be seen by the outside world, his hole card [Unified Field].

chapters.title: Chapter 1010: : Unified Field
chapters.body:
Chapter 1010: : Unified Field

The feeling of full strength made Chen Mo's spirits uplifted.

This feeling is very good. Although the power that I have learned to use now is a temporary holdover, it is also beneficial. To him, multitasking is not a problem.

Quantum body, this is the existence that Chen Mo didn't fully understand, like a beast dormant in a black hole, mysterious and powerful.

While dodge the attack of Hitomi Qing, he is still trying to expand the energy gate in his body.

That is a world full of infinite possibilities.

The energy produced in the emptiness of the body flows in every corner of his body. It seems that at the time of the Big Bang, the energy pulsating in the void, flowing between them, made Chen Mo's body under the blue fluorescence.

For weak beings, this is a mysterious and fatal color.

Chen Mo's mind is half exploring and controlling the quantum body, and his consciousness is filled with a steady stream of gains. At the moment he penetrated into the quantum body, he seemed to see universes exploding, growing, aging, and annihilating in front of him.

This picture shocked his consciousness.

He seemed to be an unsentimental spectator, watching all that happened.

One interest for hundreds of millions of years, but one interest.

Is this the characteristic of the fourth dimension of life? Seeing the beginning and annihilation of the universe, wandering through the past and the future, wandering between parallel universes. If Chen Mo could control this kind of magical ability now, he would be the supreme god.

It's a pity that now he only sees a little fur, and he doesn't have all the abilities to control all of them.

Under the pressure of Tong Qing, Chen Mo's potential is being stimulated.

He usually has a rare state of understanding, but now he has touched the law.

The horror of the quantum body, in addition to being immortal, has its omnipotent ability. The existence of the fourth dimension can control all matter in the time and space of the three-dimensional universe, including quantum, and can even cut off the law of causality, but Chen Mo has not yet explored the stage of the quantum body.

But even so, it should be more than enough to deal with the current situation.

...

The sharp blade in his hand was broken, the weapon was exhausted, and it was obviously impossible to break the solid armor.

Around Tongqing, the invisible electromagnetic force and universal gravitation are unified into a law.

【Unified Field】

Above the high altitude, cosmic radiation particles converged, creating a magical auroral circle in Tong Qing's body.

The aurora circle is getting bigger and bigger, stretching for hundreds of miles, wisps of aurora, unpredictable, with mysterious colors, under the beautiful appearance, there are terrible murderous intent, which makes people shudder.

The onlookers below saw such a magical aurora, their eyes were fascinated. Some onlookers forgot the horror fight above, and were full of praise for the aurora before them.

Perceiving the problem with the aurora, Zidi had a different color in his eyes and stared at the fight in the air intently. Almost at the same time, the high-altitude aurora turned faster, like a dancing ribbon, unusually beautiful.

The change in the magnetic field changes the atmospheric flow on the ground, and the agitated atmosphere triggers gusts of gales, which lift up the dust in the Star Stele Forest.

Zidi looked up at the high-altitude situation, but was extremely surprised in his heart. The ability of Tong Qing, he saw for the first time, was very special, manipulating the spatial force field to achieve the purpose of controlling matter.

"Lichang? It's surprising."

Feel the faint special force field, there is an invisible force.

Zidi perceives the changes in these special force fields, the changes are small, probably because of the distance, but they are very clear.

Unified field?

...

The moment the aurora rainbow arc formed, Chen Mo's battle armor stopped for a while. Then, his battle armor turned into an afterimage, lasing towards Hitomizu like a divine sword.

Close to Tongqing, it seemed as if he had entered a muddy swamp, with invisible force fields coming from all directions, tearing his armor.

For a moment, the battle armor speeds up quickly, like breaking free from the shackles of the force field, and the dragon goes out to sea.

Tong Qing smiled indifferently, unmoved.

The special force field did not change. As Chen Mo continued to approach, the speed of the battle armor became slower and slower.

The aurora rainbow arc is becoming dense at a speed visible to the naked eye.

In a blink of an eye, the entire sky was filled with aurora.

Chen Mo, who was planning to attack Tongqing, was stagnant at this time, and the engine failed, just like a spaceship without power, floating in the air. The nanorobot failed under the high magnetic field, and the gap in the filled armor was exposed.

Chen Mo's face under the helmet was full of surprise.

This is Hitomi's hidden special ability?

The ability to control the force field and magnetic field has been developed so powerful that the special force field he releases even affects the magnetic field and gravity of the planet.

The unified force field of magnetism and gravity.

This is the ability to control metal particles and magnetic fields. Under the armor system, this ability is almost invincible.

Hitomi can control metal particles, which means that it can control all armor made of metal.

This is the shortcoming of the existing armor.

Tong Qing smiled slightly. He admitted that Chen Mo was very strong and could force his [Unified Field] out.

But everything ends here.

...

The battle becomes an invisible confrontation.

The armor on Chen Mo's body was melting, and it was melted into a metal cocoon floating in the air, trying to trap him.

The silent battle is even more terrifying.

Suddenly, a cloud of molten metal surfaced on Chen Mo's battle armor, condensed into a sharp blade in the air, and pierced into the head of the metal cocoon.

With a murderous blade, the cold light flickered, and it pierced Chen Mo's neck at a very fast speed. If it was struck, the body and the head were separated, and the high-stage immortal body would also lose control of the body.

Chi Chi! !

The sharp blade that came from the attack had just approached the metal cocoon, just like a paper approaching a furnace, disappearing in an extremely fast annihilation, turning into fly ash.

The aurora rainbow was stirred rapidly.

Tongqing looked around subconsciously, and saw the outer aurora, all disturbed by unknown forces, forming a beautiful colorful curtain high in the sky.

The range of rainbow arc chaos continues to spread.

Tong Qing did not feel the change in the force field, but the rainbow arc itself was changing, not constrained by the magnetic field at all.

Suddenly, Chen Mo's body armor melted into an iron cocoon, cracks slowly appeared, and slowly sublimated into nothingness.

What is this ability?

Different colors appeared in the eyes of the pupils.

Chen Mo's demonstrated ability has broken his cognition time and time again. His [Unified Field] can control all metals and reach the molecular level, but the opponent is not restrained, and even turns metal particles into nothingness.

However, under the battle armor system, there is no battle armor, but an eagle without wings.

drink!

Tong Qing gave a soft sigh, and the battle armor exploded with a terrifying acceleration. Before Chen Mo could break free, he appeared beside Iron Cocoon, his legs arched and swept across Iron Cocoon's head.

The iron cocoon in the high sky flew at an incredible speed like a football, falling from high altitude, like a meteorite, smashing into the forest of star steles, leaving a **** hole, making it impossible to see the situation at the entrance of the hole.

Tong Qing looked down at Chen Mo's fall.

Just at this moment, his battle armor came with alarms.

The smile under the helmet of Hitomi Blue Battle Armor froze.

He only discovered that at the moment he acted on Chen Mo, the energy furnace of his battle armor had exploded, the engine was deformed, and the battle armor lost its power.

His pupils shrank and his heart was shocked.

What is going on here?

The battle armor fell uncontrollably, making Tong Qing's eyes uncertain. As he got closer to the ground, his falling speed became slower and slower, finally hovering above the Star Forest Forest.

This scene spread to all parts of the universe, causing an uproar.

"How did Hitomi's battle armor energy furnace and engine damage?"

"His armor engine is broken and can fly?"

"It should be related to his special ability." said a discerning life.

"Who wins now?"

"It should be Tongqing, Chen Mo's armor is integrated, and the kick that was kicked just now is not dead and seriously injured."

"..."

The discussion continued, the hole did not clear up, and the camera could not shoot clearly. The onlookers all looked towards Zidi and Mu Shizhong, hoping that they would announce the result.

Mu Shizhong also looked at Zidi, waiting for his words.

In this battle, the referee is Zidi.

"The outcome is undivided, don't worry." Zidi said lightly.

When the words were over, a ray of blue light floated at the hole where Chen Mo fell.

chapters.title: Chapter 1011: : Battle In The Age Of Super Power
chapters.body:
Chapter 1011: : Battle In The Age Of Super Power

Chen Mo slowly floated from the entrance of the cave and appeared on the ground.

The iron cocoon of the battle armor disappeared, revealing Chen Mo's true body. The blue gloom that appeared on his body was not the fluorescence flowing on the skin, but a self-luminous form.

Youguang carries a fatal temptation.

As the smoke cleared, Chen Mo just raised his head and stared at Tong Qing.

The two looked at each other up and down.

Is this his special state?

A sense of danger gasped from Tong Qing's heart, which shocked him. A sense of danger, how many years have you not experienced this sense of danger? He suddenly felt a little strange.

Suddenly, Tong Qing laughed at himself.

When, at the moment, he was actually a little scared. I was afraid that this kind of word would still appear in his dictionary. It was not mature enough.

The universe is so big that there are countless secrets hidden. Even today when civilization has developed to its extreme, there are still many unsolved mysteries. It is not surprising that Chen Mo appears in this state. He exists and he is reasonable.

But for the fourth dimension of life, his curiosity rose again.

At this moment, even Tong Qing had some desire and greed. For the first time in his life, the word envy appeared. Even if he was once a legendary strong man, or the purple emperor known as the legend, he would not envy him, but he is envied now.

He thinks that his body is almost perfect, but in front of Chen Mo's body, there is still some deficiency.

The kick of the Battle Armor just now, even a god-level life, could be kicked into serious injuries and dying. The strength of the life body is no better than the materials synthesized by top technology. This is for sure, even the god-level life, in front of the top armor materials, can not resist.

But Chen Mo recovered to this state in such a short time.
