How high is his immortality?

The secrets in Chen Mo's body can't see the end strength.

This is perfect life.

How terrible would it be to allow Chen Mo to control his body perfectly?

Tong Qing had a sense of crisis, which made him shudder.

...

The silent confrontation is even more terrifying and full of crisis.

For some reason, the onlookers swallowed their saliva, more nervous than just now.

Tong Qing was condescending, overlooking Chen Mo and said: "You can't beat me at all, give up."

"Controlling gravity and magnetism, and controlling metal particles with a force field. This is your trump card." Chen Mo's expression was unwavering, as if he was telling something unrelated to him: "I saw your fear."

Tongqing's body shook slightly and recovered as usual.

"Really?" Hitomi smiled: "You are indeed special, but you are still too weak. You can't even control your own strength, and waste a good body."

Buzzing! !

Invisible waves rippled away, and an invisible force field appeared on Tong Qing, forming a barrier on him. The ground began to vibrate, and countless stones shattered and floated up with regular lines of magnetic induction.

The surface of the star map stele also began to shrink, slowly turning into dust, and all metal particles rose.

Strips of metal particles in the air criss-cross, amidst the ruined walls, a scene of the end of the world.

Click!

Beside Chen Mo, the crushed metal blocks condensed into strips, restraining his footsteps, and then slowly spreading upward along his body, like a water snake of steel.

"Tian Xing's posthumous book belongs to the civilization of the entire universe. It is good for you and me to admit defeat." His pupils spread out with five fingers, and a series of steel walls condensed and rose around Chen Mo as if they were originally on the ground.

Chen Mo was unmoved.

"Then don't blame me."

Tongqing's five fingers grabbed, and the metal wall surrounding him instantly joined together, hooping Chen Mo in the center. The constantly emerging metal particles converge with Chen Mo as the center.

It's like an ancient and tragic funeral.

The pyramidal metal mountain is rapidly growing up, and the monument centered on Chen Mo is all shattered. Metal particles merge into the metal mountain, piled up continuously, and the scene is violent.

Ten meters!

Twenty meters!

Fifty meters!

One hundred meters!

Five hundred meters!

A 500-meter-high black metal mountain was formed, and the surrounding land was drained of metal particles and weathered into sand. Smoke and dust aroused high in the sky, and the floating metal belt, like a river, was flowing around the pupil blue.

Around him is a transparent barrier, and the space is distorted by the force field.

He was floating in the air, quietly looking at the Jinshan in front of him.

The other beings looked at this scene in horror. They didn't use technology, but only special abilities could cause such terrifying damage, which made people shudder.

Never thought that there is a life that can cause such a fight and such a wonderful battle without using armor and warships.

has it ended?

Obviously not, Zidi was floating in the air, quietly watching the battlefield.

At this moment, Tongqing's face changed suddenly.

An invisible force stirred, and his force field appeared a little disordered.

Under his gaze, strange phenomena began to appear on the outermost layer of the metal mountain.

Metal particles passed the flame like layers of thin paper, turned into fly ash, and disappeared into nothingness, but there was no open flame. One layer, two layers, the entire pyramid, is disappearing out of thin air strangely.

Chi Chi!

The speed of disappearing is getting faster and faster, and the pyramid that suppresses Chen Mo is shrinking at a speed visible to the naked eye.

And the metal particles near the pyramid are all sublimated, disappearing without even releasing energy.

Strange like this.

This scene, like a basin of cold water, fell on the head of life who wanted to celebrate Hitomi's victory.

Is this still life?

It is completely beyond their understanding of life.

Hitomi felt a clear pressure, a suffocating pressure.

Huh!

The last metal particles that wrapped Chen Mo disappeared, just as the wrapped foam suddenly burst, revealing Chen Mo's real body.

The Star Stele Forest, which was assimilated into a gray-white world by the pupils, had an unusually dazzling touch of death in the center, as if the center of the world.

At this moment, he even felt a sense of powerlessness, which could not be erased from the bottom of his heart. The lives on the periphery were full of horror. The timid body trembled when he saw this figure.

The life that sees this scene will imprint this scene in his mind until he gets old.

There was a sudden gust of wind in the court.

The sand on the ground gathered together, and a giant stone pillar with a height of 100 meters gathered in front of Chen Mo.

Still motionless, Chen Mo took a step, holding his hands on the stone pillar, as if grabbing a wooden stick, waved towards Tongqing in the air.

The stone pillars crashed into the city, breaking through the speed of sound, and the sound of howling in the air spread, and the mourning turned forever.

Boom!

Suddenly, the sky trembled.

The stone pillar was condensed in the metal cover on the side of Tongqing, and the terrifying impact sound could shake ordinary life to death.

Just when everyone thought it was over, Chen Mo on the ground suddenly backed away, pulling back the stone pillar and ramming towards Tongqing. The hundred-meter-high stone pillar surrounded by five people was like a toy in his hand.

"Flashy." Tong Qing spread his hands, and metal particles formed a sharp iron spear in front of him, piercing towards the stone pillar.

Boom!

The huge shock exploded, and Tongqing's face changed slightly, like a football hit in the air, flying upside down.

However, Chen Mo's stone pillar suddenly cracked and turned into countless stones. Stone rain fell underneath. The iron pillar controlled by Tongqing also lost control and hit the ground heavily.

Tong Qing, who was stationary in the air, was a little embarrassed.

Although this level of blow was only slightly injured, it was shameful.

The metal sand circulating in the air turned into sharp sand currents, pointed directly at Chen Mo on the ground.

The gray canopy became depressed.

Under the gaze of everyone, the sand on the ground rose up into the sky, condensed into strands, and hit the metal sand without any fancy. The two special abilities collided head-on, not giving way to each other.

There is no light and destruction of anti-matter bombs, but that kind of terrifying momentum, with the shock of manpower against the sky, makes the onlookers scalp numb.

In the age of technology, the battle of the age of superpower has been fought in the battle armor system.

Later history will call this battle the first battle of the super power era.

In the iron-colored sky curtain, the influence of the magnetic field will be affected.

The collision of metal sand and sand filled the sky with dust, like the end of a sandstorm.

Chen Mo didn't know the shock of the outside world, he was experimenting.

Yes, he was experimenting, experimenting with his own abilities. The fourth-dimensional body had infinite possibilities. He was sure that he had not developed even one billionth of this body.

After finally mastering the initial abilities, he wanted to be more proficient.

He almost felt every energy and power change in his body like crazy. No one taught him, he could only rely on himself. The quantum of his body continuously supplies the energy he needs, inexhaustible and inexhaustible.

Tong Qing's expression suddenly became calm, and his mind was in the force field controlled by him.

He drank suddenly.

laugh!

A ten-meter-high iron thorn drilled out of the ground, and as the first iron thorn appeared from the ground, like a signal, thousands suddenly emerged, turning the underground into a forest of iron thorns, even if there were giant beasts. Stabbed into a sieve again.

The iron-sand confrontation in the air did not disappear until the iron thorn flooded the place where Chen Mo was.

The battlefield fell silent again.

When everyone thought that the battle was really over, they saw Chen Mozheng standing in the air without any support under his feet.

chapters.title: Chapter 1012: : Spatial Capacity
chapters.body:
Chapter 1012: : Spatial Capacity

"My lord, the surrounding areas are all controlled and cleared." The very artificial intelligence reported Ming Tu.

They are at the exit of the Mu's Sky Star System. The Mu's Sky Star is hitting fiercely, the space is blocked, everyone inside can't get out, and all external forces can't get in.

As an external response force, he received instructions from Chen Mo when the space was just blocked, came here to respond, waited for the space blockade to be lifted, and then left.

Coming with him, there is also the fleet of gods.

The two warheads were united, and they became the strongest force in the periphery of the Mu's Celestial Galaxy.

It is natural to occupy one of the exits of the waterway.

Space jammers are all scattered, and it is impossible to attack them.

Watching the live broadcast of Mu Shi Tianxing again, Ming Tu was excited. The first time I saw the battle with super power, it was like the prelude to the super power era.

Chen Mo and Tong Qing were on a par, which surprised him. At the same time, the accident turned into fanaticism and hope.

This means that Chen Mo's strength is indeed comparable to that of a god-level civilization. Chen Mo told him that he has mastered the consciousness transfer technology. He now completely believes that as long as he returns to Chen Mo's base camp this time, he will no longer have to suffer from this cold steel body. Of bondage.

...

The iron thorns are scattered all over the middle of the Star Stele Forest, stretching for a hundred meters in a radius. They are huge, but sharp as needles. You can see the cold light flashing at the tip from far away, making people shudder.

All those who saw this scene were shocked and trembling.

Relying on his own strength to achieve such a point, Tong Qing can only be unprecedented.

Being alone in the flesh, comparable to the gods, but so.

When they saw Chen Mo floating above the spikes, they all took a breath.

If they see the scene of Hitomi, facing such an enemy, they will feel desperate. This kind of enemy is too terrible to see the bottom of the abyss at the end, and calmly respond to all attacks.

When they think that Chen Mo is the end, Chen Mo can always show incredible ability to end their fantasy.

They never thought that the battle between the two would go to this point. From the top battle armor confrontation to the most shocking super power confrontation, the former conquered life in the universe with a crazy sense of strike and combat, and the latter shocked the world with majestic terror and incredible ability.

Thunder and other masters, who thought they were close to Tong Qing, were frustrated inside.

This level of confrontation is beyond their cognition.

The fighting did not stop.

A strange sound appeared from the ground.

The spikes under Chen Mo's feet melted, turning into thumb-sized steel balls, floating in the air like stagnant raindrops and hail. Looking closer, the smooth steel ball can find the reflection.

Tong Qing squeezed his palm, and countless steel **** shot at Chen Mo like bullets, in all directions, without dead ends.

Click!

When the outside world thought that Chen Mo would pierce through the steel ball controlled by Tong Qing, Chen Mo, who had not moved, suddenly raised his hand. His movements were elegant and natural, but he had the potential to point the common people.

The steel ball approaching him at high speed suddenly stopped and hovered in the air.

Bang bang ......

The sound of the steel **** colliding constantly echoed, and for a moment, all the steel **** surged like a swarm of bees, pointing straight at the pupil.

I saw Tong's green face and cold face, with the palms hanging in front of him. All the steel **** melted like raindrops and gathered into a huge golden pillar. Under the gray sky, the smooth metal pillar was very conspicuous.

drink!

Tongqing's palm covered the golden pillar and pushed hard.

It seemed as if the ancient city collided with the pillar, descending from the sky, and the target was Chen Mo.

Bang!

The moment it hit Chen Mo, a ripple spread, and a terrifying howling sound erupted. Looking at Chen Mo, he held the metal column motionlessly in midair with one hand.

This is a confrontation of power.

The cracks began to spread in the metal column, like a spider web, until it spread all over the column, and instantly exploded.

Buzzing! The strange sound of the underground sounded again, and a violent earthquake appeared on the Tianxing Stele Forest, and the plates were shaking, affecting the entire Tianxing Stele Forest.

There is something to come out.

Seeing this scene, the spectator's first thought came out like this.

At this moment, a bottomless crack suddenly opened on the ground.

puff! A fiery red cylinder ejected from the crack, and the terrifying fireworks reflected half of the sky in red.

Magma column.

As the first magma column appeared, the second and third appeared in the cracks. Until the tenth, the flaming magma spread out on the ground and the column soared into the sky, reflecting the sky under the gray iron curtain. , As horrible as purgatory.

Part of the magma column exploded in the air, sparks gurgling down from the sky like rain.

If magma touches the body, it can melt people.

The temperature of the battlefield in the Star Forest of Steles rose rapidly, and all the spectators on the periphery retreated to the farther sky, trembling in fear.

The strength of both sides can't see the end.

They think that when the cards are out, there will always be more terrifying big moves.

In their battle armor radar, it can be clearly detected that the magnetic field of Mu's Sky Star is changing, which is affected by the super power of Tongqing. The magnetic field here is extremely strong, like a small black hole standing in the sky.

Suddenly, a magma column fell downward on the high air conditioning head. It dragged its red body like a fire dragon and swept down like a fire dragon, crashing down towards Chen Mo.

Chen Mo was still experiencing the mystery of the body, the feeling of controlling everything appeared in his consciousness.

He saw it.

It seems to be the spatial dimension of quantum beating.

He saw the shape of the space.

The space at this time is being wrapped and blocked by a few peculiar spatial fluctuations. It should be the solidification and interference of the Mu's Sky Star, which blocked this space, making the space here unable to be folded and jumped.

This should be the scene that Mo Nu saw when she used her spatial ability.

You can try to control the space, a bold idea popped up in his mind.

When the magma fire column came towards him, Chen Mo raised his hand and grasped it imaginarily, like tearing a thick silk, with difficulty.

Suddenly, a gust of wind swept across the Star Monument Forest, and the atmosphere gathered towards Chen Mo as if entering a bottomless pit. In the space in front of him, a black crack appeared, and the atmosphere rushed towards it as if it was poured into a vacuum.

Huh!

Like a piece of cloth being torn, the space in front of him split instantly.

The magma that came gurgling down towards Chen Mo was all sucked into the cracks in the space. The cracks made a weird howling sound, like a cry from an unknown space and an unwilling roar of magma, and the listener shuddered.

The magma flowed out, the cracks slowly closed in the space self-healing, making unwilling noises, and then disappeared.

Space capability?

The spectators were completely suppressed, always possessing incredible abilities, and Chen Mo overturned their understanding of God-level life abilities.

Hitomi was equally shocked, but did not show it. If someone is in his position, he will feel the pressure. Chen Mo is like a crack in the space just now, without seeing the depth.

However, this is only the beginning.

To calm down, Tongqing's face tightened.

Nine magma columns in the air, one after another, hung down towards Chen Mo.

Every pillar of fire is trapped by the momentum of thunder.

Upon seeing this, Chen Mo raised his hand and looked directly at the pillar of fire that swept over him.

Snapped! The pillar of fire hit the invisible transparent ball space, unable to get close to his body.

When the outside world thought it was over, the magma column was attached to an invisible transparent ball and gathered into a huge fireball with a diameter of tens of meters. In the next instant, the metal fragments that fell from the ground quickly floated into the air, attached to the magma ball, and melted into a large iron ball, suspended high in the air.

Suddenly, Hitomi shook his palm fiercely, and the iron ball was squashed like a bun.

hiss!

This scene numbs the scalp of countless lives, and only one sentence can describe this struggle.

This is God's war.

Has Chen Mo been subdued this time? Countless lives are looking forward to it.

At the same time, a possibility emerged in their hearts.

not at all.

chapters.title: Chapter 1013: : Win Or Lose
chapters.body:
Chapter 1013: : Win Or Lose

Huh!

Just like the Jinshan at the beginning, the metal in the outer part began to annihilate and turn into fly ash.

Chen Mo inside seemed not to be affected by this attack. Seeing this situation, all the spectators took a breath. There is nothing wrong with this level. How can you fight this kind of battle?

They couldn't think of any way to deal with this kind of enemy. They couldn't kill them, and they couldn't kill them. The bigger they were, the more desperate they were.

Hitomi's eyes flashed, raised his left finger to the ground, and saw the magma exploded again, continuously converging towards the giant sphere in the sky. Obviously, the speed of annihilation was not as fast as that of convergence, and the sphere was slowly getting bigger.

He didn't mean to stop, the huge metal ball slowly moved over the cracked ground, and saw the hole below collapse, revealing a huge hole, bottomless, like a huge mouth in the abyss.

At the next moment, Tongqing released his control, and saw the magma ball wrapped around Chen Mo, falling vertically toward the ground.

Boom!

After the metal ball was sent into the ground, the hole collapsed, burying everything, leaving only the smoking magma on the ground and a mess in the ground.

So cruel.

This is sent underground, how come out? The spectators were in an uproar.

This time, even Zhao Min was a little worried. Although Chen Mo's body was special, she was not sure about this situation and whether he could escape.

Tongqing turned his head to look at Zidi, the meaning was obvious, I won.

"Don't worry, it's not over yet." Zidi smiled slightly, not caring.

Tong Qing narrowed his eyes and took a deep look at him: "There are countdowns in the ring. Will you wait endlessly?"

"Five minutes." Zidi said, his voice was beyond doubt.

Tong Qing didn't speak any more, and waited quietly, overlooking the ground where Chen Mo was buried.

This hasn't lost yet?

The onlookers were all convinced, but looking at Chen Mo's subordinates, most of them were calm as usual, as if they were not worried about their leader being killed.

Upon seeing this, the crowd also waited, while talking in a low voice.

...

With Tong Qing's methods, Chen Mo truly realized that if he didn't have a quantum body, he might have already lost. Coming out of the magma ball, he looked around at the rocks, a little surprised.

Tong Qing is clever, and trapped him underground.

Calming down, Chen Mo began to look around and feel the direction of gravity.

In the darkness, he could clearly feel the surface of the rock and soil, and inside, the molecules and atoms were all spinning like crazy.

He saw the irregular beating of electrons, which seemed to be quantum-like but without purpose and direction, flashing around the nucleus, and he saw the gaps in the atoms.

Atomic gap.

Chen Mo thought for a while, raised his hand and slowly attached it to the rock.

He tried to control every quantum that makes up the body, passing through the gap between atoms and electrons. After a while, a finger was tapped in the rock and slowly submerged in it, but when it was pulled out again, there was no trace.

can.

Chen Mo's eyes lit up.

Try new abilities.

Chen Mo covered the rock with his palm, and slowly, submerged in it, and his body also became virtual, as if there was something like nothing, in a state that he could see but could not touch.

One minute.

Two minutes.

three minutes.

Above the Star Forest Forest, the spectators were a little nervous. They wanted to see if Chen Mo could reappear. If you don't show up for five minutes, you will be judged by the Zidi.

However, the time was approaching, but there was no movement.

Is Hitomi going to win?

As time was about to pass, there was another movement in the battlefield.

A faint blue figure slowly floated up, like molecules passing through the permeable membrane without any hindrance.

Escape?

The appearance of Chen Mo made the life preparing for a carnival think that it was a drake whose throat was strangled.

...

"Then do it again."

Tong Qing did not expect to be able to come up in such a short time, but his face was indifferent, raising his hand, the magma in the crack erupted again, and the surrounding metal particles all gathered on Chen Mo, trying to wrap it.

Again?

Chen Mo did not intend to be beaten underground again.

Just now he not only experienced the ability to shuttle between atoms, but also another ability that he could try.

The ability of Ant-Man.

Collision and contraction of atoms,

In the next instant, Chen Mo's body was quickly raised, and within a short while, his body had become twenty meters tall and was still growing up, like a giant rising from the ground. The spectators stood silly on the spot, opened their mouths wide, and almost stared out, horrified.

A giant two hundred meters high is standing on the battlefield.

Chen Mo felt that it was not the limit, there was a higher limit, but it was enough now.

At this moment, they felt fear.

Hitomi looked up at the giant in front of him, feeling mixed.

He is known as the first person, the strongest in the universe, from childhood to greatest, as long as he challenges, he will not be defeated. He has the best genes and talents, as well as the best resources, but he did not expect to be compared to a sudden rise of analogy here.

After this battle, whether he wins or loses, Chen Mo's name in the universe will spread.

This is his greatest enemy, an enemy several times more terrifying than Dan.

The flow of magma and metal in the air came frantically.

Ten streams of fluid, or fiery red, or black and cold, have sharp contrasts. Under the gray sky, this battlefield becomes the center of the universe.

The fluid speed was extremely fast, and Tong Qing arched his body and exhausted his strength. He has a solemn expression, and his dark pupils are deep, like staring from the abyss. Ten fluids converge in front of him.

The metal melts into a sword bone, and the magma encases it as a sword blade. Formed from top to bottom, the two-hundred-meter-high giant sword penetrated the sky and formed in front of Tongqing in the blink of an eye, and the magma of the sword was still in flux.

Puff!

The dripping lava from the giant sword stirred up dust and smoke on the ground, and a strange sulphur gas occupied the battlefield.

The terrifying giant sword makes people shudder. Around the giant sword, the water vapor evaporating from the temperature of the magma ripples, seeming to distort the space. Tongqing's face was rarely tired, and then a trace of determination flashed.

Suddenly, the huge sword in the air was raised, slashing towards Chen Mo's huge body with a force of destruction. Caught in the sound of howling, the giant sword carried magma fireworks, leaving fan-shaped smoke trails in the air.

As for Chen Mo's huge body, his palms were raised high, and he patted Tongqing in midair. The whistling sound aroused by the palm wind was equally harsh and unstoppable.

One palm and one sword.

Huh!

Snapped!

The two muffled sounds sounded almost at the same time, and everyone was frightened.

The smoke cleared, and the battlefield situation appeared before their eyes. The faces of the spectators were still scared. The vicissitudes of the quaint Star Stele Forest, in the central area where the battlefield was located, was completely destroyed, leaving only one place. The long sword was stuck on the ground, and the lava in the sword body continued to flow down.

But Chen Mo left a long cut mark on his body, his left arm was broken, and the magma sword cut open from the ribs to the abdomen, the wound was terrifying. Chen Mo's figure slowly became smaller, standing on the messy ruins, looking up at the giant sword in front of him.

He dropped his broken arm and was picked up and pressed it on his left hand. The two slowly merged and returned to the original shape. The wound on his abdomen, after the blue light flickered, recovered.

And Tong Qing also got up from the pothole a few kilometers away, his eyes dim, his complexion tired, and extremely embarrassed.

Who will win?

A question emerged in the hearts of all lives on the court.

Click.

A cracking sound sounded...

chapters.title: Chapter 1014: : Tianxing'S Suicide Note Was Destroyed
chapters.body:
Chapter 1014: : Tianxing'S Suicide Note Was Destroyed

The cracking sound is very subtle, but it seems like a beloved thing is broken, making the listener's heart twitch.

Xunsheng looked at the source of the fragmented sound, all beings were dumbfounded, their mouths grew wide, and they were stuck in their throats like endless words, but they couldn't make a sound and were silent for a long time.

The source of the sound lies in Zidi.

The Tianxing suicide note in Zidi's hands turned into a mass of fragments.

He crushed Tianxing's suicide note!

This fact made the life who was waiting for Tian Xing's suicide note to be announced, grabbing his hair and almost going crazy.

In the history of cosmic civilization, the biggest secret left by the wisest man was destroyed in the hands of Zidi. That is the most important treasure of cosmic civilization and the most priceless cultural heritage.

Unwilling to accept this reality of life, screamed, and instantly collapsed.

Click!

As if stepping on their wounds again.

Zidi crushed all the remaining pages, and every movement of him seemed to be pinched on the heart of every life.

How could he destroy Tianxing's suicide note?

The hearts of countless scholars and technical researchers were trembling, and they could not wait to **** the fragments in the hands of the purple emperor and save them, and then smash the purple emperor's body into pieces.

I saw Zidi spread his hands.

All the fragments of Tianxing's suicide note floated above his hand, and then under the gaze of the whole universe, it condensed into a white sphere, like a stone not stone, like jade or jade, smooth and shiny.

This is the material of the book.

On the surface of the white ball the size of an ostrich egg, there are still hundreds of characters attached, which are the characters of Tian Xing's suicide note, but they cannot form sentences. Let alone rely on hundreds of characters to know the content of Tian Xing's suicide note.

The book becomes a jade ball.

Chen Mo glanced at the jade ball in Zidi's hand and slowly flew back to the team. Tong Qing also took a deep look at Zidi, flew back to his team, and said nothing.

Zidi smiled lightly, seeming not to take the priceless treasure that ruined the civilization of the universe into his heart, and threw the ball to Mu Shizhong: "After all, it is of commemorative value. It is a treasure of the town hall in the museum. Noodles."

When the researchers and scholars heard this, their faces turned black and they wanted to choke Zidi to death.

Mu Shizhong's face also twitched, and he was so distressed that he almost didn't cry.

This is a civilization treasure left by the ancestors for hundreds of millions of years, and it also hides the secrets of life in the universe, so it is destroyed casually. This is a crime against the culture of the universe.

But he didn't dare to say, fearing to provoke the killer, he just carefully held the stone ball in his hand and looked carefully.

Even if you give things to any of them, or Zidi takes them away, the Tianxing suicide note can be kept intact. Now that the book is destroyed, what is recorded in it has become a permanent mystery.

"This competition ends here, does anyone have an opinion?" Zidi looked around for a week, watching the crowd.

Many beings looked at each other, and finally their eyes fell on the ranks of god-level civilization, leaving them to make decisions. There are so many big bosses here, ordinary life is not qualified to speak.

The representative of the god-level civilization did not speak at this moment.

What if it doesn't end?

All lives were suffocated by the battle between Chen Mo and Tong Qing just now. They realized that possessing special superpowers is also terrifying in close combat with non-thermal weapons.

"Since everyone has no objections, let's say a few words from the Chong patriarch of the Mu clan." Zidi spoke and flew aside by himself.

"This battle has brought great damage to the Tianxing Stele Forest and also a great loss to Mu's Tianxing. This is the loss of cosmic civilization. I hope that this will end. This is the territory of the pursuit of peace. I am here. Thank you in advance."

Mu clan bowed to all lives again and said.

"The Tianxing suicide note has been destroyed. This battle ends here. The Tianxing stele forest will be closed for a period of time to repair the damage and open at another day. This suicide note is condensed into a stone ball, and I will put it in the Tianxing Museum for all life in the universe.

Regarding the space blockade, I saw that the situation was serious and I activated the space blockade system of Mu's Sky Star to avoid damage and expansion. I apologize for the inconvenience caused to everyone. The space blockade will be unlocked in three hours, and those who want to leave can be prepared.

The Planetary Security Agency will protect the safety of Mr. Chen Mo and his party before the space blockade is unlocked. I hope everyone will not cause trouble. After that, Mr. Chen Mo will be escorted away from the Star Monument, and there will be no relationship with the Star Monument in the future. Thank you all. "

Many lives secretly nodded to Mu's heavy processing method, which is the best way to deal with Mu's sky star.

Seeing Chen Mo and his entourage left under the **** of the Planetary Security Agency, all other god-level civilizations left the field, leaving only the life onlookers staring at each other.

...

In this battle, some people are happy and some are worried.

At least in the marching ant headquarters of the solar system, there is a group of people frowning.

"It's a bit big." Lan muttered, her tone a little helpless, it was helpless to the boss.

The trouble this time has caused has forced the marching ant group to be fully exposed to life in the entire universe. The great civilization of the universe will spare no effort to investigate their information and will intensify their defenses.

They wanted to keep a low profile, I am afraid they will never be able to keep a low profile again. Only them know the contents of the Xing Xing's suicide note, and all civilizations in the universe will look upon them.

The high-ranking army ants on the field all looked at Lan to see how he arranged.

Lan knocked on the table, turned off the live broadcast of Mu Shi Tianxing, and looked at the conference hall.

"At the Star Festival, Professor Loinu announced the basis of super power technology, plus the destruction and influence shown by the battle between the boss and Hitomi. Next, super power technology is definitely the most important thing that many civilizations in the universe need to develop. Technology, so we don’t need to be afraid of exposure.

Fully develop super powers, adapt and train in advance for the reserve soldiers of each war department. In the various colleges and universities in our Star Territory, we select talents and popularize super technology. There is no need to cover up. "

"Yes."

Everyone on the court should be surprised, they have been waiting for this day for a long time.

In addition to special superpowers, super-power technology can also make life's physical fitness stronger, faster thinking speed, and smarter brain. This is definitely a good thing. Raising all their personnel to the highest level, the marching ant group will develop rapidly.

...

"You relied on your own ability to mess around, right? You haven't really figured out what's going on with your body, so you dare to go crazy? What if something happens?"

Back at the manor, Chen Mo obediently received the training.

On the holographic video, it was Xiao Yu's angry face, swearing at Chen Mo, the lingering fear still remained on his face.

Just now Chen Mo was underground. They waited for a few minutes, almost anxious, and finally saw Chen Mo's safety and felt a little relieved. Now that Chen Mo was still smiling at her, he was not angry.

Zhao Min didn't speak aside, but she was on Xiao Yu's side, and the worry on her face had not completely disappeared. But I was so happy in my heart. Chen Mo, who dared to be the enemy of universe life just now, was actually being trained by his wife in a blink of an eye. The contrast was a bit big.

Mo Nu was standing quietly.

"Did you listen? Don't take risks like this next time."

"Hmm."

Chen Mo smiled and nodded.

"You still have a smile on your face. It is estimated that you are also in the ears of the wind. When you come back, I will see how I clean up you." Xiao Yu said angrily: "After the space blockade is opened, you must come back with Mo Girl immediately and cannot stay."

"Mo Nu take Min to go back. I want to go back with the Shenwei fleet and the Ming Tu battle department. After all, I am the leader, and I can't leave the next person to run." Chen Mo explained.

"Okay, but you can't stay in other places for too long halfway." Xiao Yu said solemnly.

Now that the cosmic chaos has occurred, the marching ant group has a big business, and he must come back and sit in the town to be at ease. Otherwise, if the army is out for a long time, the base camp will be unstable and it will be troublesome.

"Okay." Chen Mo blinked and nodded obediently.

chapters.title: Chapter 1015: ：The Choice Of Zi Yun
chapters.body:
Chapter 1015: ：The Choice Of Zi Yun

While waiting for the space blockade to open, the manor where Chen Mo was located ushered in an unexpected visitor.

Arowana Princess.

This life only communicated once at the Mu Family Banquet.

Seeing this beautiful and peerless face in front of him, Chen Mo was a little surprised.

"You still come to visit me at this time. Are you afraid of being jealous and revenge from other cosmic civilizations?" Chen Mo asked curiously. Now he is almost in a state of being an enemy of the universe. It is not a very good decision to visit Princess Arowana at such a sensitive moment.

Princess Arowana pursed her lips and smiled: "I'm afraid I won't be able to see you if I don't visit this time."

There is ambiguity in the words.

Chen Mo immediately felt a cold light shining from behind. This gaze came from Zhao Min, and his face twitched.

Princess Arowana didn't know the ambiguity in her words, and continued to speak: "Remember that at Mu's banquet, you invited me to your hometown. Do you still count it?"

Zhao Min felt calm when he heard the words of Princess Arowana. This sentence is ambiguous, and how you hear it, it seems that Chen Mo wants to take Arowana Princess back to Earth.

Chen Mo braced the cold light behind him, bit his head and said, "Naturally count."

"Then I will go to harass another day, after all, in the universe, life like ours is very rare." Princess Arowana said.

"Okay." Chen Mo said, "I give you my communication number. You can contact me when you arrive."

"Thank you, sir." Princess Arowana took out her communication device and recorded Chen Mo's quantum communication number: "Then Arowana will not bother Mr., see you later."

Arowana looked up and saw Zhao Min and Mo Nu, nodded slightly in greeting, and left.

"Yes, noble temperament, tall and graceful, decent, very nice mermaid, and one more confidante." Zhao Min leaned forward with a sour voice in his voice.

"Don't think too much about it, just look at the legend of humans and fishes on the earth. The people on earth have a special feeling for this kind of life. She is also a star of the universe. She simply invites people to come and have a look. There is no other meaning. Are you jealous?" Chen Mo heard the smell and joked with a smile.

"It's okay, it's not my turn to eat." Zhao Min gave a meaningful smile: "As long as you don't take the female toad back, you can't die."

The quiet Mo Girl beside her couldn't help laughing.

Chen Mo's expression froze on his face.

...

During the Battle of the Star Stele Forest, Chen Mo became the hottest figure in the entire universe, and the marching ant group also appeared on the stage of the entire universe. For a time, various information about the marching ant group appeared on the case tables of major civilizations.

Soon, Chen Mo's information was exposed, and it was no secret in the territory of the marching ant group.

The rise of Chen Mo is a legend.

A pioneer of civilization, in just a few decades, he single-handedly transformed the marching ant group into a superpower, leading the earth civilization where he is in contact with the universe, the smartest person in the entire earth civilization, most of the marching ant group’s core technology is derived from His laboratory.

Such amazing wisdom has never been seen before.

In addition, the battle of the Star Stele Forest exposed his force to the outside world. Fighting with Hitomi stunned the entire universe, successfully boarded the cosmic civilization battle list, and was rated as one of the 100 most exciting battles.

All-rounder.

Shocking talent, the limelight overwhelmed Tongqing for a while, becoming the most potential life.

At the same time, the outside world is discussing whether Chen Mo or Tongqing won the battle in the Star Forest of Steles? This mystery has become a topic of debate throughout the universe.

Various opinions and speculations are circulating in the universe network.

But one thing was almost defaulted by the outside world: Hitomi did not win that battle.

Regarding these arguments, the Black Eye Civilization has been silent, and did not express any opinions about the battle to the outside world. Tong Qing himself did not say a word.

...

"Go home, these years have been hard." Zi Junzhi's deep voice sighed, with mixed emotions.

The purple eye next to her looked into the lobby, standing in the pavilion, the cold and left-over Zi Yun, waiting for her answer, secretly anxious.

In the lobby, other holographically projected Ziwei civilization executives all looked at Zi Yun, with mixed emotions, flickering eyes, and their own plans hidden in their hearts. Whether or not she wants to go back is another matter, but they are not easy to show.

Zi Yun is one of the leaders among the younger generation of Ziwei civilization, but her personality is too cold and incontrovertible.

But her ability to stand alone has never been doubted. In addition to finding the small universe that was messed up by an accident, there is also the matter of super power development technology. Everything in the past can be done perfectly in her hands.

She is almost the perfect incarnation of the generation of Ziwei civilization.

"Professor Loinu has announced the basics of super-power technology, and the family affairs don't use me, so I won't go back for the time being." Zi Yun shook her head slightly and said lightly.

Zimu was secretly anxious on the sidelines, but to no avail, he couldn't interrupt on this occasion.

Zi Yun's refusal caused some commotion in the lobby. Zi Junzhi fell silent and stared at Zi Yun, but did not see other emotions in her.

The atmosphere became dull.

"Where are you going next?"

"I'm not strong enough, I want to wander around in the universe." Zi Yun said lightly.

Everyone couldn't help thinking back to the scene where Zi Yun was defeated by Mo Nu during the Battle of the Star Forest of Steles. It's incredible that the proud lady of the Ziwei civilization lost to an unknown woman.

"Oh!" Zi Jun sighed and said, "Then come back whenever you want to come back, now the takeaway is messy, here is your root."

"Thank you Star Master." Zi Yun nodded slightly.

All the holographic projections in the lobby disappeared, leaving both Zi Yun and Zi Mu.

"My lord, why don't you go back?" Zimu asked with some regret.

Zi Yun shook her head slightly, but did not reply.

...

"Zi Yun didn't go back, hehe."

In an oxygen-rich planet, in a military base of the Ziwei civilization, Ziluo shook his fat body, glanced at the news and murmured, continued to pick up the game controller and focus on the game in front of him.

"Concentrate on playing games and see what information." The young man in pajamas with his sleepy eyes drooping next to him muttered and complained: "It made me almost die."

Fatty Luo couldn't help but complain: "That's because your skills are too bad."

"Fart." The sleepy young man suddenly became unhappy, so he was quite awake: "Would you like to solo, and see who sucks?"

Fatty Luo obviously wouldn't be able to challenge his solo. He grabbed an unknown fruit and stuck his mouth in his mouth: "Speaking of business, this time Zi Yun rejected the star host. It's surprising. I don't know where she will go."

"It's better to go anywhere than to go back. Think about it from another perspective. The star master tells you to go back. Can't you go back?" the sleepy youth asked.

"Aren't you nonsense? Of course not, I'm not stupid."

Fatty Luo is righteous.

It was impossible to come out to loosen his bones and let him go back.

"That's all right, do you think Zi Yun is stupid than you? Those sisters can understand better than anyone else." The sleepy young man hummed, "Speaking of which, Zi Yun saw Zidi in Mu's Tianxing, I don't know. Whether she will contact them or not, I am a little envious of them."

"Don't be heard by the star master, otherwise trouble will happen." Fatty Luo's face trembled.

Thinking of the status quo of the Ziwei civilization, Fatty Luo sighed.

The inevitable decay and decay of the ancient dynasty, and today's crape myrtle civilization, various families are fighting for power, the younger generation is either arrogant or extravagant and decadent, which is difficult to use.

It was those families who controlled the various powers of the crape myrtle civilization, greedy and complacent, and brought the entire craze myrtle civilization to a rotten root after years of corruption.

The Lagerstroemia civilization, which has been domineering for hundreds of millions of years, suddenly declined, and it did not happen overnight. The embankment of a thousand miles was destroyed in the ant nest, not to mention the greedy beasts.

Why did the Zidi almost slaughter the elite children of the entire Ziwei civilized family back then? There was no hatred for no reason.

The sleepy youth didn't speak any more. Both seemed to be thinking about the same thing, and the atmosphere became quiet for a while.

chapters.title: Chapter 1016: :Task
chapters.body:
Chapter 1016: :Task

"Madam, we are back."

Bai Jia and Bai Lu approached Hu Bing's body and saluted respectfully.

Hu Bingxin glanced over her eyes and nodded in satisfaction. After Shi Ganxing, this girl showed great potential. She felt that she was a man of creation, and there was indeed a lack of a female subordinate beside her. Uncle Lion was his guard, it was impossible to be convenient all the time.

Now, Uncle Lion is approaching the age of retreat, just as Bai Yu and Egret have returned from school. In the future, they can succeed Uncle Lion as her guard.

So after Shi Ganxing came out, Hu Bingxin sent them to the core base of Bai Xing for further study. Now Bai Yu is less impetuous, more confident and calm than when he was in Shi Ganxing.

"It looks like a good harvest."

"This is also most of the madam's work." Bai Yu said with a playful smile, and slapped a little flattery.

"I have no credit, this is the result of your hard work." Hu Bingxin said.

"Madam, I heard that Mu Shi Tianxing's Tianxing suicide note appeared, how is it?" Bailu asked.

When it came to this, Hu Bingxin's mood changed, thinking about the information sent to her by the intelligence department, frowning: "Tianxing's suicide note is not important anymore."

"Not important? Why?" Bai Yu asked puzzledly: "Didn't it mean that Chen Mo's strength was due to Tian Xing's suicide note?"

They trained, and they just learned that countless lives are in the Star Forest Stele Forest. They are fighting for the death and life of the last letter of the Star. Now the wife says it is not important, and Bai Jia is a little puzzled.

Hu Bingxin's gaze became distant, as if recalling the battlefield at that time: "That was just hearsay."

"This……"

Bai Yu paused, feeling that things were not that simple.

Upon seeing this, Hu Bingxin did not sell her, and said, "Something happened to Gou Xuan."

"Gou Xuan? What's wrong with Gou Xuan?" Bai Su instantly became nervous. Gou Xuan and her are very good best friends.

"She suffered a loss on Zi Luo's hand, and was trapped in the dark forest star field, and then planted another somersault on a hand called Wang Hai. She is in a bad situation now, but there is no life threatening."

Bai Yu secretly breathed a sigh of relief: "Ziluo? Fat Luo, Ziwei civilization?"

"Yes, Ziwei civilization."

"The Ziwei civilization attacked our Hongqiao leading to the dark forest civilization, cutting off the connection between Gouxuan and the White Star Territory."

"Fatty Luo is the top star of the Ziwei civilization, side by side with Yan and Lei Yu, understandable. But this Wang Hai? Who is Wang Hai? I haven't heard of it." Bai Xu immediately found the key, full of curiosity.

"I haven't heard of it before, but Gou Xuan fought him twice. The first time was a test. Both sides quickly stopped. Go Xuan only thought he was good. Until later, Fatty Luo snatched us to the dark forest. Hongqiao in the star domain, she went to forcibly attacked Muwu Hongqiao and retreated with a feather. Only then did she know so much." Hu Bing had a solemn expression in his heart.

"What kind of power is he? Dare to oppose our White Star Civilization?"

Goxuan belonged to their White Star civilization, and their equipment and fighters were the most elite. They were defeated, and they really didn't believe it.

Unlike them, they are armored divisions, pursuing the ultimate in personal strength.

And Gou Xuan is a general star, leading soldiers to fight, or the new top general star of the White Star Civilization, from the highest military academy of the White Star Civilization, standing out from countless general stars, the combat strength is absolutely top level.

"Chen Mo's subordinates." Hu Bingxin said a name.

"Chen Mo? Who is this?"

Baiyu and Bailu looked at each other blankly. They didn't seem to have heard of the name, but they felt very familiar.

After sorting out his thoughts, Hu Bing said in his heart: "You should be familiar with it. It is the mysterious armored division who robbed the experimental body of Demon Flame Civilization on Shigan Star and caused our operation to fail."

"It's him." Bai Jia was extremely surprised.

Thinking of the mysterious armored division, she gritted her teeth.

Originally, the mission in Shi Ganxing was not that complicated. As long as they caught the escaped experimental body at that time, their plan was mostly successful. They didn't expect to see it succeed, and they were cut off.

After that, a chain reaction led to a series of incidents in Shi Ganxing.

"This Chen Mo, he also made a lot of troubles in Mu's Sky Star?"

"It's more than that. He has another identity, as you all know. Selling the space connector to Tong Qing indirectly caused Dan's death. The humanoid we lost in Shi Gan Xing is him."

Baijiao and Bailu glanced at each other, with surprise in their eyes.

Although the humanoid who sold the space connector to Tongqing did not directly manipulate them, he helped Tongqing transport the space weapons into the blocked Shi Ganxing and gained the initiative to fight.

"If he sees that we won't run away, he still dares to fight us?" Bai Jia was very puzzled, even a little angry.

Hu Bingxin ignored Bai Jia's anger and suddenly became serious.

"It's not that simple. You are training and the information is closed. Many things are still unclear. Anyway, I have nothing to do. I still have to talk to you about some things."

Bai Yu and Bai Lu glanced at each other, and they both saw the change in Madam's attitude, and immediately listened carefully.

"This Chen Mo is not easy. Defeating Goxuan's Wang Hai is just one of his generals, the same generals, and another one who killed the Mingyue Liuhua of the underworld civilization head-on in the battle for the Great Wall of Sloan. "

"Mingyue Liuhua was killed?" The two took a breath.

Mingyue Liuhua is Ming'a's most powerful lieutenant, and Ming'ai is considered a relative. She is said to be the life of the third top general star following Ming A and Ming Tu.

Now Mingyue Liuhua is dead, but the loss is huge.

It’s easy to get a thousand soldiers and it’s hard to find a general. It’s the same for any civilization in the universe.

Ignoring their shock, Hu Bingxin said: "The current strength of the marching ant group is comparable to that of a god-level civilization. Even if the foundation may not be as good, it is absolutely comparable to the most elite top civilization. According to our in-depth investigation, there is a'fox'. Under Chen Mo's command."

"fox?"

"Remember the Black Maple Leaf Battle Armor Corps three hundred years ago? Today's trap was laid to slay the'silver-haired' foxes of the Dahe Civilization Encirclement and Suppression Corps."

"Silver hair is under his command?"

The egret opened its mouth and couldn't say much for a time.

Hu Bingxin said nothing.

Judging from the information obtained, the'Wizard of Heaven' is not enough to describe Chen Mo's terrifying talent and ability. His life is just like hanging up, even if Mu's Sky Star is alive, facing Chen Mo's achievements, I am afraid it will be overshadowed.

The rise of the marching ant group led by Chen Mo is a miracle in the history of cosmic civilization.

There has never been a top civilization or god-level civilization. In just a few decades, it has completed continuous civilization-level jumps, and even the tone of Hu Bingxin is full of admiration.

Bai Yu's mouth was open, and his dazed face was full of shock.

Hu Bingxin didn't stop the introduction, sighing: "After Shi Ganxing, Chen Mo disappeared. He reappears, it's the Star Festival at the Star Stele."

"So he is also related to this Tianxing suicide note incident?"

"You guessed it, he is still the protagonist." Hu Bingxin said solemnly: "Last time Shi Ganxing, he was the best supporting actor who took away the experimental body of the Demon Flame Civilization. He is the well-deserved best protagonist at this Star Festival."

Baiyu and Bailu calmed down and listened carefully to his wife's introduction, for fear of missing a word.

After thinking about it, Hu Bingxin said, "Uncle Lion and I were there in person, so I saw these things with my own eyes."

The two did not interrupt.

"As soon as Chen Mo appeared in the Star Forest of Steles, he triggered a vision. During the Star Festival, he was in the limelight. His guards defeated a famous battle armor teacher. As for his own superpower, no one knew at the beginning. Until the opening ceremony Show your strength, one-on-two, and defeat two top-tier battle armor masters."

"One pick two?"

Bai Jia was stunned. The top armored division was one out of two, and his strength was close to the strongest.

"This is just the beginning. Later, the Ming Qiyu of the Underworld Civilization ambushed them in Mu's Sky Star, trying to capture him, but he was killed. The fleet of the Underworld Civilization escorting the delegation was also slaughtered and killed. You are also familiar with it."

"We are familiar? Who?"

"Ming Tu."

"Ming Tu slaughtered the fleet of Nether civilization?"

Bai Yu and Bailu were dumbfounded, this is a bit of fantasy.

Hu Bingxin didn't care about their reaction: "Ming Tu defected. During the Star Festival, he took refuge in Chen Mo."

She suddenly remembered the blockade of Mu Clan's Sky Star. If it weren't for Mu Clan's re-blocking the space of Mu Clan's Sky Star, I am afraid that all the lives of the main star of Mu Clan's Sky Star would have to face Ming Tu's butcher knife.

"Madam, it's not over yet?" Bai Jia suddenly felt that things were not that simple.

Hu Bing nodded silently, and then said: "He appeared in the Star Forest Stele Forest for the third time, and found the Star Chamber in the folding space. The birth of the last picture monument left by Mu's Star Star and the last note of the Star Star was the origin of the event of the Star Star Stele."

Both Baiyu and Bailu feel unreal.

The secret room of the Stars has been hidden for hundreds of millions of years, and countless lives have been searching for nothing in their entire lives. They were found out by a life who has been to the Forest of Stars of the Stars three times.

Hu Bingxin was a little helpless and admired.

"It should be their spatial ability, that's why they found the Star Secret Chamber. Zidi and Tong Qing set up a gambling battle to compete for the star's suicide note. Chen Moyifang defeated Thunder, Ziyun, the genius of Ziwei civilization, and Uncle Lion one after another."

"what?"

This time, Bai Yu and Bailu couldn't help but screamed.

Thunder is the genius who defeated the last speaker of the Black Eye Civilization, and belongs to the strongest. They didn't understand Zi Yun, but as the geniuses of Ziwei civilization, their strength was definitely not weaker than them. Shi Ming and they know very well that the real Xeon has been defeated [Didaxs novel www.didaxs.info], this is impossible.

"Not only that, but..."

"and also?"

"Watch it for yourself." Hu Bingxin called out a battle video. She didn't know how to describe this battle.

"The pupil is green?"

Bai Yu and Egret opened their mouths, dumbfounded.

Watching the battle video, they refreshed their cognition of the Xeon and super powers time and time again, and at the end, they felt numb.

They thought they were well trained and confident, but they were shocked.

"Did you get hit?" Hu Bingxin said quietly.

Egret nodded and shook his head again. After a brief shock, his eyes became hot. Only such a strong person is his real goal.

Hu Bing glanced at the egret with satisfaction: "This time you come back, and there happens to be a task for you."

Bai Jiao and Bailu looked straight and straightened.

"You will contact some big civilized kings for me. In the future, the universe situation may change greatly. This mission is very important."

chapters.title: Chapter 1017: : General Trend
chapters.body:
Chapter 1017: : General Trend

"Madam, why do you say that Tianxing's suicide note is not important anymore?" Shi Ming asked puzzledly when everyone dispersed.

Hu Bingxin paused, and said, "Does Uncle Lion think that Chen Mo became so strong only after getting Tianxing's suicide note?"

"This……"

He did think so, but when his wife said so, he was not confident.

"Remember the death of Ming Qiyu?"

"Remember." Shi Ming nodded.

He recalled that the information he received was that during the battle, Chen Mo's female assistant tore through the space and escaped, and then brought back a group of guards, unaffected by the space span.

That was the first time Chen Mo's female assistant showed her abilities. Later, she retreated and defeated Zi Yun, who was also the female assistant.

It's just that the battle between Chen Mo and Tong Qing was too shocking, covering up all the light of other lives, and Chen Mo's female assistant did not have that high attention.

"During Ming Qiyu's sneak attack, his female assistant showed incredible spatial abilities, as well as the special stealth abilities that Chen Mo showed at the opening ceremony. The outside world had never seen their true abilities, if they had it at that time. Is it strong? Hidden like Tong Qing." Hu Bingxin said.

Shi Ming's body shook and did not answer.

"Uncle Lion remember, how long did you take to adapt and advance when you awakened? Is it possible for them to adapt to their abilities in such a short time?"

Shi Wei was taken aback, as if what the wife said was not unreasonable.

But he also thought of a possibility.

"What if the secret is related to the fourth-dimensional life? The fourth-dimensional life cannot be explained by our knowledge."

"I have also thought about this question. Mu's secret rumors are indeed related to the fourth-dimensional life, but they only took a look at the books to reach that level. Do you think it is possible? Besides, if it is such a good thing, you think Zidi After crushing the book, will Chen Mo not be angry?"

Madam’s question made Shi Ming shook his head.

Chen Mo wouldn't hand it over to Zidi easily, let alone let him destroy it.

And Hu Bingxin recalled Chen Mo's intelligence.

"That battle was probably just for Chen Mo to fight for a breath. It is easy to find out from Chen Mo's experience. He already possesses incredible abilities and is extremely clever, so he can create technology and build in just a few decades. A force comparable to a god-level civilization.

There is also a very high possibility that he has obtained the complete technology left over by a lost top civilization, or he is a survivor of the top civilization himself, with the accumulation of scientific and technological background of the top civilization, so he will rise in such a short time. "

Shi Hao suddenly agreed with his wife.

"Then what are we going to do now?"

"Develop super technology first, and be prepared, it won't be peaceful in the future." Hu Bingxin's beautiful eyes shone: "I am very interested in him now."

She was telling the truth. If it were not for the special chaos, she would really like to go to Pisces Cetus, see the man's hometown in person, and play with him for a while.

"Madam, this idea is very dangerous." Shi Ming's body shook and said hurriedly.

Hu Bingxin was silent.

...

Chen Mo and Mo Nu talked about the development of physical abilities.

At present, only the two of them have the same physique, so in terms of ability development, they have the same situation, and the two share their own ideas, which is more conducive to controlling their own bodies.

As for Tianxing's suicide note, it played an enlightening role for them. After opening the door of the treasure, the key was no longer so important.

Even so, Chen Mo had to admire Mu Shi Tianxing.

That sentence of consciousness is the fourth-dimensional matter, which makes him inspire.

After mastering the method, everything behind it is logical.

Mo Nu listened very carefully, and from time to time she demonstrated according to Chen Mo's ideas to see if she could control the same ability. In terms of comprehension, Mo Nu is not weak, on the contrary, she is very smart.

Mo Nu's thinking is supported by the quantum network, which is broader than Chen Mo. It only needs an opportunity. Chen Mo doesn't need to teach the rest at all. On the contrary, he can teach Chen Mo.

...

After two days of rest, Chen Mo dressed up and headed to the headquarters of the March Ant Group.

During this period of time, the marching ant group was in the same spotlight. It was during the period of the cosmic wars. There were countless people who came to take refuge, and even some lives were migrated by tribes.

In this regard, the marching ant group does not refuse to come.

In the age of the universe, the most indispensable thing is land and buildings. To transform a planet, how many lives can migrate over.

As for beings with ulterior motives, it is impossible to prevent them from entering their territory in the age of the universe in units of hundreds of millions. The only thing that can be guaranteed is the purity of the War Headquarters.

With hypnosis technology and polygraph technology, it is easy to find the spies and spies who want to join the war department.

To ensure the purity of the warhead and the core personnel of the marching ant group, ordinary lives are irrelevant.

What marching ant group is about to face is the future development.

After Loinu chose to publicly announce the super power factor formula and gene equation, super power technology will become the main development technology in the future.

They have always tried to keep their superpowers secret, so they don't have to worry about it now.

In terms of super technology, their technology is ahead of the outside world, which has a great advantage.

The meeting has already been held, and the top leaders of the Armed Forces and Administration Department headed by Lan and Zhao Min are all concentrated in the conference room of the headquarters. Those who have not returned to the earth also appeared on the scene of the conference room through holographic projection.

When the time came, Chen Mo entered the meeting room.

After preparing, Zhao Min stood up and went to the main topic: "Today's meeting is to discuss an important topic, about the popularization of super power technology, and talk about your suggestions and ideas."

...

Hitomi's spacecraft landed on an oxygen-rich planet and entered a scientific research base.

This is the highest scientific research planet of the black pupil civilization, and the entire planet is a research institute, studying the most cutting-edge technology of the black pupil civilization.

The entire planet is protected. Every time a person enters and exits, he has to go through the ten most stringent checks, and even be genetically tested. It is impossible for outsiders without authorization to sneak into the scientific research planet.

Under the leadership of scientific researchers, Tong Qing arrived in a huge building that was 100 meters high.

Super R&D institutions.

"Speaker, this is our latest research result." The head of Hequier proudly handed a tube of reagent to Hitomi: "It is an improved version of the magic flame civilization super power technology, and Biroinu is on the Mu's star. The announced development technology is much stronger, with a success rate of 10%, and the side effects of the magic flame civilization technology have been eliminated, and mass production is possible."

The group of researchers who followed Hequier nodded their heads with great pride.

After Tong Qing came to power, their scientific research personnel's status was higher than before, and their funds were more than before. The best feedback is naturally the results.

"Not bad."

Tongqing nodded with satisfaction, with a success rate of 10%. In a universe with hundreds of millions of lives, it can be said that the success rate is very high.

"You are mass-producing now, the demand in the future will be great, and the popularization of super technology is imperative."

"Yes." Hequier nodded solemnly.

Hitomi Green put the medicine back on the storage platform: "Although I will not interfere with your research process, there are two new research and development directions that I want to talk to you."

"Speaker, please speak." Hequier also shocked all the researchers below.

Their existence is to complete the scientific research goals specified by Tong Qing, and nowadays there are rare new research tasks.

Hitomi's expression is serious, with some memories in his eyes: "The first is to explore super-power technology that can stack multiple superpowers in one, and the second is to find super-power technology that can develop a specific ability. While increasing the success rate, move towards this For R&D in both directions, I provide unlimited funding and resource support."

Unlimited funding and resource tilt.

As a scientific researcher, Hequier knows what this means. The speaker is desperate to develop in these two directions.

But think about it carefully, the next step in the development of super energy technology does need to go like this.

chapters.title: Chapter 1018: :Game?
chapters.body:
Chapter 1018: :Game?

"Let me talk about it first." Lan got up from her position and looked at Chen Mo.

Chen Mo motioned for him to start.

"Before super powers become popular, there is one thing you must pay attention to in advance and make a special preparation. There is an old saying in the boss's hometown that knights are forbidden by martial arts. If super powers are not controlled, it is more difficult to manage than battle armor. .

Warframe can be implanted with programs to monitor crime, but superpowers can't. Superpower crimes are more difficult to investigate and it is not easy to obtain evidence. If it gets out of control, it is endless trouble. "

After Lan's words fell, everyone on the court agreed.

Most of them develop super powers, so they naturally know the dangers.

"Instructor Lan, do you have any suggestions?" Chen Mo asked.

Lan Lang said: "Technology has not changed, rules first, first regulate the management laws of super powers, establish the classification of super power types and stage grading standards. Establish a registration mechanism for super powers to assess the dangers of super power types.

Establish a talent selection and training mechanism for superpowers, and establish an effective punishment mechanism for superpower crimes, which is different from the rule system outside the ordinary law.

These are all my preliminary suggestions. Under the rules that ensure that the super-power can be managed and restricted and used for us, we will gradually refine other rules instead of blindly developing. "

As early as when the boss was fighting with Hitomi, he talked about the popularization of super powers. During this time, he also thought about some problems that might arise when the popularization of super powers.

When Lan's thought came out, everyone on the court was brightened.

They are thinking about how to popularize super powers, but they have not thought about the impact that these foundations may have brought.

"Everything else is easy to handle. The last penalty rule can be refined, referring to the criminal law." Chen Mo asked.

Zhu He raised his hand and attracted everyone's attention.

"I will talk about my thoughts on the fifth punishment mechanism of Instructor Lan. Is there a technology that can completely eliminate the superpowers of life bodies so that they can never have superpowers? This technology can more effectively deter superpowers. Those who can."

She is engaged in intelligence. She is a little familiar with punishment and knows what can deter criminals.

Chen Mo nodded: "This kind of technology is available. I prepared it at the beginning of the development of super power technology. There is a medicine in my laboratory that can eliminate the super power of a life and turn it into an ordinary life."

Everyone on the court was numb to the various weird techniques in the boss's laboratory, and was not surprised.

"It is the hardest point and the most troublesome for us to use powerful and special superpowers. So everyone can think more about this." Zhao Min said.

"Dad, let me ask a question?"

Wushuang next to Zhao Min watched Chen Mo raise his hand, and everyone's eyes fell on her.

Many high-level executives looked at Wushuang with approval and affirmation. Among them, there were many core personnel of the original marching ant group. They watched Wushuang's infant children grow into today's beautiful girls.

Wushuang has inherited Chen Mo's wisdom, Xiaoyu's temperament and Zhao Min's aura, and has long been able to stand alone.

"Yeah, say." Chen Mo's eyes were petting.

"What kind of talent do we need? From which ethnic groups?" Wushuang asked.

"I come."

Zhao Min looked at Chen Mo and got his approval before standing up.

"We are short of all talents. As long as they are talents, the more the better. The selected races are all races within the star field of our group, and they are treated equally and without special."

"There must be something special."

Lan raised her hand to intervene.

"After all, the earth is the hometown of the boss and the president. The life here still stays at the red level. According to the life level of the universe, it is inferior. Although life is equal, there are always a small number of lives that are not cold to the red life, and here is Where the boss rises, no life dares to have an opinion, but the rhythm must be controlled properly."

Other high-levels on the court nodded.

"Wushuang, you say it." Lan finished speaking and led the words back to Wushuang.

"I have two suggestions regarding the management of super talents."

Wushuang saw that everyone on the field cast inquiring eyes, and continued to speak.

"The first suggestion is very common, and everyone should be able to think of it. Super-power technology is said to be popular, but it is absolutely impossible to be popularized by all people like War Armor in a short time, because the management system can't keep up and it will be chaotic.

We can first popularize the best part of life, build a super power academy in each star system in the star field, select outstanding talents from the star system to join the super power academy of constant stars, and then super power the students of the super power academy. Can develop and let them learn. The college system facilitates the unified management and education of superpowers.

Then select the outstanding superpowers of the Star Super Academy, graduate and enter the super power academy of the galaxy level, and then select the graduates with excellent abilities to join the super power academy of the constellation level, and select them in layers, so that you can roughly distinguish talents , We can collect them into the marching ant group according to the talents needed. "

Chen Mo nodded: "What about the second one?"

"There are too many lives, and life's hobbies and ideas are different. The single-academy system of selection of talents will definitely miss the net, and there are a lot of these fish. We can select through another method."

Seeing everyone attentive and listening without interrupting, Wushuang continued.

"For example, Uncle Lan needs military talents, but under the academy system, there may be many military talents who are missing due to poor grades or who have no conditions to go to the Super Academy, or talents who are late bloomers. We can establish a special selection that all people participate in. The mechanism is designated as special enrollment and added to the talent plan."

"What are the national selection mechanisms?" Even Lan was interested.

"Dad, tell me you don't hit me." Wushuang looked at Chen Mo and blinked.

Chen Mo was amused by this girl: "Since I was young, have I beaten you? This is a free speech conference, and speak freely."

"Game." Wushuang said.

"game?"

This answer made everyone in the conference room dumbfounded, and their thinking was a little strange. Whatever they think, they will not think of using the ‘game’ selection mechanism.

"How do you say?" Chen Mo asked curiously.

...

The black-robed man looked at the female person who came by, and his gaze was stunned. The wine glass in his hand paused and placed it on the table. He looked at the incoming person: "You dare to find me? Are you afraid of me?"

His voice was full of surprise.

The female person had a cold face and said, "I'm afraid I won't come."

The black robe is the Zidi, who is feared like a tiger, and the female is Ziyun.

The most talented girl of the Ziwei civilization today came to find the Zidi, the biggest sinner of the Ziwei civilization. If the outside world knows it, it will definitely stir up an uproar.

"Then what are you looking for me for? Do you catch me and go back?" Zidi picked up the wine glass and drank to himself.

"I want to be your student."

Zidi's hand paused, his expression was stunned, and he smiled softly: "The best genius of the Ziwei civilization, who wants to be a student of the greatest sinner of the Ziwei civilization, will pass it back. You are not afraid of Zijun's death?"

Zi Yun was silent.

The two stopped talking, Zidi drank wine on his own, and watched the air football game played in the pub, completely treating Zi Yun as a transparent person.

It took an hour before Zidi put down his glass.

"Pay the bill." Zidi turned around and left outside the tavern.

"is teacher."

Zi Yun nodded lightly, settled the bill, and quickly followed Zidi to leave.

chapters.title: Chapter 1019: :Guess
chapters.body:
Chapter 1019: :Guess

"It's not a game in the strict sense, but a talent selection mechanism platform that combines virtual reality."

Wushuang talked about his own thoughts.

She has seen Lan use virtual reality to teach combat strategy and virtual exercises, and the marching ant group also used this method when it was just looking out of the Milky Way.

"For example, in the selection of military talents, in addition to the selection of the college examination system, we developed a virtual reality interstellar war confrontation platform based on the theme of war sandbox, so that the whole people can participate, and the lives that stand out in the layered virtual reality interstellar war are against the interstellar battlefield. The layout and decision-making must be excellent.

We selected this group of lives and recruited them to enter the War Command Department of the Super Academy, and study with the students who passed the exam. The collision between wild ways and majors and mutual learning can create more possibilities without becoming a system. And the backwaters of the rules. "

Wushuang's thoughts made the armed personnel on the field nod secretly.

These mechanisms are consistent with some of the training concepts of their internal staff system, but this concept has been popularized in a more acceptable way.

In countless lives, the fittest will survive and the most elite will be selected.

The base of life is large enough, and after layers of screening, it is absolutely talented that can be left behind, and maybe it can also collide with different ideas.

"This mechanism was implemented on Earth during the time when my father disappeared, and the results were good. At the beginning, our selection and training of soldiers used similar competitive platforms.

The Earth’s war robots and interstellar combat styles combine the interstellar combat ideas and combat skills of those ‘game’ players on Earth. After we deduced and improved them, we did not take any detours. We successfully explored the armor system and integrated with the universe armor system.

Including the future, the virtual reality platform can explore the combat methods and training methods of superpowers. After all, on the virtual reality platform, there are many conveniences for wanton destruction without worrying about major events. Moreover, virtual reality can well circumvent some black-box operations and backdoor problems, and provide a fair environment. "

I didn't say anything in the conference room for a long time, digesting Wushuang's ideas.

"Wushuang's idea has a lot of room for manipulation." Lan said.

...

Giants.

Located in a cosmic structure composed of a group of giant super-large quasars.

The main star of the constellation Giant, also known as the Giant City, belongs to one of the 108 cities. It is a large earth-like planet and an oxygen-rich planet. The oxygen concentration of giant stars is very high. When the planets evolved in the past, giant tribes were derived and continue to the present.

When Bai Yu landed on a giant earth-like planet, he began to look around.

She entered the Giants for the first time and was very curious about it. The egrets around her were calmer.

When seeing the giant clan greeted, the life of the white star civilization sighed inwardly.

The five-meter-high holding humanoid, with typical humanoid characteristics, stands in front of them, like a pet.

A life flew out of the giant team and landed not far in front of them. Compared with other giants, this thin giant youth was only two meters tall, just like a dwarf in a tall man.

The giant youth greeted them with neither humble nor overbearing, and performed a giant welcoming etiquette to them: "Welcome to the arrival of the White Star Messenger."

"Hello, I am Bai Jia." Bai Jia said with a smile in reply.

"I am a egret." The egret also replied to the giant youth: "Dare to ask you who is it?"

The giant youth looked at the two of them, and then said: "I am Xi Liu, the son of the ancient emperor. This time my father welcomes the two very much, so I specially sent me to greet the two and go to the palace for a talk."

"It turned out to be the son of Emperor Xiliu, so he was interested." Egret smiled politely.

"You two, please follow me." Xi Liu stretched out his hand and motioned for the two to follow.

On the road, the party gets along well. Although Xiliu does not have a very tall body like other giants, he is very smart and flexible, friendly and stable, and has a very high emotional intelligence. Communication with him is never afraid of the embarrassment of saying the wrong thing, and it is extremely easy.

Occasionally, the eyes of the egret passed by the soldiers of the giant race, secretly surprised.

Their physique gives them some special places. The armor design is different from the mainstream compact, but it is as thick as the mecha. Each armor has a large shield of more than two meters in the hand. If you want to attack them, To break the defense of this shield.

Judging the strength of the giants from these soldiers, they shouldn't be underestimated if they see the big from the small.

Fortunately, their White Star civilization has a good relationship with the Giants, so this time the wife sent them over to the Giants to get in touch. Maybe in the future, they can cooperate very well.

The situation in the universe is unstable. It is well known that the establishment of alliances together can gain an advantage in battle.

This is Madam’s precaution.

They came to the Giants as the lady's messenger this time, hoping to have in-depth contact and seek to establish a formal ally in the future.

Enjoy the scenery and culture of the giants along the way.

Because of the high oxygen content of the planet, the creatures that have evolved on the planet are all large in size and large in trees.
