The houses where the giants live and the vehicles they use are all several times, or even dozens of times, larger than those of the standard cosmic life.

This is also a unique scenery.

Before long, a majestic and majestic giant palace located in the center of the Giant City came into their eyes.

...

"This is the complete information of Chen Mo and the marching ant group." Lei Ting's voice was deep and deep, like thunder from a distance.

Lei Yu looked quietly, pausing from time to time.

"In terms of experience, his experience is legendary and a miracle."

Thunder admired and admired.

If this information is made public, he can definitely enter the top 100 list of celebrities in the history of the universe. He is extremely wise, powerful, masters a variety of superpowers, and is also a pioneer of civilization.

"Every one of his superpowers belongs to the top superpower, not only him, but the woman next to him is also very mysterious. Now there is speculation that their abilities may be related to the fourth-dimensional life."

"The fourth dimension of life?"

Lei Yu was moved instantly.

"Yes, the fourth dimension life." Thunder nodded.

Only when you really face them do you feel that way. Very mysterious, unfathomable, with no end in sight.

But it was just a guess, they were not sure.

Lei Yu browsed Chen Mo's information, wondering whether he was thinking.

"From his information, there is a very high possibility."

"What's possible?" Thunder cast a questioning look.

Lei Yu thought about it, and said: "He has a complete technological heritage of a top civilization and even a god-level civilization in his hands."

"But which of the top civilization's technical inheritance has been obtained by him? Their technical style does not have a specific trace of which civilization has been destroyed. The spatial connector is not available to other forces besides the Seven."

"Where does the space connection technology come from? What if it is a civilization in a small universe?"

Thunder's body was shaken.

"You mean he has a small universe in his hands?"

"There is such a possibility, and it is very big. Otherwise, how to explain that he had developed such a large armed force in a galaxy in the early stage, but the surrounding civilization did not know it? It doesn't make sense."

In this way, we have the foundation of a god-level civilization.

If Chen Mo were to be here, he would definitely be surprised by Lei Yu's guess.

There was a haze in Thunder's eyes.

This means that he has one more opponent in the universe.

Seeing Thunder’s concern, Lei Yu shook his head and said, “Our target is not him, it’s the Black Eye civilization. Although they have risen, they are not in contact with our star field at the moment. What should be a headache is the forces around him. Opportunity, we can even cooperate with it."

...

Ming Ah stared at the star map, stunned.

The gray eyes, the focus is not there, I don't know what I am thinking.

It took about an hour before his status was pulled out by his subordinate's report.

"My lord, the patriarch has come to confirm that Ming Tu and Chen Mo are back in Pisces and Cetus."

Ming Ah's eyes turned into focus, and he looked up at the holographic star chart.

The patriarch summoned him, talked a lot, talked about the current state of the Mind civilization, confirmed that Ming Tu had relied on Chen Mo, and also learned that Min Tu had massacred the envoy guard fleet stationed outside the Star Stele.

Unexpectedly, the former colleague would become a sworn enemy.

The situation gradually deteriorated, and they were running out of time.

It didn't have much advantage, but now it's even more difficult with Ming Tu. He and Ming Tu both studied in the same college. Because of each other's excellence, they played against each other many times and knew each other.

The outside world doesn't know about Ming Tu, he knows.

That's why the clan is worried.

In terms of the layout of the war, his deduction ability has infinite possibilities, and that is a butcher knife without emotions, and he will not end well if he looks at it.

According to the current intelligence, the silver hair is also the opponent's star.

They don't know much about the silver-haired fox.

The marching ant group, first Mingyue, then Mingtu, then Mingqiyu, etc., the grudges are too deep, and they can only be destroyed if they can't be solved.

chapters.title: Chapter 1020: : Dark Forest Split
chapters.body:
Chapter 1020: : Dark Forest Split

Lin Zhiyuan arrived at the company as usual, and the years had washed away his youthfulness when he first entered the marching ant group, leaving him calm and restrained.

He was trained as a core talent by the marching ant group. With his own hard work and hard work, he is now the number two person in the virtual reality department.

In addition to Wushuang who creates virtual reality, he has the oldest qualifications in the Virtual Reality Department.

For Wushuang and the marching ant group, they all admire from the bottom of their hearts. Even without Chen Mo's relationship, no one would have an opinion on her being in a high position at a young age.

At a young age, he developed neural computing networks, combined with the boss’ quantum technology and consciousness connection technology, and spread virtual reality.

The name of a genius girl has long been spread throughout the marching ant group.

Today Wushuang informed him that he had to come out of the laboratory to the conference room. Because there is a very important virtual reality platform that needs the assistance of the virtual reality department to develop.

Today's marching ant group is no longer what it used to be, not as simple as a company.

The marching ant group, which started with technology, retained all the technical departments.

They are the original game development department, renamed the virtual reality department, and have a separate headquarters base.

The virtual reality department of the marching ant has continued to expand after the emergence of virtual reality technology. The virtual reality game platform that monopolizes the earth has also become the largest virtual reality platform under the jurisdiction of the marching ant.

At the beginning of the earth through the use of virtual reality games to select the armored division, the virtual reality department will not only operate the virtual reality game platform, but also undertake some special virtual reality space development so as to provide other departments for virtual reality experiments.

In addition to the earth headquarters, there are branches of their group in the star field under the jurisdiction of the marching ant group.

The planets affected by the marching ant group have their branches, covering all virtual reality talents in the star domain.

The former members of the game department of the marching ant group have now become senior members of the virtual reality department.

Meeting room of the Virtual Reality Department.

The core personnel of the Virtual Reality Department are all present. Those who are not on the earth appear in their positions through holographic projection.

They are all discussing the content of this meeting.

What Wushuang informed them was that there was an important virtual reality platform to be developed, and the core personnel of all teams in the virtual reality department had a meeting.

They are all very curious about what platform it is that should be so grand.

He Wushuang also appeared at the top of the Armed Forces Department and the top executives of the administrative department.

Senior officials from other departments come to their meeting room?

Everyone on the court looked at each other.

"This time we are convening everyone to inform a research topic. This time we need the Virtual Reality Department to assist the armed departments and administrative departments to develop a virtual reality platform. This platform requires the Star Territory under the Marching Ant Group to be used by all lives. "

"What is the role and function of this platform?" a virtual reality engineer asked.

"Select talents for our marching ant group."

...

Under the leadership of the robot, Ming Tu entered the No. 1 building area of the March Ant Group headquarters.

It has been more than ten days since I returned to Pisces and Cetus.

The Ming Tu War Department is currently stationed in Sagittarius, and he chose to return to Earth with Chen Mo.

"This is the consciousness transfer laboratory. Now you can choose the life genes you need."

Chen Mo pointed to the gene selection system.

Here is a collection of all the life genes that have entered the Star Territory of the Marching Ant Group, as well as the genes of other high-level life in the universe. The gene bank has a very large capacity.

Ming Tu has no expression on his face.

"Humanity." Ming Tu chose the genome of human beings on Earth without thinking.

Chen Mo was taken aback by his choice.

Among the options is the genome of Ming Tu's original life group. He thought that Ming Tu would choose his original group.

But he chose human beings.

"Why?" Chen Mo asked.

"It looks pleasing to the eye."

"..."

He chose, and Chen Mo no longer said more.

"You can choose your look, and the artificial intelligence will edit the genome according to the look you want."

Ming Tu began to choose meticulously, and it took about half an hour before he pieced together the looks he liked according to his preferences.

He chose the same yellow race as Chen Mo. He looks a little handsome, but looks very cold, a bit like Ming Tu's current temperament, an ascetic man.

"How long will it take?" Ming Tu asked.

"It takes about five months to add the growth potion, and the cloned life form can become an adult."

"Thank you."

Chen Mo was a little surprised when the word ‘thank you’ came out of Ming Tu’s mouth, and then smiled.

...

"Di Nanye, give up your idea, I can swear in the name of my mother that I will not blame you for the past this time." Dinan Miro looked ugly at the orc-like life in front of him, trying to carve himself as much as possible. Anger.

Di Nanye, his good brother, launched a dark forest coup on the eve of the Star Festival, making them a joke of the whole universe.

"Since I gave the first order, I didn't intend to give up."

Di Nanye grinned, the rough leather armor on his face made his smile a bit sullen.

"Why did you get to this point?"

"Ho **** ho."

Di Nanye let out a weird laugh.

"Why? The dark dragon is dead, but you do nothing. You know that it was the Tik tribe who colluded with the black-eye civilization and revealed the dark dragon's whereabouts to them, and sent someone to assassinate the black-eye civilization. You are actually afraid of the black With the strength of Tong Qing, I only dare to find faults in the endless sea, and in front of Tong Qing, I still have to greet him with a smile. In my eyes, you are a coward, bullying and fearing hardship."

Speaking of this, Dinan Miro became restless, and an anger was brewing.

"Do you think I don't want to fight with the black pupils? Why do you think it is so easy to know that the Tick tribe is in collusion with the black pupils? Did you really find out? That is Tongqing's calculation.

He wants to use us as a knife to shake Vivroyun's position, and he can inherit it. He failed with me, so he went to Shi Ganxing and killed Dan, which attracted the anger of Thor Civilization and White Star Civilization, and now he has succeeded. "

"Why didn't you dare to do it when Bai Xing and Thor joined forces to deal with the black pupil? You do it, and the three companies put pressure on it. Wouldn't Viveroyun sacrifice a pupil and protect the black pupil?" Di Nanye roared, His eyes show fire.

"Our dark forest is inherently weak, and I want them to lose all of them, so our dark forest civilization can rise and grow." Dinan Miro took a little bit of anger and felt a little guilty: "I am forbearing for the dark forest civilization."

"Ho **** ho, keep talking for the dark forest civilization? You are so virgin, you go and set up an archway. For the dark forest, you give me your power, and now the dark forest does not need to be divided."

Di Nanye's face was full of sarcasm.

"Do you dare to give it? You dare not give it. After all, you are greedy for life and fear of death, you are not willing to give up the power in your hands, and you dare not give a fart to your enemy."

"Enough, Dark Dragon is my son, don't I feel sad for his death?" Dinan Miro broke out in anger: "I am for Dark Forest."

"Tongqing is so smart, he should tell you a message next."

"What?" Dinan Miro was stunned.

"Dark Dragon is not your son, he is my son."

Huh!

Dinan Miro froze in place with staring eyes, cold hands and feet, looking at this familiar face in front of him, an unprecedented anger erupted, occupying all of his consciousness.

"Di Nanye, you and I will never die. Ah..." Dinan Miro went crazy and slammed Di Nanye with a punch. The fist passed through the holographic projection, letting him miss.

Ahhhhh!

Like crazy, he grabbed the chair beside him and smashed it against the holographic platform in front of him.

The next day, the dark forest civilization, one of the seven god-level civilizations, split and shocked the universe.

chapters.title: Chapter 1021: : Times Have Changed
chapters.body:
Chapter 1021: : Times Have Changed

Zhao Min gave Chen Mo a document, a plan for super promotion.

In the age of the universe, as the decision makers of the marching ant group, their pattern has long surpassed the height of all mankind and is no longer confined to the nations of the earth.

Now that the marching ant group has become the overlord of the universe, they don't want the human beings on Earth to be so weak.

At the meeting, Lan was right that the earth is their hometown.

No matter how special this place is, the other races in their Star Territory are not qualified to have an opinion. The marching ant group has risen from here, and the earth people are the first soldiers to defeat the dynasty.

Besides, this is where Chen Mo's population and hometown are.

The first beneficiary group to popularize superpower is naturally human beings.

"The earth should change." Zhao Min said.

Chen Mo picked up the file and glanced at it.

On the vertical day, the marching ant group announced to humans around the world in a strong posture that in the future, it will gradually enter the development of super energy for all people. Every human on earth can develop and evolve and possess powerful super energy.

At the same time, the interstellar spacecraft will be opened. Humans on Earth can take the public interstellar spacecraft to go to other galaxies and planets.

The prerequisite for interstellar travel in a spacecraft is that it must undergo physical development, otherwise it will not be able to adapt to the atmosphere and viruses of other planets.

So human beings, upon hearing these news, the first words that popped up in their minds were.

Times have changed.

Under the strong influence of the marching ant group, all nuclear countries on the planet began to destroy nuclear weapons. With the assistance of the marching ant group, led by the Huaxia official, integrated the world and started the global human integration.

Under the absolute strength of the marching ant group, the earth's change is proceeding smoothly.

Some Americans and Europeans protested and marched, rejecting the integration of human beings, rejecting the development of super power, and believing that the marching ant group is killing humans.

However, all the protesters were captured by the marching ant group and the rights to super power development were cancelled.

In the age of the universe, there are still demonstrations for this one-third of the earth to protest this stupid behavior, which is destined to be eliminated by the times.

In this era, to refuse to use technology to accelerate the evolution of life is to put oneself in a disadvantaged position. This kind of ignorance and shortsightedness is harmful to the future of the earth.

After that, the marching ant group issued a report.

Anyone who publicly spreads and clamors against big integration and super power development will prohibit super power development and use all the science and technology of the marching ant group, allowing him to live in the era of one acre of three-point field guarding the earth.

The marching ant group's iron-blooded and decisive means immediately stopped those who wanted to emerge.

With the cooperation of all continents, super power academies have been established on the earth, and super power laws and rules have also been issued. The earth is changing in an orderly manner.

The vigorous superpower transformation has made the earth the first pioneer in the universe to enter the superpower era.

...

Lan scanned the pieces of information that came up.

Many small groups of troops infiltrated and harassed the periphery of the Sloan Great Wall, not one or two, but as many as tens of thousands. Once they chase, the other party will flee and will not entangle them.

Although these small units will not cause much loss, they are overwhelmed. If they are accidentally caught by the opponent's loopholes, they may cause big losses.

From the action point of view, some people want to do things behind their backs.

The opponent's purpose is very clear. Let the Hongqiao battlefield of the Sloan Great Wall be distracted to deal with them and give the Hongqiao battlefield an advantage.

"The methods are clean and neat, and the action is organized. It is not an idle force looking for trouble. I am afraid that the forces behind this are not small." Lan stared at the intelligence and said.

It is definitely not a small civilization that can achieve this level. Now the marching ant group is strong and the limelight is flourishing. Small forces have to deal with them, and they must weigh the consequences.

"Can you find which power it is?" Chen Mo asked.

Lan shook his head and said, "The small groups of troops who came to harass all have smart chips implanted in their brains. Once caught, the smart chips will be activated to confine their memories and perform brainwashing. For the time being, they are not sure which one they are. "

"What are you going to do?" Chen Mo frowned slightly.

"Kill a few chickens and show the monkey behind." Lan's long, narrow eyes flashed with cold light like a knife.

The harassment of the Sloan Great Wall is getting more and more serious. If it is allowed to develop, once it causes irreversible huge losses, it will not be a good thing for the Hongqiao battlefield of the Sloan Great Wall.

It's not clear which force is behind, but it's easy to figure out which ethnic group.

Soon, Lan asked the Great Demon War Department to go to the constellations outside the Sloan Great Wall and destroy 20 small civilizations in a row.

However, they were a step late. Those small civilized royal families and those in power had already led the core ethnic groups and important personnel to flee, leaving some innocent lives on the planet.

...

"Father, we have sent a small group of troops to harass the Sloan Great Wall according to your request." Prince Wu respectfully reported.

Emperor Wu showed satisfaction, with a smile on his rough face, Emperor Wei and Emperor Yu both showed light joy. In the final battle of the Star Festival, he has already demonstrated his strength, and now the Hercules does not need to be as low-key as before.

Seeing that Prince Wu had doubts on his face, Emperor Wu said, "Are you wondering why we should act on the marching ant group?"

Prince Wu nodded and said: "Now the marching ant group is in full swing, and we are not wise to engage with it. It is not wise to add a powerful enemy out of thin air. Offending them is not good for us."

"You can say that, it means that you have carefully thought about the gains and losses." Emperor Wu glanced at Prince Wu with admiration, then said: "But you can't just care about temporary gains and losses. You think, we don't do anything, the army ants treat us. Isn't the threat less?"

"This..." Prince Wu hesitated for a while, and after careful consideration, he said: "There are also threats. The marching ants are right next to us, bordering the stars. They are powerful and the threat to us always exists."

"That's right." Emperor Wu nodded calmly: "Now the marching ants are strong, and they have the qualifications to compete in the universe. We are bordered by their star field, and a war is inevitable in the future. Alliance with the phantom civilization, against the marching ant group, once The phantom civilization breaks the Hongqiao of the Sloan Great Wall, and the two of them will enter a full-scale war."

Prince Wu thoughtfully.

Seeing his unclear appearance, Emperor Wu continued: "The strength of the marching ant group should not be underestimated. It can be said that the army is strong and the technology is not weak. If they go to full-scale war with the meditation civilization, the two will definitely consume Seriously, and even both sides will suffer. This is very beneficial to us."

Prince Wu suddenly realized.

Even if they choose to form an alliance with the Pluto civilization, in this era, there are no permanent friends.

If the marching ant group is destroyed, and the star field of the marching ant is received by the scorpion civilization, then the stellar civilization bordering their star field is the spit civilization, which is a bigger and more dangerous beast. Maybe the butcher will come to them.

And if the losses of the Pluto civilization in this battle are too serious, their Hercules may not be able to use the benefit of their allies to demand the takeover of the Hongqiao of the Sloan Great Wall.

No matter how bad they are, they can collect some of the star domains of the marching ant group to obtain greater benefits.

"Big Brother, have you ever thought that once the meditation civilization is defeated in the Baiwu Hongqiao?" Emperor Wei asked this question subconsciously.

As soon as he said this, the hall fell silent.

This subconscious question seemed to pierce another wall and put a series of questions on the surface. Even Emperor Wei who asked this question suddenly woke up.

Yes, they didn't count the possibility of the failure of the meditation civilization from the beginning of the decision.

But the defeat of the god-level civilization is a bit hard to imagine.

However, the meditation civilization did have several somersaults in the hands of the marching ant group, and the failure may not exist.

Emperor Wu was stunned by this question, frowned and thought about it, and then tuned out the star map. The three emperors all paid attention to the star map and began to talk quietly.

"It's impossible for the meditation civilization to fail in such a critical war?" Prince Wu muttered.

"Nothing is impossible." The Emperor Yu shook his head and said, "Nephew, you are still young and have not experienced many wars. For war, never say that it is impossible. War has any possibility."

As soon as Emperor Yu's Dun Dun teaching was finished, Emperor Wu spoke.

"If the Pluto civilization fails, it will be lively. Many top civilizations in the universe have long coveted the status of god-level civilizations, and even several god-level civilizations hope that they can destroy a few, so that they can dominate and gain greater The power and interests of the world. Once the descent civilization appears, the end will not be any better than the dark forest."

"Father's point is that if the Ming body fails, it will split?" Prince Wu asked in shock.

Emperor Wu shook his head and said nothing.

chapters.title: Chapter 1022: : Dangerous Situation
chapters.body:
Chapter 1022: : Dangerous Situation

Armed headquarters, the generals and stars from all warheads of the marching ant group gathered together.

Wang Hai, Black Eagle, Kuyao, Wat Mu, Damazu, Zhu He, Xiaoli, Qu Shu, Zhong Lei, Chi Jin, Kutian and others are discussing the current situation.

Among them, Wang Hai, Wu Mu and other generals stationed outside appeared through projection.

"First, I will introduce you to a new colleague, Ming Tu." Chen Mo looked at Ming Tu beside him.

Taking him back to the planet and their star field for so long, this is the first time that Ming Tu has officially met with the generals of the Armed Forces Department.

"In the future, Ming Tu will be our comrade-in-arms, and can give back to each other's comrade-in-arms." Chen Mo said solemnly.

As soon as these words came out, everyone on the court looked at Ming Tu and applauded.

And Ming Tu next to Chen Mo, raising his eyes to look at Chen Mo, his always cold expression, rarely softened. As the judge of the meditation civilization, he can get such trust, which is unprecedented.

In the meditation civilization, he is faced with endless monitoring and restriction, as well as indelible hatred. It is here that he feels a little warm.

At least here, someone is willing to trust him.

"Just say a word." Chen Mo led the words to Ming Tu.

After a stunned start, Ming Tu said quietly, "My name is Ming Tu."

Just four words, one sentence indeed.

Not shy, nor unfamiliar.

During this time of contact, Chen Mo also knew about Ming Tu.

Special encounters and special physical limitations have allowed him to seldom communicate with other lives for hundreds of years, let alone feel the temperature, so he naturally develops a solitary and introverted character. It is obviously unrealistic to let him talk a lot.

"Ming Tu just joined us, and he will lead the Ming Tu battle department in the future. I hope everyone will take care of each other and be the most trusted comrades in arms."

After Chen Mo finished speaking, let everyone sit down.

"This time, the Great Wall of Sloan was harassed by a large number of small units, and some eyebrows were investigated." Zhu He stood up and reported the intelligence: "According to our investigation, there is a high probability that it is related to the Hercules."

Hercules?

Qu Shu was shocked.

That is the land of martial immortals, the first of the twelve lands, and it is among the most powerful top civilizations. The star area spans tens of billions of light years. It just so happens that the territory has some borders with them.

The holographic star map appeared on the combat platform, and the bordering star regions of the two sides were clear at a glance.

During this time he was worried and had been dealing with harassment. After all, that is his hometown, and the other party's harassment on such a large scale, he is also afraid that something will happen and bring trouble to the battlefield of Baiwu Hongqiao, that is the most serious.

After joining the marching ant group, he performed well, was willing to learn, and had the stability of a veteran star. He quickly integrated into the group. After Lan's training, his tactical ability was greatly improved.

His warhead also uses the various technologies of the marching ant group to complete the transformation, which is one level higher than before.

Therefore, in the battle of the Great Wall of Sloan, he was stationed at the Great Wall of Sloan as a ready-to-support force, and also protected the rear of the War Department of Wat Mu guarding Hongqiao, so as to be foolproof.

After all, their opponent is the meditation civilization, and this war cannot be lost.

Now there is one more Hercules?

"Why does Hercules come over to harass us?" Qu Shu asked.

"The battle of Mu's Tianxing? Was it because of Tianxing's suicide note in the hands of the boss? Or, they were afraid that we would become bigger and affect their safety?"

After Qu Shu's question, all the questions about the reason for Hercules intervention were asked.

"The place they chose is the Sloan Great Wall. We failed in the Sloan Great Wall. What good will it do for them?" Black Hawk asked.

"That's a good question." Lan said at the beginning: "What good will the War of the Sloan Great Wall do to Hercules?"

The court fell into short thoughts.

"We weaken our strength. We are bordered by the Hercules. We are strong, and it is not good for them. In the words of the earth, there is no room for two tigers in a mountain." Watuki said.

"But if we lose, Hercules may usher in a stronger tiger, and there may be some kind of benefit agreement between them." Wang Hai said.

The generals all set their sights on the star map, bordering the Baiwu Hongqiao.

Pluto civilization.

When it comes to the civilization of the meditation body, the generals are all looking towards Ming Tu. He was born in the Pluto civilization, that is his old club, and he is undoubtedly the one who knows the Pluto civilization and their generals best.

I saw Ming Tu at this time, staring at the star map, with a ray of hatred in his eyes, cold and ruthless, and murderous.

...

"In this situation, it seems that the meditation civilization is preparing to live with the marching ant group endlessly." Yan smiled calmly.

In the black-pupil civilization, Yan's physique is considered thin, the black-pupil color patterns are chaotic, and his personal strength is weak, but it does not affect his military achievements.

Once served as a staff member of the Black Eye First Army Corps, he fought in all directions. He killed the courageously and made the enemy frightened. Now the person in charge of the General Staff Headquarters of the Black Eye Civilization has a higher power.

A lot of Tong Qing's decision on the situation must come to Yan to discuss, his real power is almost under Tong Qing.

In terms of age, Tongqing is bigger, but Yan's appearance looks older. He fights all the year round and is decisive and decisive. In the eyes of mental exhaustion, he is naturally not as energetic as the powerful Tongqing and looks younger.

Withdrawing his gaze from the star chart, the pupil was green and thoughtful.

The prestige of the meditation civilization has been hit again and again in the hands of the marching ant group. Only by destroying the marching ant group can the meditation civilization be prosperous.

After the sudden change in Hongqiao, the situation of the Pluto civilization is getting worse and worse. If they win the marching ant group this time, other civilizations will be afraid, and they will be able to solve their current dilemma.

If you don't win...

"Who do you think can win this war?" Tong Qing asked calmly.

Yan thought for a while, and said: "It's hard to say who wins and who wins. Wars are changing rapidly. At least, there is no obvious gap between the two sides in the weapons and technologies that have been exposed."

Hitomi nodded in agreement: "From the current intelligence point of view, their technology is not backward. Mastering so many advanced technologies in such a short period of time should be the core of technology left over from a certain top civilization. However, their super technology may A lot more advanced than us."

"I don't need to worry too much about the superpower problem for the time being," Yan said.

The mainstream warfare in the universe competes with technologies such as weapons of war, war robots, and warships. The confrontation of individual soldiers mostly occurs in encounters, or offensive and defensive battles when weapons are exhausted.

Superpower affects the individual strength of life, but does not affect the mainstream of war technology.

In space war, discover and destroy.

Once the fleet is discovered by the enemy, it will face a devastating blow. Under the space weapons and the speed of light destruction weapons, even the most powerful individual soldiers are like reptiles.

"Chen Mo's abilities are not simple. Do you know what it felt like to fight against Mu's Sky Star that time?" Tong Qing had memories in his eyes.

When Yan raised a little interest, it would make Tongqing say that it was not a simple life, but not many. Dan did not get this evaluation back then: "I am a little curious now."

"Like facing a black hole, you will never see his hole cards, a sense of powerlessness, if you change your life is a sense of despair, your confidence will be destroyed in the constant fight with him, which is very tricky." He sighed and said: "It was when I fought him at that time, I was sure that he had hidden the secret of life in the fourth dimension."

Yan was horrified and moved.

"Close to the subject, at the Great Wall of Sloan, shall we send troops there?" Tong Qing said.

"There are ten cities between us and the marching ant group, and there is no direct territorial contact. Sending a small group of troops there is not very effective. Sending a corps in the past will cause insufficient supplies and insufficient reinforcements. It is easy to cause problems. The vigilance of the surrounding forces. Do nothing, it is the best state now, watch them fight against the meditation civilization."

Yan pointed to the division of forces on the holographic star chart.

"Don't worry that the Pluto civilization will keep your hands. This war is very important to the Pluto civilization. The Pluto race must win by all means."

otherwise……

chapters.title: Chapter 1023: : Hongqiao Offensive And Defensive Battle
chapters.body:
Chapter 1023: : Hongqiao Offensive And Defensive Battle

"Report, there is an emergency report from the front, and the marching ant group dispatched the Kunpeng battle department, and Chen Bing joined the star field."

This news caused the three emperors on the court to raise their eyebrows.

Emperor Wu chuckled and didn't care: "It seems to know that we are making trouble."

"It's a bit fast, it seems that this marching ant group has something." Emperor Wei said in a gloomy tone, jokingly.

"Think about how to deal with the problem."

Emperor Yu gently picked up a drink and drank it all at once. He is the one with the mildest personality among the Three Emperors. He usually does things and never panics, but he is confident.

The question of playing or not playing.

"Fighting, we will definitely suffer losses, but it can hold part of the opponent's forces, which is beneficial to the battlefield of the meditation civilization. If not, the meditation civilization will definitely doubt the sincerity of our alliance." Emperor Wu pondered.

"If you want me to say I can yell at them." Wei Di's character is relatively hot, anxious.

"It's not right." Emperor Yu shook his head: "That will become a war between us and the marching ant civilization. This is not worth the gain for us."

Emperor Wu also nodded, agreeing with Emperor Yu's statement: "It's a compromise. We will join forces with Chen and Bing, posture, and then fight with the marching ant group to create tension. Don't do anything. Just watch other things. To meet some of the opponent’s military requirements."

"Aren't you afraid that he will do it on us in turn?" Wei Di puzzled.

"They won't." Yudi said: "Now the marching ant group is at war with the major god-level civilizations, and it is at war with the Pluto civilization, and it will do more harm than good. As long as the opposing commander is not a fool, they will not choose Take the initiative to fight us."

...

Ming Ading stared at the star map in front of him.

On the holographic star chart, there are various dense and complex marks.

Garrison, troop strength, Hongqiao, supply, defensive line, battlefield, enemy layout, supply, troop strength and garrison, all kinds of densely packed marks, in the hologram, the degree of complexity is beyond ordinary life can understand.

This is not a star war, but a space war.

The spherical war of the planet is useless in the age of the universe.

In the age of the universe, on the battlefield of the cosmic space dimension, your enemies may attack you from any position. Eight quadrants, countless changes, and at the same time be careful of black holes, pulsars, and space turbulence in the starry sky.

There may be hundreds of thousands, millions, or even more civilizations that are adjacent to their star fields, such as the god-level civilizations with vast star fields like the Pluto civilization.

This is not as simple as hundreds of civilizations on a certain planet, and the complexity of cosmic wars is unimaginable.

With such a huge star field and complicated external environment, as a star, you need a powerful brain and an excellent overall view.

After the shocking changes in Hongqiao, this kind of neighboring relationship between literary stardoms became more complicated.

Pluto civilization is the worst one.

After the sudden change in Hongqiao, their response was insufficient and the other party occupied Hongqiao. The point is that many of the civilizations occupying Hongqiao are powerful top civilizations.

There are even two Hongqiao, connecting the star fields of Black Eye Civilization and Thor Civilization, almost making them desperate. Fortunately, the two companies do not intend to do anything to them.

This sudden change in Hongqiao completely disrupted all military defensive deployments of the meditation civilization.

And the Hongqiao leading to the Great Wall of Sloan under their control, close to the hinterland of their star field, was also lost because of Ming Tu defecting.

Today's meditation civilization is at war with many top civilizations, and the defense line is fragmented.

Ming Ah stayed on the spot, standing motionless for two hours. This kind of layout, once a detail is missed, may cause a chain reaction of the entire war, causing them all to lose.

If Ming Tu is there, he can share half of the pressure. And if Mingyue Liuhua is still there, he can also give him some reference tactics.

Ming Tu defected, Ming Yue died in battle, both of which are related to one life.

Chen Mo.

Ming Ah's gaze fell on the star field of the Great Wall of Sloan connected by the Baiwu Hongqiao.

He wanted to avenge Mingyue Liuhua, but as a commander, he could not be guided by hatred, otherwise he would die.

Ming Ah stared at the star field of the Sloan Great Wall.

Whether it is public or private, it must be won here.

"Master Baoming." The subordinate's report interrupted his thoughts.

"Say."

Ming Ah didn't look away from the star map, and his voice had no emotion.

"There will be news from the front that the War Head of the Hercules and the Chen Bing border of the Marching Ant Group have quarreled."

"Fighting?" Ming Tu was taken aback, then turned to ask.

"Yes, quarreling, the Hercules and the marching ant group are accusing each other of initiating a dispute, but they didn't really do it."

"Which army of the marching ants is on the border?"

"Kunpeng Battle Headquarters."

"Kunpeng Battle Headquarters? It should have been discovered that Hercules harassed the Great Wall of Sloan."

"My lord, do you want Hercules to increase the harassment of the opponent's Sloan Great Wall?" said a general in the battle room.

"No, don't pin your hopes on other civilizations, otherwise you will die miserably." Ming Ah looked up at the holographic projection, at the junction of the Hercules and the marching ant star field, the two warhead marks had appeared.

Pluto civilization is now at war with many top civilizations, because the location of Hongqiao is very sensitive, and even Hongqiao appears in the small universe. It can be said that they have reached the most critical moment.

The most critical battle is here at the Sloan Great Wall.

...

"This Hercules is very clever. If he doesn't confront us, he will create a topic to support us." Lan said to Chen Mo beside him.

The two parties seem to be arguing, but the two parties have not suffered any loss.

However, they must guard against each other.

"Master Lan, the Great Wall of Sloan has returned the news, and the Ming body has stepped up its offensive." Chi Jin told Lan the information.

The members of the war department suddenly came to their minds, the star map sand table opened, and the situation of the Sloan Great Wall appeared in front of them.

The situation of the marching ant colony is much better than that of the Pluto civilization, because their territory is relatively small, and the inner star field variation Hongqiao is relatively small. Later, two Hongqiao bridges were added to the star field. One leads to a huge cosmic hole that has not yet been discovered by civilization, and the other leads to a remote Xiaowen star field. They quickly controlled that small civilization without much effort. strength.

Because the Rania Kea super galaxy, where the marching ants are located, is in a remote location, there are not many large civilizations bordering it.

Pluto civilization is different, now it is multi-line combat.

Ming Tu defected to them and was known as Mingyue Liuhua, who is most likely to become the third top general star. Because he underestimated the enemy was killed by them, there is only Ming A in the Ming body civilization.

In the layout of the space war, the mental effort is very huge, and the overall situation needs to be considered. The more battlefields there are, the more factors that will be considered by the star.

They don't need to be distracted too much to worry about other battlefields. In this regard, they have some advantages.

"Increase your troops and defend Hongqiao." Lan only issued the simplest order.

...

The explosion of antimatter is extremely dazzling in space, silent and beautiful, bursting out infinite rays of death and energy.

The Hongqiao battlefield is full of war firepower.

The first stage of the interstellar war offensive and defensive warfare, firepower is consumed.

Unmanned warships shuttle, space-based laser sweeps, anti-matter bombs like rainstorms, war robots like schools of deep-sea fish, depicting the battlefield of the end times in silent space.

A steady stream of weapons and anti-matter energy is being transported, thrown into the battlefield, destroyed, transported again, and so on.

The planets near the battlefield were all mined and digested, eroded, turned into a steady stream of weapons, and sent to the battlefield.

The collision of anti-matter bombs, the strafing of space-based laser weapons, the debris of space-based weapons and unmanned battleships, as well as the remains of war robots, are all over the space, which becomes a sea of death, a space ruin.

No life dared to approach, approaching is death.

Under the blockade of space interference and space interference, this kind of battlefield is unable to carry out the projection of space weapons and light speed weapons, so it can only head hard.

Both sides know the meaning of this battlefield.

"My lord, the thirteenth wave of stealth soldiers died."

"Launch the 14th wave."

With an order, thousands of stealth soldiers entered the space battlefield, scattered to all quadrants, and went to the enemy's defense line.

Stealth soldiers will not be detected by quantum radar. They are ghosts on the battlefield. Their mission is to destroy as many space-based weapons as possible, create firepower advantage for them, and disrupt the enemy's defense line.

Mingxi's face was gloomy, and his eyes were fixed on the battlefield projection.

The 13 waves of stealth soldiers have limited results.

However, the number of stealth soldiers is decreasing, and the quality is decreasing.

The consumption is too serious, and the cost of this offensive and defensive war is too great.

He felt that he was not attacking an ordinary civilization, but a god-level civilization of the same level, and the opponent's war technology was not worse than them.

Suddenly, a subordinate hurriedly came over and said cautiously: "My lord, there is an urgent report from above."

chapters.title: Chapter 1024: : Super Weapon
chapters.body:
Chapter 1024: : Super Weapon

"Congratulations, passed the assessment."

A voice seemed like a natural sound.

Carrie retired from the virtual battlefield and exhaled.

The assessment is to stand out among the many stars. She faces the competition of the other seven stars in the virtual reality battlefield.

At the beginning, she said it was a virtual reality assessment, but she didn't care, because the simulated battlefield of virtual reality is very different from the actual battle. The powerful star in the virtual reality battlefield may not be like this in the real battlefield.

But after entering, he found the difference.

At the beginning, an examiner named ‘Fox’ asked a series of questions about war, even if she was a star, it was a bit difficult.

Later, she began to compete against the assessment, the result is obvious, she was taught enough miserable, defeated.

It's been a long time since I lost so badly in the simulated battlefield of virtual reality.

After that, she refused to admit defeat, and played three more games with each other, all of which failed.

This made her wonder.

Obviously this organization has top generals, but it still has to recruit generals. But when this doubt appeared, she was relieved.

In the age of war, it is difficult to find a general in a thousand armies. What's more, this organization may have other top forces behind it in secret.

Coming out of the virtual reality cabin, Carrie looked at a dozen other stars.

They have all played and cooperated in the battlefield of virtual reality, and they are considered comrades-in-arms, and they are quite sympathetic.

Seeing the poisonous girl coming in, all the lives on the court were awe-inspiring.

If they guessed correctly, the leader of this dark organization is the female life in front of them. To be one of the overlords of Chaos Land, they don't think this female life is simple.

"Congratulations, Carrie, Red sequence, your assessment results are in the first sequence." The poisonous girl said two names.

Hong Xu is different from Kaliyi. Kaliyi was born in a shepherd city and belongs to the top civilized general. With a red root, he receives the most formal war college training and the most systematic education.

The Red Order was born with a battle armour regiment, or an obscure medium-sized war armour regiment.

The battle armour regiment was kicked out of the team because of the head's perseverance and he was disarmed and returned home.

In the subsequent operations, his original battle armour regiment was destroyed, and he could only be a tactical teacher at the Planetary Military Academy in a corner of a certain planet every day, relying on virtual reality combat and classroom theory to satisfy his command. Qianjun’s dream.

Until the organization found him.

Almost without even thinking about it, he joined the other party's organization.

If a general star does not die on the battlefield, but dies in a muddle, it would be an insult to him. After three rounds of virtual reality simulation war selection, he stood out and was sent here.

During this period of time, the teaching and assessment of that mysterious general will be useful to all generals on the field for life.

Regardless of whether they were born in grassroots or extraordinary, at this moment, they have gained a lot, standing on the same stage.

"Congratulations, you all passed the assessment, but if you want to go further or complete the transformation, you still need to go to the real battlefield."

The girl with the poisonous skin was expressionless, and her expression was so cold that she was cold.

"Next, Kaliyi and Hongxu will be divided into two teams to form their own warheads. Remember, you are colleagues and competitors. Who can become the commander of the team in the future will depend on your respective achievements. And performance on the battlefield."

Kaliyi and Hong Xu looked at each other, then retracted.

Both of them can see the meaning of war in each other's eyes.

"Well, you two, among your comrades-in-arms, start to choose a team. Carrie has the highest overall score in the assessment, and Carrie chooses the first place first." The poisonous woman's voice was beyond doubt.

"Chengluo." Carrie said a name without hesitation.

A middle-aged life slowly walked to Carrie.

"Inagi." Hong Xu said.

"Sixty-six."

...

"Xiao Yu, do me a favor." Chen Mo looked at Xiao Yu and blinked.

"Do you still want me to help?"

Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo in surprise, but seeing the grin on his face made him feel uneasy.

"Say it."

"I will ask you to do a research."

"Are you addicted to studying your wife?" Xiao Yu cursed with a smile.

"It's not studying you, it's studying your abilities." Chen Mo said.

"Is there any difference?"

"Yes, Mo Nu and I are Wushuang. We are developing a special weapon that may end the cosmic war." Chen Mo said mysteriously in Xiao Yu's ear.

"Weapon? This weapon is called a'woman'?" Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo jokingly: "I found out that a woman can destroy the world, then grab me to study?"

"Hey, I found that you have become humorous. This is a good idea."

"Go away." Xiao Yu gave him a white look and became serious: "You study weapons, how can I help?"

"Super weapon."

"Super weapon?" Xiao Yu suddenly turned his head and stared at Chen Mo, as if he found a monster. Chen Mo was also frowned upon by her: "This is what you and Mo Nu have done with Wushuang's recent gods and secrets? "

Recently, the father and daughter, as well as the Mo girl, went out early every day and didn't come back until very late. Sometimes they didn't come back at all and studied in the laboratory overnight.

Xiao Yu couldn't help them. They didn't say what to study, and she couldn't take the initiative to ask.

Now Chen Mo actually told her.

Chen tacitly nodded.

The disclosure of super power technology means the arrival of the universal super power era in the universe. Superpower is very special and involves consciousness. Until now, many civilizations have not solved the mystery of superpower.

However, these mysteries are solved here by Chen Mo and Mo Nu.

"Can super power still have weapons?" Xiao Yu asked.

"Yes." Chen Mo nodded and solemnly explained: "What if the superpower is enlarged?"

Chen Mo stretched out his hand and lightly tapped the glass water glass in front of him, only to see the water glass floating in the air, turning into a transparent glass ball in front of them, and falling on Xiao Yu's hand.

"This is the ability to control objects. What if my ability is expanded to manipulate planets like a water cup, or even a star system or galaxy?"

Hearing this, Xiao Yu felt a bit cold in the glass ball in his hand.

Dreaming about the scene where one person controls the entire star system, she felt a little hairy.

Chen Mo didn't pay attention to her reaction and continued: "Like the battle between Tongqing and I in the Star Stele Forest, if our two superpowers continue to rise, with our own strength, the possibility of the existence of the planet is destroyed."

"Impossible, it takes a lot of energy to destroy a planet. A living body cannot have that much energy, right?" Xiao Yu asked uncertainly.

"Conservation of energy is for the existing cosmic system. If it is the fourth dimension, that mysterious dimension, do you say that its energy is not conserved? Just like the two-dimensional world cartoons written by us humans. There is no conservation of energy. This scene rises to the scene of a four-dimensional world versus a three-dimensional world."

While in the Star Stele Forest, Chen Mo was aware of the energy used by his body.

He does not know whether it is the energy of the existing universe, the energy of an unknown dimension, or their special quantum body that has stolen the energy of the time dimension in the past or the future.

However, in his and Mo Nu's bodies, there is indeed a steady flow of energy, but it will not affect them.

Hearing what Chen Mo said, Xiao Yu stared, feeling that the worldview he had constructed was collapsing.

"To develop super-power weapons, I have also thought about it. In today's cosmic wars, the fastest rate of destruction is the speed of light. Calculated by 100,000 light years in the Milky Way, it takes 100,000 years to destroy a single space weapon. Taking the diameter of the universe hundreds of billions of light years In other words, the progress of the war is too slow. If space weapons are deployed regardless of the number, they will be out of control, the damage will be too great, and the cost will be too great."

"Super-power weapons are just as expensive. According to you, they are equally destructive."

Xiao Yu shook the glass ball in his hand.

"This situation is better than space weapons destruction, it is also controllable than space weapons, and there is a solution to war beyond the speed of light."

"Beyond the speed of light?" Xiao Yu asked.

"Yes, superpower involves consciousness. Consciousness is a fourth-dimensional matter. It is not restricted by the highest speed of the universe. Consciousness can go anywhere in the universe at any time, just like Mo Girl can open the space door and send you to Mu's Sky Star. same."

In the Tianxing stele forest, the words recorded by Mu's Tianxing gave him an initiation.

Consciousness is the fourth dimension of matter.

After that, the gate of the fourth dimension opened to him, giving this world unlimited possibilities.

"What can I help?"

"I think of a method that does not work on the destruction of planets and galaxies, but works on the fundamentals, which might end war quickly."

"what way?"

"Remember that brainwave device of Dr. X?"

chapters.title: Chapter 1025: :Hand Of God
chapters.body:
Chapter 1025: :Hand Of God

The general headquarters of the marching ant Venus is as busy as usual.

All kinds of intelligence are gathered here in the war department and then uploaded to the staff room of the war department.

A hundred thousand urgent news also came in.

"The news has just been sent back that Ming'A War Department has joined the Hongqiao battlefield of the Sloan Great Wall."

When Lan announced the news, there was a commotion in the Operations Department.

Pluto, the top general of the Pluto civilization, is also one of the most famous generals in the universe. Nowadays, the Pluto civilization is fighting hot, and he is presiding over the overall situation of the battle.

Let the civilization of the underworld, which should have been chaotic, remain relatively stable.

In the Ming body civilization, some people describe Ming A's style as a strong, steady and old-fashioned handsome talent. Ming Tu's style is as cold as a blade, as fierce as a fire, and too murderous.

It is also said that only Ming Ah's style can stabilize the current situation of the civilization of the Ming body, and if another general star comes over, it will not do better than Ming Ah.

"In order to ensure the security of the Sloan Great Wall battlefield, the Hongqiao battlefield may need support." Lan said.

"I'll fight." Mazu stood up.

"I'm here, how?" Xiaoli also responded.

Soon, they felt the atmosphere in the combat room was weird, and everyone looked in one direction. I saw Ming Tu staring at Ming Ah, bursting with infinite murderous aura and hatred, cold like a knife.

"Me." Ming Tu's voice was low.

"Okay, Ming Tu is over."

Lan chose Ming Tu without hesitation.

Not only the generals on the court, but even Ming Tu was a little surprised, Chao Lan nodded slightly.

...

"Remember, do you want to develop that thing?" Xiaoyu looked at Chen Mo incredulously: "Do you use that thing to control all mankind?"

"It's not about controlling all human beings, but all life in the universe."

Xiao Yuteng stood up, and before she could speak, Chen Mo stopped her and comforted her to sit down.

She knew what Xiao Yu was thinking.

Xiao Yu must have thought he was crazy.

But Xiao Yu did think so. This plan was too terrifying, and only lunatics would dare to play like this.

"It's not as scary as you think, listen to me." Chen Mo comforted Xiao Yu: "Your ability is very special. You can see the consciousness of all life. If you develop an instrument, like Dr. X, expand this consciousness. , Through quantum space-time, spread to the entire universe, and then control the consciousness of all life."

Xiao Yu heard this and looked at Chen Mo like a monster.

I dare to think of any ideas.

"I thought, this is the fastest way to end the war in the universe."

Every technological change will bring about changes in the times, as well as wars.

As far as the earth is concerned, the Stone Age was ended by the Iron Age, which was a tribal war.

The cold weapon era is vulnerable to hot weapons.

In the technological age of aircraft and tanks, thermal weapons have no power to fight back.

With regard to the current history of the universe, the War Armor era appeared, which changed the past cosmic disputes and created the Ziwei civilization of the War Armor system, and became a god-level civilization.

After the emergence of space weapons, the process and speed of war became the speed of light, and lives who were unable to escape at the speed of light faced the danger of being driven into dust by a space weapon at any time.

The war in the Stone Age may take two tribes to fight in a generation. Wars in the Cold Weapon Era have existed for several years and decades. In the era of thermal weapons, the duration of war was shortened to months. In the interstellar age, the speed of warfare is counted by the day. If you do not pay attention, the entire planet and warhead will be destroyed with one weapon.

As the tools and abilities controlled by intelligent life change, the methods of warfare are also changing.

Now that the age of super power is coming, the technology of the new era can be used to end disputes.

The speed at which this war ends can be even shorter.

"Let you participate in the research, let Mo Girl and I learn your abilities, and then we will operate the instrument." Chen Mo said.

Xiao Yu shook his head with a firm expression: "I can't let your hands be covered with blood. War will die, but even if too many people die, even if they die by the warhead, I don't want you to kill yourself. So many lives die."

Chen Mo's heart warmed and said, "I didn't say that I used that instrument to kill people."

"What do you mean?"

"You are still so stupid, stupid and cute. That instrument is really successful, do I still use it to kill people? With that ability, it is God, consciousness control, and there is no need to kill the enemy."

"Can it succeed?"

"This world is full of incredible." Chen Mo said.

Xiao Yu looked at Chen Mo blankly, thinking for a long time.

"What is the name of this project?"

"hand of God."

...

"The meditation civilization is ready to die with the marching ants." Yan stared at the holographic sand table with a faint smile: "the meditation civilization is a little anxious."

"Why?" Hitomi asked curiously.

Yan knocked on the information in his hand and handed it to Tong Qing.

"Interesting changes are taking place at the upper levels of the meditation civilization. The old patriarch is trying to cut flesh from the hands of the elders of the meditation civilization, concentrate power, and pave the way for Ming A to come to power."

"This is a bit difficult," Tong Qing said.

He knows how difficult it is to withdraw power from those nobles and high-level ethnic groups.

He has a great say in this.

At the beginning, he used external pressure to complete the centralization and integration of the black-pupil civilization, and get rid of the internal corruption of the black-pupil civilization and the situation of fighting each other. Otherwise, the current situation of the black-pupil civilization is equally bad.

If the centralization of power fails, the result will be the appearance of the dark forest civilization.

"Once the centralization is completed, even if the meditation civilization is weak, it will be difficult to destroy them. But no matter how difficult it is, they have to do it, otherwise the abyss black hole will greet them. However, Ming's reputation is not enough, he It takes a victory enough to reach the prestige of the underworld civilization and set the way to power."

"So they chose Chen Mo?" Tong Qing heard Yan's meaning.

"Yes, Ming Tu surrendered, Ming Yue Liuhua died, Ming Qiyu and Ming Yan were killed, and the delegation was slaughtered. They were all marching ants. They ruined the marching ants, enough to make Ming A's reputation reach the top of the military civilization. With this prestige, and with the support of the old patriarch, it is logical to take over the meditation civilization."

"Can't let them integrate." Tong Qing shook his head.

With the help of defeating the prestige of the former Speaker of the Black Eye Civilization, Thunder completely secured the position of the King of Thor Civilization, rectified the inside of Thor Civilization, and became the strongest civilization after Black Eye Civilization.

If you let the Ming body civilization replicate, let Ming A take over the power of the Ming body civilization and take over as the patriarch of the Ming body civilization, after a burst of blood exchange, it will be another Thor civilization.

"Then give them something." Yan smiled, and Zhizhu's self-confidence: "Help the marching ants?"

"It's not impossible. The marching ants are too immature. Although Chen Mo is mysterious, the distance is a threat. It is still near the fire, and there are Hercules stumbling them, and there is the Ten City Alliance." Tong Qing said.

"The key is will they believe us?"

Tongqing thought for a while, then smiled: "Then it depends on whether their decision makers have the courage."

...

"Do you know who came from the news?" Lan looked at the information in her hand, her eyes uncertain.

Just now Zhu He sent him a piece of information. This piece of information is a bit unbelievable. If this piece of information is true, it can determine the direction of the entire battle.

"do not know."

Zhu He was not sure about a wry smile.

As an intelligence officer, providing inaccurate information may face very terrifying consequences, but this information is too important.

Even if she is not sure, she will bring it.

"The other party does not want us to know his identity. There must be many methods, quantum communication, which cannot be cracked, so this is an uncertain message."

"Ok."

Lan dumbly looked at the intelligence in his hand and thought.

He was thinking about who might help him with them.

If it is the endless sea civilization, there is no need to be anonymous, if it is a few other companies, it is possible, but at the same time it is also possible to pit them.

If it is false news, they may suffer considerable losses, if it is true news, they can win this victory.

Zhu He hesitated and said, "Should you let the boss decide?"

chapters.title: Chapter 1026: : The Old Chief Of The White Star Civilization
chapters.body:
Chapter 1026: : The Old Chief Of The White Star Civilization

"How did you get this information?"

Lin Han was also very surprised by the information passed by Zhu He and Lan. It is a very serious matter that such important information as the meditation civilization actually flows out.

"Not sure, it was passed to us by an anonymous person, so the credibility of this information cannot be determined." Zhu He smiled bitterly.

"Anonymous?" Chen Mo was taken aback: "Lan, what do you think?"

"Maybe it was passed to us by one of several other families." Lan said: "In fact, it is easy to understand, see if this news is true, who will benefit the most. For now, the Pluto civilization has been defeated, and the other Which companies have the greatest interest."

"What if it's fake?" Chen Mo asked.

"We may lose a little, but the loss is within the controllable range. There are pros and cons, so let you make an idea. Really, we won the war, fake, our loss is controllable, and will not directly affect the Sloan Wall battlefield. Direction." Lan said.

"Eh?" Chen Mo stared at the intelligence and thought: "You can take a risk."

...

"This is an uncertain piece of information." Zhu He sent the piece of information to Ming Tu. When he spoke, his voice was very serious, as if he was afraid that Ming Tu would not know, this was an uncertain piece of information.

Seeing the content of the intelligence, Ming Tu was taken aback, his eyes flickering, very humane.

"The value of this information is very special. You should know better than me. We asked the boss for his opinion. The boss chose to take a risk and start implementing it. Let me show you this information first. Do you want to implement it?" Zhu He said .

"Good." Ming Tu nodded slightly, the hatred in his eyes bursting with light.

The next day, a fleet of the Ming Tu battle department quietly separated from the team, turned on the space engine, and jumped into the depths of space.

...

Thunder stared at the training ground in front of him.

Super training ground.

This is based on the training ground of Thor Civilization.

"Wang, these are all successfully developed lives."

A researcher handed a list to Thunder, with a serious expression.

"We improved the technology we got in the hands of Demon Flame Civilization. The side effects were reduced. It could have been put into use. Later, Loinu’s results were announced. We improved his theory and made further improvements. The success rate was higher. I haven't found it yet."

"How many special abilities have been discovered so far?" Thunder asked while looking at the list.

"Most of them are ordinary abilities. There are a total of 193 abilities. Only one special is iron control, but it has not yet reached the practical level, let alone participating in combat. It is not very supportive for the armor system. Development success rate It’s about 4%, but there are a few super-powers with multiple abilities. We are studying to make their abilities stack up."

"Research on useful abilities, otherwise it will not greatly improve the combat troops."

"Wang, if you upgrade, there are still some. Most of our soldiers are top-level beings. After using the medicine, even if they don't successfully awaken the super power, their reaction speed is much faster than before, which is equivalent to the god-level life. We have summarized this data from 100,000 volunteers who were veterans. Their health is obviously better than before, and their strength is stronger than before."

"Not bad."

There was thunder in Thunder's eyes.

The results of the Demon Flame Civilization were exchanged by Dan from Shi Ganxing for his life, but the information was somewhat incomplete, so he had been studying and improving secretly. The results announced by Loinu allowed them to break through again. This is a good thing.

Their research results may not be faster than those of other companies, but they are definitely not behind.

"Select the personnel, prepare to promote the super potion in the main star, Thor Civilization is ready to welcome a brand new era." Thunder's voice was thunderous.

...

In the small universe of the White Star Civilization, at the gravitational periphery of the largest black hole, a space fluctuation with a diameter of two meters appeared, and the space crack slowly expanded. Suddenly, an orc with a metallic luster in his skin walked out of the space hole and laughed wildly.

"Hahahaha, yes, this is the power of time and space, this is the power of invincibility, this feeling is very good."

In him, every line is particularly perfect and full of power. In space without the slightest gravitational force, he stood as if walking on the ground, very strange.

The old chieftain of the White Star Civilization. Although the White Star Civilization has become one of the god-level civilizations, it still retains the oldest title like the patriarch of the Hades and the star master of the Ziwei Star.

Ten thousand years ago, the old chief tried the law with his body, injected with medicine, sealed his body with dark matter, and plunged into the black hole.

Ten thousand years outside, fleeting in his consciousness of falling into a black hole.

The space-time around the black hole is compressed to the extreme.

It can be said that the danger is extremely dangerous there, and he may be torn apart by the terrifying gravity of the black hole at any time, and he almost ventured in with a mortal determination.

Now he proves that his idea is right.

Consciousness was immersed in the space-time compressed by the black hole, finally causing his body to mutate. The power of time and space is the highest power in this universe, and no one can escape the sanctions of time and space.

"I don't know what happened to Bai Xing now."

The old chief Bai Xing looked around in space, searching for the position of the main star in his memory. In the space in front of him, a slight spatial ripple appeared, and he stepped into it.

Hu Bingxin, who had just come out of the office, looked tired, and the hidden worries between his brows lingered.

In today's situation, there are a lot of things waiting for her to deal with every day.

Just received the news that the super powers of the Black Eye Civilization and Thor Civilization are being promoted, and they cannot lag behind. Because of this, things have only increased recently, even if she has a strong brain, she can't bear it.

Suddenly, a slight ripple was stirred up in the space in front of her, making the people around her instantly dizzy.

"Who?" Shi Ming's expression changed drastically, and he immediately protected Fox Bingxin behind him.

I saw a figure stepping out of the ripples in the space, making the lion min in front of Hu Bingxin freeze in place, dumbfounded.

"Ancestor?"

Seeing the life appearing, Hu Bingxin's voice was hesitant and uncertain.

...

After deciding to study the instrument, Chen Mo set about implementing it. This method can end the war as quickly as possible, and it can also minimize the death of life in the universe.

No matter from what perspective, the advantages outweigh the disadvantages.

As for the issue of technology being taken away, it does not exist at all. In this era, the degree of technological secrecy is very high, and the existence of quantum computing makes it impossible to crack technical secrets.

"Try the scope problem first." Chen Mo said to Xiao Yu.

"Good." Xiao Yu nodded.

After she entered a super state, a different scene appeared before her eyes, only Chen Mo's consciousness body, and the consciousness bodies of Wushuang and Mo Girl around her.

The consciousness bodies of Chen Mo and Mo Nu are very special, almost complete human forms, completely different from Wushuang's only in the brain.

"Can you see the people outside?" Chen Mo asked.

"I can't see it." Xiao Yu shook his head.

"Now we feel with our consciousness, close our eyes and try, without looking at it," Chen Mo said.

On Mo Nu's side, she has been collecting data on Xiao Yu's brain wave fluctuations, hoping to find a breakthrough in Xiao Yu's ability so that they can also learn this ability.

Following Chen Mo's arrangement, Xiao Yu slowly closed his eyes.

"Can you see it?" Chen Mo asked.

"can not see."

"Feel it with your heart, imagine that I am by your side, and see if you can see it," Chen Mo said.

Xiao Yu lay quiet on the bed, and remained silent for a long time.

Chen Mo was not in a hurry, waiting patiently by his side.

Xiao Yu's task is to use her abilities, not to withstand any drug stimulation and equipment to stimulate the brain, and will not cause any impact on the body, so there is no need to worry about her safety.

"Yes." Xiao Yu with his eyes closed suddenly said.

chapters.title: Chapter 1027: : Overture To War
chapters.body:
Chapter 1027: : Overture To War

"This base is where you will work for some time in the future."

Hui Twenty-one led Kaliyi and Hong Xu to a base on a planet and introduced them to them.

"The Land of Chaos is in the shuffling stage. Among the forces we control, there are many legions. But we do not intend to withdraw those legions from those forces, so you have two tasks next."

Upon hearing the task, Karrie and Hong Xu clung to each other's backs and immediately cheered up.

Hui Twenty turned a blind eye to their movements, he was no longer regarded as the innocent child who was hunted down in Shi Ganxing. Over the years, he has grown too much with the venomous skin girl in the dark world of Chaos Land.

"The first task is to recruit and form your respective warheads in the chaotic land."

"Respective warheads?"

Kaliyi and Hong Xu were taken aback for a moment and did not speak, but the other Jiangxing beside them muttered.

Don’t let them take over the original warhead?

"You heard that right, it's your respective warheads. Your team builds your own warheads. How many soldiers are needed is up to you. The strength of the warhead's combat power is also a content of the comparison between you. I don't understand. The generals who set up their own warheads are just talking on paper."

Hui Twenty-one's words, let them all agree.

As a general, you don’t even have a warhead of your own, which is no different from playing a virtual reality battle game.

"There will also be a list for you to choose from the equipment you need. What equipment you need, we will try our best to satisfy you. Also, after you have selected the soldiers, we will develop super powers for all soldiers. By then, all All soldiers may be capable, and you must consider these in your training and preparations."

"what?"

"Develop super powers for all soldiers?"

This situation shocked them. At this stage, few civilizations have mastered super-power technology.

Could it be that the civilization behind them has quietly mastered these technologies?

When they heard this, their hearts were extremely hot, and it seemed that the mountain behind them was not weak.

Hui Twenty turned a blind eye to their surprise.

"You have a second task, that is, while forming a warhead, command the existing legion we control in the chaotic land and begin to integrate the chaotic land star field. Your two teams will command each part of the star field separately. Star clusters, of course, don’t integrate as quickly as possible, but it depends on your layout and tactics in the command of each war, as well as the number of casualties between the enemy and ourselves.”

"Good." Carrie and Hong Xu agreed at the same time.

The two looked at each other, and they could see the eagerness in each other's eyes.

...

The war between the meditation civilization and the marching ant group has attracted the attention of the top civilization in the universe. Except for the fighting in the dark forest, this is the highest level of civilized war.

The reputation of the marching ant group spread because of Chen Mo's battle in the Tianxing Monument, and it is considered one of the top civilizations.

This enduring war has made many civilizations a crucial war.

The god-level civilization has formulated the rules and order of the universe since the last cosmic war, and its rights and prestige have not changed. At the same time, they use the power in their hands to squeeze the survival of some civilizations.

But no civilization has ever dared to fully confront them. A god-level civilization with a small universe is almost invincible.

But now it's different, the small universe is opened up by Hongqiao, which makes the ambitions of some top big civilizations begin to revive. Once the Pluto civilization fails, it shows that the god-level civilization is not invincible, which will greatly enhance the ambitions of some top civilizations.

Under the attention of the outside world, the war at the White Mist and Hongqiao Bridge at the Sloan Great Wall has lasted for a month, but the intensity did not diminish.

In the galaxies at both ends of the battlefield, some planets were completely hollowed out, and all the weapons made were sent to the front.

In the battlefield in the outer space of Baiwu Hongqiao, all kinds of debris are almost all over space, making this a place of death. Even if the spacecraft is flying here, you must be careful not to turn on the speed of light, and you are afraid of hitting the debris and disintegrating directly.

The cost of offensive and defensive warfare is the greatest. There is no fancy in this kind of battle, only head-on head-on.

Both sides of the battlefield are straining to see who can't hold on to the end.

Pluto civilization cannot afford failure, nor can the marching ant group.

"Are you all ready?" Ming A turned to the adjutant beside him.

"It's all ready." The adjutant responded, and then hesitated: "My lord, in this case, the price will be a bit high."

"If this war is not won, the cost will be even greater." Ming Ah said in a faint voice, raising his eyes to look at the star map marked in front of him: "Let the whole army prepare and launch a general attack in ten minutes."

...

"I don't know if the marching ant group has made any moves. I originally wanted to use such important news by myself. I hope that it won't be in vain to pass it on to them." Tong Qing muttered lightly while paying attention to the information returned from the front.

"I think the speaker hopes it will be in vain." Yan also followed.

"Life is so tangled, there is no way." Tong Qing smiled: "I just hope that there is a qualified opponent, otherwise such a competition is meaningless."

Yan was not surprised by Tong Qing's words: "This will test the opponent's courage and decision-making level. By the way, let's take a look at the opponent's general star layout ability."

During the conversation between the two, a pop-up window appeared on the holographic platform in front of them.

"President, there is information coming back from the front. The two sides are about to fight, I will send the picture back to you." After the reporter finished speaking, the picture disappeared and replaced by the situation on the Baiwu Hongqiao battlefield.

This is the simulated scene after quantum radar scanning. It is not 100% real, but try to restore the scene.

...

After Chen Mo asked Mo Nu to turn on the machine, he signaled Xiao Yu to start.

The consciousness weapon of the "Hand of God" has become his greatest secret weapon. This research can prevent countless lives in the universe from being destroyed by terrible war.

This is a project that he decided to start after careful consideration.

Because this project is too dangerous, one step carefully will lead to irreversible consequences.

Therefore, their project is not on the earth, but on a terrestrial planet not far from the solar system. The environment here is similar to that of the earth. They were transformed into another earth, which is also a secret research base and garrison base. Without Chen Mo's permission, no life can approach.

Here, they can carry out research unscrupulously, and they are not afraid that if this experiment goes wrong, it will cause terrible consequences to humans on the earth.

"Try again now and relax." Chen Mo said.

"Yeah." Xiao Yu nodded slightly and slowly closed his eyes.

Under Chen Mo's guidance, she began to feel the world without her eyes, but with her own consciousness. Slowly, she could see the life consciousness around her without using her eyes, and she was not affected by any barriers.

"Talk about it." Chen Mo said.

"Husband."

Xiao Yu didn't even speak, a voice resounded in Chen Mo's consciousness, it was Xiao Yu's voice.

"can."

Chen Mo was overjoyed and took another step.
