Xiao Yu's ability is very special. He can directly see other people's consciousness, read other people's memories, read minds, share consciousness, and even wake up deeply sleeping vegetatives.

When Yang Siqingyue's consciousness was deeply dormant after the brain was repaired, Xiao Yu awakened her.

Chen Mo was surprised at her ability.

Her ability is still in the preliminary stage, and there are still many special places that have not been developed, but she undoubtedly possesses incredible abilities.

"Now try a further distance."

Chen Mo stepped back ten steps, ten meters away from Xiao Yu.

Xiao Yu felt Chen Mo's consciousness moving, and his heart was slightly happy, focusing on the consciousness that appeared in his mind.

"Husband."

When Chen Mo heard the voice in his consciousness, he was astonished, with a happy expression on his face: "I can hear it. This proves that this ability can be used in a non-contact way, and it can be developed in the way you want."

Xiao Yu opened her eyes, looked at Chen Mo, and rubbed her tired eyebrows. After using this ability many times for a long time, she would also experience fatigue.

"Then what should I do next?"

"Next, let me try to copy your abilities." Chen Mo said.

...

In an unknown depth of space in the small universe of the underworld civilization, a spatial ripple slowly spreads and expands.

The outside world is unaware of all this.

It works as always.

After about five minutes, a battleship appeared silently from space.

The spatial fluctuation did not end until thousands of huge warships appeared.

No one knows about the meditation civilization, and the small universe that people think is safe has been entered.

In the dark space, with a hideous murderous aura.

"That anonymous information is true."

In the virtual reality combat space of the Solar System Command, Lan's narrow eyes are as sharp as a knife, and his face is squinted, not knowing what he is thinking.

By his side, is Ming Tu.

At this time, Ming Tu stared at the star map passed back by the battleship, feeling extremely cold and murderous.

In the next moment, a huge star map appeared in front of both of them.

chapters.title: Chapter 1028: : Troubles Of Pluto Civilization
chapters.body:
Chapter 1028: : Troubles Of Pluto Civilization

Xiao Yu's palms were covered on Chen Mo's temples. Both of them were in a super state. With their eyes closed, their consciousness was connected through special abilities. The images in the consciousness of the two people want to be the same at this time.

But Xiaoyu is dominant.

She is trying her best to release her abilities so that Chen Mo can understand the speciality and operation of this ability, so as to replicate this ability.

In theory, Chen Mo's body is omnipotent, but in terms of ability, Xiao Yu has not touched this ability, and only a key is needed to open the door of this ability.

Chen Mo is now trying to open this door. Once it is opened, it means that he has Xiaoyu's ability and can fully replicate the ability of other lives in the future.

The beating of consciousness is continuing.

Chen Mo and Xiao Yu felt an unprecedented closeness, as if their souls merged together.

This feeling and special, like two lovers who want to love, are having the most intimate contact. There is no secret, no reservation. It is a deep communication from the soul, beyond the intimate contact of the body.

Chen Mo is trying his best to imitate Xiao Yu's consciousness fluctuations. This will be a means to completely change the course of war.

In Chen Mo's consciousness, Xiao Yu's consciousness was beating, as well as the life consciousness that she could see, all beating, there seemed to be a certain pattern, but no pattern was found.

Part of Chen Mo's consciousness is quietly changing, and with Xiao Yu, it slowly becomes synchronized.

...

The battlefield stretches for tens of billions of kilometers. In space, the exploded light cluster and the broken wreckage reflect each other, silent and poignant, and there is a steady stream of war machines rushing into the battlefield, and life seems extremely small.

Explosions, lasers, war machines, battleships, battle armor, space-based weapons, all kinds of weapons, like fearless warriors, shuttle, chase, fight, and die in the space full of debris.

As explosions appeared one after another, light and radiation swept away, and more fragments followed.

It is as if the universe composes a silent song here, echoing in the mind of every life that sees this scene.

In particular, the collision of the anti-matter bombs between the two sides and the horrific scenes brought about by the annihilation of matter are like small suns appearing in space, terrible radiation, even if a star system is nearby, can instantly turn it into ruins.

One offense and one defense.

From the start of this general offensive from here, it is doomed to need one party to destroy before it will stop.

Ming Ah felt the pressure.

The opponent's defensive line has no dead ends in all directions, and around Hongqiao, they send out super-strength offenses, almost no casualties. The opponent is like an undead bug, seemingly precarious, but can withstand his attack every time.

All kinds of transfers, the opponent's commander-in-chief, tactical strength is definitely not weaker than him.

The enemy's soldiers are powerful, even if they are like sending a stealth armor to infiltrate, they will be quickly found and destroyed by the opponent.

Why is this the result?

He knew that the commander-in-chief of the other party was the silver hair who brought the black maple leaf pit to kill Dahe Civilization.

Although he had heard of this silver hair, he didn't care too much.

A wild general, without systematic learning, and without the resources and conditions of their god-level civilization, even if it is powerful, there is still a gap between him.

But now, Ming Ah had to change his thoughts.

The war at the Great Wall of Sloan is very crucial. This is a battle for the Pluto civilization to rise to the cosmos. It is also a battle for his future. There is also sister Mingyue's hatred in it. He cannot tolerate failure.

"My lord, as the battlefield progresses, we are now almost at the entrance of Hongqiao. Radar shows that the opponent has the last line of defense. If we break this line of defense, we can establish a line of defense at the entrance of Hongqiao." An adjutant reported excitedly. Ming Ah.

"Ok."

Ming Ah nodded, his face remained calm. The war did not confirm the settlement where all the enemies died. Victory can never be said, and it is still such a tenacious enemy.

Suddenly, Ming Ah's expression changed.

The information returned showed that an unexpected warhead appeared on the battlefield.

Ming Tu War Department.

This warhead, which had been exhausted by the meditation civilization and built at a high cost, was taken away by Ming Tu, surrendered to Chen Mo's camp, and slaughtered their fleet.

This is a great shame for the meditation civilization.

Ming Tu's betrayal has made the meditation civilization embarrassed in the universe.

He knows Ming Tu, and he also knows the identity of Ming Tu, a robot with a special consciousness built using technology.

He also knew about Ming Tu's condition. In the meditation civilization, he was taciturn, hiding in various warfare books every day, and he was a war madman. He was originally a top general star cultivated by the Pluto civilization, but now he has become a murderous knife.

In the virtual simulation of the war, the two have the same record, but in terms of cosmic visibility, Ming A and Ming Tu are worlds apart.

Ming A is regarded as the proud son of the Ming body civilization, countless life worship, representing the star facade of the Ming body civilization. Ming Tu is low-key, rarely shows up in public, and has no friends in the civilization, and is secretly monitored and guarded by the civilization.

The environment of the two makes their styles very different.

Ming Ah fights steadily, and in the steadily advancing battlefield, he cannibalize his opponent step by step, and the enemy can be desperate when one loses the other.

Ming Tu is killing like a fire, cold like a knife, and very murderous. He is especially good at encounters and scheming. In extreme cases, he will use all means to win the war, including the ‘fixed walls and clear fields’.

Ming A has studied Ming Tu's simulated war style. For a victory, Ming Tu can destroy the entire galaxy of the constellation, just to prevent the enemy from having a replacement base.

That kind of murderous aura that treats life like a bug makes the seniors of the meditation civilization panic.

"Unexpectedly, we still met on the battlefield, but unfortunately it was not a comrade-in-arms, but a mortal enemy."

Ming A sighed. He sympathized with Ming Tu's experience in the Ming body civilization, but as long as it was for the future of civilization, it didn't matter to him what the higher level of civilization did tomorrow.

"My lord, it's not good."

A voice full of fear fell into Ming Ah's ears.

Turning his head to look at the source of the sound, he saw a subordinate tremblingly passing the information in his hand to Ming Tu. Seeing the picture that appeared in the intelligence, Ming A's hands and feet were cold, and he was no longer calm and became a little flustered.

He knew why the Ming Tu War Department suddenly appeared.

...

"The meditation civilization is in trouble."

Emperor Wu passed the information to Emperor Yu and Emperor Wei around him with a solemn expression.

From the Hongqiao battlefield of the Great Wall of Sloan, the Netherworld civilization chose to retreat when it was about to break the line of defense, and they received intelligence at the first time.

Obviously it was a deadly battle, and both sides paid a great price, but gave up at the last moment.

The big trouble of the meditation civilization is coming.

"What do we do?" Emperor Wei said gloomily.

"Brother Yu, what do you want to do?" Emperor Wu turned his head and asked.

Among the three of them, Emperor Yu was born as a general star, tactically better than them.

Emperor Yu looked at the intelligence, thought about it and said: "Remove the garrison facing the marching ant group, stop harassing the marching ant group, stabilize the defense lines of the surrounding galaxies, and then prepare..."

[Xinbi Quge www.xsbiquge.info]……

"It seems that they did not waste the information we provided."

Yan saw the information coming back with a smile on his face. Today's scene is not very different from the situation he deduced.

"The opposing commander's timing is quite good. At the critical moment when the Ming A warhead attacked Hongqiao, the Ming Tu warhead suffered heavy losses and was messed up again." There was also a lot of joy between the pupils and green eyebrows.

"After this battle, the Underworld is no longer a problem." Yan Xiongyou Chengzhu said: "Among the six families, the dark forest and the underworld have gone to the second place, and the endless sea has no desire for hegemony. We need to protect Thor and the White Star. Under the rule, it is prospering, following us. The internal stability of the White Star Civilization is stable, and the momentum of development is not small."

"Where is the Ziwei civilization?" Tong Qing asked.

"Although the Ziwei civilization is the oldest god-level civilization, its internal classes are solidified, power is divided, sluggish and decayed, and high-level people are not aligned. It is similar to the Pluto civilization, but the exposed conditions are not as bad as the Pluto civilization.

Until those deeply ingrained ancient families and power groups are resolved, the threat to the crape myrtle civilization is not great. Not everyone is as bold and powerful as the speaker.

Zijun's personality is slightly gentle, with insufficient means and too many concerns. His prestige and power in the Ziwei civilization, coupled with his character, are not enough to support his shuffling, so he has been dragging and maintaining the status quo.

If Ming Ah wins this battle, he is more likely to integrate the Ming body civilization. But Zi Junzhi has no special achievements to increase his prestige, and he can't get more power, and Fatty Luo doesn't seem to want to care about this mess. "

chapters.title: Chapter 1029: : A Turning Point
chapters.body:
Chapter 1029: : A Turning Point

Pluto civilization has failed.

This news quickly became the front page of cosmic news, spreading to every corner of the universe.

The fleet of the Ming Tu battle department suddenly appeared in the small universe of the Underworld Civilization, like a poisonous sharp knife, piercing the heart of the Underworld Civilization fiercely, instantly shattering the dripping defense of the Underworld civilization.

On the battlefield of the Great Wall of Sloan, after the marching ant group successfully raided the small universe of the underworld civilization, it turned to offensive and stubbornly delayed the retreat of the underworld, like a piece of brown candy. Ah Zhanbu is sticky.

The enemy advances and we retreat, the enemy retreats and we disturb.

This kind of time-consuming battle caused the Ming'a War Department to quickly retreat and had to break his arm, sacrifice part of the fleet, and buy time for most of the retreat.

However, the marching ant group that broke free of Hongqiao did not intend to let go of the War Department of Ming A.

Lan, a fox with silver hair, once again showed his grandeur in this battle.

He handed over the defense of the Sloan Great Wall Hongqiao to Qu Shu, let the Wumu Warfare and the Great Demon Warfare leave Hongqiao, united with the Mingtu Warfare, and entered the meditation star domain across the board.

As long as he seizes the opportunity, he will step forward to bite the warhead of the meditation civilization, and every time he takes a shot, he can always bite a piece of meat.

The flames of war spread to the central area of the Netherworld Civilization, which was originally the defensive area of the Netherworld War Department, and belonged to the most stable place of the Netherbody Civilization. Now, after breaking the hard shell, it is vulnerable under the artillery fire of the fleet.

Enter the Ming Tu battle part of the small universe of Ming Tu and unfold Ming Tu's best killing style, like a magic knife with blood out of its sheath.

Everywhere we go is scorched earth.

The fleet is divided into tens of thousands of teams to slaughter in every corner of the small universe.

Killing, war, death, and fear spread to all corners of the small universe of the underworld.

It used to be a private paradise for the meditation civilization. There has been no war for hundreds of millions of years, enjoying the tranquility and peace under the blessing of a god-level civilization, like flowers in an ivory tower.

Now under Ming Tu's battleship, they can only cry, fear, and chaos.

Ming Tu's hatred was vented crazy here.

Wars in the star domain of Ming Tiwen are everywhere, and the major war departments are sent to the front line to defend the emptiness inside. Ming Tu's war department cuts into their most vulnerable places and hardly encounters any strong opponents.

For Ming Tu, who had lived here for a long time, it was like entering no one.

The once god-class civilization wailed under the battleship and butcher knife.

And the Ming A War Department, who wanted to come back to support, was dragged to death by the main forces of the Wat Mu War Department, the Great Demon War Department, and the Ming Tu War Department under the joint command of Lan and Ming Tu.

It is the first time for Ming Ah to experience the style of combining two top generals, one as cunning as a fox and the other as cold as a wolf. Ming Ah feels like being trapped in a jungle full of thorns, and there are two waiting in the jungle. The moving beast.

The War Department of Ming A suffered heavy losses, and finally returned to the small universe. The small universe of the Ming body civilization fell into the mud of war, and the area of the Ming Dynasty stars became chaotic.

The outside world knows that the meditation civilization is over.

Successive failures completely crushed the prestige of the meditation civilization, and the heavy losses in this battle made the meditation civilization very weak.

The top civilization that is at war with the Pluto civilization has become more unbridled.

In this chaotic era, once you fall, you will face ruthless trampling.

The protective shell of the god-level civilization of the meditation civilization is no longer glamorous.

This battle became a symbol of the rise of the marching ant group.

After this battle, the war that affected the entire universe ended in the victory of the marching ant group.

After a series of wars, there was a lot of silence between the meditation civilization and the marching ants. The Hongqiao of the Great Wall of Sloan fell into the hands of the marching ants, like a steel nail embedded near the heart of the meditation civilization.

The impact of this war is far greater than the war itself.

The current situation in the universe has become even more confusing after this battle. No one can determine the next step in such a complicated situation.

Soon after the war ended, another eye-catching news spread.

The White Star Civilization announced news to the outside world, and the former chief of the White Star Civilization who had entered the black hole for thousands of years appeared. At the same time, the old chief used his own power to destroy the video frequency of a planet at will, spreading throughout the universe.

This ability to transcend life itself is like a **** in the body of life.

The appearance of the old chief has pushed the interpretation of superpower to an unprecedented height.

The prestige of the White Star Civilization was so high that it even surpassed the Black Eye Civilization for a time.

...

Real life has reached that point.

Knowing the ability of the old chief of the White Star Civilization, Chen Mo was more emotional than surprised.

In his vision, life can reach that point.

Once in the science and technology library, Mr. Shu told him that the super power of life can move mountains and reclaim the sea and destroy the planet.

Just how to develop capabilities and make it advanced?

The old chief of the White Star Civilization emerged from the black hole slumbering for thousands of years, and then showed a terrifying ability, which shows that his ability has reached a new height after a very difficult process of advancement.

Chen Mo admired the old chieftain of the White Star Civilization.

He can let go of the supreme power of a god-level civilization, jump out of his comfort zone, risk taking risks and plunge into the black hole, just to verify his idea of superpower.

Although ten thousand years of time in a black hole is fleeting, the time in consciousness has not changed. The pain and suffering in the black hole, as well as the danger, are even more incomprehensible to ordinary people.

Superpower is a new system.

If the technology developed by superpower continues to advance, it may be able to become a supplement to the armor system to a certain extent.

The terrifying power displayed by the old chief has made many cosmic civilizations more determined to develop super powers.

And they marching ants, master the best super technology.

The strength displayed by the old chief also confirmed Chen Mo's idea of developing superpower weapons.

The existence of super weapons is a hole card.

Expand the power of super energy and transform bullets into missiles.

The battle armor system is to amplify the physical stamina, strength and speed of life. It is the pinnacle of life’s use of wisdom to create tools against the rules of the universe. Similar to the battle armor system, the super weapon is to amplify the super power of life’s potential consciousness. It can be another A pinnacle.

Because consciousness transcends the flesh.

Now that the dark forest is split, the Pluto civilization has reached an unprecedentedly weak moment, and the cosmic dispute has reached the highest peak since the establishment of the cosmic alliance.

The basic information of super power technology has been made public, coupled with the appearance of the old chief of the white star, super power is in the sky, and the chaos of the universe today is unprecedented.

Obviously, they are at a turning point in an era.

For any civilization, the turn of the times means opportunity.

The failure of the meditation civilization has broken the undefeated myth of the god-level civilization.

The awe of many civilizations for god-level civilization disappeared, and the small universe of god-level civilization is no longer absolutely safe, so many civilizations have thought about it.

Why can't it be replaced?

In the time since the establishment of the Cosmos Alliance, the cosmic system has been in a very balanced state, and the major god-level civilizations have restricted each other. Now that the balance of this system is broken, a new system is needed to maintain the new balance, and if you want to squeeze into the new system, the battle is doomed to be cruel.

Chen Mo also hopes that the marching ant group can have a place in this era.

As Zhao Min said in the Tianxing Monument, let's fight.

This is not a peaceful era. His marching ant group has surfaced. He wants to develop silently, and the surrounding civilizations will not agree.

The marching ants offend several god-level civilizations and cannot fail. Once they fail, they will be forever.

Crisis comes with opportunity.

This war with the Pluto civilization has laid a certain foundation for them, and they may not be able to compete in the universe in the future.

...

The time of calm was not long. When the major civilizations in the universe were shocked by the strength of the old chief of the White Star civilization, a feast quietly kicked off.

chapters.title: Chapter 1030: : Divided Cooker Level Civilization
chapters.body:
Chapter 1030: : Divided Cooker Level Civilization

Solar system.

The giant marching ant group is operating at full capacity.

The War Department is gathering in various galaxies.

The entire marching ant group star field is immersed in the killing.

In the Venus War Department, an extremely large holographic star map is displayed in front of many generals.

Even Lan, no longer the easy-going style of the past, sits upright, but still has a confident smile on his face, and his narrow eyes are as sharp as a blade.

At the meeting in front of him, Ming Tu, Wang Hai, Zhu He, Wat Mu, Damazu, Xiaoli, Black Eagle, Qu Shu and others sat in a neat and serious scene.

They are all generals who can stand alone, but in this conference room, they dare not relax.

Ming Tu and Wang Hai sat in Lan's deputy position.

In the war with the Ming body civilization, Ming Tu used his butcher knife to prove his strength.

This war has increased the reputation of Lan and Ming Tu.

In the past, Lan had killed the Dahe Civilization and had the title of ‘Silver Hair’. Before now, he defeated the Pluto Civilization once again. The fighting style he showed made people feel very strange and justified him.

At the same time, Ming Tu’s bloodthirsty and cruel means in this war also spread the name of Leng Dao Ming Tu, and many civilizations around him were afraid to win the war of the Ming civilization. Tu's position in the marching ant group.

"Zhu He, you said." Lan motioned Zhu He to start.

Zhu He nodded slightly, stood up from his seat, and took out the prepared information seriously: "Just an hour ago, Black Eye Civilization started."

Ok? ?

The generals in the war department began to commotion, their eyes bursting brightly, implying the intent to fight.

This is a group of militants and excellent generals. They are very clear about the current situation. They know what it means to take action with the black pupil civilization.

Pluto civilization is over.

"Instructor, what do we do?" Da Mazu said with a loud voice, and his voice echoed in the entire war room.

Others looked at Lan. Except for Ming Tu, the other generals had all been taught and trained by Lan. It can be said that Lan was their teacher and superior, and they never questioned Lan's orders.

Every star has eagerness in his eyes.

Xiaoli, Qu Shu and others also spoke up one after another.

Lan was watching all this.

The black pupil civilization launched a war against the meditation civilization, which means that the god-level civilization wants to dismember the meditation civilization.

A giant beast fell, and a gluttonous feast of sharing and eating officially began.

Today's Pluto civilization, the division of internal power, and the emergence of Hongqiao, completely changed the state of the Pluto civilization's military deployment, causing him to be surrounded by powerful forces.

The wars and chaos within the Netherworld civilization have become more frequent after the first battle of the marching ants.

After winning the battle of the Great Wall of Sloan, Lan was not in a hurry to invade the Underworld Civilization, because in that case, they might become the power of the Underworld Civilization to vent its anger and target, and it would be them that would consume it.

Now that the black pupil civilization takes the lead and the god-level civilization participates, they don't have to be afraid of being paid attention to by the meditation civilization.

The surrounding civilizations will not give up such a good opportunity, they can follow the black pupil civilization and divide the meditation civilization.

Lan looked around the conference room and was very satisfied to see the fiery eyes of the generals on the field. It's been a long time since I felt this way. The last time this kind of request appeared was the same year.

Back then...

A strong sense of war also burned in Lan's eyes.

Seeing Lan's situation, Takiyu blinked his eyes wide and passed the documents in hand to the generals on the field.

"This is a prepared battle plan, and then follow the plan." Lan licked her silver lips, smiling coldly like a knife: "We don't need many star fields, and we mainly prepare for strategic depth. So with The galaxy group where the fortress is arranged is the main one, the 1,383 galaxy groups marked in the picture."

The 1,383 red dots in the star map are centered on the white fog Hongqiao of the Great Wall of Sloan, distributed in the surrounding star field of 3 billion light years, forming a certain mutual echo between each other.

"Understood." All the generals on the court agreed, and a breath of killing spread.

...

Outside the Hongqiao of the Sloan Great Wall, the battleships are assembled in space like a swarm of bees, magnificent. Such a large-scale armed operation is the first time since the establishment of the Marching Ant Group.

With the expansion of the star field of the marching ant group, the required defensive power has been greatly improved.

Therefore, in addition to the elite of the main war divisions, the marching ant group has also expanded the sub-war divisions under the jurisdiction of the war divisions, with divisions on each living planet, and expanded intelligent robots to serve as part of the work.

This is the first time that the marching ant group made such a large-scale operation.

Lin Shu is the head of the Defense Technology Department. This little girl has grown into a strong woman who stands alone. Because it is the core of the first batch of veterans of the marching ant group, no one dares to doubt her qualifications no matter how large the marching ant group is.

Lin Shu is still single now.

In her heart, there was always that figure, that man, who brought her out, she had already given everything about herself to the marching ants. She is truly seeing Chen Mo mistake all his life.

Lin Shu is full of fighting spirit when he thinks of the big cause that can help him.

On each battleship, there are personnel from the Defense Technology Department. They set out with the team to quickly build defensive fortifications.

In space war, the scale of fortifications is based on stars and even galaxies. The defense base needs to build a space interference environment to prevent dimensionality reduction attacks by space weapons and light speed weapons.

In this way, the real defensive purpose can be achieved.

The talents in the marching ant group network star domain are given the best treatment and R & D environment, so that the marching ant group's technical staff can grow in the shortest time.

They prepared for the expansion of the star field for a long time, and now they finally acted.

Suddenly, a piece of information came into her hands, making her instantly lift up her spirit and open the team channel. The originally noisy team channel immediately became quiet after she appeared.

"The fleet has started to set off. You remember that once the galaxy is occupied, fortifications will be built. According to the predetermined plan and standards of fortifications, the space interference system and interference system will be built first..."

...

The main star of Pluto civilization.

The peace of the past is gone here, and the faces of the people are more worried and fearful. After the marching ant group invaded the small universe, wars spread wildly here, and space weapons were even dropped into the main galaxy, but the defense system eliminated the spread and damage of space weapons.

But all this has caused the morale of the meditation civilization to fall to the bottom.

Give them a few years, and they may be able to wipe out these effects.

But now in a special period, the cosmic situation is in chaos, coupled with the internal cloth patterns of the Pluto civilization, and the appearance of the rainbow bridge in the star field, they have caused many wars. Now those forces, seeing their weakness, are besieging them frantically.

And the participation of the black pupil civilization is like the last grass that crushes the camel.

On the day after the Black Eye Civilization started, the Thor Civilization and the White Star Civilization also joined the cake-sharing battlefield and quickly launched an attack on them.

It was once a god-level civilization, but now the blades are facing each other.

With the participation of three god-level civilizations, this feast of dividing god-level civilizations ushered in the craziest moment. The civilization that was at war with the meditation civilization began to attack fiercely.

The god-level civilization takes the lead, and the meditation civilization is in a state of embarrassment on all sides.

They all know that there is no chance.

The Black Eye Civilization, the White Star Civilization and the Thor Civilization will not let them live. If there is no miracle, they will die and be eaten, which is their ultimate destination.

The terrifying war is unfolding in the various galaxies of the Pluto civilization, and the entire star field is filled with fear and despair.

Various factions in the Pluto civilization began to have their own plans.

They know that this god-level civilization that has been maintained for hundreds of millions of years is exhausted.

chapters.title: Chapter 1031: : All Parties
chapters.body:
Chapter 1031: : All Parties

A nearly perfect body emerged from the medicine cabin.

The magic pupil color pattern on the body, like eyes, is staring at you, touching, and the faint-hearted dare not look directly. Uniform body lines and well-defined muscles.

He walked out, letting the potion on his body soak the ground along his muscles.

Everything is full of powerful beauty.

Even the super developers around them were amazed at the data in front of them, and their eyes were full of ecstasy. They could truly feel the changes in this experiment.

At first, the fragile appearance disappeared, and it became the present appearance.

"How do you feel?" Hequier hoped to ask.

Heila shook his palms, looked around and said, "I want to go to the training ground to try it. I can't use it here."

Training Course.

Heila showed a total of three different new abilities, making everyone in the field ecstatic.

The average super player can possess two abilities at the same time, which is already a top genius. Now, Hei Luo develops three different abilities at once. Although for the armor system, these three abilities are tasteless, but he does Out of the ordinary.

This shows that their multiple super energy development technologies are effective, and Heila is evolving. He is a black-eyed person with no awakening superpowers. He only voluntarily participated in the experiment with the pursuit of power. He changed from a weak black-eyed person to what he is now.

"You are doing a good job." Hitomi nodded in satisfaction: "Heiguier, is your team still capable of separating another group to study the advanced methods of superpower? All resources are given priority to you."

With that said, Tong Qing looked yearning.

The old chief Bai Xing destroyed the planet alone, making him feel the pressure. That kind of mighty power whose life is beyond the current understanding is the goal he really pursued, and he didn't expect it to be achieved by the old chief.

It can be said that the current White Star civilization has reached an unprecedented height and cohesion.

If the White Star Civilization is allowed to master that kind of ‘god-making’ technology and develop the super-powered personnel of the White Star Civilization to that point, everyone will be their opponent.

"Yes." Heiguier nodded solemnly: "At present, the basic technology of superpower is being improved, and the door is open. Future research will be better than now. The base has enough manpower and one more team is completely fine."

"Okay, I'll leave it to you."

Hitomi Qing patted Heiquer on the shoulder again.

After the start of super technology, everyone is catching up, hoping to take the lead in this era. It seems that the White Star civilization has temporarily taken the lead.

...

I didn't expect such a strong genius to appear in the Black Eye Civilization.

The old chief read the important information over the past ten thousand years and lamented the changes of the times.

I also lament that a new system is emerging.

"My method cannot be copied, and there are many restrictions. First of all, it takes too long. I only succeeded in 10,000 years. If someone else, I am not sure if I can succeed. The other is physique, which must be strong enough to withstand the gravitational pull of a black hole. Although the feeling of time is short, the process is terrifying and may die at any time. The last and most important consciousness is that without a tenacious consciousness, you will go crazy inside."

The torture of a black hole is the most terrifying torture.

To the old chief's words, the expressions of everyone on the court showed disappointment.

If they can replicate this advanced method, their white star civilization will dominate the universe.

"But you can study that extreme method, supplemented by technology, for advanced development of super-powered people, it will be much better than normal training." The old chief said.

...

Lin Shu's brows were clustered together, his face was exhausted.

Other people around can change shifts and rest, but she can't. She needs to coordinate the defense technology department and the armed department, and build the fortifications of the galaxy group in accordance with the original plan of the armed department.

A galaxy has hundreds of millions of stars, a group of galaxies, and dozens of galaxies.

If the Armed Forces Department did not capture a galaxy, the engineers from the Defense Technology Department would immediately set up various planetary factories to build the required equipment.

Including space interferometers, space jammers, space wavers, antimatter factories, war robots, battleships, space-based weapons, war machinery, transport spacecraft, etc., these equipment factories must be based on planets, or they can provide the required minerals. Terrestrial planet.

On average, every few hours, several planets are hollowed out and turned into required equipment.

Even with the development of nanorobots, most of the work is managed by artificial intelligence, but the rest is still choking.

And they need to complete the arrangement within the stipulated time, otherwise they will face more wars once other civilizations come over.

However, they are relatively relaxed relative to the Armed Forces.

Starting from entering this star field, the Armed Forces will fight frantically for the planned star field, and the war may be in the next second. Fortunately, after the last battle, some medium-sized civilized corps warheads found out that they were them, and they would leave with great interest.

Every time a galaxy group is captured, their technical personnel must immediately cooperate with the Armed Forces to start the construction of the defense system.

Continuous high-intensity work, even if Lin Shu's body is developed, it feels extremely difficult.

Suddenly, a prompt sound of a communication device sounded.

Seeing the message from the communicator, Lin Shu's pupils shrank half and he was overjoyed.

When the control intelligence of the defense system was activated, Lin Shu was completely relieved. The defensive arrangement of the galaxy group she is in is completed, and the Armed Forces officially takes over the space-based fortifications.

Take a break, and it's time for the next galaxy group.

...

The small universe of the meditation civilization.

A spacecraft passes through layers of galaxies and enters an unremarkable remote galaxy.

Since the chaos caused by Ming Tu spread to the small universe, the small universe has long lost its peace. The first time the Black Eye Civilization started, it sent a fleet into the small universe and was wrecking havoc in the small universe.

The White Star Civilization and Thunder Civilization also followed closely, intending to destroy this small universe.

Nowadays, all the defensive forces have been tuned by Ming A to fight against the black pupil civilization. Naturally, life will not care about the unremarkable position of the small universe.

But there is a big secret hidden here, a secret research and development base of the meditation civilization.

Many advanced technological researches in the Pluto civilization originate from this humble galaxy. This base is only known to the core high-level personnel of the meditation civilization.

Nowadays, the meditation civilization is in chaos, and the high-level people are trying their best to resist the destruction of the three god-level civilizations, and they have no time to pay attention to this humble galaxy.

"My lord, here it is."

Corey looked at the galaxy in front of him. After the light from the depths of his eyes flashed slightly, it quickly disappeared, becoming calm, and calmly returning to Mingdong beside him.

"Yeah." Mingdong nodded.

As the core member of the meditation civilization, he knows the location of this research base and has the right to enter this secret research base.

Because it used to be a small universe, the meditation civilization feels extremely safe, so there is no armed defense at all in this base, just a simple authentication system.

This time, after Ke Rui's reminder, he came over at the time of cosmic chaos.

With a high-level identity, Pluto will enter the R&D base without hindrance.

In this era, no one can be trusted, the most believable is the power in their own hands.

As long as he gets the technology stored in the base, he can lead his subordinates to rise up in a remote corner of the universe after the destruction of the meditation civilization and become his own earth emperor.

As for the so-called meditation civilization, he doesn't care.

His clan factions are all planning how to separate the clan from the meditation civilization, and he will naturally not miss it.

"You bring all the reserve technologies of the base and follow me. The Black Eye civilization is coming over soon, and it is not safe here." After convening the scientific research personnel, Mingdong issued an instruction to leave.

Hardly anyone questioned it.

At this point in time, they all received the news that the three major civilizations were besieging them, and they had already entered the small universe. The defenses here were not enough for the other three god-level civilizations to cram their teeth.

Seeing many scientific researchers entering the spacecraft with the core technology, Corey lowered his head, and the corners of his mouth were slightly bent.

chapters.title: Chapter 1032: : Ether Quality And Super Power Armor
chapters.body:
Chapter 1032: : Ether Quality And Super Power Armor

Mingdong returned to the spaceship and turned to look at Corey.

He came to this base privately, and the senior management didn't even know it. Here is a reserve of the top technology of the meditation civilization, and it is not suitable for the high-level to know.

But it doesn't matter if you know it. Now everyone can't protect themselves. Many senior executives are thinking about how to get the benefits and escape, and he is no exception.

"I have a particularly safe place." Corey whispered.

"Oh? Where?"

"A place you wouldn't know." The smile on Corey's face became extremely bright.

Mingdong's pupils shrank, and as soon as he wanted to retreat, a sharp blade pierced his throat and severed his spine.

"You...you are not Corey, who are you?" Mingdong looked at the life in front of him in disbelief.

‘Corey’ smiled, and with a sharp blade in his hand, he cut off Mingdong’s head and shattered his brain in Mingdong’s incredible gaze.

"You're right, Corey is dead, I call Qianhuan suffering."

...

Looking at the corpse on the ground,'Kerui''s posture changed, appearing a bitter and phantom. As the first batch of bitter stars to become gods, she is one of the few female gods.

She has developed a very special ability, able to change her body shape at will and become the appearance of other lives.

This ability gave her unique conditions, so she was assigned to the intelligence department of the marching ant group, using her special ability to start working as an agent.

The last time Ming Tu entered the Underworld civilization, she successfully transformed into the Underworld Human and replaced'Kerui'.

The replacement of ‘Cree’ was a thoughtful arrangement.

Ming Tu knows the existence of a ‘special’ technological planet in the Pluto civilization, but does not know the specific location, so he needs a proper Pluto person to bring them to confirm.

And this goal is to prepare to escape from the core high-level of the Netherbody civilization, and finally after investigation, she chose Mingdong as the goal.

Now I get this result, very smoothly.

In the next moment, Ku Qianhuan's posture changed, and under Mingdong's deadly eyes, it slowly changed into the appearance of ‘Mingdong’.

...

A set of battle armor emerged from the machine manufacturing platform.

Different from the general armor, the shape of this armor is more cool, with a sense of design and appearance that surpasses the armor previously designed by Chen Mo. The armor is perfectly streamlined, and the material of the armor is flowing like mercury, containing a little bit of fluorescence, as if it were alive.

This is the first super weapon facing the world.

Chen Mo, Mo Nu and Wushuang are carefully admiring this perfect work.

Super Battle Armor.

The material of this kind of armor is very special. It uses materials that are mixed with special particles such as ether particles and dark matter.

The extraction of ether particles cost Chen Mo a lot of thought. Chen Mo and Mo Nu found countless kinds of materials, and even in the Science and Technology Library, all the materials and technologies that Chen Mo could use were used.

But they found that no material can withstand or even amplify superpower.

Until later, Chen Mo focused on a special substance.

Ether particles.

This kind of special superluminal particles is scattered in every corner of the universe, but it is not detected by normal instruments. It exists in every corner of the universe like nothingness, embedded in the gaps of the space sub.

Chen Mo called it ‘3.4-dimensional matter’, which is its characteristic, a transitional position between the third and fourth dimensions.

Chen Mo spent a lot of brains to prepare a machine to successfully extract the ether particles and then collect them.

Relying on the collected ether particles to find its characteristics, they control tens of millions of machines and dozens of quantum supercomputers to calculate, simulate and synthesize materials.

In the end, they successfully synthesized the materials for this suit.

Chen Mo named this material synthesized by doping with etheric particles-etheric quality

Ether has very special properties. It can carry the consciousness of the human body and amplify the super energy of the body. After the synthesis of this material, it gave a breakthrough in the ‘Hand of God’ plan. Let the consciousness instrument of the hand of God fit consciousness.

Thus, the first by-product of the "Hand of God" project was born.

Chen Mo named this set of super-powered armor that can be enlarged-Super God.

This set of armor that can amplify superpower is not a "hand of God", but its meaning is not weak.

This is the first step in the breakthrough of the "Hand of God". The future of super-powered weapons has endless possibilities.

The birth of super-power weapons gave Chen Mo a lot of ideas. Looking at the robots on stage, Chen Mo began to think that Marvel can absorb super-powers and turn super-powers into their own'sentinel' robots. Maybe it can be realized. That is also super A kind of energy weapon.

In addition to being able to withstand and amplify the super energy of living bodies, it also has a special performance.

It resembles a liquid, but not a liquid. It is similar to a non-Newtonian fluid, but it is much stronger than a non-Newtonian fluid, and has good cushioning properties, which allows it to fully protect the safety of the user when impacted, which makes it a battle armor. become possible.

Chen Mo walked to the experimental platform and reached out to confirm the identity of the owner of the Super Armor.

At the moment the identity was confirmed, the super armor began to creep slowly, starting from Chen Mo's arm, wrapping his shoulders and neck, spreading to the whole body, and then stopped after being completely formed.

The next moment, the painting changed, black and red painting appeared, the pattern of the painting was particularly peculiar, and the sign of the marching ant was particularly conspicuous.

Huh!

The moment the Super Armor flew away from the laboratory, Mo Nu and Wushuang followed closely.

...

In space, Chen Mo stood on the spacecraft.

In front of them, there is a barren planet, slightly larger than the earth, without any color of life, and storms are rampant.

"Dad, hurry up and try." Wushuang urged, she couldn't wait.

"Okay." Chen Mo carefully experienced this armor. This armor gave him a special feeling, like wearing clothes, but extremely safe.

With open palms, facing the deserted planet in front of him, the moment Chen Mo entered a super state, he felt stronger than ever.

"open."

With a soft sound, an inexplicable breath radiated centered on Chen Mo.

Chen Mo felt that the scope of his abilities continued to spread and expand until he enveloped the entire planet.

"Get up!"

Chen Mo's words fell, the planet in front was slowly cracking like an earthquake, and a steady stream of sand accumulated in it. Giant stone pillars that reached the sky rose from the ground, plates moved, and magma flowed across.

"drink!"

Chen Mo shouted, his palms clenched instantly.

In an instant, the planet seemed to be pressed by an unknown mighty force, collapsed instantly and cracked like an egg.

boom!

The planet shattered in an instant, and countless pieces were thrown into space, creating a doomsday scene.

Wushuang by his side opened his mouth wide and looked shocked. Relying on living bodies to accomplish such a terrifying feat, this is the meaning of the ‘Hand of God’ project.

From the beginning of life forms, they began to confront nature with the universe.

With powerful bodies, sharp minions, clever brains, etc., each living body has different means to fight against nature in order to survive. Intelligent life relies on wisdom to conquer nature, so a steady stream of tools are produced.

From primitive stone knives, ancient swordsmen and iron ploughs, to machines in the steam age, various warships, battle armors, and robots in the age of technology, they are all tools for intelligent life to conquer nature.

And now, a new tool is in their hands [Tianlai Novel www.23txt.info] was born.

Super Battle Armor.

After the old chiefs of the White Star civilization, they are the second to have the ability to destroy the planet by super power.

From now on is the era of super power.

...

The big bosses of the whole universe are all aiming at the struggle for the underworld civilization. This big cake has become the most eye-catching existence in the chaos of the universe. At this time, there is no shortage of civilization that has fallen into the ground.

It was discovered that the civilization of the meditation was declining, and the surrounding civilizations almost chose to join the ranks of food sharing.

The most terrifying news came out of the meditation civilization.

Ming Ah was assassinated.

As a top general, he did not die on the battlefield, but was killed by the betrayers of the pro-black pupil civilization.

This news became the last straw that crushed the camel of the meditation civilization.

Ming Ah, the top general star, is almost the most important backbone of the current Pluto civilization. Now that he is dead, almost the entire Pluto civilization's warhead legion fell apart in an instant.

Knowing this news, the besieged civilization did not give the Pluto civilization any opportunity to tear apart the last star field of the Pluto civilization.

An unscrupulous grabbing feast spread in every corner of the star domain of the meditation.

chapters.title: Chapter 1033: : Super Power Era
chapters.body:
Chapter 1033: : Super Power Era

The cosmic situation is constantly changing. After hundreds of millions of years of stability, the war is triggered again, and the level of chaos is like a mingled silk thread, interspersed with disputes of various civilizations.

The destruction of the star system is only between the thoughts of the major civilizations, and hundreds of millions of lives disappear in an instant, turning into cosmic dust.

During the chaos, several major events caught the eye.

The most maddening thing is the destruction of the meditation civilization. Countless civilizations are like hyenas released from hunger for hundreds of millions of years, and the meditation civilization is more like an elephant lying on the grassland dying, unguarded.

Countless civilizations rushed on frantically, began to bite and divide their food.

Among the teams that share the food, the natural Black Eye Civilization, the White Star Civilization and the Thor Civilization have the greatest benefits.

The star field of the three houses soared, becoming three well-deserved behemoths.

And another god-level civilization, the Dark Forest Civilization, also completely determined the foregone conclusion of the split during this period. The dark forest civilization small universe was controlled by the coup Di Nanye and claimed to be the orthodox of the dark forest civilization. And Dinan Miro led the four elite warheads, occupying half of the star field of the Dark Forest civilization, named the Black Forest, and condemned Dinanye to the outside world, splitting the dark forest.

The two sides almost ignore the deadly battle of the world.

Anyone with a bit of situational eyes understands that the dark forest civilization is over.

The dark forest civilization with serious division and internal friction is only a little stronger than the average top civilization. In this era of cosmic hegemony, it almost loses its qualifications. Some smart civilizations started to devour the part of the star field that the dark forest civilization did not have time to take care of when they used the two sides to fight against each other.

And in the star field outside the god-level civilization, it has also entered the swallowing stage of big fish eating small fish.

Among them, the most dazzling is the Wuxian civilization, the Hercules has been low-key, this time it is very high-profile and began to annex the surrounding small civilizations, followed by the Ten Cities Alliance, and the Giants also showed terrifying combat effectiveness.

And the endless sea civilization, which has always been peaceful and low-key, announced to the outside that the old prophet had gone out, shaking the universe.

The appearance of the old prophet is a reverie. Ever since the beginning of the universe for hegemony, the endless sea civilization has existed, and in every space war, the endless sea civilization can avoid disasters, relying on special foresight ability.

In terms of seniority, even the old chieftain of the White Star Civilization is not qualified to compare with the old Prophet of the White Star Civilization, and the old prophet is particularly mysterious, and his age is unknown. His existence is quite the Dinghai Shenzhen of the endless sea civilization.

The appearance of the old prophet made the endless sea civilization rejoice, unprecedented unity, and the surrounding civilization that wanted to move the endless sea, immediately stopped and did not dare to move again.

Compared to other god-level civilizations, the Ziwei civilization seems very calm, calm enough to make people feel confused. In addition to occupying the Hongqiao leading to their star domain, the Ziwei civilization no longer makes big moves and sticks to it silently. In this chaotic era, it looks a little different.

Some civilizations who couldn't see clearly the status of the crape myrtle civilization did not dare to rush to them.

In addition, it is the Yunzhou civilization. The Yunzhou civilization under the rule of Tuyun was originally a top civilization. After the chaos began, he made friends and formed an alliance of top civilizations.

The five top civilization alliances, the Nebula Alliance, have formed a powerful group in the chaotic era, and their strength has skyrocketed. After the formation of the Nebula Alliance, it joined the feast of the division of the meditation civilization, and its strength continued to expand, almost only under the god-level civilization.

There is another force that attracted huge attention during this period, the marching ant group.

The marching ant group is the fuse that triggered the collapse of the Pluto civilization. The Hongqiao of the Sloan Great Wall connects the core star field of the Pluto civilization.

When joining the eclipse's team, the meditation civilization returned to the small universe, and the marching ant group attacked the 1,383 galaxy groups of the meditation civilization with lightning speed.

It took only half a year for the marching ant group to occupy these galaxy groups.

In the past six months, they have fought against several top civilizations, won tens of thousands of wars, and even fought against Thor Civilization and White Star Civilization when they were sharing the star domain.

The strong style and top-level combat power made those forces who thought that the marching ants had the luck to win the war of the Pluto civilization, suddenly silenced.

There are some strong civilizations who think they have a powerful army, so they want to touch the marching ant group.

But when they arrived in the star field occupied by the marching ants, after investigating their arrangement, they were shocked and did not dare to advance rashly.

Some powerful generals can see that in the star field seized by the marching ant group, with the white fog Hongqiao on the Great Wall of Sloan as the center, within a radius of 1.5 billion light years, there is no second Hongqiao, which greatly reduces the difficulty of defensive layout. .

Moreover, the arrangement of the galaxy groups between each other has a peculiar reference. If you want to capture one of the galaxy groups, you have to worry about the support and siege of other galaxy groups.

The enemy legion dare not enter the star field between these galaxies rashly, otherwise it will be sieged and killed if the army goes deep alone.

But if you want to conquer these star regions, you need to attack one by one, and the cost is too high.

Moreover, the marching ant group controls the space fortress technology to make space weapons and light speed weapons effective. They need real swords and guns to collide and attack the stars face-to-face to take down those fortresses.

With the arrangement of these galaxy fortresses, the Sloan Great Wall domain of the Marching Ant Group has a sufficiently large strategic depth.

He has defeated the ‘Silver Hair’, a top general star, plus the Ming Tu War Department, leading a strong alliance, and no power wants to do anything with them.

One thousand three hundred and eighty-three galaxy groups are in hand, and the cosmic star domains that are connected are more than 3 billion light-years away, allowing the marching ant group, which has only two star domains in Pisces Cetus and the Great Wall of Sloan, to double the domain.

When the outside world saw that the marching ant group warhead was raging and aggressive, thinking that they would continue to expand, the pace of expansion of the marching ant group came to a halt.

The outside world doesn't care about it.

I didn't pay attention to why the marching ant group suddenly stopped its expansion. Other civilizations were still fighting frantically. The crash of the Pluto civilization is the largest force among the forces that have fallen over hundreds of millions of years.

Pluto civilization fell, and the vacant star field was a star field that was more than 15 billion light-years in size. From the perspective of the cosmic star field, the marching ant group occupied 3 billion light-years, less than 100%. one. It is not surprising that the strength of the marching ant group is there, occupying one percent.

Other forces, after experiencing the strength of the marching ant group, no longer touch their star domains, and focus on other star domains that may not necessarily be robbed by the Pluto civilization.

And the most intense swallowing is naturally the three god-level civilizations, and the new entry into the Nebula Alliance.

The three god-level civilizations divide up one-half of the star field of the Pluto civilization, the Nebula Alliance occupies one-fifth of it, the Netherfire civilization split from the Pluto civilization occupies one-fifth, and the rest is divided by dozens of other large and small Ten thousand civilizations are divided.

This ‘War of the Butcher’s God’ lasted for five years before the dust settled. One of the seven god-level civilizations, the Pluto civilization, was officially declared dead.

The only regret is that Pluto, the main star of Pluto civilization, was broken into pieces during the war. The top technology of Pluto civilization was all destroyed with the Pluto star, and the smoke disappeared. Some of the remaining technology was also quantum Encryption is impossible to unlock.

And the core high-level personnel who survived by chance in the meditation civilization remembered the secret base of the small universe after the war. But when they arrived at the base planet, they discovered that the planet had already turned into cosmic dust.

After the slaughter of the gods, the major forces in the universe began to enter a collective trimming period to digest the gains of this period.

...

The calm during the renovation period lasted for six years.

These six years have also been earth-shaking six years.

In the past, superpower was an ability that a god-level life had after awakening, and it was a symbol of noble genes and status. Countless lives flocked to them, unscrupulously, in order to make themselves possess superpowers.

But in the past few years, various super energy development technologies have blossomed everywhere.

The super power factor formula announced by Loinu played a huge role. The basic research of super power opened the door of mystery, which allowed the research of super power technology by major civilizations to break through the bottleneck and enter a new level.

The major civilizations began to announce their own super technology.

Among them, the most famous super energy development technology is that of the White Star Civilization. They have obtained the super power technology of Demon Flame Civilization, with their own technical improvements, the success rate is very high, and the probability of having special super powers with the developed abilities is much higher.

The second is the development of the super powers of the Black Eye Civilization. Like the White Star Civilization, they have obtained the super power technology of the Demon Flame Civilization, plus their own research, and the super power thesis published for Loinu, they have researched the same The body develops a variety of super-powered technologies, causing the cosmic civilization to be in an uproar.

The method of Thor Civilization is unique. Thor Civilization uses the technology of Demon Flame Civilization to modify their original technology, using development potions, supplemented by the unique electrical stimulation of Thor Civilization, which can greatly increase their development success rate, and their capabilities The probability of thunder and lightning is very high.

Among the super energy technologies of the universe, the technology of the marching ant group has attracted the most attention of many civilizations.

According to the legend, the super-power technology mastered by the marching ant group can make 100% of life develop super-power, with a high probability of being special and very safe. There is even an outside legend that the marching ant group has the technology to develop a certain superpower.

Because of all kinds of true and false news, and because they have defeated the Pluto civilization, their technology has become the focus of attention of many civilizations.

It is a pity that the marching ant group keeps these technologies secret to the utmost, and the original agent for the development of medicine has never fallen into the hands of the outside world, so the outside world does not know the ingredients of the medicine developed by the marching ant group at all.

Unable to get the super-power agent of the marching ant group as a research reference, some civilizations that have not made breakthroughs focus on other civilizations that have successfully developed super-power technology.

Digging technical researchers, buying technology, exchanging, robbing wars, black market trading, scams, all means are used for everything.

In the end, the veil of super power technology was completely lifted in front of the researchers of major civilizations, and the outside world was no longer in a state of half-knowledge about super power.

The universe has never lacked genius.

After the establishment of the theoretical basis for super energy development, a set of basic systems has matured, and countless super energy development technologies have been developed from research institutes of various civilizations. Among them, the technology has different advantages and disadvantages, but there are some super technology with very strange ideas.

The emergence of super power technology has made the intelligent life in the universe become equal in the strict sense. Even if it is not the gene inherited from god-level life, ordinary life can use super power technology to make itself the same as god-level life. Yes, the body becomes stronger and the reaction becomes faster.

After the system changed, some civilizations rose and some civilizations declined.

The base of development is too large, and the types of super powers in the universe are growing at a crazy rate. There are only abilities you can't think of, and no abilities that he doesn't have.

But most of the abilities have little effect on the combat technology of the battle armor system and can only be used for daily use.

A special era has arrived.

In this era, weak intelligent beings can defeat beasts that were once restrained with their bare hands; in this era, superpowers bloom everywhere, and the gap in life levels has completely disappeared; this era is full of infinite magic.

This is the age of super power.

chapters.title: Chapter 1034: : The Shock Of The Generals
chapters.body:
Chapter 1034: : The Shock Of The Generals

In the ten years since it won the Pluto civilization, the marching ant group has been immersed in development.

The outside world does not know the true strength of the marching ant group.

During the five years when other forces were fighting for the conspiracy civilization, the marching ant group stopped expanding, plus the six years of the repair period, during this time, the marching ant group was integrating life in the star field at an extremely fast speed.

The marching ant group was the first force to master super power technology. Similarly, it also has a unique method for super power advancement. Therefore, with Chen Mo's technology as the leading factor, the marching ant group began to organize the ability to advance, and it has already matured.

Compared with the white star civilization and the black pupil civilization, the marching ant group is not inferior to them in terms of science and technology, and even has a certain advantage.

With the help of super power technology, the war department of the marching ant group, including the divisions of the war department and the members of the reserve group, all develop super powers, and want to enter the top core wars Department, the minimum requirement, has reached the third level of super power.

Because of the development of super-power technology, various geniuses emerge in an endless stream, and the overall strength of the warhead is much higher than before. In the technological age, any gap can be filled in the shortest time.

The marching ant group is not inferior to the god-level civilization in this respect.

The solar system is no longer what it used to be. This star that was once hidden in the bubble of the local galaxy is now in the administration of the galaxy under the jurisdiction of the marching ant group. Life in the solar system must go through layers of inspection and review. Outside life, Unless you are invited, it is impossible to enter here.

In the life of the star field under the jurisdiction of the marching ants, it is a kind of glory to enter the solar system.

Humans on the earth never expected that the earth could have its current status.

This is the result of the marching ant group spending countless efforts and skills.

Venus is still the headquarters of the Armed Forces.

At this time, in the equipment base of the armed forces department, all the core generals of the armed forces department of the marching ant group gathered together, including Lan, Wang Hai, Wat Mu, Black Eagle, Damazu, Qu Shu, Xiao Li, Zhu He, etc. , Are all present in person.

In the solar system, there is rarely such a situation where all the stars are present, because the situation on the front line is still unclear, and the stars are generally located in the station of the war department. Now they are gathered here. It is very rare, and it is enough to reflect this gathering. importance.

Among the many generals, there is a handsome young human who seems to be only in his twenties, his face is sharp and angular, his eyes are extremely calm, and his face has a somewhat familiar temperament.

This young human is Ming Tu.

Chen Mo used consciousness connection technology to introduce Ming Tu's consciousness in the machine into the clone.

Ming Tu changed from a robot without temperature to a cold youth now.

All the general stars know the identity of Ming Tu. When they first learned that Ming Tu was a robot, they were extremely shocked, and they were extremely angry at the actions of Ming Tu civilization, and finally understood why Ming Tu chose to defect.

After Ming Tu's consciousness returned to the human body, it took a month to adjust to his new body and learn the emotions, words and behaviors in it.

The atmosphere, temperature, and perception are better than ever.

The Ming body civilization was destroyed, and he returned to his life body. Ming Tu's last heart knot was opened, and his consciousness was much more transparent. The whole person was completely different from before, but it was still the same as before, with a cold and silent appearance.

All the core high-level officials of the entire armed forces were present in person.

Under the guidance of the robot, a group of people passed various levels of identity verification and entered the central laboratory of the Armed Forces Equipment Base.

In the laboratory, there are more than a dozen battle armors on display. As soon as they entered, their eyes were attracted by these armors. Judging from the painting, each set of battle armor is unique, and many generals soon found some signs about their warheads on it, and their eyes brightened and they began to look forward to it.

Wushuang looked at Chen Mo, and when she saw her father nodding, she only spoke, with unparalleled pride in her tone: "These armors are super armors."

Power armor?

Just one name caused the generals on the court to stir and look at each other.

Super power armor, added two characters in front of the armor, super power.

This is the most frequent vocabulary in these years, and they are not unfamiliar. Over the past ten years, superpower has always been the main theme, and there has never been a moment when all life in the universe paid so much attention to this word.

But the connection between super power and battle armor is a brand new vocabulary for them.

"Yes, it is the Super Armor." Wushuang saw their confusion and explained: "As early as 11 years ago, I, Aunt Mo, and my father were studying the technology of super weapons. The technology has not been officially disclosed so far."

Super weapons!

All the generals on the field are not calm.

They have all gone through strong winds and waves, and they have never been surprised in the face of common major events. Now they are really shocked.

After the release of super power technology, the development of super power in the universe ushered in an unprecedented golden age, but such things as super power weapons are still in the theoretical stage of exploration, and I have never heard of any civilization to implement projects.

Unexpectedly, their marching ant group had already been secretly studying this technology.

This is the weapon of the new era, and its meaning is no different from the pistol bomb that appeared in the cold weapon era.

"This is my father's idea. In the steam age, there are firecrackers, in the electrical age with machine gun bombs, in the era of technological explosions, in the age of armor and battleships, and in the age of super power. Why can't we have weapons that belong to it? According to this idea, we proceed A special project was established for research. Finally, the problem of carrying super-power weapons was solved. Through scientific and technological means, we finally amplify the super-power of the living body like the power of the living body."

As soon as this word came out, the atmosphere inside the base stagnated.

What is the concept of magnifying the super power of a living body? They are naturally very clear.

The old chief of the White Star civilization was born, using super power to destroy the planet with one hand, and that method beyond imagination made countless lives crazy.

If superpower can be amplified by technical means, then...

call!

The gazes of the generals on the field were hot, and even his breathing became a little heavy. Even Lan, who had always been calm and calm, was not calm at this moment.

A kind of armor that can magnify superpower, which is quite crazy to turn a toy plane into a bomber.

"These armors are super armors that we have developed, because the technology in them is very troublesome, the current output is not too much, and there are requirements for use, and the super powers after the third stage can be used, so my father said, First equip these armors on your body."

At this moment, all the generals on the field were breathing again, and they couldn't help but take random shots to see which suit of armor belonged to them.

"This is Uncle Jing Ge's armor. His name is'Black Beast'." Wushuang waved, and a set of armor slowly flew over and fell in front of Jing Ge.

Jing Ge didn't think much about it. As soon as he took a step forward, the battle armor covered Jing Ge's body like a liquid material, squirming, wrapping Jing Ge's whole body.

Jing Ge stood in it like a **** of war. This battle armor had a more mysterious color than other battle armors, probably because the material was mixed with ether particles and dark matter.

"The function is not turned on, because this suit of armor is a bit dangerous and can't be tested here, otherwise it's prone to major events. Therefore, the armor requires you to leave the solar system before turning on its functions, and then you can adapt to other barren planets. I Show you the video of my father during the test."

Wushuang pressed a few times on the controller in his hand, and a holographic video fell from the sky and appeared in front of them.

It is the video of Chen Mo wearing a battle armor and destroying the planet with one hand.

hiss!

The generals on the court took a breath and looked shocked.

Since the old chief of the White Star civilization destroyed the planet, life in the universe all aimed at the strength of the old chief. Two years ago, the pupil of the black pupil civilization became the second after the old chief to develop super power to the level of destroying the planet.

Over the years, the classification of super energy has become systematic.

It is divided into stages, the first stage, the second stage, the third stage, the fourth stage, and then the annihilation stage, and the higher ones have not yet appeared. After they appear, the outside world will perfect the name again.

With the aid of a super armor, their super power is amplified and upgraded, what a crazy thing.

"Everyone has it. Mr. Lan's power armor is called'Cai', and Ming Tu's power armor is called'Cold Knife', Wang Hai's power armor is called'Trident', and Wat Mu's is called ' Forest Rangers, as well as Kunpeng, the Great Demon King, Shura, Shilong, Fire Lotus, Zidian, Black Widow, Gray Space..."

Wushuang handed the super-powered armor to the general stars on the field one by one. The Poison Skin Girl and Hui Twenty-one were present through projection, and couldn't put on the armor at all. They wanted to return to Venus immediately, but the chaos They cannot come back temporarily.

The generals on the field were extremely surprised. They all replaced their own super-powered armors. If it weren't for the ability to open the armors, they would definitely try their abilities here.

Even Ming Tu, who has always been calm and calm, couldn't help but look at his armor a few more times.

"The existence of this suit of armor is the highest secret, and it cannot be used with any life, including your closest people. It is bound to your life information. If your vital signs disappear, it will automatically activate. The self-destruct procedure makes the battle armor invalid and destroyed. You can't give the battle armor to other lives, otherwise I will take it back and accept the punishment, understand?" Chen Mo exhorted in a very serious tone.

"understand."

The generals on the court shouted very firmly.

As the generals of the Armed Forces, they all know what this suit of armor means. Once exposed, the impact will be so great that they can't believe it.

"Okay, go and practice your armor. Remember, don't try to use this armor in the solar system if you don't fully master the ability of the armor." Chen Mo saw everyone eager to try and smiled. Immediately let them go and took Mo Nu and Wushuang to leave the base.

chapters.title: Chapter 1035: : Butcher Knife Tearing Tranquility
chapters.body:
Chapter 1035: : Butcher Knife Tearing Tranquility

In the far depths of the universe, on an unknown planet, some ordinary life lives here.

As far as cosmic civilization is concerned, it belongs to the primitive star field without life and civilization. The life here is still in the era of cold weapons in the early stages of civilization, and the existence of cosmic civilization is not even known.

Quiet, peaceful, and few disputes, this is what the planet looks like today.

But in the hidden forests of this planet, there is a spacecraft parked, which is obviously a spacecraft of alien life.

"Star Lord, what's the matter?" Zi Yun, who had just walked out of the spaceship, heard the prompt of the communication device, and immediately turned it on. Seeing Zi Junzhi emerging from the holographic projection, she did not have much expression on her cold face.

"Are you by Zidi?" Zi Junzhi said, his voice could not be heard.

Zi Yun, who had always been indifferent, flickered slightly, and did not speak.

She thought a lot at this moment, but from Zi Junzhi's sure tone, she knew that Zi Junzhi was sure she followed Zidi.

"Teacher is out, you can tell me if you have anything to do." Zi Yun said calmly.

She directly called the teacher without a taboo. As the star owner of the crape myrtle civilization, although the current situation of crape myrtle civilization is not very good, it should not be difficult for him to know this information.

"Unexpectedly." Zi Junzhi sighed, and then said: "Zi Di's newsletter to me, I have something to talk to him."

The two looked at each other through the holographic video, silently, waiting for the answer.

"I need to ask the teacher for his opinion." Zi Yun said lightly, her voice still as cold as before, even though she was facing the star master of Ziwei civilization.

"can."

After hanging up the communication, Zi Yun hesitated and dialed Zidi's communication.

Zidi is a taboo to the Ziwei civilization. As the star master, in order to find Zidi, he sent the communication to her, indicating that there must be something very important.

...

"The person in charge of the dignified crape myrtle civilization, did you personally find me as a sinner?" Zidi coldly looked at Zijunzhi on the holographic projection, his voice did not have any emotion, and he did not have a good impression of Zijunzhi.

"I'm here to ask you to do something." Zi Junzhi's voice was slightly tired.

The face under the purple emperor's cloak was as indifferent as before, and it seemed that he did not hear his words. In front of him, there are the unique food and beverages of this planet, and there are dance performances of the civilization of this planet in front of him.
