The scene is so lively, and other lives are jubilant.

"You star master of the dignified Ziwei civilization, are you coming to invite me as a sinner?" Zidi laughed tauntingly: "Will I go back to jail or Ling Chi?"

"The Ziwei civilization is on the edge of the abyss."

Zi Junzhi's voice was lonely, even a little sad, without the aura of a hero in front of other lives.

Seeing this, Zidi was still indifferent, and he had no interest in such things. It seemed that the stage performances before him were more important than what Zijunzhi said.

"Very good, this is the result I want to see. Are you here to give me the good news?" Zidi said coldly: "I heard the good news, you can go away."

Zidi stretched out his hand, preparing to turn off the communicator.

"Wait, the bodies of your parents and Zi Qing are still with me."

When the words fell, Zidi's hand froze in the air.

boom!

With Zidi as the center, a large area of life around him fainted. The wine bottle on his table instantly turned into powder, allowing the wine to scatter around.

"Better give me an explanation." Zidi's voice became extremely cold.

The terrifying gaze made Zijun's heart tremble, and he dared not look directly at him. He bit his head and said: "Your parents and Ziqing's bodies, I kept them in a freezer. They didn't completely die back then. I secretly used medical technology. , Restored their physical preservation, but the brain was eventually damaged, and they entered a strange deep confinement of consciousness, unable to awaken."

Zidi's purple eyes were extremely shocking, and his always calm face showed a hint of excitement.

"I didn't participate in that incident at the beginning. After the accident, I secretly replaced their bodies with others and kept them. I know that the incident was a bit too much. Ziwei Civilization is sorry for you."

"You are not guilty. You thought that one day you would use me, so you kept it secretly." Zidi sneered unabashedly: "Do you know why I didn't kill you back then?"

Zijun's body trembled, recalling the scene that year, an inexplicable fear floated from his heart. The scene at that time was the scene he didn't want to recall most. Over the past few thousand years, he woke up from nightmares countless times.

"A good calculation, seemingly weak but extremely powerful, you do not participate because you are timid, and there is only a little bit of immorality deep in your heart, and a little bit of cleverness. You are the only one who is better to Ziqing Friends, otherwise you would have died early."

Zijun's expression was sullen, and when he recalled what had happened, he felt a little guilty.

"Where are their bodies?" Zidi asked coldly.

"In the secret room of my residence, the freezer compartment is kept. Their condition is very bad. The dormant warehouse cannot be maintained and can only be frozen." Zijun felt that Zidi’s eyes could penetrate through the holographic video and penetrate his heart. Don't dare to lie.

After just finished speaking, Zi Junzhi felt his body loose, and he exhaled deeply, and the fine sweat on his forehead had come out.

"Let's talk, what are the conditions?" Zidi said indifferently.

"I would like to invite you to kill all the families that participated in that incident, and some other old nobles, I will cooperate with you." One of the Zijun gritted his teeth, looked ruthless, and lowered his head to say his request. Come out, dare not look directly at Zidi.

"Hahahahaha..."

Zidi laughed frantically, unscrupulously, as if he heard a great joke, but also seemed to have encountered a good thing.

"Unexpectedly, I, the ancient sinner of crape myrtle, will become your sword to the star lord, and the person under the knife will still be a crape myrtle. Zijunzhi, it seems that you have grown a little over the years, and you can bear it well."

Zijunzhi had broken the jar, gritted his teeth and said: "After the fall of the crape myrtle civilization, the forces around the crape myrtle civilization are ready to move and regard the crape myrtle civilization as the second crape myrtle civilization. If the old aristocratic family is not eliminated, the crape myrtle civilization is facing a split It’s more dangerous than the dark forest. I don’t want the crape myrtle civilization to be destroyed in my hands."

"Hahaha!"

Zidi's laughter was taunting.

"Why should I believe you? Are you trying to trick me back into besieging me?"

"The situation in the universe is very complicated now. The two families of Black Eye and White Star have already started contacting those families. If they are not cleared early, the Ziwei civilization may fall into a civil strife fighting for power." Zijun's voice was frantic: "I can Leave me under your control. I only want the Ziwei civilization to be stable, even if you come back to be the star master, I will give it to you."

"I'm not interested in dirty Mao Keng." Zidi smiled coldly, and looked at Zi Jun deeply: "Take someone to send out the bodies of my parents and Zi Qing. I promised you."

...

Chen Mo is receiving a special visitor.

Arowana Princess.

Over the years, they have talked a lot on the communication device, but it was the first time that Arowana came to the galaxy, and it was also the invitation of this year.

Arowana walked down from the spaceship, a gorgeous tight-fitting fish-scale suit, outlined her perfect figure, noble and generous, very charming and visually impactful, tall figure, many times more beautiful than Miss World of human beings on earth .

I am afraid that only Mo Nu can be compared.

As soon as he stepped off the spaceship, Arowana looked around, curious about Chen Mo's hometown.

After all, the life that came out of here actually grew out of nothing and developed into one of today's overlords of the universe. This planet gives people a sense of yearning, just like the former residence of a celebrity.

The most important thing is that when she looks around, most of them are similar to her.

Before Mu's Tianxing met Chen Mo, she had never thought that there would be such a humanoid tribe that looked exactly the same as their mermaid tribe after they got out of the water.

"After reading for so long, I finally came to your hometown. You are a busy person, did you interrupt your work?" Arowana asked, her voice as sweet as a clear spring.

"No." Chen Mo said.

"That's good, the planet in your hometown is very small and exquisite!" Arowana smiled.

"indeed."

Chen Mo is noncommittal. Compared with other life planets in the universe, the earth does belong to a small category.

"Can you take me to your house?"

"I'm afraid this is not good for the time being." Chen Mo spread his hands.

"It seems that my husband is still a strict wife." Arowana smiled charmingly, and looked up and down Chen Mo: "Then take me to visit your home planet and see the culture and customs here."

"This is fine." Chen Mo said, "You are here this time, isn't it just to come to have fun?"

"Mr. is really smart. This time I came here to find a backer for my people to explore the way." Arowana smiled undiminished and looked at Chen Mo: "Mr.'s thighs should be thick enough."

While talking, Arowana was a little fascinated.

Now that the universe is in chaos, Mermaid has become a star field coveted by many civilizations, because the life planets there are beautiful, and various species are also beautiful and very special, especially their mermaid tribe.

"Now the cosmic war has spread to the Mermaid, and the surrounding top civilizations are all eyeing us. The Mermaid’s situation is not very good and cannot be resisted for long, so I can only come over in advance and ask Mr. The mermaid tribe, if the mermaid civilization is destroyed, my tribe and I have nowhere to go and can go to Mr.

"Turn to me? Why do you want to turn to me?" Chen Mo asked in surprise.

"There are many reasons. The first is that after we leave the water, we are exactly the same as humans. It is easier for us to integrate with you. Next, Mr.'s marching ant group is still developing at a high speed, and other established forces have formed internally. It’s been a long time since our mermaid went to them and won’t end well. Either we were raised in captivity and used our mermaid as a favorite, or we were marginalized, and then coveted by interstellar traffickers and caught for sale."

With that, Princess Arowana sighed.

The proportion of missing persons of their merman tribe is the highest in the universe.

One is their beautiful appearance, and the other is their mermaid female fish, who have incomparable singing and dancing talents. Some civilized royal families like to use mermaid female fish as singers.

Many interstellar human traffickers focused on the Mermaid in Mermaid and caught them and sold them to the royal families.

"You go to me, are you afraid that I will keep you in captivity?"

"Mr. Will?" Princess Arowana looked directly at Chen Mo.

Chen Mo smiled openly and did not answer. His answer was naturally negative. He had experienced the feeling of being taken away and raised in captivity, and he had not been so perverted as to be a pet girl in captivity.

"Even if the husband let us be the patrons, the appearance of the husband is the same as ours, and he feels better in his heart. If the husband needs it, there should be many girls in our clan who like him, including Arowana."

Princess Arowana smiled playfully, looking at Chen Mo with her beautiful eyes.

Chen Mo's cheeks twitched. If Xiao Yu heard this, he would be able to poke his skin off and turned to look at the Mo Girl next to him. The meaning was obvious. He didn't say anything, and he didn't agree.

"I won't tell Sister Xiaoyu." Mo Nu said very witty.

Upon hearing the conversation between the two, Princess Arowana giggled.

Now she is sure that Chen Mo is a very funny human being.

In the age of the universe, especially the overlords of the universe, all of them are extremely powerful. The male power dominates groups of wives and concubines, and the female power dominates the house full of spoiled men. This is normal. There is no such thing as a strict wife control like Chen Mo. .

During the chat between the two, Mo Nu suddenly paused and turned on the communication device in her hand.

"Brother Mo."

"what's wrong?"

"news."

Mo Nu handed a message to Chen Mo. Chen Mo narrowed his eyes as soon as he saw the information.

"Are you in a hurry?"

Princess Arowana was a little puzzled about their sudden situation. Looking at their demeanor, something big should have happened.

Chen Mo handed the message in his hand to Princess Arowana.

"The eternal sinner of Ziwei civilization, Zidi, used unknown means to enter the small universe of Ziwei civilization, and through spiritual control, slaughtered all members of the ten major families of the Ziwei civilization and some veteran nobles, totaling 57.93 million lives and corpses everywhere."

chapters.title: Chapter 1036: : The Situation Of The Universe
chapters.body:
Chapter 1036: : The Situation Of The Universe

Zidi slaughtered 57 million crape myrtle people on crape myrtle star.

The ten strongest families of the Ziwei civilization and the core members of the old nobles in charge of the important powers of the Ziwei civilization were not spared. Except for the clans who went out, all the other clansmen in the Ziwei star were massacred.

The methods are extremely terrible.

It is said that on the day of the massacre, Zidi demonstrated terror, covering the entire Ziwei star with spiritual control, controlling those family nobles to kill each other, and blood flowed into rivers.

There is another life in the universe that can envelop the planet with super power, and it is also the most terrifying mind control of the Ziwei civilization.

To Ziwei people, the name Zidi is not unfamiliar, even very familiar. The taboo characters of Ziwei civilization are rarely discussed in public.

The former Zidi slaughtered all the students of the Ziwei Civilization Supreme High School Ziwei Academy, and some senior nobles also died in the slaughter. And those who are studying in the academy are the core descendants of the major power families of the crape myrtle civilization, and they are also the best handful of lives in the crape myrtle civilization.

However, in that incident, the highest institution of the crape myrtle civilization became a dead place, and the best descendants of the top tier of the crape myrtle civilization died in that incident. The reputation of the crape myrtle civilization was greatly damaged and began to enter a period of decline. Depressed.

After that incident, the generations of outstanding talents from the major families of the Ziwei civilization appeared.

As for why Zidi slaughtered those elite children and chose to defect, there are different opinions from the outside world, but the specific truth is only known to the parties at the time, but all the parties at the time were silent.

The name Zidi has become a taboo in the Ziwei civilization.

The Ziwei civilization even was willing to use a constellation to exchange the head of the Zidi, but for thousands of years, no one had dared to make his mind. He himself was not a dragon, and rarely appeared in front of the outside world.

After the trip to the Star Stele, Zidi reappeared, but slaughtered the core personnel of the ten strongest families of Ziwei civilization and the old nobles.

Inside the crape myrtle star, blood flows into a river.

There is a conspiracy.

Anyone who uses his brain can see that there is a conspiracy.

Before the massacre began, the Ziwei civilization was preparing to hold a supreme meeting one by one every year. Almost all the core personnel of the big families and old nobles of the Ziwei civilization were on the Ziwei star.

Ziwei Star is quite a palace-like existence of a country, with the highest security level. It needs to pass through the small space entrance of the Ziwei civilization, and also through the layers of galaxies, star systems and planets. It is impossible for Zidi to sneak in silently alone. Crape myrtle star.

The only possible reason is that there is life in the Ziwei civilization as the Zidi's internal response, and his status in the Ziwei civilization is not low, so those who can be exempted from these interrogation procedures.

The top ten families and old nobles were slaughtered, who benefited most?

The star lord of the Ziwei civilization, Zijunzhi.

This answer made countless people shudder.

However, the outside world can only speculate and cannot be confirmed.

As soon as the Zidi massacre had passed, Zijunzhi stood up, expressed anger at the massacre, and announced that Zidi was wanted at any cost. Then the Ziwei Galaxy declared martial law and began to interrogate Zidi's traces.

After that, Zi Junzhi appointed Zi Luo as the commander-in-chief of the war, and took over the investigation of the life of the Zidi collusion within the Ziwei civilization.

A bright warning.

The butcher knife rests on the neck of every crape myrtle civilized family. No family dares to act rashly or speak casually. A family that secretly wanted to build momentum, pointing to the Zijun’s collusion with the Zidi to slaughter the tribe, was ransacked that day and the whole clan was slaughtered for collusion with the Zidi.

For a while, all the top families in the Ziwei civilization shut up and did not dare to act rashly.

Obviously, Zi Junzhi was prepared for all this.

In the thunderous actions of Zijun, there was no huge turbulence in Ziwei civilization because of this incident. All the legions of the destroyed family factions are under the control of Zi Luo. In the name of investigating the whereabouts of Zidi, internal personnel exchanges have been initiated.

At the beginning, the attention of the outside world was on the matter itself. When the arrangement of Ziluo was completed, some talents from the top families of Ziwei civilization discovered that the warhead army they were in charge of was emptied by Ziluo's people.

With the momentum of thunder, Zi Luo completely controls all warheads within the Ziwei civilization. Then, on the charge of colluding with the Zidi, slaughtered two families that tried to unite with the top family to seize power.

The Ziwei star was panicked, and no family dared to come forward.

They knew that Zi Junzhi started the purge, but they could only watch.

This is the craziest turmoil since the establishment of the Ziwei civilization for hundreds of millions of years.

Even the veteran family of Ziweixing couldn't believe that Zi Junzhi, an ordinary seemingly peaceful person, started his hands, but was as fierce as an executioner, and gave no excuses or opportunities to other families.

The core personnel of the ten major families and the old nobles were slaughtered, which did not trigger protests from the civilized Ziwei people, but secretly applauded the Zidi.

Within the Ziwei civilization, everyone knows that those core families are aloof and don't treat ordinary Ziwei people as their lives. Every nobleman has bad marks on his body. Zidi slaughtered them to death, naturally everyone was happy.

The crape myrtle civilization, which was still facing internal and external troubles, after this major cleansing, all internal hidden dangers disappeared.

The outside world can guess the conspiracy in this great purge. Without evidence, it can only be a guess.

But in any case, the outside world has to admit that after this great purge, the Ziwei civilization has got rid of the constraints of the old powerful families and nobles and completed the centralization of power.

Sweeping away thousands of years of decline, this oldest god-level civilization has once again come to life.

...

On the other side, the Warhead of the Black Eye Civilization officially began to annex the civilizations around the star field. The Black Eye Civilization Action also led to the White Star Civilization and Thor Civilization, and the big fish began to eat the small fish.

The situation became tense overnight.

The three god-level civilizations are in a tacit understanding. They didn't attack each other, they all chose to carry out an annexation operation against the civilizations adjacent to the star field.

The cosmic situation of ten years of quiet, Xiyun first emerged.

After these years of adjustment, the new system means a new world.

This is a war about the right to speak in the universe for hundreds of millions of years. Whoever can win this war will have a greater right to speak in the future.

Chen Mo's expression was a bit solemn, and Lan and the others beside him were equally cautious.

If the strength of the black-eye civilization does not change, then in the future, they will definitely encounter a terrifying opponent. Similarly, other god-level civilizations pose a great threat. After all, they have a relationship with other god-level civilizations. not too good.

"Our current star field is three billion light-years away from the Phantom Civilization. Together with the Great Wall of Sloan and the Pisces Cetus, the horizontal space spans about 6.2 billion light-years and the vertical depth is 47. Light years."

Lan introduced the laser pointer to Chen Mo.

"We have an advantage that is not considered an advantage. The position here in Pisces the Whale is at the end of the'cosmic feather', a remote location in the universe. The surrounding galaxies are not dense and there are many cosmic holes.

In the third and fourth quadrants, adjacent to us is the Ten Cities Alliance, and on the other side of the Ten Cities Alliance is the Black Eye Civilization. The Tianlu City in the Ten Cities Alliance has the Gulu Hongqiao, leading to the White Star Civilization, which is currently the White Star Civilization. Take control. Next to the Sloan Great Wall is the Wuxian civilization, which is followed by the giant civilization.

Here, there are two rainbow bridges leading to the dark forest civilization, the skeleton rainbow bridge leading to the An's super galaxy cluster at the edge of the dark forest domain, and the Muwu Hongqiao leading to the vicinity of the edge cloud. At present, the Anshi Supercluster is under our control, next to it is the dark forest and the land of a thousand stars.

Finally, there is the Baiwu Hongqiao, which connects the core area of the once-netherworld civilization, which is located at the core of the universe. In this star field, we are separated from the Thor civilization and the Black Eye civilization, separated by the Nebula Alliance and the Underfire civilization. So although we are remote, we are very lucky and have not had direct contact with those companies for the time being. "

The huge holographic star map clearly marked the spatial location of the main forces at present. The position of their marching ant groups in the corners is not conspicuous.

The most eye-catching is the white, black, blue, and purple star fields marked by the White Star Civilization, Black Pupil Civilization, Thor Civilization and Ziwei Civilization. The largest Lagerstroemia Civilization ever had a range of more than 24 billion light years. Today, the largest star field is the black pupil civilization after it has annexed part of the star field of the Pluto civilization. The star field covers more than 26 billion light years.

Several occupies the most dense center of the universe galaxy, intricately. The cosmic space position connected by the Hongqiao marked on the map makes the power between the cosmic star maps a hundred times more complicated.

They may not be very good when it comes to Star Territory, but when it comes to the strength of the War Department, they are not afraid of any civilization.

After defeating the Netherite civilization, the combat effectiveness of the marching ant group has never been doubted, and they have full confidence in the power in their hands. The technology comparable to the god-level civilization and the superpowers leading the major forces in the universe make them full of confidence in their own strength.

When Lan looked at Chen Mo, the other Jiangxing followed.

Lan explained all the situation around them, and Chen Mo needed to determine what to do next.

"To form an alliance with the Nebula Alliance, the defense comes from the Black Eye Civilization and Thor Civilization. The surrounding area of Muwu Hongqiao is not moving temporarily. The Shepherd is weak and is being coveted by the Lion Throne. Let them fight first. The Intelligence Department does the work of the Shepherd. Wu Xian. Civilization is now constrained by giant civilization. Behind the giant is the shadow of the white star civilization, allowing Hercules to concentrate on dealing with the giant.

The Ten Cities Alliance straddles between us and the Black Eye Civilization, and they will also face the crisis of the White Star Civilization crossing the Gulu Hongqiao, so the sense of anxiety will increase.

The Ten-City Alliance is our shield across the black-eye civilization. If the Ten-City Alliance is annexed, then we will face the Black-eye civilization and the White Star civilization.

There is a chance to cooperate with them, but let them come to form an alliance with us so that we can take the initiative.

The situation of the universe is changing all the time. If we do nothing, it will cause some scruples around us, so we should also move appropriately. The strategic depth of the An's Supercluster can be expanded a bit. "

Chen Mo's words fell, and the eyes of the generals on the court skyrocketed, and some were eager to try.

As general stars, they are all a group of militants. Now the situation in the universe is blurred. They have rested for ten years. They have long been uncomfortable. Now they finally have the opportunity to move their bones.

If you want the marching ant group to continue to grow, it must expand. This is beyond doubt.

Lan secretly nodded to Chen Mo's analysis. The boss has the talent of being a star, but he is the king, and he does not need to go to battle in the march and battle. But in terms of the overall situation and strategy, the boss's vision is not weak, on the contrary, it is very strong.

"Which direction?" Lan asked.

"Don’t move the dark forest, those two brothers are fighting to death and life, and moving them will wake them up. Other top civilizations should see this too, so let them continue to consume. Let’s go in the other direction, the land of a thousand stars. Lun Alliance."

chapters.title: Chapter 1037: : Zidi Found
chapters.body:
Chapter 1037: : Zidi Found

The Land of Thousand Stars is not a force, nor is it a thousand galaxies, but a general name for a location, there are thousands of constellations, and each constellation is controlled by a top civilization, spanning tens of billions of light years .

There is the densest area of top civilization.

The formation of the Land of Thousand Stars was formed by the split of the Thousand Stars civilization during the last cosmic war. After hundreds of millions of years, the Thousand Stars civilization became the history of the universe, but the name of the Land of Thousand Stars has been passed down.

At the beginning of the struggle in the universe, the Land of Thousand Stars formed many alliances. In order to survive the troubled times, the top civilizations had to be twisted together. Otherwise, the surrounding civilizations would become the main targets of the major alliances. .

Among the alliances in the Land of Thousand Stars, the most famous are the Thousand Star Alliance, the Sauron Alliance and the Yaoshan Alliance.

"You will arrange this battle." Chen Mo looked at Lan.

The direction is determined by him, the specific combat is carried out by Lan, and Chen Mo does not participate. Chen Mo is Wang and Lan is handsome. His only goal is to complete the strategic direction that Chen Mo said.

"Okay." Lan swept across the faces of the generals on the court.

I saw Wang Hai and the others straightened up, eager to try in their eyes.

"An's is currently stationed by Xiaoli's warhead. In this operation, Xiaoli will be the main general and the Black Hawk will assist. The two warheads are responsible for the war against the Sauron Alliance. This operation is codenamed'Star Annihilation'."

"Yes."

Xiaoli and Black Hawk straightened their bodies and drank solemnly.

...

"Do you have any objections to this result?"

The poisonous woman scanned the faces of the people without expression for a week, waiting for their response.

The others looked at each other, and then looked at today's protagonists, Carrie and Hong Xu.

After ten years of hard work, the two of them have changed their appearances. Carrie has a calm temperament, even more than before, like a general, and the red order is not bad, and the aura is restrained. At the beginning, because of the little inferiority of her background, Has long been erased by time.

Carrie did not speak, but waited for Hong Xu to speak.

"No." Hong Xu shook his head.

After these years of working together, the two are rivals, so he has a much deeper understanding of Carrie than other stars.

This woman has a lot of energy, I can't tell which kind, but in terms of tactical command and strategic vision, she is indeed better than him.

These years of expansion can tell that from soldiers to generals, their respect for Kaliyi is from the heart. At this point, Hong Xu is even worse than Carrie, which may be the reason why Carrie has been in charge of the top civil war before.

"Since there is no such thing, that's the decision. From now on, the dark star commander will be Kaliyi, and Hong Xu will be the deputy commander. You two will be responsible for the formation of the Dark Star Operations Department and the General Staff Department." Poison Skin Girl said.

"Understand." Karrie and Hong Xu's body were sitting upright, and they answered seriously.

Dark Star is their current power.

After the Dark Turmoil, the forces in the Land of Chaos began to reshuffle. Their current forces consisted of the original seventeen forces, named'Dark Star'. The War Department is the two major war Departments and its regiments. Now the commander-in-chief is determined, The war department also took shape.

"You have to move fast. Next, we have to act on the Frost Empire."

As soon as these words came out, Karrie and Hong Xu looked awe-inspiring.

The Frost Empire is one of the strongest forces in the Land of Chaos, and its strength is not much worse than them. It can be said that as long as they swallow the Empire of Frost, the Land of Chaos will fall into their control without accident.

The determined Dark Star is planning a big action, and this big action will bring the entire chaotic land to unity for the first time in history.

...

"This is my hometown." Chen Mo looked down at the planet under his feet and introduced Zidi and Ziyun around him.

Chen Mo felt incredible when he received Zidi's contact.

The two had a two-sided bond, and his impression of this life full of legendary experiences was not bad.

For another life, he would be scared to death when he heard the name Zidi.

After all, slaughtered tens of millions of lives of the ten major families of the Ziwei civilization and the old nobles. The danger factor of Zidi is almost the highest life in the universe, and he deserves to be killed.

However, Zidi gave Chen Mo his notes, which recorded some important content about the advanced development of super powers.

In recent years, the soldiers and masters of their marching ant group have used the methods recorded in Zidi's notes to improve their advanced superpower development. Even Chen Mo himself is also using Zidi's method to enhance his superpower.

Therefore, to Chen Mo, Zidi is half a teacher.

As for the titles of "butcher", "killing god" and "executioner", Chen Mo didn't care. From the Zidi's style of doing things and the only dialogue with him, Chen Mo can affirm that Zidi only hates the Ziwei civilization and is not a murderer.

The Purple Emperor was floating high in the sky, looking down on this small planet, without too many waves in his heart.

The reason why he chose to ask Chen Mo for help was given guidance.

After leaving the Ziwei civilization, he found the prophet of the endless sea, and the prophet of the endless sea said about the ‘silver hair’.

"Silver Hair" has a daughter who was nearly half-dead in the brain due to a space accident and was frozen. Here in Chen Mo, his daughter has awakened.

The meaning of the Prophet of Endless Sea is obvious, and Chen Mo may have a solution here.

Therefore, he did not hesitate to choose to contact Chen Mo.

He used to help the other party because of his love for his talents in the Tianxing Monument, and he couldn't understand the deeds of the meditation civilization. He didn't expect that he could help himself today.

Even Zidi has to admit that sometimes things are so strange.

If it weren't for getting to know him at the Tianxing Monument, with his fame and deeds, I am afraid Chen Mo would not dare to receive him casually.

"Go to my laboratory first and bring them." Chen Mo said.

Zidi didn't see the outside, choosing to ask Chen Mo for help, he had to trust Chen Mo, just as Chen Mo believed him.

A small spaceship, along with their armor, landed towards the earth.

"Is the silver-haired daughter in the same situation?" Zidi asked.

"Do you know all about this?"

"I have found the Prophet of the Endless Sea."

"No wonder."

Chen Mo nodded clearly. When Tuyun introduced Lan to him, Shuiling also knew that the Prophet of Endless Sea was Shuiling's teacher, and it was not unusual to know these things.

"According to your description, the situation may not be the same."

"Different?" Zidi's voice was slightly nervous.

"It's really different. Yang Siqingyue was injured by the debris hitting his brain. It is a half-dead brain tissue injury. The undamaged part of the brain is still active. The rescue is timely and the freezing time is relatively short. Your family I’m not sure about his specific physical condition, and the freezing time is relatively long, so I need to check it first."

Zidi answered and remained silent. Before he came, he had made all possible psychological preparations.

As long as there is a little hope, he will fight for it.

"However, if the brain is half-dead, the situation should be the same. In recent years, we have done many similar operations. It is nothing more than removing the dead brain tissue, then regenerating the brain tissue, restoring the brain nerves, and then awakening their consciousness. .

The first two steps are not difficult for the god-level civilization. The most difficult thing is the final awakening of consciousness. The god-level civilization does not master the deep-sleeping consciousness awakening skills, so the god-level civilization will be at a loss for similar cases. It happens that we have mastered the technology in this area, so there is hope of healing for the half-dead brain. "

While talking, they have landed at the marching ant headquarters.

Zi Yun was surprised by the scene in front of her, not too advanced, but too ordinary.

It was such an ordinary planet where Chen Mo, the overlord of the universe, appeared.

Overlords such as Tongqing and Thunder, they are all backed by god-level civilizations, and they have grown up in them all year round. After hundreds of years, thousands of years, they have achieved current results.

And Chen Mo only spent a few decades growing up from an ordinary planet, and then relying on himself to build a power comparable to a god-level civilization.

The research at hand looks very ordinary, in the Ziwei civilization, it can only be regarded as the R&D base of the most common R&D institution.

Is there medical technology beyond the crape myrtle civilization?

Zi Yun was somewhat skeptical, but she didn't say anything, just stood quietly on the side.

After learning that Zidi went to Ziwei Star to slaughter ten big families and some old nobles, Zi Yun was equally shocked, but she still followed Zidi, because she knew that Ziwei star could not go back because of the relationship between Zidi.

The teacher didn't tell her the truth, and she didn't ask, she understood everything she could understand, and there was no need to uncover the last layer of paper.

Even she herself didn't know whether it was happiness or worry.

"Little Qi, you accompany Ms. Zi Yun around." Chen Mo said to the robot beside him.

"Okay, sir." Xiao Qi nodded and walked to Zi Yun's side.

In this regard, Zi Yun is not surprised, her identity is very sensitive, she was once the core high-level of the Ziwei civilization, and is also the most likely candidate to inherit the Ziwei civilization and served as the messenger of the Ziwei civilization.

So before entering the galaxy, her armor was not allowed to be brought in, and the armor she was currently wearing was provided to her by the marching ant group.

Now it is even more impossible to enter the most important R&D base of the March Ant Group.

"Trouble." Zi Yun nodded gently to the Xiaoqi robot next to her.

"No trouble, ma'am, please." Xiao Qi stretched out her hand and led Zi Yun away.

After Zi Yun left, Chen Mo asked the robot to move the three freezer compartments from the small spacecraft, and took Zidi to the medical laboratory in Building 1.

chapters.title: Chapter 1038: : Artificial Wormhole
chapters.body:
Chapter 1038: : Artificial Wormhole

Medical laboratory in Building 1.

In the three freezing cabins, three crape myrtle people lying quietly, with purple skin and tall stature, the unique color patterns of crape myrtle civilization, printed on their skins, with a strange beauty.

Ziwei people are the most typical humanoids, and the armor system was established by them, so the definition of humanoid appearance is also one of the typical standards for Ziwei people.

The faces of the two middle-aged Ziwei people are somewhat similar to those of Zidi.

In addition, there is a young female crape myrtle. Chen Mo is not clear about the aesthetics of the crape myrtle, but from his eyes, the proportion of the female crape myrtle looks very comfortable, better than the purple rhyme. If you want to come, you should Is a big beauty.

This is Zidi's parents and his former lover.

According to some information from the chat with Zidi, this is the reason why Zidi judged the Ziwei civilization. His parents and lovers were forced into this by the Ziwei civilization family.

And the massacre of Ziweixing is also related to them.

Zi Junzhi used their bodies in exchange to let Zidi slaughter those old-fashioned families and complete the centralization of the Ziwei civilization in a fair way.

Even Chen Mo had to admire this method.

It's just that why they become what they are now, Chen Mo is not good to ask carefully.

Regardless of the process, it must be an extremely painful memory for Zidi. Since the dust is sealed, Chen Mo will not uncover the scars of others.

"The inspection results are out." Chen Mo handed an inspection report to Zidi: "From the inspection results, their situation is not as bad as expected."

"Really?" Even if he was used to seeing strong winds and waves, Zidi couldn't help his heart ups and downs at this moment.

"Your parents are in better condition. Part of the cerebral cortex died. This is certain. After a small part of the brain tissue is replaced, it should be just after the accident. Someone wanted to treat them, but they have not mastered the technology of deep consciousness awakening, so they did not succeed. Resurrection. Because there is no awakening and the brain tissue is still dying, in desperation, I chose to freeze it.

The girl’s situation is relatively complicated. I don’t know how long she was involved in passive brain tissue replacement surgery, but it is certain that her brain has undergone extensive tissue replacement, which involves some memory modules, although it is possible to wake her up , But part of her memory will be lost forever. I'm not sure how much I've lost. I won't be able to determine until she is awakened. I don't rule out the possibility that all memories will be lost. "

Hearing this, Zidi's heart sank and fell into silence.

If all memories are lost, is she still her?

"Can you be sure to wake them up?"

"Anything, there is no 100% success rate, but their situation is not as bad as imagined. The probability of success is very high, but any unexpected possibility is not ruled out." Chen Mo said.

The decision is in the hands of Zidi, if he fails, he will suffer the pain of losing his loved ones again. It gave him hope and made him desperate, the pain is beyond description.

Zidi's pain was a choice, and the laboratory became deadly silent.

"You just let it go, and I accept any result."

...

The marching ant group is rapidly turning.

They moved very quickly. Although there has been no major war in these years, it does not mean that the war department has done nothing. Various training subjects, as well as transfers, allow them to spend the year in high-intensity transfers.

During this mobilization, the two main warheads of the marching ant group are assembled and are rapidly appearing in the An's Supercluster.

After Xiaoli joined the marching ant group, the main force of the war department is guarding the An's super galaxy cluster. This super galaxy cluster is located on the edge of the dark forest literary star field, and it is in contact with the land of a thousand stars. It is sandwiched in the middle corner. It was originally an unknown super galaxy cluster, and its internal strength was not strong.

After the marching ant group took control of the An's Supercluster, this position appeared to be a three-legged posture.

The dark forest, the land of a thousand stars, and the marching ants are just three-legged, and they have not reached a balanced state.

The dark forest is split and is in an internal struggle, and there is no time to take care of other affairs. The major alliances in the Land of Thousand Stars are scattered and the hearts of the people are uneven, so the marching ant group is given a chance.

There is a reason why Chen Mo chose this direction.

The skeleton rainbow bridge is too close to the hinterland controlled by the marching ants. Once the enemy chooses to invade the Pisces Cetus from the position of the skeleton rainbow bridge, a few space jumps will reach the Milky Way, then go straight into the marching ant hinterland, which is equivalent to the white mist rainbow bridge To the civilization of the meditation.

The deeper the position, the safer the hinterland.

Since the self-propelled army ant group took control of the Angle Supercluster, a lot of development has been carried out here.

This is not the time when the space connection technology is monopolized by the god-level civilization. The marching ant group has fully used Eisenrol's concept of "cosmic village".

Establish space traps to block some dead star systems without life, and then use space interference technology to change the spatial frequency of blocked star systems.

Create a space connector inside the blocked star system to serve as the cosmic space transmission center to connect the blocked star system in other corners of the marching ant star field, which can greatly reduce the risk and time of long-distance space jumps.

These spatial connectors are quite controllable artificial wormholes.

This idea allows them to reach all corners of the star field in the shortest possible time.

Although the construction of the space connector is a bit troublesome, the convenience is obvious, faster, safer and more controllable. Therefore, under Chen Mo's instruction, thousands of space connectors appeared in various super galaxy clusters.

They can mobilize all kinds of materials and equipment at will, without worrying about the enemy laying traps and ambushes in space. Compared with the average top civilization, this is the advantage of the god-level civilization that controls the space connection technology.

War is no small matter.

From the moment the order is issued, the marching ant group has done all the logistics mobilization.

The marching ant group has seven main battle divisions, and the other countless legions belong to the subordinate legions of the seven main battle divisions. This time the two major battle divisions are invested here in the An's Transcendent Galaxy Cluster, which shows the importance it is attached to here.

Lan did not personally choose to command operations. He is in charge of the overall situation. These divisional wars must be dealt with tactically by the war department itself. This is to train the generals of the war department.

Only the growth of the generals of the war department is the real growth.

The main reason for the failure of the Ming body civilization is to place all hopes on Ming Ah, and let him support the whole battle. Apart from that, there is no other general star that can be used as a big star.

After Ming Ah was assassinated, the Ming body civilization fell apart instantly.

Two fists are hard to beat four hands, and a general who can stand alone is the talent the commander needs.

The reason why the marching ant group is not afraid of any other civilizations today is because of its outstanding generals.

In the ranking of the stars of the major forces in the universe, the celebrities of the marching ant group, Youlan and Ming Tu, are the top celebrities. Later, the more famous are Wang Hai and Wumu, because in the two Hongqiao offensive and defensive battles, the two were separately Gou Xuan, the famous general of the White Star civilization, and Xing Ming, the top general of the Pluto civilization.

Xiaoli and Black Hawk belong to the unknown types in the main battle department commander of the marching ant group.

Xiaoli was born in the Yeluzi Battle Armor Group. After Lan's training and training, he gradually formed his own tactical style during many combat drills.

In addition to the Ming Tu battle department is a newly added battle department, the Black Hawk's Kunpeng battle department is the latest war department established. In Lan's training, the Black Hawk also formed a tactic that belonged to his personal style, and then stood out.

Among the tactical systems of the Kunpeng War Headquarters, the most absorbed are the tactics in the China Art of War. Combining China’s warfare with the tactics of the space war system, it has become the style of the current Kunpeng War Head.

In the Seven Great War Department, Xiaoli's style is brave and tough, and Black Hawk's style is fast-breaking, both have very obvious warhead style.

The encounter that Xiaoli is good at is the ability that other generals dream of, but he can't learn it at all. The Black Hawk is good at raid warfare, a quick raid tactic of changing one shot to one location. In a virtual war game, other warheads of the marching ant group suffer hardships, and if they are not careful, their headquarters are taken away.

The two are complementary in style, which is why Lan asked them to fight together.

The two Great War Departments, such a huge fleet entering the An's Supercluster, cannot hide the surrounding forces at all. When the warhead of the marching ant group appeared in the An's super galaxy cluster, the direction of the dark forest civilization and the forces of the land of a thousand stars became tense.

This was a force that forced the underworld civilization to collapse, and they couldn't help but not be vigilant.

It's just that the forces in the Land of Thousand Stars did not expect that the marching ant group would not give them time to react.

When they were preparing to mobilize more troops to the border star field of the An's Transcendent galaxy cluster, the warheads of Xiaoli and Black Hawk had appeared in the border star field of both sides.

chapters.title: Chapter 1039: : Start
chapters.body:
Chapter 1039: : Start

The war broke out extremely fast. The warhead of the Sauron Alliance had just been mobilized, and the battle had started before it was fully equipped.

The Black Hawk-style raid war ended the first battle before the Sauron Alliance had time to react. The Black Hawk with fast style, after Arashi's tempering over the years, he has already become a venomous sharp knife, bringing his fast, accurate and ruthless style to the fullest.

Under a surprise attack, they can destroy an unsuspecting enemy base in one fell swoop, and then flee thousands of miles away.

The victory of World War I easily destroyed the bases of ten star systems in the Sauron Alliance.

Although there is no particularly important base among them, when the sharp knife is out of the sheath, a big victory in one fell swoop is enough to put a lot of pressure on the Sauron Alliance.

The Black Hawk's surprise attack was a signal, and on the other side, Xiaoli also started a battle plan.

The defense of the star field borders is to block various star systems, even galaxies, and build space-based weapons in them as a fortress of war. The location and layout are not comparable to wars on the planet.

The arming here is the arming of eight quadrants. Any quadrant may be the target of attack.

This is the difficulty of space defense.

Similarly, in space, wars are not carried out one by one, but in groups. A large-scale war may have to attack dozens or even hundreds of stellar forts at the same time.

That kind of scene is a real butterfly piercing through flowers. When the victory of each stellar fortress appears, it is necessary to immediately calculate the victory of this fortress and what impact it will have on other nearby star battlefields.

Will the enemy come out of this battlefield and go to other stellar fortress battlefields to support?

Heavy calculations require a star to have a good overall view, calculation ability, tactical layout ability, and strong psychological quality.

The war between the two sides began, and the Sauron Alliance quickly reacted and began to strengthen defenses in the galaxies along the way.

Xiaoli's target this time is Sauron Star, also called the Eye of Sauron, a galaxy like an eye, very beautiful. The Sauron Star was captured, and the Sauron Alliance was truly broken.

But want to capture the headquarters of a top alliance galaxy, how easy is it to say?

In recent years, the situation in Hongqiao has been basically stable, and the deployment of each family has already been adjusted accordingly. It is no longer as hasty as it was at the beginning, and in recent years, the development of super powers has allowed the combat effectiveness of combat troops to fully surpass that of war robots.

The warheads of various civilizations have improved their individual combat strength to varying degrees.

However, the war of soldiers is not the dominant rate. Technology has become an insurmountable gap on the battlefield. Almost 99% of the wars are unmanned warfare under the war machine. Dispatch a stealth armor to be embedded in the opponent's line of defense.

Knowing that the opponent is the marching ant group, the Sauron Alliance is almost tense from top to bottom.

The marching ant group is well-known, and it is no longer an unknown force at the time. Whether it is super power technology or other aspects, the marching ant group is at the forefront of the universe.

And the marching ant group has top generals.

This is a force that has defeated a god-level civilization. If you don't mention the twelve points of spiritual treatment, I am afraid that they will become the next target to be destroyed.

The Sauron Alliance immediately raised the defense level of each Battlestar to the highest level as if they were facing a major enemy.

...

In the virtual reality war room, the atmosphere is extremely quiet.

The lives that are sitting around the virtual war room are all generals and staff members of the Yexiao War Headquarters and the Kunpeng War Headquarters.

The two staff sat interspersed and did not speak.

This meeting was presided over by Xiao Li, and Xiao Li was the highest general in the battlefield of the Sauron Alliance. The War Department of the An's Super Galaxy Group deals with the forces of the Land of Thousand Stars all the year round. They have a better understanding of the enemy. This is a natural advantage that other War Departments do not have.

Although both warheads came to this battlefield, and the general goal was determined by Xiaoli, the specific tactical situation was deployed by their respective warheads.

Because even Xiaoli didn't understand the style of the Kunpeng War Headquarters. As long as the Kunpeng War Headquarters acted in accordance with Xiaoli's major plan goals, they would all be directed by themselves.

After the personnel arrived, Xiaoli and Black Hawk looked at each other, nodded slightly, and were sure they could start.

"Next, let me talk about the actions of the Kunpeng War Headquarters. You are only responsible for one plan."

The generals and staff of the Kunpeng War Department all straightened their waists. Although their leader is Black Hawk, the highest leader this time is Xiaoli. They still have to confirm some instructions that should be followed.

"You use your good combat method to muddy the waters of the Sauron Alliance."

Xiaoli used the term earth.

The Kunpeng War Department has a lot of warfare, which are derived from the earth, so it will be easier to understand some of the terms of the earth.

"Can it be done?" Xiaoli looked at Black Hawk.

The two have the same status in the armed forces of the marching ant group. In this battle, the Black Hawk will be the deputy commander in chief. In the next battle, maybe the Black Hawk will be the commander in chief.

They fought against each other many times during training exercises, but this time they are colleagues. In this war, their goals are unified.

"How muddy?" Black Hawk asked.

"The muddy the better, it's easier to fish."

"Okay." Black Hawk nodded heavily.

"Also, you look for opportunities, the attack numbers X3Y103, X4Y9213, X7Y2948... If it can be destroyed, it will be destroyed, if it cannot be destroyed, it will be harassed. The purpose is to put pressure on them, the bigger the better, and to divert their attention."

Xiaoli clicked on a series of galaxy numbers, and these numbered galaxies all turned into flashing red dots in the holographic map.

Almost the next moment, the generals and staff of the Kunpeng War Department remembered these star systems in their minds, and at the same time was thinking of tactics to destroy these star systems.

"The goal of the Night Owl War Department is to destroy X3Y9204, X8Y3193, X5Y29492..., a total of 472 galaxies, of which there are a total of 129,780 targets in the galaxy."

This remark made the generals on the field ponder while staring at the marked target. What are the common characteristics?

But specifically, they dare not ask.

This is how the combat department is deployed. You should know it. The upper part will give you complete information and plans. If you shouldn’t know, you can’t ask more, otherwise you will be taboo. If you accidentally reveal the combat intention to your opponent, the consequences will be disastrous. .

In this kind of war, confidentiality is very important.

"Do you understand everything?" Xiaoli asked.

"understand."

"Not only to understand, but also to complete the task."

"Yes."

...

The big action of the marching ant group began, and in the quiet solar system, Chen Mo also had something to do.

The condition of Zidi's relatives has been confirmed.

Three different medical reports.

Chen Mo explained to him the best and worst results of the operation.

"I have explained the specific situation clearly to you. If you still have any questions, you can ask me." Chen Mo expertly gathered all the data.

Zidi took a deep breath and said, "Nothing."

This sentence said that he was mentally prepared.

"I will try my best to get the best result." Chen Mo said solemnly, and took Mo Nu into the operating room.

This kind of operation cannot tolerate the slightest error, and Chen Mo had to personally conduct it. Although Zidi said that he was psychologically prepared, if he really failed, the pain of losing a loved one could not be said to be prepared.

After making all the preoperative preparations, Chen Mo gave the order to thaw the patient.

chapters.title: Chapter 1040: : Take A New Beast
chapters.body:
Chapter 1040: : Take A New Beast

Sitting across from Hitomi, is the current commander of the Black Eye Civilization, the former commander of the First Army of the Black Eye Civilization, the Red Army, and the first think tank of the Black Eye Civilization, Yan, the general staff of the war department.

These two, in terms of arms, are Tong Qing's right and left arms, and in the current Black Eye civilization, the two are almost under the same person.

In formulating strategies, Tong Qing sometimes consults both.

"The marching ant group has acted on the Sauron Alliance. What do you think about this?"

Hitomi was the first to open the topic.

The Red Army looked at Yan and motioned to him.

In terms of strategy, Yan has a unique right to speak.

The first star is the name given to Yan by the major civilizations in the universe.

Let Tongqing effortlessly rectify the black pupil civilization, and even some life believes that the death of Shi Ganxing, the first heir of Thor's civilization, Dan, was also planned by Yan for Tongqing.

There are many stories about him.

He is almost the most dazzling one in Jiangxing Realm, the idol in countless Jiangxing's hearts.

"Looking at the territory of the marching ants, they are doing a good job."

Yan skillfully called up the star map in the holographic platform, centered on the star field of the marching ant group, and marked the surrounding forces.

"They are in a remote location, adjacent to the Ten Cities Alliance, Hercules, and the Shepherds, and the void of the universe. The Hongqiao of the Sloan Great Wall connects the hinterland of the original Pluto star domain. In the last battle of the God Slaughter, they occupied a favorable galaxy group. Armed, and we are separated from the Netherfire Civilization and Nebula Alliance. Their territory has some advantages, except for the dark forest, there is no strict star contact with other god-level civilizations.

God-level civilization wants to attack them, it must cross the Ten Cities Alliance and the Nebula Alliance. Among the civilizations around him, the Wuxian civilization deals with the giants, the Nebula Alliance and the Darkfire civilization deal with us and the Thor civilization, and the Ten Cities Alliance blocks the White Star Alliance. No matter what direction they take, it is not their goal. Because if these powers are destroyed, he will face us directly.

The location of the An's Supercluster is very special, the edge of the dark forest region, bordering the land of a thousand stars. They chose the An's Supercluster to expand outwards, and the purpose is nothing more than to increase the depth of defense so that their border star field can be farther away from their core area and serve as a strategic buffer.

The An’s Supercluster is not large. The skeleton rainbow bridge here leads to the constellation Pisces Cetus, which is the center of marching ants. Here, they have two directions. The first one expands to the fifth, sixth, and seventh quadrants, to attack Dinan Miro, which was split from the dark forest civilization, or to the land of a thousand stars. They didn't want to disturb the battle between the two brothers, so they chose the land of a thousand stars. Their decision makers are still very eye-catching. "

Yan praised at the end.

Tong Qing thought about it.

After seeing Chen Mo a few times, he felt a strong opponent feeling in his heart, especially after the trip to the Star Monument, that feeling was almost certain.

"What are you thinking about?" Yan asked.

The Red Army also looked over, because Tong Qing rarely showed such an expression.

"Thinking about how to deal with marching ants, I have a hunch that he will be the biggest opponent in my hegemony." Hitomi Qing said.

"Huh? Why do you feel this way?" Chi Jun and Yan were interested at the same time.

"He has all the conditions that an overlord has, strength, technology, talent, courage, prestige, etc. Apart from Dan, he is the best life I have ever seen, and even surpasses me in some aspects." Tong Qing sighed.

Although I don't want to admit it, I have to say that in some aspects, Chen Mo does surpass him.

Seeing that Tongqing gave Chen Mo such a high evaluation, Chi Jun and Yan glanced at each other, shocked and shocked.

In their opinion, Hitomi is almost the most perfect life, whether it is talent, intellect, strategy and courage, as well as excellent personality charm, they can't find anyone who can match Hitomi.

Maybe Dan is one, but Dan is dead.

But even if it was Dan, Hitomi only regarded him as an opponent, and had never given such a high evaluation.

Now that Tongqing gave Chen Mo such a high evaluation, they were very surprised.

"Is it a bit overestimated?" Chi Jun asked.

"No, no." Hitomi said with certainty: "There is only underestimation, not overestimation. For example, the endless sense of abyss that I faced when I fought against him at the Star Monument. I am still impressed until now. Suspect that he touched the threshold of the fourth dimension of life."

"He is at most just a life inherited from a certain civilization. Relying on the technology inherited from civilization, he has developed to the present level."

"Let's put it this way, to give you a heritage of civilization, can you develop step by step from a low-level being in just a few decades, from nothing, to the point where they can now be heroes with god-level civilization?"

The Red Army's breath stagnated, then stopped, thinking for a long time before shaking his head.

"But after my research, he lacks something a hegemon should have." Yan interrupted.

"What?" Hitomi asked.

"Ambition."

Yan is very determined.

"From the perspective of their actions and layout over the years, his expansion ambitions are not very strong. If he had ambitions, when the Phantom Civilization was eating, their gains would not be less than ours. Because they are the last to overthrow the Phantom Civilization. Straw, and they are in the most central area. And now, they can attack the Wuxian civilization, and together with the giants, swallow the Hercules, but he doesn't do that."

"Ambition?" Hitomi Qing's eyes came up leisurely: "I thought he had no ambition, so at the Star Festival, I tested him and he chose to stand on the podium. He originally seemed peaceful and uncontroversial, but that time Let me be surprised. Do you know why he chose to stand at the center of the universe to show all beings in the universe?"

Both Chi Jun and Yan had a longing for an answer in their eyes.

"Later I asked the messenger who invited him, because the woman next to him said a word, what should be disputed. Therefore, ambition, whether there is something or not, is just a matter of thought after that point."

The two nodded at the same time, agreeing with what Tong Qing said.

At that point, Huang Pao added himself, Chen Mo had no ambition, he must have ambition too.

"If you want to deal with them, you need to deal with the Nebula Alliance and the Netherfire Civilization first. This hurdle cannot be crossed. If their decision-makers have eyes, they will definitely form an alliance with the Nebula Alliance, which is even more difficult." Yan said.

"Yeah." Hitomi nodded slightly: "Come slowly, let's pay attention to their movements first, and talk about the current situation of the universe."

Hitomi Ching introduced the topic and put it in other areas.

"The situation? In the general environment of the universe, our four families, Black Eye, White Star, Thor, and Endless Sea, are in great power. The White Star has the old chief, and we have you. All are planet-level superpowers. They are convinced and awed by powerful strength. The internal cohesion between the two is very strong, and Raytheon civilization is half way behind in this regard.

The endless sea has always been mysterious and low-key, and now that the old prophets show up, no one dares to touch them. The situation of the crape myrtle civilization is also very complicated, and the dark forest is divided. If this calm continues and the new system balances out, the great forces and civilizations of the universe may take shape. It's just that the status of the original underworld and the dark forest needs to be replaced by two new forces. "

Yan speaks eloquently, judging the situation with insight and confidence.

"What if you don't want a new system to take shape?" Hitomi Qing said.

"In these houses, take the new giant beast for surgery." A crazy light flashed in Yan's eyes.

...

The twelve hours that Zidi waited was the slowest time in his life.

For the past twelve hours, Zidi had been sitting at the door of the operating room, indicating that he was very calm, sitting motionless, but occasionally moving fingers seemed to express his restlessness.

At this moment, the inner heart with calm appearance is suffering every second.

Suddenly, the operation door opened, and Zidi, who had been sitting quietly, stood up suddenly, his purple pupils staring at the door of the operation room.

Seeing Chen Mo and Mo Nu coming out from inside, they hurriedly stepped forward.

Without Zidi speaking, Chen Mo knew what he wanted to know from his expression.

"All three operations were successful."

Although he didn’t have much contact with Zidi, it was rumored that he was a butcher, executioner, and murderer, but after contact, he will find that this is a most affectionate life, very cruel and cruel to enemies, but very good to family and friends. .

"But they haven't awakened yet. There is one last step to awaken their consciousness."

Originally, he just breathed a sigh of relief, but Chen Mo's turn raised his heart.

"Don't worry, for other forces, the technique of awakening consciousness is difficult, and it is not difficult for us." Chen Mo saw Zidi's worry, after all, the medical technology of God-level civilization is just the last step.

"What should I do?" Zidi asked after finishing his mood.

"Using the super power of communication consciousness is difficult for other forces, but simple for us."

chapters.title: Chapter 1041: : Yan'S Analysis
chapters.body:
Chapter 1041: : Yan'S Analysis

Xiao Yu curiously looked at Zidi, the legendary **** of murder, she saw for the first time. She left early when she was at the Tianxing Monument, and she was not present when Zidi appeared.

But the name of Zidi's killing god, she had heard of it.

Especially not long ago, the slaughter of the core family of the Ziwei civilization that shocked the universe.

This kind of massacre is unique for the core races in the god-level civilization, which is more shocking than the countless ordinary lives that destroyed a galaxy.

There were rumors about how terrifying this killing **** was, but Xiao Yu didn't feel special when he saw Zidi, like an ordinary alien uncle.

"Hello, Mr. Zidi, meeting for the first time." Xiao Yu said hello politely.

"Hello, madam." Zidi nodded slightly.

He was also looking at Xiao Yu. This female life looked very ordinary, nothing special, and did not look like a woman of great wisdom and great means. She was such a woman, the current mistress of the marching ant.

Suddenly, seeing the little mother beast on Xiao Yu's shoulder, Zidi was slightly surprised.

The little mother beast was also looking at him, then retracted her body into Xiao Yu's hair, and stretched her head to look at him curiously.

"Mr. knows Tudou?" Xiao Yu asked curiously.

"How did you get this little guy?"

"I bought this from a pet dealer on a planet in Origin City. I bought it when I saw that it had spiritual eyes." Chen Mo said.

This little guy has helped a few times, but he found a lot of information, and there is no record of this little beast.

"This kind of little beast is quite rare," said Zidi.

"What kind of beast is it?"

"The record about it has only appeared in the legend of a very small civilization in the history of cosmic civilization. This little beast has very special abilities, like the super powers of intelligent life forms, but whether it is specifically, it is just a legend. It's just a legend." Zidi said.

Chen Mo knew it.

This little guy is really special.

After entering the ward, the little mother beast was taken from Xiaoyu by Chen Mo.

"Leave it to you." Chen Mo said to Xiao Yu.

Xiao Yu nodded very seriously.

She didn't do this kind of thing once or twice. She already knew how to use her own abilities. After entering the super state, Xiao Yu looked at Zidi.

When the two looked at each other, Zidi's body vibrated slightly, revealing a look of surprise.

At that moment, he even had a feeling of being pierced by a glance. This feeling appeared for the first time in his life.

"Madam, what superpower is this?" Zidi looked at Chen Mo and asked.

"Her superpower is very special. It is related to consciousness and can communicate the consciousness of life."

"Consciousness? Although the superpowers of communication consciousness are rare, there are still a lot of them, such as mind reading, mind control, and looking through memory. These superpowers are also like her?"

"No, it's different from mind reading and mind control." Chen Mo shook his head: "She can see the existence of life consciousness."

"See the life consciousness?" Zidi thought about it: "The consciousness really exists?"

"Existence, the consciousness is the fourth-dimensional matter, and every life exists, but the general three-dimensional life cannot see it."

Chen Mo definitely nodded.

After years of research, he determined that the consciousness that he saw actually existed, it was just a normal instrument, and it was impossible to detect its existence, but its existence was a necessity for life.

The beating trajectory of the consciousness of non-intelligent life is extremely simple. In intelligent life, the beating of the consciousness is very complicated and there are no rules to follow, because of the existence of thinking.

Zidi did not question Chen Mo's remarks. Now that the technology is so advanced, the mysteries in the universe are still everywhere.

At this time, Xiao Yu was sitting behind the hospital bed with his hands covering the patient's temple.

...

Speaking of taking the beast, Tong Qing's body straightened slightly and her face became cautious. The current situation affects the whole body, not to mention the movement of a giant.

War is not a joke, especially this kind of large-scale war.

"Which behemoth?" Hitomi asked earnestly.

"Netherworld civilization is dead, and among the remaining houses, Ziwei and Dark Forest are the weakest."

"Which is the most suitable?"

"The dark forest is divided into two. The two brothers are desperately working hard. The dark forest is consuming frantically. The energy is exhausted and there is no threat. If you do something on the dark forest, the crape myrtle civilization will definitely participate and use this pressureless external war After the cleansing, the internal integration and the elimination of different people from the war through war, everything is a matter of course.

Therefore, if you start with the dark forest, the benefits are not large, and the Ziwei civilization can be integrated. Your hegemony plan has one more opponent, so ignore the dark forest for the time being. Now our biggest opponents are White Star, Thor, Endless Sea, Ziwei, and the five marching ants mentioned by the speaker.

There is a strategic buffer force between us and the marching ants, temporarily unable to move, the White Star and Thor are powerful, now the cost and consumption of fighting are too great, and even both sides will suffer. No one dares to touch the endless sea now, so there is only one left.

The crape myrtle civilization has just gone through internal cleansing and is in a period of instability. The families and veteran aristocrats who once held important powers in their civilization have all been purged. I have to say that Zi Junzhi's hand is ruthless and beautiful.

Originally, crape myrtle had almost become the second meditation civilization, at the edge of the black hole, but he pulled the crape myrtle civilization back from the edge of the black hole forcibly. Although the method was special, it was the most effective method. For so many years, Zi Junzhi actually used Zidi's knife once he made a move. "

Yan sighed with admiration.

"This time, let us fall short in the layout of the old family of the crape myrtle civilization. If you give them some time, there is no doubt that they will be able to recover from the great purge and reproduce the history of the crape myrtle civilization. Glory. But now, no forces are willing to watch them recover.

The ten major families of Ziwei were slaughtered, and the power of those old families fell into the hands of Zijun. Now is the time when the power of the Ziwei civilization is most concentrated, and it is also the most vulnerable time. We can make a fuss about the massacre of the core members of the ten major families. "

Hearing this, Tongqing and Yan exchanged glances and immediately understood what was in each other's hearts.

In terms of methods, there are a lot of Tongqing, and now Yan mentioned this, he naturally understands the opportunities.

Now the power is concentrated on Zi Junzhi. According to their understanding of Zi Junzhi, this person is tolerant, powerful, vicious, and cowardly. I just don't know how to muster up the courage this time, and by what means to introduce Zidi to be his butcher knife.

But this is not important. Now the power is concentrated on Zijunzhi. If Zijunzhi's prestige collapses, the remaining forces in the secrets of the top ten families and old nobles will definitely not let him go, and they will add to the flames.

When Zijun's prestige is lost and the Ziwei civilization is in chaos, they are the second meditation civilization.

The Red Army on the side, seeing their tacit understanding, asked a little bit puzzled: "But we don't have any evidence of the collusion between Zijunzhi and Zidi, how can we make a fuss?"

Upon seeing this, Tongqing and Yan smiled at each other.

"The Red Army, now the outside world generally thinks that the Zijunzhi and Zidi colluded to slaughter the core family of the Ziwei civilization, right?" Yan Shun asked rhetorically.

"Yes, there is no evidence from the outside world, but we all know each other well, and everyone is not stupid.

Hitomi smiled and nodded: "Indeed, everyone is not stupid, just lack of evidence. If there is a piece of evidence, pierce this layer of transparent paper, and put the matter in the view of the table?"

"If there is evidence, Zi Junzhi's prestige will be wiped out, but we have no evidence, how can we break it?" Red Jun asked.

Tong Qing laughed, and Yan also laughed: "Old soldier, you got into the tip of the corner, we have evidence."

chapters.title: Chapter 1042: : Do You Want To Recruit Me?
chapters.body:
Chapter 1042: : Do You Want To Recruit Me?

"What are your plans next?" Chen Mo asked as Xiao Yu treated them.

Zidi stared at the door of the ward motionless, and said blankly: "If you succeed, you should find a small planet to enjoy life."

"Do you think my planet is small enough?" Chen Mo said.

"Uh?"

Zidi was taken aback and turned to look at Chen Mo.

"Do you want to recruit me?"

"You can think so." Chen Mo was noncommittal.

"Others fear me like a star beast, you want to recruit me?" Zidi's tone was a little surprised: "Aren't you afraid that I will lose control?"

"Your emotional control is one of the best lives I have ever seen. It is impossible to lose control." Chen Mo shook his head slightly, his voice was not loud, but he was very sure.

A life of love and sex, he can't go there.

"I slaughtered tens of millions of lives in the Ziwei civilization, a veritable **** of murder."

"Any War Armor regiment has more than this blood on them. For the era of destroying a planet at will, the standard for tens of millions of lives should be a kind life."

"They destroy the stars of the planet, and they kill what they think is the low-level life, just like destroying the insect dens. There is no psychological burden, even if you feel guilty, and then forget. And I killed tens of millions of people, but as normal life. Killed."

Zidi watched Chen Mo carefully. He hoped to see something from this young leader, even if it was about recruiting him this time.

After judging the crape myrtle culture, it was the first time that I dared to have a life to recruit myself. It was an overly young life.

"In my eyes there is no difference, lives are created equal." Chen Mo said unmovedly.

Zidi glanced at Chen Mo deeply: "You can consider it."

Chen Mo smiled.

Unexpectedly, with the idea of giving it a try, I actually succeeded.

Adding a master to the town, although one person does not affect the general trend of the war, but the introduction of top talents and the use of them will definitely help him.

While talking, Xiao Yu and Mo Nu came out of the ward.

Xiao Yu at this time looked a little pale because of too much consumption.

"How is it?" Zidi asked first.

"They wake up, but most of Ms. Ziqing's memory is permanently missing, and some language and action functions need to be relearned."

Zidi's eyes showed pain, but he was finally suppressed: "Thank you, madam, for your hard work."

"You're welcome." Xiao Yu said softly.

Seeing Zidi entered the ward, Chen Mo did not follow up.

Over the years, no one knows the pain he has buried deeply. Although there are some regrets this time, many things can be made up again. Zidi should not want others to see his gaffe.

...

The Kunpeng battle department is like a ghost in space, swimming in the battlefield, as long as it finds an opportunity, it will bite the opponent at an extremely fast speed, and then flee away.

The Kunpeng Battle Headquarters was divided into eight parts, and the eight attacking teams were subdivided into layers. There are now more than 3,000 Kunpeng Battle Headquarters swimming in the space of the Sauron star field.

Even the Black Hawks cannot order three thousand teams to fight at the same time.

But it was such a warhead that was handy in the hands of Black Hawk.

The Black Hawk launches a multi-directional blitz, and there is a trick, which is to hand over the command of the blitz to the leader of each team.

In order to create chaos, the Black Hawk directly issued an order: Free Destruction.

Without a detailed combat plan, even the Black Hawk himself has no rules about the way of fighting freedom destruction, because this time is the most chaotic time, and he himself cannot grasp the rules.

Their purpose is to make the Sauron Alliance star field chaotic enough and the line of defense chaotic enough.

While thinking about it, the Black Hawk saw the intelligence officer rushing forward, and immediately recovered.

The intelligence officer gave a military salute and immediately reported: "General, four teams and six teams responded to the news, and the task is complete. Three teams, one team, four teams, seven teams, and fifteen teams arrived at the scheduled location."

"it is good."

Black Hawk's waist was slightly straightened, and a smile appeared on his face.

"Contact General Xiaoli."

...

"What are their combat intentions?" Sauron 326 looked at the new holographic map, his voice was as usual, but his expression changed.

Hearing this, the subordinates next to him were shocked. He followed Sauron 326 for many years, and he rarely heard the king's expression like this, and he was obviously worried about the war.

"Wang, haven't their combat intentions been clear yet?" He asked cautiously.

Sauron 326 was 6,000 years old. In his ethnic group, he belonged to middle-aged and old people. His skin was dimming, but his temperament was still majestic.

Sauron 326th is the throne of hereditary ancestors. When he was young, the universe was stable and peaceful, which obliterated his contending for power. Now that the universe is in chaos, his ambitions have been wiped out, and now he has no power.

In the Land of Thousand Stars, his Sauron Alliance was already strong. Under his proper governance, although it was not stronger, it did not weaken.

Nowadays, superpower is rising and times are changing. The situation in the universe has been quiet for six years. I thought that the universe would restore stability and create a new balance system. His Sauron Alliance can still be passed on safely and steadily.

But I don't want to, the marching ant group will take the lead in their actions.

Over the years, the life structure of the universe has long changed. The boundaries of god-level life were broken by super-power technology, and the level of life in the universe that had been consolidated was stratified at that moment.

Life level is no longer the bottleneck that limits the upper limit of the universe's life. Numerous genius lives continue to be on the stage, and emerging forces are constantly emerging to challenge the high-level life races that once oppressed them.

He knew that the Sauron Alliance’s proper style would be fine if they maintained the status quo in a stable environment, but under the current cosmic situation, they might not work.

But how easy is it to make changes?
