Before he could make a change, the marching ants started to attack them.

Marching ants, in today's cosmic chaos, the forces that can stand in the center of the stage, have repeatedly defeated the elite warheads of the Netherite civilization, and become the last straw that crushes the Netherite civilization. This is their strength.

Compared with the Sauron Alliance, which they have inherited for tens of millions of years, or even hundreds of millions of years, this force is as young as a newborn baby, but it shows unparalleled vitality.

Being watched by this top power, he is now on his back.

He had no idea whether he could block the offensive of the marching ants.

From the beginning of the war to the present, within a few days, the defensive line within the Sauron Alliance's star field was in chaos.

Tens of thousands of defensive star systems have been attacked, and they have destroyed very few enemies, but the opponent has made them pay an extremely heavy price, and their defense lines have been disrupted.

The opponent's attack was extremely fast, fascinating, like flying beasts playing primitives, several times, their defensive points, in the same hour, several star systems reported being attacked by the same team.

This makes their response bad.

Tens of thousands of defensive stars are attacked, and tens of thousands of combat points are deployed at the same time. This is beyond the computing power of ordinary stars, and it must also be included in the attack route of the same fleet and the combat situation of their major defensive points.

Artificial intelligence assisted them in drawing the route, only to find that everything was out of order.

The opponents ran around like headless flies, purely to provoke the flames of war. They lost a devastating weapon and ran away, without seeing their combat goals.

The more this happened, Sauron became more panicked. He instinctively told him that the generals of the marching ant group, especially the major generals of the war ministries, were not mediocre. Behind this, there must be a bigger plan.

But in the face of his subordinates, he can't show that he has no bottom, otherwise the military will be shaken and he will face even more terrifying consequences.

Sauron sighed deeply: "It's just not certain. Their tactics are rare. I'm afraid there is any special conspiracy, so I just think about it."

"Don't worry, the king, Prince Suoli is not weak in command, I believe Prince Suoli will surely break the offensive of the marching ant group." The subordinate said for sure.

Hearing Prince Suoli, King Sauron showed relief on his face and felt calmer.

As a king of the top power in the universe, his harem wives have tens of thousands. For thousands of years, he has given birth to enough children to establish a group. Among his many sons, the most outstanding is Suoli.

He has been smart since he was a child. In an era without super power technology, he suddenly emerged super power and became a god-level life. After entering the war academy, he once again demonstrated his talent in the tactics class and became a senior general. star.

Today, the army of the Sauron Alliance is in the hands of Suoli. He is now the commander of the war department, and in the future, he is most likely to succeed him and become the prince of Sauron 327.

At this moment, an intelligence officer came in anxiously and handed his warhead to King Sauron 326: "King, the latest battle report is sent back from the front."

The moment his eyes fell on the battle report, Sauron's 326th hand froze in place, dumbfounded.

chapters.title: Chapter 1043: : This Is The Power Of God
chapters.body:
Chapter 1043: : This Is The Power Of God

The envoy of the Nebula Alliance brought the delegation to visit.

Chen Mo was not surprised.

The Nebula Alliance is the Yunzhou civilization of Tuyun, which is composed of several friendly top civilizations. In the disintegration of the Pluto civilization, it expanded rapidly and became the existence second only to the god-level alliance in the universe.

Today's Nebula Alliance, straddling between them, the Black Eye civilization and Thor civilization, can be said to be the shield between the marching ant group and the two civilizations.

This makes them natural allies.

The messenger who came was a young woman named Qiu Zhi. As for appearance, to Chen Mo, apart from human beings, he did not have much appreciation for the beauty and ugliness of other alien life.

At the same time, Qiu Zhi was also looking at Chen Mo.

The master of the marching ant group, defeating the life of the meditation civilization, is also the life that the leader has always praised and admired. I've only seen it on video before, and I've seen his legendary information. It is incredible that an ordinary life has become one of the overlords of the universe in such a short time.

"Hello, Mr. Chen, the leader sent me this time, if there is a discussion." Qiu Zhi said respectfully to Chen Mo.

"You said." Chen Mo motioned her to continue.

"The leader wants me to ask Mr., what do you think of the current situation?" Qiu Zhi asked neither arrogant nor humble.

"Today's situation? This one or two sentences can't be finished, it's more complicated. To sum up, the heroes are together and the undercurrents are raging." Chen Mo said, "If you have anything, you can just say it."

"My husband’s opinion, now the black pupil civilization and the white star civilization are very powerful, and the two are ambitious and ready to move. The undercurrent of the universe is surging. I am afraid it will not be quiet for too long. Mr. Ask, in the troubled times, have you ever thought of adding an ally so that you can have one more friend in the troubled times?" Qiu Zhi said.

"Alliance?"

"Yes." Qiu Zhi looked at Chen Mo confidently without comment.

Chen Mo said without hesitation: "It's okay to form an alliance, but I don't know how far it will be?"

"Offensive and defensive alliance."

Lan Chao Chen Mo nodded slightly.

Tu Yun has an intersection with them and is considered a friend. The Nebula Alliance traverses between the marching ants and the god-level civilization, and is a natural ally. An alliance is beneficial to both, otherwise it will be a loss of lips and teeth. Even if Di Yun did not send someone over, they would send someone to discuss the alliance.

"Yes." Chen Mo agreed immediately.

Seeing this, Qiu Zhi smiled. Things went well, Chen Mo agreed, and the trip was half completed: "Sir, there are other important things in this trip of Autumn. The leader asked me to ask, can the dark matter of marching ants be sold?"

"Sell, of course." Chen Mo smiled: "We started from business, so there is no reason to make money, how much do you need?"

Qiuzhi looked overjoyed, and said: "The first batch of dark matter, one billion luns, how long can you prepare, sir?"

"The number of billion luns is a bit big, and it takes three months." Chen Mo thought about it in his mind and said time.

They are currently one of the few forces in the universe that master the dark matter extraction technology. They will store or sell the remaining dark matter only if they guarantee their own needs.

The role of dark matter is equivalent to the rare earth in the earth age, and it is a particularly important trace material. In ten years of development, they have stored a lot of dark matter, but Chen Mo will not sell the strategic reserves.

"Well, in three months, we will have as much dark matter as you have." Qiu Zhi said: "At the same time, we hope to sign a long-term agreement to purchase dark matter."

Without dark matter, warships cannot withstand the squeezing of space folding and the impact of high-radiation particles. In space warfare, it is like scrap iron. In addition to the god-level civilization, the marching ant group is the force that masters the dark matter extraction technology, and the god-level civilization will restrict the export of dark matter, so it can only ask the marching ant group for help.

The consumption of space wars is very scary.

"Good." Chen Mo agreed without hesitation.

The stronger the Nebula Alliance, the stronger the ability to resist the threat of God-level civilization, and the stronger their shield, which is a good thing for them.

...

Above the magnificent palace, the poisonous woman walked slowly, with a special sense of beauty in every step.

On both sides of the ranks are the core high-levels of Dark Star.

Every senior has a joyful smile on his face.

Today is a special day.

Since the establishment of Dark Star, although it occupies half of the chaotic land, the outside world never knows who their leader is. Today is the day when the leader of the poisonous girl officially goes from darkness to sunshine.

The first queen of Dark Star ascended the throne.

Hui Twenty-one was not present, and no members of the assassination team were present.

They are forces that walk in the dark and started from the dark, so sometimes the dark is their best protective color. Sometimes, many things are solved by the means of the underground world, which saves a lot of things from being solved more openly.

Venom Skin Girl stepped onto the table, Hui Twenty-one took her place, and the underground world in Chaos Land was in charge, and it was also the secret service department of Dark Star.

Stepping up the steps, the moment the poisonous girl sat on the throne, the many core high-levels above the hall showed joy.

At this time, the girl with poisonous skin has gorgeous and unparalleled temperament, grace and luxury, less mysterious and cold than before, and more stunning noble. Her coldness has become her majesty.

"Your Majesty." Many high-level officials saluted.

"Yeah." The poisonous woman nodded slightly: "Kaliyi listened to the order, from now on, you will be the commander-in-chief of the combat department, dispatch troops to the Frost Empire, and unify the chaotic land."

"Subordinates take orders."

Kaliyi immediately gave a military salute and accepted the appointment papers handed over by her subordinates.

The other high-levels on the court were all eager to try and looked excited.

Born in a place of chaos, here is accompanied by conspiracy, killing, fighting, scams and so on all the year round. This is the most chaotic place in the universe. People who come here are all kinds of characters such as cosmic wanted criminals, conspirators, exiles, desperadoes, etc. , There has never been peace here.

The life in the chaotic land, the desire for battle, is much higher than other places in the universe.

Now the girl with the poisonous skin said, how crazy it is to unify the chaotic land.

On that day, the Dark Star Empire in the Land of Chaos was officially established, and the Frost Empire was dispatched.

For a time, the land of chaos was chaotic.

...

Mo Nu carefully observed the changes in Chen Mo's data.

In the past ten years, the "Hand of God" project has made many breakthroughs. There have been several super-tech products derived from the project, but they have not really been exposed to the outside world.

So the project is going on in secret.

Chen Mo hopes that one day when these super-power technologies are revealed, other forces in the universe will be attacked by dimensionality reduction.

At this time, Chen Mo was standing in space.

The space he lives in is a star of life.

Here, there are two low-level life planets. The humanoid intelligent life on one planet is still in primitive society and there are not many in number. The other is the age of giant beasts, similar to the age of dinosaurs on the earth, but the giant beasts on it are very smart and have formed weak wisdom.

On the edge of the star system, there are several spaceships with many volunteers from various planets.

This time, Chen Mo's experimental project has once again been upgraded.

The super consciousness is amplified by the super war armor on his body, covering the entire star system.

The abilities of the planet class have been expanded to a constant star.

Under the consciousness, the consciousness of life in the entire star system can be clearly seen in Chen Mo's eyes, and even Chen Mo can be attached to each consciousness at any time to check the memory in their consciousness.

Chen Mo felt like a god, reading the memories of life in the entire stellar system, overlooking the joys, sorrows, sorrows and joys of many lives without emotional fluctuations.

This is the power of God.

After exiting from the super state, Chen Mo remained silent for a long time.

"The constant star's'hand of God' succeeded."

chapters.title: Chapter 1044: : I Have A Big Appetite
chapters.body:
Chapter 1044: : I Have A Big Appetite

The constant star ‘Hand of God’, this level of super-powered weapon, already has preliminary strategic significance.

This weapon is not a space weapon or a light speed weapon.

Space weapons and light speed weapons can also be used for defense through space interference and interference, while super-power weapons do not yet have the means of defense.

"Now that the means of consciousness manipulation are mature, this'hand of God' can be used." Chen Mo said.

Chen Mo copied Xiao Yu's ability. Her ability is mainly conscious manipulation. It is very special. Chen Mo is learning about the super power of manipulating consciousness, because Xiao Yu's development level is not high.

But a long groping process.

Now Xiao Yu's consciousness control has only been developed to the second stage, and Chen Mo copied it to this extent.

If the level of consciousness control is not developed enough, it will have limited influence on some super masters, especially for top masters like Hitomi, it needs a very sharp consciousness attack method.

"In this regard, you can find someone to help you." Mo Nu said.

"Who?"

"Zi Di, he has mind control, and his development level is at least planetary level. This ability and consciousness control should have the same effect. Maybe it can be analogous, or it is not. Copy his abilities and combine them with existing abilities. use."

Mo Nu's proposal made Chen Mo's eyes brighten.

It happened that Zidi was here, almost a ready-made teacher.

...

Sauron 326th held the intelligence, with anger in his eyes.

He was shaking hands, not knowing whether it was anger or fear, or both.

News from the front revealed that the warhead of the marching ant group suddenly changed its style. In the chaotic battle, it dispersed the team and attacked their tens of thousands of dark matter storage sites.

Although not all succeeded, they also succeeded a lot, causing them to suffer heavy losses.

The strategic inventory of dark matter has been threatened as never before, and the inventory has been reduced by one-third, which has already broken the bones.

Today is a war period, the price of dark matter has risen again and again, and as a strategic material, the number of god-level civilizations sold is decreasing, and one-third of their inventory has been destroyed, causing them to lose heavily.

If all dark matter is destroyed, what will happen?

King Sauron didn't dare to continue thinking about it.

"What a marching ant, he has a really big appetite. I want to swallow the Sauron Alliance in one bite, and I am not afraid of being killed." King Sauron destroyed the intelligence in his hand and was furious. After thinking about it, he still turned on the communication device. Now he is here. , Can't rest assured at all.

A young life appeared in the holographic video. He looked similar to King Sauron. He was the most satisfied son of King Sauron 326 and the commander-in-chief of the Sauron Alliance.

Suoli at this time, his face was obviously not very good.

"Father, what's the matter?"

"How is the battle?"

Sauron 326th restrained his anger. At this time, he couldn't put too much pressure on him, and he didn't dare to interfere with the opponent. He didn't know the situation of the battle. If he interfered with the rhythm of the general, the consequences would be serious.

"The loss is under control." Suo Li's eyes were sharp, and his voice [Penquge www.boquge.info] was slightly low.

"Can you deal with them?"

"Yes, now their intentions have emerged, and they will be able to cope well next. Their team is too scattered, and they want to launch a large-scale fort attack and need to regroup. We just need to guard the dark matter warehouse and not give them a chance. Can drag them into the mud."

Suoli's voice was still cold, and he was very annoyed when he was attacked this time and suffered a big loss.

If you have a big appetite, you must be prepared to die.

Although the loss of the dark matter inventory made him heartache, they have already made the opponent's intentions clear. It is almost impossible for a small team to attack their dark matter warehouse.

Within their star field, the marching ant team has limited anti-matter energy, limited weapons, and no reinforcements. As long as their defensive rhythm is not chaotic, it will not take long for the opponent's tactics to go bankrupt.

When the time comes, it is time for them to counterattack.

Sauron is the commander-in-chief of the Sauron Alliance, and he is responsible for coordinating the warheads of the Sauron Alliance. He is also the top star in the universe.

He also has his courage. If the marching ant group can attack them, he will naturally not be afraid of the opponent.

As a star, he is very confident in his ability and judgment.

Hearing Suoli’s self-confidence, King Sauron calmed down a lot, but he was still very worried. He intuitively told him that the marching ant group was not so easy to deal with: "Well, don’t underestimate the enemy, they are the generals of the marching ant group. This force, It has always been mysterious and weird."

"I know." Suo Li nodded slightly.

...

"Xiao Li's hand is very beautiful." Humu was a little surprised when he saw the battle report.

In the several war divisions of the marching ant group, they will often use virtual reality technology to discuss tactics and understand each other, but this time the tactics did not surprise them.

At the beginning of this battle, except for the high-level officials of Ye Xiao and Kunpeng War Head, the other generals did not know the true intentions of Xiaoli and Black Hawk.

At first, the game was chaotic, like a random fight.

The entire Sauron Alliance’s defenses were full of wars, but the thunder was heavy and the rain was small. From start to finish, there was no large-scale offensive and defensive battle.

The generals inside their marching ants all thought Xiaoli was only testing the reality of the opponent.

Until the end showed fangs.

For a general star, a perfect war is a fatal temptation for them.

Not surprisingly, in the battle against the Sauron Alliance, Xiaoli and Black Hawk's reputation will rise sharply and rank among the first-class.

The war divisions of the marching ant group, because of the relationship between regular exercises and training assessments, will more or less compete with each other. Because of the same conditions and the same resources, no one wants to get the bottom of the performance in exercises and training assessments, otherwise, it would be very shameless.

Now Xiaoli and Black Hawk joined forces to give the Sauron Alliance such a hand, which really surprised them.

They admire this layout and tactics.

Even if they were given command, they couldn't think of Xiaoli and Black Hawk. The combination of the two brought the advantages and style of the two major departments to the fullest.

"It's a bit risky, a bit crazy." Rao is Da Mazu's insidious style, and he has no idea about this kind of tactics.

Wataki fixed his gaze and stared at the holographic star chart: "Wealth and wealth are in danger, and we will fight it in a proper way. I'm afraid this war will take a lot of time."

This sentence, let Da Mazu agree.

They knew Xiaoli very well, because they fought too many hands. From the beginning of the attack, they knew Xiaoli's true intentions.

Destroy the dark matter inventory of the Sauron Alliance.

Without the strategic material of dark matter, in the future frontal offensive and defensive wars, the Alliance of Sauron has no interstellar spacecraft materials for making space jumps. The consequences are unimaginable.

There is no spaceship that can jump in space, and in a war, it can only be slaughtered.

Although this tactic is very risky, if it succeeds, the Sauron Alliance will be theirs.

...

"Will Xiaoli's idea be too risky?" Zhao Min stared at the star map curiously.

The intelligence of the war came back and shocked the brains of the General Staff Department, and Zhao Min was also shocked when he saw Xiaoli's plan. Although she doesn't understand war tactics, she knows the pros and cons of it better than anyone else.

From the perspective of the overall situation, the importance of strategic materials is self-evident, especially dark matter.

Stare at the opponent's dark matter storage planet to fight and destroy the opponent's dark matter inventory.

This requires sending a team to go deep into the Sauron Civilization Defense Line. Once the team is dragged by the opponent in the war, the team will fall into a heavy siege, and rescue is impossible.

On the contrary, Lan is much calmer: "He and Black Hawk have joined forces in this battle. They have their ideas. If it is other warheads, it may be very risky, but Black Hawk and Xiaoli are indeed suitable for this kind of unruly fast attack. The Black Hawk’s rhythm is fast enough to disrupt the opponent’s rhythm and bring the Sauron Alliance into our offensive rhythm. It may be a bit expensive, but it is much better than a long-term offensive and defensive battle."

Lan appreciates Xiaoli's bold plan very much.

Sometimes war needs to be bold.

Even if this tactic cannot completely destroy the dark matter of the Sauron civilization, the results and data obtained so far are very good.

Next, it will definitely disrupt the opponent's defensive rhythm, allowing the opponent's defensive force to recover from the original line of defense to the defensive line centered on the dark matter storage planet.

...

Xiaoli stared blankly at the battle reports from each team.

The densely packed intelligence on the holographic screen was displayed, and every piece of information gathered in his mind.

On the holographic star chart, with the content of each piece of information, the star chart marks also change.

The destroyed planet disappeared on the star chart.

The destruction of this kind of planet has long been commonplace for him.

They disrupted the entire defense line of the Sauron Alliance star field in order to fish in troubled waters today. The opposing team's defensive line was chaotic, and the incident happened suddenly, which made them gain a lot.

One-third of the dark matter inventory is now estimated to be distressed.

But this is not enough.

"Ordered, the first team, the seventh team, the twelfth team to the blue bull star, the ghost bird star, the tutu star three galaxies. The fifth team, the nine team, the numbered Luo star, the drum star, the eleventh team, the fourteenth team. The team returned to Wuyexing and stood by. All the members of the second team, the third team, and the fourth team gathered at Suihuxing, Heiyuxing, and Tianlunxing. Other teams..."

One by one, orders were issued from Xiaoli's mouth.

After giving the order, Xiaoli communicated with the Black Hawk.

"How to arrange?" Black Hawk cut directly to the subject.

Xiaoli shared the latest combat star map with Black Hawk.

"This time I have gained a lot. The other party's dark matter inventory has suffered heavy losses. I am going to assemble the team and attack the areas where they have lost their dark matter inventory. Without dark matter manufacturing equipment, their support and firepower in these areas will be greatly reduced. This is our opportunity. You continue to swim around the planet where the dark matter is stored, giving them defensive pressure."

"Good." Black Hawk agreed without hesitation.

chapters.title: Chapter 1045: : Ability To Copy
chapters.body:
Chapter 1045: : Ability To Copy

Zidi lived in a manor, the blue sky, and the air only smelled of grass mixed with soil. There are no tall buildings of the age of science and technology. For a living planet, it is a very good place to live.

Promise Chen Mo to stay on Earth, and Zidi will live here.

Originally he was in a semi-reclusive state. If it weren't for Zi Junzhi, he might have lived freely on an underdeveloped planet in the universe.

Staying in the marching ants, Chen Mo did not force him to do anything, his life was completely free.

What he does every day is to accompany his relatives on shopping and shopping.

When Zi Qing woke up, even though she had lost all her memory, she still had a natural sense of trust in the unfamiliar Zidi, so she didn't reject him. Zidi accompanies her to study and live again every day.

For Zidi, there is some regret, but this is the best result.

"How are they?" Chen Mo asked.

"Recovered very well." Zidi looked at the manor house with a look of regret: "The memory is lost, and their living abilities need to be relearned. These are all simple and not a matter of life."

The Zidi now seemed to lack the horrible aura of crippling people, and his temperament was much softer than before, more like an ordinary middle-aged uncle. This change gave him a touch of human touch.

Chen Mo saw all this in his eyes.

"Do you like the life here?"

"To me, it's the same there, but it's a little different this time." Zidi's voice was slightly emotional, which would not appear before: "Say, what can I do this time?"

When Chen Mo was promised to stay, he knew that he still needed some effort when needed. Not to mention, he still owes Chen Mo a favor.

"It's really something." Chen Mo was not hypocritical, and cut to the subject: "I need your ability."

"My ability?" Zidi looked at Chen Mo puzzledly: "How to say?"

"I want to copy your abilities."

"Copy my abilities?"

This sentence surprised the Zidi who had seen strong winds and waves.

He thought Chen Mo needed his help to accomplish some tasks or to do something. With the favor he owed Chen Mo, he would not refuse even if it was a big deal.

It's just that Chen Mo's answer was beyond his expectation.

Superpower has been mysterious since ancient times, and the ability to replicate other lives. This situation only appears in super-power movies and literary creations. In reality, I have never heard of a life having the ability to replicate the superpowers of other god-level civilizations.

That thing is so mysterious and mysterious, I really can't think of how to copy it.

Clone? Cloning is also impossible.

Above advanced life, the difficulty of cloning increases exponentially. The higher the advanced life, the more complex the genetic code and the greater the difficulty of cloning. They have never heard that the god-level life is successfully cloned, not to mention that even if the replication is successful, new Living bodies do not necessarily awaken superpowers.

Or does it mean that Chen Mo has the super power to replicate other life abilities?

Chen Mo didn't talk nonsense with Zidi. At this time, it was easier for both parties to understand and accept: "I am now learning some methods of consciousness manipulation. Your ability is similar to that of consciousness manipulation, so I want to copy and learn from it."

"Are you still consciously controlling?" Zidi glanced at Chen Mo.

"This is my ability to replicate my family's Xiaoyu. Her development and research on manipulation consciousness is not deep, so I want to try your mind control."

Zidi's mind control can control the life of a planet.

This ability is terrifying.

The massacre of Ziwei Star was accomplished under his control.

"How to copy?"

"You need to open up the defense of your consciousness, and then use this ability, I will sense this ability." Chen Mo said, he copied Xiaoyu's ability, that's how he copied it.

Zidi pondered for a while, and finally shook his head: "I'm afraid it won't work. My consciousness is too guarded against the outside world. My memory is too hostile and murderous. I almost instinctively resist other consciousness, and accidentally hurt you."

Chen Mo was taken aback, thinking about it.

He didn't think that Zidi was lying to himself.

Zidi’s experience was there, growth was accompanied by **** and killing, normal life could not bear that kind of pressure, and his hostility was normal.

"But there is a life that can meet your requirements." Zidi said without waiting for Chen Mo to speak: "She also has mind control, but she is relatively weak, but suitable for you, she is my student, Zi Yun, you should know. "

The shadow of the female crape myrtle appeared in Chen Mo's mind.

"You copy her ability, and I will teach you how to improve it. With your talent, you will soon be able to advance." Zidi said.

"Yes." Chen Mo agreed.

...

When she found Zi Yun, she was in a cafe, quietly reading the book, the book of the earth, and she didn't care about the curious eyes of the people around her from time to time.

Very quiet, very cold, like a purple lotus that has left the world alone.

She was immersed in her own world, indifferent to everything around her.

At this time, Zi Yun was wearing a dress of a human being on Earth. Because of her purple fluorescent skin, she looked a little special, but it didn't look awkward. On the contrary, there would be a strange beauty. Chen Mo didn't know how to describe it.

However, this woman is very adaptable, and she actually blended in here during the time she came to Earth.

In a short period of time, she learned the language of the earth, the way of life of the earth, and the way of work and rest. What she does every day is shopping, watching the scenery of the earth, tasting the food of the earth, and does not care about other things.

If it wasn't for the difference in appearance, she would not be considered an alien at all.

She is still as cold as ever, it seems that the trivial matters in the world have nothing to do with her.

Her coldness is not indifference, but has nothing to do with everything around her as if she can see through the world, and there are very few mood swings.

Chen Mo and her have met many times, and she has never seen too many expressions, as if there is no joy, anger, sorrow or joy.

This female life has always been invisible.

When Zidi saw Zi Yun, he said, "Zi Yun, you do me a favor for Mr. Chen Mo."

"Okay, teacher."

Zi Yun looked at Chen Mo and nodded slightly.

"Mr. Chen Mo wants to copy the ability of mind control. I am not suitable here. You can copy it for him." Chen Mo has nothing to do with her, nor does it have any favors. It can only be said by Zidi. In name, Zidi is Ziyun's teacher. .

Zi Yun's cold eyes showed a rare surprise, and looked at Chen Mo: "Can you copy superpower?"

In Mu Shi Tianxing, Chen Mo showed a variety of terrifying superpowers, which shocked the life of the universe, and there are still, but she is not surprised. Chen Mo's abilities are beyond the scope of a god-level life.

"Yes." Chen Mo did not deny.

Zi Yun returned to her plain appearance. She didn't ask Chen Mo what she needed her ability to do, and it was useless to ask.

As the leader of a power, Chen Mo is regarded as a high-level opponent of the power, and she will definitely not tell her what to do with her ability. From a normal point of view, it is normal to have the ability to copy and to see special abilities, and to use it as one's own after copying.

"What do I need to do?"

Chen Mo was not surprised by Zi Yun's reaction: "To cooperate with me, you need to let go of the defenses of your consciousness. I will connect your consciousness, sense your consciousness fluctuations, and then you will release your ability and I will imitate it." Chen Mo said.

"Consciousness connection? Do you want to read memory?" Zi Yun's expression appeared unnatural.

As a female life, letting go of consciousness and memory, she means that all her secrets will be known by the other party. If their relationship is really close to each other, there is no secret, it doesn't matter, now the two are not familiar, this is the embarrassment.

"The process will inevitably touch the memory. If you mind, you can refuse and I will think of other ways." Chen Mo said.

The process of copying abilities between him and Xiao Yu was natural, because they were husband and wife, and gave each other body and mind without secrets and defenses. But for Zi Yun, if the other party minds being touched by the memory, Chen Mo won't be overwhelmed.

Zi Yun thought for a long time before raising her head: "I can cooperate with you."

chapters.title: Chapter 1046: : Decapitation Of The Venomous Girl
chapters.body:
Chapter 1046: : Decapitation Of The Venomous Girl

Zi Yun and Chen Mo entered the laboratory. She couldn't help but look around.

Chen Mo now belongs to the most advanced hegemony level of the cosmic pyramid in terms of fame and status.

Such a most powerful being, and its own professional laboratory, are very rare in the universe.

Beings with superior force generally study this kind of things and don’t catch a cold. As the overlord of the universe, they are in power, and they don’t have too much thoughts on boring research. They are more about playing power and strategy, or indulging in power. In the dream of wine color.

Throughout the universe, the pupils and the like do not say that they study technology, but Chen Mo often stays in this place.

What a rare animal.

Perhaps this is the difference between his life and other overlords.

These days, she stayed on the earth, read the biography about Chen Mo, and checked the information about the earth. In just a few decades, Chen Mo, as a pioneer of civilization, used his own power to bring a low-level life planet to the power that dominates the universe.

This experience is extremely shocking.

Even the growth rate of a god-level civilization was not as scary as Chen Mo.

A few people didn't speak, Zi Yun didn't like to actively communicate with other lives because of her personality. Chen Mo didn't know what to communicate with her because she was not familiar with it.

Strictly speaking, he and Zi Yun are still enemies.

In a certain position, they were opposed. Even so, Zi Yun was still willing to give him the ability to replicate because of Zidi, and Chen Mo couldn't see through this female Ziwei.

As for her ulterior motives, Chen Mo thought about it, but didn't care. She now has no armor or weapons, and her superpower is not a threat to Chen Mo, and she can't do anything.

After arranging the equipment for Zi Yun, Chen Mo changed into an experimental outfit.

"Wait to relax your mind, your consciousness is strange, don't show up violent resistance, if you feel uncomfortable, just speak up, I will stop the experiment." Chen Mo said.

He noticed the unnaturalness of Zi Yun.

It is normal that a female life, all her secrets and memories will soon be known by a strange male life.

"In the process, I will guide you, I will let you release your abilities, and you will release the abilities to control the experimental monkeys in the laboratory."

"Good." Zi Yun replied faintly.

"it has started."

Chen Mo sat behind Zi Yun, with his hands gently pressed against her temples.

It is the first time for Zi Yun to sit in an experimental chair when she grows up.

Zi Yun had an unprecedented feeling. For the first time, she felt like she was standing in front of a man. Whether it is the body or consciousness, there is no defense.

This feeling is weird.

She didn't know if it was rejection, she was unwell, but she didn't have a strong sense of rejection.

It seems that someone is helping her flip through the memory.

At this moment, she has no secrets at all. In addition to her own secrets and privacy, there are also secrets that have not been passed down including the Ziwei civilization, which are also known to Chen Mo.

Zi Yun didn't know if this was a good thing or a bad thing.

As for regret? She never thought about it.

Every time she makes a decision, she will not regret it.

Before making a decision, she thought about these issues.

"Converge emotions and release your abilities." Chen Mo's emotional voice sounded deep in her consciousness.

Zi Yun was stunned, releasing her super power.

An invisible wave spread out and enveloped the entire laboratory.

Afterwards, a strange ray appeared in Zi Yun's heart. Under the influence of her ability, Chen Mo's fluctuations are very familiar.

She remembered the scene of fighting with the Mo girl when she was at the Tianxing Monument. At that time, she wanted to control Mo Girl with super power, but she ended up without a problem. The feeling that Mo Girl gave her was this kind of fluctuation.

She didn't know what this fluctuation meant, but it felt unfathomable to her.

At the beginning, she thought about using her ability to control Mo Nu and then win the battle, but it was a pity that her ability touch Mo Nu, like sugar silk into the water.

Are they the same kind of life? The same ability?

"Control the experimental monkey." Chen Mo reminded her.

Those thoughts flashed in Zi Yun's mind, she was not sure whether Chen Mo knew she was thinking about these issues.

Hearing Chen Mo's reminder, Zi Yun used the same set of controlling other living organisms to control the monkey Chen Mo said. The laboratory fell into dead silence, and only Mo Nu was guarding Chen Mo, watching the changes in various data.

...

"Find the position of Baishuang." A subordinate reported the news to the poisonous girl.

They are at war with the Frost Empire, vying for the dominance of the chaotic land. Hoarfrost is the emperor of the Frost Empire.

For the forces that started in the dark world, their fighting methods are obviously more than just head-to-head battles. The unknown battlefield is also the key to a decisive battle.

Venom Skin Girl is now the Queen of Dark Stars. In order to obtain the unification right of Chaos Land as soon as possible, she needs to use all means she can use.

"Ok."

Poison Skin Girl responded, let the reporting subordinate go down and turn to look at Hui Twenty One.

"Do you master that piece of equipment?"

The equipment that Poison Skin Girl said was the super armor that the headquarters sent her. Because of the special strategic significance of the Power Armor, apart from the Poison Skin Girl and Ash Twenty One, no other life knows the existence of the Power Armor. Even if they wear them, the life they see only thinks that it is a normal set of combat. A.

They tried that suit of battle armor to make their superpower reach the planet level. From the beginning, they were shocked by their terrifying strength, and they also had a deep awe of the boss.

The technology in the hands of the boss transcends the times.

They once imagined that when this kind of battle armor can be mass-produced and used to equip a warhead, the combat power, even if they think about it, they will shudder.

The super armor is in their hands, and it is only used for adaptive training in private.

In charge of a faction all the year round, they have much less chance of taking action personally, so they have never used that suit of armor in actual combat.

Now is an opportunity.

Assassins with planet-level ‘tele-movement’ superpowers, once the target’s location is determined, the success rate and the probability of retreating all over the body after success rises linearly.

Even if they escape, the outside world cannot know their direction, let alone track their tracks.

Although their abilities are used, they will not shock the outside world because of the huge movement, but those who understand their abilities will know the horror.

The dark world they control, the core killer, has long developed teleportation, so they can become the overlord of the chaotic land in a short time.

"I have been training to adapt, and I have mastered it." Hui Twenty-one nodded coldly.

After the Poison Skin Girl became a queen, she turned from darkness to light. Hui Twenty-one took over the position of the Poison Skin Girl in the dark world and became the leader of the dark world.

Today's Hui 21 has grown a lot.

The dark world is a cold, emotionless world. Once there are too many personal emotions here, the footsteps of death will follow.

Over time, his personality and behavior style were also affected. Only when he was connected to the headquarters and saw Chen Mo, Jing Ge and others would he show emotions.

When he escaped from Demon Flame Civilization, he was still an immature boy, following Chen Mo who rescued him. From the moment Chen Mo risked taking him in, he swore to repay Chen Mo.

He also knows that the stronger his strength, the greater the help to Chen Mo, so in these years, he has never dared to slacken his promotion, even if he is now in a high position.

"Then this action will be handed over to you?" Poison Skin Woman said.

"it is good."

chapters.title: Chapter 1047: : Stellar Fortress
chapters.body:
Chapter 1047: : Stellar Fortress

Boom boom boom!

The explosion of fire shines through the holographic screen on the face of every life. The two fleets were smashed into a ball, completely twisted together.

This is the most direct confrontation of the war machine.

Suo Li originally thought that the marching ant group would choose to retreat after a sneak attack on their dark matter, but he didn't expect that they would dare to directly attack their defensive star fortress in their star field.

He is not a life that can be easily dealt with, facing the offensive of the marching ants, he quickly responded.

Head-to-head.

They are fighting locally, and they can afford to fight wars of attrition. This is the most direct way to deal with them.

The warhead of the Alliance of Sauron has a steady stream of machines thrown into the battlefield. The torrent of steel chases and collides in space, and countless exploding fireballs suddenly bloom in space.

Not one battle, but hundreds of battlefields.

Suo Li stared at the space battlefield on the screen, his eyes splitting, and his face a bit hideous. He was originally gentle, but now he was full of fierce and hostile air, as fierce as he was terrifying.

Even though the screen is separated, the battlefield that will kill the stars is in his mind.

The number of the fleet is rapidly declining, and this time he feels the strength of the marching ants. The powerful war machine, suffocating pressure, surged towards them with unmatched aura.

Surround a stellar fortress, then use space jammers to lay down the battlefield and ambush their reinforcements.

This kind of disgusting and outdated attacking aid was actually used on him.

After losing several fleets, he reacted.

This fleet has absolute battlefield dominance in encounters, and its play style is extremely fierce.

The opponent is only one of the generals and stars of the marching ant, not the commander-in-chief. If the legendary ‘silver hair’ personally takes command, he can’t imagine the consequences.

Whether it is technology or tactics, marching ants have an advantage over them.

The war machines and warships of the warheads of the marching ant group are specially modified according to the style of the generals. This is more conducive to their star players better display their combat style.

Specific modifications have more advantages in specific tactics.

The Night Owl War Department is dominated by Xiao Li. The combat style is fierce and fierce, and is good at encounters. Therefore, the armor and war machines have been modified to highlight the style of encounters. In space encounters, this is a fierce battle. Shura Iron Army.

News of the destruction of the fleet and the victory and defeat of the wars continued to gather in the combat department.

In the War Department, there is no war here, but the smell of gunpowder has never dissipated.

The marching ants have two warheads involved in this war, and two different styles of combat put him under the same pressure.

A red dot in the star map is a battlefield.

At first the line of defense was disrupted, and then the planet that stored dark matter was attacked. The line of defense was disrupted again. In addition, the planet that stored dark matter was destroyed. Part of the galaxy's fleet could not be supplemented, resulting in different strengths. Now the defense line of the Sauron Alliance There is no time to organize it.

In addition to the frontal force of the warhead, there are also those fleets swimming around the planet that stores dark matter, which puts them under great defensive pressure.

That team is different from the team they encountered head-on. That team is like a cunning bird. Without him, it is agile. It can't chase or catch up. It can't be beaten. It's like a sword hanging over their heads, full of deterrence. .

Where is the way to break the game?

"Continue to adjust from Baiyexing's fleet." Suo Li supported the holographic battle platform with both hands, his voice slightly hoarse.

"I can't adjust many teams, Shi Lanxing's dark matter is destroyed, and the surrounding strongholds have insufficient dark matter to make interstellar transport ships." The subordinates around him immediately replied.

Suo Li was shocked, and then looked at the star map, and he was immediately stunned.

"Damn it."

He just reacted and stared at the star map.

The other party only chooses to attack these star regions when the dark matter in his star regions is destroyed. Without dark matter materials to build a fleet, the surrounding galaxies can't project much force, they can't do anything, they can only wait and die.

It is indeed a force that has defeated a god-level civilization.

Only one of the warheads showed such a powerful strength.

This is just a confrontation between unmanned war machines, and the confrontation between soldiers has not yet begun. The super power technology of the marching ant group, known as the technology beyond the god-level civilization, is still unknown.

"The ghost bird star has fallen." A panicked voice sounded.

Inside the war department, there was a sorrow.

The fall of the ghost bird star further stimulated Suo Li's fighting spirit, staring at the gray star field.

"What are you doing? Keep up your mind, this is just a galaxy. A star field spanning billions of light years, do you care about the gains and losses of a galaxy? Have you never fought a war?" See the generals of the Operations Department in a depressed mood , Suo Li reprimanded.

call!

The generals who were in a depressed mood suddenly straightened their bodies, and wisps of fighting spirit appeared on their bodies.

"Order the space bombing of the ghost bird galaxy immediately. Since it has fallen, there is no need to keep it. It is better to destroy it than to fall on their hands." The sharp voice was cold.

Give instructions, unmanned warships full of space weapons, set out from various galaxies and disappear into the dark space.

...

"Hurry up, build a stellar fortress according to the original plan, and build the gate of space at the fastest speed."

"The ministries started immediately, striving to build the Stellar Fortress before the opponent's counterattack arrives."

After the fall of the ghost bird star, the personnel of the technical department immediately began to command the team to open the construction of the star fortress and space gate.

Lin Shu impressively listed.

This is their gateway to the Sauron Star Territory, and they must rely on this stronghold to open the situation of the Sauron Alliance. She couldn't be assured of entrusting such an important job to her subordinates, so she followed up personally.

A stellar fortress, with space interferometers and space jammers, can prevent space folding and jumping, and block the bombing of space weapons and light speed weapons.

It can be said that once a stellar fortress is built, it will become a defensive base for them.

"Master Lin Shu, the opponent's first space bombing has begun. A space weapon was exploded five light-years away from the fortress."

"Two light-years? Don't worry about this. There is enough time. Try to build the star fortress before the opponent's next space bombardment. At the same time, be prepared to evacuate at any time. If a weapon falls in the distance from us, it is not necessary Report and evacuate directly." Lin Shu ordered.

If there is no restriction and obstruction of space weapons at the beginning, the farther behind, the wider the spread, until it loses control, the cost of blocking is too great, and the entire galaxy will be destroyed in the end.

Once space weapons are out of control, apart from the space fortress, the entire galaxy will become cosmic dust, but it will take time.

The time for the destruction of the galaxy is enough for them to use this as a stronghold to conduct a larger war against the Sauron Alliance and then devour the other side.

As for the ordinary life in the galaxy, the general forces will ignore it.

In the universe, life is the least valuable.

In the face of cosmic war, life is a bug, especially between different races, other races will not sympathize with your destruction.

Whether you can survive a cruel war depends on the luck of the planet of life.

The universe will not pity the weak.

The defensive star point was determined, and the technical staff quickly started work.

Planets were eroded under the nanorobots, and then converged into space-based weapons and buildings in space. Antimatter factories and dark matter factories are also being built on planets within stars.

This is not the first time I have done this work. In addition to doing it in actual combat before, I didn't do less in training. They were already well-versed.

Everything is in order.

chapters.title: Chapter 1048: : What A Despicable Means
chapters.body:
Chapter 1048: : What A Despicable Means

The Night Owl War Department occupied the ghost bird star, like a parasitic flower seed, embedded in the skin of the Sauron Alliance, where it took root and grew savagely.

The stellar fortress was established, and the space connector was successfully constructed, allowing the Ghost Bird Star to connect to other star regions of the Marching Ant Group, and a steady stream of support began to enter this galaxy far in the Sauron Alliance star region.

Previously, the results of the destruction of dark matter appeared. Under Xiaoli's warhead supplementing equipment and launching more frenzied attacks, the Sauron Alliance's galaxy group that lost dark matter resources quickly collapsed under Xiaoli's iron armor.

The star field occupied by the marching ant group is getting bigger and bigger.

At the beginning, he was calm, and gradually lost his calmness, became impatient, and launched a crazy attack on the star region occupied by Xiaoli. However, Xiaoli grasped Suoli's urgent need for military exploits and made a big set to annihilate an elite warhead.

That battle shocked the Sauron Alliance.

Wars continue to be small battles, and are madly eroding the defense of the Sauron Alliance.

Xiaoli was not advancing fast, but steadily hit, like a soft knife, slowly cutting the opponent's flesh. Not fatal, but step by step blows the opponent's confidence.

Successive failures caused Suoli to suffer a blow.

When Suoli was preparing to counterattack Xiaoli, the tactical style of the marching ants changed again. The Kunpeng War Department began to emerge and dominate the rhythm of the war.

The Kunpeng War Department uses a fast style to produce ghostly effects.

The fleet of their warhead is always indeterminate, with elusive goals, and the rapid pace of tactical development, which is jaw-dropping.

Originally adapting to Xiaoli's warfare pressure and playing style, facing the sudden change, the head of the heart was stuffed into the stone, and there was a kind of uncomfortable feeling that he could not spit out a breath.

The two generals joined forces, and the pressure to resolute was extremely huge, as well as pressure from within the alliance.

But he did not collapse, instead, his fighting spirit became more vigorous.

Since he became the commander-in-chief of the Sauron Alliance, he has never played against such a strong opponent in the battlefield. If he can win this time, it will be a perfect stepping stone for his path to the top star.

Top star.

Suo Li's eyes were frenzied and he became firm, and under long-term combat, he didn't feel too tired.

Now that both sides are stunned, battleships and war machines are constantly being sent to the forefront, and the battle has never been more intense.

Both sides are robbing their own fighting rhythm.

Obviously, the current rhythm belongs to the marching ants.

As a well-versed star, Suo Li knows that the rhythm of war is not a tactic, indescribable, but very important. Once the war falls into the opponent's rhythm, there will be a rhythm trap, led by the nose, and advance the war in full accordance with the opponent's layout.

That is very dangerous.

Xiaoli did a good job of controlling the rhythm of war.

From the initial disorganization of the layout, to the sneak attack on dark matter, and then concentrated firepower to attack the opponent's weakness, now the war leadership is handed over to the Kunpeng Battle Head, and the layout is refocused on him.

From the beginning to the present, the entire war has been advancing in accordance with Xiaoli's layout and ideas.

So they always take the initiative.

The forces that secretly followed this war were also startled by the speed of marching ants. The war department of some forces began to gather intelligence to deduct this war.

The marching ants once defeated the warhead of the god-level civilization. No one can tell whether they will fight the marching ants in the future, so they are collecting as much information as possible about the marching ant warhead to study the combat style and Number of ways.

"From the current situation, the marching ants have absolute initiative, and their rhythm is very good." Yan said in surprise. It is indeed surprising that the Ye Xiao War Department and the Kun Peng War Department can advance the war so quickly.

According to Tongqing's thoughts, the marching ants are one of the biggest opponents of the black pupil civilization, and they are also following up on this battle. As the war progressed, what surprised him was the strength of the Ye Xiao War Department and the Kun Peng War Department, beyond his imagination.

Yan turned his head and said to Tongqing: "I'm afraid we have to reassess the overall strength of the marching ant group."

Judging from the combat capabilities and layout capabilities demonstrated in this war, Xiaoli is very good at controlling layout and the pace of war, and some tactical methods are very sophisticated.

In addition, there are Black Hawks, all with distinct combat styles.

They all have a lot of room for improvement.

Moreover, they are only two of the marching ant warheads, not including the handguard warhead that resists Ming Ah, and Wang Hai who resists the battle.

Each of these stars can stand alone.

There are also two top stars, the silver-haired fox and Ming Tu.

In the interstellar war, the layout of the top generals is very important, but the generals of the lower major wars are equally important.

Ming A is very strong, but there are not many outstanding generals below. He alone cannot control tens of thousands of battlefield conditions, let alone direct the response on each battlefield. If Ming Ah had a powerful general like the marching ant group at the time, the Ming body civilization might have another ending.

Tong Qing withdrew his gaze from the star chart, and said lightly: "Do you still underestimate their strength?"

"My lord, there is a new situation in the Sauron Alliance."

Tara entered the war room and interrupted their conversation. Tong Qing and Yan stopped together.

"There are rumors in the Sauron Alliance that they are incompetent and want to change the commander. This incident has been spread from the people and has reached the ears of the Sauron Alliance high-level." Gou Xuan glanced at the intelligence and looked strange.

"Can you still play like this?" A look of surprise flashed in Hu Bing's eyes.

"The victory on the battlefield, a large part of it is not on the battlefield, but in the rear." Gou Xuan deeply agreed.

At the beginning, the Ziwei civilization took Hongqiao away, but was rejected by Wang Hai from Hongqiao. The successive failures were one reason for the lack of support from the rear. After that, she and the War Department crossed half of the universe before returning to the White Star Civilization. During this period, she grew up a lot more than before, and also had a deeper understanding of war.

A rumor of'sorry incompetence' spread in the star regions of the Sauron Alliance until it reached the ears of the senior leaders of the Sauron Alliance.

The rumors are clear-cut.

Suoli is the son of King Sauron, and rumors have completely shaped him into a second generation relying on his father. He seems powerful, but in fact incompetent.

There used to be no big battles and strong opponents that could be fooled, but now in front of the big opponents, he is very vulnerable.

At first, the senior leaders of the Sauron Alliance only thought it was a means for the marching ant group to disintegrate their high-level unity, but after the successive failures of the battle, the taste of the rumors changed.

Everything that happened on the front lines seemed to confirm the rumored incompetence.

Even if you don't believe it, it is impossible to put all the bets on Suoli. Now the senior leaders of the Sauron Alliance are preparing to elect a second commander to command half of the army.

"To change the commander before the battle, the soldiers are taboo, the Sauron Alliance is about to have a major event." Gou Xuan said: "What a clever way."

"What a powerful marching ant." Hu Bingxin said in admiration.

Incompetent.

This rumor spread in the Sauron Alliance, reached the ears of the top, and even spread among the warheads of the Sauron Alliance. This was a major blow to Suo Li's prestige, and the one who was hit with prestige was also King Sauron 326.

As a force, no matter when, there will be no less internal struggles, even in special moments of war.

Knowing that this might be a conspiracy against Suoli, he couldn't help but make a fuss.

Create the suspicion and competition within the Sauron Alliance, and the power to divide.

The life that spreads this rumors is itself uneasy.

As for who is behind it, there is no way to find out, and no one can be sure whether it was the marching ant group or the tough competitors within the Sauron civilization.

...

"What a despicable method." A general star was indignant.

The generals on the field all looked at the leader's resolute.

They are aware of the difficulties and pressures during this period of time, and if they change to other generals, they may have collapsed under this offensive and pressure.

Suoli did well enough, but was labeled as incompetent.

"Don't say this. On the battlefield, despicability is a kind of praise." Suoli was surprisingly calm.

Knowing that this was a conspiracy against him, he was unable to refute it.

Because so far, he has not won a big battle, but the star field of the Sauron Alliance is slowly being eaten away.

All the subordinates fell silent. After a while, one of the generals spoke up, unwilling to say, "Don’t lead your nose like this? You know it’s a conspiracy. Change of commander in battle, the group of dancers. Isn't the councilor a fool?"

The court fell into dead silence.

As generals, they all know that changing coaches is a taboo. Not to mention the low morale, the new commander did not fully understand the trend of the war before the layout, and the opponent's style, will continue to expand their disadvantages.

Dididi...

The general wanted to speak, but was interrupted by the sound of the communication.

chapters.title: Chapter 1049: : Chen Mo Adventure
chapters.body:
Chapter 1049: : Chen Mo Adventure

Mutu took a dart gun as usual and left the tribe, and together with several tribal warriors, followed the leader to leave the tribe.

This time, it was a tribal war.

Their Mu Niu tribe and their rival Hanke tribe are rivals.

In order to compete for territorial rights of Liutu grassland.

The Liutu grassland is the most important hunting ground near them. One third of the tribe’s food comes from the prey of the Liutu grassland.

Their fight with the Hanke tribe has been going on for a long time.

They won the previous competitions, but the Hanke tribe has never given up. Every time, they will attack them.

This time the most intense, both sides suffered great losses.

If they win this time, they will be able to annex the Hanke tribe and become the largest tribe group nearby.

Both sides have gathered in the Liutu grassland. There are hundreds of fighters on each side. They are a little stronger than the Hanke tribe, and there are more than forty more fighters than the other.

It's not hot today. You can see all kinds of beasts and prey everywhere in the Liutu grassland. Mutu held the dart in his hand tightly, waiting for the commander to attack.

Soldiers on both sides were beating stone drums, bone weapons to create momentum.

"Roar!"

The leader's offensive roar sounded, and both sides launched an offensive at the same time.

Buzzing...

Just at this time, the invisible fluctuations dispersed, and all the soldiers ran slower and slower, and finally stopped in one place, staring at each other in a daze.

The beasts on the grassland are all set in place. If the grass is not moved by the breeze, you will think that the time in this world is static. This scene took place in every corner of the planet, and almost all conscious beings stood still.

I don't know how long it has passed, it seems that it's just a gust of wind, and the world has returned to normal.

The warriors of the two tribes looked at each other, then turned to look at their leader, and their leader looked at each other, looking at the beasts on the grassland.

"Ho **** ho ho!!"

The two leaders took the lead, and the two tribes who were going to fight together joined forces to hunt down the beasts. The picture was extremely strange.

...

The man who controls all this is standing in the outer space of the planet, with a smile on his mouth.

He is Chen Mo.

Next to Chen Mo, Zidi glanced at him in surprise.

Chen Mo's learning ability was too strong. After copying Zi Yun's ability, he began to teach Chen Mo how to use this ability.

It didn't take long for Chen Mo to become familiar with controlling mind control, and his ability reached the planet level. He even felt that Chen Mo was still staying in his power and did not exhaust all his strength.

Among Chen Mo's abilities, there is also the ability to tamper with memory and change consciousness, which is very scary.

Even though Zidi was well-informed, he had to marvel at so many unique abilities.

Is that human being?

Zi Yun looked at Chen Mo with a complicated expression.

Chen Mo's ability was copied from her, but she watched him surpass her step by step in a short time. This male life is like a mystery, never see what his trump card is.

And now, she feels very strange to Chen Mo. After being read and copied, Chen Mo knows all of her privacy and secrets, but she does not reject Chen Mo, but has a touch of intimacy.

This feeling makes her uncomfortable.

She never thought that she would feel close to a male life.

"Next, you don't need me to teach, and I can't teach it either." Zidi said quietly.

"These days, thank you very much," Chen Mo said.

"Since I have promised to stay with you, I can't eat and drink for nothing." Zidi looked down at the planet that was still in the civilization era of primitive tribes, and said: "You are the most special life I have ever seen. Your ability is beyond. The existing ability system is equivalent to a god."

"God?" Chen Mo also looked down at the planet in front of him: "God is just a life higher than ours. Just like for life on this planet, I am a god, I can move mountains and fill the sea, fly into the sky and escape, but I am not a god."

"You are eager to learn to control this ability, what are you going to do?" Zidi asked this long-standing question for the first time.

"What? I don't know. I just feel that I want to keep getting stronger. I have my mission to accomplish." Chen Mo grinned.

He thought of science and technology libraries.

Until now, the last mission of the Science and Technology Library has not been disclosed to him, and no matter what method he uses, he has not solved the last mystery.

"That inheritance mission in your hand?" Zi Yun asked suddenly.

Her sudden opening made Chen Mo surprised.

Strictly speaking, the science and technology library is indeed a heritage: "How do you know I have a heritage?"

"It's not just me, the forces of the entire universe, as long as you are not stupid, you should know that you have the inheritance of a certain top civilization in your hands. Otherwise, it is impossible to master so many and such terrifying technology in such a short period of time." Zi Yun faintly Said.

Chen Mo thought about it, it was indeed the case.

Other top powers have used tens of millions of years, even hundreds of millions of years of accumulation of science and technology in various civilizations, and have come step by step. The worst of the top powers will take tens of thousands of years to develop, and he only spent a few decades.

The only explanation is that he holds the technology left over from the top civilization.

The fact is exactly the same, but it is not a heritage of top civilization, but a heritage that transcends god-level civilization.

"It's just luck." Chen Mo said.

Zi Yun did not speak, did not agree, and did not refute.

...

"Are you going to the Sauron Alliance?"

The news that Chen Mo was going to the front almost made Lan and Zhao Min jump up, including Xiao Yu.

As the leader of one party, he was going to the front line. Without even thinking about it, everyone objected.

"The great man in your hometown has said that when he wants to use a gun, the legion will be finished. As the leader of one party, you should understand this principle. Normally, it is not a problem to learn skills, but it is not a problem to go to the front line. The opponent won't keep your hands because of your high status, but instead concentrates the firepower on you." Lan said solemnly.

Zhao Min deeply agrees: "I don't support you in this matter. As the leader of one party, your safety is the sacred needle of the entire marching ant."

On the contrary, Xiao Yu was calm, with a dangerous light in his eyes.

"Don't be like this, I'm fine, I just try to test the abilities and equipment, and I can't die. My equipment always needs a test field." Chen Mo said.

"You have not been hit by space weapons or the speed of light. No one knows what the consequences will be. I don't support you in risking the past." Lan said firmly.

"If it succeeds, we will take the entire Sauron Alliance without a single soldier."

"Although the harvest is tempting, the risk is the same. I don't support you." Lan firmly shook his head and said, "Once there is an accident, the entire marching ants will have big problems."

"This is the case. Mo Girl and I both have the ability to control space, so don't worry." Chen Mo's words are beyond doubt.

Everyone looked at Xiao Yu, only hope Xiao Yu could persuade him.

"Go, if there is an accident, I will find someone to marry." Xiao Yu said calmly and turned to leave.

Chen Mo's face was green.

Lan suffocated a smile, turned to look elsewhere, pretending not to hear.

Zhao Min smiled lightly, did not speak, and looked as if it had nothing to do with her. Seeing Chen Mo's help, she could only shrug her shoulders: "It's none of my business. I stand on the opposing side of this matter. , Will not coax her for you."

In desperation, Chen Mo can only bite the bullet to keep up, and still have to do the work of a small fisherman.

...

"What? The boss is coming over?" Xiaoli and Black Hawk couldn't believe it when they received the news.

The lord of one party must go to the battlefield, a kind of shame to their subordinates.

If his subordinates are capable, does Chen Mo, as the leader of the power, need to go to the battlefield? Even if it is not for this reason, they are not comfortable.

Even if their command center is far away from the front line, it is equally dangerous. No one can tell. The opponent found their command center that day and then assassinated them or space bombed them.

Here, if you are not careful, something big will happen.

"Instructor, can't you persuade the boss?" Xiaoli and Black Eagle looked solemnly.

"I can't persuade him. Madam has lost his temper. He still has to go, so you must pay attention to protect the boss and not let him have any problems."

Chen Mo's security issue is more important than the two warheads. Their warhead can be destroyed, and any one of them can die, but Chen Mo can't do anything.

During this period, he could not take any risky behaviors, or even expose his whereabouts to the outside world.

"Isn't the boss fooling around?" Xiaoli muttered.

"Who is fooling around?"

A faint voice appeared in his mind out of thin air, and then, in front of them, a spatial hole appeared, and the figures of Chen Mo and Mo Girl walked out.

chapters.title: Chapter 1050: : Unsolvable
chapters.body:
Chapter 1050: : Unsolvable

"Old... Boss." Xiaoli showed a flattering smile, a little embarrassed.

"Just now you said I was fooling around?" Chen Mo asked.

"Nothing." Xiaoli said solemnly: "The adjutant said."

"???" The adjutant beside Xiaoli had a question mark on his face.

"Okay, I don't mind, this matter looks like a bit of a idiot." Chen Mo didn't care about waving his hand: "I'm here to try my current ability. You can cooperate with me. If it goes well, maybe you can. Take down the Sauron Alliance in one fell swoop."

"Yes." Xiaoli stopped his waist, his face was serious.

"Do you know the position of King Sauron?" Chen Mo asked.

"I don't know. During the war, the king's place of residence is the highest level secret. It cannot be easily known to the outside world. The location of their hiding places is constantly changing and it is difficult to determine because they are afraid of being assassinated." Xiaoli looked at it. Chen Mo, he is an exception. As a power leader, he ran to the front alone.

"Where is their headquarters?"

"The same, the top secret, there are more than 10,000 commanders in disguise, let alone others."

"Then find a defensive line where they have a warhead and a general star. This should always be there," Chen Mo said.

"On the colorful bird star." Xiaoli pointed to a red punctuation in the star chart: "Boss, will this be too risky? In fact, you don't need to take risks, I can solve this battle, and don't be too rushed."

According to the information he got, the Sauron Alliance is now very divided.

The biggest problem is the emergence of the second commander. Neither of the two factions can do anything about it, and neither is willing to compromise. The surface is united, but in reality there is a secret gap.

Both the Wang faction and the opposition faction must serve their respective interest groups. Teams that have disagreements are undoubtedly greatly weakened in combat effectiveness, but they are helpless, and no one is willing to give up their own interests.

As for blocking the marching ant group, they wanted to pay attention, but they were powerless. There was a gap between the two factions in the former Sauron Alliance. Even if Chen Mo couldn't come, Xiaoli was confident to win the Sauron Alliance. It was a matter of time.

"I have a sense of measure."

Chen Mo didn't answer Xiaoli's concerns, but asked him to call out all the intelligence of the colorful bird star.

"Next, I will follow the vines and find the highest level of the Sauron Alliance, then control them and catch them all at once. At that time, you will follow my orders to cooperate with the offense. I will test my abilities."

"Understand." Xiaoli nodded his head heavily.

Although he opposed Chen Mo's coming to the front line, Chen Mo's ability was undoubtedly terrifying. Even if they are their own people, they don't know the depth of the boss, let alone the enemy.

…

Color Bird Star has the strongest defensive fortress in the nearby constellations. Appreciation Xinghe is an intermediate general star, as a coordinating general star, stationed in the colorful bird star.

Although it is possible to remotely command the war corps, in some places, there must be a general to respond to the actual situation, especially the particularly important interstellar fortress.

The rhythm of this battle was so nervous that they suffocated them.

Now that the second commander-in-chief of the Sauron Alliance has been appointed by senior leaders, Roll Xi has been in place.

This is the most troublesome.

In the Sauron Alliance, Sauri and Roll West are competitors in the Sauron Alliance.

One king faction, one opposition faction.

The king faction is a high-level faction that supports the hereditary lineage of King Sauron, and the opposition faction is a high-level faction that opposes the hereditary lineage of King Sauron.

So now there is a big discord within the Sauron Alliance.

Because this is a multi-civilization alliance, in essence, the throne should not be hereditary. However, because the Sauron civilization is strong where it was formed, it is dominant.

At present, other senior officials who joined civilization are opposing the hereditary inheritance of the Sauron Alliance, otherwise the problem of uneven distribution of the benefits of alliance joining civilization will easily occur.

The appearance of the two commanders in this war is a very good performance.

But this is not his responsibility.

The above assigns their team to the commander of that team, and they must obey whose orders.

As usual, Appreciation Xinghe is in the headquarters, collating information from various defensive fortresses, and then scheduling plans.

Because this place is near the frontline axis of the battle between the two sides, no matter which galaxy to support, the jump distance here is the shortest. With this advantage, the colorful bird star is now a heavy ground.

There is a dark matter storage planet, a steady stream of war machines, which are being developed here and sent to the frontline support of various battles.

Suddenly, Appreciation Xinghe felt a warning sign in his heart. He felt an invisible wave disperse, and his brain appeared in a trance. After returning to his senses, he saw an extremely terrifying thing.

In front of him, a three-meter-high spatial hole appeared.

Two armors, one man and one woman, slowly appeared in the hole.

The armor on them felt very special to him, and he didn't know where it was special.

The helmet of the comer's armor fell, and after seeing Chen Mo's appearance clearly, the appreciative star was stunned.

Chen Mo, the leader of the marching ant group, his legend has long been spread throughout the universe. But this man actually didn't find the safest hiding place in the Star Territory of the Marching Ant Group, and appeared in the enemy camp wearing a battle armor.

Appreciation Xinghe could hardly believe his eyes.

Enemy attack!

Appreciation Xinghe wanted to shout, but he discovered something more terrifying.

His body can no longer move, and his body's thinking is out of his control. This means that he has lost control of his body, like a puppet controlled by some unknown ability.

He couldn't even call it.

Not only him, but beside him, all the soldiers froze in place, without any movement.

The brain consciousness of all beings on the scene is all controlled by Chen Mo.

Seeing Chen Mo walking towards him, Appreciation Xinghe's fear deepened step by step, his face pale.

What if this happens at the top of the Sauron Alliance?

Appreciation Xinghe's eyes dimmed, and he didn't dare to think about it.

"There is a lot of psychological activity."

Chen Mo smiled, slowly stretched out his hand, touched the brain of Appreciation Xinghe, after a long time, let go, a confident smile appeared on his face.

"Good harvest, at least I know the planet where King Sauron is hiding."

From the memory of Xingxinghe, I know the planet where the Sauron Alliance's core high-level leaders are hiding, but I don't know the location of the headquarters. As Xiaoli said, the position of the battle commander is constantly changing.

Originally, he didn't know the position of the core senior management, but a friend accidentally let him know.

It was an unexpected surprise.

Otherwise, Chen Mo will have to go to his superior and do it again.

"Today, you didn't see anything."

"It's over."

Seeing Lin Han enter the space channel, Appreciation Xinghe thought of two words subconsciously, followed by a trance.

Chen Mo erased the fragments in their memory about just now, and tore apart the space with Mo Nu, and headed to the next target point. His next goal is the planet where the core high-level members of the Sauron Alliance hide.

The moment after Chen Mo disappeared, all the lives of Color Bird Star that had been fixed in place resumed their activities, but every one of them looked confused. They didn't remember what happened just now. Looking back, it seemed that nothing happened.

The urging of various instructions makes them re-engage in the busy.

The king star of Sauron 17.

The senior leaders of the Sauron Alliance are in a frantic quarrel.

Regarding the appointment of the second commander-in-chief, Rollxi, and dealing with the marching ant group, there are other questions.

The quarrel was fierce, making the conference room a bit noisy. King Sauron sat in the first place, frowning, and having a headache. Next to him, is the Grand Speaker of the Sauron Alliance, he is the leader of the opposition, and he is sitting in distress, silent.

These differences did not appear overnight, but formed in the hundreds of thousands of years since the formation of the Sauron Alliance. Wars and rumors are just the fuse, allowing the opposition to seize the means to weaken the power of King Sauron.

The Alliance of Sauron is now in a weak position, no matter the star, warhead or technology, it is incomparable with the marching ant group.

With their strength, they cannot compete with the marching ants, so they must find another countermeasure.

There are high-level leaders who advocate vassalization of god-level civilization and introduce the umbrella of god-level civilization. Some high-level people advocate promoting forces in the land of a thousand stars to form a major alliance to jointly fight against marching ants.

Suddenly, a voice appeared untimely.

"It's quite lively."

The sound was not loud, but it appeared in each of them, clearly audible.

Almost at the same time, the debate in the conference room stopped abruptly.

I saw a space opening in the meeting room, and two armored divisions emerged from the inside together, sitting slowly on the empty seat opposite to King Sauron.

At this moment, the faces of all the senior leaders of the Sauron Alliance changed drastically.
