"Who are you? Why are you here?" A member of the Diet was shocked.

"Me? You should know." Chen Mo and Mo Nu's armor helmets were put away, revealing their true colors, and he grinned toward the court.

"Chen Mo." A congressman exclaimed and lost his voice. Chen Mo's face is not unfamiliar to him. It is the marching ants that this man is in charge of, making them into the current dilemma: "Why are you here?"

The audience was dead silent, and they were all in shock.

"I'm here to watch the excitement, do you believe it?" Chen Mo smiled. He searched for a while before he found this place.

"Do you deliver it to your door?" A congressman grinned: "Sentinel, grab him, control Chen Mo, the entire marching ant group belongs to us."

The sentry in the conference room just wanted to take action, but found that their armor quickly melted and merged into one. In addition, their brains do not listen. The brain consciousness of all beings on the field seemed to be strangled by a big hand, leaving their consciousness out of control.

The look of King Sauron and the chairperson who noticed the strange change changed drastically.

What is this ability?

Coming from space to control the consciousness of all life, this ability is almost insoluble.

Is this the ability that the marching ant group controls?

"Really good means, what do you want?" King Sauron said with a sullen face.

"It's useless not to say too much, let's discuss how to deal with the Sauron Alliance." Chen Mo's voice was not loud, but the huge conference room was clearly audible.

chapters.title: Chapter 1051: : This War Should End
chapters.body:
Chapter 1051: : This War Should End

"If you want to use this method to control the Sauron Alliance, you may not underestimate us?" King Sauron said solemnly.

"Yes, there is a kind of dignified defeating us on the battlefield." A member of the law said.

"This kind of indiscriminate means, want to conquer our Sauron Alliance? Impossible."

"..."

The anger and unwillingness can be seen on the faces of several members.

"One by one is quite hard."

Chen Mo couldn't help laughing. These guys had a hard-faced mouth, but they were thinking about it in their hearts. Now he could see the consciousness of these people, all under fear, thinking about how to get out.

But fighting him is definitely not good, and the chips he won can't be returned to this group of people.

"Actually, I now have a hundred ways to deal with you, just to give you a chance. But it is not to make you feel that you still have a bargaining chip for the conditions."

Chen Mo looked at Mo Nu.

I saw Mo Nu walked to the nearest member of Parliament, her palm covering his brain.

The pupils of many Sauron League seniors on the field shrank, and their hearts were shaken, with a bad premonition.

Not long after, Mo Nu let go.

The congressman stood up obediently, walked to Chen Mo's side and bowed to Chen Mo, "My lord."

"Zelin, are you betraying the Sauron Alliance?" The speaker glared at the rising senior with an angry face, his body trembling with anger.

"I just want to tell you the fact that I can tamper with your memory and consciousness, and then enslave and control you, including all life on this planet, and even go to the planet where your family is located and enslave your people."

Chen Mo waved his hand, and then Mo Nu walked to another councillor, stretched out her hand to cover his head, and then the third, the fourth...

At this moment, all the councillors on the court changed their colors suddenly, with fear in their eyes.

If they were enslaved, what would be the consequences?

They will no longer be himself.

"Impossible, it is impossible to have this kind of ability." The voice of the speaker was unbelievable.

"You can only control us. It is impossible to control the Sauron Alliance," King Sauron said sharply.

"You have the highest decision-making power and the highest authority in the Sauron Alliance. I control you and quite control the brains of the Sauron Alliance. What do you say I can do?" Chen Mo knocked on the conference table and said calmly: "This The war should be over."

King Sauron was like a gambler who had lost all his chips, lying uncontrollably on a chair.

He knew that the Sauron Alliance was over.

...

After a ‘meeting’, the core senior management of the Sauron Alliance is quietly changing.

Chen Mo's incomprehensible ability, by surprise, almost wiped out the entire Sauron Alliance's core senior management. Except for the generals who go out to fight, the highest authority responsible for internal affairs and logistics are all controlled.

As for the minutes of the meeting, they were all destroyed. The outside world does not know what happened in this meeting.

The outside world of the Sauron Alliance did not even know that there was such a meeting.

However, the core high-level personnel of the entire Sauron Alliance were all controlled by Chen Mo. After that, Zhu He and Lan took over the next shuffle.

The entire Sauron Alliance is undergoing an unknown purge. With the supreme control and decision-making power in their hands, the various secrets and military arrangements of the Sauron Alliance are all transparent in their hands.

Having been engaged in intelligence work for many years, Zhu He's methods are very cold.

Using high-level power and decision-making convenience, they quickly completed infiltration and control of the core high-level ethnic groups of the Sauron Alliance. In the eyes of the outside world, this is just a normal struggle for power and gains.

Together with Suo Li and Roll Xi, they were also silently controlled, and when they reacted to something wrong, it was too late.

In the meeting room, Suo Li and Roll Xi sat facing each other, and they could see helplessness from each other's expressions.

They don't even know when it will start, and the upper level will be controlled.

The marching ant group is like hanging up.

Chen Mo didn't tamper with their memories and consciousness. Relatively speaking, these two men are general stars and rare talents. Once changed, the two elite will be destroyed.

"Now you have a multiple choice question, you should all know what a multiple choice question is." Lan said.

The two remained silent for a long time.

They knew that there was only one chance. They promised that their families would still have a good life. If they didn't promise, their families would not suffer too much embarrassment, because the Sauron Alliance had almost become the bag of the marching ants.

The only difference is the status of their family and ethnic group.

They are generals and are accustomed to any means, because the battlefield does not restrict the use of any means, as long as they win, any means is a good means.

They have to admit that the other party succeeded.

It's just that I didn't think that I was defeated on the battlefield, but by this means.

Without spending too much money, the marching ants control the entire Sauron Alliance.

During the time they didn't notice, the marching ants had controlled the core areas and resources of the Sauron Alliance, and even they, as the commander of the war department, were sitting here.

The control of the marching ants group over them is irreversible, and it is impossible for them to break free.

Ordinary people, they don't care who rules, they only care whether their lives are good or not, whether they are worried, will one day suddenly die under the bombing of space weapons.

As for the high-level people, including King Sauron, they are now being emptied and become a puppet endorsing.

Under the control of the marching ant group, they have no chance.

"There are no enemies on the battlefield, only rivals, winners and losers. You can make another choice, but there will be other stars to take your place, and then their families and populations will be revived with resources and preferential treatment. Your families and populations Decline, this is the survival of the fittest in the universe. Of course, no matter how you choose, I will not embarrass you."

After a long silence, Roll Xi said in a low voice, "I hope to retire."

"How about you?" Lan looked at the next to Li.

Rolling West is a veteran, and this choice is not surprising, because he has feelings for the Sauron League.

Among the two generals, he is more optimistic about Suoli. From the beginning of the match, he can see Suoli's potential, and he is young, polished, and will be a sharp edge for the marching ant group in the future.

"I need to think about it." Suoli said.

"Okay, give you three days to think about it." Lan said generously: "The prosperity and demise of civilization should not be limited to the change of dynasties. You are a smart general. I believe you will make the right choice. ."

...

Three days later, Suo Li walked out alone and went to the combat department.

Five days later, Roll Xi suddenly announced his retirement and handed over all military power to Suoli.

Ten days later, the Marching Ant Group and the Sauron Alliance declared a truce, and the two sides started negotiations.

A series of unexpected news made the onlookers unable to understand the war. The completely unreasonable direction of the war makes the star who deduces the direction of the battle as uncomfortable as eating a cockroach.

All the war trends they deduced in the previous period are all invalidated.

Fifteen days later, King Sauron held a press conference for the entire alliance, publicly signed a letter of descent, announced an unconditional surrender, and the Sauron Alliance Star Territory merged into the March Ant Group.

As soon as the news came out, the world was in an uproar.

chapters.title: Chapter 1052: : Unreasonable War Trend
chapters.body:
Chapter 1052: : Unreasonable War Trend

The marching ant group integrated the Sauron Alliance completely without paying too much casualty and cost, and peacefully annexed the entire Sauron Alliance star field into the territory of the marching ant group.

The universe shakes.

In the history of cosmic civilization wars, there have been many open-ended battles, but there has never been such a weird war. It is so weird that it is impossible to use common sense to measure theories.

This annexation overturned the results of all previous war theories.

There are so many stars in the universe that have smashed their heads, and they can't figure out where the problem is.

The weird war shows the uniqueness of the marching ants everywhere, and the forces close to the marching ants star field have a shuddering feeling.

If it was really the annexation planned by a certain star or a conspirator, then the star power of this star has already surpassed the category of the top star, and it is almost a godlike existence.

The major forces in the universe racked their brains and thought of various impossible possibilities, but they were too wild.

Events that are impossible to happen happen in front of our eyes.

...

Yan stared at the deduction sand table, holding the table with both hands, his eyes were splitting, and there was no such thing as the past Fengqingyundan and Zhizhu in his grip. His eyes were full of incredible.

"Impossible. This is not in line with common sense. It is impossible for this war to go like this."

Hitomi was also shocked: "It seems that we still underestimated the threat of the marching ant group, such a weird method."

He now has to pay attention to the threat of the marching ant group to his hegemony. This war ended too hastily and suddenly, completely beyond the imagination of all lives and forces. The threat and weirdness displayed by the marching ant group has reached its extreme value. Even with conspiracy, it is impossible to annex the entire Sauron Alliance peacefully in this way.

This is not a small civilization, but the top force in the universe. It is impossible to annex this force without warning. There will be ripples in the water when a small stone is thrown into the water. This is a meteorite.

The marching ant group became mysterious in their eyes.

Tong Qing suddenly thought of Chen Mo, the deep feeling he and Chen Mo had in the battle, a strong sense of crisis suddenly appeared in his heart, and the most threatening to his hegemony was probably the marching ant group.

"Have we missed anything?" Hitomi said.

"Forget it? There should be no problem with our intelligence, everything is normal, only this swallow is not normal." Yan said.

Hitomi thought for a moment and said his thoughts: "But if there is a possibility, all the senior leaders of the Sauron Alliance are secretly controlled, and the outside world does not know?"

Yan was taken aback for a moment, then frowned: "But does this possibility exist?"

"Who said it doesn't exist? You forgot the killing of Ziwei civilization?"

Yan's body became stiff, and his face changed slightly.

If this is the case, then the marching ant group becomes terrible.

"However, the planet where the high-level hides are generally sealed off by space. Even if an inner ghost appears, it is impossible to silently control all the high-levels."

"But we cannot rule out this possibility."

Yes, this possibility cannot be ruled out.

A series of deductions emerged in Yan's mind. Substituting the assumption that all the senior leaders of the Sauron Alliance were secretly controlled, some subsequent deductions became reasonable.

However, how did the other party secretly control the top of the Sauron Alliance? This is another impossible proof question.

Is it possible?

Yan's eyes narrowed.

...

"Failed again, impossible."

Gou Xuan clutched his head, almost frantic.

Even if she combined with another top general of the White Star Civilization, Xing Yuannan, and all the generals and think tanks of the General Staff Department, with the help of a super quantum computer, it still failed.

They have deduced this war countless times, and none of them can get out of this trend.

Conspiracy, conspiracy, and all kinds of trickery assumptions are used, and they even use the entire army of the Sauron Alliance as the assumptions, and they still can't deduce such a silent annexation.

Hu Bingxin, who was sitting in front of the star map of the sand table, also frowned.

She watched the deduction of Jiang Xing and the think tank team throughout the whole process. There was absolutely no problem with their Jiang Xing abilities. It was absolutely because they had missed some key information that they could not deduct this weird war.

What are the important factors missing?

factor?

Suddenly, Hu Bingxin's pupils shook, and he stood up suddenly.

"Your deduction has missed one factor."

At this moment, all the eyes of Xing Xing focused on Hu Bingxin, and they never questioned Hu Bingxin's wisdom. Many times, the lady can see the problem at a glance.

Therefore, in recent years, the White Star civilization has developed rapidly under the management of the wife, and her prestige in the White Star civilization is second only to the existence of the old chief.

"Super power. In your deduction, the super power factor is missing." Hu Bingxin said.

Now is the age of super powers, and the deduction of Jiangxing still stays on the system of the War Armor era. Because Jiang Xing believed that only relying on the super power of personal strength, even if the soldiers were a little more powerful, it was not enough to affect the general trend of the war.

Therefore, in wars, they tend to ignore the superpower factor.

"Madam, does Superpower have any influence?" Gou Xuan asked.

"Yes, have you forgotten the ancestors' abilities? His abilities reach the star level and can affect the direction of a battlefield. Superpower has long had the ability to influence the direction of war." Hu Bingxin said.

Her words made many stars into thinking.

They are thinking about the possible changes in the trend.

"But is there any connection between this annexation and Superpower?" a general star asked.

"What if the marching ants use superpowers to silently control all the senior leaders of the Sauron Alliance?" Hu Bingxin gave an example: "For example, the slaughter of the Ziwei civilization, isn't it the case?"

At this moment, the faces of all the stars on the field changed drastically, and they immediately gathered at the sand table.

"Assuming this premise is true, if I control King Sauron, without being known by the Sauron Alliance, what advantage can I gain? What will I do next?"

"To control King Sauron, you have the highest level of authority in the Sauron Alliance. You can get all the secrets and military layouts of the Sauron Alliance. One can secretly infiltrate, and then control other high-levels, and second, you can find defensive weaknesses to attack, and get the best results. Three is two The combination of the two is infiltrating and attacking at the same time. Judging by the war model, there is no movement in the early stage, the second is not established, the first three is established, and the time of control is uncertain.

"With condition one established, suppose..."

"Condition 3 holds, suppose..."

The instructions for deduction were issued again, and logical deductions were made again and again to keep them close to the correct answer.

...

Zi Luo was biting a fleshy leg, ignoring his greasy mouth, sitting comfortably on the chair, staring at the sand table star chart in front of him. The star map is the star map of the Marching Ant Group and the Sauron Alliance. There are also comparisons of various comprehensive forces on it.

Beside him, is a young man in pajamas, dozing off with a stuffed toy.

In the Ziwei civilization, there is a rumor that when Fatty Luo is eating his legs and looking at the star map, don't bother him. And the dozing Zizhong, don't wake up.

Therefore, although there are many generals and staff in the war department, they dare not chat back and forth with Zi Luo.

Instead, he chose to play this incredible war in another combat sandbox.

"It's totally illogical and unreasonable."

"Even if the strength of the two groups is quite different, it is impossible for this kind of trend to occur, and it is completely unreasonable and unconditional to surrender and annex."

"Assuming that the leaders of the Sauron Alliance are all fools, this result is true."

"If this assumption is true, the next question is how to make them fools."

"If you ask this question, the gods can turn you into fools."

The general star not far away was playing in the sand table, but he couldn't think of the result, so he set conditions randomly. The last group of people became silent because they couldn't understand.

"Fool? God?"

Fatty Luo, who was eating the meat, froze in his hands holding the meat legs, and the next moment, his eyes skyrocketed.

"Assemble all the members and bring them to me."

Fatty Luo dropped the chicken leg in his hand and shouted at the sand table next to him.

"%*￥&" The sleepy young man was so scared by Fatty Luo's loud voice that he jumped up from the chair and yelled: "Fatty man, can you keep your voice down?

Fatty Luo Pu's big palm grabbed this guy, wiped the greasy hands with his pajamas and stuffed toys, and then threw him onto the chair aside: "Sleep your sleep, sleepy bug. "

"You fat man, waiting for you to sleep tonight, I will take off your pants and hang them up."

Seeing the many generals in the Operation Department were frightened. In the Ziwei civilization, only Fatty Luo dared to do this with Zizhong.

"Come here all to deduct this war." Fatty Luo ignored the sleepy man.

"All the factors and assumptions have been deduced, but still unsuccessful." A general star said in frustration.

"There is a condition, you just assumed it."

"We? What conditions?"

"All the senior leaders of the Sauron Alliance have become ‘fools’!"

chapters.title: Chapter 1053: : War Mode In The Age Of Super Power
chapters.body:
Chapter 1053: : War Mode In The Age Of Super Power

The result came out!

Lei Yu saw the result of the deduction and remained silent for a long time.

The deduction of this war model finally succeeded, and it took them a lot of effort.

"Unexpectedly, really unexpectedly." Thunder sighed and said, "General Lei, what do you do next?"

"Open the universe live broadcast." Lei Yu regained his senses and said.

Thunder frowned slightly, and then said: "You want to announce the answer to the deduction?"

"Yes, this is an epic war. It will be a brand new beginning. It should be known by the universe." Lei Yu did not deny it, but said it frankly.

This answer stunned all the generals and the Thunder in the war room.

Raytheon Civilization starts the live broadcast of the universe, and the top general Xing Leiyu will explain the war deduction model of "The Battle of the Alliance of Sauron by the Marching Ants".

After this news appeared, it spread throughout the universe like a space storm.

Almost all the stars of the forces switched their screens to Lei Yu's live broadcast channel.

The battle of the marching ant group was so shocking that it made countless stars racked their brains without thinking of the real answer. Now Lei Yu wants to announce the answer they deduced.

Lei Yu of the Thor civilization, Yan of the Black Eye civilization, Fatty Luo of the Ziwei civilization, and Ming A of the Pluto civilization are known as the four top generals in the universe. After Ming Ah fell, Lan took the place of Ming Ah.

The four top general stars are almost the idols and guiding lights of the universe.

Now that Lei Yu personally ends the performance, it is tantamount to opening the forum with the top professors in the star realm to explain this epic war model.

When the live broadcast was ready, Lei Yu appeared on the live broadcast screen with a laser pointer. Seeing this scene, Jiang Xing was breathless.

"I didn't expect to use this method to announce our deduction model of this war. First of all, I am here to show respect to the generals of the marching ant group."

As soon as Lei Yu entered the live broadcast, he spoke.

"When the war just ended, many colleagues told me that this war was an impossible war. The whole direction of the war was completely unreasonable. Its existence overturned all previous war theories. In this regard, we have produced as many as Hundreds of millions of war models were deduced, but without exception, they all failed, and they could not get the same results as this war."

Lei Yu showed some deduced star maps and results in the star map of the live broadcast.

This sentence made the viewer nod in agreement with the star.

They did build countless war models, and the result was the same as Lei Yu, but they still have no idea.

Even ordinary people were attracted by Lei Yu's words. What kind of war model makes the battle team of God-level civilization build countless models that can't be deduced?

"Our deduction has come to a dead end, but the war model is real, so this must be a viable war. It exists, and there must be an answer, so we started to think about the important factors ignored in the war. In the end we found that it is indeed An important factor is missing."

As soon as the words fell, watching the live broadcast, the star breathed heavily and kept his eyes intent for fear of missing a detail.

"This factor is super power." Lei Yu throws out the answer.

"Super?"

"It seems to be super power? We didn't consider the super power factor when we deduced it."

"I haven't thought about it either."

Many stars suddenly realized, but did not continue to study, but focused on the live broadcast.

As Lei Yu talked, the star maps of the Marching Ant Group and the Sauron Alliance were called out.

"In fact, in previous war exercises, we never considered the factor of'super power'. Because war is a general trend, super power is an individual, not a special situation, a single soldier, it is impossible to stop the general advancement of the war. This inertial thinking makes us fall into a misunderstanding of deduction."

"Later, after we thought about the super power factor, we were still not sure. When we brought this factor into the deduction model, we found that the entire war model has undergone earth-shaking changes, which can be described as totally unrecognizable.

This fact also awakens us, Superpower has already had the influence to change the course of war. After that, we made a bold hypothesis. This hypothesis was inspired by a special event, the Zidi massacre of Ziwei star. "

Speaking of the Purple Emperor Massacre, all the stars who watched the live broadcast couldn't help but swallow.

Since the popularization of super power technology, the massacre of Zidi is the super power incident that has the greatest impact in history. Surpassing Chen Mo and Tong Qing's super power battle, it also surpassed the old chief to show the ability to destroy the planet.

That was an event that changed the course of space war.

That slaughter pulled the crape myrtle civilization from the edge of decay, and used blood to complete the centralization of the crape myrtle civilization, while avoiding the siege of the powers like a scorpion civilization, it became the most shocking slaughter in the universe.

"We make a hypothesis. Assume that there is a person with the horrible ability of the Purple Emperor in the marching ant group, who has the ability to affect the brain of life. After the hypothesis is completed, we give the first condition.

Suppose that the marching ant group discovers the nest of the Sauron Alliance. One day, King Sauron and the core high-level leaders will gather on the same planet to have a meeting to discuss how to deal with the marching ant group.

Suddenly, the capable person of the marching ant group appeared on the planet where King Sauron was, and then used his ability to control the entire planet. Controlling King Sauron and the high-levels silently.

Under the premise that this assumption is established, the marching ant group controls the highest leader and decision-making power of the Sauron Alliance. Because we are not sure when the marching ant group did all this, we decided to embed this assumption from the beginning of the war.

In this case, the marching ants can use his remotely controlled high-level puppet to exchange blood in the high-level Sauron Alliance. Until the exchange of blood infiltration is completed, the two sides ceased the war and conducted peace talks. As the senior leaders of the Sauron Alliance were controlled, it was natural to suddenly and unconditionally surrender. This war model is established. "

Lei Yu said the answer, making all the lives that heard it feel incredible.

Too unreasonable.

"The question is not over. There will definitely be questions from the generals. When they are close to the planet where the high-levels are stationed, they need a spacecraft to approach, and there is also an extremely strict identity review. How can they quietly go to the planet where the high-level is located and control all the high-levels? The question was raised to me by a colleague during the deduction. In fact, the answer is very simple, the ability of space shuttle."

"Space shuttle?"

"Is this okay?"

"This ability really exists, and it has appeared before, in Mu's Sky Star."

Some Jiang Xing screamed when thinking about the Mu's Heavenly Star incident. Although in the past ten years, many stars have a clear understanding of the events and memories of the event.

"Someone would have thought that in Mu's Tianxing, Chen Mo and his female assistants had used space abilities. And the old chief Baixing also had the ability to control space."

Lei Yu clicked on a holographic video. It was Mo Nu tearing the space and bringing the guards back to the scene to siege Ming Qiyu, Chen Mo tearing the space apart, resisting the attack of Tongqing, and the old chief of the White Star civilization destroying the planet. Video.

"This kind of space shuttle ability can easily evade all censorship and directly enter the planet's hinterland. Space shuttle ability and brain control ability people can move together. They can easily penetrate any defense, enter the planet silently, and then move the inside If the high-level has all control, this question is established.

Lei Yu released the synthetic screen of the deduction model. Judging from the settings they input, it is fully in line with the expected effect.

Seeing this kind of scene, the leaders of almost all forces felt cold all over.

This ability is too scary.

This combination of abilities is used to perform beheading operations, and at present, it is almost unsolvable.

Unless a trap is set, the opponent is introduced into the planet, and then the space weapons in the planet are detonated without warning, and they are destroyed within the planet.

"There may be questions here. If the marching ants are not as strong as the Purple Emperor, how can they control the senior leaders of the Sauron Alliance? Regarding this question, we cannot confirm, but we can assume that the marching ants have such a strong. Because This hypothesis holds true for this ability and this strong person.

Combining all kinds of information, the assumptions brought in by this war model are the only successful model so far. Only with this assumption can everything that happens after this war appears reasonable.

This is not the era of the armor system, but the era of super powers. This era has brand new tactics and tactics in this era. I admire the star who came up with this tactic. "

"This war is of great significance, and it is also the reason why I chose to publicly deduct it. If my deduction is true, then I will tell you that this is a brand-new war mode, and the marching ant group will be the pioneer of this mode. The mode of war in the age of energy."

Times have changed.

chapters.title: Chapter 1054: : The War Is Changing
chapters.body:
Chapter 1054: : The War Is Changing

Seeing Lei Yu's live broadcast of the war deduction analysis, Chen Mo had to admire him. He deserves to be the commander-in-chief of Thor Civilization.

Based on speculation and deduction, they almost restored the entire process of their annexation of the Sauron Alliance, and also concluded a brand new war mode.

It seems that there are still many capable people in the universe.

"Wrong move."

Lan touched her pointed chin and said with some regret.

When Chen Mo controlled the Sauron Alliance, all of them were immersed in the joy of annexing the Sauron Alliance, but ignored an important arrangement.

They can secretly control the Alliance of Sauron as an unexpected **** without revealing their existing methods.

It's a pity that I didn't think about this at the time, I just wanted to annex the Sauron Alliance, get the strategic depth, and miss a good opportunity.

The inertial thinking of their traditional tactics hadn't realized the horror of Chen Mo's abilities. When they realized this, it was too late.

This move is not so perfect, and their superpowers are exposed.

"How to arrange next?" Chen Mo asked.

"You need to form a team, study the war mode in the age of superpower, and understand this new mode. Boss, you have torn the traditional tactics to perfection in this action. Stronger modes and tactics must be changed."

Lan sighed a little, their warhead was violent and consumed a lot of energy before they captured a few galaxy clusters.

In the end, Chen Mo did well. He took the other people's nest as soon as he shot. Now Xiaoli and Black Hawk are still doubting their lives. Not only them, but the generals of the universe at that time were doubting life.

It's abnormal.

"We need to train special superpowers and enhance the superpower level of the team members."

The instigator of the annexation of the Sauron Alliance is here.

They know how to not be influenced and controlled by the mind reader, that is, the super power level is higher than the opponent, and the will is strong. At the same time, I know the role of someone with special superpowers.

Special types of superpowers, such as mind reading, mind control, modifying and reading memory, manipulating consciousness, controlling objects, foresight, space, time, etc., are very powerful superpowers.

Once these superpowers break through to the star level or even the constant star level, one person is equivalent to a fleet.

"I just tried my ability, and I didn't expect to involve such a big change." Chen Mo spread his hands and said helplessly.

Before starting, he had never thought about the war mode of the super power era or anything. After taking this action, so many things were summed up.

"Do you want to continue to expand?" Chen Mo asked.

"It's best not to temporarily. Now the entire universe is guarding against our special abilities. If you accidentally fall into the trap of the opponent, it will be very troublesome. Settle for a period of time, thoroughly digest the Sauron Alliance, and understand the war mode of the super power era. , And then use our own advantages to act."

"Then I will continue to study my'hand of God'."

...

The war deduction analyzed by Lei Yu in the universe live broadcast caused an uproar.

With the arrival of the super power era, they have a real feeling about the changes in the strength of each Armored Division around them.

However, the mode of war has not changed, because Xingxing’s past tactics and inertial thinking believe that the general trend of war will not change much because of the strength of individual lives.

However, Lei Yu's conclusion is that the war mode in the super power era is different from the war in the armor system era, and there is a big difference.

There is a brand new war mode in the super power era.

In the war game, the incredible superpower and the weird group control are almost unsolvable at this stage.

Lei Yu's live broadcast reminds all forces in the universe that a new system will gradually replace the original system with the advent of a new era. Everything is changing, and so is the war.

At the same time, the outside world's fear of the marching ant group has increased by three points.

Especially the forces bordering the marching ant star field, the core high-level people are all scattered throughout the star field, and they dare not gather on the same planet. At the same time, they try their best to create a mystery of their whereabouts and prevent the outside world from knowing where they really hide.

They had to be cautious when they didn't think of a solution to this ability.

Almost all forces began to find a way to deal with this kind of open-hanging ability.

...

Over an unremarkable planet in the Land of Chaos, a spaceship is floating in the spaceport.

This planet is not noticeable, but if you want to come here, you have to go through a lot of procedures and censorship.

Hui Twenty-one was on the spaceship, looking at the planet in the holographic screen with a grim face. If Chen Mo and others were there, he would definitely be able to see the familiar temperament from him.

As time went by, Hui Twenty-one had more and more Jing Ge's temperament. Although his appearance and race were different, they were all the same grim.

The planet in front of me is the hiding place of Hoarfrost, King of the Frost Empire.

The purpose of Hui 21's trip is Hoarfrost.

For this goal, he has been preparing for a long time.

The life and death of Baishuang is related to the future of the chaotic land. They must unify the chaotic land and gain the right to speak in the chaotic world. This may be vital to the future marching ant group.

Dididi...

In the communicator, a prompt of information sounded in a coded language.

Seeing the information above, Hui Twenty One retracted his gaze, and the battle armor covered his stern face.

call!

In the spacecraft, Hui Twenty-one's body suddenly disappeared in place.

And over a certain building on the planet below the spacecraft, a thin armor suddenly appeared, looking around the world, as if it were lonely.

In the palace of the planet, Hoarfrost rubbed her tired eyes, her frowning brows couldn't stretch.

For some reason, he had a not-so-good premonition. This feeling is hard to say, but it is real.

When the Frost Empire was passed on to him, it was still a weak and advanced civilization, and its position in the land of chaos was precarious. Since he took over, he has carried out drastic reforms and selected talents, only gradually annexing the surrounding civilizations and becoming the top civilization.

After the dark turmoil occurred in the chaotic land, the chaotic land began to shuffle, and the power accumulated by their Frost Empire was released, and then continued to grow in the chaos, and finally the situation where it is today.

Today's chaotic land is a situation where the two powers compete for hegemony.

His opponent was Dark Star. Their predecessor was a force that planned to provoke the dark turmoil. Their strength and technology were extremely powerful.

In the past, the opponent did not have a strong star to preside over the battle, so the advantage to them was not obvious.

Not long ago, Dark Star did not know where two powerful generals emerged from, which put them under tremendous pressure on the battlefield.

Especially after the marching ant group annexed the Sauron Alliance, he became more careful.

Because Dark Star's predecessor was a dark force and was proficient in assassination, it was really possible to behead him. Therefore, he is particularly concerned about his safety. This hiding place is carefully selected.

Every life that comes in needs to go through numerous tests and cannot carry thermal weapons. He still has a substitute to face the public in the palace. Security shouldn't be a problem, but now he feels flustered.

Suddenly, Hoarfrost felt a throbbing behind her, and a panic swept across her body.

Just turning his head, his pupils quickly dilated and froze in place. 1603389457

chapters.title: Chapter 1055: : Black Pupil Civilization Started
chapters.body:
Chapter 1055: : Black Pupil Civilization Started

The girl with the poisonous skin was closing her eyes and resting her mind, calming down on the various battle reports that came back.

Carrie and Hong Xu were left with the matter of the war, and she didn't care too much.

But there is one thing that makes her care.

The main hall of the palace was quiet for a long time.

Suddenly, a shadow slowly appeared in front of the hall, and Hui Twenty-one's figure in battle armor appeared instantly, revealing a cold face.

"Fulfill the mission." Hui Twenty-one said.

"Good." The poisonous girl showed a rare smile, like a blooming black rose: "Notify the combat department."

A dispute is emerging in a chaotic place.

The changes in the place of chaos still caused small waves in the universe, but not many people followed it, but the forces around the place of chaos were paying attention.

The aftermath of the marching ants' annexation of the Sauron Alliance has not disappeared, and the significance of this war is too far-reaching.

The forces of the universe after more than ten years of peace have become active again.

They all seem to be aware that the atmosphere of the cosmic forces has become subtle.

All forces are straining a string. While studying and understanding the latest war mode, they are also secretly preparing for it, and at the same time guessing who the next target will be destroyed and annexed.

After a brief period of calm, the storm came as many forces had expected.

It's just this object, beyond the expectations of all forces.

Ziwei civilization.

"The Zijun colluded with the Zidi and slaughtered the high-level crape myrtle civilization. 》

This news suddenly appeared in the news of the Universe Network, and spread throughout the star domain of Ziwei Wen, especially the planet where the Ziwei people are, all received this information push.

The news exposed the scenes and dialogue between Zijunzhi and Zidi when they met. Zijunzhi secretly asked Zidi to slaughter the high-level Ziwei civilization and help him complete the centralization of power, including some cruel methods.

The place where the video was recorded is in a secret hall, and the light is not enough, which makes the conversation between the two more authentic.

"This is the evidence that Zi Junzhi planned the massacre."

"The Ziwei civilization was ruled by a tyrant, and it was so terrible to carry out such a brutal massacre."

"I said early in the morning that it was the work of Zijun."

"Such a terrible hypocrite, no wonder Zidi can easily enter Ziwei Star."

"Let Zijun step down!"

"..."

The news caused an uproar in the entire universe, and the voices attacking Zijunzhi spread throughout the universe.

Later, the Ziwei civilization official refuted the rumors, claiming that the video was forged by someone who wanted to.

But no one believed it.

The massacre of the Ziwei civilization, the outside world is speculating that Zijunzhi joined Zidi, because so many people were killed, but Zijunzhi was not affected, and he was also the biggest beneficiary of this incident, even in the later During the suppression, Zi Junzhi also issued an order to eliminate dissidents.

Originally, there was no evidence. The outside world should only open one eye and close one eye, but now, the video has once again ignited the anger of the civilized people of crape myrtle.

The news became louder and louder, and the high-level Ziwei civilization collectively silenced, while the Ziwei civilized people broke out an unprecedented scale of protests, demanding Zijun step down and try Zijunzhi.

The turmoil started.

...

Black pupil civilization has started!

The moment Lan received the information, Lan realized that it was wrong, and now that the crape myrtle civilization has become a big mess, he confirmed the news.

This storm came too weird, obviously carefully planned.

"How can I be sure that it is the Black Eye civilization and not other civilizations?" Zhao Min was very curious about Lan's statement, because there was no information to show that the Ziwei civilization was in chaos this time, and it was the Black Eye civilization that was behind it.

Chen Mo also looked at Lan, seeking answers.

"Feeling. In the remaining god-level civilization, Lei Ting does not have the ambition to be aggressive, and is not much stronger than Ziwei. Even if he does it, he will not choose Ziwei. The endless sea ignores world affairs, the dark forest is divided, and it is overwhelming. The white star and the black pupil are left. This method and style is more like the style of pupil green."

Lan and them carefully analyzed.

While studying the various god-level civilizations, he did an in-depth study of the personality of the main senior leaders, including the opponent's leader.

From the previous methods and actions, it is obviously the style of Hitomi.

Chen Mo stared at the star map for a while, but did not come up with an answer: "Why is the Ziwei civilization?"

"Lagerstroemia civilization currently has obvious weaknesses. The sequelae of Zidi’s massacre are too great. You must know that even if the crape myrtle civilization family is in charge of some power and influence of the crape myrtle civilization, their families, whether it is prestige or ability, can There are still so many people, and the Ziwei civilization pays attention to blood.

After the slaughter, the Ziwei civilization appeared to be empty for a short time, and there was no talent with enough prestige to manage it in the right place, and it was easy to be used to make a fuss.

The Ziwei civilization is showing signs of recovery. As the oldest god-level civilization, her background is very large. Tong Qing has a hegemonic heart, if he kills the Ziwei civilization, or maimed it, the obstacle to his hegemony will be linearly reduced. Otherwise, give her time to recover and rectify, that is a very strong opponent.

The war mode in the super power era has changed, and Hitomi should also be anxious. Because once this new model develops and matures, the god-level civilization may not be the strongest. Right now, we will be ahead of him.

This mode of warfare relies on the combination of special superpowers and personal strength, and then cooperates with the warhead. Offensive and defensive are not traditional offensive and defensive, and may therefore rewrite the existing strong and weak order of the universe.

The longer the peace is, the more mature the super power system will develop, and the weaker the superiority of the god-level civilization warhead will be. The top civilization may stand out due to the birth of special super powers, so the cards must be shuffled.

Before the opponent has mastered this mode of warfare, it will be annexed and torn apart. Not only the Black Eye Civilization, but the White Star Civilization and Thor Civilization, if they see this, will also attack the powerful pair of manual knives around them. "

"Where are we?" Chen Mo asked.

"Wait, we need to digest the Sauron Alliance, and we also have a geographical advantage. The remaining opponents are not suitable for anyone. I am afraid it will not be peaceful next. Let's take a look at the movements of other god-level civilizations. There are also the reactions of several nearby companies. We braked with silence."

The war is changing, and this is a change that many generals clearly feel.

...

The situation within the crape myrtle civilization continued to deteriorate. After the event fermented, Zi Junzhi's prestige was completely lost, causing quite a stir in the crape myrtle civilization.

And the remnants of the former top ten families and old nobles began to find excuses to criticize Zi Junzhi.

The scene of the riots continues to expand.

When the Ziwei civilization is preparing to use the warhead to suppress the riots.

Sure enough, as Lan expected.

Black pupil civilization excuses to support the overthrow of Zi Junzhi's inhumane tyranny, Chen Bing star borders. The leader of the army is the battle chief of the Ziwei civilization, the Red Army, the commander of the first legion of the Black Eye Civilization, a very powerful veteran.

The Ziwei Civilization War Department was attracted and had to fully guard against the intervention of the Black Eye Civilization.

For a time, the smell of gunpowder between the Black Eye civilization and the Ziwei civilization was extremely strong.

However, this is more like the beginning of a great chaos in the universe [笔趣阁www.boquge.co].

Soon after, Thor Civilization launched an attack on Underfire Civilization. The White Star Civilization united with the giants to attack the Wuxian civilization.

Everything seems to be different.

The movements of several god-level civilizations are very tacit.

...

Chen Mo was also found by someone he didn't expect.

Zi Yun, he still felt incredible when this female Ziwei came to him.

Chen Mo was not disgusted with Zi Yun, even he himself copied the other's abilities, read the other's memory, and knew all the other's secrets.

Since this female crape myrtle came to them, she was an uncontested, pure-hearted temperament. She had never had a red face with anyone, had no dispute with anyone, just read a book quietly.

This time I came to Chen Mo, but Chen Mo was surprised.

"I want to go back."

Zi Yun's voice is still so cold.

"Just for this?" Chen Mo asked in surprise.

"Ok."

"Because of recent events?"

Zi Yun was noncommittal, and her purple eyes looked at Chen Mo more: "There was an accident on the star lord's side and it was a lot of pressure. I'm afraid it's a bit troublesome. I can't ignore it. After all, it is my hometown.

"Those so-called evidence, knowing that they are false, do not let your teacher come forward to clarify?"

"The teacher's identity is special. He will only get darker and darker when he comes out, but sits down to realize all that, and the teacher will not come out to save Ziwei."

"Then I wish you a smooth journey."

"Thank you for your hospitality during this time."

Zi Yun said goodbye.

Even if Chen Mo knew the woman's memory and secrets, he still couldn't understand the female crape myrtle. It is estimated that no one in the universe could understand what this girl was thinking.

Her decision is always surprising, but it doesn't matter anymore.

Soon after sending Zi Yun away, Chen Mo received a notice from Lan before he returned home.

The Ten Cities Alliance sent envoys over. 1603467619

chapters.title: Chapter 1056: : Conditions Of Alliance
chapters.body:
Chapter 1056: : Conditions Of Alliance

The messenger of the Ten Cities Alliance is a lean humanoid, with haggard skin like an old wrinkled book cover, eyes like bullseye, and unusually slender fingers. From a distance, he looked like a tree man carved from dead wood.

The life of the Yaoluo tribe, the life of this tribe is extremely shrewd, able to speak well, and also very good at observing words and colors, so the communication is very good, a natural negotiator.

Demon Luo City is a city of the Ten Cities Alliance, and it occupies an important position in it. It is normal to send them over this time.

Seeing Chen Mo coming, the big eyes of the envoy of the Ten Cities Tongling looked at him.

This young being is currently one of the strongest overlords in the universe, but it doesn't seem to be special.

"Mr. Long Yang." The ten city envoy saluted Chen Mo respectfully: "My name is Luo Huo. I am the representative of the envoy sent by the leader this time."

"Envoy Luo, hello, what's the matter?" Chen Mo simply greeted the other party and cut into the subject.

"Mr. Refreshing, the leader sent me over to ask the marching ants if they have any idea of reaching an alliance, and then we both seek some cooperation." With a friendly smile on Rojo's face, like a friendly old tree man, let People can't bring up feelings of disgust.

"Alliance?" Chen Mo looked at Lan, and when he made a look, he understood: "Is an alliance with you any good for us?"

Luo Huo's breath was slightly stagnant, and he looked up after thinking.

"Now that the universe is in chaos, the god-level civilization is almost about to destroy other civilizations and dominate the universe. Adjacent to us is the strongest black pupil civilization, and there is a Hongqiao leading to the white star civilization. It can be said that the threat is not small on our side. The two god-level civilizations join forces to attack us, and we are determined to be unable to resist, but if we fail, your marching ants will face the two god-level civilizations, with cold lips and teeth."

"That's the truth."

Chen Mo suddenly realized that Lan once said that once the Ten Cities Alliance came to form an alliance, it must take the initiative, so he did not immediately agree.

"The alliance is not bad, but there are two conditions."

"Sir, you say."

Luo Huo was taken aback and took a deep look at Chen Mo, no wonder this man could become one of the overlords of the universe.

"The first condition is that our army of marching ants can enter the Star Territory of the Ten City Alliance at any time, and it is convenient to support during the war."

"This shouldn't be a big problem. If the two sides are jointly defending, this is a necessary condition. The leader should agree to it." Rojo sighed in secret, "Sir, what is the second condition?"

"The second condition is that if the two sides are engaged in joint operations, whether the battlefield is in our star region or in the ten-cities star region, the commander-in-chief of the joint operations department must be led by us, and the joint corps must obey the orders of the joint operations department."

"This……"

Rojo dared not answer for a while.

Because this condition involves too much.

To get the commander-in-chief means to have absolute dominance in this cooperation.

But he also knew that their strength was indeed worse than that of the marching ant group. The marching ant group was a strong general and it was normal to want to lead.

Just handing over all the leadership to the marching ants group, they are not sure whether their interests can be guaranteed.

"I need to go back to ask the leader for this."

"No hurry, you can ask your leader to think about it before giving me a reply." Chen Mo said indifferently, "I only have these two conditions. Do the messengers have any other questions?"

"Yes, we want to buy some dark matter from Mr."

"This is easy to say, how much?"

"Seven billion luns."

Rojo used his finger to compare a universal seven-character.

Now the people in charge of dark matter extraction technology are god-level civilizations, as well as marching ant groups. Therefore, in the universe, the major forces either cooperate with god-level civilization or are attacked and annexed by god-level civilization.

In the peaceful era, god-level civilizations dominated the universe alliance, and it was they dominated the distribution of dark matter.

Nowadays, apart from the god-level civilization, only the marching ant group has the dark matter extraction technology.

"Yes, but I don't need star coins, I need resource planets in exchange."

"Half stars, half resources."

"No way."

Chen Mo refused without hesitation. Now that the universe is in chaos, resources are the best currency.

You know, not all planets are suitable for mining.

Gas planets are difficult to mine, dwarf planets are too gravitational, and difficult to mine, so generally only terrestrial planets are suitable for mining, with enough minerals and space to produce various war machines.

In a space war, the war machine consumed is based on hollowing out the planet, which consumes huge resources.

"Okay." Rojo agreed.

"Dark matter will be delivered within three months. About the alliance, you can go back and ask your leader before discussing it with me."

"I will tell the leader, thank you sir." Rojo saluted Chen Mo again: "No matter whether the alliance is successful this time, you are our best friend."

"It's easy to say." Chen Mo said politely.

Rojo did not stay with them for a long time. After the conversation, he went to the manor arranged for them by Chen Mo and contacted the Ten Cities Alliance headquarters.

...

"He said that?"

"Yes."

With Rojo's affirmative answer, the male life in the holographic video was lost in thought.

He is the current lord of the Ten Cities Alliance, the lord of the Greek Demon City, Kahn, his magic patterns flow and change like a living thing, which is the characteristic of the Greek Demon clan.

The Ten Cities Alliance is composed of ten cities. Each city is a top-level civilization. It belongs to one of the 108 cities. They are Tianlu, Demon Luo, Liuli, Holy Python, Moon Deer, Hunter, Rahu, Mermaid, and Greek Demon, **** disciple.

The leader of the Ten Cities Alliance adopts a rotation system, which rotates once every three years, while major internal decisions are adopted by a voting system, and more than half of them can pass, and the leader's vote counts one and a half votes.

Now, the lord of the other nine cities is by Kahn's side.

"I am opposed to giving them full control. In case they want to pit us, we will die without a place to be buried." The city lord of the gods was calm and not in a good mood.

"I also think it needs more consideration, it's too risky." Hunter City City Lord also shook his head.

The city lord of Demon Luo city by his side glanced at them, then retracted his gaze: "I think it's okay. They have silver hair and Ming Tu two top generals. If they fight together, their generals will be stronger, and it is normal for them to lead them. "

"Ling Xi is not weak."

"..."

Kahn frowned as they watched their argument.

There is no unity within the Ten Cities Alliance, he also knows these. Some big cities are pro-White Star civilization, some are pro-Black Eye civilization, those two have done a lot of work within the Ten Cities Alliance.

It was precisely because of the sense of crisis that he chose to contact the marching ants to form an alliance, otherwise, let them face the two god-level civilizations. Once the other party did it, they might only end up with one.

But from the current situation, things are more troublesome than I thought.

Kahn's heart kept sinking.

...

Chen Mo sat on the chair, tapping his fingers on the table, but his eyes did not leave the star map: "Do you think they will agree to our terms this time?"

"It's unlikely."

Lan gave a decisive answer.

"How to say?"

"The Ten Cities Alliance is not as united as expected. The White Star Civilization and the Black Eye Civilization have infiltrated them severely, and there are big internal opinions among the ten cities. If the commandership is given to us, they are afraid that we will use the commanding power to exclude dissidents."

"Then why did you propose this condition?" Chen Mo asked. This condition was mentioned by Lan when communicating with him. Once the Ten Cities Alliance came to seek an alliance, they would raise this condition.

"I have to mention that there is no commander-in-chief and we cannot cooperate. Otherwise, we are at risk of being trapped when we cooperate, because we don't know who of them will be infiltrated and to what extent.

If this condition is thrown out, we take the absolute initiative and can initially determine the position within the Ten-City Alliance. If the Ten-City Alliance is split in the future, then we can form alliances with big cities with good positions and let them become our buffer zone. "

Lan drew the area of the Ten-City Alliance in the star map, and its strategic location was clear at a glance.

"What if they agree?" Chen Mo asked curiously.

"If you agree, it will be even simpler. Boss, you have the ability to read their memories. Look for a chance to see who is the ghost. When the time comes, we will open up the two dark chess and build the Ten Cities Alliance into us. Steel buffer zone."

Lan laughed, very treacherous.

"So it is unlikely that they will agree. The two companies are unlikely to let us get the commandership so easily. It is more likely to maintain the status quo or split."

"How to arrange next?" Chen Mo asked.

"Boss, I think you can find your old friend."

"What is it? My old friend is good?"

chapters.title: Chapter 1057: : Arowana Princess
chapters.body:
Chapter 1057: : Arowana Princess

"How many oppose?"

"God disciple, moon deer, hunter, holy python, four families, Luo Hu abstained."

"It's normal for them to object."

In the office in the palace, Kahn is talking to a man who looks like a young man, and talks holographically.

This man is not an unknown person. In the Ten Cities Alliance, his right to speak is almost under one person. He is the commander-in-chief of the war headquarters in charge of the Allied Forces of the Ten Cities Alliance, Ling Xi.

He doesn't look tough, or even a little lean, but his eyes are extremely sharp.

In fact, he did not become famous by force.

In the ranking of the top generals in the universe, the current generals in power can also be ranked high. It was his layout that kept the White Star Civilization within the Gulu Hongqiao, and the black pupil on the other side did not dare to act rashly.

"Why is it normal for them to oppose?" Kahn asked puzzled.

"The commander-in-chief. If the marching ant group promises to form an alliance that does not involve this condition, they will agree without hesitation. But the marching ants have proposed the commandership of joint operations. Some of them are very suspicious and some are really afraid. Yes. To be precise, the master behind them is afraid."

Ling Xi pointed to the holographic star map.

"It is impossible for the marching ant group not to know the penetration of the white star and the black pupil. If they find a chance to take power, the marching ants will definitely pull out the nails of the two arranged in the Ten-City Alliance. One united and strong, but not kissing the two. The ten-city alliance of god-level civilization is most in line with the interests of marching ants."

"But now I can't form an alliance, what should I do?"

Kahn frowned. If the two families did it without the help of marching ants, they wouldn't last long.

"Not being able to form an alliance is not a bad thing. The marching ants should have been mentally prepared for being unable to form an alliance. The purpose of this condition is to put some problems on the table."

Ling Xi also saw Kahn's concerns.

"I can contact the commander-in-chief of the marching ants privately to achieve cooperation. The god-level civilization will do it, and the marching ants will never sit back and watch, otherwise we will perish, and the marching ants will face the two god-level civilizations without the strategic buffer zone. So even if The price is higher, and they won't allow God-level civilization to annex us."

"Leave it to you." Kahn said earnestly.

...

Princess Arowana looked confused and wondered why Chen Mo invited her over.

But I don't care.

Judging from the several contacts, she has a good impression of Chen Mo, and they have similarities in appearance.

If the Mermaid is lost, her first choice is Chen Mo.

The plane landed on the outskirts of the marching ant group headquarters. Princess Arowana got off the car, and a robot greeted her and went to the marching ant group headquarters office.

Chen Mo's office.

Here, she came here for the first time. As soon as she walked in, she saw Chen Mo's familiar face.

"Long time no see, come and sit."

"long time no see."

Princess Arowana sat down on the sofa and took the tea cup from Chen Mo. She had drunk this drink the last time she came. The taste is not good, but it makes people feel quiet.

"What do you think of the current situation of Mermaid?" Chen Mo cut directly to the subject.

"Mermaid?"

Princess Arowana didn't answer him right away, Chen Mo asked her this question, it must be of his use.

"I should have told you last time that the Mermaid is almost the weakest in the Ten Cities Alliance. The surrounding civilization is uneasy and kind to us, and the same is true in the Ten Cities Alliance.

We were in the most fringe zone, and other civilizations nearby harassed us, and the Ten Cities Alliance ignored it. If there is a real war, either the Mermaid will be occupied by the Ten Cities Alliance with a special excuse, or they will be abandoned, so I will contact you in advance last time. I hope that in the future, when the Mermaid is destroyed, there will be a place to stay. "

"If I need you to do something for me, would you like it?" Chen Mo asked.

At this moment, Arowana somewhat guessed why Chen Mo contacted her, but he was still not so sure: "Do you want me to be your internal correspondent in the Ten Cities Alliance?"

"Yes."

Chen Mo did not deny that it is better to say this kind of thing straightforwardly than to hesitate.

"The current Ten Cities Alliance, you should know better than me, the hearts of the people are distracted, and some civilizations have been infiltrated by the two god-level civilizations. You also said that once war starts, your mermaid civilization will be the first to suffer."

Arowana was silent.

"White Star Civilization and Black Eye Civilization are now the two most powerful civilizations in the universe. If the Ten Cities Alliance falls, our marching ants will face the two god-level civilizations, so I have to plan ahead." Chen Mo said.

"They do it, can't you also divide the Ten Cities Alliance?" Princess Arowana blinked curiously.

"Other civilizations are okay, but the Ten-City Alliance cannot." Chen Mo said truthfully: "The Ten-City Alliance is a shield between us and the two god-level civilizations. If the shield is broken, the two giants will swallow us next. So we The Ten Cities Alliance is needed as a strategic buffer zone."

"Using the Ten Cities Alliance to hold down the two god-level civilizations?"

"Do you think they can hold it back?" Chen Mo asked back.

Princess Arowana was silent.

It is impossible for the Ten Cities Alliance to hold the two strongest god-level civilizations. Even if the ten members of the Ten City Alliance work together, they dare not say that they can be blocked.

"Once the war starts, no matter what the outcome is, Mermaid City will not end well. White Star and Black Eye will not care about your mermaid clan issues, and you may even become the favored slaves of the White Star Civilization and Black Eye civilization families. If we win this war, your mermaid tribe can have a high status with us. After all, your tribe has the innate conditions to truly integrate into our humanity."

After pondering for a long time, Princess Arowana sighed. I have to say that she was persuaded by Chen Mo.

"What should I do?"

These few words came out, indicating that Princess Arowana has made up her mind.

She had to make up her mind. If she wanted her people to live better and have a higher status, she couldn't refuse Chen Mo's idea.

"Improve my abilities, improve my reputation and status in Mermaid." Chen Mo suddenly became serious and looked straight into the eyes of Arowana: "The higher the status, the greater the right to speak."

"But can I be alone?"

"Don't worry, we will give you support, resources, capital, talent, and technology here to enhance your status in Mermaid. We will arrange all the follow-up plans for what you need to do when your status in Mermaid rises. "

"What about personal strength? I don't know how to fight with armor."

"Don't worry about personal strength. You have an illusory voice that goes deep into your consciousness, but you only use it to sing. I will find a teacher for you who will teach you how to use your abilities correctly."

"Am I very capable?"

"To be precise, in the age of super power, the mermaid's ability is not weak. Do you know why there are so many fans in the universe? And regardless of age. You have the voice that makes all life hallucinogenic. This ability is properly used. It can hypnotize a life and manipulate people's hearts."

Princess Arowana was in a daze, she had never thought about hypnotizing others, let alone manipulating others.

"I have one more gift for you."

Chen Mo beckoned, and a set of fish-scale painted armor appeared in the office. The fish scales are radiant, dreamlike, and the lines are perfect, which fits perfectly with the lines on Princess Arowana.

This is a battle armor designed based on the body data of Arowana Princess.

"This is a special set of armor, it is a super armor."

"Super Armor?"

"Yes, this is the biggest secret of our marching ants right now. You are one of the few people who know and use." Chen Mo said solemnly.

Princess Arowana was shocked, and Chen Mo told her this, indicating that the trust in her was high.

"This kind of battle armor is a super weapon that we are secretly developing, a weapon that enlarges the range of super power. With it, your super power can cover the entire planet."

Princess Arowana froze in place, her mouth opened and she wanted to ask, she couldn't tell.

chapters.title: Chapter 1058: : Hole Cards
chapters.body:
Chapter 1058: : Hole Cards

"What news is there from Ziwei civilization?" Tong Qing asked.

"Developing according to our expectations, the prestige of Zijun is now completely lost. If he does not abdicate, then the Ziwei civilization will go down and there will be no prestige to speak of. If he abdicates, he must choose a candidate.

At present, Fatty Luo is the best choice, but based on my understanding of Fatty Luo, he is not this material. If other candidates cannot convince the crowd, we can support some families to fight, even if they can’t fight, it’s good for us if they mess up. It depends on Zi Junzhi's desire for power. If his desire for power is great enough, Ziwei civilization is no longer a threat. "

Yan's voice carried unparalleled confidence.

"Where is the marching ant?"

Yan shook his head: "They didn't move much. After they won the Sauron Alliance, they turned out to be very low-key, as if digesting the Sauron Alliance's star field. The alliance with the Ten Cities Alliance was opposed by several companies and went bankrupt. There was too much action. It is not excluded that they secretly cooperate with the Ten Cities Alliance."

"Secretly cooperate? Didn't you find it?"

"The Ten Cities Alliance is in charge of the War Department. Ling Xi has a low-key style. He is the nephew of Kahn, the lord of Xi Mo City and the current Ten Cities Alliance leader. The decision of the War Department is up to him and is not controlled by other city owners. Our eyeliner, so if Lingxi contacted the marching ants in private, we would not know."

Yan has always acted cautiously and comprehensively, so Tong Qing is very relieved of him.

"Is the plan of the Ten City Alliance going well?" Hitomi asked.

"The three families of God Disciple, Saint Python, and Hunter went well. Yuelu seems to have been infiltrated by the White Star Civilization. The Luohu tribe is too smart and progresses the slowest. The same goes for Ximo City and Tianlu City. The remaining demon city, Liuli City, and Mermaid City It’s progressing a bit, but the White Star Civilization also moves."

"The three strongest cities are still not easy to deal with." Tong Qing looked helpless.

"This shouldn't be anxious. It's a good thing to make progress now. After vetoing the alliance with the marching ants, Kahn and several other city owners should see some tediousness. If they are anxious, it will be counterproductive."

"Commander-in-chief, marching ants are the one who won't suffer. They are very smart." Tong Qing exclaimed, and then thought for a while and said, "Would you like to put some pressure on the Ten Cities Alliance?"

"It's not right." Yan shook his head without hesitation: "Now they are very nervous. If they are pressured, they have no choice but to hug outside. The three powers of Ximo, Tianlu and Luohu are the Ten City Alliance. If it’s the mainstay, it will take a lot of effort to take it down."

"Then what?" Tong Qing continued to ask.

"Friendship, win over, divide." Yan only said three words.

Three words are enough for Tongqing to understand the meaning.

The tension of the Ten Cities Alliance mainly comes from their threats. If you show favor to them, throw out the idea of alliance, and the threat disappears, the Ten Cities Alliance will not be as united as before.

They can use this to divide the Ten-City Alliance, win over several companies, and then secretly plan the conflicts of interest of several companies, so that they can cause internal conflicts, and wait for their conflicts to increase.

Yan Shen nodded his head with approval: "Leave this to you. On the side of the marching ants, I can't rest assured, Chen Mo, a human being, is too mysterious to let people see the bottom line."

At first, he felt that the marching ant group was too worried about Tongqing. However, as time went on, he discovered that the danger of the marching ant group gradually refreshed his upper limit of knowledge.

Especially after silently annexing the Sauron Alliance, they felt a deep sense of threat.

In theory, the set in the deduction can be applied to any civilization, including their god-level civilization.

The universe system is changing, so they have to be nervous.

After all, Hitomi's ambition is more than simply maintaining the current status of the Black Eye civilization.

...

Now Chen Mo has a few good cards in his hand.

These good cards are the key to their victory.

There is a dark move in the land of chaos, and no one knows that the land of chaos is their arrangement except for the most core high-level army ants.

In addition, Chen Mo's other card is Super Armor.

The current armor and weapons in the universe are all built on technology, only increasing the strength of the armor division. And they are the only force that controls the power armor.

This epoch-making battle armor, once it appears, will surely become a killer.

But Chen Mo now solves some technical problems.

It's not other technologies, but the mass production of ether materials.

Chen Mo spends all day in the research base, dedicated to solving the mass production of ether as soon as possible. Once the problem of mass production of ether substances is solved, the era of super technology has arrived.

In an unknown space in the Milky Way, there is a huge space base floating.

This space base is very special. The entire marching ant group can approach life within ten light-years of this space base, and it can be counted with one slap.

Even the core group of senior leaders in the marching ant group cannot be approached without authorization.

As for the role of this base, no one else knows except for a few people. It is a forbidden area.

At this time, this base is running at full capacity.

"The equipment is debugged."

In the laboratory, Mo Nu turned her head to look at Chen Mo, waiting for his instructions.

"Then start."

Chen Mo gave orders without hesitation.

The special of super power lies in the consciousness of the living body and the genetic structure of the body, and the war armor that amplifies super power naturally requires special materials and technology. The armor is made of ether, so it is very troublesome.

Chen Mo studied for so long, spent a lot of resources and effort, and finally extracted the ether quality, mixed with synthetic materials, only enough to make a hundred sets of super armor. If the problem of mass production of ether is solved, their warhead's ability is enough to sweep all opponents.

In the current main universe, dark matter accounts for about 23%, ordinary matter only accounts for 4%, and the remaining 73% is dark energy, which is universal, but you can't feel its existence.

Ether is a kind of dark energy. This kind of matter exists in every corner of the universe, but it is very difficult to collect.

In the definition of human philosophy, etheric matter is the first most basic element created by the stream of consciousness that composes the space and the spiritual world when it creates the physical phenomenon world.

Everything in the world of material phenomena exists within it, so it is often used as a synonym for "space". In the traditional Chinese philosophy, the definition of "ether" is similar to "chaos."

The nature of the ether is very special. It can be a rigid particle. It is very hard and almost indestructible. It is many times harder than the hardest diamond. At the same time, it is extremely thin. When the matter passes through the ether, you can hardly feel any resistance and Subtract. If the starlight travels hundreds of millions of kilometers, it can still be seen when it reaches the earth.

The strange properties of this substance have created its unimaginable speciality, and it is an incredible existence, so that many scientists question whether its existence is possible.

When extracted successfully, it will be found that the etheric substance is composed of a dark red fluid-like stream of consciousness, forming a spatial fluid with a relatively stable shape.

It has something to do with the fourth dimension, consciousness, and superpower. Even Chen Mo cannot thoroughly study and understand all its attributes. However, it confirmed some of Chen Mo's conjectures that the existing universe may have been formed by the decay of some kind of object in the fourth dimension.

It is impossible to solve all the puzzles, but it does not hinder Chen Mo's application of this substance.

After a long period of research, his gains are not small.

This floating space base is an ether-quality instrument he created.

Space technology is used to confine the space, and the space frequency and amplitude are constantly compressed by interference waves, and the ether is resolved from the space. Finally, the quantum degeneracy technology is used to extract a little bit of the ether and store it in a dark matter container.

Of course, this is Chen Mo's idea.

If this machine is feasible, it can increase the extraction efficiency of ether by tens of thousands of times, and the ether obtained by that time can meet their initial mass production needs.

Whether it will work or not, specific tests are needed.

The machine's startup process was very slow, and Chen Mo was not in a hurry, staring at the changes of various information and data on the holographic screen, thinking about it from time to time.

Four hours later, Chen Mo finally saw that the data reached his ideal level.

Four more hours passed...

"It's done."

Mo Nu's voice was a little joyful, as if it were natural.

chapters.title: Chapter 1059: : Actions Of Black Pupil Civilization
chapters.body:
Chapter 1059: : Actions Of Black Pupil Civilization

Thousand Star Alliance.

Wantianxing has a headache, and the position of the land of a thousand stars is very bad. Caught between the dark forest, the black pupil and the Ziwei civilization, there is now another marching ant.

It can be said that they are a child around the great powers, and if there is a conflict between these forces, they will be helpless in the land of a thousand stars.

The Marching Ant Group quickly won the Sauron Alliance, and the silence of their Thousand Star Land was broken. Now only the Thousand Star Alliance and the Yaoshan Alliance are left, as well as a number of minor alliances.

In short, the Land of Thousand Stars is scattered with sand, surrounded by giant beasts. If there is no countermeasure, their demise is only a matter of time.

At this moment, the sound of the communicator rang.

Seeing the caller ID, Wan Tianxing narrowed his eyes and thought about connecting.

A holographic projection of a female life appeared before his eyes, full of majestic aura, making Wantianxing's heart awe-inspiring. Although he had never touched this life, he was no stranger.

The planner of the dark turmoil in the land of chaos, the queen poisonous girl of the emerging power of the dark star empire, known as the black widow, some time ago, Hoarfrost was assassinated and killed, and the war in the land of chaos has also entered the final stage.

There is no accident, it will not be long before the poisonous girl will become the lord of chaos.

"Leader Wan, contact you suddenly, are you abrupt?" The Poison Skin Girl asked quietly.

Wan Tianxing smiled and said indifferently: "Your Majesty's time to contact me is rare, so why is it abrupt?"

"I have something to discuss with Chief Wan, do you have time?"

"Please say."

"How do Chief Ten Thousand think about the current situation in the universe?" The poisonous girl asked a question unceremoniously: "Or a more detailed question, how do Chief Ten Thousand think about the current situation in the land of a thousand stars?"

Wan Tianxing's eyes flickered slightly, and his expression was a little stiff: "Why does Her Majesty the Queen ask?"

"You should be communicating."

"Speaking of the situation in the universe, anyone with a discerning eye can see that the heroes are fighting for hegemony. As for the land of a thousand stars, I would like to hear the opinion of Her Majesty the Queen." Wan Tianxing did not answer directly, but chose to rub the ball. He didn't know the poisonous girl. The purpose of contacting him.

"As you said, in today's universe, heroes are fighting for hegemony, but does this'male' have the position of ten thousand chiefs?" The question of the poisonous girl is not polite.

"What do you mean? Her Majesty the Queen, please explain." Wan Tianxing's eyes flickered, and he couldn't see any mood.

"Literally, today's Land of Thousand Stars is a pile of scattered sand, especially after the marching ant group annexed the Sauron Alliance, the situation is even more critical.
