Near the black pupil, crape myrtle, dark forest, now there is another marching ant, surrounded by giant beasts, you It should be clear that once the fight is complete, you will not even have the chance to struggle under the iron armor of those giant beasts."

Wan Tianxing was silent, and they knew in their hearts that the poisonous girl was telling the truth. At their level, some things can be understood, and if they continue to play dumb, it will be boring to communicate again.

"In fact, we are facing the same situation as you in the chaotic land, close to the White Star, Thor, and Black Eye. Therefore, this time contacting Chief Ten thousand is an important matter."

"Your Majesty, please speak." Wan Tianxing thought about it, guessing some signs from a few words, but was not sure.

"We are all caught in the gap between many overlords. If we continue to fight separately, the final result will be annexed by them. In that case, why don't we join forces and reach an alliance?

The two of us have formed an alliance. The strength and size are second only to the many hegemons of the universe. It is restored to the grand status of the Thousand Star Empire. It is also a Nebula Alliance. In the cosmic heroes' battle for hegemony, we may not be unable to hold a place. What do you say? "The poisonous woman said.

Living in the dark for a long time has allowed her to see countless unknown darkness. Similarly, her control of life's desires has reached a certain point. She is confident that Wantianxing will not refuse this condition.

Wan Tianxing's eyes skyrocketed.

Any force in the Land of Thousand Stars wants to unify the Land of Thousand Stars and restore the strength of the previous Thousand Star Civilization, but they have no intentions.

I have to say that the condition of the poisonous girl is too tempting. In the troubled times, he naturally has the ambition to dominate the universe, but his strength does not allow it, now it is an opportunity.

"I am willing. Other alliances in the Land of Thousand Stars may not be willing."

"Now the land of chaos is in my hands. Once we form an alliance, it will be a small behemoth. Other civilizations agree, we welcome, and we disagree, and we swallow it. The two places are unified, and then we will have the capital to speak."

Wan Tianxing narrowed his eyes.

He admitted that he was moved.

...

The technological breakthrough in the initial mass production of the ethereum made Chen Mo very happy and could not wait to laugh out loud.

Ether quality! Super armor!

Power armor production? That scene was extremely sour.

Thinking of the future with a group of fully-armed super-power armored soldiers, they will be rampant in the universe.

Mortals, tremble.

The whole universe is still playing traditional battle armor technology, and they have already begun to prepare for scale replacement of super battle armor!

The initial mass production of Ether made Chen Mo high-spirited and continued to focus on the research of the "Hand of God" project. Once this technology succeeds, they will not be afraid of any forces.

And soon after Chen Mo was happy, there was a news.

"The messenger of the Black Eye Civilization, went to the Ten Cities Alliance to meet with the lord of the Ten Cities Alliance." Zhu He told Chen Mo intelligence: "Black Eye gave the conditions and is willing to make an alliance with the Ten Cities Alliance and form an alliance, and promised Gifts and sales of dark matter and other resources, and if the White Star civilization invades, they can send troops to fight together. But the condition is that the Ten City Alliance must interrupt all cooperation with the marching ants, and when they are at war with us, the Ten City Alliance must declare war with us. The alliance is about one hundred years."

"All city owners?" Chen Mo asked with frowning.

"Yes."

"And then? What happened?"

"It's not clear for the time being, but it's certain that some of them agreed."

"Tongqing can't sit still?" Chen Mo murmured.

Sure enough, as Zhu He's intelligence said, before long, within the Ten Cities Alliance, the conditions and news of the alliance with the Black Eye Civilization spread, and there was a cheer in the Ten Cities Alliance.

Is it good for black pupil civilization or marching ants?

There is no doubt that the Black Eye Civilization is the most powerful force at present, the old god-level civilization, and friendship with them is undoubtedly the best choice.

In fact, the ten city owners of the Ten Cities Alliance are also arguing over this matter.

"What do you think about the Black Eye Civilization?" Kahn looked around at the major City Lords on the round table, and there was nothing more to say.

Between the two forces, they must weigh the pros and cons.

The City Lord of God Disciple thought for a while and said: "I think it is feasible. We form an alliance with the marching ants, the purpose is to resist the black pupil and the white star. Now the black pupil is willing to sign the covenant with us, and also promised to help us defend the white star. Ants are better, and there is a hundred years of peace."

"I also agree that for a hundred years of peace, maybe the universe will restore the peaceful environment again and start a new era of universe alliance. At that time, our Ten Cities Alliance will still be able to survive." This time a rough humanoid spoke. , With dark muscles, this is the lord of Hunter City.

Kahn was not surprised that he could say these things, but these people are still a little self-aware, knowing that they are just to survive, not to say things like fighting for the universe.

"What about you?" Kahn looked at the other City Lords.

"I object."

The City Lord of Yuelu City was the first to object, and Kahn gave him a deep look.

"I don't agree." The mermaid clan chief in the seat also shook his head.

"I don't agree here." The City Lord Demon Luo also spoke.

The three people objected, making the eager atmosphere in the conference room instantly cold. Several other city owners on the field looked at the three in a daze, and after holding back for a long time, they said, "Why?"

"Have you never thought about how the black pupil civilization would tear up the covenant once the marching ants died?" Ling Xi said suddenly, obviously, he also opposed it.

"But...but..."

The city lord of Shentuo City, but for a long time, could not tell a reason.

Believe that the black pupil civilization will abide by the covenant? He can believe it, but the others on the court will not believe it. When this kind of agreement is signed, they cannot be invalidated because they will be punished by Black Eye, but when Black Eye is invalidated, they have nothing to do with each other.

In the history of the development of cosmic civilization, this kind of tearing up the covenant abounds, and there are even countless ways to tear it openly.

"Do you still want to form an alliance with marching ants? Do you know that they also have joint command. We are their shield to resist the black-pupil civilization, and now, we don’t have to resist the black-pupil civilization and the white star civilization. It is also an alliance. , Why do we believe the marching ants and not the black pupil?" The voice of the Lord of the Hunter City was a little excited.

For a while, the meeting room fell into dead silence.

"I still don't agree." A firm voice sounded, Ling Xi's expression did not change much.

"why?"

"From the perspective of allies, the marching ants are more reliable than the black eyes. The marching ants are threatened with extinction like us. Without us, he will face the attacks of the two god-level civilizations. If they betray this covenant, they will not get it. Good, I have to die.

And the black pupil civilization betrays this covenant, they can divide us and the marching ants, take the marching ants first, turn back to tear the covenant, and then take us. The price paid for winning the two top power star domains was just a little reputation.

Two star regions and one fame, how would Hitomi choose? What if he finds a legitimate excuse to tear up the covenant? Don't even lose reputation. Do you think you are born to fall pie? "

chapters.title: Chapter 1060: : Wings Fanned By A Small Butterfly
chapters.body:
Chapter 1060: : Wings Fanned By A Small Butterfly

Due to the promotion of the Black Eye Civilization and other parties, the Zidi Massacre of the Ziwei Civilization became more intense.

Zi Junzhi has lost his prestige in the Ziwei civilization. Almost all ordinary people are opposed to Zi Junzhi's continued role as star master. Even in the military warhead, there are some voices.

Especially the people who were left behind by the family factions who were slaughtered, the reaction was the most intense.

A star master who has lost his prestige makes the management of the Ziwei civilization more difficult.

In addition to opposing Zi Junzhi, one more thing has also become the focus of outside attention.

Who will inherit the position of Zijunzhi and become the new star master of Ziwei civilization?

The situation of Ziwei civilization is different from that of the outside world. The prestigious families of the older generation were all uprooted by Zidi, almost cutting off their blood. Therefore, after Zijun stepped down, no one in the older generation was suitable for the position of star master.

So only find suitable candidates among the younger generation.

The loudest voice was naturally Fat Zi Luoluo, who was the commander-in-chief of the war department. However, Fatty Luo has not appeared in public since the news spread, let alone expressed any attitude to the outside world.

The main star of Ziwei, Zi Yun's expression is cold, maintaining the same expression as before.

"How are you thinking about it?"

The look of Zijun in front of her was serious, but compared with the last time she appeared, Zijunzhi at this time had a lot more tired face, a lot of weight loss and old figure. Obviously, the events of this period made him Physically and mentally exhausted.

Zi Yun shook her head without answering.

"Now that the critical time is reached, you are the most suitable candidate. For the sake of crape myrtle, I can bear infamy." Zijun's voice was determined: "Unless you want to watch crape myrtle perish."

Zi Yun became quiet, did not speak, obviously a little loose.

Let her watch the crape myrtle perish, obviously not what she wants to see.

"If there is a way, I don't want to put pressure on you. The status quo of Ziwei is like this. It is rotten to the root, but it has not yet reached the point where it is dying and can be remedied." Zi Junzhi's face was low with guilt and regret.

"Why me?" Zi Yun said coldly.

"Ziluo is an excellent general. Although Zizhong has a good talent, he ignores world affairs. Among the younger generation, you are the most suitable candidate."

"Fatty is more suitable than me."

"Zi Luo has enough prestige, but his strength is not strong, and his administrative ability is insufficient. He is an excellent general, not an excellent leader. He also recommends you to come up, as long as you agree, I will help you arrange everything behind.

All power is in your hands, and you can do whatever you want. Even if the Ziwei civilization perishes in your hands, I have no complaints. I didn't have a choice before, but now I still don't have a choice. "Zi Jun's voice has a deep sense of powerlessness.

"Do I have a choice?" Zi Yun's voice finally fluctuates.

...

Sommy looked at the room in front of him, feeling very unfounded.

He is just an ordinary life. Since he was a child, he has lived on an inconspicuous small planet in the constellation of Pisces Cetus. Since the promotion of super power, his life has changed a lot.

He successfully entered the Super Power Academy and joined the life group of super power development.

Since entering the Super Academy, he has successfully developed super powers. Days are getting better every day. He can feel the changes in his body and brain. Although the training courses are very hard, no one has an opinion, because the ability to develop super powers is an evolution for ordinary life. Super energy development can complete the evolution that their ancestors could not complete for tens of millions of years, or even hundreds of millions of years.

Moreover, the teaching level of Super Academy is many times higher than their original academy.

Many of their classmates are training frantically, comparing themselves to being a member of the ants, advanced super powers, hoping to join the Legion War Head in the future to serve the marching ants.

All of their lives have infinite visions for the future.

At this moment, they received a notice from the Super Academy that they were admitted by the marching ants and went to receive a special training camp.

Special training?

The students who were named were very puzzled, but they asked all the lives and never heard of this special training. Even the dean of the Super Academy did not disclose the content.

In the marching ant star field, especially the super academy, they are proud to join the marching ants, because the marching ants have changed their destiny. Similarly, the marching ant war department is a gathering place for the strong.

After careful consideration, Somi chose to join the training camp.

He knew that this was an opportunity to make himself stronger. If he doesn't come, he may stay in a small galaxy for the rest of his life, or become a member of all living beings.

His life is inconspicuous in the universe, it is better to make his life a little more exciting.

Soomi was taken aback when he stepped into the room.

All the eyes on the field are on him, there are ten pairs, and the eyes are very sharp.

Somi was a little nervous, because the people sitting opposite were all the lives of the marching ant warfare department, and they were all wearing marching ant armed camouflage uniforms. Although he knew this was the selection of the marching ant army, he was still a little nervous.

At this moment, Sommy was somewhat restrained and did not dare to move.

"Don't be nervous, please sit down, what's your name?"

"My name is Suomi, Suohe Star." Suomi said truthfully.

"Well, let's ask first, your superpower?"

"I can let the flowers and plants wilt, and the little stones will weather." Somi hurriedly said.

"You will show it." It was Zhong Lei who was talking, and asked someone to bring a pot of flowers and a stone to Somi. This time the instructor asked him to take charge of the selection. Although they were all rookies, he also knew the importance of this task.

Suomi sat in a somewhat cramped position, holding the small flower pot with both hands, his attention began to concentrate, and the cramps on his body slowly disappeared. After a while, the flower bone quickly withered and faded, and then, the withered flower slowly returned to its original appearance.

Upon seeing this, several interviewers on the court looked solemn and looked at Zhong Lei. They are well-informed and have realized the special features of this super power.

"What type of superpower do you personally think?" Zhong Lei asked.

"Type?" Sommy thought about it for a moment, then said with a little confidence: "It should be related to time."

Zhong Lei did not deny, but slightly nodded: "I will first tell you what it means to join this project. This project is a super fighter project. Your joining means that you will become a member of the special super fighter of the marching ants. Do you know what to pay?"

Sommy pondered for a while before speaking, "Loyal."

He is not stupid. Loyalty is the most basic and important thing of a fighter.

"Your answer is very good. Now I invite you to join us. Once you join us, your relatives will be treated as military members. Of course, to become a super fighter, you must be mentally prepared because the training is very hard and very hard. Special, but you will become very powerful, and at the same time you have to pay what you call loyalty." Zhong Lei said.

Sommy suddenly became a little excited.

In the army ants, the treatment of the army is the best, and the welfare is much stronger than the average life. Whether in life or other aspects, there will be special conveniences. This is one of the reasons why countless lives want to join the army ants.

What's more, he can become stronger.

"I'm willing to join." Soomi seemed to be afraid of Zhong Lei's regret, and excitedly agreed.

The truth of the universe makes the life at the bottom feel alive like worms. In order to change their destiny, they have an unparalleled desire and pursuit of power, and he is one of them.

Suomi followed the soldiers to leave, and the interviewers next to him looked at Zhong Lei with excitement. What Suomi said just now is correct. His abilities are related to time. They interviewed many lives, but'Time Superpower' was the first.

They have seen countless lives with super powers, the proportion of time super powers is extremely rare, not extremely rare, but almost none, so far, there is only Somi.

Because it is so special.

"Head, do you want to report to Master Lan?" a subordinate asked.

"Well, report to Master Lan and the boss." Zhong Lei nodded and said.

Since the Super War Armor came out, the boss has asked them to prepare for the Super War Department.

Super War Department.

This kind of warhead has never appeared before.

The project he is responsible for involves the most secret super-power technology of the marching ants, and the degree of emphasis can be imagined. But the super warhead needs some special super powers, super powers that are conducive to combat, especially combat in space.

Among the tens of thousands of super powers, only a small part of the super powers are conducive to combat, so they will start this selection. The purpose is to select super talents suitable for super warfare and concentrate them in the super war department.

In particular, the boss told them that the mass production technology of Super Battle Armor had made breakthroughs, and when the project needed to be accelerated, the core senior management of the combat department was shocked, and their admiration for the boss deepened once more.

Hearing that they were going to report to the boss, all the interviewers looked shocked and became extremely serious.

Suomi never dreamed that his humble appearance, like the wings fanned by a small butterfly, would have a big impact on the back.

chapters.title: Chapter 1061: : Time Super
chapters.body:
Chapter 1061: : Time Super

"Brother Mo, Zhong Lei sent a message saying: They found a life suspected of possessing time superpower." Mo Nu suddenly interrupted Chen Mo who was studying the'Hand of God' project.

"Oh?"

Originally, he concentrated on studying Chen Mo, but suddenly stopped, his eyebrows slightly raised.

"Time superpower?"

"That's what his news said, it's just suspicion, because he couldn't officially confirm it when it first appeared, and it's not ruled out that it is the super power of mind." Mo Girl played the video that Zhong Lei had sent.

It is the scene where Soomi participated in the selection.

The flowers in the pots bloom and fall under Soomi's control.

This scene shocked Chen Mo's spirits.

If understood according to the ability of time, this scene is indeed a bit similar.

It is not excluded that it is the ability of mind, because the super power of mind can also do this kind of scene. Chen Mo's mind can do the same thing, but the essence of the two abilities is not the same.

Time gives all things the prosperity, prosperity and decline, and the mind cannot be restored.

Suomi's ability is very weak, the range is very small, and now it is just a video, Chen Mo can't really determine whether his ability is time superpower.

The power of time is very mysterious, and even now Chen Mo has not grasped the mystery. He has been looking for a way to control time, but he has no clue.

"Where is this Suomi now?" Chen Mo asked.

"He was selected into the Super War Department. As a member of the Super War Department, he is now training at the base." Mo Nui waved her palm lightly, and the scene of Suomi's training appeared on the holographic platform.

"Contact Zhong Lei and arrange for me to see him."

Chen Mo wasn't sure if this was time superpower, but he felt anxious. This kind of strong feeling has not appeared for a long time. He even felt that the appearance of this feeling had something to do with the science and technology library.

He has a hunch that if it is really time superpower, maybe he can find the secret of the next mission of the Science and Technology Library.

"Okay." Mo Nu immediately dialed Zhong Lei's communication.

...

Somi was deeply shocked for the first time. He knew that he was joining a super warfare and he was about to become one of them, but when Zhenzhen came to the training base, he was still shocked.

Due to the special nature of the training camp, their training base is on a planet without intelligent life.

This is easy to understand, the reason for confidentiality.

He was surprised when he saw these players.

Superpowers such as space, object control, gold control, mind, illusion, and mind reading appear on the members of this base, and their super power level is not weak.

After the advent of the super power era, the major civilizations in the universe have classified super powers. When he was in the academy, he had known the types of super powers. The things he saw at the base were some special superpowers, once they grew up, they were very powerful.

Sommy, who was already a little unsure, is even more unsure now.

But after the surprise, Soomi quickly sank into training.

The training facilities at the base are very good, and there are also machine-assisted training. Somi can even feel that his superpower is growing. During the training process, the instructors will also organize their members to exchange their own experience in the super advanced process, and share the methods and training methods of super advanced.

Soomi, who had just come in, immediately fell in love with the training atmosphere.

Suomi, who didn't know how to make her super advanced before, began to feel it slowly. Super ability grows rapidly, and given time, one might not be a super master.

"Somi, you stop."

The sound of the earphones rang, making Sommy stunned and immediately stopped the training in his hands: "Instructor, what's the matter?"

"You come with me." The instructor who trained superpower waved to him, motioning for him to follow.

On the way, Soomi looked puzzled.

Since he entered the base, he has not made any mistakes and training has never failed. Why did the instructor suddenly look for him?

Is it because he is too weak and will soon be kicked out of the team?

Thinking of this, Sommy became nervous. He only came to the base for a few days. Every time he trains, he doesn't say the hardest one, but there is absolutely no laziness. He can feel his progress, but it doesn't take two days to become stronger It can be successful.

Sommy was thinking to himself, but thinking that he might be eliminated and left, he was a bit bitter.

"Why is this expression?" the instructor who led him asked. His name is Guris, a soldier who was transferred back from the front line. At first, he was reluctant to leave the front line. However, after knowing the importance of this project, he did not refuse, and came here as one of the many instructors. member.

"Instructor, why are you taking me over now?" Somi asked weakly.

"Good thing."

"Good thing?" Sommy let go of his heart. "I thought I was going to be driven."

"If you come in, no one will be opened until the training is officially over. Don't worry. Unless you make a major mistake, you won't be too bad in the future." Gu Ruisi's voice was a little envious: "This is a good thing, I I want to have this opportunity."

"What's that?"

"You'll know when you get there."

Before long, the two stopped in front of the laboratory in the base.

"go in."

Suomi couldn't think of a reason, so he opened the door and went in. The moment he saw the situation inside the door clearly, he froze in place, like a clay figure.

...

"Hello!" Chen Mo saw Somi restrained and spoke first.

Sommy was extremely nervous, he did not expect that the boss was here. How many have joined the lives of marching ants, how many have wanted to see the boss with their own eyes, but never had a chance.

He didn't expect that not long after he joined, he would see the boss so close.

And the boss greeted him like a dream.

No wonder the instructor said this is a good thing.

Guris moved him, and he woke up like a dream, and hurriedly said, "Boss."

"How about training at the base?" Chen Mo motioned for him to sit down.

Somi, who was given instructions, sat on the opposite side somewhat restrained, not knowing what to do. At this moment, many thoughts flashed in his mind, but he still didn't understand why the boss would come to him.

"Fortunately, I really like the current training environment." Somi said truthfully.

"Your ability is very special?" Chen Mo cut into the subject: "Time is involved?"

Hearing Chen Mo's words, Suomi immediately understood why the boss came to him. It was about his ability. He thought for a while and said, "This...I personally feel that it involves time."

"Can you show me your ability?" Chen Mo asked.

"Yes." Sommy agreed without hesitation.

To be able to show his abilities to the boss is the pursuit of almost all marching Ant-Man. For them, this is an honor, and he has no reason to reject this honor.

"Here is a flower, a radish, a glass of water, and a miniature atomic clock. Use your power to cover it and change it." Chen Mo placed four objects on the table and asked Soomi to show them.

"it is good."

Sommy did not refuse, and sat down at the table, holding his palms empty, focusing on a few items on the table.

At the moment the effect took effect, all four things on the table changed.

The flowers bloomed and the radishes quickly withered and decayed. The glass of water was disappearing at a speed visible to the naked eye from slow to fast, and the time beating on the atomic clock was dizzying.

All changes only show one problem, the above time field is changing.

This is really about the ability of time.

The next moment, Chen Mo, who was sitting on the side, changed suddenly.

The science and technology library, which had been silent for a long time, was moving again.

chapters.title: Chapter 1062: : News Of The
chapters.body:
Chapter 1062: : News Of The

The Science and Technology Library has been silent for so many years since he completed the development of quantum life.

Chen Mo had thought of countless ways to try to trigger the movement of the Science and Technology Library and complete its final task. However, even if he tried harder, he still could not trigger this task.

Later, Chen acquiesced that he needed to continuously develop his quantum body's abilities and control the true abilities of this body in order to trigger the task of the science and technology library. But over the years, he has continued to grow stronger and his abilities have increased and he has still failed to touch the science and technology library.

Until now, the emergence of time ability.

At the moment there was movement in the Science and Technology Library, Chen Mo understood.

The trigger condition may require him to master the time ability, combine with his existing space ability, and control time and space.

Life in the fourth dimension is related to the existing space-time dimensions of the universe.

Only in charge of the two most important abilities of time and space and consciousness can he be qualified to become a true fourth-dimensional life.

At this moment, all the questions became clear in Chen Mo's mind.

He had thought about this reason before, but the ability of time has not been explored, so he has not confirmed this idea. Now after seeing Somme show his ability of time, his idea has been confirmed.

He is right.

Chen Mo looked at Suomi with fiery eyes, as if looking at his long-lost lover.

Even Suomi noticed the difference in Chen Mo's eyes and became unnatural. Does the boss have any special hobbies? Thinking of this, Sommy's heart fluttered.

If it does, he will be miserable.

"Brother Mo." Seeing Chen Mo's appearance, Mo Nu whispered softly beside him.

In an instant, Chen Mo woke up.

Realizing that he was out of shape, he also smiled embarrassedly: "I just saw your ability demonstration and figured out a key issue of the experiment. I was a little out of shape."

Hearing these words, Sommy was completely relieved.

It turns out that I figured out the experimental subject, and this can understand why the boss's eyes were so hot. Many researchers have figured out the key technical issues, and the state is much crazier than the boss.

But the boss is still a great scientist, so Sommy admires him.

Regardless of the old age or the new age, there is a professional job that is the most difficult, that is, a researcher with the most cutting-edge technology. They are groping for something unknown and need a very powerful brain.

And their boss is such a life, which is also one of the reasons why the lives of many marching ant star domains worship Chen Mo.

Realizing that his ability display helped the boss, Sommy's mood suddenly became happy.

"Your abilities are a bit special and may be helpful to one of my experiments, so I ask you, would you like to join this experiment and help me research this project? The experiment will not be dangerous, but it will involve your privacy." Chen Mo said .

Hearing that his privacy was involved, Sommy hesitated: "Is the project important?"

"It's very important, it's about the future of the marching ants." Chen Mo looked at Sommy's eyes and said seriously.

"Okay." Sommy gritted his teeth, isn't it just privacy, it doesn't matter.

...

In the main hall of the star, Zi Yun stared at the location of the hall in a daze.

This is the symbol of the supreme power of the oldest god-level civilization.

"Are you sure you think about it?" A thick voice came from behind, and Fatty Luo took a meaty leg, and the sleepy youth Zi Zhong came in, with questions and concerns in their calm eyes.

As the high-level of Ziwei civilization, their natural way, Zi Yun's decision, means to herself and what to bear.

"I have no choice." Zi Yun shook her head, her cold voice added a rare warmth.

"No one has a choice. Most of the time, fate helps him choose." Fatty Luo bit off a piece of meat in his hand and said while eating: "I have arranged everything, and the star owner is willing to cooperate. As long as you are sure, you will board. Go to this throne and leave the rest to me and Zizhong. From now on, the Ziwei civilization will be yours. Even if you package it and send it out, we won't have any opinions."

Zi Yun showed a rare wry smile: "I did consider giving it away."

"This is your business. If you are really ready to take over, you must be mentally prepared. You will no longer be you, but the star master of the Ziwei civilization. Your decision may be related to a god-level inherited for hundreds of millions of years. The survival of civilization." Fatty Luo reminded.

"Ok."

Zi Yun nodded slightly, walked towards the throne, swept the skirt and sat on it. At this moment, Zi Luo's body was straight and his face was solemn; even the drooping eyes of the dozing young man became piercing, and he bowed to Zi Yun slightly.

"According to your plan, act." Zi Yun closed her eyes, her voice returned to the coldness as before, with sadness hidden.

The contradictions within the Ziwei civilization are getting bigger and bigger, and the black pupil civilization almost unabashedly puts pressure on it, and the outside world is watching how the Ziwei civilization will respond, but a world-class movement is indeed brewing.

When the outside world did not know where the Ziwei civilization should go, Zi Yun stood up.

Zi Yun launched a coup and ousted Zi Junzhi. This decision was supported by Zi Luo. After that, Zi Yun released a live broadcast of a full Ziwei civilization speech.

In the speech, Zi Yun told the guilt of the top ten families and the old nobles. At the same time, she denounced that Zi Junzhi did not use legal means to punish the ten families, but colluded with the Zidi and massacred the ten families.

Then, Zi Yun announced all the factual evidence, showing the bad guilt of the top ten families and the means of oppressing the bottom life, and at the same time announced the punishment of Zi Jun's collusion with the crape myrtle sinner.

And Zi Junzhi also publicly admitted his crimes.

Zi Yun then began to preach the current status of the universe and the current status of the Ziwei civilization. The inside of the crape myrtle civilization is clear, but no one has said clearly that today’s crape myrtle civilization is at the lowest point in history. If they are as muddled as before, they may become the second meditation civilization, calling on the citizens of the crape myrtle civilization to unite and relax. Anger.

Finally, Zi Yun publicly condemned the Black Pupil civilization for planning this chaos, openly disrupting the internal affairs and order of the Ziwei civilization, and at the same time announced that it would clean up the internal traitors within the Ziwei civilization and announced that it would counter the Black Pupil civilization.

At the end of the speech, the universe was in an uproar.

The senior officials of Ziwei civilization have heard of the name Ziyun, but the outside world has not heard much.

However, after Zi Yun was made public, her information was quickly dug up.

The most talented woman in Ziwei civilization has held a variety of important positions and completed various difficult tasks perfectly. Among the younger generation, her prestige is very high. Including her deeds in Shi Gan Xing and Tian Xing stele are also mentioned.

Soon, the anger of ordinary people in the Ziwei civilization towards Zijunzhi was extinguished by Zi Yun's passionate speech. Zi Yun also took this opportunity to order people to publicly try the high-level internal traitors who colluded with the black pupil civilization and divert the people's conflicts.

Zi Luo took advantage of Chen Bing's black pupil civilization boundary star region, and for a time, the two god-level civilizations were at war.

After a series of actions, all the Ziwei people were indignant. Zi Yun received the support of many young people, and some young and energetic youths began to openly demand a war on the black pupil civilization.

The contradictions within the Ziwei civilization are gradually being resolved.

The Ziwei civilization put the emotional vent on the body of the black pupil civilization, coupled with the fierce response from the people, and Zi Yun deliberately induced the contradiction to this.

Thus, the battle began.

Zi Yun asked Tongqing to step down on the grounds that the Black Eye Civilization had blatantly disturbed their national security, and issued a statement of war against the Black Eye Civilization.

On the same day, Zi Luo launched an attack on the Black Eye Wen star domain, and won 28 galaxies.

As soon as the news came out, life in the universe was shocked.

The two god-level civilizations are at war.

The oldest god-level civilization and the strongest god-level civilization currently.

Tell outsiders by various means.

The Ziwei civilization has changed!

The situation of Ziwei civilization has changed from the chaos at the beginning to the unanimous outside world today. This oldest civilization unites again, how terrifying is the energy displayed? No life dares to underestimate the crape myrtle civilization, nor is it qualified to underestimate the oldest god-level civilization that created the War Armor era and survived to this day.

But now is the age of super power, even if the Ziwei civilization is powerful, it may not be able to replicate the flourishing age of super civilization.

After that, it was surprising that Zi Yun appointed the sleeper Zizhong in the legend of Ziwei civilization as the chief administrative officer, responsible for the highest administrative power of Ziwei civilization.

This decision makes the outside world very puzzled, is Zi Yun no one available?

But they shut up soon.

Before Zizhong was downplaying it, he issued several administrative orders to fully build a super academy within the Ziwei civilization, abolish the previous regulation of entering the core high-level bloodline, and promote several non-Ziwei civilization pure blood lives to be treated.

The attention of the civilized Ziwei people diverted again, and the disordered internal order began to recover. After this time, the outside world knew how talented this seemingly lazy young man was.

After Ziyun came to power, the high-level Ziwei civilization changed again. Except for a few old high-levels, most of the high-levels of the Zijun faction were cleared.

The senior members of the Ziwei civilization have become younger and show surprising vitality.

No one dared to question Zi Yun's ability as the star master.

Especially after the ten major families and some old nobles were eliminated, the emerging families hope to fill some of the gaps and gain some benefits, so they have to do their best to support Zi Yun.

Resolve crises, transfer contradictions, maintain internal stability, and counter opponents.

After a lot of thunderous methods, the originally precarious crape myrtle civilization was surprisingly alleviated, and there was even a momentum of ZTE.

chapters.title: Chapter 1063: : The Gate Of Parallel Time And Space
chapters.body:
Chapter 1063: : The Gate Of Parallel Time And Space

Science and Technology Library.

After seeing Somi's abilities, Chen Mo sensed some changes in the Science and Technology Library, so he came in and took a look.

The tall bookshelves of the past are still there, displayed in rows, extending to infinity.

The science and technology ball in the center of the Science and Technology Library was still there. After Chen Mo came in, it fell from above and hovered in front of him.

Since obtaining the permission of [Technology Administrator·God], the ball in the center of the Science and Technology Library has turned into a soft transparent color. After that, even if it became a quantum life, there has been no change, and the entire Science and Technology Library has not reappeared. Variety.

Chen Mo has been looking for a way to the next stage of tasks, but could not find any clues.

It wasn't until the emergence of'time superpower' that the science and technology library changed again. The brilliance flow inside the science and technology sphere became much faster, and the light spots formed a vein, like a universe.

Following an impulse in his heart, Chen Mo reached out and touched the technology ball.

In the next moment, things happen suddenly.

The colorful light in the science and technology sphere skyrocketed, and the whole science and technology library vibrated slightly.

Upon seeing this, Chen Mo's eyebrows moved and he was slightly happy.

There has been no movement in the Science and Technology Library for a long time. I did not expect that this time there will be movement. This is a welcome change.

The tall bookshelves in the front changed, and the tall bookshelves began to move. An avenue leads to the depths of the Science and Technology Library, with 100-meter-high bookshelves on both sides, coldly revealing brilliance, which has never changed.

In the next moment, I saw the colorful science and technology **** in front of me, shooting like bullets, and flying along the avenue to the depths of the deep science and technology library.

Chen Mo was taken aback for a moment, then raised his eyes to the new avenue of the Science and Technology Library.

Standing in the middle of the avenue, there is a sense of infinite loneliness and desolation, as if the road in front of you is an endless river of time. Stepping forward, he could clearly hear the footsteps, echoing between the bookshelves, step by step towards the front.

I don't know how long I have been walking, it seems to be a minute, it seems to be a long time, Chen Mo is on the avenue, without the concept of time, this feeling is special.

Suddenly, Chen Mo stopped, and there was a door in front of him.

Chen Mo feels that this gate is similar to the gate of the Science and Technology Library, but the texture is quite different. The texture is like a certain material, and has a special law.

The texture on the door changes anytime and anywhere.

Chen Mo is no stranger to this door.

When the science and technology library changed and the authority was elevated, a piece of information about the ‘door’ flashed in his mind, which was in the depths of the science and technology library.

He once asked Elder Shu what was behind the door, but unfortunately he didn't get the answer, but let him explore it himself.

Now, this door really appeared.

This should be the highest secret and mission of the science and technology library.

Be mentally prepared, Chen Mo reached out and pushed the door.

Huh?

The next moment, Chen Mo was stunned.

He didn't touch anything, his palm pierced through the door and reached the back of the door without any resistance. Chen Mo tried to step forward, but found that the front was the infinite extension of the Science and Technology Library, and the gate was behind him.

what happened?

A huge question flashed through Chen Mo's mind.

Turning his head, Chen Mo reached out and touched the door again, but he still couldn't reach it.

The door in front of him seemed to be in another parallel time and space, close at hand, but never touched, even without any resistance. Chen Mo tried again, and the effect was the same.

Is it necessary to master the power of time and space to touch this door?

It can only be for this reason.

Because the appearance of this door is related to time.

After a few more attempts, Chen Mo gave up.

The door does seem to be in parallel time and space, or in the time dimension, Chen Mo still cannot escape the dimensional constraints, and cannot touch the space parallel to the existing dimensions.

Wait for the ability to control time, master all three abilities of time, space, and consciousness, and come here to unlock the mission behind this door.

I am afraid that the difficulty of this task will not be too low.

...

Somi followed Mo Nu into the laboratory. It was the first time he came to the laboratory.

The ordinary life of marching ants does not know the existence of this laboratory.

The laboratory looks very concise, all in a technological style.

Especially in the laboratory, there are all kinds of unknown machinery and equipment, and some text symbols that he can't understand, but he also knows that those are equations that he also studied.

He has heard the legend of the boss. The boss brought the marching ants out in the laboratory.

Now he has come to the place where the boss works, which is the core and most secret position.

The boss was waiting for him in the laboratory, his face was very good, it should be a happy event, but when he saw Chen Mo, he was still a little nervous.

"How does my laboratory feel?" Chen Mo asked.

"I don't understand," Sommy said.

The boss is also the object of his admiration. When he comes into contact with the legendary characters so close, although the boss is very peaceful and has no arrogance, he still hasn't let go.

"I don't understand normality. This is my super power laboratory. I study super powers and understandable life in the universe. I can count them in one slap." Chen Mo said: "About this experiment, Mo Girl will follow Did you say it?"

"Yeah, I said it all." Soomi was shocked when he heard that the boss could replicate his abilities.

What a terrifying ability to replicate the ability of others. Moreover, the boss has multiple abilities in the limited record. If he can replicate multiple abilities without restriction, he is a god.

"Copying your abilities will not damage your own abilities. It may also speed up your abilities. So there is no need to be nervous in the process, just the brain consciousness that I need to watch. So in the process, it is inevitable to watch To your privacy.

In this regard, I will compensate you. Your family, including your future wife, will unconditionally develop abilities for them. In addition, you can make a request to me, within the scope of my ability, without harming the great interests of the marching ants, I will try my best to satisfy you. "

"No, I don't really need it." Sommy waved his hand hurriedly: "It is an honor for me to be helpful to the boss. And my ability is also developed by the pharmacy given by the Super Academy founded by the group. This is yours. Mine, otherwise I am just one of countless ordinary beings in the universe."

"I speak up. If you have any difficulties or needs in the future, you will find me with this sign." Chen Mo gave Soomi a special synthetic metal sign: "If you can't find me, you can find the president, and she can help. You, you don’t need to, and leave to your children and grandchildren also count."

"thank you boss."

So Mi stopped being hypocritical, and carefully took over the sign Chen Mo gave him.

The brand does not see the material, but it is a bit heavy. It feels cold to the touch. It is decorated with the logo of the marching ant group, and behind it is the signature of Chen Mo. It is very simple but very meaningful.

If you tell a friend that this is a gift from the boss, you will probably be envious.

And this token means that he can get a promise from the boss, and the degree of value is self-evident.

"Not much polite remarks, it's time to get to the point, are you ready?"

"Ready." Sommy nodded firmly.

"Wait, you can release your abilities as much as you want, and then leave the rest alone, stop when you are tired."

Chen Mo took him to a chair and sat down with two sensors attached to his forehead.

"Don't be nervous, try to relax, feel peeped, and don't resist. I will connect your brain consciousness. In this process, you can see your memory and feel the changes in your superpower."

His super power level is above the planet level, much higher than Somi, and Somi resists, and he can see it. It's just that if you resist violently, it may hurt Soomi's own brain.

"Good." Sommy nodded seriously.

These Mo girls have all told him.

Chen Mo also walked behind him, placing his palm on his brain.

"it has started."

chapters.title: Chapter 1064: : The Horror Of Time Superpower
chapters.body:
Chapter 1064: : The Horror Of Time Superpower

Time superpower is very special. Chen Mo is immersed in it, hoping to see the fluctuations in it.

The fluctuation is very special, and Chen Mo has a feeling of being on the time axis.

This feeling is very special. The last time this feeling appeared was when I copied Xiaoyu's super power.

So Mi's attention is on the flowers and plants in the laboratory, controlling the growth of the flowers and plants.

Chen Mo can clearly see the atomic movement trajectory of flowers and plants.

In his eyes, it’s not right. In Somi’s eyes, the flowers and plants he sees are like watching a movie. He can adjust the timeline at any time. Every time the timeline is'adjusted', the plant will bloom and wither. , Grow and fall leaves, and then grow up little by little.

The objective existence of time is formed by the movement and change of matter and then felt by consciousness.

Time superpower is similar to mind power, but the essence is different.

The power of mind can control the change and movement of matter, but it does not change according to the law of its motion in the future. The power of mind is not time superpower.

Mind power is the use of external forces of consciousness to interfere with the original movement of matter. It can fabricate the shape of matter at will, or even change the nature of matter.

And time superpower uses consciousness to accelerate the movement and change of matter. What it changes is only the appearance of the object in the objective time, the past and the future, and it cannot be changed into other shapes.

Ru Nian Li can turn a tree into a small sapling or a towering tree, and even turn it into a wooden cup or furniture.

The super power of time can only turn trees into small saplings, or towering trees, and then decay and decay when the tree reaches its age, but it cannot turn it into cups and furniture.

When there is no external force interference, what will the "future" of matter be like? After time superpower interferes with it, it will look like the "future", including the position of each atom.

Time super can quickly make matter what it looks like in the past or future.

The'towering tree' that mind power makes small saplings become and the'towering tree' that time super can make small saplings turn into are different in appearance. Time super can generate the future after the small tree itself grows naturally. But Nianli is not.

This is the ability in the time dimension.

The real'time axis' is just like Xiaoyu can see the'conscious body'. With this ability, he can see the changes in the movement of matter, and then use his own consciousness to change its movement and make it into the past Or what the future looks like.

When all the matter seen by a living body regresses to the state of the previous minute, it is time to go back and travel back to the previous minute. At this time, the consciousness of the life body still has a memory of what happened in the'future' one minute, which is the time travel of the life body.

As long as the controlled time superpower is strong enough to pull back the time axis of each atom of the earth to the position and state of a thousand years ago, and the life form still retains the current memory, then it is quite the life body that travels back to a thousand years ago, this is the time superpower Horror.

Of course, all atoms return to their positions and states a thousand years ago, which means that the current humans will disappear, and the ancient humans that have appeared will re-develop and evolve according to the time axis predetermined for the millennium.

If a living entity wants to retain the memory of ‘retrospecting time’, it must break free from the shackles of the material and time dimensions, become a life in the fourth dimension, and control time in order to have this terrifying ability.

After traversing, actively using external force to change the future trajectory of an atom or object will change the world quite a bit, and will induce the emergence of parallel time and space.

Changes in the predetermined trajectory of a single atom or object will cause the'butterfly effect'.

The existence of this kind of butterfly effect, with a long enough time to develop and change, will make the world of parallel time and space gradually differ from the world of original time and space. As time goes by, the difference becomes bigger and bigger.

If you want to remove the parallel space-time, you must use mighty force to move time back to the time axis when an object changed, and put the changed atom or object back to its original position.

The life that truly controls time can travel back to the time when the enemy is not growing and kill the enemy.

This is a weapon of causality in philosophy.

It is also the terror of time superpower.

In the process of copying Somi's abilities, Chen Mo always felt the special nature of time ability, which is a complete fourth-dimensional life that must be controlled.

Once the ability to control time, and then developed sufficiently strong, he can freely shuttle through the long river of time and space and parallel time and space.

This is the true immortal of the universe, immortal, but if you want to be the **** in charge of everything, you also need the ability to enter the memory of every life body, that is Xiaoyu’s supernatural consciousness, and Chen Mo now has it. The last time is super power.

To know the final mission of the Science and Technology Library, he must be in charge of time superpower. He felt that time superpower was the last condition, the condition that triggered the final mission of the science and technology library.

"Try to set time back." Chen Mo reminded Somi.

Suomi, who was controlling the flowers and plants, was taken aback when he heard Chen Mo's voice in his mind, and then immediately understood.

"Hmm."

Sommy responded and refocused on the flowers and plants in the laboratory, trying to use his own to reverse the growth time of the flowers and plants.

Soon, Soomi's forehead began to sweat, his body slowly shivered, and his facial muscles also tremble. After a while, he stopped to lose his strength, and his whole body was like a fish, which was very exhausting.

"No," Sommy said tiredly, her voice a little weak.

He hasn't found the trick to rewind time. There seems to be an invisible barrier that blocks his ability and prevents him from rewinding time. And he felt that his own ability could not set time back.

Chen Mo also stopped.

Just now when Suomi used time to rewind the time of flowers and plants, he also felt a block. It was the reason that Suomi's ability was not developed enough. It may also be that Suomi's current body and consciousness could not bear this kind of time. Backward changes.

"Thanks for your hard work, take a break and continue next time. The body is the most important thing," Chen Mo said.

Sommy sat up from the chair, took the towel sent by the robot and wiped off his sweat, and asked curiously, "Does the boss gain anything?"

"Some gains." Chen Mo nodded.

There are gains, but he has not succeeded in copying, and his time superpower has not yet been mastered. Time superpower is too complicated. It is not a matter of one or two days. It takes time to experience, so I can't rush.

In Chen Mo's classification of superpowers, consciousness, time, and space belong to the top three categories of superpowers, and are at the top of the superpower pyramid.

It took Chen Mo a lot of effort to understand Xiao Yu's super power of consciousness at the time. Now, the difficulty of time super power should not be too low.

"Let's go to dinner first, just together." Chen Mo took off his experimental robe and led him out of the laboratory.

"Eh."

Sommy smiled on his tired face. He didn't expect to have dinner with the boss, so he could go back and brag for a long time.

Dididi!

At this moment, a prompt message was sent to Chen Mo's communication device. Chen Mo paused after scanning the number of the message. The news came directly from the Intelligence Department, he knew that there was a major event.

Mo Nu approached Chen Mo and said in a low voice, "Brother Mo, something happened to the Ten Cities Alliance."

Seeing the news from the Intelligence Department, Chen Mo fell silent all at once.

Something really happened.

chapters.title: Chapter 1065: : The Fury Of The Ten Cities Alliance
chapters.body:
Chapter 1065: : The Fury Of The Ten Cities Alliance

The lord of Ximo City and the current Ten Cities Alliance leader Kahn, the demon city lord Luo Yao, and the Ten Cities Alliance allied commander Ling Xi were assassinated almost simultaneously. Luo Yao, the lord of Demon Luo City, was stabbed to death, Kahn was seriously injured and fled, and Ling Xi was also slightly injured.

This is the intelligence message from the Ten Cities Alliance.

"Kahn and Luo Yao have a very good friendship, like brothers, and Luo Yao and Lingxi’s teacher have friendship, and there are some kindnesses to Lingxi. This time Luo Yao was killed, I am afraid the Ten Cities Alliance will change the sky. ."

Lan stroked her sharp chin, thinking about the possible changes in the situation. This change was unexpected by them.

Chen Mo's heart is heavy, and it seems that the situation is more complicated than expected.

"Who moved the hand?"

"Uncertain, there are not many clues left by the assassins. Anyway, it is one of Bai Xing and Black Eye." Lan thought about it and said: "Based on the current situation of the Ten City Alliance, Bai Xing is more likely to do it. "

"How to say?"

"The plan of the Black Eye Civilization to divide the Ten Cities Alliance seems to have some effect. The last time they proposed an alliance with the Ten Cities Alliance, several companies agreed, indicating that their plan is very successful, and they can slowly advance and completely divide the Ten Cities Alliance.

But this plan, in addition to threatening us, is also damaging the interests of the White Star Civilization, because the success of the Black Eye in the Ten Cities, the White Star Civilization will gain little. So they have reasons to destroy the black pupil civilization plan, or prevent them from following the plan so smoothly, or even want to get a share of the pie. "

"What's the impact?"

"If all three are successfully assassinated, the Ten-City Alliance will be destroyed. The Ten-City Alliance has no leader. The White Star Civilization will launch an offensive without hesitation, and the Black Eye Civilization will not lag behind. At that time, they will not be united within the two god-level civilizations. There is only one dead end to attack. But Kahn and Lingxi failed to assassinate the two most important figures, and the backbone of the Ten Cities Alliance is still there.

This assassination aroused the anger of Kahn and Lingxi. They may directly clean the inside of the Ten City Alliance. At that time, both the inside of the White Star Civilization or the inside of the Black Eye Civilization will suffer. There is no doubt that if the assassination of the White Star Civilization fails, the Black Eye Civilization plan will also go bankrupt, and the two companies may adopt other methods. "

"What means?"

"Strike up the military plan, then cut down the hand? Secondly cut down the army? Then attack the city." Lan moved a set of earth's classic war theory: "This is left by your ancestors. This theory is very in place? Never out of date. ."

"You mean? They might choose to attack the Ten Cities Alliance?"

"No." Lan shook his head very positively: "If I were the decision maker of Black Eye, I would not attack the Ten Cities Alliance? But..."

...

Lan's analysis is not surprising.

The assassination did indeed touch the nerves of the Ten Cities Alliance.

At the same time, assassinate three of the most important figures in the Ten-City Alliance? Without the help of the insiders? The assassins could not know their specific location, so those inside lines will become the first existence of the Ten-City Alliance to cleanse.

The anger of the Ten Cities Alliance was completely activated after this blatant assassination.

That piece of star field? It is the star field that the Ten City Alliance has operated for countless years. Their internal layout and control are deeper than the outside world imagined, otherwise they would have been swallowed by the black pupil civilization.

Xi Mocheng and Demon Luocheng were so angry that they didn't plan to leave any room? They didn't want to maintain those hypocritical relationships.

Luo Yao's death aroused the anger of the senior leaders of the Ten Cities Alliance.

Kahn publicly launched a call for the Xi Mo City as the main, and the Demon Luo City as the auxiliary. Together with Tianlu, Liuli, Luohu and Mermaid, they launched a vigorous internal cleaning operation.

Soon? Some of the inner lines that were arranged by the White Star Civilization and the Black Eye Civilization to enter their star domain? All were picked up? Together with the'messengers' who were sent to serve as the inner link connectors, they were also arrested.

Kahn had no mercy and ordered all insiders to be publicly executed, including the ‘messenger’ sent by Bai Xing and Heitong, who were also executed after the guilt was announced.

For a time, it caused a lot of waves.

In the Ten Cities Alliance, the thoughts of the Black Eyes who wanted to Alliance Black Eyes were calmed down a lot.

...

Yan said with a gloomy expression: "The White Star Civilization did it. He saw that our plan here is going well, and he directly destroyed our layout. Kill those three, and then they will attack the Ten City Alliance and swallow one of them. Now they If we failed, it was even more difficult for us to deal with the Ten Cities Alliance through differentiation."

Tong Qing's expression was also not very good: "Unexpectedly, Bai Xing would use such a rude means to enter the arena."

Originally, the plan for the Ten Cities Alliance was progressing smoothly, and they succeeded in disagreement within them. With time, they will be able to successfully divide the major civilizations of the Ten Cities Alliance.

It's just that the White Star Civilization suddenly jumped in and destroyed their good situation.

Now the Ten Cities Alliance is united a lot more than before. To deal with them, I am afraid that it will take more thought and cost than before.

They are not dealing with the Ten Cities Alliance.

The Ten Cities Alliance had no threat except one that was difficult to deal with. In Tong Qing's eyes, the strongest enemy was the White Star Civilization, and the most threatening enemy was the marching ant group.

The White Star Civilization is an old opponent, they know the roots, but the marching ant group makes him feel threatened.

Especially since the beginning of the super power era, the marching ant group has shown strong super power technology and special super power tactics. The marching ant group has shown very terrifying potential and growth.

Whether it is single-soldier combat or warhead combat, marching ants seem to have a much more advanced understanding of superpower than their concepts. Let the marching ants continue to develop, the future is definitely a very terrible opponent.

When the future super power era is completely unfolded, their technological advantages as a god-level civilization will disappear.

Therefore, they have to think of restricting them and slowing down their development before the marching ants are completely formed. When the black pupil civilization gains power, they can unite with other old god-level civilizations to destroy the potential threat of marching ants in one fell swoop.

Now that the layout is completely ruined, Tong Qing is also in a dilemma: "What to do next? The marching ant group must be restricted."

Yan glanced at the star map and fell into thinking. Obviously, the White Star civilization stepped in and destroyed their great layout. He didn't expect it: "If you can't make a plan, just attack the city."

Hitomi's black eyes condensed in focus: "Assault the Ten Cities Alliance?"

"No, Ximocheng issued a call to clean the inside line, and blatantly killed our messenger. We naturally found the trouble for Ximocheng." Yan's eyes were shining: "The Ten City Alliance was originally divided by us, and they are mutually divided. There are more or less old grievances and conflicts of interest. We chose to attack Ximo City this time instead of looking for trouble from other companies, and see how they react."

His eyes were blue and bright.

They didn't assassinate Kahn, and Ximocheng killed their messenger, which can be used as an excuse. If they only choose to trouble the Ximocheng, will the other companies help?

If it helps, it is against their black-eye civilization. If it doesn't help, then the Ten Cities Alliance exists in name only.

The Ten Cities Alliance itself is not monolithic, and the Black Eye civilization is so powerful that ordinary civilizations are unwilling to be enemies, and it will be operational by then...

chapters.title: Chapter 1066: : Gaming
chapters.body:
Chapter 1066: : Gaming

The Ten Cities Alliance was in chaos.

The warhead of the Black Eye Civilization pointed directly at the Magic City of Xi'an and made it public. Their target was only the City of Xi'an.

Ximocheng publicly executed the black pupil messenger. They demanded that Kahn, the lord of Ximocheng, step down, and handed Kahn to the black pupil civilization for trial, asking other civilizations not to interfere with their grievances with Ximocheng.

Demon Luo City, Liuli City, Tianlu City, and Mermaid City immediately issued a statement of solidarity to Ximo City, and began to dispatch the war headquarters, ready to support. On the other side, Ling Xi directly mobilized the warhead to confront the warhead of the Black Eye Civilization.

The Ten Cities Alliance seemed to be trapped in a gunpowder keg, which could explode at any time.

However, Yuelu City, Hunter City, God City, Holy Python City and Luohu City remained silent on this and did not issue any statements.

In the Ten Cities Alliance, each of them has some rumors circulating. Many lives believed that this was something Kahn had caused and that the Ten-City Alliance should not be dragged into the water, but there were indeed a few that did not concern themselves.

The cracks within the Ten Cities Alliance were unabashedly exposed to the outside world.

The Black Eye Civilization also took this opportunity to increase the means of exerting pressure on Xi Mo City.

Commander Yan’s warhead launched an offensive against the Magic City of Xi'an. The war began, and the Ten Cities Alliance suddenly became nervous, fearing that the Black Eye civilization would trouble them. Ling Xi was not to be outdone, and commanded the warhead to block and defend the warhead of the black pupil civilization.

The battle situation is changing so fast that people are overwhelmed.

The formation of the two warheads attracted the attention of the whole universe.

Yan’s strength is well known. The black pupil civilization is the strongest general star and is also one of the top ten general stars in the universe. He has a strong strategic overall view and layout means. He once used one enemy and two to hold down the offensive of the White Star Civilization and the Thor Civilization to help Hitomi. Qing sat firmly in the position of Speaker Black Eye.

Ling Xi is not too weak, and as one of the top ten generals, he is also a hot figure in the universe. He is in charge of the operations department of the Ten Cities Alliance with his own strength, with good methods and tactics, and a strategic vision of the situation. Because of Lingxi's existence? White Star Civilization and Black Eye Civilization didn't dare to launch an offensive against the Ten Cities Alliance easily.

The battle between the two top generals? Attention suddenly rose.

However, the White Star civilization that has not been very active? It seems that this time it is also a bit unwilling to be lonely. A steady stream of warheads? Appeared in the Hongqiao of the Gulu Galaxy, there is a posture to launch an offensive to the Ten Cities Alliance.

Hosting the White Star War Department? It is the top general of the White Star civilization, Xing Gou Xuan.

Goxuan Ziluo and the marching ant group have been defeated one after another. After crossing half of the universe and returning to the White Star civilization? The arrogance of the whole person has been worn away? The style is much lower-key and calm, so her strength is only higher than before. Not low.

White Star Civilization increases troops Gulu Hongqiao? Make Ten Cities Alliance nervous.

Ling Xi is now doing his best to deal with the Black Eye Civilization? Clone lacks skills. If you deal with the White Star Civilization's warhead, I am afraid that it will be more difficult, so the Ten Cities Alliance can only watch the big moves of the White Star Civilization.

The two god-level civilizations are aimed at the Ximocheng.

For a time, the lives in Ximo City? Everyone is at risk.

Just when the outside world thought that the magic city of Ximo was over, the White Star civilization suddenly stopped moving? After studying deeply, the outside world discovered that a warhead appeared in Ximo City.

Marching ant group, Ming Tu war department.

Discussing the strength of the war department alone? Because of the existence of the top general star Ming Tu? The war department is almost the strongest in the single war department of the marching ant group.

As one of the warfare that destroys the civilization of the meditation? The warfare of the meditation is so famous that it is the top general star cultivated by the civilization of the meditation.

The Ming Tu War Department suddenly appeared in Ximo City. After the news spread, he was concerned about the lives of this war, and he was shocked.

It turns out that marching ants and Ximocheng have reached an alliance long ago.

Marching ants group.

No one dares to despise this power.

Especially the war department that appeared this time is the Ming Tu war department.

Almost when the Ming Tu War Department released its array in Ximo City, the War Department of the White Star Civilization stopped moving, and there was no intention to do anything.

The situation is deadlocked.

Ling Xi confronted the Yan of the Black Eye Civilization, and Ming Tu contained the conspiracy of the White Star Civilization. The top stars in the universe gathered together. The pressure of this war made many civilizations frightened.

The movement of this star field is a space war.

If the Greek Demon City is against the Black Eye civilization, it is the worm shaking the tree, but the marching ants enter the arena and unite the five cities in the Ten-City Alliance. This force may not lose to any god-level civilization.

If you want to eliminate these two, you must devote all your efforts to the two god-level civilizations and start an all-out war before they can be swallowed.

But if a full-scale war is launched, even if the army ants and the five cities are taken, the two god-level civilizations will have to suffer a lot of losses, and it may start the battle of the universe.

But the black pupil civilization does not seem to want to let go of this opportunity.

At the time of the confrontation, prepare to dispatch the Red Army Warhead to come, in a posture of full-scale war.

However, the Black Eye Civilization did not expect that when the Red Army War Head just wanted to leave, the Zi Luo of the Ziwei Civilization would dispatch a large fleet to the junction of the stars of the Black Eye Civilization.

The Red Army Warhead, who was about to leave, stopped immediately and did not dare to act rashly.

At this time, the Ziwei civilization stepped in, do they want to help the marching ants?

The Lagerstroemia civilization today is still in a period of weakness after the cleansing. The general star talents are not as good as the other god-level civilizations, but the war machinery of the Ziwei civilization is powerful, and Fatty Luo is strong enough to rank in the forefront of the top ten generals in the universe. Hitomi Civilization didn't dare to take it lightly.

On the other hand, Thor Civilization was unwilling to be lonely, a little bit ready to move.

When the Thor Civilization just wanted to pull its army and approach the marching ants, the Nebula Alliance at its border also moved. The warhead of the Nebula Alliance received an order from Tu Yun, and Chen Bing was at the border of the Thor Star Territory.

The Nebula Alliance is not as powerful as the Thor Civilization, but if they send troops to attack the marching ants, the rear of the Thor Civilization will be empty, and the Nebula Alliance has plans to take the back road.

Feeling the threat, Thor Civilization immediately stopped its actions and deployed troops to deal with the Nebula Alliance.

The situation is like igniting a gunpowder barrel with fuse.

...

The marching ants and the Ten Cities Alliance did not reach an agreement on offensive and defensive alliances, but seeing the seriousness of the situation, Xi bypassed the Ten Cities Alliance and reached an offensive and defensive alliance agreement with them in private.

The dispatch of Ming Tu to support Xi Mo City this time is the content of the agreement, and it is also the meaning of Lan and Chen Mo.

In any case, the Greek Devil City cannot be destroyed, and the shield of the Ten City Alliance cannot be thrown away, even if only half is left, or all of it can not be thrown away. Otherwise, facing the two god-level civilizations, the marching ants will be very disadvantaged.

Chen Mo didn't believe that Tong Qing dared to start the battle at this time.

In a full-scale war, not to mention that the Black Eye Civilization will definitely win them. Even if they win, they will suffer heavy losses. At that time, they will be cheaper than other companies. Hitomi's ambition is not limited to them, but the entire universe.

His ambition of cosmic hegemony is there, and he will definitely not let his warhead fight with them and lose both.

The plan of the Black Eye Civilization was only to split the Ten City Alliance. To achieve this level, their goal had already been achieved.

In this confrontation, all the friends and passers-by in the Ten Cities Alliance were clear, and it was impossible to return to the previous Ten Cities Alliance.

Once the Ten-City Alliance splits, one of them is quite torn off, and that piece is like scattered sand, and the Black Eye civilization can easily engulf and consolidate itself.

But even if he saw the black pupil civilization plan, Chen Mo was helpless.

This is Yang Mou, he can't intervene in the affairs of the Ten Cities Alliance, otherwise he will be used by Tong Qing to make a fuss.

But the current situation is sufficient.

They formed alliances with Ximo City, Demon Luo City, Liuli City, Tianlu City, and Mermaid City. These civilizations can be built into an iron barrel, and they can also serve as a strategic buffer zone between the marching ants and the black pupil civilization.

...

Kahn and Lingxi have a comprehensive understanding of the current situation, knowing that leaving the marching ants aside, their fate is only to be swallowed up by the god-level civilization, so they clung to the thighs of the marching ant clique.

Kahn and Lingxi see the potential of the marching ant group.

Whether it is super power technology or warhead generals, the marching ants are not inferior to the god-level civilization, and there is also a small universe. The marching ants have the conditions for a god-level civilization, and they also have incomparable vitality.

It is much better to have this kind of allies than to be swallowed by a god-level civilization.

Kahn and Ling Xi formed an alliance with the marching ants, but they were opposed by several others, and quarrels and disagreements emerged.

The current Ten Cities Alliance is divided into three factions. No, it is four factions.

Kahn carries five cities and ally marches ants.

The three families of God, Saint Python, and Hunter hope to form an alliance with the Black Eye civilization.

The Yuelu family wanted to adhere to the White Star civilization. The last Luo Hucheng did not make up his mind.

In the end is Luohu City. The lives of the Luohu people are too smart. It is precisely because of their smartness that they weigh the pros and cons too much. They do not know how to choose. They wait for the situation to become clear before making a decision.

There is no hope for other big cities, and Kahn and Lingxi don't plan to worry too much.

"Now I can only rely on marching ants." Kahn's tired face didn't stretch: "I thought about training you to be the leader of the Ten Cities Alliance, but you only have handsome talents and no kings. Now the Black Eye civilization has come again. With great pressure, the Ten Cities Alliance is in name only."

"Yeah." Ling Xi smiled bitterly, helplessly.

War is to make the situation and make the situation.

The game is opened, the momentum is formed, and the players are clear at a glance.

chapters.title: Chapter 1067: : Wu
chapters.body:
Chapter 1067: : Wu

How to break the game?

This is a question that the forces of the entire universe are thinking about.

The degree of tension caused by the confrontation of various forces is a kind of psychological pressure, which is more terrifying than war. Once fire is opened, war will be launched across the board.

The top forces in the entire universe are in confrontation, and now the whole world is like a cannonball on a grill.

"Old ancestor, what should we do?" Hu Bingxin looked at the first Chief White Star.

"This is the question you should think about. The current world is not the world I used to be. Bai Xing will manage it for you, and naturally you will be the master." The old chief Bai Xing calmly said: "However, depending on the current situation, we and the black pupil civilization We can't start a war for the time being, we might as well engage other opponents first."

"Other opponents?"

"Well, do you think that among our opponents in the universe today, except for the black pupil, which force is the most threatening?" Old Chief White Star asked.

"If it is threatening, the threats of several forces are not low, but if it is the most threatening, is Thor Civilization?" Hu Bing thought for a while and said his answer.

"Thor Civilization? In any era of change, the power to master the core technology of change is the pride of the era. A technological change can turn a small civilization into a cosmic civilization. That's how the Ziwei civilization rose back then. Now is the age of super powers, in this era super power technology, super power war mode, super power application of these core technologies, does Raytheon civilization master the most advanced technology?" Old Chief White Star asked rhetorically.

Hu Bingxin was lost in thought and raised his head suddenly: "The ancestors mean, the marching ant group?"

All she can think of is the marching ant group.

This sudden emergence of civilization is expanding like a violent wind, and if it is against them, the victory or defeat might really belong to whom.

After all, the lives of the marching ant group are all terrifying guys.

"Tongqing is so anxious to deal with the marching ant group instead of dealing with the Ziwei civilization, think about why?"

There was a brief silence in the hall.

Seeing Hu Bingxin thinking, Old Chief Bai Xing did not interrupt. Among his many descendants of Zici? Hu Bingxin is indeed the best one? He is in charge of the White Star Civilization at a young age and is well managed.

After this made him appear safely, the White Star Civilization relied on its high confidence to get rid of other god-level civilizations, and became the existence second only to the Black Eye civilization.

So no matter now or in the future? Hu Bingxin is undoubtedly the successor.

It's just a pity, not a man.

The natural flaws in female life? Let her not have the ambition to dominate the universe? In terms of ambition, she is weaker than men. This is also the reason why the White Star Civilization has been low-key before he came out.

As if to understand a little bit, Hu Bingxin hesitated and said, "Tongqing believes that the marching ant group is more threatening than the Ziwei civilization?"

"Yes? That's true. At least for now, it is. The marching ant group has all the conditions that a god-level civilization should have. Dark matter antimatter extraction technology, leading super energy technology, small universe, top general star? Top war technology. The most important thing is that this force has unparalleled vigor and vitality."
