"Energetic?"

"Right? Old civilization. After countless years of development, the system has become rigid. Families, groups, factions, etc.? have become a part that cannot be ignored, and sometimes they can even influence decision-making, even our White Star civilization is no exception.

The old chief Bai Xing had a deep gaze and sighed slightly.

"The Ziwei civilization is so weak, so I also admire Zijunzhi, unknown, nothing special, but ruthlessly put Zidi into the Ziwei star, and use him to clean up all the solidified factions of the Ziwei civilization. The cruel heart is enough for him to become a hero in history.

But the marching ants are different. This force, speaking out as a corporate group, has developed in just a few decades. They are in a period of rapid development, and everything is unfinished. Each of them can see the enterprising spirit in them. And their core is Chen Mo. This gives them unlimited possibilities. "

Twenty years ago, no one had heard the name Marching Ant Group.

now what?

Today's marching ant group is so similar to the crape myrtle civilization back then.

"I understand." Bai Xing nodded calmly.

...

"Are you ready?"

"All right."

After entering the super state, Somi's attention began to focus on the flowers and plants in the laboratory.

During this period of time, he used super powers for a long time, more frequently than training, and his understanding of super powers increased a lot. At the same time, he also exchanged some ideas and experiences about super powers with his boss, which greatly benefited him.

If this continues, his time super can quickly reach the combat level.

Because of the particularity of time, the time super power to reach the combat level is unimaginable.

However, when using time super power, he must carefully control his own state, because excessive use of super power will lead to mental fatigue. This is related to the strength of consciousness and will, and the boss never seems to be tired, which makes him admire , And also curious about how strong the boss is.

As Sommy sat on the laboratory chair, the sensing equipment slowly covered his ears and forehead. Chen Mo's palm also covers his brain.

Lan will deal with matters of war.

The top civilizations in the entire universe are now confronting each other, small-scale frictions have already begun, and local wars have started, but they have not yet started across the board.

No one can control the consequences of a war across the board.

Once out of control, even the god-level civilization cannot control the future direction.

So they are all progressing tacitly and steadily. First, some small civilizations and small forces are eliminated, and the chaotic situation is sorted out. Then is the highlight.

During this period of time, Chen Mo has been committed to the replication of time superpower.

After experiencing this period of time, he has a deep understanding of time superpower. Once he gets started, he will be able to go smoothly.

Time superpowers are partly about causality and philosophical issues, which are much more complicated than general superpowers.

After entering the state, Chen Mo focused on the super power used by Somi.

So far, Somi hasn't mastered the technique of ‘backtracking’. The difficulty and requirements of time backtracking are too high, and his physical fitness cannot support him to use this technique.

Regarding time, it is mentioned in the law of parity non-conservation that time has the phenomenon of asymmetry in reversal.

That is, the conversion process between the two mesons, the time required for forward and reverse is different

For example, when ‘K meson’ is transformed into ‘anti-K meson’, it will be faster for K meson to transform into anti-K meson, while the time for ‘anti-K meson’ to reverse to ‘K meson’ is relatively slow.

This is the time reversal asymmetry in parity non-conservation.

This kind of time asymmetry makes the difficulty of ‘backtracking in time’ infinite times greater than the acceleration of time.

According to the parallel universe and time shuttle theory, every time you look back in time, a single atom or even an object will change the state of the ‘original time axis’, causing the time butterfly effect and creating a parallel universe.

Therefore, looking back in time, it is necessary to create a universe-like energy.

There is only one existence that can withstand this infinite energy: the fourth-dimensional life, which is Chen Mo's current quantum body.

It is the fourth-dimensional life that can look back in time.

Countless insights flashed in Chen Mo's mind. He felt itchy through his boots, as if he could touch something, but after thinking about it carefully, he didn't get anything.

Chen Mo is comprehending the particularity of time. With Soumi's concentration, the flowers and plants in the laboratory are growing and wilting at an extremely fast rate, and then new seeds germinate, grow wildly, and then bloom and die.

The whole process is like a time-lapse shot in a documentary.

Suddenly, Chen Mo paused. Everything he had seen just now appeared in his mind as if it were flowing backwards, and when he returned to the starting point, he accelerated forward again, cyclically.

He somewhat understood the meaning of the concept of the essence of time.

Time is the continuous and sequential realization of changes in the movement of matter.

Chen Mo froze there, a trace of inspiration made him grasp this, his eyes became out of focus, he was lost in thought, and his brain was thinking crazy about time every second.

Feeling the movement of Chen Mo, the Mo Girl on the side did not dare to disturb her, and stayed quietly beside him, Suomi didn't realize it, still silently releasing her superpower.

In the laboratory, there was a dead silence, only the data was beating, and the flowers and plants in the laboratory grew and withered under Soomi's control.

Half an hour later, an invisible wave radiated from Chen Mo's body.

chapters.title: Chapter 1068: : Sniff The Rose
chapters.body:
Chapter 1068: : Sniff The Rose

call!

Chen Mo breathed a sigh of relief and opened his eyes again, as if his eyes could penetrate time and space. At this moment, he felt a sense of control, as if he could see the future and the past at a glance, controlling time and space and everything in the universe.

When Mo Nu saw this, she looked happy. She was with Chen Mo every day, almost a shadow of Chen Mo. She could clearly feel Chen Mo's changes.

"Brother Mo, did you succeed?" Mo Nu approached Chen Mo and asked softly.

"Successful."

Chen Mo stroked her hair casually, showing a slight smile, then raised his hand and patted Somi, motioning him to stop.

"Boss, what's the matter?" Sommy was still blank, wondering why the boss asked him to stop.

"Thanks for your hard work during this time," Chen Mo said.

"What does the boss mean?" Sommy was puzzled.

"Successful, the experiment is over."

Chen Mo stretched out his hand and faced the flowers and plants in the laboratory. In an instant, the flowers and plants that had just sprouted sprung up like bamboo shoots after a rain, and the speed was many times faster than what Somi controlled.

Once he started, Chen Mo had a good grasp of this ability.

"Congratulations to the boss." Suomi was overwhelmed and finally heaved a sigh of relief. At the same time, she also envied the boss's horrible ability.

"If you have any difficulties in the future, just ask me or the president. Regarding the advanced method of time superpower, I will give you some tips. You should train well and don't let down this special super power. It will be a world of super power in the future."

"Thank you boss." Sommy exulted.

...

"I'm back." Chen Mo entered the house and saw the empty house with only a few robot servants, and he was taken aback.

The expected welcome did not appear.

People?

Chen Mo looked at Mo Nu.

"My parents have gone to travel, Wushuang is in the research institute, Wuming is studying in the Armed Forces Department. Sister Xiaoyu and Sister Zhao Min are in the study room, dealing with work." Mo Nu said.

Chen Mo was stunned, then relieved.

During this period of time, he concentrated on the understanding of the superpower of time, and only went home after a while, and he didn't ask too much about his family, so he felt a little guilty.

"Do Xiao Yu and Zhao Min know that I am back?" Chen Mo asked.

"I don't know, I didn't tell them." Mo Nu shook her head: "They are dealing with the group's affairs? I can't bother."

"Then we go directly to the study? Give them a surprise."

Chen Mo Shi Shi Ran went to the study.

During this period of time, the confrontation between the great forces of the universe is at a stalemate? No one dares to start the war lightly.

Under such high pressure, the marching ant, one of the protagonists, is too busy. The marching ant group provides logistical support and technical support to the armed forces. Now the entire group is strained.

No one knows? Will it come first tomorrow or change?

Regardless of affairs, Chen Mo, Xiaoyu and Zhao Min, as the proprietress, naturally have to preside over the overall situation.

Until Chen Mo entered the study, the two women did not notice his arrival.

Seeing the tired look on their faces? Chen Mo felt a little distressed.

I heard Mo Nu say? Since the confrontation, they have not had a good rest for a week. They work at the headquarters regardless of day and night, and then go home and work again? If it is not for good physical fitness, they can't bear it.

"Two beauties? Is work important or me?"

Hearing Chen Mo's voice, the two women raised their heads? Their complexions were immediately unsightly: "Work is important."

The abrupt words made Chen Mo's face turn green: "Just give me face!"

"Are you the boss? Your job? We will handle it for you? You still have the face to ask?" Xiao Yu snorted lightly.

"Thank you."

Chen Mo walked over and stroked Xiaoyu's head.

The contents of the documents they are dealing with are all about the affairs and foreign affairs of some galaxies under the marching ant group, as well as the long-term planning projects of the marching ant group.

Nowadays, the star field of the marching ant group is huge, and countless lives live under the jurisdiction, and there are not many things.

They use groups instead of civilized forces to manage them. These project documents have been processed and discussed by the management team below, and they will be sent to them for review and signature.

"I know to go home." Xiao Yu's tone was a little bit resentful.

"You also know that this project is special, so it took a little longer." Chen Mo apologized: "I will come back to compensate you this time, and I will accompany you well in the future."

"Really?"

"Really!" Chen Mo definitely nodded.

"Seeing that you are so sincere, forgive you for the time being. But you may not be able to accompany us for the time being. Now the universe is so tense and there are too many things in the group. If you are the shopkeeper, we don't have time." Xiao Yu said.

"I am the leader of the marching ants. I still don't know the situation of the marching ants? The group is so big. If the leader disappears for a few days and it can't operate, then I might as well disband the group."

"That's the truth, but it's a time of war." Zhao Min interrupted.

"It's the same during the war. If one day I hide in the laboratory and disappear for a few days, the group won't function. It's better to admit defeat as soon as possible." Chen Mo said.

Although he stayed in the laboratory, if something happened to affect the general trend of the marching ant group, he knew immediately that he did not seem to pay much attention to the affairs of the marching ants, but he knew everything about the marching ants. chest.

And if there is a big event, he can make a decision in the first place.

A true mature leader, like a chess player, will be wiped out while talking and laughing.

"Since the boss has spoken, we don't have to be busy." Zhao Min stretched out, and the curve was drawn with the clothes.

"Let's go, these files will be fine for a few days, I will deal with them in a few days. There are particularly important matters, Mo Nui told them to deal with them in the laboratory." Chen Mo took the two women and left the study.

That night.

Chen Mo was sitting on the sofa, holding a hair dryer, carefully blowing Xiao Yu's hair.

This is a small habit they have cultivated since they fell in love. Every time Xiao Yu washed her hair, as long as Chen Mo was there, she would blow dry her.

During this time, Chen Mo was either in the laboratory or in the conference room of the War Department, and had little time to go home. Because of this, after Chen Mo successfully mastered the time super power, he would go home to accompany them as soon as possible.

"Seeing you are in a good mood today, is there a happy event?" Xiao Yu's face was ruddy at this time, enjoying the feeling of Chen Mo's big hand touching her hair, with a faint smile on his face.

"It's a good event, it's super power to control time." Chen Mo said.

Xiao Yu looked happy: "So fast?"

"Well, it went well, so it ended early. I will stay with you for three days. What do you want to go or do you want?"

"Will you accompany you when shopping?" Xiao Yu said.

"Still so unpromising."

Chen Mo was immediately happy. Every time I asked them to make a request, Xiao Yu's request was to go shopping, but Chen Mo laughed and scolded each time, but Chen Mo also knew that Xiao Yu didn't ask much, as long as he was by his side, and this It is one of her few pleasures.

"I just didn't succeed." Xiao Yu said triumphantly.

After the hair was blown dry, Chen Mo put the hair dryer aside and said earnestly: "You must be with you."

"The overlord of the universe also does trivial things like shopping with his wife?" Xiao Yu said jokingly.

"As a leader, I have the courage to scold Fang Qiu, but at home, I should accompany his wife or his wife. What is this...have a tiger in your heart, sniff the rose."

"You sniff the rose, why do you sniff me?" Xiao Yu smiled and cursed when Chen Mo stretched his head and moved her nose.

"What do you mean?"

"Um~~Big villain..."

One hour, after Xiao Yu was so tired that he fell asleep, Chen Mo quietly left and went to Zhao Min's room. No way, he wants rain and dew, and he cannot favor one another...

chapters.title: Chapter 1069: : Alliance
chapters.body:
Chapter 1069: : Alliance

Chen Mo woke up.

The sunlight outside the window sneaked into the bedroom through the gaps in the curtains, opened the curtains, and the rising sunlight fell on him with a hint of warmth.

It's been a long time since I rested so comfortably, I don't have to think about anything.

After washing briefly, Chen Mo left the room.

Mo Nu was busy in the kitchen, and when Chen Mo came out, she smiled sweetly at him.

Although her consciousness was generated by quantum, this body was cloned by human genes. After years of learning, she had already had the complete human emotions.

"Brother Mo."

"Don't you sleep more?"

"It's the same whether I sleep or not. It's rare to go home and make breakfast for you and my sister." Mo Nu said.

Mo Nu's physique is the same as him. They don't need to eat, sleep, or get tired. In the laboratory, they can concentrate on the research for a long time without eating or drinking.

But going home is different.

This is home, where he lives. Chen Mo prefers to be like a normal person.

Two hours later, Xiao Yu and Zhao Min came out of the room one after another. After working for so many days without a good rest and finally relaxing once, Chen Mo didn't wake them up, let them wake up naturally.

Chen Mo wanted to develop their physique, but the two women refused. They had no idea of developing their physique for the time being. They said that they would wait for a while and make some psychological preparations.

Chen Mo did not insist on [biqugetv.info], but followed them.

"Go for breakfast, Mo Nu's craftsmanship." Chen Mo put down the documents in his hand and went to the restaurant with them.

A home-cooked breakfast, passing in a warm atmosphere.

...

Several people rested at home for a long time, and then dressed up again. It was not until noon that they left home and started shopping.

Or ordinary shopping on the earth? But there are still not many aliens on the earth now? They are all relatives of the high-ranking army ants group, and they can only enter the earth with knowledge.

After all, the earth has a special status? It's like a royal garden in a kingdom? Or a military compound. You can't let other lives come close.

The scene on the street? In line with the interstellar style, showing a majestic sci-fi style? Suspended vehicles and aircraft that can be seen everywhere? There are also battle armors. However, in the shopping mall in the shopping area, armor and aircraft are not allowed to enter here, and can only be entered on foot, retaining the original cultural atmosphere.

People coming and going around? Chen Mo felt unconsciously relaxed.

Very ordinary life? Only by experiencing the vastness of the universe and the smallness of life, and seeing a cosmic war in which a bullet destroys a living planet, can you realize that this ordinary life is hard-won.

"I haven't given you a gift for a long time, what do you want in particular, I will give it to you today."

"You said it." Xiao Yu said politely. They don't lack anything? They don't lack money, they can buy anything they want? But Chen Mo gave them to them, and they bought them themselves? The meaning is completely different.

"I said!"

"Then I want to spend."

"You're still the dull little fisher." Chen Mo squeezed Xiao Yu's face.

This little fisher has to spend every time? Chen Mo still gave it to her in a different way? In addition to the earth's species and the famous flower species in the universe, he also sent a lot, but every time she asked her to make a request, it was just flowers.

There are a lot of small hobbies, I like shopping and flowers. From the beginning to the present, it has never changed.

"Then you send it or not?"

"Send!" Chen Mo nodded without hesitation, and looked at Zhao Min and Mo Nu: "What about you?"

"I want to watch a movie." Zhao Min said.

Mo Nui smiled softly: "I want a couple outfit."

As a typical science girl, she has a special identity. She has everything she wants. The biggest ideal is to be with Chen Mo. But this is not ideal. She just follows Chen Mo every day, like a shadow.

"I also want."

"I also want."

Seeing the joy on their faces, Chen Mo showed a knowing smile: "Yes, you can do whatever you want today."

The "Hand of God" project, followed by war, and then there is time for super power projects, he absolutely spends most of his time in the laboratory, compared with before, now spends much less time with them.

But Xiao Yu and the others have never complained. It is easy to be satisfied by spending time with them and buying a small gift.

Sometimes Chen Mo loved them a little bit, but now the outer environment of the universe is special, and there is not much time to spare.

...

Di Nanye smiled on the rough beast face when he saw the messenger who came. Although the mood is peaceful, the smile on this face looks chilling.

The messenger of the White Star civilization?

interesting!

He just received the news that the White Star Civilization sent an envoy over to see him.

He was a little surprised by the sudden visit of the White Star Civilization Envoy.

The visitor was a leopard girl of the orc race, and she looked pretty.

Perceiving Di Nanye's scrutiny gaze, Bai Jia felt a little uncomfortable.

These dark forest civilization-like orc races are indeed wild and untamable, and this kind of look makes people unable to mention too much goodwill. If it weren't for the order of the lady, she would never come here.

As the leader of a top power, Di Nanye naturally has no shortage of etiquette. He just looked back and looked back: "White Star Messenger, please sit down."

"Thank you, King." Bai Jia thanked him and took his seat safely.

"What's the matter with the messenger coming this time?" Di Nanye asked.

"Madam asked me to come and talk to the king about the alliance."

"Alliance?" Di Nanye's eyebrows twitched, his eyes twitched slightly, he didn't know his happiness or anger: "Madam didn't contact me in advance about the alliance."

"Because the matter is of great importance, my wife thought that the two sides need to talk face-to-face, so I was sent here as a representative to meet with the king to show sincerity." Bai Jiao said.

"Let's talk, how to form an alliance?" Di Nanye said in a deep voice.

"Lord, please see."

Bai Yu took out a holographic projection communicator and placed it on the table, only to see a figure that appeared in the hall, which was the projection of Hu Bingxin. Mrs. Bai Xing, the woman who manages the Bai Xing civilization, has long sleeves, is good at dancing, and is wise.

As a high-level god-level civilization, he naturally met Hu Bingxin on important occasions on some cosmic platforms.

"Lord, long time no see." Hu Bingxin said first.

"Mrs. Bai Xing, long time no see." Di Nanye smiled: "Your messenger said, this time for the alliance?"

Hu Bing was noncommittal.

"Let's talk about the conditions of the alliance." Di Nanye is straightforward.

"No hurry, let me talk about the king first, is the king still fighting Dinan Miro?" Hu Bingxin said in a hurry.

"What's your opinion, Madam?"

"The direction of the king is wrong."

"What do you mean, madam?"

Di Nanye narrowed his eyes slightly, his voice was slightly dull, took a sip of the scarlet blood wine in his hand, and licked his scarlet tongue.

"The king and Dinan Miro will never die, I have nothing to say. Now that the king controls half of the dark forest, it is a foregone conclusion, but the king has fought with Dinan Miro for many years. What is the result? The strength of the two of you is almost the same. If there are no accidents, it is still deadlock and consumes oneself."

Di Nanye did not refute, but acquiesced in what she said and let her continue.

"If the king continues to consume like this, and when the king's strength declines, I am afraid that the surrounding civilizations will not miss such a good opportunity. The result of the Pluto civilization, the king has seen it."

Having said that, Hu Bingxin stopped deliberately.

"Madam has something to say, you might as well finish it."

"Have you ever thought about strengthening your own strength first, and then fighting Dinan Miro later, so you can annex him and reunify the dark forest."

"You White Star Civilization want to help me?"

"No, you help yourself. The current situation in the universe is complicated. We form an alliance with the king. The king can use this to expand his strength. When the situation becomes clear and the king's strength increases, I will get rid of my hand and send troops to support the king's unification of the dark forest. , It's not a problem at all."

Di Nanye drank a glass of blood wine again, and the unpleasant smell filled Bai Jiao's eyes, but he dared not speak.

"This is what you promised to benefit? What conditions do I have to pay?"

"The king is refreshing!"

Fox Bingxin smiled.

chapters.title: Chapter 1070: : Technology Administrator
chapters.body:
Chapter 1070: : Technology Administrator

"Wait a minute, if I have any movement, don't bother me." Chen Mo told Mo Nu.

"Yeah." Mo Nu nodded gently, guarding beside Chen Mo.

She knew that Chen Mo was going to do that technology inheritance.

It is no secret that Chen Mo has a technological heritage, but the outside world does not know how this technological heritage exists. Only Xiao Yu and others who are closest to Chen Mo know where the technological heritage lies.

Lying on the chair, Chen Mo closed his eyes full.

In the depths of the Science and Technology Library, Chen Mo is here again.

As early as when he mastered time superpower, he had an urge to come in, but he resisted it.

He didn't know what a big disturbance would happen again this time. The previous few times, his brain and body were tortured enough, so he wanted to go in in the best condition.

After spending these two days with his family, he chose to come in after the rest.

Chen Mo has always wanted to know the final mission of the Science and Technology Library. After waiting for so many years, this puzzle that has kept him curious for so many years will soon be revealed.

Chen Mo was also a little expectant and nervous.

In front of the gate deep in the Science and Technology Library, Chen Mo circled around.

The gate has not changed.

After thinking about it, Chen Mo slowly stretched out his hand and pushed towards the door.

Then, Chen Mo was taken aback.

Still didn't touch the door, what's the problem? Although the Science and Technology Library did not prompt, he was sure that the opening conditions should be met.

The status is wrong?

After thinking about it, Chen Mo entered a super state, where the super powers of time and space operate simultaneously.

That's it!

In Chen Mo's eyes, an almost insignificant film of time and space enveloped the gate.

What a special feeling.

This is the existence of time and space?

After Chen Mo developed his physique, for the first time he felt that he could escape from time and space.

After careful observation, he stretched out his hand and lightly touched the space-time film. Sure enough, his palm passed through the film unimpeded and pressed against the door.

With just a light push, the door opened.

Chen Mo looked inside? It was dark? Seeing nothing, he stepped through that layer of time and space film? Enter the door.

At the moment the door closes? In reality, things happen suddenly.

...

Mo Nu kept quietly beside Chen Mo, her eyes on Chen Mo? The lingering attachment. Ever since she remembered, Chen Mo was there? To her? Chen Mo was everything, so she never rejected Chen Mo.

She wanted to follow Chen Mo as his shadow.

Thinking of this, Mo Nu smiled slightly.

Suddenly? An invisible wave came from Chen Mo's body? She was awakened.

Her physique is the same as Chen Mo's. After quantum life development, she can feel the fluctuations in Chen Mo.

The fluctuation of time and space.

She could feel Chen Mo's body undergoing insignificant changes.

Ok?

Mo Girl's pupils shrank, she clearly saw Chen Mo's body slowly became illusory, like a ghost, until it disappeared without leaving any traces.

Brother Mo disappeared before her eyes?

She was panicked for the first time.

...

Xiao Yu and Zhao Min walked into the study quickly? They looked a little panicked.

Xiao Yu was wearing a wet nightdress. She was in the shower just now? She ran over without even drying her hair. Zhao Min is also in pajamas? Just removed her makeup.

Just now Mo Nu asked the robot to tell them? Chen Mo suddenly disappeared.

This time it disappeared without warning.

The monitoring of the study room recorded the entire process of Chen Mo's disappearance. Like the disappearance of a holographic projection, it slowly faded without any movement.

Xiao Yu's face was pale.

"Brother Mo just entered the inheritance, and told me that if there is any movement, don't disturb him. After a while, he slowly disappeared." Mo Nui's eyes were red, and the whole person was confused. This is since she was emotional , For the first time there was such a big mood swing.

"Before he disappeared, what was the abnormal situation?" Xiao Yu asked.

"Yes, his body fluctuates in time and space." Mo Nu tried to control her emotions.

"Don't worry, his body is a little special, it may be related to that inheritance, this time such anxious comprehension of time superpower, it should be related to time." Zhao Minqiang endured the panic and calmed them.

The study fell into dead silence, and they could even hear each other's breathing.

Xiao Yu entered a super state, looking around, her body disappeared, and her consciousness should still be there. However, no matter what she did, she couldn't find any traces.

Every second is a torment for them.

...

Chen Mo entered a very special space. The space was small and special, surrounded by colorful flowing shadows, covering this special space like a water curtain.

This is like a secret room in a science and technology library.

In the center of the secret room, there is a transparent sphere floating with brilliance, which is the science and technology sphere that Chen Mo has seen in the science and technology library.

After thinking about it, Chen Mo stretched out his hand and attached it to the tech ball.

In the next moment, the science and technology ball fell into the desert like a water drop, following Chen Mo's palm and blending into his body.

Chen Mo, who had been prepared for pain, was taken aback.

The whole technology ball was integrated into his body without any discomfort. Afterwards, the surrounding secret room like a curtain of water disappeared like blisters, and Chen Mo went black without warning and lost consciousness.

Opening his eyes again, Chen Mo looked down at the galaxy in front of him like a god. The movement of every life in the galaxy and the beating of every atom were all present in his mind.

He has a feeling that as long as he has a thought, the galaxy in front of him will be annihilated, leaving no trace.

He cannot sense the passage of time, nor any changes in space.

It seems to be walking on time, quietly watching one life being born, then birth, old, sick, and death, and then the next generation continues to grow and pass on from generation to generation.

He even witnessed the whole process of the development of a civilized planet.

This kind of development takes hundreds of millions of years, but Chen Mo feels that everything seems to be in an instant.

Billions of years have passed? Where is Xiaoyu?

His mind was awake for an instant, pulling him back to reality, and the scene before him rewinded and returned to the original point.

Endless information came into his mind.

【Technology Administrator】

The suffix he dreamed of disappeared.

After digesting all the information he received, Chen Mo froze in a shocked expression, and remained silent for a long time.

Withdrawing from the shocked state, he saw three women in the study with an anxious expression, staring at the chair in the study. This is his study, three women, Xiao Yu and others.

"Xiao Yu." Chen Mo shouted.

Xiao Yu seemed to feel something in his heart, and looked back at him, but looked a little dazed, as if he hadn't seen him.

"Is time and space wrong?" Chen Mo murmured.

...

"I feel my husband is by my side."

Xiao Yu looked around blankly, but did not see any shadow of Chen Mo.

Even in the super state, Chen Mo's consciousness did not exist.

She was sure that she didn't feel wrong. The sense of security that Chen Mo was around was exactly what she felt right now. The two had already had a good understanding, but she could not see where Chen Mo was.

"My husband, where are you, come out quickly." Xiao Yu shouted.

Only the empty echo of the study, but no one can be seen. Mo Nu and Zhao Min also looked around, and Xiao Yu said that Chen Mo was in the room and it should not be wrong.

"Husband."

"Ok!"

A response appeared suddenly, and Chen Mo's figure slowly appeared behind Xiao Yu, smiling at her.

"You still know it."

"..."

chapters.title: Chapter 1071: : Means Of The White Star Civilization
chapters.body:
Chapter 1071: : Means Of The White Star Civilization

Xiao Yu and Zhao Min sat opposite Chen Mo in a posture of a three-court trial.

Now Mo Nu's eyes are still red, and she is a little scared. If Chen Mo disappears in front of her for no reason, she really doesn't know what to do, but it's just a false alarm.

Chen Mo coaxed them for a while before comforting them.

"What happened just now?" Zhao Min first asked his doubts.

Chen Mo remembered the final mission of the Science and Technology Library, and shook his head without telling them. Upon seeing this, the three women tacitly agreed and did not ask any more questions. Chen Mo did not want to say, naturally there was a reason why he did not want to say.

They should be told, Chen Mo never concealed them.

"I'll help you develop your physique." Chen Mo said suddenly.

After a time travel, he felt a panic.

Before time, any life is just a fleeting firework.

He is now a quantum life, theoretically immortal, but Xiao Yu, Zhao Min, and his family are not. The current god-level life has a life span of ten thousand years, but the body functions will also age. What about ten thousand years later? Or what accident happened during the period?

And the mission of the Science and Technology Library made Chen Mo feel his scalp numb.

Xiao Yu and Zhao Min looked at each other.

Chen Mo said it before, but they were not in a hurry, and Chen Mo didn't mention it again. Now Chen Mo said it again, and it was still so serious.

"Ok."

Xiao Yu chose to agree. She was just a little scared before, but Chen Mo said she promised nothing. She didn't worry. She just wanted to keep Chen Mo busy for this period of time before talking about it. Now Chen Mo put forward this idea again, she also understands Chen Mo's painstaking efforts.

"I will live forever, what many people dream of, I will be crazy with you." Zhao Min also chose to agree.

...

Dark forest civilization.

This group of wild beasts entered in an unexpected way.

No one thought that the confrontation between the great forces of the universe would break the deadlock by the dark forest civilization in internal strife.

Di Nanye suddenly dispatched battleships to attack the An's Supercluster under the Marching Ant Group. On the other hand, the Black Forest Civilization controlled by Dinan Miro also began to attack the Hongqiao of the Marching Ant Group from the Muwu Hongqiao side.

Everything came without warning.

These two brothers who had turned against each other suddenly turned their fingers at them? Let Lan realize the seriousness of the situation.

Almost at the same time? Lan made Suo Li and Xiao Li begin to deal with the Dark Forest Civilized Legion, while Wang Hai was still responsible for the defense of Muwu Hongqiao.

The current marching ants? It seems that they have the same situation as the meditation civilization in the past? They are facing the danger of being besieged.

There are forces behind the scenes.

The two brothers were fighting to the death, but they suddenly agreed to a truce? They pointed the finger at them. If something goes wrong, there will be demons.

The action of the two brothers means a change in the direction of the local war.

Later? White Star Civilization also took action, launching an attack at Gulu Hongqiao in Tianlu City. On the other hand, the Black Pupil civilization is about to move, but the Nebula Alliance has been silent.

The predicament of marching ants is too deep? Almost no solution.

Suddenly facing the siege of the three god-level civilizations? Also guard against the defection of your allies.

The five cities led by the Nebula Alliance and Kahn are definitely their allies, but in this era, there are no eternal friends, only eternal interests.

The entire marching ant group?

The marching ant group is the center of this confrontation storm. The goal of the Black Eye civilization is them? Now the other two god-level civilizations are also targeting them.

Now that someone breaks the deadlock, they have become targets in the eyes of everyone.

The situation in the universe? Precarious.

Originally, the internal consumption of the two brothers in the Dark Forest was not disturbed by the outside? Chen Mo just wanted them to consume it, but didn't want it? The two suddenly ceased fighting and pointed their guns at them.

The siege of the three houses put great pressure on the marching ant group.

In just one month, all kinds of equipment and personnel of the marching ant group have been continuously put into the battlefield.

Things are developing too fast, so fast that they will shock the outside world.

The marching ant group fell into the center of an unprecedented storm.

...

In the meeting room, Lan and others looked solemn.

The crisis of the marching ant group spread in the universe, and when the dark forest civilization made a big move, the high-level officials received the news.

As the star, they are naturally aware of the seriousness of this problem.

Lan didn't expect that the two brothers in the dark forest turned their heads around tacitly, attacking their star field and Hongqiao without warning, and the original balance of confrontation was broken.

The siege of the three god-level civilizations has maximized the crisis of the marching ant group, and has now entered a situation of embarrassment on all sides. Even if the marching ant group is more powerful, it will be hard to beat with four hands while facing the offensives of the three god-level civilizations from different directions.

The Dark Forest Civilization is extremely vicious.

The balance was broken, and the marching ants fell into a dilemma of being completely besieged, and the three powerhouses surrounded the confidence of those who wanted to form an alliance.

Lan is not stupid, he knows that the powerful enemy that appears inexplicably is definitely more than simple.

Sure enough, the manipulating hands behind his back soon surfaced.

"The means of the White Star Civilization." The news that Zhu He brought back made the marching ants dignified.

The methods of the White Star Civilization were beyond their expectations.

As a force that is not weaker than the black pupil civilization, the White Star civilization is almost one of the best in the universe, and its background cannot be ignored.

"The White Star Civilization promised Di Nanye to help him increase his strength. When the war here is stable, they can send troops to help Di Nanye complete the unification of the dark forest. The condition is to jointly besiege us." When Zhu He said intelligence, his heart was very heavy. .

"Why did Dinan Miro attack us? Can you find it?" Lan asked.

It stands to reason that the enemy of the enemy is a friend. Dinan Miro and the Dinanye brothers turned against each other, and they were making a lot of noise, almost endlessly. Now Dinan Miro is also attacking them, which is a bit puzzling.

"This can't be found."

"Huh?" Lan frowned, unable to relax.

Army ants are facing an unprecedented crisis.

Once the situation is completely out of control, or the White Star civilization has the upper hand, I am afraid that the five cities led by the Nebula Alliance and Kahn may not follow him all the way to the black.

This group of god-level civilizations really can stand up to them.

...

Yan leaned on the chair and looked very pleased: "It seems that White Star Civilization is also aware of the threat of marching ants. This trick is quite beautiful. Break the balance and hit all the offensive on the marching ants group. See how Chen Mo responds this time. "

Tong Qing was obviously in a good mood: "I didn't expect that the White Star Civilization would come to this trick, but it made me admire."

"But I don't understand Dinan Miro, why didn't he choose to form an alliance with Chen Mo?" Yan stared at the map and analyzed.

In the star field of marching ants, there are two Hongqiao bridges connecting the two ends of the original dark forest civilization.

From the above situation, if Dinan Miro chooses to form an alliance with the marching ants, they can form a stance of flanking Dinanye.

"Who knows what Dinan Miro thinks, maybe he thinks that he controls the dark forest once, or wants to restore the glory of the dark forest by himself." Hitomi smiled and shook his head, and said, "Do we want to Do something?"

"Put some pressure on the forces of the Ten Cities Alliance. We will put pressure on the marching ants from the direction of the Ten Cities Alliance. Don’t let Ling Xi help them. This time, let’s look at the actions of the White Star Civilization. If necessary, we will cooperate with the White Star Civilization. "Yan was extremely happy.

"Good." Tong Qing agreed without hesitation.

Regardless of the final result of the Dark Forest Civilization, the marching ants pose a greater threat to them. As long as he participated in the containment of the marching ants at the end, Tongqing didn't care about their ending.

When the siege posture of the three god-level civilizations is formed, the marching ant group will only be left with the battle of the trapped beasts. At that time, he can only hide in his own small universe.

What he fears most is the uncertain factor of the marching ant group. As long as this confidant is removed, the future hegemony is just around the corner.

chapters.title: Chapter 1072: :Attitude
chapters.body:
Chapter 1072: :Attitude

"The messenger of the White Star Civilization, went to meet several other leaders." The subordinate reported.

Tu Yun's calm face was expressionless: "What did they talk about?"

As the current leader of the Nebula Alliance, the messenger of the White Star Civilization first came to see him, but he was concerned about the taboos of the marching ants, but he did not see him.

He is not stupid, as long as he sees the messengers of the White Star Civilization, the marching ants don't know their specific conversations, and will suspect them more or less, and their alliance will have gaps.

If the White Star Civilization releases some more smoke bombs, then it will only fall into the consequence of being led by the White Star Civilization.

However, as a franchise, the Nebula Alliance is formed by the alliance of several top forces. He is only the current leader and cannot prevent other franchisees from meeting the envoy of the White Star civilization.

"The White Star Civilization provides conditions. As long as we attack the marching ant group, they are willing to provide us with unlimited dark matter. The contract is for a hundred years. The two sides have reached an alliance. If there is an enemy in the future, they will also send troops to help us."

"How did they react?"

"They didn't give the answer head-on." The subordinate said.

"Heh, it seems that we are going to quarrel." Tu Yun smiled coldly, he knew that there must be a leader's heart.

Unexpectedly, in the meeting the next day, several leaders raised this issue.

"The messenger of the White Star Civilization came and wanted to form an alliance with us, what does the leader think?" One of the leaders was straightforward.

"What do you think?" Tu Yun asked without expression.

On his right, a leader thought about it and said: "I personally think it is possible. The alliance with the marching ants is also an alliance, and the alliance with the White Star Civilization is also an alliance. We just want to survive in this troubled world. The strength of the White Star Civilization is stronger. A better ally than marching ants."

Tu Yun listened quietly, without expressing any thoughts, but looked at other leaders.

"I also think it is feasible. The 100-year contract. By that time, the space war may have passed long ago, and we can survive." The other leader also nodded in agreement.

The others, either nodded or remained silent, obviously not opposed to this idea.

"I don't agree." Tu Yun said coldly.

The meeting room, which was originally a bit eager, was instantly cold, and several leaders looked at Tuyun in a daze, and said nothing for a long time.

"why?"

They don't understand Tu Yun's opposition? Obviously this is a better choice.

"After the army ants are destroyed? Who are we going to face? Black Eye Civilization? Or Thor Civilization?" Tu Yun said coldly, "At that time, in the event of a war? You promise that the White Star Civilization will help us? Not against us. Cannon fodder?"

"But is the agreement written by both parties? They will send troops."

"We have still written the agreement with the marching ants! But what are we discussing now? Can we abandon the agreement with the marching ants and turn our heads to form an alliance with the White Star Civilization? Why can't the White Star Civilization betray the agreement?" Tu Yun is not polite Said sarcastically.

The meeting room fell silent.

...

Chen Mo hugged Xiao Yu out of the Quantum Life Ball and placed it gently on the bed. Next to her? Zhao Min is lying. Two body signs are stable? It's just vital data, completely different from before.

The two women have just finished their physical transformations and are still sleeping. Need to wait for them to wake up? Then slowly adapt to their physical changes.

After Chen Mo's improvement? The shortcomings of the Quantum Life Sphere have long since disappeared, and now it can be used with confidence.

Chen Mo stroked the two women's foreheads.

"Close the Quantum Life Orb and go back."

Solar system, marching ant armed department.

When Chen Mo entered the combat department, many high-level officials seemed to have taken a reassurance? Secretly relieved, the atmosphere in the combat room was also quietly changing.

Now the marching ants are in the midst of survival? Chen Mo is undoubtedly their best spiritual support.

Chen Mo already knows the current situation? They are currently under siege, almost embarrassed on all sides. The entire Armed Forces? All Warfare Departments?

This war? They cannot and cannot afford to lose.

"How is the situation?" Chen Mo asked when he saw Lan.

"It's a bit urgent. The An's Transcendent Galaxy Cluster has started fighting, Xiaoli and Suoli are dealing with it. On the Muwu Hongqiao side, Wang Hai is defending. The White Star Civilization is also testing in Gulu Hongqiao, and the Black Eye Civilization grants the Ten Cities Alliance Pressure. It can be said that a pack of wolves is waiting."

Lan pointed to a few red areas in the holographic star map, where the war was taking place. At this time, they deeply felt the state of the underworld civilization being under siege.

"Can you deal with it?" Chen Mo asked.

"It's okay to persist for a period of time, mainly depending on the Nebula Alliance and Kahn. The White Star Civilization has sent envoys to the Nebula Alliance. If the cloud is turned back, Kahn can't stand the pressure of the Black Pupil civilization, and we are a little troubled."

Lan pointed to two areas of the Nebula Alliance and the Ten Cities Alliance.

For the marching ants, now is not the most critical time.

They are not bordered by the Black Eye Civilization, nor are they truly bordered by the White Star Civilization. Gulu Hongqiao is the star region of the Ten Cities Alliance. Although the two brothers Dinanye and Dinanmiro are coming fiercely, they can still be separated from the war department.

The most important thing is the attitude of the Nebula Alliance and the Ten Cities Alliance.

If the two succumb to the pressure of the White Star Civilization and the Black Pupil Civilization, they will face siege from all directions. At that time, it will be the most critical time. If they are not handled well, they will follow the footsteps of the Pluto civilization.

"Don't we still have several hole cards?"

Lan's spirit was shocked: "Do you want to use your hole cards?"

"Don't move, it's not time yet." Chen Mo stared at the star map with an extremely calm voice, as if he was not worried about the situation in front of him.

At this moment, Mo Nu suddenly said: "Brother Mo, Kahn is here to contact."

...

Kahn in the holographic projection, his face is a bit more tired than before.

During this period, the pressure on the Ten Cities Alliance was beyond imagination.

The Ten-City Alliance exists in name only, and now only their five cities are of the same heart, and they are now facing increasing pressure from the Black Eye civilization. Especially when the White Star Civilization and the Dark Forest joined to contain the marching ants, the internal differences became bigger and bigger.

Many beings advocate accepting the alliance conditions of the black pupil civilization so that they can survive.

This kind of intrigue can be harder than on the battlefield.

"Mr. Chen Mo, don't be unharmed." Kahn maintained a calm face. This is the basic quality that a leader should possess. Even in the face of strong pressure, he must be calm and unhurried.

"The current situation does not allow me to say no harm." Chen Mo said.

Kahn was taken aback, and then smiled bitterly: "That's right, the current situation is indeed ill. As far as I know, the White Star Civilization has given Di Nanye good conditions, and they promised Di Nanye to help him fight after the incident. Dinan Miro, unify the dark forest. Moreover, on the Nebula Alliance side, the White Star Civilization seems to have also sent envoys."

"White Star Civilization is indeed beautiful."

Chen Mo remained calm, not surprised by this news, because he also got the same information here.

White Star Civilization's move this time can be said to be at no cost.

"Your marching ants don't seem to be doing very well now, how do you plan to deal with it?" Kahn looked at Chen Mo's face, hoping to see something in his expression.

"Don't talk about us yet, where is your side?" Chen Mo asked back.

"The people below are arguing fiercely, wanting to accept the conditions of the black pupil civilization, at least to survive."

Hearing these thoughts, Chen Mo was not surprised, it made sense.

"How are you marching ants planning?" Kahn stared at Chen Mo's face.

Chen Mo is the youngest leader he has ever seen. From Chen Mo's information, he can understand that no matter how strong, courageous, magnanimous and charismatic is, he is no weaker than the veteran leader like Tong Qing. This is the best life he has ever seen. none of them.

Now the marching ants have come to life and death.

This predicament completely tests a leader's ability to face the crisis. Chen Mo's existence made even Black Eye and Bai Xing jealous. He also wanted to see how this guy who was jealous of the two major civilizations faced a life and death crisis.

"I just want to hear your choices now." Chen Mo didn't answer him head-on, but chose to ask back.

"we?"

"Yes, your choice. As you said just now, the people below are noisy and want to agree to the conditions of the black pupil, at least to survive. But that is the idea of the people below, not the high-level ones."

"In fact, there is nothing wrong with their thinking. In the troubled times, to survive is the best choice."

"Then they will be used as guns and cannon fodder? You should know that Hitomi's ambition is not just as simple as a certain family. His ambition is the entire universe. Even if you promise them, when we disintegrate, he will deal with it later, for sure It is one of the other god-level civilizations, and then you will be treated as a pioneer cannon fodder army. A somewhat combative, but also strong cannon fodder can consume the enemy and is the most convenient to use."

Kahn's breath stagnated, his expression hard to look. Chen Mo said that he was in an alliance with the Black Eye Civilization. The so-called alliance was nothing but a means by Tong Qing to control them.

Once he was disobedient in the future, Hitomi could make an excuse, saying that he did not abide by the alliance agreement and killed him backhand.

"At least I can live for a few more days, isn't it? The insects still cherish their lives, let alone my intelligent life sitting in a high position."

Chen Mo smiled coldly and said, "Then you have to live well."

chapters.title: Chapter 1073: :Select
chapters.body:
Chapter 1073: :Select

After hanging up the video call with Chen Mo, Kahn had a dark face.

This kind of expression is hard to see on him. As a superior, he can control his emotions, and his usual decision-making is calm enough. It seems that everything can be calm.

Even in the face of the pressure of the black pupil civilization, he can calm down and think about the pros and cons.

But when he makes a decision, he will act vigorously. It was his decision to decisively execute the intelligence personnel arranged by the traitor and the two god-level civilizations.

The moment he decides to come out, it means that he and the two civilizations are torn apart.

Originally thought that the balance was expected, who would have thought, the entry of the dark forest civilization, let his hopeful marching ant group into an unprecedented crisis.

Now he has to face a choice again.

The Ten Cities Alliance exists in name only, and he chooses to form an alliance with the Black Eye Civilization. He may step down, or even be judged by the Black Eye Civilization, in exchange for the peace of Xi Mo City, and then another person will come on stage.

Those words of Chen Mo were also what he thought [Liancheng www.wsx5.cn], but it was always unpleasant to be said by him without any cover.

Choosing to ally with the black pupil civilization, they are at a disadvantage. There may be temporary security, but in the long run, it is definitely not a wise choice.

Hitomi is ambitious, has the ambition to annex the universe, and will never be willing to ally with these weak people.

As Chen Mo said, they may be used as cannon fodder, as the pioneers of the pupils competing in the universe, to consume other strong opponents.

If you choose the black pupil civilization, their first opponent is the marching ants who are now allied with them, how ironic.

The marching ants are a good ally, don’t worry about betrayal.

Because the crisis faced by the marching ants is greater than them, once they betrayed, they will lose both sides, and then they will all be swallowed by the god-level civilization that is eye-catching.

But now the marching ants are in a critical situation, and if they are not handled well, they may instantly overturn.

If you continue to ally with the marching ants, wait for the marching ants to have problems? At that time, they will not even have the qualifications to be the cannon fodder of the god-level civilization? Only the country will be destroyed.

Ling Xi fell into contemplation after listening to Kahn's account? Her expression was relatively calm.

"If we allied with the Black Eye Civilization? What will happen to the marching ants?"

"Destruction!" Kahn uttered two words, after thinking about it? Something was wrong, and then said: "Or retreat to the small universe."

"They have a small universe? What about us? How do we end up?"

"We may be able to live? But become a kind of dog of the black pupil civilization, let anyone bite whoever bites." Kahn said with a gloomy face, he did not want to say these words, but the reality is so cruel.

Ling Xi was unmoved by this description: "After the marching ants disappear? Who is bordering us?"

How many blinks of Kahn's eyes? Said: "White Star Civilization, if accidentally, there may be the two brothers of Dark Forest Civilization."

"We are caught between several god-level civilizations, once they start?"

Kahn was silent, he did not dare to think further.

Seeing that Kahn didn't speak? Ling Xi continued: "We will become the most tragic battlefield here, and may even become the ruins of the universe war? The citizens of it, I don't need to say more."

On war and combat? Ling Xi, as a general star, sees more thoroughly than Kahn.

"Anyway and vertical are the same end? Why don't we take a gamble?" Ling Xi said.

"Gambling on marching ants?"

"Do we have other ways to bet? There is a gap between the strength of us and the marching ants? But to him? They are their more powerful friends. And in the black pupil civilization, what are we? A dog-like me? I don't want to be their dog. It's the first time I live. Why should I be his dog?

Moreover, we may not lose. If the Nebula Alliance and the marching ants are in one mind, our three emerging forces can't break their wrists against the three god-level civilizations? Also, are we sure that Chen Mo really has no other cards? "

Kahn was silent for a long time.

...

"The White Star Civilization is really clever." Fatty Luo bit his leg, full of emotion: "I'm afraid the marching ants are in trouble this time."

Zi Yun stared at the star map, her eyes gleaming: "Is there a way to break the game?"

The dozing young man next to him was holding a doll, and nothing happened.

Fatty Luo put down the fleshy leg in his hand, picked up a tissue and wiped his mouth, then said: "The key lies in the Nebula Alliance and the Ten Cities Alliance. The White Star Civilization and the Nebula Alliance have come into contact. Tong Qing also puts pressure on the Ten Cities Alliance. If the two families turn to each other, or choose not to help at this time, the marching ants will be over."

"Not necessarily." Zi Yun thought for a while, shook his head and popped out two words.

"not necessarily?"

Fatty Luo looked at Zi Yun incomprehensibly. Zi Zhong, who was dozing off, woke up for a while and looked at Zi Yun.

"Does the star master have a way to break the game?"

"When there is no one, don't call me Star Master." Zi Yun said calmly.

"It's just a title, it's all the same." Fatty Luo didn't care about Zi Yun's words.

"It's not me, it's Chen Mo." Zi Yun was very sure.

"Why so sure?"

"Aren't you curious about where I went some time ago? I was in the Marching Ant Group, Chen Mo's hometown."

As soon as he said this, Fatty Luo stared in disbelief.

Zi Zhong, who was dozing off, woke up in an instant, staring at Zi Yun incomparably gossiping, "You won't go over to be his wife, will you?"

Fatty Luo's eyelids twitched, and he slapped Zizhong's head with a fan-like palm: "Sleep you, don't speak, don't speak, no one will treat you as dumb."

Zi Yun was speechless about Zi Zhong's thoughts.

"I lived there for a while and experienced the civilized environment in which Chen Mo grew up." A trace of recollection appeared in Zi Yun's eyes: "There, I saw Chen Mo's power."

"Have you seen his secret weapon or special technique?"

"I have experienced the special technology once." Zi Yun remembered that after Chen Mo had seen all her memory and privacy, her calm face was slightly unnatural.

"What kind of special technology?" Zi Zhong held the doll with a smile on his face.

This time, even Fatty Luo was a little gossip.

"It's about super power." Zi Yun didn't take their gaze seriously, and her expression returned to her former calm: "He is always so confident and unfathomable, so he must have a hole card this time."

Fatty Luo thought about the information in Zi Yun's words.

"What should we do?" Zi Zhong asked.

"Make some trouble for Bai Xing." Zi Yun said firmly.

...

After Chen Mo hung up the phone, he took a deep breath.

Lan and others in the war room frowned.

They are thinking.

What does Kahn mean? Do you want to turn your back on the alliance and go to the black pupil civilization?

They have to have this concern, because the agreement between them and Kahn does not have an advantage compared to the conditions given by the black pupil civilization. In joint operations, they need command power, while the black pupil civilization does not.

In addition, what they can provide, the Black Eye Civilization can also provide, including resisting the White Star Civilization, and can do better.

If Kahn abandons the alliance agreement, they will have no small trouble.

"Should you prepare to withdraw troops from the Gulu Galaxy?" Lan asked.

Chen Mo shook his head and said, "No, but pay attention to the movement of Ximocheng. Kahn is hesitating and has no real answer yet."

"Then what are we doing now?" Chi Jin next to Lan asked.

"Wait." Chen Mo said after thinking.

What are you waiting for? When the Nebula Alliance's answer is unsure about the attitude of his ally, it is not appropriate to act rashly. Otherwise, once the warhead is mobilized and they turn against them, the marching ants will be the real trouble.

"First, focus on dealing with the two brothers of the Dark Forest Civilization. The White Star Civilization has no direct contact with us. Once we do it, there is still time for us to respond. Even if Kahn turns, their warhead mobilizes to our side, there is time to respond. At the same time, prepare for the worst."

As Chen Mo said, all they can do now is to wait, wait for the situation to become clear, and to confirm the enemy and us, so that they can use their fists without scruple, but they must also prepare for the worst.

The fastest preparation is for Kahn and the Nebula Alliance to rebel.

There was a brief silence in the combat room, and then quickly got busy, preparing for the worst plan.

The waiting time is very tormenting, but every life in the marching ant group is tense and afraid to relax, especially the frontline generals. They are not allowed to fail. Once they fail, they will face an endless abyss.

Soon, news came from the Nebula Alliance, and Tu Yun rejected the conditions of the White Star civilization.

chapters.title: Chapter 1074: : Broken Balance
chapters.body:
Chapter 1074: : Broken Balance

"Why?" Chen Mo looked at the Tuyun in the holographic projection, puzzled.

He didn't understand why Tu Yun made this choice.

The conditions of the White Star civilization are better than their marching ants, and they are powerful, but Tu Yun insists on choosing the marching ant group that seems to be weaker from the outside world.

This choice is obviously not in line with the interests of the current Nebula Alliance.

"If you have to say the reason, there is indeed one. I have studied the history of your hometown, using the allusions of your hometown, it is called lip death and tooth cold. After you perish, we will not live long." Tu Yun said.

Chen nodded at the same time by default, at least Tu Yun was not confused.

"I told other senior leaders of the Nebula Alliance that if we can betray the alliance today, then our alliance can also betray us tomorrow."

Cooperating with the White Star Civilization is tantamount to seeking skin with a tiger. They belong to a side bed. The White Star Civilization will never watch them grow bigger, just want to use them.

"I can't guarantee that it will not happen in the future, but at least I will not suspend my alliance with you during these years."

Hearing these words, Chen Mo relaxed a lot.

The Nebulas Alliance’s choice made them less pressured.

"You have the confidence to resist, right?" Tu Yun's tone was still a bit worried. After all, the three offensives, even if they don't border each other, they have to guard against.

"Don't worry, I have no problem here. I want to swallow me, but I have to break my teeth." Chen Mo was full of confidence.

The two chatted a lot, each said some information about their own star domain, and also exchanged some opinions on the situation, and finally reiterated their position before hanging up the call.

...

The Nebula Alliance refused.

When this news spread, the senior leaders of the White Star Civilization were all taken aback.

They think that the conditions given are better than the marching ants. Why should they refuse? Is there any reason to refuse? Couldn't the Nebula Alliance see the current situation of the marching ants? Or do you think that the marching ants can resist their offensive?

A series of questions appeared in their minds.

When Hu Bingxin received the news, she was in a bad mood.

There were some disagreements within the Nebula Alliance, and many people agreed with the alliance, but it was a pity that this alliance was destroyed by Tuyun. According to the information obtained from the intelligence, Tu Yun's concerns are simple, fearing that they will go back or be cannon fodder in the future.

In fact, she really thought so.

Under the pace of dominating the universe, there are only two ways to either surrender or perish. Even if they can survive in the first stage, they will definitely disappear in the next stage, whether it is an alliance with the white star civilization or the black pupil civilization. Can't escape this fate.

"Since this doesn't work? Just come on hard." Hu Bingxin said.

The high-level spirits on the field gathered for a while? Looking at each other, he understood the meaning of Hu Bing's heart.

"Will this be too anxious? We and the marching ants will lose out? Isn't the black pupil civilization picking up the bargain?" A high-level executive said his worries.

"Don't worry? Black pupil civilization is more anxious than we are hoping to destroy Chen Mo. He won't just sit back and watch such a good opportunity." Hu Bingxin looked confident.

How many high-level executives saw the self-confidence look of Hu Bingxin? Now Hu Bingxin is the leader of the White Star Civilization, except for the old chief? No other high-level officials can deny her decision.

"Ling? Let Gou Xuan do it." Hu Bingxin said, "Ban Yan also speed up."

As one of the super powers in the universe, the White Star Civilization is naturally rich in soldiers, and there are three top generals, Gouxuan, Banyan and Yangnan. Yangnan guards the internal stability of the White Star civilization? Prevents outside attacks? Gou Xuan is in Gulu Hongqiao.

The most important thing is Banyan, the warhead of Banyan is joining forces with the giants to deal with the Wuxian civilization, as long as the Hercules is conquered by them? They will directly contact the star field of the marching ant group, and then they can go from the direction of the Great Wall of Sloan Advance towards the marching ant star field.

The marching ant group? Will become their bag.

...

The White Star Civilization and the marching ant group war broke out, all this was as early as expected by the outside world. The White Star Civilization launched an offensive against the Ten Cities Alliance in the Gulu Galaxy? At the same time, the offensive against the Great Wall of Sloan also suddenly increased.

"This is a good opportunity." Yan's eyes gleamed when he heard that the White Star Civilization acted on the marching ants.

Tong Qing hesitated: "Would you like to wait any longer? Let the White Star Civilization and the marching ants take a while? Let's enter the venue again?"

"No."

Yan immediately shook his head to stop Tong Qing from thinking like this.

"During the war, opportunities are fleeting. The situation was confrontational and in a state of balance. The White Star Civilization saw us deal with the marching ants, so they chose to use the marching ants as a breakthrough point and wanted to work together to deal with this threat. Once we stand by, White Star Civilization The attacking of the marching ants will be stopped. At that time, an opportunity to destroy the marching ants without too much effort will disappear."

The sensitivity and sense of smell to war are Yan's advantage, so he can be called the top general in the universe.

After the demise of the meditation civilization, the outside world is waiting for an opportunity to break the balance again. Now the opportunity appears. If they don't seize it, the next time, they don't know when.

"it is good."

Tong Qing agreed with Yan's idea.

In terms of war affairs, Tong Qing was almost entirely responsible for the management of Yan. Yan's keen sense of smell and strategy for war is beyond him.

...

The Black Eye Civilization officially declared war on the marching ants.

As soon as the news came out, the universe was in an uproar.

The White Star civilization attacked from the direction of Gulu Hongqiao, and the allies of the giants joined hands with the White Star to advance in the direction of Hercules.

The two brothers of the Dark Forest Civilization attacked from both the direction of the constellation of the marching ants and the Supercluster of Angels.

The black pupil civilization chose to pressure from the Ten Cities Alliance.

The pattern of three god-level civilizations and the four forces surrounding the hunting and marching ant group formally took shape.

The space war is fully launched, and the original balance system is also broken. The outside world knows that the era of space war is coming again. This time the center of the storm is the marching ant group.

However, there is more than one big news.

The Ten Cities Alliance broke the news that Kahn rejected the alliance conditions with the Black Eye Civilization and announced that he would continue to maintain his alliance with the marching ants. The news caused a shock within the Ten Cities Alliance.

Several of the Ten Cities Alliance thought Kahn would compromise this time, but Kahn would still choose to unite with the marching ants.

They were quarrelsome internally because of Kahn's decision.

The original rift, from the dark to the bright, the alliance was completely broken.

Yuelu City reached an agreement with the White Star Civilization and joined the alliance camp of the White Star Civilization.

The gods, the holy pythons, and the hunters announced that they had accepted the black-eye civilization and formed an alliance with the black-eye civilization.

Luo Hucheng remained neutral and kept silent from beginning to end.

As for the remaining Ximo City, Demon Luo City, Liuli City, Tianlu City, and Mermaid City, they formed a new 50% alliance to maintain the alliance relationship with the marching ant group.

The Ten Cities Alliance, once one of the top powers, officially announced its disintegration.

Between Marching Ants, Nebula, and the New Five Cities, frequent fleet movements began to occur. Needless to think about it, the three are launching a joint defense plan. They want to hold a group to guard against the attacks of the three god-level civilizations.

The situation of confrontation has been formed.

The war is fierce.

When the Ten-City Alliance officially announced its disintegration, the Black Eye Civilization did not hesitate to send the War Head into the Star Territory of the Ten-City Alliance to launch an attack on the New Five Cities. Following the three civilizations of the Black Eye civilization, they declared war on the New Five Cities backhand.

The cosmic war is fully launched in the Ten Cities Alliance star field.

chapters.title: Chapter 1075: : God'S Left Hand
chapters.body:
Chapter 1075: : God'S Left Hand

In the laboratory, Chen Mo focused on a chair being assembled with a machine.

This chair is not an ordinary chair.

It has been a long time since the Hand of God project. Chen Mo and Mo Nu's joint research has accelerated the speed of this project.

Especially after conquering the initial super energy materials, most of the technical bottlenecks encountered by the project disappeared.

Now is the harvest season.

The chair in front of you is the core technological product of the'God's Hand' project:'God's Left Hand'.

Like Dr. X, use super power to spread to every corner, and then use super power to control the opponent. The difference is that Dr. X’s super power is planetary level, and Chen Mo now wants to amplify his super power to reach galaxy level. , Even bigger.

Superpowers above the galaxy level, when used properly, can almost change the course of war.

For a long time, Chen Mo concealed this project. Except for the few closest to him, no one else knew about the existence of this project.

The core executives of the marching ants were only exposed to the ‘Hand of God’ derivative product ‘Super Power Armor’, and did not know the complete content of the Hand of God project.

The impact of this project is too wide, and Chen Mo regards this project as the core technical trump card.

At the beginning, the ‘Super Power Armor’ of the Sauron Alliance’s core high-level players was only a weakened version of the ‘Hand of God’, and now this is their full version.

With the outbreak of the space war, the marching ants are currently facing the siege of the three god-level civilizations. The offensive is very strong. The war erupts in all directions. The pressure on the battlefield is not small, and the pressure on the battlefield is not small.

But Chen Mo has never been beaten and never fight back. He has his hole cards and confidence.

Since the other party wanted to destroy him, he would naturally not sit still.

Not only for the marching ants, but also for the mission.

Up to now, there has never been a super technology in the outside world, and Chen Mo does not intend to keep hiding it. It is time for the universe to see how far technology can go.

So he decided to use this hole card.

"The assembly is complete." Mo Nu turned her head and said.

"Ok."

Chen Mo nodded lightly, approached and touched the chair and the helmet.

This is not a separate piece of equipment, but a set of "this set of equipment" that needs to be connected to the entire space battleship, using the signal transmission and energy of the space battleship to maintain the operation of the equipment.

The ‘Hand of God’ project? It aims to spread one’s own super energy through quantum transmission to reach the corners that quantum signals can reach? In order to control all life within this range.

In this scenario, he is God? Know the memory of each life? Control the actions, words and deeds of each life.

As far as the existing war technology is concerned, this super technology is a dimensionality reduction attack.

"I will try first."

Chen Mo sat on the chair? Let the helmet of the chair cover his head.

A sense of control over the world swept through his body.

...

An unknown planet in the small universe.

Lan got off the spaceship and set foot on this unknown planet. The size of this planet is three times that of the earth, and this kind of planet is also pitiful among the planets in the universe.

This is an oxygen-rich planet? The planet is blue-green, which is really beautiful.

Is it such a planet without civilized life? An ace warhead of the marching ant group is assembled.

Super War Department.

"Hello, my lord." The players in the field saluted Lan Qi together with a loud voice.

"Hello." Lan returned a military salute.

Since Chen Mo ordered him to form the Super War Department? He has asked Zhong Lei to start selecting special types of super talents in all super schools in the Star Territory of the Marching Ant Group to train and develop them.

His purpose is very simple? Let these special types of superpowers gather in one place, use super armored armor, and build the strongest team in the universe.

This is one of the strongest trump cards of the marching ant group.

"Come here this time, there is a mission, not an exercise, but a real mission." Lan said to the players in front.

The atmosphere of the team is one of a kind, the atmosphere of killing is permeated, and the atmosphere has a deep sense of oppression. This team is similar to Shenwei, directly under Chen Mo, and is the strongest team.

"Our opponent is a god-level civilization, but what about a god-level civilization?" Lan's unruly tone passed into the ears of every team member: "This time we will let the god-level civilization see what is the super power era."

call!

An excitement filled the whole team.

...

The marching ant group is running frantically.

This war is different. They need to fight with their allies. The friendly forces are the Nebula Alliance and the New Five Cities Alliance.

The trilateral power against the three god-level civilizations is the most intense battle since the war broke out. Except for the Guardian Warhead stationed inside, the Marching Ant Group all entered the battlefield.

For this reason, the three parties established a joint operations department, and the commander-in-chief of the operations department is Lan. The two deputy commanders are Ling Xi and the top general of the Nebula Alliance, Xing Mingfeng, and the other staff think tanks are selected from the generals and staff of their respective operations departments.

The three parties have their respective headquarters in the star region, responsible for wars in the star region.

After the Super War Department was fully equipped, Lan did not rashly launch a counterattack.

He knows very well that this hole card, as long as it can be used to the maximum, can instantly turn the tide of battle. Once exposed, the warhead of the god-level civilization is prepared, and they will get much less results.

After determining the combat effectiveness of the Super Warhead, Lan began to formulate a counterattack plan.

The strongest intelligence force of the entire marching ant group is used passively to determine the location of the enemy’s key warheads and command posts.

In the Super War Department, special types of super war soldiers have combat power comparable to a small fleet. This terrifying combat power is enough for them to disrupt the offensive rhythm of God-level civilization and start a counterattack.

And the members of Tuyun, Mingfeng, Kahn, and Lingxi, who formed the joint operations department with the marching ants, were deeply shocked when they saw the appearance of the super warhead.

They never thought that the marching ant group actually developed a super battle armor and secretly formed a super war department.

The war department has a small organization, only 20,000 soldiers.

But if the 20,000 soldiers confronted head-on, they could easily destroy any top warhead in the universe.

Tu Yun, Kahn and others doubted Chen Mo's true strength for the first time. The strength of the marching ant group alone has reached the top of the universe with the technology of Super Armor.

No wonder the three god-level civilizations can't wait to put Chen Mo to death, this guy is too terrifying.

God level civilization is going to be unlucky.

This is the only thought in their hearts, and at the same time, they are fortunate that they did not choose the wrong team, otherwise they are the first to face this kind of terrorist warfare force.

When Chen Mo appeared with the'God's Left Hand', Lan was dumbfounded. Lan, who reacted, fell into ecstasy, and his confidence in the war rose to an unprecedented height.

The'Left Hand of God' is a galaxy-level superpower weapon. Its existence is a hundred times stronger than the entire superpower warhead.

Space weapons only spread at the speed of light, and it will take more than 100,000 years to completely destroy a galaxy. And this kind of super-powered weapon does not have a propagation speed limit.

The boss said that consciousness is a fourth-dimensional matter, and superpower involves consciousness and is not limited by the speed of light. Therefore, superpower in space can tear open the door of space and appear billions of light years away.

Lan is almost certain that as long as he determines the galaxy where the opponent's leader is located, travels through space and controls with super powers, the war is over, just like the last time he dealt with the Sauron Alliance.

At this stage, this is an unsolvable weapon.

chapters.title: Chapter 1076: :Support
chapters.body:
Chapter 1076: :Support

"My lord, the reinforcements from the headquarters are here." Deca said respectfully.

The person in front of him is Ming Tu, one of the top generals of the marching ant group, now he looks like a human, and his appearance looks ordinary.

They had all heard of Ming Tu's deeds, and no one dared to underestimate his abilities.

"How many have you come?" Ming Tu withdrew his gaze from the star chart and turned to ask.

"Five thousand!" Deca said.

"Five thousand?" Ming Tu's voice was slightly surprised: "Is that so many?"

The corners of Deca's mouth twitched.

Five thousand reinforcements? Is it too much? Not much at all.
