Interstellar warfare consumes hundreds of millions of war machines. The warhead has more than one million people as the unit, and the warships are all over 10,000. However, the headquarters has sent five thousand reinforcements. Master Ming Tu said more.

Even the top five thousand armored divisions have a limited role in war.

In the war, various weapons of destruction were raging, and the top armored divisions were slightly different, and the end was the same, even the teeth were not enough. Space warfare emphasizes strategy and tactics, and a very small number of individual soldiers are powerful and have little effect.

"Let's go out and have a look." Ming Tu put down the laser pointer in his hand and turned to leave the combat department.

The many generals and staff in the war department looked at each other, and they didn't understand why the five thousand reinforcements should be met by the adults in person, but they didn't dare to ask casually.

...

Keiya, in the local dialect of the star, means hero.

Keiya's family gave him this name, so that one day, he can become a big man, not an ordinary life on the planet.

There was no hope of fulfilling this vision in a lifetime. However, shortly after the Marching Ant Group took over the Pisces Cetus, it started to create the Super Academy. He was very lucky to be a member of the Super Academy and was developed with special mental superpowers.

In the selection process? He successfully became a member of the Super War Department.

During training? He naturally knew that this kind of opportunity was not easy to come by, so he was surprisingly hardworking? He also learned that he is not the most talented group of players? But he is definitely the hardest group of players.

In the selection of the captain, with his usual hard work, his stable character, and the conviction of the players? He successfully became the captain of the first team of the Super War Department.

This is the first non-exercise mission? All their team members know that they are about to face a real war.

There is no fear, but some expectations.

"My lord, Guidon, the first team captain of the Super War Department? Come with the team? Report to you." Seeing Ming Tu coming over, Guidon hurriedly saluted.

Ming Tu is one of the top generals within the marching ant group. It is the same level generals as the commander-in-chief Lan, and one of the idols of the major war divisions of the marching ant group.

Can you see it so close today? It made him happy.

"Master Lan sent his subordinates to support him. During the period, he obeyed all the orders of Master Ming Tu." Keizo said loudly, and handed a disk to Ming Tu: "This is the detailed information of all the members of our team? There is also ability introduction. ."

Ming Tu also returned a military salute and looked at Kyuya.

"Not bad."

Hearing Ming Tu's praise? Keiya felt a little flattered. Have they ever heard of Master Mingtu's indifferent character? Very few praises, the entire marching ant group, people praised by Master Mingtu are extremely rare.

"Let your subordinates rest first, you and the deputy captain, come with me." After Ming Tu finished speaking, he turned to Deka next to him and said, "Prepare a free combat meeting room. I need to use it."

...

"Enough for them to drink a pot this time." Xiaoli and Suoli looked through the information of the members of the Super War Department, and their hearts were agitated.

Especially Suoli, he joined the marching ant group after the destruction of the Sauron Alliance. He became a monk halfway through, and he still didn't understand some of the most core secrets of the marching ant group.

In the past, he didn't understand how he lost so badly at the beginning, but now he sees this team, he really understands why he lost so badly at the beginning.

They used to be two levels of forces with the marching ants.

At the same time he was shocked.

With such a team, cosmic civilization, who else can match it?

This is almost insoluble.

"Make a detailed plan. This time, let them see how terrifying the weapons of the super power era are." Xiaoli smiled viciously.

The three god-level civilizations besieged, they have been on the defensive, now they can finally plan a counterattack. During this period of time, he was unable to counterattack the opponent, he was very aggrieved, this time he would not let the opponent easily.

...

"Master Mingfeng, I am Wushi, the deputy captain of the second battalion of the Advanced Warfare Division of the Marching Ant Group. In the future, we will assist the adults in the Nebula Alliance fight." Wushi saluted the male life in front of him with a serious expression. .

This life is Ming Feng, the commander-in-chief of the Nebula Alliance.

It looks tall and thin, is a typical humanoid, slender body, big eyes, no particularly obtrusive characteristics, among the many life races in the universe, it is a very humble humanoid.

But it is such a humanoid who controls the military power of the Nebula Alliance, the largest power under the god-level civilization.

His name is not loud among ordinary beings, and it is much worse than the top generals of other major forces in the universe. But in Jiangxing circle, his reputation is not weak.

There is a characteristic of his combat. It is not stunned or hot. It is worse than a strategic layout. He is not as good as a god-level civilization. He is also slightly inferior to tactics.

So his fighting style is very ordinary and has no obvious characteristics, but it is the most deadly. His advantage in the battlefield is accumulated little by little, like a frog boiled in warm water, when the opponent reacts, his advantage is enough to snowball.

The generals who fought with him were very uncomfortable. Many times, like a punch on cotton, when they wanted to take it back, they found that they were entangled.

Mingfeng also saluted Wushi.

Looked back and forth on the two thousand players behind him.

As the deputy commander of the Joint Operations Department, Lan told him not long ago about the existence of this super-power warfare, but simply mentioned a name and their abilities, but he has not really seen this team fight.

Now, they have appeared as reinforcements, and Ming Feng is also the first time to see them.

In the team, the race of almost every life is different, and the size is also different. The tall ones are three to four meters tall, and the short ones are less than one meter. They are uneven and look weird, like a miscellaneous army.

However, the murderousness and confidence in their eyes told him that this team is not simple.

"Do you obey my command or fight independently?" Mingfeng asked.

"Reporting adults, in principle, we only obey the instructions of the boss and Master Lan, but the adults can explain our tasks, how to complete it, and we will make tactics by ourselves." Wushi said.

As soon as the deputy general of Mingfeng Life wanted to speak, he was stunned by Mingfeng's eyes.

"Then it will be troublesome." Ming Feng nodded gently.

"No trouble, sir." Wushi said modestly.

"You go to the base for a rest. For combat missions, I will contact you directly."

"Yes, sir." Wushi Chaoming gave a military salute, turned and led the team away.

As soon as the members of the Super War Department left, the generals around Mingfeng couldn't hold back.

"What's the matter with this marching ant group? Sending two thousand reinforcements over, are they here for sightseeing? What is this [笔趣阁www.xbqg5200.xyz] alliance?" a general said angrily.

"And you still don't obey our command, isn't this a nonsense?" The other star was also a little unhappy.

"Okay." Mingfeng interrupted their complaints: "If the Nebula Warhead goes to the marching ant star field to support, will it obey the command of the opponent's star? If you don't understand the style of a team, it will hurt this. A team, this is the basic knowledge of the star."

"But how do they compare to the Nebula Warhead?"

Mingfeng shook his head, without explaining to Jiangxing below.

According to the information revealed by Lan, this team possesses terrifying combat effectiveness and belongs to the core secret. It is used as a strange army. The following generals are not enough to know this information.

In the future, when this team really showed their ability, Jiang Xing below naturally understood.

chapters.title: Chapter 1077: : Counterattack
chapters.body:
Chapter 1077: : Counterattack

"Be careful." Rong Jin reminded the soldiers at the sentry station, staring at the calm radar display, he felt a sense of anxiety instead.

They are now stationed in the Wanshan Galaxy, an important dark matter storage galaxy in the Black Forest civilization.

The dark matter here will be transported to various planets producing battleships and war robots through transport ships, and then sent to the front lines to meet those battleships and robots.

This can be regarded as an important central galaxy, and its strategic position is self-evident to the front line of the battle between the Black Forest and Muwu Hongqiao.

Dark matter is a very important strategic resource, so here in the Wanshan Galaxy, a complete warfare department is stationed, with heavy space-based weapon protection.

Especially after the battle with the marching ants, the garrison here has increased a lot.

Because in Muwu Hongqiao, it was the Sea King Battle Headquarters of the Marching Ant Group who fought with them.

The marching ants originally guided and planned the dark matter sneak attack against the Sauron Alliance, which made all the stars of the universe vividly remembered, so they strengthened their defense forces in every dark matter storage galaxy.

However, even so, Rong Jin still feels a little nervous.

As an important hub, it is too quiet here, but a bit abnormal.

The other party came to attack them?

Thinking of this, Rong Jin shook his head.

This possibility is unlikely.

The marching ant group was besieged by three parties, and it was currently in the defensive stage, and even Hongqiao was not coming out, let alone sending the war headquarters to sneak attack them.

They are not far from the front line here. If they want to come in, they must break through layers of defense. The large-scale fleet cannot sneak into it silently.

As for the small-scale fleet approaching, it is no different from giving someone a head.

Space weapons are highly destructive, but their existence will provoke warnings from quantum radars, so they can safely evacuate by dropping space weapons over.

Now that the battle is fierce, the war of attrition on the front line is at the right time, and the front line is now riddled with damage. Countless space weapons and light speed weapons, as well as war robots and battleships, are thrown into the battlefield.

Other galaxies have been attacked and fought more or less, but this important storage hub of dark matter has nothing to do with it? There must be something wrong here.

Rong Jin didn't think that the marching ant group had forgotten them.

But his gaze swept across the star fortress signs on the star chart? His heart was quite settled. It is not easy for the opposing large-scale fleet to approach here.

He is also a mid-level general? Can't control space wars? But he can still handle galactic wars. Among the mid-level general stars? He is also considered top-notch, so he will be the garrison general star here in the Wanshan Galaxy.

Suddenly? An alarm signal appeared? Rong Jin's expression changed.

Under the quantum radar, they detected regular abnormal spatial fluctuations here.

Rong Jin lifted his heart, his eyelids twitched.

A two-meter-high space gate formed in front of his eyes, and a slender figure appeared in his field of vision? The fatal sense of danger stimulated his brain? How did the other party come over? Why can a person appear out of thin air?

His face was instantly pale, and he pulled his neck and shouted, "Enemy attack."

The expressions of the soldiers in the command post changed drastically, and when they reacted, it was already too late.

From the door of space, that shadow turned a blind eye to everything around.

In the command post, the shadow stepped out, calmly turning his head to look at the surrounding situation, his expression indifferent.

A woman?

Rong Jin looked horrified, a strong sense of danger? It almost burst out through his skull. The fear of death is like a small spaceship in a cosmic storm.

Chen Mo's woman.

Rong Jin recognized the person.

The inseparable woman beside Chen Mo.

This woman is the top genius of Mu's Tianxing and Ziwei civilization? The current Ziwei star master Ziyun's battle? Many lives have seen it. How dangerous is she? She definitely ranks among the universe.

"Kill her." Rong Jin ordered without hesitation.

The Mo girl who stood still, looked around in a circle. This is her rare act alone, and Brother Mo asked her to do it.

Naturally she would not refuse.

Helping Chen Mo grow his career is her dream.

She knew that Chen Mo got a major mission from the Science and Technology Library, and that it might be related to space war. All she could do was to help him as best as she could.

Seeing the hands-on soldiers, Mo Nui's expression condensed, and an invisible wave spread.

Click!

For a moment, the space seemed to be still, and all life expressions were frozen on the face.

Sizzle...

Strange sounds spread like their ears, like glass cracking, in their vision, the surrounding space appeared bright, like spider webs spreading.

The body can't move, but another tearing pain spreads on them, and a sense of fear emerges in their hearts.

They seemed to be on a glass that was about to shatter, and blood flowed out of the cracks on their bodies.

Bang bang bang!

Fragmentation sounds appeared, and a soldier's body was shattered like broken ice, sucked into the cracks in the dark space.

All the soldiers stared, fear occupying everything in their brains. With the weird whistling sound, everything in front of them was shattered, and after a sense of relief, their consciousness plunged into darkness.

Rong Jin looked at the scene in front of him incredulously. He had thought about many scenes of himself dying on the battlefield, but he had never thought of such a result.

Is this the strength of top super players?

This is the method of the marching ant group!

He has seen super powers, in fact, he is also a super power, but his super powers are a bit tasteless, and the development is not enough. But a general star, whether or not he has superpowers does not have much impact on his status.

The impact of super power on space wars first appeared in the destruction of the Sauron Alliance.

The major forces in the universe have begun to pay attention to the cultivation of super powers, but the speed of super powers is limited, and it takes a long time to advance to the planet level or even higher.

I thought that the army ants' methods to deal with the Sauron Alliance could not be copied, but I didn't want to use that method to deal with them.

Click!

There was a cracking sound in his ear. This was the last sound Rong Jin heard.

All thoughts stopped abruptly.

...

It was the first time for Ling Xi to see such a combat plan. This feeling was very special.

He had never seen a soldier used as a team. But Lan gave him a very clear plan, including detailed information about these soldiers.

He is also a top general. Some time ago, after the marching ant group annexed the Sauron Alliance in an unimaginable way, he also has a deep research on the super war. But they all simulate wars through virtual reality models, and have never commanded super-power wars in reality because conditions do not allow them.

Lan made the plan for this counterattack, so although the scale of this counterattack was relatively large, he felt relaxed.

What he needs to do is to carry out this plan, and then respond in the battlefield to arrange the combat position of the super-powered soldiers in place. If there is no accident, their combat mission will be very smooth.

The target is naturally the warheads of the gods, holy pythons and hunters.

The three went to the Black Eye civilization, and from that moment on, they were destined to be enemies.

Instead of letting them become the minions of the black pupil civilization to deal with them, it is better to pull them out while they have not really adapted.

At the same time win the Black Bear constellation in Hunter City.

The position of that constellation is very special. It is at the center of the three houses and stores a large amount of dark matter. It is much more convenient for them to capture the Black Bear constellation and attack the three houses.

Even if they retreat, they can destroy the dark matter warehouse and use their military advantage to devour the radiated star field of Ursa Ursa.

As a key strategic material for interstellar warfare, dark matter determines the direction of cosmic warfare.

Once the storage warehouse is destroyed and transported over billions of light-years from the Black Eye civilization, the efficiency and quantity are limited. In an emergency war, it is far from being able to quench the thirst.

Time is the most urgent thing in war.

Therefore, the destruction of a dark matter storage galaxy, the constellation of the galaxy radiated by this warehouse, will have a shortage of warships for a period of time.

Insufficient reinforcements, in the interstellar war, this is fatal.

Interstellar warfare can be advanced quickly by destroying the opponent's strategic reserves under limited conditions. This is the most cost-effective method of tactics, but it is also very difficult.

Important dark matter storage stars are heavily guarded, and there are two ways to destroy them.

One is a strong attack, which uses overwhelming force to destroy the opponent’s war machine and stellar fortress, and the other is a sneak attack, which unknowingly attacks the opponent’s dark matter warehouse.

The Three Cities have sufficient defensive power against the Black Bear constellation, but when encountering a general superpower like the Super War Department, no amount of defense is futile, especially when they are unprepared.

The new super tactics are enough to catch the opponent off guard.

This counterattack planned by Lan was not ruthless.

This team has the most superpower reinforcements, 6,000 special superpowers, all equipped with the semi-constant star superpower armor that Chen Mo said. Quite three thousand constant star corps, and flexibility, concealment and destructiveness, surpassing any previous warhead corps.

This kind of power is used properly, and any power in the universe at present has to pinch its tail.

However, these forces have to provoke the marching ants, but fortunately they did not stand in the wrong team, otherwise this new experience was prepared for them, and Ling Xi once thought fortunately.

Their main tasks this time are two: destroy the vital power of the three cities; capture the black bear constellation.

Time is almost up.

Ling Xi was shocked, and his eyes became dangerous: "Initiate an attack."

chapters.title: Chapter 1078: : Some Do Not Speak Martial Arts
chapters.body:
Chapter 1078: : Some Do Not Speak Martial Arts

Ming Tu's mission is Gulu Hongqiao.

Gulu Hongqiao is the gateway for the White Star Civilization to reach Tianlu City. The importance of this location is self-evident. Occupy this Hongqiao, the connection between Yuelu City and the White Star Civilization will be severed, and the Yuelu City that has taken refuge in the White Star Civilization will become a turtle in the urn.

Without the internal response of Yuelu City, the White Star Civilization would not have a foothold in the Ten-City Alliance Star Territory. If you want to re-enter the Ten-City Alliance, get close to the marching ants, you will either spend a lot of money to attack the Hongqiao Fortress or come from the direction of Wuxian Civilization.

The battlefield can appear in the star field on the side of the White Star Civilization. At that time, the defense will turn into an offense, and their layout will be much simpler.

This battle will be a turning point for them to turn from defense to offense.

Gulu Hongqiao was built into an iron barrel fortress by the White Star Civilization, with extremely strong combat readiness.

It has almost become one of the strategic fortresses of the White Star civilization.

The White Star Civilization in Gulu Hongqiao can deter the expansion of the Black Eye Civilization towards the Ten Cities Alliance and at the same time deter the marching ant groups. Even if they retreat, there is no need to put the battlefield in the star field of the White Star Civilization.

In Gulu Hongqiao, a large number of space interferometers and space jammers are arranged. The speed of light weapons and space weapons are ineffective in this fortress area. The only way is to attack, which costs a huge price and may not be able to attack.

But this is for the space weapon layout of the War Armor era. Now it is the era of super powers. There is no defense machine for the time being, which can be prepared against top special super users.

Marching ants are at the forefront of the super power era. This time the three god-level civilizations have joined forces to besiege, Chen Mo is ready to give the outside world a shocking shock.

In order to allow Ming Tu to take the Gulu Hongqiao in one fell swoop, Lan sent five thousand heavily armed super-powered soldiers over to give Ming Tu command. When the White Star Civilization still has no way to deal with the top super players, give the other party a surprise.

Five thousand superpowers equipped with a semi-constant star power armor. This force is equivalent to five thousand fast-reacting top warhead teams. The extent of its destruction makes people shudder to think about.

This is where the confrontation broke out between the two sides and the most critical zone.

...

Ming Tu attaches great importance to this mission.

In the eyes of the outside world, Ming Tu is indifferent, ruthless and even a little crazy, but the outside world does not know that when he is forcibly transformed into artificial intelligence consciousness by the meditation civilization, he also gains artificial intelligence-like rationality and computing power.

The destruction of the meditation civilization that had caused him to suffer countless sufferings, his heart knot disappeared.

With the help of Chen Mo, he freed himself from the temperatureless digital space and re-entered the body of life? His current body is a human being on earth.

Coming out of the cold digital space? His machine-like calmness and computing power did not disappear with it, but still powerful? But those things? Some changes were quietly happening.

This change is silent? Even Ming Tu himself didn't notice.

He is now a human body, with seven emotions, six desires, temperature, blood, and pain.

He adapts to the human body, and gradually likes the life of human beings on earth, likes the life of marching ants? And blending into it? Although his expression is still cold, and strangers are not close, but compared to before, it has changed a lot.

Without the hatred against the phantom civilization, he is still passionate about war? He doesn't want other forces to destroy the marching ants. He feels at home among the marching ants.

Here he gains unconditional trust? No one discriminates against him, no one dislikes him? Even willing to share his thoughts with him as a friend? Give him a birthday party.

These emotions? Only he knows.

Maybe both the boss and Lan know it? They just didn't say it clearly.

With a human body, Ming Tu also learned human knowledge and history. His own tactics have undergone some changes, becoming more changeable, complicated, and terrifying.

As one of the top stars in the universe, Ming Tu's ability is beyond doubt.

However, Chen Mo and Lan both had a headache for Ming Tu's inadequate communication with people. This is a straight man at the level of a dwarf planet, and sometimes offends people when he speaks.

Therefore, Chen Mo and Lan found ways to strengthen the communication between Ming Tu and other senior generals and marching ants.

As a result, Lan started from the war department's simulated war exercises, and let Ming Tu join forces with each war department to deduct a virtual war.

From the beginning, Ming Tu had obstacles in communicating with the generals of the various war divisions. Later, he slowly became harmonious, and then later, the generals of the marching ants were convinced by him.

The generals and senior leaders of the marching ant group began to adapt to the reticent Ming Tu. They know that Ming Tu is just not good at communication, but sometimes she is very cute in working very hard to integrate into their group.

Today's Ming Tu is now the second top general star of the marching ants besides Lan. The Ming Tu battle department is also the most powerful battle department of the marching ants, except for the super war department.

The marching ant group has plans to fully transform into a super warhead in the future.

Therefore, since the Sauron Alliance War, learning the tactics of super-powered soldiers has become a compulsory course for each of them. They have the most advanced super power equipment in their hands, so they know the destructive power of super power very well.

As a genius general, Ming Tu is the fastest to adapt to super-power tactics, so this time Lancai dispatched five thousand fully-armed super-power soldiers to Lin Han's command.

The battle for Gulu Hongqiao will be his re-face to the universe with a new identity.

The victory of Gulu Hongqiao will relieve the pressure on the marching ant group by half.

Looking at the vast star map and the deployment map of Gulu Hongqiao, Ming Tu seriously flashed a fiery fighting spirit.

"Order, let the Super War Department prepare."

...

Chen Mo's own mission is the dark matter warehouse of the White Star Civilization.

Today, the attention of the White Star Civilization is on the front line of the battlefield. There is no large-scale war in their star field, and the area of the star field is also expanding.

Only Chen Mo and Mo Nu can enter Bai Xingwen's star domain quietly.

Mo Nu went to perform another task, so Chen Mo came over in person.

It is simply incredible to let one's own leader go to the enemy's hinterland alone to do damage and put it on other forces.

But this is the case with the marching ants.

The senior leaders of the marching ant group are helpless to Chen Mo, a leader who likes waves. They just can't sit still anyway.

They thought of many ways to stop Chen Mo, they were all closed and the boss's wife was closed, and they still couldn't figure it out, so they could only worry about it while perfecting the intelligence to avoid any accidents to Chen Mo.

A small spaceship emerges from the door of space and floats in space. This is Chen Mo's spacecraft. The spacecraft is carrying his latest super work "The Left Hand of God".

In the distance is a star.

"Sure it's right here, right?" Chen Mo asked.

"Yes, this is the star number 39439 in the third spiral arm of the Red Fox galaxy." The spacecraft's artificial intelligence replied.

Chen Mo is inside the Red Fox Galaxy.

The Red Fox galaxy is one of his target galaxies this time. This galaxy stores a huge amount of dark matter and is also an important dark matter production factory for the White Star civilization.

Most stars with suitable conditions have dark matter production factories. The dark matter reserves here provide the dark matter consumption of the three constellations.

Putting such a huge amount of dark matter in this galaxy can be described as terrifying.

Only the super power of space can tear the cracks in space so quietly and sneak into here.

"Let's start with this galaxy." Chen Mo glanced at the distant stars and started sitting on the chair of the'God's Left Hand'.

It doesn't talk about martial ethics, but in order to win, it doesn't matter what means. As long as it can win, who will keep the other party's technology from keeping up with the changes of the times.

chapters.title: Chapter 1079: : Invincible
chapters.body:
Chapter 1079: : Invincible

Mo Nuo's palm was pressed in the air, the space was like broken glass, and the cracks were spreading rapidly, and every crack had a faint fluorescence, with an irregular beauty.

boom!

The invisible muffled sound turned the entire space into fragments, and the sense of tearing and chaos it brought swallowed the entire planet.

Boom boom boom!

Countless explosions lit up in the stellar fortress, space-based weapons and war machines in space, as the shattered space disintegrated, and the viable forces stationed in the stellar fortress died in the space torn apart.

Then, in the center of the star fortress, the star burst out with dazzling light, which was more than a hundred times brighter than before.

All the planets in the star system become scarlet when illuminated by high-brightness stars, like a sea of fire. The brilliant brilliance of those planets will be destroyed by the explosion of the sea of fire.

This scene, like the explosion of stellar wind in ancient times, forms a magnificent space picture.

Mo Nu's black eyes moved, her face calm.

From the appearance of the star system, there is a turbulent space in front of you, with colored rays floating irregularly, like the aurora of a planet. The planets disintegrate in the turbulent space and become fragments, floating and splashing randomly.

Stars that exist for hundreds of millions of years, the powerful gravitational force seems to fight against these turbulences in space, and in the end it just drifts along with the turbulence, and the stellar wind erupts unscrupulously, becoming one of the brightest points in the turbulence of space.

A top power, in a star field billions of light years away, there are millions, or even tens of millions, of similar dark matter warehouses for the manufacture of interstellar ships that radiate surrounding constellations or super galaxy clusters.

"The next goal."

Mo Nu raised her face, opened her hands, and tore a space crack in front? Step into it.

...

Venkash paid attention to the defense monitoring of the Red Fox Galaxy as usual.

The red fox galaxy is a dark matter storage galaxy? Its status is particularly important, especially after the start of the war. The red fox galaxy's defensive power has increased substantially. The defensive line and various detection radars and jammers have also increased a lot.

The war broke out on the front? And behind, it was calm as water.

The defensive force here is not the top elite warhead? It is the ordinary elite warhead. To put it bluntly, most of the defenses like this dark matter storage galaxy are for military exploits and resumes.

Such particularly important and safe areas? Defensive soldiers? Most of them have backgrounds.

For example, the children of a large family of the White Star Civilization who need to enter the military system of the White Star Civilization are sent here. They are safe and have real power. They live in a comfortable and comfortable life. After a period of time, they will be promoted if they have enough benefits. local.

And many children of big families come here? Relying on dark matter, a special strategic material, go through the back door to acquaintances? Every one is full of money.

Venkash is a veteran of the Red Fox galaxy? He has seen too many such things? Over time, he becomes numb.

It's not that he is numb, but all the guards are numb.

They are accustomed to all kinds of strange things, and occasionally one or two thorns appear, criticizing these default unspoken rules, they will be transferred to the front-line warhead by various excuses by high-level officials to serve as cannon fodder or small soldiers.

Calvin Xu was too lazy to take care of these things, and he couldn't take care of it, so he stayed at his post in the Red Fox Galaxy. Normal tasks are more leisurely, and you can save your life in this chaotic world.

Suddenly, Cavin Xu was in a trance, and his eyes went dark.

When he opened his eyes again, he appeared in a strange and illusory space.

In the space, there are densely packed lives, and there are some comrades in the same team who he knows.

Where is this place?

With only a little consciousness, a question emerged in my mind.

Then he woke up quickly.

No, isn't he patrolling radar surveillance? How would it appear here.

It should be thinking of the same problem as him, and the surrounding lives began to look around in confusion, the space was a little noisy.

"Destroy all the dark matter in the Red Fox Galaxy."

That voice seemed to have infinite magic power, making all the beings in the entire consciousness space obediently obedient.

"Yes."

Some soldiers who had mastered important weapons agreed subconsciously, without any idea of resisting that voice.

"No, no." Cavin Xu's expression changed abruptly, almost shouting.

But his shout only caused a few comrades around him to struggle slightly, and he quieted quickly.

Calvin Xu Hong stared, madly fighting against the consciousness trying to control his consciousness.

The opponent uses a super power similar to the mind control technique in an attempt to control them and destroy the strategic materials of the White Star civilization. If this attempt is realized, their White Star civilization will be passive.

"Everyone, wake up, don't listen to him." Cavin Xu could not move his body, but his mouth could speak, frantically shouting at his teammates around him: "Don't be controlled by his consciousness, wake up."

However, his voice did not cause much ripples. In other directions, there are some people who, like Cavinchu, are struggling with will.

But soon, they only felt a pain in their consciousness, and all their thinking became stagnant.

The last point of perception disappeared, and Cavunx stood still on the spot like a puppet.

The Red Fox Galaxy is over!

This is Cavin Xu's last thought.

...

Even Chen Mo was surprised. It is reasonable to say that the soldiers stationed here should have fierce resistance when their consciousness is controlled. Now they are thrown into the lake like a pebble, with only slight ripples. All the soldiers are easily controlled by his consciousness. live.

There are hundreds of people resisting, but these soldiers are only a few compared to the tens of thousands of soldiers.

Chen Mo directly erased their consciousness and easily made them shut up.

The will of this group of garrisoned soldiers is generally much worse than those of the elite warheads.

Determined to control their consciousness, Chen Mo gave them instructions to come down and do something.

If there is life that can see the Red Fox galaxy, it will definitely be able to see that inexplicable explosions appear in every corner of the Red Fox galaxy. The explosion is accompanied by brilliant brilliance, which is a phenomenon of the dissipation of dark matter in the explosion.

In less than an hour, all the important dark matter storage stellar warehouses of the entire Red Fox galaxy were all plunged into the sea of fire.

The mission of the Red Fox Galaxy is complete.

Next is the second goal.

Chen Mo looked at the coordinates and tore open the space. The spacecraft disappeared in his original space until the space crack disappeared, as if he had never appeared before.

...

Chen Mo and Mo Nu have the same tasks, but different targets.

Mo Nu's task is to destroy the dark matter warehouse on the front line of the dark forest and relieve the pressure on the Muwu Hongqiao battlefield and the opponent's offensive. And Chen Mo's goal is to go deep into the Bai Xingwen star domain and destroy the dark matter warehouse at the important hub of the Bai Xing civilization.

When the opponent's attention was on the front lines of the war, Mo Nu and Chen Mo, who were almost incomprehensible, were invincible all the way like a demon god.

Especially Chen Mo, his speed of destruction did not show any mercy.

In this action against the marching ants, it was the White Star Civilization that broke the balance, so the White Star Civilization naturally became the first protagonist targeted by the marching ants.

The strategy for this counterattack against the White Star Civilization was formulated by Lan.

In the confrontation with several great god-level civilizations, the marching ants began to be on the defensive. After all, they are veteran god-level civilizations that have been passed down for hundreds of millions of years. The methods are naturally not weak, and they suddenly attack him at the same time. They need to make strategies for a while, and take a look. The attitude of allies.

After determining the attitude of the Nebula Alliance and the New Five Cities, Chen Mo did not hesitate to let Lan show the trump card of the Super War Department.

The marching ants that control the technology of super-power weapons, technically surpass the god-level civilization.

In particular, Chen Mo and Mo Nu have such incomprehensible existence, they can easily break through the defense of the White Star Civilization.

Within Bai Xingwen's star domain, he has not experienced a war for too long, so the defensive warhead is not elite, and there is no super master. They didn't even think that the marching ants would break through their defense lines without warning and enter their hinterland to attack.

Lan was ecstatic when she learned about Chen Mo's ability at that time. This ability was most suitable for destroying the enemy's internal order.

The outside world is afraid of god-level civilization, but marching ants are not.

Now is the age of superpower, and the god-level civilization is not invincible.

This action was to give the White Star Civilization an unforgettable counterattack.

chapters.title: Chapter 1080: : Can Anyone Tell Me What Happened?
chapters.body:
Chapter 1080: : Can Anyone Tell Me What Happened?

"What's going on? Can anyone tell me what happened?"

The white star civilization roared staring at the blue earth galaxy, and he was driven crazy by the radar observation. The good-looking dark matter warehouse, there was no enemy fleet invasion, nothing unusual, but in just two hours, it was attacked by one's own weapons and turned into ruins.

He didn't expect that this is the safest hinterland of the White Star civilization, and such a strange scene would happen.

The explosion of a dark matter warehouse on one planet can be explained by the fact that the entire galaxy now has hundreds of millions of dark matter warehouse planets destroyed at the same time, and countless dark matter has been lost.

How to explain to superiors?

The White Star Civilization scolded the stars. Now the picture is a little weird. No one knows what happened. It turned a galaxy into ruins in just a few hours.

Neither space weapons nor light-speed weapons cover bombing were destroyed so quickly.

A top warhead attack, under the strict defense of the Blue Earth Galaxy, cannot be completely destroyed so quickly, and there is no warning.

What is even more bizarre is that the millions of soldiers stationed in the Blue Earth Galaxy all died, and the line of defense stationed blew up.

It becomes even more difficult for them to even want to investigate data.

It is said that there are countless all kinds of weird things in the universe, and he has seen many of them, but for hundreds of years in the army, he has never experienced such a weird ‘war’. He didn't even know what the enemy was, and his territory became ruins.

Only in one's own turf, all the troops on the line of defense detonate their weapons at the same time, can such a rapid destruction occur.

Is there a traitor?

The starry eyes of the White Star Civilization began to flicker.

But even if there are traitors, it is impossible for millions of soldiers to betray at the same time, and also to attack the dark matter warehouse planet at the same time.

They racked their brains and couldn't think that Chen Mo could have the ability to control the entire galaxy. That kind of ability was beyond their current imagination.

The other Jiang Xing around him was silent, and I couldn't imagine all this.

At the same time, what they dare not imagine is the next responsibility.

They are not the front line here, but the losses are more serious than the front line.

A dark matter warehouse galaxy, it takes years or even decades of construction to fully form, but now it is destroyed in a few hours.

The atmosphere was terribly quiet, and they even heard each other's breathing.

When the responsibility comes, all of them will be punished.

"My lord? Upper contact." A correspondent broke the dead silence with trembling.

...

"Dark matter warehouse is destroyed?" Dinan Miro couldn't believe his ears? The good star fortress and dark matter warehouse were destroyed for no reason.

Originally he was paying attention to the war against marching ants.

Di Nanye united with the White Star Civilization? Launched an attack on the marching ants from the direction of the An's Supercluster. He did not choose to attack Di Nanye? Instead, he turned his head from Muwu Hongqiao to attack the marching ants.

His purpose? Is to join the feast of the Tuntong Army Ants and the Ten Cities Alliance, and then the battle is settled? He can unite with the Black Eye Civilization? Aiming at the cooperation between the White Star Civilization and Di Nanye.

They did not participate in the feast of the division of the meditation civilization, and there is no reason to miss this feast of the marching ants-ten city alliance.

At the same time, he also wants to grow the Black Forest? To reach the scale of the dark forest civilization.

It has to be said that the defense of the marching ant group is really strong, the space connector connects the entire star field, and the speed of support is fast enough to make them exhausted? They did not capture the Muwu Hongqiao.

There were no results, but now his subordinates told him that dozens of dark matter warehouses around the Muwu Hongqiao battlefield were all destroyed.

The dark matter warehouse on the front line was destroyed? The result was the missing material for the interstellar battleship.

As far as the costly interstellar war is concerned, without interstellar warships? Fighting with an eagle is quite wingless.

"How was it destroyed? Who can tell me what happened?" Dinan Miro scanned the information obtained? The column of the cause of destruction? It was blank.

"Suspected space turbulence."

"Suspected space turbulence?" Dinan Miro laughed angrily, and threw the data in his hand to the ground: "You mean space turbulence destroys my dozens of dark matter warehouses and stellar fortresses? Space turbulence has eyes. ?"

The subordinates dare not speak any more.

They also know that the reason for spatial turbulence is far-fetched.

It can be a coincidence that a warehouse is destroyed by spatial turbulence, but dozens of warehouses in different locations have been destroyed one after another in a short period of time, and there is also a time sequence. The spatial turbulence cannot be so precise, it is uncontrollable. Random events.

But they couldn't find out other reasons, this is the most terrifying.

The enemy quietly destroyed dozens of their heavily defended fortresses. The idea was too terrifying. Their radar did not detect a large-scale enemy invasion.

"Let the Intelligence Department find out the cause within three days. If it can't be found out, the Minister of the Intelligence Department will go home for the elderly." Dinan Miro said calmly.

"Yes."

The subordinates hesitated and stopped.

Dinan Miro looked at his appearance and said coldly: "If you have something to say."

"What about the battlefield of Muwu Hongqiao? The marching ant group suddenly increased its offensive and launched a counterattack against us, seeming to know that after our dark matter warehouse was destroyed, the successor was weak." The subordinate said cautiously.

"Let Ebon decide, he is the general star." Dinan Miro waved his hand and told him to retreat.

It wasn't until his subordinates left that Dinan Miro had a dark face, thinking about the incident. Inside, there are weirdness everywhere, he must be absolutely man-made, and it is likely to be related to the marching ant group.

...

Lan received news from both the boss and Mo female, and was very happy. Especially for the boss, the battle results are so impressive that it is enough to make the white star civilization pain for a long time.

Now is the stage of the outbreak of the war, and it is entering a fever pitch.

The Ziwei civilization and the Black Eye civilization are also fighting. It is said that the battle between Fatty Luo and Yan, the two top genius generals, is extremely fierce. This also relieved their marching ants.

The black pupil civilization is constrained by the crape myrtle civilization, and the pressure on the marching ants is much less. For them, this is good news.

The Thor civilization is annexing the Netherfire civilization, and it is still fighting another new force.

Thousand Star Empire.

After all the forces in the Land of Thousand Stars were annexed by the Sauron Alliance, they reached the Thousand Star Alliance, and then united with the Dark Star Empire in the Land of Chaos to form a new Thousand Star Empire.

The Thousand Star Empire was once a glorious top-level power. It challenged God-level civilization and split under the siege of God-level civilization. Now the re-emergence of the Thousand Star Empire has surprised many top forces.

Almost shortly after the announcement of its establishment, Thor Civilization was eyeing the fat of Thousand Star Empire, and it was no surprise that a war broke out between the two.

As for the events behind the Thousand Star Empire, Lan just smiled, keeping secret.

The Nebula Alliance on the other side is fighting the Black Eye Civilization, and at the same time, it is trying to resist the attack of the White Star Civilization. Each force is fighting on multiple sides, and now the period of great melee has begun, and mutual alliances are the only backing they can trust.

The most important thing for marching ants now is this war with the White Star Civilization Gulu Hongqiao.

As long as they take the Gulu Hongqiao and defend from Hongqiao, they can cut off the connection between the White Star Civilization and the Ten Cities Alliance Star Territory, and they can also call out the Ming Tu War Department to support Lingxi and attack the Black Eye Civilization.

If this battle is won, the marching ant group will become a veritable giant.

Lan is sober, the more critical the moment, the more careful. He had already prepared the combat department and began to deduct the future direction of the universe.

As time goes by, the war will get worse and worse.

This is a war to change the structure of the universe.

chapters.title: Chapter 1081: : Jiang Xing Ming Tu
chapters.body:
Chapter 1081: : Jiang Xing Ming Tu

"How much is the loss?" the old chief of the White Star Civilization asked.

"It's miserable." The intelligence officer looked extremely ugly, and carefully reported: "Thirty-three dark matter warehouse galaxies were destroyed, all of which were central galaxies. A large number of dark matter factories were built. These galaxies can radiate the entire supercluster. Our dark matter reserves. The amount has been reduced by five percent. Affected by the destruction of the dark matter warehouse, the super galaxy clusters in the radiation range, and the shortage of dark matter, this impact requires the reconstruction of a dark matter warehouse galaxy to alleviate it. It will take two years."

"The manufacture of interstellar transport ships and battleships is also affected. Without dark matter synthesis materials, interstellar ships cannot withstand the squeezing of space folding. Nowadays, the dark matter is missing, the radiation star field of the destroyed dark matter warehouse, and the manufacture of interstellar ships will be stagnated. The reporting intelligence officer was cautious: "There are two dark matter warehouses close to the frontline battlefield."

The old chief Bai Xing was silent for a long time before he asked, "Can the super galaxy cluster that is closer to the frontline be supported by warships?"

"Yes, but the consumption will be relatively large." The intelligence officer shook his head and said: "In order to facilitate the transportation cost and use of dark matter materials, interstellar ship production plants are generally built in the galaxy around the dark matter warehouse. For a long time, we have planned this way. Almost all interstellar ship production plants are in the star field around the dark matter warehouse, and there are only a few small short-range ship production plants in the relatively distant star field."

A core executive suddenly said: "If this is the case, can we assign dark matter factories to each galaxy, and let their respective galaxies build dark matter factories for their use? This can solve the crisis of dark matter shortage as soon as possible. "

Several of them frowned slightly and looked unhappy, but did not dare to refute.

For a long time, dark matter production has been controlled by specific interest groups. This strategic material is a means to control the White Star civilization and a means to grow their family relationship.

The division now means that their control and influence over those galaxies will decline.

Many galaxies are not of their faction.

Therefore, the high-level proposal is naturally accepted by the high-level who has benefited, and the high-level who has been touched by the interests is naturally in a bad mood.

"How do you say?" Old Chief Bai Xing looked at Hu Bingxin beside her, she was the manager of the Bai Xing civilization.

"Yes." Hu Bingxin nodded.

With the confirmation of Hu Bingxin, many high-level faces showed joy, which means that they no longer have to look at the faces of certain high-levels to act? And the dark matter factory has a lot of oil and water.

"What is the reason for this incident?" Old Chief White Star turned a blind eye to the disgruntled high-levels.

The intelligence officer wanted to say something but stopped? After seeing the old chief's face, he cautiously said: "How many survivors? He seems to know a little reason."

"How do you say?" The old chief had a calm face? Tens of millions of soldiers were stationed, only the survivors.

In the main hall? All the senior members of the White Star civilization have their ears erected, for fear of missing a word? No one dares to speak? For fear of being touched.

The intelligence officer opened the holographic projection and placed the projection of the surviving soldiers on the hall.

"Someone controls us. I have a holographic video conference with my teammates outside the galaxy. Some of my teammates suddenly have something wrong? Faces are struggling? He said not to listen to him, to resist, everyone to resist. But I don’t know what happened, everything in the video Teammates, including Lord General Star? This is the case, and they seem to be controlled by others? They use weapons to lock their own station? Then..."

All the survivors are not in the destroyed galaxy? They are all in the holographic video with their teammates? So I saw the scene at that time. What a survivor said? It may be a lie. All survivors have the same description. It is definitely not false.

Dead still!

There was dead silence in the hall, and there was no high-level person who had just spoken. Thinking about the scene described by the survivors, they shuddered.

Is the entire galaxy controlled? What kind of weapon is this?

"Do you know who moved the hand?" the old chief asked lightly.

"Uncertain, but there is one thing worth paying attention to. In the Black Forest controlled by Dinan Miro, a situation similar to ours has occurred, and many dark matter warehouses and stellar forts have been destroyed."

The intelligence officer passed the information in his hand to the upper level on the field.

"Unlike us, their main destroyed star has turbulence in space, but ours did not, but was destroyed by our own hands. According to the calculation of the star war model, the high probability is related to the marching ant group."

The old chief did not speak any more, but quietly looked at the message in his hand.

The huge loss of the White Star civilization spread quickly throughout the universe, causing a lot of waves.

The White Star Civilization lost more than 30 important central galaxies in the hinterland in just a few dozen hours. This loss, in any force, would be a hemorrhage.

But there are many puzzles that have not been solved. Who attacked the White Star Civilization? What weapon did you use?

There are rumors that the marching ant group attacked the White Star Civilization; there are also rumors that traitors appeared within the White Star Civilization and detonated the weapons of the galaxy; others said it was the betrayal of the artificial intelligence that led to the end.

But the real reason is that the senior leaders of the White Star civilization are secretive.

...

Combat headquarters.

Keiya arrived early to wait, and with him was his deputy captain Simaret. In the combat headquarters, there are also a group of think tanks and generals from the Ming Tu War Department.

There is a bit of hustle and bustle in the conference room. Many generals are talking about the war deduction of the star map and various war information.

When Ming Tu came in, the scene immediately became deadly silent.

They all know that it is time to get to the point.

The Gulu Hongqiao war is related to their future combat deployment. It is a turning point. The boss has personally asked about the situation, and Commander Lan also always pays attention to the movement here.

And this war is very important to Ming Tu and to them.

The general stars and think tanks who follow the Ming Tu, in addition to following the Ming Tu sentenced to the condemned civilization, there are also many of the ordinary or the generals who were surrendered. They were selected by the Ming Tu and then nurtured them. The position of the marching ants is very high, but the chance of going on the battlefield is very small.

The marching ants have a wide range of soldiers, and the competition is fierce. But Master Ming Tu is very reticent and rarely competes with others for credit. Therefore, some small-scale wars will not use their Ming Tu War Department at all, so they are self-conscious. After the destruction of civilization, it has been in a dormant state.

Now is the day for them to take action again, they need a big victory to prove the ability of the Ming Tu battle department, not just the name.

"Report your lord, the warhead is at the predetermined position." A general saluted.

Ming Tu nodded slightly in response and looked at Keiya.

Kyudon's face was grimace, and he hurriedly reported: "My lord, the Super War Department is deployed to a predetermined location according to your order, and all plans are issued, only waiting for your order."

"Hab, you are in charge of the third quadrant. Give an order. Attack at all costs. After fighting the war machine, you should retreat immediately. You can't fight." Ming Tu circled a star map and looked at a blue-skinned life.

"Understood." Habu's spirit was shocked, and he saluted Ming Tu.

"Mangkang, you are in charge of the sixth quadrant, holding the opponent, responsible for the feint."

"Yes."

"Vena, your goal is the eighth quadrant. The battle plan is determined by yourself, but at least half of the combat power is reserved. After I order it, you will turn to the seventh quadrant to attack."

"Understood, sir." A female star immediately said with a chest straight.

"Go to your fighting position."

All the generals of the War Department left, leaving behind both Guiya and Cimalet from the Super War Department. They knew that this was an assault on the fortress, but the adults still had to make arrangements to surprise them, but no one dared to question Ming Tu's deployment.

"Gyudon and Cimalet, your team is under my direct command and cooperates with the main battle department."

"Yes." The two saluted together.

chapters.title: Chapter 1082: : Fortress Attack And Defense
chapters.body:
Chapter 1082: : Fortress Attack And Defense

"Start to prepare according to the plan. This is a good opportunity. After that, it will be a little more troublesome in the future." Lan told Mingfeng.

"Do you want to start now?"

"Yes, there is only one chance of surprise. You should have seen the combat power of the Super Warhead. Taking advantage of the Ziwei Civilization to attract some of the attention of the Black Eye Civilization, when they are distracted, now is the best opportunity to do it." Lan Yi After taking a sip of tea, he said without delay.

Ming Tu is about to attack Gulu Hongqiao. By then, the Super Warhead will be fully exposed to the forces of the universe, and the Black Eye Civilization will definitely guard against their Super Warhead.

At that time, in order to prevent large losses from entering the opponent's trap, it was not possible to use the Super Warhead unscrupulously like now.

Now is the best opportunity.

Mingfeng naturally understood the truth, and immediately agreed.

During this time, he watched a real drill of the Super War Department, which shocked him.

At this moment, he knew what kind of monster the marching ants had released. At this stage, when any warhead in the universe encounters this warhead head-on, there is only one end.

At the same time, these days, he also received some intelligence from the White Star Civilization and the Black Forest Civilization.

The two dark matter warehouses were attacked, and the frontline encountered little trouble, so now is their best opportunity to counterattack. Seizing this opportunity, they can balance the victory of the two sides back to when their side is dominant.

"Call them here and start preparing for the battle." After Mingfeng closed the holographic video, he gave an order to all the generals.

...

"Ming Tu Xiang took the Gulu Hongqiao in one fell swoop." Gou Xuan said unhurriedly, her tone of voice did not fluctuate much, and her eyes never left the star map.

Jiang Xing next to her, all pricked their ears to listen.

"Is he not afraid of his stomach breaking? Does he think that a warhead can take down our Hongqiao Fortress? Yan is here, and he dare not say to take our fortress in one fell swoop." A general star sneered.

Gou Xuan did not refute his subordinate's remarks, his eyes were sharp: "He wants to break through our Gulu Hongqiao, and then use this as a stronghold to launch a counterattack against our Bai Xingwen star domain, and put the battlefield in our white star domain, making us passive. situation."

"They really dare to think about it." The general next to her was full of mockery: "I can't protect myself, and I want to counterattack us? The idea is too naive."

In their view, today's marching ants? Are in crisis? It is unlikely to counterattack them.

They are god-level civilizations, they have their own self-confidence? Now the White Star civilization is one of the most powerful forces in the universe? Only the Black Eye civilization is comparable to them.

They believe? Fight alone, except for Black Eye Civilization? Other forces are not their opponents.

What's more? There are now three companies working on the marching ant group.

Although the other party also has allies, but the three god-level civilizations, including the two strongest in the universe, deal with the three top civilizations? There is a gap in itself.

They are not arrogant? But the facts are there.

But Gouxuan is not as optimistic as they are.

She has fought against the marching ant group, the warhead of the marching ant group is very tenacious, and the war technology is not weaker than them, and the general commanded by the other party is Ming Tu, the cold-blooded killing god.

To Ming Tu? She was still a little bit jealous.

Ming Tu is the top genius general star of the Pluto civilization. In the past, Ming Tu was the same name as Ming Ah? Ming Tu was the same famous general star as Yan, Lei Yu, and Luo Fatty. This shows that Ming Tu's ability is not simple.

In the feast of the division of the meditation civilization? They had seen Ming Tu's butcher knife, invading the small universe of the meditation civilization? A knife was inserted in the heart of the meditation civilization? Let Ming Ah Fang chaos.

"Beware of them using special methods." Gou Xuan said.

The generals on the field are all stunned? Some generals said: "What is the special means that the lord said? In space wars, in addition to tactics, special means include space traps, space bombings, assassinations, and cutting off supply resources. Wait."

"In our star field, the dark matter warehouse has been destroyed. Although the real reason has not been announced, this incident is likely to be related to the marching ant group. Don't underestimate them. The marching ant group is the black pupil civilization that wants to deal with it. The main force of the White Star Civilization is also the main force that our White Star Civilization is mainly dealing with. Without any strength, it is not worth having our two families deal with him at the same time." Gou Xuan said.

Speaking of the attack on the dark matter warehouse in Bai Xingwen's star domain, there was a moment of silence on the field. They are all smart people, and naturally understand the strangeness hidden in them.

It is absolutely no coincidence that their peaceful star field for hundreds of millions of years was suddenly broken.

"Do you think that marching ants will use the same methods as dark matter warehouses to deal with us?"

"Why not? The dark matter warehouse of a supercluster near us has been erased. They really have this ability, why can't they be used against us?"

The generals were dumb, as Master Gou Xuan said, if it was the marching ant group that attacked their inner star field, why couldn't they use that method to deal with them?

The enemy will not greet you when they hit you, when they hit them, and what they use.

"But we are here as a fortress. All kinds of defensive methods are sufficient. Except for internal mutiny and assassination, other methods, such as space bombing and traps, will not work. The opponent sends masters to assassinate, and it is impossible to approach our combat department. The possibility is even lower."

"Don't talk too full, no matter whether the other party has hidden means, we must make the best preparations and don't underestimate the enemy. Ming Tu's tactical ability can rank in the forefront of the universe, it will not be as simple as the surface." Gou Xuan Said.

She is one of the top generals of the White Star Civilization. Although her abilities are not as good as Yan, Lei Yu, Fatty Luo, and Lan Zhi, the role of strategy and layout in wars such as offensive and defensive fortresses is much smaller. Instead, they are war machines and combat troops. The role of Yan is great, so even if Yan comes to direct her personally, she is not afraid.

This kind of war against fortresses does not have any fancy strategies and tactics, mainly because the fists are hard enough.

Without several times the strength, it is impossible to attack the fortress.

This was the case when she was trapped in the Dark Forest Star Territory when she attacked Muwu Hongqiao. At that time, she was not strong enough and had no reinforcements, so when she attacked Hongqiao, she lost to the unknown star Wang Hai.

Now she found it very clearly that among the teams stationed on the outskirts of Gulu Hongqiao, there was only the Ming Tu War Department, with the same strength and war machine.

When the enemy's strength is less than three times the fortress attack and defense, she is not afraid of any general star in the universe, even if a few of the top general stars in the universe jointly attack the fortress, she is not afraid.

But this is also a concern for her.

With the same force, even with the talents of ghosts and gods, it is impossible to capture a well-prepared fortress. This is the common sense of a general. Ming Tu knew that the forces in his hand couldn't attack Gulu Hongqiao, but he wanted to attack. Gou Xuan had to think more about whether there was a conspiracy in it.

Either Ming Tu is a mediocre and doesn't understand this at all, or he has other plans. Under the prestigious reputation, there is no illusory scholar, and she believes that it is the latter. This is the key to her defense.

"If he had prepared otherwise, why didn't he see any big movements? This shouldn't be. If they have large-scale reinforcements, they will never escape radar detection. Or they attacked us just to hide our eyes and eyes, but actually attacked other places?"

"Will it be prepared to put pressure on us and cut off our contact with Yuelu City, and then they are going to swallow Yuelu City?"

Several generals put forward their own guesses.

They really couldn't guess the purpose of Lin Han's doing this.

Just as they were puzzled, a sudden, short and urgent siren sounded in the war room.

All Jiangxing's expressions were cautious.

The war has begun.

chapters.title: Chapter 1083: : Offensive And Defensive Momentum
chapters.body:
Chapter 1083: : Offensive And Defensive Momentum

Tens of thousands of warships are spreading out throughout space, and a steady stream of war robots are being dropped out of the warships to advance towards the Hongqiao Fortress.

The mysterious but prestigious team of the Ming Tu War Department appeared in front of the world.

It was the first time that Gou Xuan had seen this warhead in its entirety. The atmosphere of killing, separated by space, could be detected through holographic images.

"Sure enough," Gou Xuan said in admiration, while secretly guarding her heart.

Ming Tu War Department, this team used to be the butcher knife of the Ming body civilization, and is now the strongest war department of the marching ant group. After the transformation, Ming Tu has become more dangerous.

Some changes can be noticed from the momentum.

Ming Tu used to be a robot, and this is no secret in the high-level god-level civilization. In order to pursue immortality, the meditation civilization has done various experiments, almost to the point of being frantic, and no one regrets the fate of today.

Because it used to be artificial intelligence, Ming Tu has a very powerful tactical ability and control for commanding war robots.

Under the eyes of the machine, the indifferent murderous intent made people shudder.

The war department is advancing, and in all directions of Hongqiao, like bloodthirsty crows, murderous intent is permeating.

According to the information they obtained about Ming Tu, they knew that Ming Tu was known for his computational power, because of his former ‘artificial intelligence’ consciousness identity, and his computational abilities are like quantum supercomputing.

Any changes in the battlefield, as small as a spaceship, will be counted by him.

Gou Xuan's expression became extremely dignified, and the Jiang Xing beside her also felt pressure.

It is worthy of being the top general star, across space, across the holographic projection, can give them terrifying pressure.

Under pressure, many of the stars' hearts ignited a raging fighting spirit, and all the stars were eager. They were eager to fight Lin Han, then win the opponent, and hit the opponent fiercely.

The fortress war, they have the determination to win.

...

Ming Tu stared at the star map's defensive deployment blankly.

The Gulu Hongqiao is like a sphere fortress. With the Hongqiao as the center, space-based weapons and battleships are scattered all over the world, like chess pieces scattered in space, and the distance between them has a certain echo.

Before the Hongqiao Incident, the center of the galaxy was the source of gravity, and everything around was swallowed up by the black hole. Therefore, taking Hongqiao as the center, within a radius of 100 million kilometers, there is almost nothing. In such a natural unobstructed situation, wanting to capture the Hongqiao Fortress is tantamount to attacking the high ground in a flat plain, and the local equipment and The ammunition is sufficient.

Fortress battle, this is the nightmare of all generals.

Space fortresses are different from ordinary space defenses and space encounters. Space fortresses are ‘space strategic highlands’ that radiate a star field. Generally, a certain star system is chosen to build a stronghold fortress.

In the fortress, a lot of resources and equipment will be invested to prevent the enemy's destructive weapons. Space weapons and light-speed weapons are useless, so we can only rely on head-to-head warfare to destroy the opponent's fortress, without any bells and whistles.

Especially after the emergence of Hongqiao, it quickly became the most ideal base for a strategic fortress, so the investment in Hongqiao's defense force is self-evident.

The top general star faces a fortress with a complete defense system, even if the opponent general star is a senior general star, it may not be able to defeat it. Especially for the god-level civilization of the White Star Civilization, the star training system is very complete, and everyone who can become a general star is not a mediocre.

Without more than five times the force, the best generals dare not say that they will be able to capture the star fortress.

Seeing the deployment plan of Gulu Hongqiao, Ming Tu has no waves.

Now the White Star Civilization still deploys the same conventional defenses as before, and does not have the ability to target top super players. This is the biggest loophole of the opponent.

In the age of super power, the tactics of the age of super power will appear. This is the consensus of the entire universe.

Everyone is exploring the tactics of the super power era. The only difference is that because of the emergence of the super power armor, the marching ant group has entered the era of super power armor ahead of other forces.

This gives them a lot of opportunities and advantages.

As a general star, and a top general star, he will naturally not let go of such a good advantage, especially when the boss sends five thousand super team members to give him command, which means that their advantage has been maximized.

The battle of Gulu Hongqiao is very crucial.

Ming Tu used this battle to destroy the confidence and morale of his opponents.

This was the starting point for their counterattack against the White Star civilization. After shifting the battlefield to the White Star domain, they turned from defense to offense, turning the initiative into passive.

When he was on earth, he also saw some ancient art of war.

In the words of the boss's hometown, this is called the difference of offense and defense.

...

Boom boom boom! !

There is no sound from the explosion in space, and it looks like a dazzling and silent firework from a distance, but with every explosion, people who see it flash in their minds like a thunderstorm.

The video is a scene from the battlefield, reflected on the indifferent face of every star.

The war machines of both sides launched the first round of strangulation in space.

There is no bells and whistles, the frontal collision of the steel torrents, this scene is unexpected. Knowing that it is a fortress, Ming Tu still chooses to head-to-head when the forces are the same, which is obviously unwise.

The warheads of the two sides are like a crazy buffalo herd confronting a crazy rhino herd, neither of the two sides accepts the other, and collides head-on. The flames of war spread in all directions of Gulu Hongqiao, large or small, and the intensity of each location was different.

Small-scale anti-matter weapons form fireballs in space and bloom.

The tragic scene did not stir waves on the faces of many general stars. This was only the collision of unmanned war machines in the initial stage, which was in the stage of advancement and consumption.

Gou Xuan looked calm, but the doubts in his heart became more and more serious.

No matter how he thought, Lin Han shouldn't attack, but the other party did just that.

In the Gulu Hongqiao Fortress, various space-based weapons are turned on, and the fortresses and battleships are also in combat. With the same strength, it is impossible to capture them.

In the battlefield, the torrent of steel is advancing to the fortress. In the attack on both sides, the marching ant group is obviously dominant, because at the front end, there are also more war robots in the Ming Tu War Department.

But the further behind, the greater the resistance and the greater the consumption.

Space-based weapons with a diameter of thousands of meters and space-based fortresses with a diameter of tens of thousands of meters are fully fired. Lasers and anti-matter bombs form a dense rain of bullets, destroying nearby war machines.

The originally dark space is in a sea of fire, with countless rays of light intertwined into a net.

Every general star who saw this kind of war was still cold. They saw more fortress offensive and defensive battles. This is just one of their battles. The only difference is that their opponents are different.

They can see that in space wars, war robots are fighting.

Blue cold eyes, without a trace of emotion, in their program, there is only killing, like an executioner from purgatory.

When the anti-matter bombs are exhausted, they will display the laser pulse cold weapon in their hands and fight in close quarters, either killing the enemy's machine or being dismembered by the enemy's war machine.

The remains of the machinery were scattered in space, swallowed by the light of anti-matter bombs, and gasified, or turned into random stray bombs, blasting towards nearby war machines.

Soon, Gou Xuan discovered something was wrong.

The intelligence of the combat platform constantly analyzed the situation in the battlefield, and they found that the war robots of the Ming Tu War Department were cooperating in the battle.

Yes, cooperate with the fight.

As the most inconspicuous pioneer steel torrent in the space battlefield, the positioning of war robots is used to consume opponents' ammunition. But after consuming the ammunition, they discovered that the opponent's war robot could cooperate in combat.

They will have a two-to-one, three-to-one situation, and under the same scale, the momentum of the Ming Tu War Department is even stronger.

A cold weapon wrapped in a short pulse laser can feel murderous in space.

Sure enough, it is worthy of the Ming Tu War Department.

Gou Xuan had to admire that, in terms of the combat details of Gears of War, she admitted that she was not as good as Ming Tu.

Previously studied Ming Tu, only through his war video research, and now it is proved that she can perceive some of the details. Being able to become the top star in the universe is indeed not a false name.

boom!

The foremost battleship began to disintegrate under the siege of the war machine. After the explosion, it turned into a huge light group, swallowing everything around [笔趣阁www.biqugetv.xyz].

The first battleship was destroyed, and then the second one also disintegrated in space and broke into pieces.

The iron torrent of the Ming Tu War Department is still advancing.

The existence of space booby traps prevents their spacecraft from easily flying at the speed of light in the battlefield arranged by the enemy, otherwise they are likely to be killed by lightning.

The war machines of the Goxuan War Department, one after another, are constantly pouring out of the nearest space-based fortresses and battleships.

The more so, the more wrong Gou Xuan feels.

If this continues, they will undoubtedly win, and victory will come too easily.

The opponent is Ming Tu. Victory cannot be so easy. What is the problem?

Gou Xuan stared at the star map, she couldn't see Ming Tu's intention or thought of sending her to death like this, but even if she racked her brains, she couldn't find the cause of the problem.

Is Ming Tu really a mediocre star?

impossible!

At this moment, sudden changes occurred in the battlefield.

chapters.title: Chapter 1084: : First Battle
chapters.body:
Chapter 1084: : First Battle

Boom boom boom! ! !

A series of inexplicable explosions appeared in space. The space-based weapons on the Gulu Hongqiao battlefield suddenly lost control, stalled in the battlefield, exploded, and transformed into a huge light group.

The war robot surging at the forefront, like a power failure, the dark blue in its eyes went out and lost its combat effectiveness.

Even more bizarre is that the small-scale antimatter bullets that flew out of the battleship lost their speed and floated in space, and then flew back extremely fast under the incredible eyes of the White Star civilization.

All those who witnessed this scene were shocked.

This is super power!

There are not only one, but thousands of top superpowers.

Only then did they remember the weird war that the marching ant group had annexed the Sauron Alliance. Now is the age of super power, the mode of super power war has been formed in the marching ant group, and they are at the forefront of the universe.

In the frontal battlefield, the strange scene had a terrifying psychological impact on the generals of the White Star civilization. They experienced such a large-scale superpower combat for the first time.

Seeing the horror at the front end, their hearts were cold.

After the release of super power technology, the universe has already entered the age of super power, super power is no longer exclusive to god-level life, and even in a warhead, almost all soldiers have super powers, but such a wide range of super powers, Still scarce.

Even the strongest Hitomi Green and White Star Old Chief, their superpower range is only beyond the planetary level, but the superpower that the Ming Tu War Department appears this time is definitely greater than that of the planetary level. There are more than one, but many.

The marching ant group’s super power technology is in the lead in the universe. This is recognized. Now Terror is not only a little bit ahead, but is now on a business trip. They control the mass production of planetary super powers.

Thousands of super powers above the planet level are scattered in the space battlefield, and the destructive power it brings makes people shudder when thinking about it.

The picture of the old chief destroying a planet casually is vivid.

conspiracy!

This is a conspiracy.

The generals of the White Star Civilization are cold, and the generals of other forces concerned about this war are also cold.

The marching ant group has a deep calculation.

From the beginning, the Ming Tu War Department had the ability to attack and seize the fortress. A planet-level superpower, a space fortress, and super terrifying flexibility and concealment.

The offensive of the Ming Tu War Department began, and a strong sense of oppression, like a violent storm, swept the entire Hongqiao battlefield.
