The incident caught the White Star Civilization by surprise, and suddenly did not come up with a plan to deal with the top superpower.

The balance of war is tilting.

Ming Tu's style, once mastered the initiative, will never give the opponent a chance to resist.

The attack of the superpower is quite sharp. The cooperation of super power and machinery is in perfect harmony. The White Star's side, who is not familiar with the tactics and dealing with top superpowers, is destroying the line of defense almost at a speed visible to the naked eye.

Is this the trump card for the marching ants?

Gou Xuan's eyes were cold, and she was unwilling to support the platform with both hands. She knew that Ming Tu must have a hole card, otherwise using the same force to attack a fortress would be no different from looking for death.

Looking at the raging Ming Tu Zhan Bu, Gou Xuan's eyes are cracked. Has the super power technology of the marching ants reached this point?

How to deal with it?

Judging from the offensive rhythm of the Ming Tu War Department, Ming Tu is very familiar with the cooperation between the top super powers and the War Department. This is definitely not the first time that such a large-scale super power has been commanded, but through countless times. Only by performing calculations can so many top super players and warheads cooperate handily.

Originally, in this war, Gou Xuan had the confidence to win. Because of the fortress offensive and defensive, under the same strength, even if Ming Tu personally directs them, they are helpless.

But now she had no idea.

Hundreds of top super-powers of unknown strength are definitely above the planet level. They hide behind the torrent of machinery and use them as a cover to advance. Wherever they pass, space-based weapons and battleships fail and explode.

They did not have a plan to deal with such a large-scale top superpower.

They don't have top super masters, and in front of planet-level super masters, no one dares to be called elite masters.

This is the first time in the history of war that this type of combat has appeared. If they find out in peacetime, they can prepare for it through long-term drills and preplans. Now in a hurry, they have not studied this kind of tactics at all.

Gou Xuan stared at the video coming back from the front line with unprecedented input.

In her mind, she outlines the prototype of the battlefield to deduct it, trying to find a way to deal with large-scale top superpowers.

All the generals who paid attention to the battlefield were completely shocked by this accident. Even the old chiefs and Fox Bingxin who were far away in the small universe of the white star field were shocked to see this situation.

They had no doubts about Gou Xuan's block of Ming Tu's attack. It is also a top general, and the size of the warhead is almost the same. With the same size of force, it is impossible to take the fortress.

But none of them could have imagined that thousands of planet-level superpowers appeared in the Ming Tu War Department, which were gods on the battlefield.

Goxuan's face is unprecedentedly dignified, and her brain is spinning fast, using her greatest ability to find a way to break the game.

Gulu Hongqiao cannot be lost.

Suddenly, a crazy color flashed across Gouxuan's face.

"Order all warships in the fifth, sixth, and eighth quadrants to gather in the first quadrant."

"Close the space jammer and space curing device in the first quadrant, open the space, and all warships jump into the arena, and launch suicide attacks on the planet-class superpowers of the Ming Tu War Department."

With this order, all Jiang Xing chilled in the War Department.

"My lord, this..."

When a general star just wanted to speak, he was interrupted by Gou Xuan.

"Execute orders! These planet-level superpowers are more valuable than a fortress."

They all know that the Hongqiao Fortress is over.

But they have to pay the price if they want to take the fortress.

...

Seeing the scene of the Gulu Hongqiao battlefield, Yan did not hide his shock. He stared at the moving scene of the Ming Tu War Department, and there was a superpower who was caught by radar, his eyes hot: "Is this the Super War Department?"

Tong Qing was equally shocked: "Unexpectedly, the marching ant group is still walking in front of us. They can actually train so many planet-level superpowers so quickly."

He now has to admire Chen Mo.

Since Chen Mo appeared, many technologies have exceeded their expectations. The superpower warfare composed of planet-level superpowers is still in the conceptual stage of their black pupil civilization, and the shadows have not been seen. The marching ant group is not only formed, but also like an arm.

The emergence of this battle played a key role.

Chen Mo really surprised them again and again.

It seems that his hunch is correct, Chen Mo is indeed his worst enemy.

"With such a large-scale planet-level superpower, coupled with surprise, Gulu Hongqiao is dangerous in this battle. However, this is not the most terrible." Yan solemnly said.

Hitomi looked at him, waiting for his next words.

Yan also didn't plan to sell Guanzi, and said: "They can continue to train planet-level super powers, how to defend? Super powers are everywhere. In the battlefield, there is no other way to defend except super powers."

At this moment, Tong Qing also fell into contemplation.

"and also."

"and also?"

"Forget the White Star Civilization and the Black Forest Star Territory, the dark matter warehouse was attacked strangely? I can almost be sure that it has something to do with the superpower of the marching ants." Yan looked determined.

Originally, he was only skeptical, but now seeing the large-scale planet-level superpowers appear in front of him, he is almost certain that it is the action of the marching ants.

As soon as this statement came out, Tong Qing's expression changed slightly: "How to say?"

"Since they can train planet-level superpowers on a large scale, why can't there be some more top superpowers, such as constant stars, or even galaxy-level. Isn't the two lost dark matter warehouses so weird?" The voice is a bit heavy.

Hitomi Qing's face changed wildly upon hearing this.

Galaxy-class superpower.

One person's superpower covers galaxies 100,000 light-years away. This ability is more terrifying than space weapons.

Thinking of the scene where he was fighting with Chen Mo, he didn't doubt Yan's guess.

I haven't seen Chen Mo take action for so long, and the marching ants have mastered the fast advanced super power method. Chen Mo's strength is definitely not weaker than him, and may even be the same as Yan guessed.

A galaxy-level superpower, before the release, I can't even think about it.

But after the appearance of large-scale planet-level superpowers, everything seems possible.

Dididi!

When Tongqing and Yan were communicating, suddenly, a rush of information was introduced into their combat room.

chapters.title: Chapter 1085: : Tragic
chapters.body:
Chapter 1085: : Tragic

The Nebula Alliance suddenly attacked the fortress defense line of the Black Eye civilization.

This news surprised Fatty Luo, and soon his expression became solemn.

In the information returned, the Nebula Alliance also has a strange superpower warfare. Like the top superpowers exposed by the Gulu Hongqiao Mingtu warfare, they are all superpowers above the planet level.

When attacking the fortress, it is similar to the Gulu Hongqiao, advancing with a force of destruction.

Another war of superpowers.

"The marching ant group made a very detailed plan for this counterattack." Fatty Luo compared and analyzed the two wars. The attack time was the same and the methods were the same.

In addition, there is also the strange dark matter warehouse damage event inside the White Star Civilization.

These things are all related.

"The marching ant group has mastered the method of training planet-level superpowers, and there may even be more advanced superpowers." This is the first conclusion that Fatty Luo gave.

"What should we do?" Zi Yun asked.

"The Nebula Alliance divided part of the pressure of the Black Eye civilization. Our pressure has dropped sharply. This is a good opportunity. The rectification within the civilization is almost the same, and it is time for the counterattack.

The marching ants want to take advantage of the exposure of their Super Warhead, and try to expand their advantage before the enemy can react. We can expand our advantage while the attention of the black pupil civilization is on the marching ants. "

Fatty Luo swept across the star map, which was the rear of the front line war on the star map.

As long as they win this constellation, their buffer opportunities can expand a lot.

"Sleepy, you arrange for a researcher to speed up the research of advanced super powers. After this war, the mode of the super war club is unstoppable." Zi Yun looked at the super power in the video and said coldly.

"Okay." The sleepy youth nodded and continued to sleep, wondering if he had listened to Zi Yun's words.

However, Zi Yun is not worried about this. Although Zi Zhong likes to sleep, he never relaxes when it comes to major events.

...

"It's all moving, and we can't be idle."

Ling Xi waved his hand to signal his subordinates to act according to the plan.

The battleship that had been waiting in space for instructions quickly disappeared, and when it reappeared, it was in the star field of Moon Deer City.

The war started in Yuelu City.

This was a long-planned war, and Yuelu City was not allowed to support Gulu Hongqiao. At the same time, it began to annex Yuelu City when the Ming Tu War Department started.

In the Ten Cities Alliance, Yuelu City is the only force that is committed to the White Star civilization, and he is surrounded by several other houses. Ling Xidu had to ridicule the foolishness of the City Lord of Yuelu City, and even the most basic situation could not be seen clearly, so she stood in disorder.

As the commander-in-chief of the Ten Cities Alliance, Ling Xi knew everything about the Ten Cities Alliance. The situation in Yuelu City had no secrets to him.

When he knew that the situation was out of control, he played a dark game in Yuelu City and swallowed Yuelu City without much effort.

Now the Ziwei civilization is working on the black pupil civilization, attracting part of Yan's attention. In the direction of the Nebula Alliance, Mingfeng and Lan joined forces to launch an attack on the Black Eye civilization, including the Super War Department.

No matter how strong Yan was, he would not dare to relax his vigilance towards Fatty Luo and Lan, besides, there was still a bright wind.

Three top generals are enough to worry about the Black Eye civilization for a while.

Now the Black Eye Civilization has no time to take care of the Ten Cities Alliance side, making Xi's pressure drop drastically.

This is a good opportunity to expand the advantages of the Star Territory of the New Five Cities Alliance, remove some unstable factors in the Star Territory, and facilitate the counterattack of the Black Eye Civilization in the future.

...

The space in the first quadrant is open, and warships continue to jump into the battlefield.

The suicide bombing of warships, and the battle that broke out in the sky, reached unprecedented levels of horror.

There are more and more warships in space. Here, warships from all quadrants of the fortress are gathered, and they are destroyed as soon as they appear.

Gou Xuan is desperate.

At this stage, the Super War Department has no solution, and there is no time for her to think about how to deal with it. She has to exchange it at a high price. If all the planet-level superpowers here can be replaced, the White Star Civilization will not be in this war. deficit.

The dominant Ming Tu is desperate.

Two giant beasts went crazy in the Hongqiao battlefield.

The severity of the war exceeded everyone's expectations. When the space in the first quadrant was opened, Ming Tu gave instructions. All members of the super warhead retreated from the battlefield. The waiting fleet jumped into the battlefield. The teams and super warheads on standby in other quadrants, Began to attack.

In the first quadrant battlefield, the collision of the two warships was to the point of death.

Gou Xuan has no way to retreat. In Ming Tu's original bones, there is sheer madness, and she is determined to win Gulu Hongqiao.

Both are top generals.

The main fleets of the two sides strangled in one place.

The open space becomes a purgatory of ground meat. Any warship entering it will not last long before it is broken into pieces.

This is a decisive battle.

Gou Xuan continuously mobilizes warships from all quadrants and invests them in the first quadrant, regardless of loss.

Countless pieces of debris blasted in space, and the sun-like spheres of light lit up, reflecting on the hull of each battleship.

The pace of war is accelerating in the first quadrant, like two martial arts masters competing for internal strength.

"My lord, the team of the Ming Tu Division in the other quadrants is advancing faster, and those quadrants have planet-level super powers." The general star who reported the battle report trembling.

This kind of war is terrible.

Their defense line, in the hands of the opponent, was like paper, and was easily broken. He had never seen such a terrible loss in a fortress attack and defense, and they were still the defender.

As a general, they relied on various high-tech weapons, but they were confused by the sudden appearance of the Super War Department.

They never thought that personal strength can be so strong.

Gou Xuan looked solemnly: "Total number of their planet-level superpowers, how many are there?"

In the open first quadrant, the pace of war between the two sides is extremely fast, and whoever tries to change their rhythm can easily cause a flash crash. Ming Tu used the main force of the War Department to drag them into the quagmire of the war abruptly.

"Roughly, it's about five thousand."

"It turns out that there are 5,000 planet-level and above superpowers. From the very beginning, Ming Tu planned to abandon the frontal main fleet to attract firepower. He had already reached this point."

Gou Xuan looked sad.

...

"The marching ants are so calculating." Yan's tone was not very good.

When the Super Warhead was exposed in Ming Tu, the Nebula Alliance attacked their fleet and found exactly the same situation.

The warhead of the Nebula Alliance is advancing towards them.

They are now facing a war in three directions.

The attack of the Ziwei civilization, the counterattack of the Nebula Alliance, and the plan of the Ten Cities Alliance.

Now it seems that their situation is also passive, especially after the Super War Department was exposed, Chen Mo played his hole cards.

Hitomi frowned, with a solemn expression: "The Super War Department has not found a way to deal with it for the time being, it's a bit troublesome."

Yan is silent, but very cautious: "The frontline drags them first. For the sake of this plan, I am afraid that it is imperative to accelerate the research of super advanced methods. The current marching ant group is a bit scary."

The scene of the destruction of the Super Warhead in the movie is exciting.

This kind of rare war has opened up another mode of war. It turns out that life can have such great power.

...

The war at Gulu Hongqiao has become intense.

The warships of both sides are still fighting in the open first quadrant, and the other quadrants are maintaining a crazy advancing speed. The unreasonable way of pushing forward gave them a real spiritual shock.

Such a terrifying and tight attack and defense rhythm lasted for a full sixty-three hours.

The wreckage of the battleship covered the space.

The exploding ball of light was still shining in the sky, bursting out rays of death. The generals and stars who watched this war through the video are all shocked. They were not at the scene of the war, and could not smell the breath of death in it.

The terrible Ming Tu battle department, the terrible marching ant group.

Each star is full of fear and fear.

The Super War Department appeared for the first time, and the different combat modes made people feel the unknown danger. Destruction without reason, death without warning, everything is pretty unreasonable.

When designing the ‘Super Power Armor’, Chen Mo thought about it. What he wanted was the expansion of the damage scope of the super power to the star level or even the constant star level. Only in this way can the super-powerful perform his due role in the war.

The two sides did not retreat at all.

With the depletion of warships and war machines on both sides, the collision of the first quadrant battlefield reached its most intense time.

But in other directions, due to the deployment of battleships, the White Star Civilization’s line of defense was unable to fight back in front of the Super War Department. The planet-class super-powers abandon their skills and brutally ruined space-based weapons and battlestars along the way.

Under the attack of this kind of non-military ethics, the Goxuan War Department has been weak in succession.

The balance of victory has poured out.

The defeat of the Goxuan War Department has already appeared, and there are fewer and fewer warships and war machines at their disposal.

The advancing speed of the Ming Tu War Department is also getting faster.

The outcome has been determined.

"Evacuate the stars and destroy the fortress."

This is the final instruction that Gou Xuan gave when the generals and team members of the Go Xuan War Department left Gulu Hongqiao. No one knows how painful Gou Xuan felt. This withdrawal shows that they have failed, and they have lost thoroughly.

Buzzing! !

Invisible spatial fluctuations spread from the fortress, and the radar warning triggered by this fluctuation caused the Ming Tu war tribe to stop advancing and quickly leave the battlefield in a spacecraft.

Half an hour later, the collapse caused by space weapons began.

Where the space fluctuations pass, the spacecraft wreckage, space-based weapon wreckage, the remaining defense lines and instruments of the Gulu Hongqiao Fortress, all turned into dust, and the space seemed to be compressed and spread out.

Space weapons are activated and the fortress is destroyed.

Before the video, I saw a scene of destruction in space, and all the stars became silent. They never thought that the fortress's offensive and defensive war would reach this point.

The suicidal attacks and the unsolvable super-powers of the Ming Tu War Department gave them a huge impact.

Ming Tu witnessed the destruction of the fortress in the distant space.

"Clear the shock wave of space weapons and take over Hongqiao." Ming Tu ordered.

chapters.title: Chapter 1086: : Bai Xing'S Plot
chapters.body:
Chapter 1086: : Bai Xing'S Plot

"Is it clear?" The old chief said lightly.

"Yes." Hu Bing nodded.

They spent a lot of time investigating why the central galaxy in the dark matter warehouse was destroyed. Finally found clues from the galaxy radar monitoring the dark matter warehouse.

The picture restored by the radar is opened, there are superpowers tearing apart the space, the gods enter the galaxy unknowingly, and then control the entire galaxy.

According to the radar picture and analysis, they can almost confirm that the one who did it is Chen Mo.

"Chen Mo?" The old chief Bai Xing thought suddenly, then raised his head after a while: "How sure is it that he is?"

"80% chance."

Hu Bingxin gave the radar detection content to the old chief. The scene became deadly silent, and they could all experience the weird atmosphere, but they did not dare to disturb the old chief's thinking.

"Where is Gulu Hongqiao? Can you get it back?" The old chief Baixing didn't feel any particularly big mood swings.

"Difficult." Hu Bingxin shook his head.

Gou Xuan has given them news, the battle is set, and the marching ants have won.

They used a brand-new combat method to take down Hongqiao like a ruin. If there is no means to deal with the super warhead of the marching ant group, they want to retake the Hongqiao battlefield, unless the opposing generals doze off collectively.

"Then find a way to deal with the marching ants, otherwise, let them continue like this, we will definitely suffer, their growth is very terrible." The old chief sighed.

"There is currently no good way to deal with their thousands of planet-level superpowers." Hu Bingxin shook his head.

"In fact, it's not impossible, but I don't know if it will work." A high-level who had been silent for a long time spoke, and everyone's eyes were on them.

Luo Yi of the Xiao clan.

The origins of the Xiao Clan are not small. They are the traditional veteran giants of the White Star Civilization. They are the strongest veteran faction in the White Star Civilization. Their faction is in charge of ship manufacturing and some outstanding talents.

Except for Mrs. Hu Bingxin's faction, the faction of the Xiao clan is the strongest. Almost every time when the election is changed, the Xiao clan has talented characters into the highest core level.

The Xiao Clan has always acted low-key and rarely has serious conflicts with other factions.

Therefore, the Xiao clan still has a lot of weight when it comes to speaking at the top.

"What way?" the old chief asked.

"The super-powered man who started the sneak attack is Chen Mo. We can design and draw Chen Mo and catch him with traps. When Chen Mo is caught by us, the marching ants can be controlled by us. All problems are no longer a problem." Luo Yi calmly Said.

Everyone on the court was shaking.

This idea is so bold that they can't even imagine it.

"How do we lead Chen Mo? How are we sure we can lead him out?" the old chief asked cautiously.

"Chen Mo personally destroyed our dark matter galaxy, which shows that he is not afraid of taking risks, and has enough courage and courage. He only needs to give enough chips to make his heart beat."

When Luo Yi saw that the high-level officials did not speak, he continued to speak.

"Our current situation in the White Star is a bit passive. The loss of Gulu Hongqiao means that marching ants and the allies of the New Five Cities can enter our star field through the Hongqiao, and the flames of war will spread to our interior. The marching ants are rising, another one Giants, and we have switched positions with them. Their strength is not weaker than ours, and now they even surpass us."

Everyone nodded in agreement.

After the super warhead of the marching ant group was exposed, the combat power quickly rose to the top position in the universe. The warheads of the White Star Civilization and the Black Eye Civilization are particularly vulnerable in front of a team composed of super powers above the planet level.

They have no way to deal with it, but can only watch the marching ants steadily advance.

The longer the time delays, the more and more planet-level superpowers of the marching ant group will become. At that time, no one can stop the marching ant group.

They have deduced the stars, and only need 10,000 superpowers above the planet level. At present, the defense of any fortress is as fragile as paper.

But in their entire White Star civilization, only the old chief was a planet-level superpower.

Dealing with Chen Mo is undoubtedly a shortcut.

"But what bargaining chip is enough for Chen Mo to do it himself?" a senior asked.

This time, the conference room fell into dead silence, Luo Yi looked down at the information, and didn't mean to say anything. The others frowned and thought, did not think of the answer, and finally their eyes fell on the old chief.

"The method is a bit risky, and the theory works." The old chief nodded slightly: "At present, it is certain that there is only one bargaining chip that must attract Chen Mo."

Many high-level leaders are in a great shock, waiting for the answer from the old chief.

"White Star's current situation is a bit passive. Our prediction was wrong. We thought that after giving generous alliance conditions this time, the Ten Cities Alliance and the Nebula Alliance would choose us and oppose the marching ants. But they chose the marching ants. We. The first step of the plan failed.

The second failure was that we underestimated the strength of the marching ants. The marching ant group exposed the trump card of the Super War Department this time. The deterrence effect is large enough and the strength is strong enough. Their internal military morale is stable and they have the strength to counterattack us. "

Many senior White Stars did not speak, because the old chief did not make a mistake. It was indeed the case. Just a few words summarized their situation during this period.

"If the marching ants continue to develop in this way and expand his superpower warhead. There is no doubt that we will lose our advantage and then slowly become a disadvantage. The enemy we face is advanced in technology, and the talents are not inferior to us. Much better than us. Therefore, for the White Star Civilization, we have to take a risk. If we win, we will have the capital to unify the universe, and the Black Eye Civilization will no longer be a problem. If we lose, we will lose only one."

All the upper floors became serious, and the atmosphere in the conference room was much heavier.

They don't understand what the old chief's words mean.

Lost, what is the loss?

Hu Bingxin glanced at Luo Yi, took a sip of tea.

The scene fell into dead silence and the atmosphere gradually became weird.

Luo Yi didn't say a word, and the old chief closed his eyes to rest his mind, and Hu Bingxin slowly sipped the tea, making the other seniors confused.

After a long time, Hu Bingxin put down his tea cup and sighed, "I agree."

"Promise? Promise what?" The high-level man next to Hu Bingxin was shocked, and suddenly thought of something, his expression changed: "You mean, Madam is going to be the bait to attract Chen Mo?"

As soon as he said this, the faces of the others changed greatly, and they instantly understood what the old chief said just now.

"Old Chief, I don't think it's right. Madam is very important to our White Stars. I would rather keep it for a while, lose some constellations, and find a way to deal with their super warheads and then counterattack. Don't take this risk." A high-level executive stood up and said.

"Old Chief, it's really wrong to let Madam take risks."

"We have hundreds of millions of important fortresses in the White Star Territory. We slowly retreat. We have a long time to find a way. There is no need to take risks."

Seeing the high-level controversy in the field, the old chief's eyes were uncertain, thinking about the gains and losses.

"No need to argue, this is my deliberate decision. At present, we, Baixing, are the only one who is the most suitable bait."

Hu Bingxin stopped everyone's controversy, took a sip of tea, and gently put it down.

"This is indeed an adventure, and it is also an opportunity. Everyone knows that in terms of true strength, we are not as good as Heitong. His goal is to unify the universe and achieve supreme hegemony. If only we and Heitong are left , We must not be the one who laughed last. And now, there is a stronger marching ant."

The scenes were audible, and they were all shocked. Especially for some generals, they have to admit that the wife is right.

"We have no advantages in technology, talent, or other aspects. Whether you want to believe it or not, from the current situation, our strength is the weakest of the three.

If we don't take risks, our final fate will still be eaten away. When the marching ants enter our star field and bite our sore spots, other civilizations may follow. We may be the next meditation civilization, eaten by the major forces of the universe.

As the ancestors said, take a risk once and win. We control Chen Mo, control the marching ants through Chen Mo, and master their super advanced technology, we have the capital to unify the universe, and the black pupil civilization is nothing to say. If we lose, we just lose one person. Without me, you can also retreat slowly according to the original method and find a way to resist the Super War Department. "

Hu Bingxin's voice was not loud, but every sentence struck their hearts.

The old chief nodded, his eyes made no secret of his appreciation for Hu Bingxin.

Hu Bingxin's resourcefulness, he was ashamed as an ancestor, so after he came out, he did not take back Hu Bingxin's power, but let her manage it.

Now it seems that he did not see the wrong person.

"Bing Xin sees it very clearly and has enough courage. I am here to announce a decision. If Bing Xin returns safely this time, she will become the first queen in the history of the White Star Civilization. From now on, the White Star Civilization will give her full control."

All the high-levels on the field are breathing stagnant.

chapters.title: Chapter 1087: : Playing Cards
chapters.body:
Chapter 1087: : Playing Cards

Helped the Nebula Alliance to attack the Black Eye civilization; Xiaoli and Suoli used the surprise of the Super War Department to make Di Nanye suffer a heavy loss; Ming Tu used the Super War Department to capture the most advanced defensive Gulu Hongqiao and let the top battle The ministry ran away dingy.

Three-line combat and a big victory.

The terrifying super warhead of the marching ant group was exposed in front of the universe.

The appearance of the Super War Department caused an uproar in the universe.

All superpowers above the planet level, and there may be higher-level superpowers hidden in the marching ants. The appearance of these speculations made opponents frightened.

The marching ants have mastered the method to quickly advance the superpower.

There is almost no solution to this terrifying army of superpowers.

When the results of the war came out, all the generals and stars of the universe were studying these wars. The general star of the marching ants once again taught the forces of the universe how to fight a super power war.

"What's going on in the White Star Civilization now?" Chen Mo asked.

He returned from the White Star Territory, and his purpose of destruction has been achieved. After the warhead enters the White Star Territory, the resistance will be much lower when launching a counterattack plan, because some important dark matter warehouses of the opponent have been destroyed, and it will take a while to rebuild.

This is also Lan's plan.

However, what surprised them was that the White Star Civilization did not have the desire to retake the Gulu Hongqiao, and was still shrinking the front, which made Chen Mo and the others incomprehensible.

The actions of the White Star Civilization are somewhat contrary to normalcy.

"No." Lan shook his head.

"Can you see what they are planning?"

"From the layout, they want to delay time." Lan points to open the star map: "They have a lot of fortresses in the star field, and our super warfare is limited. If we want to advance, we must flatten them one by one, but like this The speed will be very slow. They want to spend enough time to research super power technology to find a way to deal with our super warhead."

Chen Mo nodded.

Now that the Super Warhead appeared, some people have indeed lost their position and messed up their positions.

"How to arrange next?" Chen Mo asked.

Lan touched her pointed chin: "Slowly advancing, there is still a chance, as long as we hit the opposite side and there is no way to fight back, then, there will be disputes within the White Star Civilization, and then create public opinion that the White Star Civilization is about to fall, attracting The civilizations around him rallied and attacked him, and they were all over."

"They are god-level civilizations, the surrounding forces dare to do something?"

"Why don't you dare? Our battle shattered the myth of god-level civilization. The entire universe knows that a new era is here, and god-level civilization is not so powerful in the new era."

"Is there a faster way?" Chen Mo asked.

"Hurry up? Catch the thief first. Catch the king. The Sauron Alliance's methods can be used again, but it is a bit risky." Lan shook his head and said, "I personally don't recommend you to take the risk. After all, you are the master of the party."

When they were talking, Zhu He walked in quickly with a solemn expression.

"Something happened, Bai Xing is moving."

Zhu He handed a holographic projection to the two of them. After seeing the information clearly, they all stunned.

...

"The White Star Civilization is interesting."

Fatty Luo picked up a piece of meat and stuffed it in his mouth, watching with interest the news from the intelligence department.

Just now, the White Star Civilization issued an interesting piece of information.

Hu Bingxin publicly stated that according to the information of the Baixing Intelligence Department, Chen Mo obtained the secrets of life in the fourth dimension from Mu's Tianxing's suicide note and found a way to quickly grow super powers. This is the reason why the marching ants have a super warfare. .

She called on the forces of the entire universe to unite and ask Lin Han for a letter from the Star of Heaven, asking for the secrets of life in the fourth dimension, and making it public to the entire universe. If Chen Mo disagrees, she hopes that the entire universe will unite against the marching ants.

None of the forces expected that the White Star Civilization would suddenly come out like this.

"This trick successfully attracted the attention of the entire universe." Zi Yun sighed.

As a woman, Zi Yun had to admire Hu Bingxin's wisdom and strategy. At this time, she could still use this method.

"It's not just about attracting success."

Fatty Luo shook his head, took a bite of the meat in his hand, his eyes became distant.

...

"The fourth dimension is an unknown realm that the forces of the entire universe have been exploring. This is a higher-dimensional life of a god-level life. In the concept of the fourth-dimensional life proposed, it has the ability to be omnipotent, immortal. No. Four-dimensional life is a temptation to all life, and no life can resist this temptation." Yan clapped his hands in amazement, with a look of admiration.

"No one thought that Hu Bingxin still had such a card." Tong Qing also exclaimed.

It is said that Mrs. Fox is resourceful and ingenious. She didn't feel it before, but now she has seen it.

He couldn't even think of this hand.

Originally, I was paying attention to the marching ant super warhead, but now the reason for the formation of the super warhead is revealed, and it is even more concerned.

If the marching ants do not handle it well, they will offend the entire universe.

Now, no matter how strong the marching ants are, they can only perish in the face of the unity of the forces of the entire universe.

"This is an arrogant plan, let's see how Chen Mo accepted the move." Yan stared at the holographic video of Hu Bingxin, lost in thought.

"What do we do?" Hitomi asked.

Yan raised his head and smiled: "Of course it is adding fuel to the fire."

...

Back then, the whole universe knew that only Chen Mo and his assistant had read the Tianxing suicide note. Because Tongqing and Chen Mo had a tie, the Tianxing suicide note was melted into a ball by Zidi with super power.

Since then, Tian Xing's suicide note has become an unsolved mystery, and only Chen Mo and his assistants know the answer to the mystery.

In the beginning, the whole universe paid special attention to this, because Mu Shi Tianxing kept secrets for hundreds of millions of years, and it was definitely not simple.

But after the battle of Mu's Sky Star, all parties in the universe started a war, first the dark forest split, then the destruction of the Pluto civilization, then the arrival of the super power era, and now entering the cosmic chaos, they all forgot about the suicide note of the sky star.

Now that Hu Bingxin mentioned it, once again let the whole universe pay attention to this matter.

And involving the fourth dimension of life, there is also the super warhead that shocked the universe by the marching ants.

It is true that only the marching ants know the secrets recorded in the Tianxing's suicide note, and now, only the marching ants are in control of the method of large-scale training of super powers above the planet level.

Hu Bingxin reminded that some people had to link the two here, and she also vowed to say about the news that the White Star Intelligence Department had received.

Mu Shi Tianxing uses special means to protect the secrets of hundreds of millions of years. There are secrets of life in the fourth dimension and advanced methods of super power, which is not surprising.

With the help of those who are interested, news is spreading and fermenting.

After Hu Bingxin's call appeared, Tongqing of Black Eye Civilization also stood up.

Hitomi made it clear that Black Eye’s intelligence department only learned that the marching ants had mastered the secrets of the fourth dimension of life through Tianxing’s suicide note and did not disclose it to the public, so that they would deal with the marching ants and Chen Mo at any cost.

The two enemy brothers of the Dark Forest and the Black Forest seemed unwilling to be lonely. They all expressed that they had obtained the same information and hoped that Chen Mo would announce the secrets of life in the fourth dimension and the methods of super power advancement to the entire universe.

The three major god-level civilizations opened their mouths. Soon afterward, the Leitheon civilization, which had been low-key recently, also suddenly spoke, hoping that the marching ants group would announce the contents of the Tianxing suicide note and announce the secrets of super power advancement.

Anyone with a discerning eye knows that this is a scheming against marching ants.

But the forces of the jealous marching ants superpower warfare department, regardless of whether this is a conspiracy or not, they are really convinced that the secret of Tianxing's suicide note is related to the secret of fourth-dimensional life and superpower advancement.

The war-torn universe suddenly undercurrents.

chapters.title: Chapter 1088: : Yangmou? Conspiracy?
chapters.body:
Chapter 1088: : Yangmou? Conspiracy?

"The effect is unexpectedly good."

Hu Bingxin looked at the result of the fermentation with a satisfied smile.

The repercussions of this incident had unexpected results. Nowadays, the public opinion pressure of the entire universe is exerted on the marching ants, and they undoubtedly want to see this scene.

No matter how the marching ant group chooses, it won't be too easy to take over.

If the training method of the Super War Department is not announced, they will be attacked by groups. If the training method of the Super War Department is announced, the advantages of the marching ants will be exhausted and there is no threat.

"Madam, will the next thing be a bit risky?" Bailu persuaded by Hu Bingxin's side.

"It was originally a risk. If we win the universe and dominate the universe, if we lose, our losses are limited, and it can cause big trouble to the marching ants," said Hu Bingxin.

At this time, Bai Jia walked in and respectfully said: "Madam, the affairs of the universe live broadcast are ready."

"Okay, let's go."

Hu Bingxin withdrew from his joy and returned to his former calmness. Bailu and Baijiao guarded behind her and followed her into the live broadcast room.

"It's time to start."

The leading broadcaster carefully confirmed that the live broadcast was OK, and Chaohu Bingxin made a gesture.

"Hello friends from all star regions in the universe, I am the Fox Bingxin of the White Star Civilization..."

Standing on the small platform, Hu Bingxin spoke calmly.

This shot quickly appeared on various cosmic channels of the White Star Civilization, entered the cosmic news platform, and spread to every corner of the universe through quantum communications.

...

The things left by Mu's Heavenly Star are the common wealth of all beings in the universe. This is the consensus of the universe. Therefore, Mu's Heavenly Star has almost no war, and it is not allowed to be destroyed there.

The battle between Chen Mo and Tong Qing was the biggest destruction since the Tianxing Stele Forest stood for hundreds of millions of years.

Fox Bingxin brought the matter of Tian Xing's suicide note to the outside world again, and linked the Tian Xing suicide note to the current Super War Department. People who did not know would undoubtedly choose to believe her.

Because back then, indeed only their family had read the Xing Xing's suicide note, and according to outside speculation, the content of the Xing Xing's suicide note was related to super power.

Hu Bingxin's remarks threw this problem to him.

If the contents of Tianxing's suicide note are not disclosed, they will be enemies of the whole universe, and they may be attacked by groups.

Disclosure of the contents, without the training technology of the Super War Department, the outside world will think they have concealed it, and it is impossible for them to disclose the technology of the Super War armor.

Chen Mo admired Hu Bingxin's hand.

He didn't have a particularly big impression of the female fox before, but now he knows that he can manage the life of the White Star Civilization, and he is still a female, and has her own advantages.

"Brother Mo, there is new news, and Hu Bingxin has conducted a whole universe live broadcast." Mo Nui beside her suddenly said.

"Oh?" Chen Mo was taken aback: "Open it and take a look."

"The marching ant swallowed the last letter of the star, and successfully controlled the super power technology on the letter of the star, obtained the method of fast-advanced super power, and also mastered the secret of the fourth dimension of life. As early as his death, Mu's star After making a will, all the knowledge and technology left by him belong to the common possession of life in the universe.

But now, the marching ants have only swallowed the last letter of Tianxing, and want to take advantage of technology to rule the entire universe. Therefore, I hereby call on all civilized members of the Universe Alliance to unite and conquer the marching ants, and ask them to hand over the secrets of super-power advancement and the secrets of fourth-dimensional life in the Tianxing suicide note, and share them with the entire universe.

I hereby announce that the White Star Civilization will stop all interstellar wars except for the Marching Ant Group. I will launch the Cosmic Alliance Conference on Shenyuan Star, inviting civilized groups from all over the universe to participate and discuss the matter of recovering the Star’s will from the Marching Ant Group. ..."

...

"This is a great trick."

Seeing the content of Hu Bingxin's live broadcast, Tong Qing had to be amazed, this female fox is really a wise man. If this female fox is a male, I am afraid this is an opponent no weaker than Dan.

"This trick introduced the marching ants to the center of the cosmic storm. The marching ants are now in a hundred mouths. I didn't expect this inconspicuous thing to become a trouble for the marching ants." Yan said happily.

"No, no, it was not inconspicuous at the beginning."

Tong Qing shook his head in disapproval, and saw Yan cast a suspicious look, he continued.

"Remember when I came back, I told you that? During the match, Chen Mo felt unfathomable, like the abyss of space, without seeing the end of his abilities. The outside world seemed to be tied with him. In fact, I was the one who was defeated at that time. There were only three lives who knew I was defeated, Chen Mo, Zidi and myself."

"How come?" Yan looked shocked.

"Yes, I have to admit that it is a fact. Zidi gave me a step down and destroyed the Tian Xing suicide note, making the outside world think that it was a tie, and let the outside world see that the Tian Xing suicide note was destroyed in public and no longer exists, Chen Mo I also went down the steps and didn't continue to make a big noise, so we all agreed and didn't talk about the original battle." Tong Qing sighed.

Only masters can understand masters. They were only three of them who were on the court at that level.

"At that time, Chen Mo felt that he was a fourth-dimensional life. I seemed to have told you about this. Hu Bingxin might be on the right side this time. The secrets of the fourth-dimensional life may be recorded in the Tianxing suicide note."

"If this is the case, the marching ants must be destroyed, and we must also obtain the secret." Yan said after thinking about it: "This time, there may be another plan of the White Star Civilization. We can follow them to make a fuss. Use the power of the entire universe to discover the trump cards of the marching ants. Secondly, if we really get this secret from Chen Mo in the future, we are also one of the leaders."

"How to do it?" Hitomi asked.

Yan laughed: "Live broadcast, publicly agree with Hu Bingxin's plan, and send representatives to Shenyuanxing to attend the meeting."

...

"There is a conspiracy, Hu Bingxin initiated this meeting. There must be a conspiracy." Fatty Luo said as he ate the meat, his face trembling.

"Why do you say that?" Zi Yun asked.

"Intuition, the intuition of a general star."

With his keen sense of various strategies, it is almost certain that the meeting called by Hu Bingxin has a conspiracy.

But he didn't know where the conspiracy occurred.

The meeting itself is a conspiracy against marching ants. Let the marching ants be the enemy of the entire universe, and get rid of the predicament that the white star civilization is targeted by the marching ants at this stage.

There is a deeper conspiracy, who is it?

Deal with all civilizations participating in the conference?

impossible.

Give Hu Bingxin a hundred courage and dare not do this, otherwise they will become the next god-level civilization to be destroyed.

"Once this meeting succeeds, it will be enough to deal with the marching ants, what else is there to conspiracy?" Zi Yun asked puzzled.

"Of course we still deal with marching ants."

Suddenly, a lazy voice interjected, and the two looked at Zizhong who was dozing off and was waking up.

"Why? Is it necessary?" Zi Yun asked.

"It's necessary." The sleepy young man yawned while holding the doll and stood up, his eyes sharpened suddenly: "What if the White Star Civilization wants to swallow it?"

Fatty Luo and Zi Yun were shocked.

...

"There is a conspiracy here," Lan said very confidently.

From this layout, he felt a sense of danger.

As a top planner, he looked at things more deeply. Judging from the current intelligence, this is a shameful scheme, which is insoluble by the marching ants.

But he felt that it would not be as simple as the surface.

Hu Bingxin's positive plan could not be so simple.

If there is a conspiracy, what are they planning?

Chen Mo frowned at this time, thinking about something, and after a while, his expression relaxed.

"Don't worry about the conspiracy. In front of absolute power, no amount of conspiracy will help. Since Hu Bingxin dared to show up and expose her position, this may be an opportunity to control her. Controlling her, White Star Civilization will lose more than half."

Lan nodded gently after hearing Chen Mo's words.

"I'm afraid to be more careful." An untimely voice appeared, and a tall silver-skinned woman came in from the combat room.

Yang Siqingyue, Lan's daughter.

Chen Mo remembered that since waking up, this woman had been eating, drinking, and having fun on the earth, studying everywhere, always showing a divine and indifferent appearance, ignoring world affairs, and rarely taking care of things. In the words of the earth, she was a young man of the Buddhist family.

No one dares to doubt her talents and abilities, and sometimes Lan, as a father, admires her.

She may not be good at commanding battles, but depending on the nature and strategy of the problem, she is better than blue because of blue. Sometimes Lan encounters something, she will talk to his daughter.

Lan asked her to enter the thinking tank of the marching ants many times, as the chief of the think tank, but she just refused to focus on playing the world.

But now it suddenly appeared.

"Why are you here?" Lan saw Yang Siqingyue, her face softened.

"I don't want to come either. I'm afraid you won't think of it, so I worry about it. I came for this." Yang Siqingyue said, "There is still a conspiracy."

"You know?" Chen Mo asked.

"I don't know, but I can see some flaws." Yang Si Qingyue looked at Chen Mo: "It hasn't been long since the senior leaders of the Sauron Alliance were trapped by us. The leaders who fought with us are hiding in the dark. Why is Hu Bingxin so easy? Where to expose?"

Lan and Chen Mo looked up at the same time, their expressions changed slightly.

"They may have come to the boss this time." Yang Siqing said quietly.

chapters.title: Chapter 1089: : Restart The Universe
chapters.body:
Chapter 1089: : Restart The Universe

As Yang Siqingyue said, this may be a game against Chen Mo. As the White Star Civilization, the senior leaders of the Sauron Alliance were caught up in it. They couldn't ignore it. Exposing the position of the leader at this time is not a wise move, it can only be said to be deliberate.

Whether to enter or not, this is a question that Chen Mo should consider now.

Several people fell silent.

If it was for Chen Mobu's game, it was obvious that if he went to sneak attack on Fox Bingxin, then he might have fallen into the trap set by the opponent.

"From another angle, can we break the current situation?" Chen Mo asked.

Now the attention of the forces of the entire universe is on the marching ants, and they may face the danger of being besieged by forces of the entire universe.

Now that you decide whether you want to go there, it depends on whether it's worth it.

If there is a way to disrupt this situation, knowing that it is a game, they can avoid it.

"Once they reach a joint, we really have no choice but to retreat to the small universe." Lan shook his head and said.

To deal with the forces of the entire universe by one's own power, no one force has such a terrifying ability. Once this alliance is reached, the New Five Cities and Nebula Alliance may not dare to continue to stand in line with them.

Regardless of how smooth their cooperation is now, there are no real allies at any time, it just depends on whether the betrayal is big enough.

When the time comes, retreat to the small universe, there is no other way.

This is a conspiracy.

"What if this meeting is disrupted?" Chen Mo continued to ask.

"If we disrupt this meeting and show our marching ant's might, we can stabilize the concerns of the Nebula Alliance and the New Five Cities. As long as the three alliances are still there, we will have enough depth to arrange and buffer. What we need now is time , Super Battle Armor began small batch production, in a few years, we will be able to form more Super War Department. According to my calculations, in the case of opponents without Super Battle Armor, we have one million super The war department can sweep all opponents."

"So if you disrupt their meeting, the income will be good?" Chen Mo looked calm.

"It's true." Lan nodded and said.

"Hu Bingxin uses the body as bait. If you can control Hu Bingxin, what will be the consequences?" Chen Mo asked.

As soon as this problem came up, Lan was shocked and lost in thought, and soon looked up.

"Hu Bingxin was arrested, and their leader and the old chieftain of the White Star are the spiritual pillars of the White Star Civilization. There will be no major changes in the short term, but the morale of the White Star Civilization will be a huge blow, which is equivalent to our marching ants. Lost President Zhao Min."

"Then I really want to go there."

"This is too risky, not quite right."

"She dared to use her body as a bait to take risks. What fear do I have?" Chen Mo's eyes became a little deeper: "Besides, the other party doesn't have the means to really understand me. It is not so easy to catch me with traps. "

Lan did not object to Chen Mo.

He felt that Chen Mo had changed a lot. The previous Chen Mo was very Buddhist and didn't care about the hegemony of the universe. It can be said that he has no ambition to hegemony the universe, but just wants to live a good life. Now, his heart for hegemony has begun to appear.

For a subordinate, he was naturally happy with Chen Mo's changes.

He didn't know what was causing this change in Chen Mo. As a subordinate, he couldn't ask.

Chen Mo glanced at Lan and knew what Lan was thinking, so he said, "Is there something wrong?"

"Just thinking of some digressions, I feel that the boss is different from before." Lan smiled.

"Where is it different?"

"The boss's ambition to win is stronger. In other words, the boss's ambition to fight for hegemony is stronger than before. For the marching ants, this is a good thing." Lan said truthfully what she thought.

"Is it ambition to fight for hegemony?" Chen Mo smiled and shook his head: "You can say that, I have my mission."

"Mission? The mission of technology inheritance?" Lan asked.

It’s no secret that Chen Mo has a civilized technological heritage. Life with a little thinking ability can guess that Chen Mo’s body inherited the technological crystallization of a certain top civilization. That’s why the galaxy has developed into the strongest in the universe so quickly. One of the centers of power.

"Yeah." Chen Mo nodded slightly: "You can say so."

"The mission of unifying the universe?" Lan asked strangely.

"Restart the universe." Chen Mo said lightly.

Lan Ru was shocked by the thunder, and was dumbfounded.

...

"Should we send someone over?"

After reading Hu Bingxin's speech, Wan Tianxing turned to ask the poisonous girl next to him.

The Land of Chaos and the Land of Thousand Stars merged to restore the Thousand Star Empire. Their appearance has caused a lot of waves and successfully attracted the firepower of Thor Civilization.

Because the old civilization of the Thousand Star Empire fell, the Thor Civilization was one of the biggest promoters. The two star regions border the widest border, and it is inevitable to crossfire again.

Wan Tianxing is the first chairperson of the Thousand Star Empire, and the Poison Skin Girl becomes the number two person. Together, they are in charge of all the power of the Thousand Star Empire.

There are high and low positions, but there is no difference in their status, and they are equal internally.

"Go, of course." The girl with the poisonous skin narrowed her eyes and smiled: "The Origin Star was the place where the Cosmic Alliance signed the agreement that year. Maybe the next cosmic era will be determined in this meeting. Our current strength In the past, it was natural to become one of the dominant nations, and it was not impossible to replace a god-level civilization."

"Yes, I think so too." Wan Tianxing laughed.

...

Hu Bingxin's public speech quickly spread to every corner of the universe.

Shenyuan Star, this ancient galaxy [Guchengdushu www.guchengdushu.com] once again appeared in the vision of the entire universe.

The Origin Star is the headquarters of the former Universe Alliance. The Universe Alliance led by the seven god-level civilizations has been the rule of order for the main universe for hundreds of millions of years. Almost all powerful civilized forces in the universe must act within the framework of the rules of the universe alliance.

With the destruction of the underworld civilization, the division of the dark forest, and the opening of the cosmic war, the cosmic alliance has long existed in name only. Shenyuan Star was originally located on the edge of the Ziwei star field. After the war began, Shenyuan Star fell into the control of the White Star Civilization.

But now, the God Origin Star was mentioned by Hu Bingxin again, just to take advantage of the power of the former Universe Alliance.

This trick really played a big role.

Soon after the speech, Hitomi Qing also gave a public speech in support of Hu Bingxin's statement, and will send envoys to participate in the meeting of the gods, as one of the leaders of this special cosmic alliance meeting.

The support of the black pupil civilization has made countless forces still hesitating choose to join the lineup against the marching ants and announce their participation in this meeting.

After that, the two brothers of Thor Civilization and Dark Forest Civilization also announced that they would send representatives to the meeting agenda.

Other forces either choose to stand by or join in. No one dares to open the marching ant group. Even the new five cities and the Nebula Alliance, the allies of the marching ants, dare not easily publicly announce their support for the marching ants.

The whole universe is propagating.

The Shenyuan Conference has become the top priority of life in the universe in this troubled world.

If the meeting successfully reaches an agreement and consensus, it will be a fatal blow to the marching ant group. Successfully forcing the marching ant group to disclose the secrets of rapid super power advancement, the development of super power in the universe will usher in a golden age.

...

"Is the source of God ready?" Hu Bingxin asked lightly.

"As planned, everything is ready." Egret nodded heavily.

Don't be nervous, it is fake, this plan is related to the life of the lady, they know how important the lady is to the white star civilization. Almost all the technologies of the White Star Civilization were used this time, and they all knew that the plan of the Source Star was related to the future of their White Star Civilization.

Hu Bing nodded his head: "This plan is not trivial. The marching ants have caused great losses to us in this war. They have the ability to sneak attacks on our hinterland galaxies. It will be very troublesome for us to let the other party go step by step, so this plan must be completed. "

The super masters on the court did not consciously tensed their bodies and looked serious.

Seeing their serious expressions, Hu Bingxin felt a little relieved, then his expression regained seriousness: "Your mission this time is not to protect me."

As soon as this remark came out, the court was shocked. All the super players present looked at Hu Bingxin, their eyes filled with puzzlement.

What else can they do without protecting you?

"We can't put the cart before the horse." Hu Bingxin urged in a solemn voice: "This task is to capture Chen Mo alive."

chapters.title: Chapter 1090: : Shenyuan Conference
chapters.body:
Chapter 1090: : Shenyuan Conference

Restart the universe.

This is the mission that Chen Mo obtained in the time and space gate of the Science and Technology Library.

The universe is dying, this is the information he has obtained.

The existing universe has decayed from eleven dimensions, the space dimension has stagnated, and time has become one-dimensional, which is a manifestation of the aging of the universe and the death of cosmic consciousness.

The universe itself is a living entity, controlled by dimensional life. The time weapons launched by dimensional life are out of control, destroying the original time spin state of the universe, like a nuclear war that is out of control of planet civilization, triggering a chain change in the state of'planet'. The original life forms on the planet are extinct, and a brand-new life system is derived, like the transition from dinosaur civilization to human civilization.

This is the reason for the degradation of the universe.

The current universe is an unconscious shell, and the life in the universe is a new life system that has been destroyed and revived from the destruction of the original universe. The existing god-level race is a race inherited from the remnants of the original universe. They are born with super power genes, and other super powers are mutations of returning to ancestors.

The original universe disappeared, the state of the space dimension stopped, time became one-dimensional, and the space with unlimited speed of light was limited to 300,000 kilometers per second. Most of the planets in the universe lost their vitality and entered the era of apocalyptic wasteland.

Today's main universe has reached the moment of decay of the ‘corpse of the universe’.

The appearance of Hongqiao is a sign.

The space becomes fragile.

When all the giant gravitational sources of the galaxies in the universe collapse into rainbow bridges, the planets in the universe will lose the gravitational force of the giant gravitational sources, and all stars will begin to wander in the universe, and the era of great collision will come. At that time, space turbulence will be raging and cracks will be vertical and horizontal. The universe will lose its last vitality.

It is the ultimate mission of the science and technology library to restart the universe time and return to the eleven dimensions of time spin.

Chen Mo didn't want to drag on this matter for too long, so he wanted to end the space war quickly and begin his final mission. The abuse of space weapons and space technology is making the stagnant space fragile. The emergence of Hongqiao is the most obvious evidence.

...

After finishing the communication with the boss, Lan couldn't calm down for a long time.

According to the boss's description, restarting the universe is like bringing a new life to an apocalyptic planet.

At that time, life in the universe was like dragons and terrifying, and most planets would be rejuvenated to form life with their own characteristics and various ground state life.

Everyone is naturally awakened to superpowers, and powerful, and there may even be terrifying black hole races.

The lifespan of those lives starts from ten thousand years, and some life can live the same life as stars, only time is immortal.

That is an unimaginable world.

The world described by the boss is so incredible, subverting his understanding of the existing cosmology.

When those words are spoken from other people, he will listen to them as a story, but they will not be a joke when they are spoken from the boss. Immortal quantum life has come out. Infinite life and the ability to control time are the prerequisites for completing this mission.

Therefore, the boss does not hesitate to risk himself as a quantum life.

To restart the universe, we must first unify the universe, dominate the entire universe, and become the rule maker.

According to the boss, unifying the universe is like unifying the planets in the last days, and then dominates the power to transform this'planet', restore this'planet' to its original appearance and reconstruct the rules.

He used to follow the boss just to heal his daughter.

For his daughter, he can be desperate.

As his daughter wakes up, his mentality is also changing. The ideal of once aspiring to be the strongest star begins to slowly recover.

Perhaps it is gratitude, perhaps it is to repay the boss’s kindness, or perhaps the boss’s trust in him, he has never spared no effort in marching ants.

In the past, the boss had no ambitions, he just wanted the marching ants to survive in the universe, have a place, and live quietly. But the outside world has not kept them quiet, coveting the technology in their hands.

Now that the boss has ambitions, marching ants can no longer be like before.

He has a new goal.

...

God source star.

This once-universal alliance headquarters galaxy was once deserted because of the war.

Nowadays, there is an endless stream of civilized representatives who have come to participate in the Shenyuan meeting against the marching ant group, and the planet is once again lively.

There are fleets guarding the entrance of each space bubble, and all spacecraft passing by need to undergo the most stringent inspections. Spacecraft represented by various civilizations cannot enter, and can only enter the galaxy by spacecraft provided by the White Star Civilization.

This place is now under the jurisdiction of the White Star Civilization, so all fleets belong to the White Star Civilization.

All of this is to allow the lives that enter here to confirm their identity, in the name of it, for the sake of safety, and for the lives of marching ants to sneak into the meeting.

Hu Bingxin sat on the sofa, closed his eyes and rested.

The long-awaited Shenyuan meeting is about to begin. She is the initiator and host of this meeting.

Although a little nervous, she still has confidence.

At this time, the Divine Source Galaxy is full of the most advanced quantum radars of the White Star Civilization. Almost every storage space is covered with radar monitoring. Once space fluctuations and unknown warships occur, they will be able to spot movement for the first time.

Her target is Chen Mo.

According to their speculation, the person who controls the galaxy-level superpowers of the marching ants is most likely Chen Mo. Because when he was at Mu's Sky Star, Chen Mo showed terrifying superpowers. At that time, he and Tong Qing were famous in the universe.

Over time, she could guess that with advanced super advanced technology, Chen Mo must be the first to use it.

She guessed that it might be that Chen Mo was related to life in the fourth dimension.

For more advanced super advanced technology, she chose to use herself as a bait.

This is a bet.

If they win, the White Star Civilization holds the two strongest forces, the White Star and the March Ants. They will far surpass the Black Eye Civilization and possess the ability to dominate the universe. If she loses, she is controlled by Chen Mo, the White Star Civilization loses her, all power returns to the old chief, the White Star Civilization is still the White Star Civilization.

But regardless of winning or losing, the end of marching ants will not be too good.

She has amplified the news that the marching ants swallowed Mu's star technology. In order to obtain that kind of cross-age technology, the marching ants have become the public enemy of the universe. When the time comes, the marching ants will be overwhelmed and will naturally not focus on attacking their White Star civilization.

"What's the special discovery of the egret?" Hu Bingxin turned around and asked Lion Min next to him.

"Not found." Shi Ming shook his head.

The egret is paying attention to the galaxy monitoring and will send an alert to them when it finds an abnormality.

In order to avoid the situation of being controlled, monitoring is also installed in the monitoring place, which is guarded by teams in other galaxies, in case all the lives of their gods are controlled and cannot issue an alarm.

He did not receive an alert here, indicating that there is no problem.

For some reason, Shimin felt that Madam was too adventurous this time. The fall of the Alliance of Sauron is still vividly visible, and the major galaxies in the White Star Territory have been inexplicably destroyed. All these indicate that the marching ants are very likely to be in control. Galaxy-level super power.

For the major civilizations that are just in the development stage of super power at this stage, that level of super power is undoubtedly a more terrifying weapon than space weapons.

But this decision was passed by the core senior management, and the old chief also agreed. As a subordinate, he has no possibility of refuting it.

"Madam, the meeting is about to begin." A subordinate came to report.

"Let's go."

Hu Bing mentally adjusted his clothes and stood up gracefully.

There are millions of representatives of civilizations from all over the universe sitting in the huge circular staircase conference hall. These representatives, the last one, also represent advanced civilization.

In the order of strength and status, in the most central position of the conference hall, there are representatives of god-level civilization sitting.

The representative of the Black Pupil civilization is present, the representative of the Ziwei civilization is present, and the representative of the Thor civilization is present.

The representatives of the Dark Forest and the Black Forest occupy the seats of the endless sea and the original dark forest. The position of the original Pluto civilization is occupied by the representatives of the Thousand Star Empire.

Other civilizations, such as the Nebula Alliance, the Land of the Immortals, the Giant Civilization, the Underfire Civilization, the New Ten Cities Alliance, and many other representatives of the top civilizations, are all in the second echelon position.

There are two giants not participating, endless sea and marching ant group, the protagonist of this meeting.

The marching ants do not participate, there is no accident,

But the endless sea did not participate, and the outside world was quite puzzled, because the allies of the marching ants sent representatives to come, but the endless sea did not give any expression or explain to the outside world.

As for the statement that Endless Sea supports the marching ants, they also did not get the answer from Endless Sea's operations.

From beginning to end, no matter what predicament the marching ants face, endless sea has never helped Chen Mo. If he can't guess it, the outside world will no longer pay attention to it, only when endless sea is absent.

As Hu Bingxin took his seat, the meeting room, which was already undercurrent, suddenly became dead and the atmosphere became weird.

This picture, through live footage, spreads to every corner of the universe in real time.

This is the largest conference ever held since the great chaos in the universe.

At the same time, in the outer space of the Shenyuan star system, a violent spatial fluctuation suddenly appeared and expanded rapidly. A small spacecraft slowly emerged from the space ripples. The hull of the spacecraft was painted with the conspicuous marching ant group logo.

chapters.title: Chapter 1091: : Consciousness Space
chapters.body:
Chapter 1091: : Consciousness Space

Chen Mo appeared. Almost at the same time, the radar system of the Divine Source Galaxy sounded a violent alarm.

The White Star Civilization is extremely tightly guarded against the Divine Source Galaxy. When the heavy weight radar is small, the space fluctuations and the appearance of spaceships are found, and the swords are drawn instantly.

All radars focused their attention on where Chen Mo appeared.

The Egret looked calm and stared at the screen, but he looked calm and composed.

Sure enough, the big fish they were waiting for seemed to appear, not in the main venue of Shenyuan Star, but in this unknown space.

In any galaxy, if there is sufficient preparation, it is not easy for the enemy to enter quietly, not to mention that they are the army of the White Star civilization.

It was confirmed that the spaceship of the marching ants appeared, the egret retracted his gaze and turned on the communication device: "Madam, the spaceship of the marching ants has appeared."

Hu Bingxin, who was presiding over the meeting of the gods at the beginning, flickered slightly: "Can you be sure who is here?"

"No," said Egret.

"Start according to the predetermined plan." Hu Bingxin said calmly.

A smile appeared on the face of the egret: "Okay."

Without much communication, Egret refocused his attention on the screen. The lone warship was floating in space. The logo of the marching ant group was particularly conspicuous, which seemed to be a provocation.

Suddenly, an invisible wave spread across the Divine Source Galaxy, spreading across every corner of the Divine Source Galaxy.

Egret frowned slightly, and he suddenly had an ominous hunch, but he couldn't tell where it came from. They knew that this time the marching ants were either to sabotage the Shenyuan Conference or for the wife.

Either way, they are not what they want to see.

"The prey appears, start according to the scheduled plan, to contain this spacecraft." Egret opened the war department communications and issued instructions.

In just an instant, the entire Divine Origin Galaxy was enveloped by an inexplicable atmosphere.

...

Hu Bingxin still presided over the meeting calmly. The theme of their meeting this time was the crusade against the marching ant group.

"As we all know, the marching ants privately swallowed Mu's sky star's suicide note, which records the lifelong strongest technology of Mu's sky star, which is related to the secrets of super power and high-dimensional life. Obviously, now the marching ants control this technology. This kind of technology allowed them to establish a terrifying super warhead..."

Her goal now is to cause trouble for the marching ants, no matter if they succeed or fail this time, the marching ants will definitely fall into the mud.

This is a series of traps she set up for the marching ants. Whether the opponent comes here or not, they will face similar problems.

"So I suggest that the Great Council of the Old Cosmos Alliance lead the country, organize the warheads and legions of the participating countries, launch an offensive against the marching ants, and force them to unconditionally hand over the'Heaven Star Suicide Note' that should belong to the life of the universe. Super power technology and high-dimensional secrets are shared by life in the universe..."

Her voice is impassioned, with a trace of charm, and has a charming feeling, which makes the listener unconsciously become excited.

Suddenly, an inexplicable feeling enveloped everyone's heart at the meeting.

Everyone raised their heads unconsciously.

They saw that Chen Mo's figure slowly emerged in the holographic projection in the center of the conference hall.

"Not bad."

The appearance of Chen Mo stirred up waves in the venue, and there was an uproar in an instant, and some fainthearted still felt an inexplicable sense of fear.

It was live broadcast in the universe at this time, and the appearance of Chen Mo's projection was immediately spread throughout the universe.

The audience sitting next to the projection unconsciously held their breath.

Chen Mo looked around for a week, and his eyes fell on Hu Bingxin's face: "Unexpectedly, the real body appeared. I thought you would appear here with a stand-in."

For some reason, when Chen Mo saw it this way, Hu Bing's heart panicked. She was a little sure, but she suddenly became unconfident.

"Chen Mo, I didn't expect that we would meet again under such circumstances." Hu Bingxin said calmly, "Hand over Mu's Skystar technology, we can negotiate."

"I have told too many lies, do I take it seriously?" Chen Mo looked directly at Hu Bingxin.

Hu Bing's expression instantly became blurred, and his consciousness was out of control. This scene changed the expressions of the core seniors of the White Star Civilization in front of the live camera, and the old chief was no exception.

"Bing Xin is under control, Chen Mo is in the source galaxy, cut off the live broadcast signal." The old chief immediately ordered: "Start the capture."

Happiness!

At the Shenyuan meeting, all live broadcast signals were interrupted, and the field fell into chaos.

call!

The fleet that had already been on standby took off from various planets and jumped out of thin air to the location of the spacecraft that appeared in space.

In just one minute, tens of thousands of warships gathered around the marching ant spacecraft.

A wave of spatial fluctuation swept the audience, and the wrist instruments in the hands of countless people began to prompt.

"The space is blocked."

"What happened?"

"..."

Countless questions emerged from the minds of the participants, but no one answered him. At this point, you can think with your buttocks and know that this is the space blocked by the White Star Civilization.

Countless war machines flew out of the battleship and took the marching ant ship in space.

The space is solidified, they have surrounded this place, and this spaceship can hardly escape now with its wings.

Boom boom boom! ! !

The battleships docked around the marching ant spacecraft exploded quickly and joined together, like fireworks in space, turning into fireballs, and the battleship was swallowed.

The war robots that flew out, did not wait to get close to the spacecraft, and all turned off, floating in space like corpses.

Everything is very strange.

"This is a super power, there is such a weird super power." The old chief who saw this scene shrank his pupils and his eyes were extremely solemn: "Continue to let the battleship approach him and consume his power at all costs."

This is their strategy, because the superpowers have limited mental power, and they only need to make the opponent's superpower excessively consumed to easily catch the opponent alive.

call!

The warships hidden around the main star of the gods began to converge towards the spaceship of the marching ants at the speed of light.

The released war machine also swarmed toward the spaceship like a swarm.

Whether it is a battleship or a weapon of war, all of them lose control and become space junk within a range of one billion kilometers in diameter.

Calling forward and embracing, the war machine continues continuously, making the explosions in space a splendid picture. The machines that still have a steady stream of energy are approaching, like moths fighting a fire, desperately.

However, Chen Mo was like a bottomless pit, without seeing any fatigue.

"Let the super master pass."

call!

There are as many as tens of thousands of superpowers guarding the outer space of the Divine Source Star System, quickly approaching the location of the marching ant spacecraft at the speed of light.

In order to deal with Chen Mo, the White Star Civilization had its blood.

Inside the spaceship, Chen Mo was lying on the'left hand of the god' with his eyes closed. Beside him was Mo Nu, guarding him quietly.

In Chen Mo's vision of the world of consciousness, there are tens of thousands of superpowers approaching him at the speed of light, who are superpowers arranged by the White Star civilization. His consciousness moved all the super consciousness into the space.

In the consciousness space, Hu Bingxin's face was pale.

In front of her, Chen Mo was like a mountain giant, reaching a height of thousands of meters, but she was as small as a bug. Looking up at Chen Mo's terrifying body, she intuitively experienced Chen Mo's true ability for the first time.

Under this weird superpower, she was controlled without any resistance. She felt so small that Chen Mo could trample him to death only by moving his feet.

"Is this your ability?"

"You are very smart, but this plan does not seem to be clever." Chen Mo said while looking at Hu Bingxin.

"Not necessarily, you should be in the Divine Source galaxy now. The space of this galaxy has been reinforced and blocked, and you can't escape." Hu Bingxin still remained calm: "You can't get out, and the loss of the marching ants is greater than ours. Now everyone knows that you are sabotaging this meeting. You are the public enemy of the entire universe. Without you, the spiritual leader, how long can the marching ants last?"
