"You are so sure, can't I get out?" Chen Mo asked back, with a cold smile: "If I can't even get out, will I come over?"

"You..." Hu Bingxin's pupils shrank, her expression uncertain, and then she became firm: "Don't pretend, you can't get out, the space is blocked, here has become a cosmic space island."

"Now is the age of super powers. It is a mistake for you to use the methods of the era of war armor to restrain those who have the ability to control space in the age of super powers."

Chen Mo looked at the consciousness of those superpowers behind Hu Bing's mind, and the corners of his mouth curled up, raising his huge palm, and patted it hard.

chapters.title: Chapter 1092: :You Lose
chapters.body:
Chapter 1092: :You Lose

boom!

There was a loud noise.

Subconsciously, Hu Bingxin looked back, and saw the consciousness of those superpowers who had been drawn into the consciousness space, disappearing under the giant palm, as if they had never appeared before.

Tens of thousands of consciousnesses disappeared, and those who stayed in place were covered with fear.

Hu Bingxin's body trembled, and she felt despair in the air around her.

Chen Mo is in this space as invincible as a god.

boom!

Chen Mo didn't stop because of Fox Bingxin's fear, and waved his hand again, smashing all the remaining consciousness bodies in the consciousness space.

Huh?

Suddenly, Chen Mo's eyes condensed.

In the consciousness space, apart from the Fox Bingxin, there are two other consciousness bodies that have not disappeared.

Lion Min and Egret.

These two consciousness bodies are more solid than other superpowers, and in the consciousness space, they can move freely and dodge his attacks. Obviously, the superpower class is higher than other superpowers.

"Let go of Madam." Shi Ming quickly rushed towards Chen Mo, his eyes firm and determined to die.

"Let go madam." Egret was not far behind.

"Innocent." Chen Mo snorted softly and raised his hand to take a picture.

When he reaches his level and enters the consciousness space, the two are just two relatively strong ants to him.

Boom! !

Two loud noises sounded again in the consciousness space, and the whole space returned to calm again. No accident, only Chen Mo and Hu Bingxin remained in the space.

All the super-powers drawn into the consciousness space have only an unconscious body in the real world.

"What ability is this?"

A trace of heartache flashed in Hu Bing's eyes, her face was extremely ugly, she seemed to underestimate Chen Mo's ability, this time she was planted.

"Can't tell your ability." Chen Mo smiled.

"It's a big deal to die together." Hu Bingxin said coldly, "In my body, a life detection chip is installed. Once my vital signs disappear, it will control the explosion of the space weapons deployed in the Divine Origin Galaxy. Then, you Xiu wants to escape from the Divine Origin Galaxy."

"It's useless."

Chen Mo's body in the consciousness space shrank, and when he reached Hu Bingxin's face, he stretched out his hand to easily see her hoop her, placing his palm on Hu Bingxin's head.

"What do you want to do?" Hu Bing's eyes were full of panic.

"You will know soon."

Chen Mo ignored her, hooping her brain like catching a kitten.

...

"The old chief, all the superpowers ambushing near the main star of the gods, their vital signs have disappeared." A subordinate reported.

"Where is Bingxin?"

"Ma'am, it's okay, but the vital signs of Lord Shimin and Lord Egret have disappeared."

"Crack!"

The old Chief Bai Xing burst into a glass with his face extremely ugly.

Tens of thousands of super-powers, although they have not reached the planet-level masters, they are not weak. They are all the strongest super-powers of the White Star civilization. They can absolutely control the field in the face of a planet-level war, but now they are in Chen Mo In his hands, it can't last for five minutes.

According to their positions, they can be killed all in an instant. This method is extremely strange.

There has never been a precedent in which a single life threatens the entire warhead, and even the strongest life is not threatening in front of the warhead. Chen Mo, now marching ants, broke this law.

The elite warhead ambushing in the source of the gods did not even see the shadow of the opponent. Tens of thousands of fleets, countless war machines, and all their super masters were all destroyed.

The superpower of the marching ant has the ability to change the direction of war by a single soldier.

Suddenly, the old chief Bai Xing's pupils shrank sharply and stood up suddenly.

He sensed a wave of spatial fluctuations, accompanied by a sharp sense of danger.

Sure enough, the sirens of the hall appeared.

Above their planet, a spacecraft emerged from the ripples of space. This is the spacecraft that appeared in the Shenyuan galaxy, unexpectedly appeared in the white star small universe, and was still above the planet where they were hiding.

call!

Countless fleets received the alert and did not hesitate to jump towards the place where the spacecraft appeared. Before the warship approached, it exploded in space for no apparent reason and turned into a fireball.

Click!

The space seemed to stop, and all the high-level White Star civilizations in the hall froze in place, their eyes dull.

This weird scene appeared in every corner of the white star main galaxy.

On the White Star Hall, a ripple of space appeared, a two-meter-high space door opened, and three figures came out, Chen Mo, Mo Nu and Fox Bingxin.

At this moment, Hu Bingxin's face was painful and flustered when he saw the situation in the hall.

The White Star Civilization is over!

This was her first thought.

"Chen Mo."

The old Chief Bai Xing's face changed drastically. He didn't expect that Chen Mo would actually catch Bing Xin and appear in their den without warning.

drink!

He didn't dare to slack off, raised his hand and blasted Chen Mo with a punch.

I saw the surrounding space split like a spider web and collapsed instantly.

The cracks in the space collapsed flooded the main hall, and the intense atmospheric pressure sucked in all the high-level White Stars that had been frozen in the main hall, tearing them to pieces, without even screaming.

This indiscriminate attack is not ruthless.

But Chen Mo and Mo Nu stood still, and even the Fox Bingxin beside them was not affected by the space cracks.

"Old chief, admiration for a long time." Chen Mo said lightly.

"Long Yang."

The old Chief Bai Xing's face was unprecedentedly solemn, he felt an unprecedented sense of crisis, this kind of crisis is more terrifying than his evolution at the edge of the black hole.

"You lost." Chen Mo said.

"That's not necessarily."

The old chief Bai Xing took a step, and instantly appeared next to Chen Mo, his fist took Chen Mo's brain.

Click! ! !

Chen Mo didn't see any movement, the old chief's fist stopped ten centimeters in front of Chen Mo's brain, and the space under the fist appeared as a sound of glass breaking.

Upon seeing this, the old chief's face changed slightly.

"open!"

With a loud shout, the space in front of the old chief's fist suddenly opened. The fist appeared behind Chen Mo's head without warning, and the remaining momentum took Chen Mo's brain.

Showdown of space capabilities.

The old chief has the confidence that he is a strong man.

Just as the old chief was overjoyed, he suddenly felt his fists empty, and Chen Mo disappeared in place and appeared behind him.

The old chief's face suddenly changed, and he didn't dare to hesitate. With a move, the sky that was already outside the hall appeared again.

On the white star, there was unprecedented silence.

The old chief looked down and found that all the armored divisions fell to the ground. This scene made his scalp numb and his eyes cracked.

Chen Mo's abilities are too mysterious and weird, completely unreasonable.

Boom boom boom!

Without waiting for the response from below, the old chief tensed his body and fisted on the hall with a fist. Each punch caused a ripple in the space, tearing the hall below into dust.

With the space torn apart, the ordinary life in the hall has no possibility of surviving.

As for the safety of Hu Bingxin, he ignored it. At this time, he could not tolerate any hesitation and kindness. Once Chen Mo succeeded, the entire White Star civilization would fall into Chen Mo's hands.

Click!

The old chief turned his fist into his palm, and pressed in the void, a huge spatial crack appeared in the original hall.

The terrifying space pressure set off a storm here.

Everything at the location of the main hall was sucked into the cracks in the space. When the storm stopped, there was only a huge pothole in a radius of ten kilometers, a mess.

Without waiting for the old chief to breathe a sigh of relief, above the pothole, the three figures of Chen Mo slowly emerged and strolled around the courtyard.

chapters.title: Chapter 1093: :Perish Together?
chapters.body:
Chapter 1093: :Perish Together?

The old chief's eyelids twitched and his body unconsciously tightened. He finally realized the powerlessness facing Chen Mo.

This completely unreasonable ability.

Who can shuttle through the barriers of space in an instant and enter the small universe of other people's homes? Moreover, the war machine, the superpower, is useless in front of him. Who can control the entire warhead of the enemy's galaxy in an instant?

Chen Mo's ability made the old chief's heart sink.

The super-power technology of the White Star Civilization ranks among the top in the universe, but in front of Chen Mo, they have no power to fight back.

It is worthy of being a person who pulled the Milky Way from a low-level civilization to a god-level civilization.

Chen Mo's ability is inferior to him.

With this ability, appearing in the hideouts of the core personnel of various civilizations, they can solve the enemy with no effort, no wonder the Sauron Alliance has been smashed.

The old chief had a shuddering feeling.

Today they are the second Sauron Alliance.

"solid."

The old chief stretched out his hand and grabbed it, the space was frozen like icy, and there was dead silence in the ruins.

After a short pause, Chen Mo stepped forward again, like a staircase in the air, step by step. In the fixed world, those figures are the only moving points. The appearance of walking in a leisurely courtyard makes them the world's focus.

The old chief's pupils shrank sharply, and his hands were squeezed together: "Broken!"

Click!

The space under Chen Mo's feet spread like a spider web, and finally exploded like broken glass. The vortex of the storm converged towards the cracks, and the weird empty cry was sharp and harsh.

At the center of the storm, Hu Bingxin's expression was painful, she was being torn from space, but she was not torn apart by cracks under Mo Nu's protection, but Chen Mo and Mo Nu were just like ordinary people.

This scene moved the old chieftain.

Chen Mo moved and disappeared in place, and his body instantly appeared behind the old chief.

boom!

The frontal collision of the two fists caused a huge wave of air to shake apart the debris on the ground.

Black silk cracks appeared in the space under their fists.

Super.

Frontal collision of space superpower.

The old chief's face changed drastically and he retreated a few steps.

He raised his face to look at Chen Mo, his heart stirred up the stormy sea. His body has been baptized by the gravitational force on the edge of the black hole, it is extremely powerful, but in the fist just now, he was a little frightened.

The opponent's fist is harder than him.

"open!"

The dark cracks, like the eyes opened by the abyss behemoths, seemed to swallow everything around. Countless small cracks surrounded Chen Mo in the air, and the atmosphere of terror permeated, cutting the space into pieces.

The sky was covered in black, and a figure stepped out.

Chen Mo.

How strong is it to be unhurried in the storm of space tearing!

The old chief didn't have time to marvel, and when he saw Chen Mo, his expression changed slightly. Chen Mo's self-confidence gave people a sense of despair and weak will. At this time, he would have a thought of giving in.

This also shows that Chen Mo's strength is extremely terrifying.

Chen Mo in the air raised his hand suddenly.

Almost instantly, the space was imprisoned, everything was shrinking, and the space was collapsing. The buildings of the city began to shatter, and the aircraft parked in the square was collapsing, as if being held by a giant hand.

His palm was slowly clenched.

The space shrank rapidly, the explosion of the aircraft appeared in every corner of the city, and smoke and dust were everywhere.

With this hand, the whole city was shrouded in a sense of suffocation.

And at the center of the oppression, it was the old chief White Star.

The old chief looked at Chen Mo and did not dare to relax in the slightest. Under the confinement, he raised a hand.

The originally imprisoned space became soft like water waves, rippling from his hand, the collapsed space began to stretch, the distorted building returned to its original size, and then collapsed.

He easily resolved Chen Mo's space constraints.

When he escaped from the confinement of space, the old chief moved and disappeared in place.

In the air, the old chief stretched out his hand and tore open a space door. When he just wanted to step into it and escape, the space door suddenly shattered.

An invisible wave dispersed.

The old chief only felt a trance and appeared in a strange space.

Consciousness space.

Before his eyes, Chen Mo's consciousness was like a giant, looking down at him, his expression was still plain.

"Confrontation of consciousness? It's a bit like the mind control of Ziwei civilization." The old chief looked up at Chen Mo and said.

"Admit defeat, it is good for you and the White Star civilization." Chen Mo said.

"With me, there is no such thing as admit defeat." The old chief arched his body and entered a state of battle: "My consciousness, even the gravity on the edge of the black hole can't be erased, let alone you."

After finishing speaking, the old chief suddenly speeded up and swung his fist towards Chen Mo.

Hand-to-hand combat in the consciousness space.

In the high sky, Chen Mo and the old chief stood in it. Space began to raging, shattering everything in the city, and the scope was still spreading. The storm enveloped the entire planet, and the shattered space seemed to swallow all the atmosphere of the planet.

The wind is surging, the thunder and lightning appear, the roar and the strange cry of space, seem to be talking about the battle between the two consciousness.

Without onlookers, the life on this planet, long before Chen Mo appeared, put them all in deep sleep, and without his permission, they would not wake up at all.

The only bystanders were Mo Nu and Hu Bingxin.

Compared with Mo Nu's calmness, Hu Bing's heart was depressed at this time.

She has seen a lot of big scenes, star destruction and other things, but she has only seen this kind of doomsday scene that relies on human power in front of her, when the old chief destroys a planet with his own power. Now she saw it again.

Chen Mo's strength went deep into her heart.

Chen Mo spied on her memory, and then appeared here across the barriers of the universe. This method proved scary enough.

Judging from a series of things, this man is almost invincible.

And now the old chief can't move, as long as the Mo Girl next to her makes a move, the old chief won't have any chance.

As Chen Mo said, when he appeared here, they had already lost.

Having obtained the position of the old chief and the high-level members of the White Star Civilization, Chen Mo didn't have to spend too much effort to tear open the door of space, and drop a weapon of light speed destruction, and the entire planet would die.

But Chen Mo came personally.

I thought that the old chief could deal with Chen Mo, but from the current situation, the old chief's ability could not threaten Chen Mo.

The two sides reached a verdict.

Today is the time to determine the future of the White Star Civilization.

Once the old chief loses, the two highest leaders of the White Star Civilization are arrested, and all beliefs will fall apart.

Hu Bingxin could only watch all this and pray silently in her heart.

Suddenly, the old chief standing in the air began to look painful.

As for the planet under their feet, layers of soil are collapsing in space, spreading hundreds of thousands of square kilometers, and they are still expanding.

Magma emerged from the ground and was also sucked into the cracks in the space.

It was a huge mouth in the abyss, devouring all matter.

This was the strongest super power battle since the super power era. The scene was much bigger than the battle between Chen Mo and Tong Qing when he was in the Star Stele Forest, and the scope of damage was extremely huge.

The two are fighting their will, and the ability to stimulate is becoming more and more terrifying.

The only peaceful place on this planet is where the two confront each other.

The old chief tensed his whole body and his expression became more and more ferocious. His clothes had long been broken and turned into dust in the raging space. On his naked body, as if it had been smeared with black gold, it possessed a powerful texture, an aura, and incomparable majesty.

As for Chen Mo, a faint blue light appeared on his skin, his expression indifferent. His body flickered and appeared, as if this space did not exist, but it really existed, making people unpredictable.

Woo! Woo! Woo!

The space that makes the scalp numb is crying, and the force of destruction is raging.

Suddenly, the old chief's body began to tremble, his muscles were losing luster, and the consumption of consciousness was too great.

puff!

Before long, the old chief flew like a frustrated balloon, and fell heavily to the ground, smashing a pit. Getting up from the pit, the old chief was very embarrassed at this time, no longer the power of the beginning.

"You lost." Chen Mo looked down and said lightly.

"I didn't lose the word here, let's die together."

The old chief showed a weary and weird smile, raised his hand and slammed it down on his head.

chapters.title: Chapter 1094: : Black Hole Weapons And Changes
chapters.body:
Chapter 1094: : Black Hole Weapons And Changes

boom!

The explosion came without warning.

The moment the old chief committed suicide, the entire planet exploded.

The space shattered into fragments in an instant, then twisted and collapsed.

In the core of the planet, a black hole expanded rapidly, sucking the entire planet into it, and the space should not be shattered, and the huge tearing force would pull people into it.

Black hole!

Old Chief White Star installed a black hole weapon in the core of this planet.

Everything happened too late to think.

The life experience only knows how terrifying black hole weapons are.

This is the best weapon for arranging traps. This kind of trap is countless times more terrifying than space turbulence. As long as the enemy is attracted to the planet with black hole weapons, once activated, the entire planet will be destroyed, including all the lives inside.

It is like man-made a brand new black hole in the universe, and this kind of black hole will continue to expand, and then swallow all the surrounding matter.

This weapon is indistinguishable, and it is impossible to escape from space jumps.

Because it can continuously create black holes, this weapon is listed as a taboo weapon by the Universe Alliance, otherwise the universe will be destroyed in countless new black holes in the war.

The high-dimensional life in the past used unrestricted time weapons to destroy the time spin of the universe and fell to where it is today.

It was also the first time that Chen Mo saw a black hole weapon. He did not manufacture this kind of weapon because there was no need to manufacture it. He did not expect that the old chief dared to arrange black hole weapons on the planet where he lived, and the condition for activation was his own life.

This is a real hero, more hotter than anyone else [Penquge www.boquge.xyz].

When the old chief committed suicide, Chen Mo realized something was wrong, and instantly raised his hand to the place where Mo Nu was, and saw Mo Nu disappear in the original position in the distortion of space.

Hu Bingxin was not so lucky, and before he could be swallowed by the door of space, the whole space collapsed.

She could not escape the fate of being captured by the black hole's gravity.

Can't escape.

Hu Bingxin was almost desperate. She could only feel the ever-increasing gravitational force. She began to feel severe pain in her body, and every cell was torn by gravity.

The White Star civilization is over.

The old chief and her died here, the White Star civilization has no leader, and there are many civilizations watching, and the White Star civilization will fall apart.

It's a pity that she can't see the end of the White Star Civilization.

It’s good not to see it.

As she closed her eyes and waited for death, she suddenly felt something was wrong, and a figure appeared in front of her.

Before she could think, the palm covered her head.

She felt like time was stagnant, very strange.

Before her eyes, a two-meter-small space hole was slowly taking shape. The space hole was breaking and reorganizing against the ever-increasing gravity of the black hole every moment.

Can he tear the door of space in the black hole space? What is this ability?

"Faster."

Chen Mo opened his five fingers wide, and his heart was silent.

He didn't know the consequences of being sucked into the black hole as a fourth-dimensional body, but he couldn't risk it either.

The abilities of time and space are blending. This is the first time he has used both abilities unscrupulously. He doesn't know the consequences, but now he wants to escape the black hole's gravity.

The space-time ability is fighting against the space-time shattered by the black hole, but it is extremely difficult to maintain the stability of the space gate.

For the first time, Chen Mo realized that his abilities had not yet been developed.

Pain is inevitable, he is also suffering from the torn pain of time and space, and at the same time protects Fox Bingxin. Hu Bingxin was the key figure in his control of the White Star Civilization, and he didn't want this opportunity to be wasted.

His legs, lacking in resistance, were torn in the space, disappearing little by little like evaporation.

Gravity is getting bigger and bigger, and time and space begin to become chaotic.

In front of Chen Mo, the fluctuations became more and more severe, and the space was shattered by the black hole. He needed to reconnect the space and restore the space in front of him to its original shape, so that he could open the door to the outside space and shuttle out.

Otherwise, he will not know which time and space he will be sent to in the future, and he will be in trouble.

The colorful rays of light converge in space, and their position, like a small sampan in a whirlpool, may be swallowed at any time.

The recovery was shattered again, and repeated efforts seemed to be in vain.

Chen Mo remained calm in the time and space storm, the tearing of gravity was completely abandoned by him, and he focused on the idea of opening a door to space in the black hole space.

Oh oh oh! ! !

A weird whistling sound appeared. It was the buzzing sound of spatial friction in the black hole. Ordinary life was here, and could be shattered by this sound.

call!

A colorful door of space emerges and is expanding with difficulty.

The moment it expanded to 1.5 meters, Chen Mo grabbed Hu Bingxin's waist, his figure suddenly flashed, and he entered the door of space.

Boom!

At the moment when Chen Mo disappeared, the door of space in the black hole shattered, turned into a gleam, and stirred into the turbulent flow of the black hole.

From the opening of the black hole weapon to Chen Mo's escape, all of this was done in an instant after a long time.

In space, a planet can be seen collapsing into the black hole in the center. Gravity is constantly increasing, pulling all asteroids in space into it, and the space is shattered and distorted.

Until all the asteroids were swallowed, the newly formed black hole departed from its original orbit and approached the star.

Just waiting to get close to the gravitational range, this young black hole will swallow the star and grow.

...

The Shenyuan meeting shocked the universe.

Chen Mo suddenly appeared and opened the door of the space in full view of the crowd and controlled Hu Bingxin to leave. The hundreds of thousands of warships and countless war machines arranged around the entire Shenyuan Star were all shattered into pieces, and even the tens of thousands of super masters of the White Star Civilization died inexplicably.

Chen Mo once again demonstrated the means of annexing the Sauron Alliance. Only a galaxy-level superpower can have such a terrifying ability.

This battle changed the direction of the universe.

The Shenyuan meeting failed and Hu Bingxin was taken away, which meant that the White Star Civilization's layout against marching ants was shattered.

But there are rumors that the marching ant leader Chen Mo sneaked into the white star universe and slaughtered the high-level members of the white star civilization. Finally, he died with the old chief and was destroyed under the black hole weapon.

However, the marching ants did not seem to be affected, and their actions did not hesitate.

When the Shenyuan Meeting announced its failure, Lan commanded the warhead and inserted into the white star field with lightning speed. They encountered crazy resistance on the way, but under the strength of the concentrated super warhead, the marching ants were like a broken bamboo.

Afterwards, the marching ants announced that they had successfully opened the door of the white star universe and entered the heart of the white star civilization.

At this moment, the forces of the universe were terrified and shocked.

Another feast of the civilization of the God of Cookery kicked off.

After the destruction of the Pluto civilization, many top forces are still immersed in the beauty of harvesting benefits. The forces that participated in that war at that time all got rich in that feast.

Now that the White Star Civilization collapsed suddenly, the benefits she left behind were more than that of the Pluto Civilization.

The defense of the White Star Universe is not at the same level as the defense of the outside world. Successfully found the connection point of the white star universe, the warhead of the marching ants, almost rushed out into the white star universe, frantically swallowing the star field in the universe.

If the marching ants completely control the white star universe, then the safest base camp of the white star civilization will disappear, and then the white star civilization will not be far from destruction.

At the same time as the marching ants launched the attack against the White Star, there were also the Nebula Alliance and the New Five Cities Alliance.

On the other hand, the Black Eye Civilization also seemed to perceive something wrong, and immediately asked Yan to command the warhead to turn his head to attack the White Star Territory. The Red Army, who was originally entangled with the Ziwei civilization, also quickly turned around and slammed into the white star field.

The black pupil civilization followed, and life in the universe suddenly appeared.

The White Star civilization is in danger.

It was originally a meeting aimed at marching ants, but I didn't expect to be strongly destroyed by the marching ants, but turned around to kill White Star. All this was unexpected.

However, what was even more surprising was that no one at the top of the White Star Civilization stood up to stabilize the chaotic situation.

What happened to the senior leaders of the White Star Civilization?

Soon, the major forces began to notice the rumors that began to flow out.

Chen Mo entered the white star universe to slaughter the senior leaders of the white star civilization, and died together with the old chief, and was destroyed under the black hole weapon.

Bai Xing's high-level team was stunned.

As Bai Xing's chaos progressed, the outside world became more and more sure of this statement.

Soon, inside the White Star also confirmed the outside world's conjecture. Luo Yi, the genius of the Xiao Clan of the White Star Civilization's old family group, announced his successor to the White Star Chief, and the families that supported the old Chief and Madame Fox faction, led by top generals Xing Goxuan and Tukanan, opposed Luo Yi's succession.

The conflict between the two factions occurred and intensified.

Both parties announced that they would draw the star field and rule, claiming to be the white star orthodox.

The White Star civilization split.

The split in the special period will undoubtedly make the situation worse for Bai Xing.

The news, like a black hole explosion, caused an uproar in the universe.

The split occurred and the news of the massacre of the senior leaders and the old chiefs of Bai Xing was confirmed. However, whether Chen Mo, the leader of the marching ants, really died with the old chief, the outside world has not confirmed.

If the rumors are true, then this time is the result of both the White Star and the Marching Ants losing out.

The outside world is looking forward to confirming the news of Chen Mo's death. They are waiting for the internal collapse of the marching ants and split like white stars. But to their disappointment, the marching ants did not split, but became stronger.

The marching ants under the command of Lan quickly occupied the white star universe.

When the Ziwei civilization and the Thousand Star Empire joined the sequence of annexation, the battle for the division of the White Star Domain officially began.

The black pupil civilization and the marching ants formally met each other in the white star field, and the war between the two was particularly fierce, reaching the point where the situation changed. But with the flank of the Lagerstroemia civilization Chen Bing, the black pupil civilization and the marching ants did not dare to make much movement, and had to shrink their defense lines.

The Warhead of Thor Civilization also entered the White Star Domain, but was blocked by the Thousand Star Empire. The Thor civilization did not take advantage of the Thousand Star Empire, and the two sides quickly fell into a stalemate.

The Thor Civilization was not aware of it. Once they stalemate with the Thousand Star Empire, they will lose the qualification to eat the White Star Territory. They immediately separated from the War Department and wanted to break through the entanglement of the Thousand Star Empire from the flanks.

However, the ending surprised the outside world. The Thousand Star Empire had insight into the tactics of Thor Civilization, set up a space trap, and severely damaged the flanking warhead of Thor Civilization in one fell swoop.

As soon as the result of the battle came out, the prestige of the Thousand Star Empire skyrocketed, surpassing the previous Thousand Star Empire.

Kaliyi, the commander-in-chief of the War Department of the Thousand Star Empire, officially entered the vision of the major forces in the universe.

This former high-ranking star Carrie, who was once defeated by the marching ants and was forced to disarm and return to the field, the former senior general of Shepherd City, once again stood on the stage of the universe for the stars with a strong posture, and became the new top general star.

The civil war in the White Star Territory was fierce, and the tragic level caused some small forces to retreat.

But things have not stopped.

The contradiction between the two factions within the White Star is irreparable. The senior members of the White Star civilization have died, and the invasion of the great powers, under the terrifying offensive and pressure, Luo Yi of the White Star Xiao clan announced that he will join the Black Pupil civilization and become the allies of the Black Pupil civilization One.

After the Xiao clan split the White Star and voted for the enemy, Gou Xuan and Tukanan were even more angry, and they attacked him frantically. The war was fierce.

In the universe, no power can stay out of this war.

Time is walking fast and passing by in the flames and battles.

chapters.title: Chapter 1095: : Endless Sea
chapters.body:
Chapter 1095: : Endless Sea

Wearing a standard armor, A Yu flew over the city, patrolling as usual.

He is an ordinary police officer of Wandaoxing and is responsible for maintaining public order in this area. He has just graduated from the police academy and is very satisfied with his current job.

The city’s security is good, and for people like him, this kind of life is the best choice. There are occasional disturbances in the city, but he has received professional armor training, and he can still solve the disturbances.

Suddenly, a warning sound came from the radar of the battle armor, and strange spatial fluctuations appeared in the southeast of the city.

A Yu's spirit was slightly shaken, and he dared not neglect, and urged the armor to rush over.

Strange spatial fluctuations appear here. This is the first time he has encountered it. Could it be that there are space weapons? The thought appeared, and he was shocked, and he suddenly became nervous.

He hasn't seen space weapons with his own eyes, but he has heard many of them. With a space weapon, the entire planet will become cosmic dust.

In the war outside, news that various galaxies have been destroyed by space weapons is not uncommon. In this era, life is like weeds, and no one knows when the war will be here.

Flew to the location of the spatial fluctuation with fear, A Yu carefully watched the reaction of the battle armor radar, a little nervous.

The spatial fluctuations became clearer and clearer, and he lifted a heart, right in front of him. He stared at the radar, not daring to relax, ready to fight at any time.

The next moment, two figures appeared out of thin air in the spatial fluctuations.

A Yu was dumbfounded.

He saw two lives.

One male and one female, one humanoid, one half-orc.

The two looked a little embarrassed. The males had no clothes on their upper body and their trousers were in torn, but their eyes were very sharp, with supreme majesty. He has never seen this kind of majesty in the planet manager Kyu-sama.

The female was carried by the male's clothes, like a female fox person, two fox ears, and a white fox tail. She had a nice face, but she was pale, as if she had recovered from a serious illness.

He felt that these two lives were very familiar, as if they had seen them somewhere.

Suddenly remembering something, A Yu's face changed slightly. He remembered that this was Chen Mo, the overlord of marching ants, and Mrs. Fox of the White Star Civilization. He had seen them look like on the Universe News.

Why do they appear here?

Two overlord-level figures appeared here inexplicably, and they were also met by him.

A Yu's body under the armor became stiff.

...

Out!

Chen Mo carried Fox Bingxin out of the door of space and stood in the air.

Seeing a life in battle armor, Chen Mo smiled slightly.

"come."

Chen Mo waved at the life in front of him.

A Yu under the battle armor felt his body tighten, and the battle armor was completely out of control, slowly drifting to Chen Mo's side. This feeling of uncontrollable body was frightening. He wanted to struggle, but found that he couldn't struggle at all. The helmet of the armor was also lowered.

Super!

The only reason he could think of was that Chen Mo controlled him and the armor with super powers.

Chen Mo smiled at A Yu in panic.

A Yu swallowed, almost crying. Two overlord-level figures suddenly appeared beside him in embarrassment. He is still controlled by the opponent's super power. If the opponent is here to start a war, he will be the first person to die in the war.

"Don't worry, I won't do anything to you, just ask something." Chen Mo calmly said.

"You said, you said." A Yu was crying.

"This is where?"

"Wan Island Star."

"Wandao Star? Which star field?"

"Endless Sea, here belongs to Endless Sea."

"Is it endless sea?"

Chen Mo looked down, and below was the sea, composed of islands, forming a scene of a country of a thousand islands. The blue water is very clear, and Chen Mo can see the murlocs that shuttle between the sea and the island.

This is a sea world.

This kind of scene is very common in the endless sea. The dominant ethnic group in the endless sea is the sea-like tribe.

He has a good relationship with endless sea. He is a little baffled by the kindness of endless sea to him, and he will naturally not reject the kindness of others.

Endless Sea has also invited him many times, but he has never been there. He did not expect that the first time he appeared in Endless Sea was actually in this situation.

"What year is it now?"

"The cosmic calendar is 533920944."

"Five years?" Chen Mo sighed.

In his sense, but a few dozen seconds, he did not expect that five years have passed.

The confrontation with the black hole made him a little nervous, because he had never tried to confront the black hole. There were all disturbed time and space around him, and he was trapped in the black hole. That was endless trouble.

The space-time flow velocity in a black hole is different from the outside world. For a moment in the black hole, the outside world may be thousands of years.

If you fall into a black hole and do not come out in time, then the world will change long ago.

The old chief also wanted to trap Chen Mo with a black hole, hoping to cause Chen Mo's death or disappearance, and give the White Star civilization time and the last chance to develop. Unfortunately, he did not expect Chen Mo to escape, nor did he think about subsequent development.

Even if the black hole hadn't fully grown, Chen Mo only took tens of seconds to escape, but a lot of time passed.

Five years.

Five years have passed since Chen Mo managed to escape from the black hole.

Hello everyone, our public account will find gold and coin red envelopes every day, and you can receive them as long as you pay attention. Please seize the opportunity for the last benefit at the end of the year. Public Account [Book Friends Base Camp]

This means that he and Hu Bingxin have been missing for five years.

But fortunately, five years are fine, not too long, if five hundred years have passed, that will be the most troublesome.

I just don't know what happened during his disappearance. I don't understand the situation a bit now, so I can only understand the situation of the universe first.

"Take me to the island first, can brother lead the way?" Chen Mo asked A Yu kindly.

"Ok, Ok."

A Yu almost didn't cry, Chen Mo didn't bother him, indicating that the other party didn't want to kill him, he didn't need to die.

"Thank you." Chen Mo nodded and said.

"You're welcome, do you want to pretend first, you may be recognized by others." A Yu reminded hesitantly.

"Recognize it?" Chen Mo was a little surprised.

"You are the overlord of the universe, the famous Chen Mo, didn't you see that your little brother was almost scared to cry by you?" Hu Bingxin said lightly.

"Oh, am I not fierce?"

Chen Mo smiled freely and covered Hu Bingxin's face with his palm.

Both of them are figures in the universe, and many ordinary beings know each other. If they are known, they will become boring.

When she released her hand again, Hu Bingxin had already changed her face. Hu Mei's eyes were like smoky makeup, her white fox ears turned black, and there was a red tattoo on her forehead, which was really pretty.

Hu Bingxin didn't know what she looked like, but she was controlled by Chen Mo and could only be at the mercy of her.

With a good disguise, Chen Mo touched his face, and suddenly changed his face. It was a mermaid with colored scales on his arms and face. Like a mermaid, his face is sharp and angular, and his eyes look Long and narrow, with sharp and confident eyes.

"You still have this ability." Hu Bingxin said.

"I have a lot of abilities." Chen Mo turned to look at A Yu and said, "Brother, please lead the way."

"Oh oh."

His body was finally under control, and A Yu did not dare to hesitate, and immediately flew towards the island city. He didn't dare to escape, Chen Mo's superpower was too weird, he was not sure that he could escape from Chen Mo.

And back then, Chen Mo was the overlord who even dared to go to the meeting alone. He didn't think he could escape from Chen Mo as an ordinary life, so he could only be a guide obediently. Maybe Chen Mo was happy, he could survive, maybe in the future. There will be benefits.

On the way, Chen Mo occasionally asked about the endless sea and some things about this planet. As for Hu Bingxin, she listened from start to finish without interrupting.

A Yu didn't hide it, and told Chen Mo everything he knew. He would occasionally look at Hu Bingxin. He wondered why Hu Bingxin didn't speak, but when he saw Chen Mo carrying her, he guessed an outline in his heart, and he didn't dare to say or ask.

Under A Yu's leadership, the two successfully landed in this sea-like island city.

chapters.title: Chapter 1096: : Reunion
chapters.body:
Chapter 1096: : Reunion

Goldfish Island is an island shaped like a fish. It is the most common island in the Ten Thousand Islands. The population of this island city is only two million.

Chen Mo had no identity and could not stay in a hotel, but police officers in the city of Ayu had a little privilege. With his help, they went to a hotel and stayed.

"You two live together, or two rooms?" A Yu looked at Chen Mo and Hu Bingxin.

"Find a two-room suite." Chen Mo said.

"Why can't the two rooms be independent?" Hu Bingxin said coldly.

"Captives have no right to choose." Chen Mo said unceremoniously.

A Yu glanced at Hu Bingxin and didn't dare to say more. He was not stupid. When he came along, Hu Bingxin was carried by Chen Mo. You don't need to think about it to know that she was subdued by Chen Mo.

The former administrator of the White Star Civilization was captured by the leader of the marching ant group, and the amount of information was large enough.

A Yu did not interrupt, and hurriedly asked the hotel staff to arrange a two-room suite for them.

The endless sea is tens of billions of light-years away from the earth, but to Chen Mo, it is not a distance.

His current ability can easily tear apart the barriers of space and easily reach the other end of the universe. Time and space are in his eyes, and there are not many secrets left. Moreover, in the black hole, he has truly experienced the power of time and space, and his time and space abilities have become stronger.

For a life of his level, there are not too many secrets in the universe.

The material nature of the universe became transparent in his eyes.

"Is there a quantum communication device?" Chen Mo asked A Yu.

"Have."

A Yu nodded hurriedly and handed Chen Mo his quantum communicator.

It is the first time that he has approached such a cosmic overlord person so close. It is false to say that he is not nervous. Chen Mo can change his destiny with a word.

"Thank you."

Chen Mo thanked him, took A Yu's quantum communication device, and slowly dialed a number.

Coming out of the black hole, Chen Mo has been missing for five years, and now the most important thing is to contact his family first.

In the past few years, the family is probably very nervous.

He still doesn't know what happened to the current marching ant group.

When he was in the White Star Small Universe, the Shenyuan Conference was discussing how to besiege the marching ants. Now that five years have passed in the blink of an eye, he is really uncomfortable.

Dididi.

While he was thinking, the quantum communicator was connected.

...

As usual, Xiao Yu sat in a daze in the study after dealing with affairs.

In this familiar study, none of the objects have been moved, and it remains the same as it was five years ago. This is Chen Mo's study, his favorite place to come. She has never thought of changing this place, but hopes that one day Chen Mo will come back and be familiar with it.

In the past five years, the marching ant group has undergone great changes. After the original war, the super armor began to be blatantly equipped to the entire armed department.

Now every warhead has its own super armed army.

The marching ants continued to expand. After the White Star Civilization fell, they swallowed the most essential small universe and core star field of the White Star Civilization, and became the strongest existence.

But the core executives of the marching ant group were not happy.

Chen Mo is missing.

After the Shenyuan meeting, Chen Mo evaporated.

Mo Nu described that Chen Mo was caught in the black hole trap of the White Star Civilization. Chen Mo responded promptly and sent her out, but Chen Mo fell into it. After that, she disappeared, life or death is uncertain, and there is not even a communication.

Normal life falls into the core area of the black hole and is bound to die, but he is Chen Mo with a quantum body.

They searched the entire white star universe, and even searched for news about Chen Mo in the entire universe.

She had a mysterious feeling, Chen Mo must be still alive, but the flow of time and space in the black hole is different from that in reality. He will definitely come back someday in the future.

So she has been waiting.

Not only is she waiting, but the entire upper ranks of the marching ant group are waiting.

Chen Mo is the highest belief of the marching ant group. Although he doesn't care, he has an irreplaceable role. He is the backbone of the entire marching ant group.

A newcomer of the marching ant group once suggested that new candidates should be selected to be the leader of the marching ant group to complete the hegemony of the unified universe. As soon as this suggestion was put forward in the conference room, it was dismissed and brainwashed on the spot, and the marching ant group was cleared out.

Afterwards, Zhao Min and Lan warned all the senior leaders that whoever has the idea of changing to a new leader will end up in the same way.

The senior leaders who have followed Chen Mo for many years know that Chen Mo will not get into trouble so easily.

But even if they are firm, the people below are not firm. The whole universe is spreading, Chen Mo died with the old chief Baixing in the black hole, and it is impossible to return.

There was once a deformed super life posing as Chen Mo and openly returning to the marching ant group.

However, the final destiny is to be killed.

After more than a dozen lives who wanted to impersonate were publicly executed, no life dared to impersonate.

Later rumors were that Lan was trying to support the army to rebel and replace the new leader of the marching ant group. Various rumors emerged endlessly. The marching ant group is more or less unstable.

"Husband, where are you?" Xiao Yu whispered.

Dididi!

The quantum communicator suddenly sounded, interrupting her thoughts.

Few people know her quantum communication number, and it hasn't been changed for many years, so that one day, when Chen Mo appears, she can be contacted at any time.

An unfamiliar number.

For some reason, her heartbeat started to accelerate.

Maybe it is with some expectation.

call!

A holographic light curtain appeared, Xiao Yu looked dazed, rubbing his eyes in disbelief.

Familiar face, familiar smile, which transformed super life is posing as? Xiao Yu's expression gradually became angry.

"What are you doing? What's your expression? The silly girl who doesn't promise is angry when she sees her husband?" Chen Mo showed a gentle smile.

Xiao Yu was stricken by thunder, his angry expression disappeared, tears streaming down his eyes.

This is the man she thinks about day and night, and only this man would call her a silly girl with no promise.

"Why are you crying? Am I not good?"

Wow……

Xiaoyu Lihua burst into tears with rain.

...

Lan Mu kept staring at the star map. In the marching ant group, two people were under the most pressure, one was him and the other was Zhao Min. Especially when the marching ant group continued to resist the joint attacks of several god-level civilizations, the battle reports were all gathered here.

The matter of the war is up to him, and the governance of the marching ant star field will be summarized by Zhao Min.

Fortunately, about the Armed Forces Department, he has a group of outstanding generals and think tanks to make suggestions, and the staff of the various war Departments have all formed, so he doesn't worry much about it. As for administrative governance, Zhao Min and the think tank team can also handle it.

The benefits of Chen Mo who often acted as the shopkeeper of throwing hands were revealed during this time.

The marching ant group is operating normally and has little impact on the military and administration. It is just that the high-level lack of a real spiritual core support to stimulate all fighting spirit, and all this, only Chen Mo can do it.

If the boss is there, the current marching ant star field will more than double. But when Chen Mo is not there, he doesn't dare to expand unscrupulously, otherwise, if something goes wrong, the consequences will be disastrous.

Suddenly, a holographic light curtain popped up automatically.

All communications of the War Department are quantum communications, and the quantum network is unbreakable. There are only two possibilities for the light curtain to pop up in the War Department without warning. One is a 100,000 fire emergency order, which triggers the most urgent messages. The light curtain of the war department can pop up messages without notification. The other is a person with the highest authority to perform this operation.

In the entire marching ant group, there are only two people with the highest authority in the combat department, one is him and the other is the boss.

Seeing familiar people in the light curtain made Lan's expression froze.

"Long time no see, instructor Lan."

boom!

The tea cup in Lan's hand fell to the ground without realizing it.

chapters.title: Chapter 1097: : Old Prophet
chapters.body:
Chapter 1097: : Old Prophet

The depths of the endless sea small universe, the sea of taboo.

The Forbidden Sea is the forbidden area of the endless sea. Ordinary endless sea life is forbidden to enter. Only a handful of the endless sea core high-level can enter, because there is a special character living here.

The old prophet of the endless sea.

The old prophet is the oldest life in the endless sea, the real antiquities of the universe.

Rumor has it that at the beginning of the cosmos era, the endless sea was founded in the hands of the old prophet. After various wars, the endless sea was passed down unharmed, and the old prophet has been alive.

No one knows the true age of the old prophet, but it is known that the old prophet is over hundreds of millions of years old and is the longest life in the universe. No life knows the secret of the old prophet's long life.

There has been speculation that the old prophet may be a remnant of the prehistoric era of the universe, but no one can confirm this speculation.

The old prophet never cares about things. Generally, the students of the old prophet are in charge of the endless sea prophet, and he will intervene in decision-making when it is a matter of life and death.

No life in the entire endless sea dared to disobey his command.

At the beginning of the space war, the old prophet ordered the blockade of the endless starfish field. The war outside is in full swing, but the endless sea is extremely peaceful and peaceful.

Many high-level generals in the endless sea hope to expand the star field of the endless sea, but they are rejected.

The old prophet gave a word: Wait.

In the huge crystal palace under the sea, at the totem in the center, the old man's back is slightly thin.

Suddenly, the old man sitting cross opened his eyes, his eyes seemed to contain all things in the universe, and a sigh was heard in the quiet seabed, and his emotions were extremely complicated.

The door of the Crystal Palace opened, and two figures appeared in the Crystal Palace.

A kind old murloc took a young girl.

They are the current prophets and Shuiling of Endless Sea.

"Teacher." After entering the Crystal Palace, the old murloc slowly bowed to the ground, looking very respectful and pious.

"Old ancestors." Shuiling did not dare to hesitate and worshipped the ground.

The old prophet is the sacred needle of the entire endless sea. Anyone who lives in the endless sea sea clan, when it comes to the old prophet, his expression is extremely respectful and pious. Rumor has it that the old prophet is a prehistoric survivor of the universe, who has immortal life.

"The time is up, the girl goes to Ten Thousand Island Star to invite him over. He is related to the future of the endless sea and has a good attitude." The old prophet said quietly.

He didn't see any movement either. In front of the old murloc and Shuiling, a water curtain appeared, and an image appeared in the water curtain.

If Chen Mo sees the image, he will definitely be shocked. This image is how he changed his appearance.

"Yes, ancestor." Although Shuiling was puzzled, she didn't ask.

"Go ahead."

Shuiling got up and left.

Only the old prophet and the old murloc remained in the Crystal Palace.

"Agu, how long have you managed the endless sea?" the old prophet asked quietly.

"It's seven thousand five hundred and sixty-three years." The old murloc said truthfully.

"time flies!"

...

Wandao star.

In the hotel room, the space is distorted, and a space door opens.

Several figures came out from the door of space.

It was Xiao Yu and Mo Nu and others.

Xiao Yu stood there crying when she saw Chen Mo. No one knew how she came over these years and how much pressure she had to endure. The next moment, Xiao Yu couldn't help it anymore, and rushed over like a swallow returning home, threw himself into his arms, crying and laughing.

Chen Mo smiled and gently stroked her back, at this moment silence is better than sound.

After a long time, after Xiao Yu calmed down, he wiped away the tears and came out of Chen Mo's arms.

Zhao Min looked at him with a smile on his face, until Chen Mo opened his arms and walked over and hugged him gently.

"Thank you."

"No hard work." Zhao Min shook her head and said softly: "Mo Nuo has been a little bit self-blaming because of your disappearance these years, so please comfort her."

Mo Nu slowly walked to Chen Mo's side, a clean smile appeared on her face, her eyes never left on him, just like when she first formed consciousness.

She is the quantum consciousness transformed by artificial intelligence, and her emotions are pure.

At the beginning, because Chen Mo sent her out of the black hole, and Chen Mo sank herself, she blamed herself for her inability to protect Chen Mo. Over the years, she has been looking for Chen Mo in the universe.

"Brother Mo, I'm sorry."

Chen Mo stroked the girl's hair: "I'm sorry, don't think so much."

"Ok."

Mo Nu lightly nodded and stood quietly beside Chen Mo, as before.

The three beauties ripped apart the space and appeared, and A Yu who was next to him secretly shook his tongue, Zhiqu exited the hotel room, leaving the space for them.

After the long-lost surprise of reunion, they soon found another person in the hotel, Hu Bingxin.

"Who is she?"

Xiao Yu walked to Chen Mo and saw Hu Bingxin, and for a time countless possibilities formed in her mind. Chen Mo had been missing for five years, and when she appeared, there was an extra female life around her. She had to think more.

What should she do if it is really that kind of relationship? This is something she has to think about.

Xiao Yu's mood became tangled.

Although there are countless lives in the universe and long life spans, it is very normal for all kinds of life to have many partners, but she can't help but be an alien woman.

"She is Mrs. White Star Fox."

Chen Mo moved his fingers, and Hu Bingxin returned to its original appearance.

At this time, they were completely relieved.

This woman is a captive.

They thought there would be one more alien sister.

"I think I need to avoid it." Hu Bingxin glanced at the three women, and went back to her room witty. Others and Hongyan reunited after a long time, she still stayed here, just a big light bulb.

"Where have you been all these years?"

"I said, I feel that time has only passed for a moment, do you believe it?" Chen Mo explained.

"what happened?"

"When the black hole weapon was activated, I realized something was wrong. After sending the ink girl away, the time and space around me was messed up. I couldn't teleport out and the space couldn't shuttle, so I repaired the time and space to escape. Only a few seconds passed when I felt the time. Zhong, I only found out when he escaped, five years have passed." Chen Mo spread his hands and said that he was helpless.

"Is the time of a black hole different from reality?" Xiao Yu said.

"Yes." Chen Mo asked the three daughters to sit down: "Tell me about the situation at home."

"After you disappeared, Mo Nui came back and said that you were trapped in a black hole, and Lan launched an offensive and invaded the white star universe."

Zhao Min told Chen Mo.

After the White Star civilization was dismembered, the universe situation can be described as changing.

All forces are looking for ways to advance super powers, but the world is not impervious to the wind, and the functions of their super power armors are still spread out.

Regardless of all costs, the outside world hopes to obtain a super armor to study.

As the Super Warhead enters the battlefield, casualties are inevitable, so the wreckage of Super War Armor falls into the hands of some forces, but they have not found the secret that Super War Armor can amplify super power.

The material of the power armor is made of ether material. Before the method of extracting the ether material, don't want to produce the power armor, so they are not afraid of other forces cracking it.

The current marching ant group is really strong.

The marching ant group was safe and sound, and Chen Mo showed a slight smile.

"Why don't you go home directly?" Xiao Yu asked.

"I feel that I am here, and there seems to be some important things to do, so I haven't gone back for now." Chen Mo raised his head and looked out the hotel window.

At the same time, a space fleet suddenly appeared in the space port of Wandaoxing. A small spacecraft left the fleet and landed straight towards the location of Goldfish Island.

chapters.title: Chapter 1098: : Hu Bingxin'S Deal?
chapters.body:
Chapter 1098: : Hu Bingxin'S Deal?

"How to deal with Mrs. Fox?" Zhao Min asked Chen Mo.

Hu Bingxin is the number two figure in the White Star Civilization, and its importance is self-evident, especially after confirming the death of the old chief, Hu Bingxin is now the number one figure in the White Star Civilization.

Her identity is there, otherwise Chen Mo would not speak out to save her.

"If you want to use me to control the White Star Civilization, then I advise you to die this heart."

Hu Bingxin spoke unhurriedly, not nervous because he was a prisoner.

"Before the start of the Divine Source Conference, I gave up the supreme power of the White Star Civilization in order to prevent me from being caught. If the plan fails, I will not have a big impact on the White Star Civilization because I am controlled."

"I thought it was thoughtful. I guess you wouldn't think that after you and the old chief die, the Xiao clan will seize power and cause the White Star to split." Chen Mo said.

Hearing this, Hu Bingxin fell silent.

They had long noticed that the power of the Xiao clan was too great, but she and the old chief had previously suppressed them, and they couldn't get over the waves no matter what. It was just unexpected that in that plan, Chen Mo not only captured her, but also penetrated the space barriers of the small universe and swept away the old chief and some high-level officials.

Losing her and the old chieftain and other high-level suppression, the Xiao clan struggled for power, but the worst result occurred.

"She brings back to Earth first, don't let her contact the outside world, maybe it will be useful in the future." Chen Mo said after thinking.

"Why can't you take me by your side?"

"I agree, but neither of my wife agrees." Chen Mo said.

"I'm not bad, you accept me as a partner, maybe I can change my mind, include the White Star Civilization and give it to you. You have a woman, and the star field that you rule can expand."

Hu Bingxin completely disregarded that Xiao Yu and others were by her side.

In her opinion, this kind of transaction in the universe is very common, even a very cost-effective thing, and Chen Mo can expand the influence without any effort. Putting it on the leader of any force, he will not reject this idea.

Seeing Xiao Yu want to speak, Hu Bingxin interrupted her.

"Don't be anxious to refuse, you should know that in the universe, it is the most normal thing for a life to have many partners at the same time. Some civilized leaders even set aside a whole planet to raise the opposite **** as their harem, with countless partners.

Any civilized leader, upon hearing my request, will agree without hesitation, including Tong Qing. Because he doesn't need to spend countless resources and the lives of war soldiers to fight, he can expand his star field and have one more woman.

If you are really thinking about your husband's hegemony, you should not oppose this idea. His mind is the hegemony of the universe. As his partners, if you can't help him, you should not restrain him from becoming stronger.

In the cruel environment of the universe, being bound by a certain moral rule, it is easy to be eliminated, because you are bound by the moral rules set by others. Especially in space wars, morality is the most worthless thing. "

Hu Bing's heart showed no signs of weakness, and his face was calm.

These words were addressed to the three little fishermen.

Xiao Yu and Zhao Min looked at each other, not knowing how to refute these words from Hu Bingxin.

They actually felt that Hu Bingxin was right.

In terms of the moral rules of the current state of the universe, what Hu Bingxin said are very commonplace. In the universe, powerful leaders, whether male or female, will have many partners.

"His ability should be very strong. If you can't handle it, one more is not a bad thing."

At this time, the atmosphere became strange.

Xiao Yu and Zhao Min stared at Chen Mo fiercely, only Mo Nu standing quietly.

"Stop, the topic is crooked."

Chen Mo hurriedly shouted.

He has to admire the woman's eloquence, the angle is very tricky.

"Xiaoyu and Amin, you bring her back to the earth to take care of her. This woman should have superpowers similar to reading memories or mind reading. Xiaoyu, you lock her superpowers, don't let her be blamed, don't let her contact the outside world , Mo Nu stayed."

Chen Mo looked out the window.

A spaceship zoomed in on the horizon and came towards Goldfish Island where they were.

That is the spaceship of the endless sea.

A few of them have special identities, and they are all gathered here.

Although reluctant, when the door of space opened, Xiao Yu and Zhao Min left with Hu Bingxin, leaving Chen Mo and Mo Nu in the room.

In the next moment, Chen Mo's face changed, becoming the same as when he first landed on Goldfish Island. When Mo Nu saw this, her face changed, her face and arms were covered with colorful fish scales, like the life of a mermaid.

...

Shuiling overlooked the Goldfish Island below, and dived down from the spacecraft.

She was the only one, and no other soldiers followed.

This time, the old prophet asked her to find someone. This is top secret, and the entire endless sea, including her, only three lives know.

This direction.

Shuiling used her own abilities to perceive it, and found a direction to fly over, which was the direction of the hotel where Chen Mo was.

"Have you seen this life."

Upon arriving at the hotel where Chen Mo was located, Shuiling handed the portrait to the waiter at the front desk.

"This, the privacy of our guests..."

Before the waiter could finish speaking, he stopped abruptly, because he saw that in Shuiling's hand holding an official certificate of endless sea, the person who came was the official life of endless sea.

In the endless sea star field, the endless sea has supreme power.

"This gentleman is in room 1606."

"Thank you."

Shuiling put away his ID.

She was also puzzled by the old prophet asking her to find this strange life, but the old prophet said that it was about the future of the endless sea, and she dared not neglect it.

She also wanted to see how sacred this life made the old prophet so important.

Room 1606.

Shuiling went outside the room but found a police officer wearing a standard armor standing there.

"Have you ever seen this life?" Shuiling put the photo of Chen Mo's disguised appearance in front of A Yu.

"you are?"

When A Yu saw the people coming, he dared not neglect. Although his status is low, it does not mean that he has never seen anything. The battle armor on Shuiling is a high-class item. With such a perfect armor life, in the endless sea, his status will definitely not be low.

When seeing the man's armor helmet drop, A Yu almost collapsed on the ground without being frightened.

Shui Ling.

The goddess of the endless sea of countless male lives, a genius girl, and a student of the current prophet.

"Is he here?" Shuiling continued to ask.

"Yes, inside."

A Yu nodded hurriedly, but a little embarrassed.

He didn't know how to explain.

This is Chen Mo, he knows it, but in the room, there are also Hu Bingxin, the old master of the White Star civilization, and several of Chen Mo's beauties. When Shuiling entered, he didn't know whether it was a blessing or a curse. Once the two conflicted, it would be a war between the endless sea and the marching ants.

Explain Chen Mo's identity to Shuiling? He was afraid that Chen Mo would not like it, and his life would be explained here first.

"What's the problem?" Shuiling asked.

"No, this gentleman's identity is somewhat special." A Yu said.

"Special? I know special."

Shuiling responded, it was indeed special. Isn't it special that the life that the old prophet could find himself?

So Shuiling knows his identity? A Yu breathed a sigh of relief. That's right, Shuiling followed the Prophet, don't you know that Chen Mo came to their star field?

Click!

As the two communicated, the door of the room suddenly opened.

Chen Mo looked at Shui Ling, this girl had not changed much from when she had seen her, she was still so young. For a life with a life span of tens of thousands of years, decades are not long, and it is difficult to see changes in her.

Shuiling is also looking at Chen Mo.

Chen Mo felt very familiar to her, like a life she knew, but she was sure that she didn't know the current'Chen Mo', this feeling was very contradictory. Even if she used her predictive ability to see Chen Mo, she still couldn't see through.

Her superpower has the ability to perceive the essence of life. If it is disguised by the life changes she is familiar with, she can see through it at a glance.

But Chen Mo could not see through.

This life looks ordinary, without any obtrusive features, but the woman around him is pretty, like a perfect mermaid. This was the second time she saw such a beautiful mermaid tribe, and the last time she saw Princess Arowana up close.

What made her even more puzzled was that this woman fish also gave her a sense of familiarity.

The lives she saw must have impressions and memories, but she couldn't find the memory of these two.

"Look for me?" Chen Mo asked.

"Sir, I was ordered by the prophet to invite him." Shuiling said politely.

"prophet?"

Chen Mo was very surprised. He asked himself that this face was changing randomly and he didn't know the prophet at all. He thought that endless sea knew that Chen Mo was here, so he came to invite him, but he didn't expect that it was not the case.

"I don't seem to know the prophet, did I find the wrong one?" Chen Mo said.

"The picture is correct."

Shuiling released the photo, exactly what Chen Mo looked like after changing his face.

"Sir, the prophet has the ability to foresee, and he can naturally predict what Mr. will look like. This time, please come over to discuss important matters."

After Chen Mo thought about it, he nodded slightly.

He only appeared in the endless sea not long ago. Since the prophet of the endless sea can predict his current location and appearance, he should naturally know his true identity.

He has some friendship with the endless sea, but in these years, he has never communicated with the prophet of the endless sea at close range. He is very curious about the prophet of the endless sea with the ability to predict.

Take this opportunity to meet the prophet of the endless sea.

"Do you want to follow me and make a move later?"

Chen Mo looked at A Yu. A Yu was still clever. This time he helped him once, and he knew his identity. It was okay to let him do some trivial things.

"Yes, you can." A Yu nodded hurriedly, looking excited, he knew that this time, his destiny had changed.

"please."

Shui Ling stretched out his hand to cite.

chapters.title: Chapter 1099: : I Want You To Inherit The Endless Sea
chapters.body:
Chapter 1099: : I Want You To Inherit The Endless Sea

There are many water-bearing planets in the endless sea star field, and the galaxies here, when viewed from space, are all blue light, like sea water, so this is called the endless sea.

Penetrating the space barriers, their spacecraft headed to the Forbidden Sea.

The Forbidden Sea can be said to be the most important place in the endless sea, but now, two foreigners, Chen Mo and Mo Nu, are allowed to come in.

Chen Mo looked curiously when he saw the old murlocs waiting in the hall.

This kind-looking old murloc is the current prophet of Endless Sea. He has seen it in movies and said some kind words, and he is sure he does not know him.

If he were to abandon his identity and put him in the group of endless sea sea races, no one would have noticed such an ordinary old man.

It is such an old man who manages the endless sea now.

Chen Mo could feel the appreciation in the eyes of the old murloc. When he reached his point, he could have long been aware of whether the other party's eyes were kind or malicious, and Chen Mo did not see maliciousness in the other party's eyes.

"Prophet, long Yang." Chen Mo humbly greeted the old murloc.

"Sir, you are polite." The old murloc also returned Chen Mo's etiquette.

"The prophet is looking for me, is there something?" Chen Mo asked. Unless the other party took the initiative to reveal his identity, he didn't have the idea of changing back to his original appearance.

"It's not that I'm looking for your husband, but the teacher is looking for you." The old fishman said respectfully.

"Teacher? Old prophet?" Chen Mo was surprised, but immediately understood.

Judging from the look of the old murloc, the old murloc didn't recognize him. I'm afraid it was the old prophet who recognized himself.

He has heard the legend of the old prophet of the endless sea, but has never seen a real person. The outside world only knows that the old prophet of the endless sea is an old antique with a life span of hundreds of millions of years.

"Please follow me, the teacher is waiting for you." The old murloc asked Shui Ling and the others to stay, and he came to lead the way.

In the universe, let the old murloc take the initiative to lead the way, and this is the only one.

With infinite doubts, Chen Mo still followed with Mo Nu.

His friendship with Endless Sea can be said to be strange.

Ever since meeting him, endless sea has released his kindness. When he was in Shi Ganxing, he had not yet gained momentum, and was just a small person to the god-level civilization, but the endless sea at that time released his kindness.

And shortly after the Star Festival, the endless sea began to block the star field, almost isolated from the world.

However, none of the actions against the marching ant group were involved, even the Shenyuan meeting.

The Shenyuan Conference, even the allies of the marching ants at that time, sent people to participate, but the endless sea was still unmoved and was not afraid of being isolated by the entire universe.

This kind of unprovoked kindness made Chen Mo very baffling.

He asked himself that he had never had a problem with Endless Sea before, and he had never helped Endless Sea.

Without explanation, Chen Mo can only be attributed to the strength of the Prophet of the Endless Sea. He has long foreseen that in the future, he will become one of the overlords of the universe.

He had never experienced the power of the prophet, so he was very curious.

As the legendary Prophet of the endless sea with a life span of hundreds of millions of years, he is even more curious. In the end, life can reach this life span.

Arriving at the gate of the Crystal Palace, the old murloc stopped and signaled Chen Mo and Mo Nu to enter.

With full of doubts, Chen Mo chose to enter that door.

Seeing the situation inside the door clearly, Chen Mo's pupils shrank.

He saw a familiar back.

The shadow hidden deep in his memory is the figure that changed his life.

"Teacher?" Chen Mo walked over and stammered.

"Finally met."

The old prophet spoke quietly, and he raised his head to reveal his original appearance.

His gray hair and beard, his face is kind, he does not look old, his eyes are as deep as the starry sky, as if he can see everything in the world.

Chen Mo is very familiar with this face.

The old Shu who appeared when he got the science and technology library in his youthful period. Chen Mo didn't officially call him a teacher until he disappeared.

He thought that Old Shu was just an intelligent program left by the predecessors of the Science and Technology Library, but he did not think that he was a real life, and they actually met again in this situation. In his mind, Old Shu is his enlightenment teacher on the road of science and technology, but he doesn't want to be the old prophet of the endless sea.

In this way, all the goodwill of the endless sea to the marching ant group is a matter of course.

Suddenly, Chen Mo's expression changed.

He saw something different in the old prophet.

time.

Yes, it's time.

He saw a time break in the old prophet, and the old prophet's consciousness also had a sense of collapse, which was a precursor to the exhaustion of his life.

"Teacher, what's the matter with your body?"

Seeing Chen Mo appear, the old prophet smiled. His old face was still the same as the smile he had seen in the Science and Technology Library: "Hundreds of millions of years, I have lived long enough."

"This..." Chen Mo's mouth moved, but in the end he said nothing.

The old prophet has lived for hundreds of millions of years, and it is inevitable that his life will come to an end.

At the beginning, I was talking and laughing with him in the science and technology library, and passing on the science and technology library to his elders still couldn't escape the fate of death. He was still a little sad.

Seeing the change in Chen Mo's expression, the old prophet smiled comfortedly: "Unless it is immortal. Otherwise, the most powerful life will die. I have lived for hundreds of millions of years, and there is still a life span of several decades. There is nothing to be sad."

"I can help you evolve into a quantum life." Chen Mo said.

"No, there will be your story when I failed in evolution." The old prophet shook his head and smiled: "My body cannot support the second development."

Chen Mo was extremely shocked.

The outside world just guessed that the old prophet was a prehistoric survivor, but he did not expect the old prophet to admit it. When he came back to his senses, everything seemed to be taken for granted. It’s not surprising that something like a science library is a legacy of science and technology from prehistoric civilization.

Seeing Chen Mo showing a shocked look, the old prophet smiled freely and said: "I didn't expect you to reach this point in such a short time."

After speaking the last sentence, the old prophet sighed.

Decades are very short for his life span of hundreds of millions of years. When I first met Chen Mo, Chen Mo was still the lowest intelligent being and a young student. Unexpectedly, in such a short time, Chen Mo would become one of the strongest overlords of the universe.

"You know the final mission of the Science and Technology Library, right?" said the old prophet.

"Yeah." Chen Mo nodded gently.

Restart the universe and restore the eleven dimensions of time spin.

This task is too difficult to imagine.

"The war between the time and space tribes caused the space-time spin of the universe to stop. When they regretted it, it was too late. The chain reaction of time collapse was out of control and the operation of the universe stopped. Time spin stopped, and then time rolling stopped, and then space rolling stopped , The dimensions continue to decrease, and finally become the current universe. The state of space stops, time becomes one-dimensional, and then dimensionality is reduced. The paper universe will exist. Everything in the universe will exist in two dimensions, and finally the linear universe and the singularity universe. ."

The old prophet whispered.

"If you restore the time spin of the universe, the time and space of the universe will stop collapsing, and in the future, it will gradually return to the endless universe during the time spinning. At that time, life on all planets in the universe will slowly recover, and life will be restored to everyone. Like a dragon, it is born with superpowers, and even in black holes, life can be bred. That is the universe full of vitality."

"Since I have accepted this inheritance, I will try my best to complete the mission." Chen Mo said solemnly.

"I naturally believe in you."

The old prophet nodded.

"You are now a quantum body, with infinite possibilities. Your body is a treasure, but the power you control is only a very small part. My prophetic ability allows you to understand the future and see through. At that time, you It can control the eleven-dimensional universe, and it is more powerful than the time-space clan in the past. It will be less difficult for you to restart the universe. I can let you copy the prophetic ability, but you have to promise me a few conditions."

"How dare I not finish what you want to say?" Chen Mo smiled bitterly.

"Not bad." The old prophet smiled cheerfully and said, "I want you to inherit the endless sea and be the leader of the endless sea."

chapters.title: Chapter 1100: : The Power Of The Prophet
chapters.body:
