Chapter 1100: : The Power Of The Prophet

"Is there a leader in Endless Sea?" Chen Mo said in surprise.

"Little is old." The old prophet sighed faintly: "The endless sea has not been in contention with the world for too long. The spirit is lost, and a young prophet is needed. Moreover, if you restart the universe in the future, the endless sea will also be affected. You inherit Endless sea, I can rest assured."

"Inheriting the endless sea, it is so cheap, I have no objection, but what does the ancient prophet think? The people of the endless sea may not necessarily obey me." Chen Mo said.

The old prophet chuckled.

"You also count as my student. There is no problem in inheriting the endless sea. Every prophet of the endless sea is selected by me and all my students. Xiaogu should enjoy his life when he abdicates.

My purpose in creating Endless Sea is to one day help the inheritors of the science and technology library complete the final mission. You are the inheritor, and now is the moment of mission. As for the trust of the endless sea people, it depends on you. Life's worship of the strong is instinct, which is engraved in the genes of life. "

With such a big pie falling from the sky, Chen Mo didn't know how to describe his mood at the moment.

If you let the generals of the marching ants know, you will definitely be entangled, because they sacrificed a lot of soldiers and countless war machines before they attacked the star field with the large army ants. Now Chen Mo is doing nothing, come here for a tour. , As a result inherited a god-level civilization.

"Let you comprehend the superpower of the prophet first, open this door, you will see through the essence of the universe, and then you will know the answer yourself."

"it is good."

Chen Mo did not refuse.

Looking at the ability to pass through and the future, Chen Mo also wants to know how amazing this ability is.

He now controls the three most mysterious abilities of time, space, and consciousness, as well as various other abilities, which are all developed by his body, but he is still very curious about this prophetic ability to see through the future.

This ability is already the most essential law to see through the movement of matter. Only in this way can we see everything in the past and the future without affecting the changes in the material world at that time.

Chen Mo gently covered the old prophet's brain with his palm, and the Crystal Palace fell silent.

The moment he touched the head of the old prophet, he entered a strange state. In this state, Chen Mo felt that he could perceive everything in the past and the future.

The old prophet guided Chen Mo to comprehend this ability. He was very skilled, not the first time he did this.

This process lasted for nearly ten days, and the two of them were motionless in the Crystal Palace, Mo Nu just guarded them, quietly watching Chen Mo in concentration.

When the ten days passed, the old prophet opened his eyes, and a rare tiredness appeared in his eyes, like a dying old man, and quite old. The use of this ability consumes a lot of him, especially since he has entered his old age.

But in his expression, there is an unspeakable sense of ease. The wish for hundreds of millions of years has been fulfilled, and the burden on him has been relieved.

Chen Mo was reminiscing about that feeling, and stayed still for a long time.

Is this the power of the prophet?

Chen Mo's eyes grew deeper and deeper, and the breath on his body was as dazzling as the scorching sun, and then slowly receded and gradually disappeared.

His eyes seem to have insight into the world.

The prophet’s ability can perceive all the laws of the universe, including the laws of time and space. It has no offensive power, no destructive power, but can follow the laws of matter to see what he wants to know about the past and the future.

Everything in the universe is under control, it feels so wonderful.

Now, Chen Mo really feels the power to control his body, and it is the omnipotent power.

After the excitement, Chen Mo's mood quickly calmed down.

"Thank you teacher." Chen Mo bowed.

"Don’t thank me, your achievements are the result of your own hard work, and my contribution is not great. Even if I don’t give you the ability to watch the Prophet, you will understand it later. It just takes a little longer. Your body has The possibilities are endless. Time doesn’t make much sense to you."

The old prophet sighed and then became relaxed.

"Everything I need to do is done, and there is one last wish."

"Teacher you say." Chen Mo said respectfully.

The old prophet nodded in satisfaction, staring at the totem of the Crystal Palace in a daze.

"This totem belongs to my previous race, the Prophet. In that era, countless powerful races, such as the Time Space, the Prophet, the Black Hole, the Purple, the Thunder, and the Nether, all had incredible abilities. After the war, time and space The clan dominates, but that was also the beginning of their destruction, and war broke out within them.

It is a pity that they were too arrogant and refused to listen to the prophecies of my ancestors. They abused time weapons and eventually ended up in annihilation, and the universe became a mess. The seven god-level civilizations all have the blood of the prehistoric survivors. They are the ancestors of the prehistoric survivors' blood. They have inherited some superpowers and are stronger and smarter than other lives.

The endless sea is inherited from the blood of my prophets. But the bloodline has been diluted a long time ago, and their abilities gradually weakened over time without change. After millions of years, this ability to inherit genes will disappear.

Shui Ling is rarely a child who retains the blood of a prophet. She has signs of returning to her ancestors. She is very similar to an old person of mine. I like this girl very much. I hope you will help her evolve into a quantum body. After I die, you will protect her for me. "

"Yes." Chen Mo did not hesitate.

Shuiling is a descendant of the old prophet, and it is understandable that Chen Mo helped her evolve into a quantum life.

"What's the teacher's plan next?"

The old prophet thought for a while and laughed: "I really didn't think about it before. For the remaining decades, I will live a life of ordinary life, find a planet to live in seclusion, plant flowers, pick fruits, and raise a pet."

"Would you like to go to my hometown? That is a good place for old-age care." Chen Mo said.

"It's okay." The old prophet nodded: "I will deal with my business later. You should do what you want to do first."

...

The old murloc and Shuiling were outside the Crystal Palace. Without the call of the old prophet, he could not go in and disturb. It has been ten days since Chen Mo and Mo Nu entered the Crystal Palace. It is false to say that they are not in a hurry, and no one can guarantee that the two lives of unknown origin will act on the prophet.

If the old prophet has a problem, it will be a fatal blow to the endless sea.

"Will there be a problem with the ancestor?" Shuiling said.

"Nothing will happen, the teacher knows everything, looking for those two, naturally has his reason." The old murloc couldn't express his worry.

When the old murloc and Shuiling were anxious, the door of the Crystal Palace suddenly opened.

Upon seeing this, the two were overjoyed and hurriedly entered the palace.

The old murloc stared curiously at the young man before him.

He found that this young man had changed a lot from ten days ago, his aura was more restrained, and his appearance looked like an ordinary life, without any specialness.

This change made him extremely surprised.

He still couldn't see through Chen Mo, his insight into the essence of prophecy actually had no effect on him. He couldn't see Chen Mo's future. As the Prophet of Endless Sea, his instinct told him that this young man was terrifying, even more terrifying than the teacher.

"Xiaogu, you will pass on the next prophet of the endless sea, and now it's time for the younger generation in this era," the old prophet said.

The old murloc's body was shocked, and he said in surprise, "Do you have a suitable teacher? Is it for Shuiling?"

"No, it's the one in front of you."

"he?"

The old murloc looked at Chen Mo in surprise.

When the old prophet asked Shuiling to find someone, he knew that the person he was looking for was special, saying that it was a character about the future of the endless sea. Unexpectedly, he was the next prophet of the endless sea.

"Yes, he is my student, your junior." said the old prophet.

Junior brother?

The old murloc re-examined Chen Mo, he really didn't know that there was such a junior.

"He also has an identity, the lord of marching ants, Chen Mo. After so many years, he has also grown up."

"Chen Mo?"

The old murloc cried out in exclamation, because he had seen big winds and waves, and at this moment he was a little gaffe.

Under his watch, Chen Mo returned to his original appearance.

He had talked with this young overlord several times, but strictly speaking, it was the first time that he was face-to-face at such a close distance. He used to invite Chen Mo to come to Endless Sea, but Chen Mo never appeared.

But didn't want to, Chen Mo actually met him in this way.

This overlord-level figure who shook the forces of the entire universe was actually a student of the teacher and his junior.

This answer made his mood uneasy for a long time.

Chen Mo is the lord of the marching ants. The current marching ants are almost invincible. If he inherits the endless sea, he will have the capital to unify the universe, the first life in the history to unify the universe star field. What a glory.

The old murloc's breathing was a little short.

It is also an honor for the endless sea to stand at this historical node.

In the eyes of the outside world, the endless sea is calm and tranquil, but the truth is that the high-levels of the endless sea lack the spirit to fight for hegemony. This situation is very dangerous. Now, this situation is about to change.

The Shuiling next to her was shocked.

No wonder she was so familiar when she found Chen Mo, but she didn't remember how she met him. Now the doubts in my heart are resolved, it turned out to be Chen Mo who has been missing for five years.

This overlord is still a student of the old ancestor.

The news made her mind dizzy, and she knew what Chen Mo's identity meant. The endless sea plus marching ants, the two combined into one, plus the allies of the marching ants, he has the strength to unify the universe.

"One more thing, about Shuiling girl." The old prophet said, interrupting Shuiling's shock.

chapters.title: Chapter 1101: : The Way Of The Prophet
chapters.body:
Chapter 1101: : The Way Of The Prophet

"Instructor Lan, his wife is in conference room No. 1, saying there is news." Zhu He said softly when he approached Lan.

Lan, who was deploying tactics, was taken aback, put down the laser pointer and walked away quickly, leaving the room full of stars staring at each other.

The marching ant group is from top to bottom, and now it is too busy to find North.

Chen Mo didn't show up in five years. There are many speculations about Chen Mo's death from the outside world. From time to time, a similar news will come out. The offensive strategy of the marching ant group operations department is not as radical as before. Everything is done step by step, steady and steady.

This step-by-step state changed ten days ago.

The marching ant group suddenly appeared vitality, and both the administrative department and the armed forces were quietly changing.

Logistic materials are being concentrated, and there is a big movement in the Armed Forces Department.

Today's marching ants, with the help of super armor, can be described as the strongest giants. Every action they make, other forces in the universe will shake three times.

What happened when the top of the marching ant group changed its strategy?

There is speculation about this.

However, the senior leaders of the marching ant group did not mention this, and devoted themselves to preparing for the war.

Now that the space war is in full swing, this action means that the giant marching ant group will restart the offensive with maximum firepower.

In fact, Lan is preparing to start the biggest offensive.

Chen Mo's appearance now gave him the greatest relief.

If it weren't for the sudden disappearance of Chen Mo five years ago, the star field of the Marching Ant Group would be half larger than it is now. Defense is not what he is good at, what he is best at is offense.

"Madam, have you got any news?" Lan said as soon as he entered meeting room 1.

"Yeah." Xiao Yu carefully took out a file from the folder and handed it to Lan: "This is the news that Mo Nu just sent back. Chen Mo said that you should deploy it."

Lan was shocked and hurriedly took over the file.

The next moment, Lan took a breath and looked ecstatic.

This news is too shocking.

Until he returned to the combat department, he had not recovered. Under many puzzled eyes of Jiang Xing, Lan turned on the clearing function of the holographic sand table and cleared all the war deployments just now.

"The original tactical deployment is all invalidated, and now the new plan is deployed."

...

The poisonous girl stood alone by the office window, overlooking the city below.

This is the capital of the Thousand Star Empire, the City of Thousand Stars.

This planet is extremely prosperous, and the pomp here has long surpassed the old Thousand Star Empire. The current Thousand Star Empire was built by her and Wan Tian Xing. They resisted the attack of Thor's civilization and became stronger in the war.

She is now the number two person in the Thousand Star Empire, but she has no weaker power than Ten Thousand Stars. There are only two top generals in the Thousand Star Empire, and Kaliyi is one of them. The generals team on their side is of better quality than those of Wantianxing.

So far, no one knows that the second figure of the Thousand Star Empire, nicknamed the Queen of the Black Widow, is a dark game played by the marching ant cloth, except for the few core high-level leaders of the marching ant group. Grown up.

In recent years, the girl with the poisonous skin has been silent, and there is no too eye-catching action.

The reason is simple, the man is missing.

For five years, the instructor did not give her any instructions, and she has been dormant.

Everyone is waiting, the high-levels in the marching ant group are waiting, and the poisonous women are also waiting, they don't believe that Chen Mo will die so easily, because the man is almost omnipotent and always so confident.

call!

A little breeze came from behind.

Hui appeared behind her twenty-one with excitement, crying and laughing, tears still shining.

"What's the matter? Such a big person is still crying? What kind of expression do you have?" The poisonous girl suddenly became happy when she saw his expression, her face was indifferent and she rarely smiled.

Back then, instructor Lan asked them to go out to form the Qingan Department, and only gave her a very small number of personnel, and Hui Twenty-one. From the place of chaos, she and Hui Twenty-one formed a force together. It can be said that she has treated Hui Twenty-one as her younger brother.

"My lord has appeared."

"Who?"

"My lord, my lord is back."

The poison-skinned girl froze in place, and there was only one adult among the twenty-one mouths of Hui, the omnipotent man.

"Really?"

"Really, it hasn't spread yet. Only the core senior officials know that there is new news from the instructor." Hui Twenty-one wiped away his tears and revealed a rare smile.

...

The new prophet of Endless Sea succeeded to the throne, and the news came out, causing a sensation in the universe.

Every prophet of Endless Sea possesses the prophetic ability that penetrates everything in time. This special ability gives them a unique advantage. Thanks to this, even if the endless sea experiences great turbulence, it will eventually survive.

As a god-level civilized force, it is undoubtedly a big deal to replace a new leader.

Many forces began to frantically search for the identity information of the new prophet. However, to disappoint the outside world, no one at the top of the endless sea had heard of this new prophet, and even his real name and appearance were unknown.

There are constant battles from the outside world, and the endless sea is calm and stable. Now it is reported that a new prophet is succeeding. This has to be paid attention to.

Why should the current prophet abdicate in this chaotic universe situation? Changing coaches on the fly is a taboo.

Is there any change in the endless sea?

The outside world knows little about this young prophet who suddenly appeared. It is only certain that in a month's time, the new prophet will embark on the'road of the prophet' and go to the prophet star to be crowned.

This young prophet was a student of the old prophet and the current prophet's junior.

Ordinary people naturally dare not question the new leader recognized by the old prophet.

But acceptance by ordinary people does not mean that all the high-levels of Endless Sea accept it.

Any big power has its own interest groups, including the moderate power of Endless Sea, which also has various interests involved and is complicated. Now there is a young life that they don't know at all. They are somewhat worried about the loss of their own interests after the new prophet succeeds.

The prestige of the prophet is accumulated through one thing.

The mysterious prophet, they didn't understand at all, and they had never heard of the other party's achievements that convinced them. Naturally, they lacked prestige.

The undercurrent is raging in the endless sea, and everyone is waiting for the day of the coronation.

The outside world knows that no matter what the outcome of this coronation ceremony is, it cannot change a fact.

The endless sea is going to change.

If the coronation fails, the endless sea may fall into chaos. If the coronation is successful and the new prophet succeeds to the throne, a new round of changes in the endless sea policy may occur.

These are the focus of external attention.

Because there is no information about the new prophet, the outside world has no research or understanding of the prophet.

Endless Sea has recharged for years and is arguably one of the strongest giants. They have been defensive and have not participated in space wars. The young prophet succeeded to the throne. Does it mean that they will switch from defense to offense?

If the endless sea joins the space war, the situation will be changed again.

There is another reason why the coronation ceremony of the Prophet of the Endless Sea has attracted the attention of the whole universe.

The test of the "Prophet's Way".

The path of the prophet is a test of consciousness that must be taken in the coronation ceremony of the prophet, and it is also the last test, which lasts for two months.

The successor prophet must set off at the speed of light one light-moon away from the prophet star, and the ten warheads of the endless sea set up defenses and traps on the road to test the prophet's ability to avoid bad luck.

If the new prophet dies or is caught on the road, according to the rules, a new prophet with outstanding ability will be selected. Because if a prophet cannot even predict the dangers ahead of him, he is not qualified to be a prophet of the endless sea.

Only when you reach the Prophet before the start of the coronation ceremony will you be considered to have passed the test.

This is a test set by the old prophet, and it has not changed for hundreds of millions of years.

chapters.title: Chapter 1102: :Set Off
chapters.body:
Chapter 1102: :Set Off

"Tell me briefly about the basic power distribution inside the endless sea." Chen Mo stared at a little starlight in space, which is the star system where the Prophet Star is located.

Shuiling's thoughts were interrupted by Chen Mo and followed his gaze towards the stars in space.

"In the endless sea, the prophet is in charge of the highest authority. But it also cultivates successors. There are four sea masters and ten sea stars. These are all potential candidates for the prophet. They have excellent predictive ability, and the factions behind them have a good relationship with some generals. ."

"Which one do you belong to?"

"I am one of the ten large sea stars, the youngest starfish." Shuiling said.

"It's pretty awesome," Chen Mo said.

Shuiling was silent.

Awesome? In front of Chen Mo, no one dared to confidently say that he was amazing.

"Where is the Star Wars Department?"

"The endless sea has two top generals, namely, the white sea generals and the black sea generals. They are in charge of the strongest white sea war department and the black sea war department. In addition, there are seven general stars, red orange, yellow, green and green. The blue and purple seven sea generals command the Seven Great War Department. In this test, each war department will select an elite army to come."

"Nine warheads, ten warheads blocked, what about the last one?"

"The four sea lords and ten sea stars select guards to form the tenth army at the final finale. This is the most sad stage, because the sea lord will personally lead the team and can act separately. They also have the ability to predict and can predict you. The forward position. Your sudden appearance this time made the sea lord and starfish very dissatisfied. They did not speak publicly. But this is the most terrifying thing. They may be killed. You have to be careful.

Chen Mo responded and didn't care.

He didn't know much about Shuiling, so he observed it during this time.

A girl who doesn't like contention has a purer personality. In front of the old prophet, she is a good girl, and in the eyes of the outside world, she is a friendly princess of endless sea.

Her prestige in the endless sea is not low, and she is loved by the people, but her character is destined not to be a leader.

Not ruthless enough.

The old prophet gave him the endless sea, he could not let the endless sea chaos, and at the same time needed to control the endless sea.

These days, he has read a lot of news about the new prophet in the endless sea.

In addition to guessing the identity of his new prophet, it is more to discuss whether he can be crowned successfully. However, most of the comments were extremely cautious about Chen Mo's successful coronation, but because of the prestige of the old prophet, they were not easy to question publicly.

The path of the prophet is actually a way to establish power for the new prophet. The purpose is to prove himself and establish the prestige of the new prophet among ordinary people.

Life worships and fears the strong, even in the relatively peaceful endless sea.

He dared to break into the lair of the White Star Civilization alone, a small test, he really didn't care, it was just a matter of how to get in.

Thinking of this, Chen Mo smiled.

...

Shuiling looked at Chen Mo secretly.

When the ancestor let herself follow Chen Mo in the future, she was a little unwilling, but she did not dare to disobey.

Knowing that Chen Mo was a student of the ancestor, she only regarded Chen Mo as the secret hand of the ancestor in the universe. She regarded Chen Mo as her own, so Chen Mo took over the endless sea, and she did not reject it.

She has a low desire for power and knows that her character is not suitable to be a leader. Chen Mo is indeed the best choice as the new leader of endless sea.

But she was a little worried about the coronation ceremony.

The path of the Prophet will not be peaceful.

In the past, the prophet with the background will bring his own guards to break through, by dispersing the team, hiding the whereabouts, and then using the ability to predict dangerous locations, let the guards avoid these positions and march towards the prophet, leading away the warheads blocking the way .

Chen Mo has the background and is huge, even stronger than the endless sea. But that was in the marching ant star field, they could not let the warhead of marching ants enter the prophet star of the endless sea.

And if the news that Chen Mo is the lord of the marching ants is announced, he will lose a lot of his hole cards, and it may cause trouble to Endless Sea.

Now in the endless sea, Chen Mo is lonely.

She knows that Chen Mo is strong, but personal strength and war department strength are two concepts. In the history of the endless sea, there has never been a prophet who has passed the test by entering the path of the prophet alone.

"How are you going to break?" Shuiling stared at the starry sky and said, "Do you want me to lend you the guards?"

"Lend me?"

"My ancestor asked me to follow you in the future, and my guards will also follow your command in the future." Shuiling said.

"No, if there is a loss of personnel, I can't pay it back."

"Do you have any other solutions?"

Where can he find a strong team of guards?

Without the protection of the guards, as soon as you enter the range of the Prophet’s Road, you will be discovered by many warheads, and then set up traps to intercept on the way forward, it is impossible to pass.

"Naturally." Chen Mo smiled.

When the words fell, the Mo girl next to her stepped forward, taking a picture with one hand.

I saw a space gate expanding in front of them, and a crystal blue spaceship slowly appeared in the space gate.

This scene made Shuiling look stunned.

The spaceship appeared in front of them, and as soon as the hatch opened, the densely packed armored divisions emerged from the spaceship and arranged neatly in front of Chen Mo. The armor is painted in black without any markings.

After the installation was completed, a gas of murder spread.

"Kuyao, lead the Shenwei team and visit the king of gods." The leader flew to Chen Mo and respectfully saluted, and his armor helmet landed, showing Kuyao's excited expression.

They waited for five years and finally saw the King of God again.

"Meet the **** king."

Ten thousand guards, the voice thundered.

"Okay." Chen Mo pressed his hand and motioned them not to get excited.

Ku Yao glanced at Shuiling, then stepped aside.

Shuiling's face changed slightly, she was glanced at by Ku Yao just now, she felt an extreme sense of danger, like being stared at by a giant beast. This sense of danger made her scales chill.

She could have a foreboding that any armored division here would be able to kill her.

At this moment she felt insignificant.

It turned out that the warhead of the marching ants had reached this level.

Super Armored Division.

A name appeared in Shuiling's mind.

She woke up suddenly and realized that she had overlooked a very important issue.

Chen Mo is the lord of marching ants, and the marching ant group controls the only super-powered armor technology in the universe. A soldier can be equal to a legion.

Moreover, Chen Mo himself was not an ordinary powerhouse. At the time of the God Source Meeting, he dared to take away the Fox Bingxin alone, and then entered the White Star Civilization, ruining the old nest of the White Star Civilization, and bringing the upper level of the White Star Civilization to a pot.

Chen Mo now has the ability to travel through space against the sky, can reach any corner of the endless sea, and he can even destroy the entire Prophet.

He did not worry about the test of the path of the prophet from the beginning.

"You sent a spaceship out, are you not afraid of the endless sea's radar?" Shuiling was a little nervous. In this case, the spaceship and war department appeared, but it was an act of war.

"Don't worry, the radar can't find it." Chen Mo calmly replied, looking at Ku Yao: "Did Xiao Yu talk to you about the mission?"

"Say it." Ku Yao said solemnly.

The **** king wants to inherit the endless sea, in his view, it is the glory of the endless sea. Because in Shenwei's view, Chen Mo is omnipotent, and the future unified universe hegemony is not a dream.

"This is an endless sea. We can't act as a marching ant."

Chen Mo pointed his finger and saw the helmets of all the guards landed, and the faces of all the guards changed, turning into the sea-like form of the endless sea, the most murderous black shark.

"set off."

chapters.title: Chapter 1103: : Kill It
chapters.body:
Chapter 1103: : Kill It

The new prophet’s spacecraft entered the path of the prophet, and the news spread among the ten warheads guarded.

At the same time, there was another news. The new prophet only used one spacecraft and did not allow the team to spread out to cover the prophet.

What does he want to do?

The Path of the Prophet acts as the general star of the ‘cat’, and the same question mark appears in his heart at the same time.

Has the new prophet given up this coronation?

They have to think so.

Under the net of heaven and earth, there is no space to jump. Once discovered, the final destiny is to fall into encirclement.

"Will there be a problem with his actions like this? Single-handedly, it is easy to fall into a circle." In the Crystal Palace, the old murloc asked a little worried.

"Don't worry about this question. What you have to worry about is whether the four sea lords and the ten sea stars will be killed by him." The old prophet's voice was calm and a little casual.

"Is he really that strong?" the old murloc asked.

He couldn't see Chen Mo's fate, because Chen Mo's super power level was stronger than him, and his consciousness was stronger than him.

"He can enter the small universe of the White Star on his own and take the civilization of the White Star in a single pot. Don't you think he is not strong?" The old prophet said calmly, "He is beyond imagination. If he hadn't been missing for five years, I am afraid he can now compete with the marching ants. Yes, only a few great god-level civilizations can work together."

"Teacher, what kind of monster has he cultivated?" The old murloc couldn't help sighing.

"I didn't cultivate it." The old prophet smiled and shook his head: "The technological inheritance he got is from prehistoric times. I just led him in. The inheritance of ordinary life may become a strong research. It’s his own credit to achieve this step today. He is immortal today."

"If the outside world knows that he is the lord of marching ants, then it will be interesting." The old murloc said with a bit of wickedness.

"The time has not come, he will not announce it, this is a big hole card."

The old prophet shook his head.

"The identity of the lord of the marching ants is certainly powerful, but it is not against the endless sea. In the two battles, the marching ants have successively controlled the senior leaders of the Sauron Alliance and rejected the senior leaders of the White Star civilization. Chen Mo has a unique superpower, which is known to the entire universe. Announce his identity as the lord of the marching ants here, and those who are interested can use this to make a fuss."

The identity of the lord of marching ants is an alien identity to Endless Sea. The outside world can say that it was Chen Mo who controlled the old prophet and the current prophet of the endless sea and let them give Chen Mo the position.

Because of the war of the Sauron Alliance, this kind of remarks does not allow Chen Mo to refute it.

Those who have the intention to use this to incite the War Department and the people to confront Chen Mo, the War Department and ordinary people will never support Chen Mo's succession.

Even if the old prophet said Chen Mo was his student, ordinary people would not believe it, because the outside world would think that the old prophet was controlled by Chen Mo, so he said that.

...

Chen Mo was in a relaxed mood, just watching the news about the endless sea.

Now his spacecraft is broadcast live.

Their spacecraft was detected by Quantum Radar, and the images were simulated and placed on the live broadcast platform of the endless sea. Now the entire endless sea is watching their movements.

After possessing the power of prophecy, the nature of the universe has no secret in his eyes. Arashi is also making arrangements according to the plan, and everything is proceeding according to expectations. It will not be long before all missions will be completed.

As for the coronation ceremony of the prophet star, for him, it was just a formality, and there was nothing to worry about. The so-called test of the Path of the Prophet is full of danger to other lives, and there is no threat to him.

The reason why he summoned the guards was not to break the path of the prophet, but to be a little imposing when he was crowned. Otherwise, a dignified god-level civilization leader who was alone at the time of the coronation, without his own guard, would be a bit shameful.

It is a form of increasing prestige. Although he doesn't care, he still needs to have it.

Suddenly, the spacecraft's radar alarm sounded.

Ku Yao came over with a serious expression: "God King, a fleet is approaching us."

"It's General Chi Hai's warhead." Shuiling added.

She was born in the endless sea and became one of the ten big sea stars. She was also a student of the prophet and was very familiar with the affairs of the endless sea. The path of the Prophet will not be peaceful. It can be expected in the morning, but I did not expect it to come so soon.

This is because Chen Mo did not hide his whereabouts and went to the Prophet Star.

Warheads that participate in the test of the Prophet’s Path are rewarded, especially for catching the ‘Prophet’s successor’, the reward is doubled, and many resources can be obtained. This is a great temptation for warheads and generals.

And this time the new prophet succeeded to the throne, because his identity is unknown and he has no prestige in the endless sea, so the current war department has no respect for the new prophet. They dare not openly question the decision of the old prophet, but they will never hesitate in the test.

For many reasons, this month of the Prophet's Road will bring Chen Mo a lot of trouble.

She suddenly wondered how Chen Mo would deal with this situation.

"How did the previous prophets pass the test?" Chen Mo asked Shuiling's curious expression.

"Flee, hide, avoid."

Shui Ling sorted out his remarks before introducing it again.

"In the past test of the prophet, the prophet used his own ability to foresee danger, then hide his position, change course, and will not head head-on with the opponent. Because in terms of number and combat power, our side will not be dominant, as long as the time is specified. Reaching the Prophet within is a victory. However, the fake team will be selected to fight head-on with the opponent and delay time."

"I thought I would solve them at the end. Listening to you, I changed my mind."

"What do you mean?" Shuiling asked suspiciously.

"Stop and wait for them." Chen Mo said lightly.

"Yes." Ku Yao saluted.

The spacecraft stopped and floated in space, with no idea of moving on.

what? stop?

Shuiling could hardly believe her ears.

What does Chen Mo want to do? Do you want to go head-to-head with the Chikai Warhead?

She became nervous.

The Chihai Warhead is not an ordinary elite warhead. It is one of the nine major warheads in the endless sea. Although its combat effectiveness is low, it is not comparable to the general warhead.

"On the path of the prophet, are all warriors fighting against each other?" Chen Mo continued to ask.

"Yes, you can't use war machines and thermal weapons. They are all soldiers fighting in close combat. After all, they are a family and generally avoid death. Therefore, they are tacitly and will not attack the opponent's brain unless the conflict between the two parties is serious." Said: "I personally don't recommend you head to head with them."

In the warhead participating in the besieged war, each team has a million soldiers, but they only have 10,000 here.

It is really troublesome if they can't use heat weapons. Even if they are strong, the Red Sea War Department can delay their time and prevent them from reaching the Prophet within the coronation time.

"It's not bad." Chen Mo nodded and looked at Ku Yao: "I have not heard it. I can't attack the opponent's brain and stay alive."

"Understand." Ku Yao said with a solemn expression.

Hearing this command, Shuiling's face became stiff.

Chen Mo actually issued this order.

She suddenly found that everyone on the spacecraft was not nervous except for herself, and they were all guarding their posts. She didn't even see a trace of tension in the group of guards.

The clown turned out to be himself.

Shuiling smiled bitterly.

Chen Mo glanced at her and said, "I am different from the previous prophets. The endless sea has been locked in the territory for too long, and the bloodliness of many people has weakened. This is not a good thing during the chaotic period of the cosmic war. This test happens to happen, since In the live broadcast, let the people of Endless Sea watch the battle scenes and stimulate their bloodliness and blood once."

Shuiling opened her mouth and stared at Chen Mo blankly, not knowing how to speak.

The man was sitting there with a calm voice, but with unparalleled dominance. Chen Mo has always felt very easy-going and calm for her.

Now let her see the other side.

Killing all the way and hitting the prophet star means that they have to face ten warheads, nearly ten million soldiers.

Take one enemy a thousand.

How powerful is this?

Chen Mo wants to take a road that no previous prophet has ever walked.

The Chi Hai War Department appeared.

The battleship is displayed in space.

A murderous air filled the spaceship, and even Shuiling couldn't help stagnating the suppressed breath. Under her attention, Ku Yao led many guards from the spacecraft and into space.

The battle armor was cold and murderous.

chapters.title: Chapter 1104: :Fighting
chapters.body:
Chapter 1104: :Fighting

The array on both sides is laid out.

The generals of the Chihai War Department obviously did not expect that the new prophet would use only 10,000 guards to fight them.

The warhead they rushed over had 300,000 soldiers, but the new prophet used 10,000 soldiers to fight them, one to thirty.

Does the other party want to surrender? Still want one enemy thirty?

The former is fine, if the latter is an insult to them. Soon, the other party told him with actual actions that this was an insult.

Chen Mo, Shuiling and others appeared outside the spaceship, standing on top of the spaceship, watching the array of both sides.

"kill."

Chen Mo lightly shouted.

"Kill!" All the guards shouted together.

The guards who had already entered the fighting state instantly disappeared in place, and when they reappeared, they were in the battle line of the Chihai Warhead.

The sudden attack was unexpected by the Chi Hai War Department.

Chen Mo stood on the spaceship like an old pine, staring coldly at the battlefield in space.

The guards are like wolves into the flock, and the weapons in their hands are harvested like sickles. At this moment, they are the most ruthless killing machines. All soldiers who are close to them lose their combat effectiveness.

Shenwei's heart was filled with anger. In their view, the **** king can be the leader of the endless sea, which is the glory of the endless sea, but now he has to be tested by the opponent.

Since the King of God ordered them, they would be defeated. If the King of God hadn't said that he couldn't kill them, they wouldn't mind killing all of these soldiers.

Every guard is working hard.

They are Chen Mo's guards, each guard is a carefully selected powerhouse, and their super power development is the most advanced technology of the marching ants. Each **** guard possesses more than three superpowers. They have gone through countless wars and have extremely rich combat experience. Dealing with these soldiers is very simple.

For them, these super-powerful and weak soldiers are just a little bit stronger than the lamb.

Besides, their armors are all customized super armors.

If you let go of your hands to fight, these soldiers without heat weapons can handle them all without a hundred men.

The **** king wants to stand up in this test, and all the **** guards are riveting enough to **** their opponents frantically. They are like red-eyed wolves. There is no sluggishness in the battle. They can solve the battle with one move and never use the second one.

The soldiers of the Chihai War Department were shocked by the sudden madness.

They feel that they are not facing a soldier, but a top superpower. The momentum makes them breathless. The teammates around them fall down like wheat. From beginning to end, they have no resistance. Room.

What kind of monster is this?

They have been baptized by many wars, so they can enter one of the nine wars of the endless sea. But compared with the crazy group of guards in front of them, they were weaker like babies.

Teleportation, space, object control, a variety of superpowers poured out in their hands, dazzled, and they couldn't even resist.

The new prophet, who stood calmly on the spaceship, didn't move a bit from beginning to end, just watching the one-sided war coldly. At this moment, they suddenly understood why the old prophet chose him as the new prophet of the endless sea.

"Capture the king." The leader of the Chihai War Department shouted in the team channel.

Almost at the same time, thousands of soldiers rushed towards the spacecraft where Chen Mo was located, using their fastest speed.

Their actions completely angered Kuyao.

Under the eyes of their guards, they still want to attack the king. Even if he knew that Chen Mo could easily handle these people, it would be an insult to their guards to let Wang take the action himself.

"Ku Shi, if the king moves a finger, you will go back to confinement for half a year." Ku Yao shouted angrily.

"understand."

The bitter stone that was called was clever, and after seriously wounding a soldier, his figure flashed and appeared not far in front of Chen Mo.

Then, Kushi raised his hand and grabbed it into the void.

"kill!"

Click!

Thousands of soldiers flying towards Chen Mo were all frozen in space and unable to move.

Ping!

In the next moment, the armor of thousands of soldiers shattered and floated in space.

The brains of these thousands of soldiers exploded, and the feeling of being pinched by the **** of death just now made them cold. If the opponent hadn't kept their hands, I'm afraid they are going to report to the **** of death.

Top superpower.

The general who led the war department over had a bitter face.

The new prophet is surrounded by top superpowers.

On the other side, the other guards did not stop, rushing into the array of the Chihai Warfare, with a ghostly figure, but extremely domineering, even the masters among them could not survive three moves.

Fear spread in the Chihai Warfare.

Every blow of the guards pierced their confidence, tore the record they were once proud of, and threw them into space to shatter.

The battle gradually subsided, and there were 300,000 soldiers of the Red Sea Warfare floating in space. No one died, but their bodies were more or less injured, and broken hands and feet were the lightest.

Their expressions are lost and their fighting spirit is absent.

They thought they were one of the soldiers of the Ninth Great War of Infinite Seas, in the hands of the opponent, it was like a baby with big swords, a complete joke.

"withdraw troops."

Chen Mo's calm voice appeared in the team channel.

Kuyao gave a solemn expression, and suddenly shouted, "Return the soldiers."

All the guards flew back quickly, listed a complete array in space, and entered the spacecraft in an orderly manner. The battle just now was like a minimum-intensity training for them.

From start to finish, less than five minutes.

The remaining battlefields will naturally be cleaned up, and those soldiers will also be rescued. All the guards returned to their positions like okay people.

The spacecraft set sail again.

...

Shuiling looked at the messy space battlefield with chills.

This war severely shattered the confidence of this group of soldiers, and she couldn't feel the will to fight in these soldiers.

For a soldier, loss of fighting spirit is no different from a war machine.

Before long, they will retire.

They are done.

No wonder she felt the threat of death in these guards, these guards are too dangerous. The ghostly figure, the domineering attack, all these are integrated, they are a group of death gods in the battlefield.

She was once proud of her strength, but now she realized that her strength was not worth mentioning.

How strong is the marching ant group?

"Will this be too cruel?" Shuiling asked.

"Is it ruthless?" Chen Mo said softly.

"Without months of training and recovery, they can't return to the battlefield, and some of them will never be able to go to the battlefield. For a soldier, not being able to go to the battlefield is a shame," Shui Ling said.

Physical injuries can be recovered as long as they don’t die, but psychological traumas can’t be repaired at all. The fighting spirit of these soldiers destroyed by Chen Mo depends on them to walk through.

"In the age of super power, endless sea has not participated in this cosmic war. I don't know the cruelty."

Times have changed.

The super power technology of the endless sea is not strong, and it has not been tempered by the cosmic war. It lags far behind several other god-level civilizations. The will to war has not been baptized by the god-level civilization war, and then continues to block the star field. At that time, it may not even beat the top civilization.

...

"This is the top super player, is this the super war club? No wonder." The old murloc sighed, a little lonely.

Endless Sea was in his hands for thousands of years, but the elite warhead that had been developed for thousands of years, in the hands of Chen Mo's guard, was so vulnerable that he was not lost.

The old prophet was more calm, and glanced at the old murloc: "The times have changed a long time ago. We block the star field and feel less intense. Maybe you are for the people of the endless sea to live in peace, but other civilizations will not be soft. Peace does not require bloodshed."

"I hope he can lead the endless sea to become stronger." The old murloc sighed.

"He is destined to be the chosen son of heaven." The old prophet's voice was peaceful and satisfied, at least he witnessed Chen Mo's growth.

The war was broadcast live.

The entire endless sea was shocked by this battle.

Take one to thirty.

The visual impact of this war was very shocking. In the era of rampant heat weapons, they rarely saw this kind of battle, and it was still a battle with super-combined armor.

They used to think that the new prophet would hide their whereabouts to complete the test like the previous prophets, but now they found that they were all wrong.

The new prophet has no power and is weak?

joke!

In the past, ordinary people were convinced of the new prophet because of the appointment of the old prophet. Now it has completely changed. It is this powerful strength that makes them change their minds.

Although the folk customs of the endless sea are not as sturdy as the outside world, it does not mean that they do not worship the strong.

In the battle that Shuiling defeated the Dark Dragon prince, he won the rising popularity and prestige of the people in the endless sea.

They lack the strong, so they worship the strong.

chapters.title: Chapter 1105: : The Great Battle
chapters.body:
Chapter 1105: : The Great Battle

"kill!"

The battle in space was fierce. This one-to-one battle, because of the perception of the number of people, gave people an illusion, and there seemed to be suspense.

However, in the hands of these new prophet guards, all were vulnerable.

But under the siege, it seemed extremely fierce to the outside world.

Seriously injured, or seriously injured.

Because Chen Mo ordered them to keep their hands, no soldiers died on the field, severely injured or severely injured, and even only half of the body was left. However, due to the tenacious vitality of high-level beings and the medical technology of god-level civilization, it was only necessary to The severely wounded soldiers are sent to the recuperation cabin, and it will not take long for their injuries to recover.

With a spear in hand, Kuyao is like a general in battle, his battle armor rushes from left to right in the array, and no one can play with his opponent for a round.

This figure is like an invincible God of War in space.

Dididi! !

An alarm came, followed by a report from a guard: "The opponent has a quantum stealth armor and is approaching the king."

"A small group of attention."

"Accepted."

Fighting not far from the spaceship also broke out, and the assassin's armored division that was discovered had no resistance in the hands of the gods.

In ten minutes, the movement in space ceased.

There are various seriously wounded soldiers floating.

"Receive the team."

Ku Yao took away the spear in his hand and quickly returned to the spacecraft, leaving behind a messy space battlefield.

...

"fighting!"

"set sail!"

"fighting!"

As the spacecraft set sail again and again, a space battlefield full of wounded was left behind.

Chen Mo didn't make any adjustments to the voyage. Their spacecraft has been in a straight line since its departure, without any diversion. It seems to be telling the warhead participating in the test that they are going all the way to the Prophet.

From beginning to end, the gods and guards looked solemn.

With faith in their hearts, the **** king will not fail. Their bitter race was rescued by the **** king from being enslaved by other races. The journey of the King of God is the journey of their bitter race.

It is their highest glory to be able to open up the star field for the king of the gods. For this kind of glory, they can be desperate, and they can destroy all the forces blocking the king of gods.

"Will this consume too much?" Shuiling glanced at the guard who had just ended the battle, worried.

She knew that the use of superpowers would consume a lot of energy in the life body. Generally, life would feel exhausted after using it a few times. It was the first time she saw it like Shenwei used it so frequently.

"It's okay, they can handle this intensity." Chen Mo said.

Fighting is a bit of consumption for the gods, but it is not. Besides, there are rests on the way, so there is no need to worry about their consumption. After such a long time, the gods and guards are like okay people.

This kind of fighting intensity is not comparable to their training intensity.

You know, the training intensity of the guards has always been the strongest among the warheads of the marching ants.

They don't even need to use super energy to destroy thermal weapons and warships, so there is no need to worry about their consumption. They also have special foods to relieve mental fatigue without worrying about side effects.

Their team, like an indestructible drill, nothing can stop in front.

With a scale of ten thousand people, there is no fear in the face of a warhead of millions, and the battle can be ended like cutting melons and vegetables.

At the end of the battle, there will be no stay.

Their destination is only one.

Prophet star.

...

The pressure on the four sea elephants of the endless seas and the ten large sea stars is particularly great.

The unreasonable fighting power of the new Prophet’s guards was almost devastated, and now they did not think of a good way to deal with it. Heat weapons cannot be used in this test. Under such conditions, soldiers with powerful and superpowers are almost invincible.

But this is their last chance.

Only by successfully blocking the coronation of the new prophet can they have the opportunity to compete for the position of the new prophet.

Grab the new prophet to be noticed by the old prophet and prove their abilities, and they have a greater chance of inheriting the position of the prophet.

I thought they could easily take down the prophet of unknown origin this time, but now they discovered that it was not as simple as they thought.

The deployment of the Path of the Prophet gradually changed.

Those warheads serving as ‘Testers’ are moving closer to the new prophet’s route to the Prophet Star, intending to stop them with all their strength.

In a short time, a large number of warheads were mobilized to go to the channel where the new prophet was.

There is almost no suspense between the forces of the two sides.

The four sea masters and the ten major generals, as well as several generals participating in the test of the Great War Department, are ready to forcefully drag down the ranks of the new prophets, and use their number advantage to consume the guards of the new prophet.

The outside world thinks that the new prophet is not so stupid and will definitely avoid the edge. When other defensive positions are empty, it is easy to get close to the Prophet.

To the surprise of the outside world, the new prophet did not intend to do so.

Rather, the speed did not decrease, and he still went straight to the Prophet, taking the channel where many soldiers gathered.

Fight, go forward!

The ten thousand guards of the new prophet are like tireless machines.

one day!

Two days!

Three days!

When the fifteen days passed, what was left to the outside world was the invincible back, other than that, it was terror.

The strength in the hands of the new prophet is terrifyingly strong.

Under short-term combat, no team can survive half an hour in the hands of these ten thousand guards. Three million soldiers in front of the 10,000 guards, like pieces of tofu, were defeated in one blow, and could not fight back.

In the history of the endless sea, there has never been such a fierce prophet. Similarly, the crazy and fierce battle has inspired the blood of countless young lives in the endless sea.

In their view, the prophets in the past were too gentle, did not fight for anything, and were not domineering enough. They needed a strong leader, especially during the space war.

This test of the path of the prophet is unprecedented in the history of the endless sea.

No prophet has ever been able to do this.

Whether it fails or succeeds, this journey of the prophet will be recorded in the annals of the endless sea.

The genetic inheritance of life, and the natural worship of the strong, even in the super power era with infinitely advanced technology, this is still the case, so powerful armored divisions will be so respected.

Through this live broadcast of the test of the path of the prophet, the prestige of the new prophet in the endless sea is accumulating.

From the beginning, I didn't think that I could pass the test, and now I have only half a month of admiration.

Especially within the military of the endless sea, many generals began to accept the new prophet.

The army is the most **** place, and it is also the place where the strongest is admired. The new prophet shows a strong and domineering attitude.

Now, the entire endless sea is waiting, as long as the new prophet successfully reaches the prophet star on the coronation day, he can be convinced.

Many people of the endless sea believe that the new prophet can take the endless sea to another height.

Soon, a piece of news came out.

The West Elephant Sea Lord and the Nine Big Sea Stars jointly sent a message to mobilize all the warheads participating in the test to gather outside the Prophet.

The decisive battle started there.

chapters.title: Chapter 1106: : Encounter
chapters.body:
Chapter 1106: : Encounter

The warheads of the Path of the Prophet are gathered, naturally everyone knows, and there is no intention to hide the new prophet.

The purpose of this round is obvious. Since you like to play, you should play enough at a time.

The four elephant sea masters and the nine starfishes knew that if they continued to add fuel to their tactics, they could only be defeated by the new prophet one by one. It would be better to unite at once. They were betting, because if Chen Mo didn't accept the move and diverted forward, they could not prevent the opponent from entering the Prophet Star. They bet the new Prophet would accept the move and head against them.

This is a decisive battle.

Both the Sea Lord of the Four Elephants and the Big Sea Star of the Nine Seas mobilized their participating warheads, and at the same time issued a joint call to the Ninth Great War Headquarters.

The Ninth Great War Department did not reject the call of the Four Elephant Sea Lords and the Nine Big Sea Stars.

They are the war department and only accept the command of the prophet and the war department commander. Unless there is an appointment document, they will listen to the order, otherwise they will not accept the orders of other outsiders, but this time they chose to accept the call.

Because they are the potential heirs of the endless sea, this test fails, and the next prophet will be born among them. And if they adjust, it will leave too much space in the path of the prophet, and the new prophet can change lanes and easily enter the prophet star, which is also good for the new prophet.

Regardless of the result, it is not harmful to the warhead participating in the test.

And they received the command from the upper commander to let them pass. They wanted to see the strongest combat effectiveness of the new prophet.

As long as it is passed this time, the prestige of the new prophet may surpass the predecessor, second only to the old prophet, he will be unsatisfied, and will be able to seamlessly take over the entire endless sea.

The war department no longer blocked the new prophet’s spacecraft, and all gathered outside the prophet star.

Most of the people of the endless sea are paying attention to this prophetic test.

...

In the holographic conference room, there are projections of the four sea lords and the nine big sea stars.

This is a round table meeting.

They are in a competitive relationship with each other, and they are usually the same. This is the first time they have met so neatly. There was only one factor that prompted them to meet, the mysterious new prophet.

"This time everyone knows that if we don't cooperate once, the position of the prophet is definitely not ours." It was a middle-aged seaman who spoke. He is the lord of the Eastern Elephant Sea, Shado, a talking shark-like man, his mouth is a bit fierce with sharp teeth, and his face is fierce.

The East Elephant Sea Lord is the top three in the foresight ability among a dozen heirs. His personal prestige is second only to the endless sea genius girl Shuiling. If a new prophet does not appear, he is one of the most powerful candidates to compete for the next prophet.

The sea lord of the East Elephant spoke, and the other people on the round table snorted coldly without retorting them, indicating acquiescence.

"Now that there are six million soldiers in the periphery, success or failure depends on this." Dongxiang Sea Master said.

"It is indeed in this move, but have you ever thought about that the mysterious prophet diverted to the prophet star?" asked a sea snake-like person covered with knots.

He is the West Elephant Sea Lord, Snake Man, among the Four Elephant Sea Lords, he is the most shrewd, with a feminine personality, but the most proficient in war command. He is a high-ranking general.

"You should all have foreseen that there will be a big battle outside the Prophet Star, and this battle is related to our future." Said the octopus of the Southern Elephant Sea Lord.

The octopus man Robert of the Southern Elephant Sea Lord is the one with the strongest predictive ability among the dozen heirs. His personality is very similar to that of his predecessor. He is relatively mild. At one time, he was considered a powerful competitor to the Prophet.

As soon as this was said, everyone on the round table was silent.

They all have the ability to predict, knowing that there will be a big battle, which is the decisive battle of this test.

But they can't predict the result, only feel that this result is related to their future destiny. They couldn't predict that man, the only explanation was that the man was more capable than them.

"Why does Shuiling follow that man?" asked a young man on the round table.

No one answered his question because they didn't know that Shuiling would do it. It can only be said that Shuiling knew of the existence of such a mysterious prophet heir and voluntarily gave up the right of inheritance.

"I hope everyone can cooperate sincerely this time. If there are any competitions and grievances, we will fight afterwards. If we fail this time, no matter how much we fight, it will be meaningless." said the eldest Beixiang Sea Master, in the field. , Beixiang Sea Lord has the most stable personality, and he is considered to be the big brother of many people on the field in terms of seniority.

There was no word in the roundtable meeting, and each other acquiesced in this cooperation.

"Choose one to command six million soldiers, otherwise it's not good to fight separately," a starfish said.

"Who to choose?"

This is a problem they must face.

There is no small difficulty in getting them to follow the commands of other competitors.

"We voted for a commander. Several of us listened to the command of this battle internally, but we couldn't make it public," said a starfish.

The other starfish nodded slightly.

...

"Six million troops gather around the Prophet Star!"

When the news spread, a tavern by the sea exploded, and the discussion was very noisy. This test of the future leader of the endless sea has reached the most intense stage, and the entire endless sea is paying attention.

The name ‘prophet’ continues their entire history of the endless sea. In the hearts of the people of the endless sea, that is the supreme leader.

In the past two months, the strength of the new prophet has been recognized by most of the people of the endless sea. In their view, the leader should be so domineering and invincible.

With such a strong leader, they don't have to worry about being bullied by other civilizations in this chaotic era. As before, the dark forest civilization attacked them, but chose a defensive stance that made major events smaller. In the eyes of the outside world, they were about to become a force that bullied the soft and feared the tough.

And this is the person appointed by the old prophet, and also the person who the previous prophet is willing to abdicate and let the virtuous. If there are other options, why didn't the two prophets choose others?

Endless Sea has hundreds of millions of years of history. What is the probability that the old prophet chooses the wrong person?

As for the Four Elephant Sea Lords and Ten Big Sea Stars, they did not see outstanding leadership qualities in them.

Compared with 10,000 guards, the new prophet who has a deep army alone, those who hold together and call on the military to gather together to resist the new prophet's other heirs are so inferior.

The two sides competed in such a way and settled the verdict.

As for the mysterious identity of the new prophet, this is not a problem. The old prophet and the previous prophet shared that, who else could be more orthodox and more qualified than him?

Among the successive prophets of the endless sea, not to mention the mystery of their identities, there are even examples of the illegitimate children of a nobleman, and examples of children becoming prophets.

The new prophet only needs to be appointed by the old prophet and then pass the test of the prophet.

What ordinary people worry about is the final battle here.

"It's grandma, I've never seen such a shameless fish." A murloc who was drinking could not help cursing.

"No, six million. Killing a sea pig can't be killed so fast, and it's not a dead hand." The murloc beside him couldn't help but vomit, and there were bubbles from time to time.

"Six million besieged ten thousand, the four elephant sea masters really have a face."

Many murlocs are scolding the Four Elephant Sea Lords and the Nine Big Sea Stars as shameless, calling on six million soldiers to besiege the new prophet who has only 10,000 guards.

One enemy six hundred, everyone is an elite, and even some of them are masters.

It was almost impossible to win it before.

Now after the rise of super power, this kind of possibility exists, but which super power can bear such high intensity use of super power?

"You said, will the new prophet choose to head to head with them?"

When this question appeared, there was a brief silence in the tavern, and then someone answered.

"If you head-to-head, can you win?"

Suddenly, it became quieter, and some murlocs were breathing quickly.

This question is crazy.

...

"Diversion, this is an opportunity." When Shuiling heard the gathering, she looked surprised.

This is a rare opportunity to enter the Prophet Star. As long as they don't face the opponent head-on, they don't need to spend too much energy to successfully enter the Prophet Star.

But these words did not get Chen Mo's approval.

"Why change the route?" Chen Mo asked lightly.

"They gathered their forces on one side, and the other quadrants of the Prophet Star are not obstructed. We only need to change our course and don't have to spend any effort to fight them. Enter the Prophet Star and we will win." Shuiling said anxiously. Right now is a good opportunity. She knows the rules for the coronation of a new prophet. She only needs to enter the prophet star without specifying who to defeat.

And on their channel, there are six million soldiers waiting for them to pass. She knows that Chen Mo's guards are very strong, and they are all super masters, but using super powers at such a high intensity to fight them one enemy six hundred will definitely be choking.

With Chen Mo's current prestige among the people, it is enough for him to become the leader of the endless sea, without the need to defeat the sea lord of the four elephants and the nine big sea stars.

In terms of momentum and courage, what Chen Mo has realized now is not comparable to other heirs of Endless Sea. In Shuiling's eyes, the final battle was dispensable, and they didn't need to take risks.

Fortunately, if they win, their efforts will be wasted.

"No need." Chen Mo shook his head: "Do you know why the old prophet chose me to inherit the endless sea?"

"Didn't the ancestors say that you are his student?" Shuiling said subconsciously.

"Not all, the old prophet's mission failed, and now this mission has to be fulfilled by me. The old prophet's layout for hundreds of millions of years to create an endless sea is part of this mission."

Shui Ling was dumbfounded.

...

For the next eight days, their spacecraft did not encounter any obstacles, and drove at the speed of light all the way to the prophet star.

As the two sides got closer, the new prophet did not intend to change his course, and pointed directly to the area where the war department gathered.

The new prophet is really ready to fight over.

After this news appeared, it caused a tsunami-like uproar in the endless sea.

This situation also chose to fight over, which is crazy.

One to six hundred, the advantage of quantity can almost conceal the elite of quality.

The people who originally believed that the new prophet would be crowned sighed.

Some pessimists have spread the result that the new prophet will lose, and he can be crowned successfully by changing his course, but the new prophet chooses to head-on. This is stupid, and the new prophet will be defeated under his pride.

The closer the distance between the two parties, the more pessimistic.

Finally, the two sides met in space.

chapters.title: Chapter 1107: : Who Will Survive For Whom?
chapters.body:
Chapter 1107: : Who Will Survive For Whom?

"You said can the new prophet win this battle?"

Bai Hai will look at the holographic light curtain. Next to him is a general in black armor. The two are the two top generals in the endless sea, the white general and the black general.

As the two highest commanders of the endless sea, they themselves are friends. The new prophet appears without warning, and they are naturally curious.

"The new prophet is not a stupid person, he should have a hole card, otherwise he would not dare to play like this." The Black Sea will say firmly.

"Ten thousand to six million, it's choking." Bai Hai shook his head.

"Do you want the new prophet to win or lose?" Black Sea will suddenly ask.

As soon as these words came out, there was a brief silence between the two.

"To be honest, I hope he can win." Bai Hai will think for a long time and replied: "The space war has reached the most tense stage. Our endless sea is still blocked here, almost isolated from the world. I have not experienced the baptism of a new era war. In the future, the war department will face other forces and cause big troubles."

"Does this have anything to do with the new prophet?" Black Sea will hold his hand and rub his black fish scales.

The White Sea will glance at the Black Sea and say: "Don’t pretend, you should know that the style of the new prophet is very strong and domineering, absolutely different from the ancient prophet. At that time, the style of the endless sea will change, absolutely. Our place."

They have been studying the style of the new prophet for more than twenty days.

The strength of the new prophet on the road of trial made them shine. They are the stars, the most combatable characters, but the endless sea is sealed off, and they cannot participate in the space war.

Now everything seems to have changed.

"I don't know if it is a blessing or a curse." The Black Sea general said.

"You would say this too?" Bai Hai would sneer and mock without hesitation.

Heihai will be his competitor and friend, and the two can say that they know each other very well. The style of the Black Sea general is different from him. He is a completely madman, full of cruel and evil nature. Although in terms of tactics, he dare to say that he is slightly better than half, but the two really fight, he is also afraid of the Black Sea general.

This guy used to kill Xing's method before.

In peacetime, some small forces made small moves at the border of the star field to harass the endless sea, and then the black sea slaughtered the star. The one million light-year-old star field was slaughtered and cleaned by this guy, and all the planets of life turned into scorched earth, making the surrounding forces afraid.

In a place with relatively mild folk customs like Endless Sea, someone once opposed the appointment of such a crazy general. However, he was completely rejected by the Prophet, and instead let him be the commander of the Black Sea War Department.

The Black Sea will ignore the sneer of the White Sea general: "You said, what is the origin of the new prophet? I have never heard of such a number one, and the Black Sharks have never heard of such a terrifying super guard. ."

"This is a bit interesting, and it may not be the heir secretly cultivated by the old prophet and the ancient prophet."

"If the new prophet has advanced superpower methods and can build superpower warheads, then it will be interesting." Black Sea will lick his lips, with a crazy look in his eyes.

"Maybe, it might be true." Bai Haijiang said.

...

As the distance between the two parties got closer and closer, the spacecraft began to slow down, but did not intend to stop, and moved on.

Under the attention of countless eyes, the spacecraft entered the pocket star field laid down by the successor of the Prophet and the Ninth Great War Department and stopped.

This action caused an uproar in the lives watching the live broadcast, and they were suddenly disappointed.

The new prophet knew that this was a deadly trap, but still wanted to break in, indicating that this was a reckless man. The new prophet can completely detour and enter the prophet star range from other quadrants, but now he chooses the most stupid way to enter.

Ten thousand to six million, when thermal weapons cannot be used, this is already a qualitative change caused by a quantitative change.

Six hundred soldiers standing to let you chop, it takes a lot of effort, not to mention that this is the elite of the various war departments. Wheel warfare and brainless chaos can trample the opponent to death in chaos.

The new prophet will definitely lose.

A pity of emotions emerged in the hearts of the people of endless sea.

Once the new prophet is defeated, the successor of the prophet will compete again. At that time, a new prophet will be selected from the four sea masters and ten large sea stars. However, the competition at that time may lead to endless chaos.

Because the Four Elephant Sea Lords and the top ten generals did not have absolute strength and confidence to defeat the joint efforts of a dozen other successors.

Originally thought that the new prophet of Endless Sea was a strong, courageous and wise master, now it seems that it is nothing more than that.

The beings who were originally convinced by the new prophet sighed in their hearts.

...

Neither party saw any action.

After a long time, two light clusters lit up on the periphery, which were nuclear fusion bombs for lighting. The two light clusters become bright lights in the dark space, and the fleet in space can be clearly seen.

Actions began to appear on the Four Elephant Sea Lord's side, and the battleships started up and lined up in space, enclosing the spacecraft of the new prophet.

They have a certainty of victory in this battle.

The opponent's ability of 10,000 enemies and 500,000, shows that the super power is very powerful, but no matter how strong the super power is, there are times when they are exhausted. Under the crowd tactics, they have a lot of wins.

They all knew that the prestige of the new prophet had been accumulated along the way, so they were murderous this time.

If the new prophet does not die, none of them will have the prestige that surpasses the new prophet, and they will be weaker than the new prophet, and many people of the endless sea will not obey them.

"The fish has entered the encirclement." Xixiang Sea Master Sheman smiled coldly.

During the voting, he was pushed out to command the siege temporarily because he was a senior general. Their number of soldiers is 600 times that of the opponent, even if they are fools, there is no suspense in this kind of battle.

"Next, do we have to consider whether we are competing for the position of prophet." The Eastern Elephant Sea Master smiled lightly.

"It's too early to be happy, I have a dangerous hunch." Robert the octopus man, the master of the southern elephant sea said solemnly.

His foresight ability is the strongest among the heirs, but now he has a very strong sense of danger. As long as one step is wrong, it will be an abyss. He still cannot predict the result of this test.

"Robert is right, I also have a sense of danger." The Northern Elephant Sea Master did not dare to relax, this sense of danger was very clear.

"I have that too."

"me too."

"..."

A few big sea stars all speak.

This feeling is definitely not accidental.

Their ability to predict, help them avoid many dangers, and things that are related to their own safety, they never make mistakes.

"Strange, no reason." Sheman frowned and said, "We have obviously surrounded him."

"The only reason now is that he has the means to deal with this kind of scene." Beixiang Sea Master said.

"Does he have a heat weapon?" a starfish asked.

"Impossible. The radar shows that there are no destructive thermal weapons. If he uses thermal weapons on the path of the prophet, the old prophet and the Ninth Great War Department can tear him to pieces without us."

Now that the lone army is deep and trapped in their encirclement, it can still give them such a big sense of crisis, even if they are opponents, they have to admire.

As the confrontation time passed, the atmosphere on the scene became more and more tense. Every soldier felt the pressure, and the new prophet showed too terrifying combat power in the previous test. If he loses this battle with more enemies and fewer enemies, it will be ashamed.

"Prepare to attack, make quick decisions, so as not to change." Sheman gave instructions to the warships.

Give an order, the hatches of thousands of warships are opened, a famous soldier enters space, and the array is opened.

In front of the live screen, all the discussions disappeared, and all the people of the endless sea stared at the light curtain with bated breath, for fear of missing any detail.

When the door of the new prophet's spacecraft opened, seeing this scene of life made his heart tense.

To start.

The next moment, the pupils of all beings shrank.

On the live light curtain, they saw three figures appearing.

Against the backdrop of space and spacecraft, these three figures are pitifully small, but all lives cannot be ignored.

When they appear, they are the focal point of the entire space battlefield.

No armor, but strolling in space.

The new prophet and his maid, there is also a familiar figure they are familiar with, one of the ten large sea stars, the genius girl Shuiling loved by the people of the endless sea.

This is the heir whom the old prophet and the previous prophet fancy. He looks like a very ordinary murloc, and they can't even see the shining point in the new prophet.

However, it was just such an ordinary young prophet who broke through the warhead of the Prophet's Road, and Shuiling followed him as a waitress.

When seeing the new prophet standing on the top of the spacecraft, the whole space can feel a tense atmosphere.

His guards with strong combat effectiveness did not appear, only a maid and Shuiling.

Does the new prophet want to surrender?

A ridiculous idea emerged in the hearts of all lives.

...

Chen Mo looked around the array in space.

Six million soldiers are not crowded in space, they are very powerful. Worthy of being an elite warhead of Endless Sea, if you change another life, you will definitely choose to surrender.

But Chen Mo is no one else.

At his feet is a huge spaceship, he is motionless in space, and his calm eyes never fluctuate.

"You are very good." Chen Mo said calmly.

Strangely, Chen Mo spoke in space, but his voice appeared in the ears of every soldier on the field.

All the soldiers on the field suddenly felt a sense of terror.

It was the first time they heard voices in space, not the sound of headset communication.

Is this the superpower of the prophet?

Almost all soldiers have this guess.

"Pretend to be a ghost." Sheman's sneer sounded on the public screen.

Immediately afterwards, the Sea Lord of the Four Elephants and the Nine Big Stars appeared from the battleship, standing in space facing Chen Mo in the air, all the successors of the endless sea appeared.

"Surrender, give yourself a way to survive." Dongxiang Sea Master said coldly.

With six million soldiers in hand, he was not afraid, obviously, everything was a foregone conclusion.
