As soon as his words fell, his body suddenly tightened.

He could feel that this mysterious guy was watching him across space, as if he were a bug, being scrutinized by the other party.

"Who will survive for whom?"

Chen Mo's cold voice came into the ears of all lives on the field again, with contempt and indifference.

chapters.title: Chapter 1108: : Do You Have This Ability?
chapters.body:
Chapter 1108: : Do You Have This Ability?

Chen Mo's voice was icy with a hint of sarcasm and contempt.

Falling in the ears of many beings on the field, like a basin of ice water pouring from their heads. The eagerness of the people who originally believed that the new prophet had lost the decision instantly cooled down.

The new prophet's contempt for them made them feel like a clown standing in space.

The four sea lords and the nine big sea stars all have gloomy faces.

They occupy such a great advantage and are even ridiculed by others. In the endless sea, they are in high positions, and what they hear most is flattery. They have never received such contempt.

They frowned and were extremely upset, but this was not the time to speak. When they grasped each other, let him see the reality clearly.

"What you think is powerful, has its appearance." Chen Mo said coldly.

A simple sentence is extremely harsh and uncomfortable. In addition to the new prophet's contempt for them, there is also that hegemony and strength.

"I want to see how good you are and how big you are." The Eastern Elephant Sea Master waved his hand.

The next moment, the two soldiers behind him flashed and appeared behind Chen Mo, with a pulsed laser dagger flashing in their hands, pointing directly at Chen Mo's heart.

Click!

The imaginary battle did not happen.

The two superpowers who attacked were frozen behind Chen Mo, and the assassination movement froze like an ice sculpture. Under the gaze of everyone, the two superpowers slowly moved in front of Chen Mo.

The strange scene makes people chill.

They still don't know how the new prophet subdued the two superpowers.

The next moment, Mo Nuv moved her palm, and the two sneak attackers screamed and struggled in space, like drowning fish. It's just that his voice cannot be heard, but his movements can be seen, and he fainted before long, letting him float and fly away in space.

The sea lord of the East Elephant sank and waved his hand.

"kill."

A team broke away from space and attacked Chen Mo at the fastest speed, faster than a cannonball, and cast a long trail in space.

Eastern Elephant Marine.

This is the guard group of the East Elephant Sea Lord, and the strongest force of the East Elephant Sea Lord's subordinates. Every soldier released here will not be weaker than the soldiers of the Ninth Sea War Department.

The leader is the ghost shark, Shaku, this is the strongest master of the East Elephant Sea, the style is extremely fierce.

call!

Shaku speeded up, and the two sides were thousands of miles apart, but they approached in the blink of an eye.

He still didn't mean to slow down, he just wanted the new prophet to fly into the air and make him make a fool of all the people of the endless sea, then the spirit he accumulated during this time would be exhausted.

If the other party's 10,000 guards were there, he would really not dare to rush over so recklessly, but the new prophet entrusted him to come out by himself, and it was almost dead.

Shuiling frowned slightly, and when Shaku appeared, she couldn't notice the danger.

Shaku is very strong, but this one beside her is a monster.

What she cares about is the 100,000 soldiers behind Shaku.

The gods can't come out, these 100,000 soldiers are a threat to them. Once a hundred thousand soldiers approached Chen Mo, no one could say that there was an accident in the chaos.

But thinking that Chen Mo had taken the white star civilization's nest, she was quite stable. If you don't have a bit of strength and dare to go to the lair of the White Star Civilization, it is no different from looking for death. No matter how strong it is, it will be useless in front of Chen Mo.

What she was curious about now was how Chen Mo would deal with these 100,000 soldiers without the guards.

...

The onlookers stared at the projection, their eyes burning, unconsciously tense.

Once the new prophet falls into a heavy siege, it is a real disaster. Originally, the new prophet was entrusted and surrounded by a lone army. Now it is even more unwise to come out by himself.

They can be sure that once Shaku succeeds in getting close to the spacecraft and causing chaos, the Sixiang Sea Master will launch an attack without hesitation and command all six million soldiers to besiege.

At that time, even if the 10,000 guards appeared, it would be of no avail, two fists were hard to beat four hands, not to mention the strength of the four elephant sea lord was six hundred times that of the new prophet.

In the siege of six million soldiers, no matter how strong it is, there will be trouble.

...

Chen Mo was calm as usual. The 100,000 soldiers rushing over did not cause any fluctuations in his emotions. He ignored the 100,000 soldiers like a judge.

Now one hundred thousand soldiers, in his eyes, is not much different from ten ants.

He raised his hand, and an invisible wave spread, covering the entire space. This movement is very small, looks very slow, and makes people feel pleasing to the eye, and all kinds of feelings are absurd.

Superpower?

Seeing this scene of life, all subconsciously think of a possibility.

But then he was a bit disdainful, can the super deal with 100,000 soldiers at the same time? They have never seen such a powerful super power.

However, the four elephant sea lord and nine sea star who saw this scene changed their faces, and a sense of extreme danger emerged from their minds, spreading to the limbs and hundreds of skeletons, and their bodies became cold.

What superpower is it?

They foresee a sense of danger of death, which is very clear and absolutely not wrong. Although their prophet superpower is not as strong as the prophet, it is also at the top level in the endless sea, facing the threat of their own death, it is impossible to go wrong.

But this kind of superpower, they have never seen it.

The superpower of the new prophet, not the superpower of the prophet?

During their doubts, an incredible scene was staged in space.

A hundred thousand soldiers flying towards Chen Mo at high speed, like hitting an iron plate, instantly freezes, like nails in space, extremely fast to freeze, the speed change with great visual impact makes onlookers feel the heart is Knocked hard, almost vomiting blood, very uncomfortable.

Ahhhhh...

The screams of 100,000 soldiers spread through the Legion Channel.

The stern voice fell into the ears of six million soldiers, and the listeners were all discolored, and their bodies trembled.

The high-powered action of Shunbu can be used by many advanced armored divisions, but it is in the case of preparation, and now without preparation, quite the body hits the iron plate at a very fast speed, even if their God-level life, strong body, but also choking.

At this time, the soldiers under the battle armor vomited blue blood, and their internal organs were injured. The degree is different, the remaining few who can act are all shy and lose their fighting spirit.

One hundred thousand soldiers, unable to fight anymore, just floated in space.

This result made the onlookers chill and shocked.

What superpower is the new prophet, making one hundred thousand soldiers hit the wall at the same time.

"go to hell."

Shaku activated the armor again, and a momentary step appeared not far in front of Chen Mo.

However, without waiting for him to act, his body floats uncontrollably in space. Suddenly, a feeling of pain spreads into his body and reaches the brain nerves.

Ahhh...

Shaku appeared to be hung in space, his hands and feet struggling, and his mouth made a tragic scream, as if he had been subjected to inhuman torture. This kind of scream makes people feel a sense of fear involuntarily.

He struggled in space for a minute, and finally his hands and feet stiffened and stopped moving.

If it hadn't been for the life system of the battle armor to show that he was still alive, I am afraid that many soldiers on the field would think he was dead.

...

The world is deadly silent, except for the soundless space, and the public communication channel of the War Department.

Six million soldiers, no one spoke. They are all like ducks with their throats strangled, and they can't make a sound. They looked at the figure in the distant space and stood calmly like an okay person.

In a daze, they seemed to understand why the old and ancient prophets would choose him. They feel that only this kind of leader can they stand on the top of the universe.

In this special era, the new prophet may be related to their endless future.

Now this scene is being broadcast live in the endless star domain, and even other cosmic forces are paying attention. I thought that the new prophet would be defeated because of his arrogance, but the situation in front of them surprised them.

They looked at Chen Mo in shock like this, still a little unbelievable about what happened just now.

A sound from the ear awakened them.

"Do you have this ability? Who else thinks I am not suitable to be a prophet?"

Chen Mo's voice was flat and without any emotions. He scanned the space as if patrolling a colony of insects, with a cold expression.

This posture makes people feel an involuntary surrender.

This is the aura of the superiors, even if they are separated by a space, they still feel the pressure without facing each other.

Especially the four elephant sea lord and the nine sea star, their prophetic ability is stronger than others, and the feeling is the clearest, like a huge rock pressing on their hearts.

They wanted to defeat the new prophet completely in full view, and build momentum for them to compete for the position of the prophet in the future, but they did not want to become a stepping stone for the new prophet.

Their hearts sink.

After today, in the endless sea, the prestige of the new prophet will surpass the predecessor. This is almost a solid matter, unless he dies here.

"We haven't lost yet, we still have six million troops." Dongxiang Sea Master shouted on the public channel.

Loudly, the depressed sea masters and starfish dazzled, and their eyes slowly returned to light.

Yup.

They still have six million troops.

No matter how strong the life is, can he deal with six million soldiers at the same time? What if he has powerful superpowers?

With non-thermal weapons, one person can deal with six million soldiers?

Foolish dreams.

Before they could do anything, a burst of pressure spread out in space.

The pressure is getting stronger and stronger, the momentum is as real as the empty space, but it makes them feel like they are on the ocean floor, their bodies are being squeezed crazily.

This momentum has not stopped, and the pressure is getting stronger.

Six million soldiers in space began to realize that they could not move. They can only stay in place, looking at the figure on the spaceship through the armor.

The body of the new prophet was separated from the spaceship and floated in space, with a faint fluorescent light on his body. As his aura climbed, his light was bright. They seem to be under the gravitational force of a dwarf planet, their bodies are extremely heavy, and they are difficult to move.

What made them even more frightened was that unknown alarms appeared on the equipment of the armor.

Oh oh...

The alarm is a bit quicker, and the pressure on them increases a bit.

Six million people all changed.

They felt that the pressure seemed to never end.

chapters.title: Chapter 1109: : Liwei
chapters.body:
Chapter 1109: : Liwei

At this time, no one on the court could remain calm, all looking at the figure in space in shock.

Even the Sea Lord of the Four Elephants and the Sea Star of the Nine Stars were shocked.

They felt this way for the first time.

When they faced the ancient prophets, the restraint came from the superior temperament and his own aura, but there would be no pressure. Now some people turn this invisible aura into pressure.

What superpower is this?

This is beyond their understanding.

"What superpower is this?"

Countless people looked up at the figure in space. The audience before the live broadcast could not feel the momentum, but seeing this figure, there was an unconscious sense of devotion, a sense of devotion from the depths of genes, as if this was not a life. It's a belief.

Everything seemed static.

The battleship in space began to disintegrate, not by tearing or destruction, but by dismantling. The parts were intact and loosened at a speed visible to the naked eye, like ink falling into hot water.

The scene is very strange.

The pressure of horror, like a boulder pressing on them.

Soon, the six million soldiers discovered that their armor began to lose control, and then disintegrated in space, one by one scattered, all without warning.

Despair is permeating, and the touching strings are out of control like an avalanche.

Without the armor, they seemed helpless in space, and they couldn't move, so they could only float in space, and it would be useless to struggle.

Until now, they don't know what superpower the new prophet is and why it has such a wide range of effects.

Shuiling was also stunned by this scene.

She knew Chen Mo was powerful, but she knew how terrifying she was when she saw it.

No wonder he dared to enter the Lair of the White Star Civilization alone, take away the lair of others, and let the White Star Civilization disintegrate. At the same time, he had no idea of the power of the top superpower, and now she realized it.

No wonder the era of superpowers has arrived, and the Black Eye Civilization and the White Star Civilization are very jealous of the marching ants, and now she knows why the two are so jealous of the marching ant groups.

Under special super powers, the battle armor appears vulnerable.

She suddenly remembered the battle with Bai Xing Civilization in Gulu Hongqiao when the Super War Department just appeared.

She was a little suspicious now that those 10,000 guards could also handle the six million soldiers, only to establish the prestige of the leader, he chose to end himself.

This is showing muscles.

One person crushes six million people.

This is the top super player.

...

The terrifying picture should not stop.

All the scattered parts of the warship converge in the direction of Chen Mo, and they are transformed into molecules under the feet of the new prophet, and slowly accumulate like 3D printing.

Everyone who saw this scene was suppressed.

Under their gaze, the material under the feet of the new prophet accumulates more and more, and a super-giant warship appears in silhouette.

All this has not stopped.

With the accumulation of parts and components, the size of battleships is getting bigger and bigger.

Now they are in horror and awe, nothing else.

The battleship is still getting bigger, five hundred meters, one thousand meters, five kilometers, ten thousand meters...

The final shape.

They seemed to see a scene in a dream, without any machines or tools, using super power to build a super large battleship in such a short time.

There is no sound in the space at this time.

They stared blankly at the battleship floating in space, unable to describe the shock of their hearts in words. Use super power to create a super giant battleship out of thin air, this is the god.

That lonely figure appeared insignificant on the super giant battleship, but it became the center of the world.

They intuitively feel that they are so small.

time!

Chen Mo spread his five fingers and twisted slightly in the void, as if to twist the bearing of time.

An inexplicable breath and sense of terror enveloped this space.

Strange waves invade the body of every life, and they seem to be in a long river of time. Their skin began to loosen, their physical strength declined, and everything around them seemed to be dull and dull. They were like dust struggling in the ocean, and they could not break free if they resisted.

They grew old at a speed visible to the naked eye.

Fear, panic, and awe fill everyone's heart.

Not only the scene, but the audience in front of the live broadcast light curtain showed horror and awe. This superpower was too terrifying, as if the life and time in their body were taken away, they could not resist.

The faces of the Four Elephant Sea Master and the Nine Big Sea Stars were ashamed, their faces no longer have any fighting spirit.

They thought of the war of the Sauron Alliance, they thought of the disintegration of the White Star Civilization, the top superpower, can destroy a star on their own.

This is time super power.

The most mysterious time superpower in the legend.

Under the long river of time, everything is as small as dust. They feel that they are ridiculous and naive, their so-called siege and trap, their so-called strength and self-confidence, before the new prophet, is a joke, a complete joke.

They became the background of the new prophet and the first target of Liwei.

"I'm not reconciled."

The sea lord of the Eastern Elephant floated decadently in space, laughing crazily, and finally flew to Chen Mo desperately, like a moth fighting a fire.

Facing this kind of begging for death, Chen Mo ignored it, but the Mo girl next to him stepped forward and nodded a finger into the void. The space in space is like a stone falling on the surface of a dead lake, ripples in space spread. I saw that the armor of the Eastern Elephant Sea Lord also disintegrated in space. He was imprisoned in space and could no longer enter.

He was left alone struggling in space, laughing wildly, almost crazy.

He is the most ambitious one among the heirs of Endless Sea, and his overall strength is also considered the strongest. He has waited for thousands of years to become a prophet, and he wants to become the leader of a god-level civilization.

Now everything is gone.

He was not even better than a maid of the new prophet. He didn't even have a chance to fight the opponent. From beginning to end, the new prophet didn't look at him directly.

The Eastern Elephant Sea Lord floated in space, no longer moving, just staring blankly at the starry sky in front of him, his eyes gray.

Several other heirs are like mourning concubines.

Their self-confidence was blown beyond recognition, and they were convinced by this result.

They never thought that super power can reach such a powerful point.

It is the first time that Chen Mo has used time superpower on such a large scale. This is considered the first time super power show, and it is also the first time that he has used the power of atomic level in this way.

In terms of destructive power, time superpower is not amazing, but its impact on the soul is not weaker than other superpowers.

This ability to take away the opponent's time invisibly is completely unsolvable.

"Who else is not convinced?" Chen Mo stopped on the super giant battleship, his voice penetrated the space of space and fell into everyone's ears.

At this moment, all soldiers have their heads down.

In front of the superpowers who control time, all their obstacles are a joke.

At the same time, their hearts began to become fanatical. The new prophet taking office means that their endless sea will usher in a super strong leader as a leader, who has control of time superpower that has never been seen before.

...

This battle made the endless sea intuitively feel the arrival of the super power era. Controlling six million soldiers by oneself is an unprecedented achievement.

After experiencing the initial shock, the people of the endless sea fell into crazy cheers.

In their endless sea, a strong man who surpassed the planet-level superpower came out.

This life is still their leader.

At present, there are only a handful of people in the universe who have become superpowers above the planet level by their own strength.

The slayed Purple Emperor, the veteran powerhouse Chief White Star, known as the strongest person in the universe, Tongqing, and Chen Mo, the lord of the marching ants who destroyed the Sauron Alliance and the White Star civilization on his own.

Now there is one more powerhouse, the new prophet of their endless sea, who has the most special time superpower.

For a long time, the strength of the endless sea in the seven god-level civilizations is the inverse, and now they seem to be able to see their endless sea become stronger.

The new prophet must have a way to advance superpowers, so they will have such strength at such a young age. Once this method is promoted, their endless sea will be the second to master the power of the super warhead after the marching ants.

They are about to witness the crowning of the strongest prophet ever in the endless sea.

The prestige of the new prophet now truly surpasses the predecessor and is almost close to the old prophet. The old prophet ignores world affairs, in the endless sea, the prestige of lifelessness can surpass the new prophet.

The endless sea, which was originally calm, set off a feverish storm.

chapters.title: Chapter 1110: : In The Name Of The Prophet Of The Endless Sea Race
chapters.body:
Chapter 1110: : In The Name Of The Prophet Of The Endless Sea Race

Chen Mo breathed a sigh of relief when he arrived at the Prophet.

The test of the path of the prophet didn't come as a big surprise, and this was what he expected. He has reached a higher level now, this test is nothing to him.

The reason why he is marching in such a high profile is to establish his prestige.

He needs to control the endless sea with the fastest speed, so that he can do what he can.

Now is the best ending.

He already knew what happened next.

Now, apart from the prophet and Shuiling, no one knows his true identity. He thought of this step as early as when he obeyed the old prophet's arrangement and took over the endless sea, so he deliberately concealed his identity.

For the current situation of the universe, this is a king bomb.

When used properly, nothing is impossible.

"It's started." Mo Nu whispered in Chen Mo's ear.

The coronation ceremony began.

On the huge square, there was a dense crowd of people standing, like ants, when they saw Chen Mo's speeding car appear, cheers rang through the sky. The crowd is surging, and you can see the pious and worshipful look on their faces.

For cultural reasons, the carpet is blue, and the life of the endless sea likes blue. On both sides of the blue carpet, sea flowers were placed, and the flowers breathed out a slight mist, and the fragrance was extremely delicate.

Then came the nobles and powerful figures of the endless sea, large and small, in large numbers, standing on both sides to welcome the coronation of the new prophet.

Ten thousand guards stood on the steps on both sides of the high platform, extending to the top.

This is the highest ritual of the endless sea, and also the most sacred ritual.

Chen Mo stood in the car and saw the surrounding scenes, feeling very emotional.

He has never cared about any rituals, but the scene in front of him is really exciting. No wonder everyone likes power. With great power, he has the ambition to command the world.

Ascending to the high platform and receiving the fishbone gun and seal, which represent the supreme power of the Prophet of the Endless Sea, from the hands of the godly believer, Chen Mo felt that the responsibility in his heart was heavy.

From this moment on, he was the leader of the endless sea.

"Say a few words."

The godly believer smiled at Chen Mo and immediately retreated, leaving the center of the high platform to him.

Chen Mo raised the gray-white fishbone gun, took a step forward, and glanced at the endless sea people under the high platform: "I will guard this star field in the name of the endless sea clan prophet, the endless sea clan, immortal."

"The prophet is immortal!"

"The prophet is immortal!"

"..."

I don't know who yelled a word, and crazy cheers and shouts erupted from the field, and there was a lot of joy.

...

In the Crystal Palace in the depths of the Sea of Taboo, the old prophet smiled relievedly when Chen Mo took the oath.

"I can finally rest assured."

After speaking, the old prophet slowly stood up and staggered towards the outside.

"Teacher, what are you?"

When the old murloc saw this scene, his jaw almost fell.

He knows that the teacher seldom leaves the Crystal Palace, at least in his reign for several thousand years, he has not seen the teacher leave the Crystal Palace, but now he is leaving.

"My business is over, it's time to enjoy my old age." The old prophet smiled extremely relaxedly.

"Teacher, where are you going?"

"When I am old, I have only a few decades of life left. I look at the endless sea and find a quiet planet for the elderly, grow flowers, raise pets, and enjoy life."

The old prophet staggered out of the Crystal Palace, and the old murloc hurriedly followed.

The moment the door was closed, the empty Crystal Palace seemed to end in a sad era.

...

"The main problem you face now is the management team." Shuiling reminded Chen Mo.

Successfully taking over as the prophet of the endless sea means that the endless sea will be under Chen Mo's control in the future, but there is still a process in it to take over the endless sea.

This requires Chen Mo to appoint the main officials of endless sea to form his own management team.

"Become a prophet, and you will automatically become the most senior leader of the endless sea. You need to take over the power of the military and appoint a maritime chief at the same time." Shui Ling said: "The chief maritime officer is the second person in the endless sea. ."

"The choice of the chief maritime officer is a problem," Chen Mo muttered.

This position is quite the position of Zhao Min in the marching ant group.

But he did not have the right person to manage, which is a big problem.

The endless sea is a god-level civilization, with a vast star field, and ordinary managers may not be able to manage the endless sea. It is impossible for him to find people from the earth to come here to manage. The time of one manager here is fifty years, and the people on the earth don't understand the situation of the endless sea, and if they manage it rashly, problems will arise.

The best choice is the life inside the endless sea.

"Can't you change the line?" Chen Mo asked.

"It's mainly up to you, but I believe that the current team's work is absolutely not in line with the style you want. The current group of people are more or less at odds with the noble family." Shui Ling said.

The current endless sea management team are relatively gentle people, which is related to the style of the former prophet.

Her teacher, the former prophet, has a relatively mild personality. When he took office, there were not too many wars and contradictions in the universe. Today's universe environment is different, and Chen Mo's own personality is also different.

"Are there any suitable candidates to recommend to me?" Chen Mo asked.

"There is one, but I don't know if it's suitable." Shuiling hesitated and said: "A middle-aged man, he has excellent management skills, but for some reason, he cannot be reused."

"How do you say?" Chen Mo asked curiously.

"His original family is also considered a little nobleman in Endless Sea. He is considered the leader of that family. After graduating from the academy, he became the administrator of a galaxy. Because of his outstanding performance and rapid promotion, he became a superstar within a thousand years. The administrator of the galaxy cluster. But because he offended people and was suppressed, his family drove him out of the house in order to save him, his position was gone, and he became an ordinary life."

"So dramatic? Do you still have such a thing in Endless Sea?" Chen Mo was immediately happy.

"Where there are murlocs, there are rivers and seas. The endless sea is as big as the endless sea. Some things are inevitable, and some things, the teacher will not interfere too much." Shuiling sighed.

"What is special about him?"

"His political management is excellent. If he is the descendant of the old nobleman, I am afraid that he has entered the core management team now. He is a pragmatist and does not deal with the family aristocrats of the endless sea. He should have a very bright future, but Later it touched the interests of a large family and was suppressed."

"You won't give him a chance?"

"Our fourteen heirs, the Four Elephant Sea Lords and Ten Big Sea Stars, cannot participate in politics before they are in power, but they can identify candidates and form a brain-tank team in advance. I have thought that when competing with the prophets, my team will definitely He has a place, so I have been investigating him secretly. But now, I don't need it anymore," Shuiling said.

"Then take me to see him." Chen Mo said.

For the huge endless sea, there are countless lives and countless geniuses, and the novel has not dared to write that way, and it will be a sensation by then.

But if the other party really has this ability, Chen Mo doesn't mind using him.

"His name is Hesu," Shuiling said.

chapters.title: Chapter 1111: : Before The War
chapters.body:
Chapter 1111: : Before The War

He Su crossed out the news, shut down the virtual reality network, got up and left the house.

The new prophet has succeeded to the throne, but he doesn't know how the endless sea will go in the future.

But this has little to do with him.

He Su laughed at himself.

He is now just one of the countless ordinary lives in the endless sea, for the endless sea, he is dispensable. Although suppressed, he still has no problem solving his own life with his ability.

There were a few old people playing chess by the park. He Su thought about it and swam over.

He Su simply sat on a chess table next to him, quietly watching the two old men play chess.

"Brother, I have nothing to do. Are you interested in a game of chess?" A young man with ordinary looks took two girls and sat down on another stool on the chess table.

Traveling with two beauties, this is a rare lineup.

Hesu couldn't help but glanced at the young man, and he smiled at him, and he nodded.

"can."

The chessboard starts, and a three-dimensional chessboard emerges. This is a holographic chessboard with a style similar to three-dimensional Go. It has more rules and more points than Go, and has twenty-four lines in both horizontal and vertical widths, and the difficulty is also geometric multiples.

On the huge holographic chessboard, there are horizontal and vertical lines.

"You first." Chen Mo gestured with his hand.

Hesu takes the blue first, and Chen Mo is the red.

"Brother, have you paid attention to the news of the Prophet's succession?" Chen Mo lowered his hand and asked casually.

"Of course I pay attention to such important news."

"It feels like the endless sea is going to change. What do you think the new prophet must do to make the endless sea become stronger?"

"You mean military or political?"

"Is there a difference?"

"Yes, I don't know much about military use, so I don't have the qualifications to comment, but political science, I personally have some research, when I graduated, I learned political science." He Su said.

"Then talk about politics. I have talked with some friends, but I haven't heard the opinions of professionals."

"If you want the endless sea to become stronger, you must first take back the power in the hands of the family and nobles and drive them out of the political system." He Su said.

"Why? You have enemies with those family nobles?" Chen Mo asked casually while playing chess.

Hesu's expression remained unchanged. After thinking about it, he played a game of chess and said: "I used to have a little conflict with the nobleman, but I now say that this is not a personal vengeance."

"How to say?"

"The White Star Civilization is ruined? Why?" He Su asked back.

"The old chief and Mrs. Fox are missing?"

"This is just one of the reasons. They are missing. The White Star civilization is at most a group of dragons without a leader, a huge god-level civilization. It is impossible for this to become what it is now. They could choose a new leader.

However, the clan headed by the Xiao clan conflicted with the old Hu Bingxin tribe, and they could not be elected. However, the family aristocracy had too much power. In this troubled time, naturally, they were no longer willing to be led by others.

The intricately intertwined old interest groups are one of the reasons that hinder development. Just look at the other companies.

Marching ants are rising stars. They are not involved in such complicated family relationship interests. They are born without this trouble, so they are full of vitality.

After the Black Eye Civilization came to power in the Tong Qing Bi Palace, it shuffled the cards internally, abolished the Black Eye Council, and slowly recovered the power and privileges from the family aristocrats, centralized power in their own hands, and became a family.

The old and new Thor civilizations alternated. After the Thunder came to power, they did not completely get rid of this constraint. Therefore, the development has been a bit slow over the years, and even the Thousand Star Empire dared to challenge them.

The most ruthless Ziwei civilization, Zi Junzhi sacrificed his life’s reputation, introduced Zidi to Ziwei star, and completed the massacre and cleansing overnight. The old family and the core of the nobility were all killed, and then he gave power to his students and let himself The students of the students staged a great righteous killing of relatives, and then took charge of a crape myrtle civilization after cutting off the dead branches and rotten leaves. "

The mouth of Hesu was full of water. At the end, he turned into a sigh, and then continued to play chess.

"That said, these family nobles are really serious."

"It's more than serious. The old civilization has been passed down to this day. Some families have existed for hundreds of millions of years, even hundreds of millions of years. They involve many interests. Although the endless sea is peaceful, it is no exception. Throughout the history of the development of life civilization in the universe, many kings of the country, They often find reasons to start with some high-ranking officials, why? Because of their existence, they may be stretched to the new ruler's rule and prestige, and may even be rebellious."

When it comes to politics, He Su talks endlessly. He cares about it, but he can't do anything.

He is even suppressed now, and no matter how much he says, he is just talking about it.

When he managed the galaxy at the beginning, he was just to get rid of the interference of those family aristocrats in their galaxy, so he offended those old-fashioned families and caused him to stop his career.

"The other god-level civilizations all have methods to clean up the family nobles. If it is our endless sea, how should we clean up?" Chen Mo continued to ask.

"Unless you are going to suffer a serious injury like crape myrtle or black pupil, it can't be solved in a short time. But at this time, we can't afford endless sea injuries. We can only cook frogs in warm water."

"How to cook? What policy?"

"This thing is very complicated, we ordinary people, don't understand the situation, it's useless at all, and it's not in the right place." He Su laughed.

"What if in its place?"

Chen Mo's face changed, changing into the look of the Prophet of Endless Sea. The faces of Mo Nu and Shuiling next to them all began to change.

He Su was stunned, and his hand just about to play froze in midair.

...

On the main hall of the prophet star, full of stars sits.

These are all high-level general stars at the core of Endless Sea.

In addition to the commander-in-chief and deputy generals of the Ninth Military Headquarters, there are also generals in charge of other elite warheads.

In accordance with past practice, the succession of a new prophet is often when the old ministry changes blood, but the military will not.

These generals all relied on their military merits to get to where they are today step by step. He can use the current stars he believes to be talented, and there is no possibility of a major replacement.

"Next I want to announce one thing." Chen Mo glanced at the field and said: "The endless sea will start the journey and join the ranks of the universe war for hegemony."

As soon as this remark came out, there was a commotion among all the stars on the field.

I guessed that the succession of the new prophet would change, but I didn't expect it so soon.

There are a few general stars eager to try, they can all feel the atmosphere on the field is different, but they did not speak, looking forward to the new prophet.

"The first goal, dark forest civilization."

call!

As soon as he said this, there was a heavy breathing in the conference hall.

Finally waited until this day.

They have long been unhappy with the dark forest civilization, which is a historical grudge.

The dark forest civilization is next to them, but will often provoke them, and it has a long history. The group of wild beasts would make some noise from time to time, and then came to find their faults, and the grievance between the two parties became deeper and deeper.

When the Dark Dragon prince came here to provoke him, he was assassinated on the way back after he was assassinated on the way back, and the two started a small-scale local war and confrontation.

In the end, there was no big trouble, and the ancient prophets at that time let them bear it.

The armed confrontation continued until the dark forest split.

They wanted to teach them a lesson when the dark forest was weak, but after the cosmic war broke out, the endless sea blocked the star field and did not participate in the cosmic war, so they stopped.

Now that the new prophet succeeds to the throne, the first goal is the dark forest, and the old and new hatreds are counted together.

The outside world has said that the endless sea is not bloody, and they are also very suffocated as the endless sea's military. Now this breath, there is no need to hold back.

Chen Mo looked around for a week and was somewhat satisfied with their reaction. No matter what period, soldiers must be bloody. The impression of endless sea is peaceful. This is a misunderstanding of the outside world.

The competitive environment of the sea-like tribe is not worse than that of other places, it is only the influence of the prophet's policy.

"Next, we need to make some appropriate wartime adjustments to the war department. The original warhead of Endless Sea has been changed to wartime organization, and the war headquarters will be opened. General White Sea, you will be the commander-in-chief of the wartime operation department, and the Black Sea general With General Zihai, you serve as the deputy commander in chief, and the others maintain the original post of commander in chief of the war department.

The general headquarters governs the Ninth Great War Department and the Three Thousand Army Corps. You jointly select the stars to form the General Staff Corps to command operations against the dark forest civilization. Do you have any other questions? Or any suggestions for arrangements? "

"I'm fine." Black Sea will speak.

"I'm fine." Zi Haijun said solemnly.

According to the current arrangement, his position is considered a higher level.

The White Sea General and the Black Sea will be the top generals. He is still so close to the top generals, but he is younger than the other two. If he can experience the baptism of war, he may not lose to them in the future.

The other star looked at each other, and there was no big problem.

Bai Hai will be the big brother of many generals. He is a veteran general and a top general. He has a calm style and is the best candidate to be the commander in chief. Heihai general has a radical style, and he is also a veteran top general, and it is no problem to serve as deputy commander. Zihai general has outstanding tactical talents, dare to fight and fight, and has the potential of top generals, and there is no big problem.

The Prophet made such an arrangement, and they would naturally have no opinion.

"There is a question." Bai Hai will speak, attracting the eyes of the entire conference room, only to see him smile, his eyes flashing: "I just want to ask, when will the war begin?"

"Three months later."

chapters.title: Chapter 1112: : The Situation Changes
chapters.body:
Chapter 1112: : The Situation Changes

The black pupil civilization is stronger than before, and it can be said that there are many talents.

The only thing in the universe that can be compared with them is the marching ant group.

In these years of cosmic wars, the black-eye civilization has fought everywhere, absorbed many forces, and conquered many civilizations. The star field of the black-eye civilization is now the largest in the universe.

But with such a good situation in Black Eye Civilization, Yan was not at all happy.

After the White Star civilization split, the marching ants were almost their last opponent to dominate the universe. The forces of the marching ant group are getting stronger and stronger, making him feel like a knuckle in his throat, especially the super warhead of the marching ants.

Until now, they have not succeeded in replicating the super armor, so if confronted head-on, the threat of the marching ant group will be extremely great.

Originally a marching ant was enough for them to have a headache, but now there is an endless sea.

The whole universe is paying attention to the test of the new prophet of the endless sea.

That test would pass for ordinary lives with blood and excitement, but for their superiors, too much can be seen.

The guard team of the new prophet is a super warhead, it is very likely to be super war armor, and they also master a variety of super powers.

Another master of super armor.

Those who really understand the Super Armor are all troubled by its power.

This is an era stronger technology than the current ordinary armor.

He thought of many ways, but so far, there is no better way to deal with the Super War Department.

The existence of the Super War Department can capture a space fort with very little force and cost. From these years, the combat effectiveness of the marching ant group has been known.

They have studied that what the Super War Department enhances is the range of super powers, not the strength of super powers.

The opponents cannot control the super powers of the same level, but the trouble is that they can destroy battleships and battle armors. In the space station, there are no warships and battle armors, just like a lone boat without power floating in the sea and being slaughtered.

They thought of using super powers to resist the destruction on the opposite side, but the space war was too wide, and they even had very few planet-level super powers.

The marching ants entered the white star universe to take away the nest of the white star civilization, and after killing the old chief of the white star, they realized the crisis of terror. Speaker Hitomi has been asking researchers to look for ways to enhance superpowers by all means.

Fortunately, Chen Mo fell into the black hole and disappeared, and the marching ants did not see any major movements for the time being.

But now I didn't expect that before the success of Tongqing, a new prophet appeared in the endless sea.

He thought that endless sea would ignore world affairs, but when he saw the test of the path of the prophet, he knew that endless sea was about to join the war.

The new prophet's supremacy means that the endless sea has changed its brain and thinking.

The test process of this new prophet was full of aggressiveness and domineering. He has only seen this domineering in a few people.

Zidi, Tongqing, Chen Mo, these people are all overlord-level figures, even if it is a weaker Dan, it was necessary for Tongqing to use risky means to kill.

Over the years, the marching ant group has continued to grow stronger, and he can still remain calm. Because Chen Mo is missing, the marching ants always lack a pillar and dare not expand arbitrarily, otherwise they can use means to divide the marching ants and let them disintegrate from the inside.

But when the new Prophet of Endless Sea appeared, he was not calm.

Endless Sea has the ability to predict the future. It is absolutely extraordinary to change the leader at critical moments. Moreover, this leader is full of offensiveness and strength. He has mastered the super armor technology and possesses a variety of top superpowers.

No matter how you look at it, he is a hegemonic figure comparable to Chen Mo, and he will definitely become their strong enemy in the future.

Yan's eyes fell on the holographic star chart.

Dark forest star field.

If the new prophet of Endless Sea takes action, the first choice is undoubtedly the Dark Forest.

As a top general, Yan is still very clear about some basic situations and contradictions between forces.

The endless sea and the dark forest have historical grievances. They have always had conflicts and rivalries. They once calculated that the death of the dark dragon prince was used to provoke the contradiction between the dark forest and the endless sea, causing the two sides to break out of war and form consumption.

Let the dark forest find out that they are provoking and pressure the black pupil civilization, and let Tongqing rise to the top with the chaos of the black pupil civilization.

But the two were not in the game, so Shi Ganxing planned to use military forces to kill Dan. It caused dissatisfaction between Thor Civilization and White Star Civilization, and attacked them together.

Sure enough, there was chaos within the black pupil civilization, and pupil green went to the top smoothly.

Endless Sea has been at peace for a long time, and starting a war rashly will definitely arouse some opposition, but this kind of resistance is absolutely the smallest when starting a dark forest, and it will attract the support of countless people of Endless Sea.

The two brothers in the Dark Forest are fighting against the marching ants with all their strength, and they are still competing with each other, and they certainly can't resist another overlord's back attack.

The competitive environment of the ocean is not weaker than the competitive environment of the forest. Once the aggressiveness of the endless marine marine race is activated, it is definitely a big trouble.

When the endless sea destroys the dark forest, it will be another force comparable to the marching ants.

How to do?

Yan had a headache.

Didi!

Suddenly, a holographic video popped up in the light curtain in front of him.

Seeing the figure appeared, Yan looked happy.

The speaker came out.

...

Hitomi Green appeared, was promoted to a constant star super power, and mastered multiple super powers at the same time.

This news spread from the black pupil civilization, spreading across the entire universe like a space storm, and shocked by many forces.

Constant-star superpower means that super power can cover the range of a star system. This ability is equivalent to a warhead per person.

At the same time, it is also reflected from the side that the black pupil civilization is likely to master the technology that allows soldiers to quickly upgrade their super powers, and it is very likely that there will be another force that controls the super warhead.

Since the crape myrtle civilization weakened, the black pupil civilization has always been the strongest god-level civilization in the universe, and this attitude continued until the super warhead of the marching ant group appeared. Today, Hitomi is once again appearing in a high posture, and at the same time it is possible to master the technology to promote super power, the voice of the strongest black pupil civilization is once again noisy.

Confessing that the old chief Bai Xing was killed by Chen Mo, Tong Qing mysteriously disappeared. It was rumored that he was enhancing his superpower and even searching for the secret of life in the fourth dimension.

In five years, he has never shown up.

Now appearing in a stronger posture, this has to make the outside world suspect that this is a signal.

...

The land of martial arts.

The three leaders of Emperor Wu, Emperor Yu, and Emperor Wei looked at the star map with painful expressions. In addition, on their desk, there was an agreement with the logo of the Thousand Star Empire on the cover.

After a long time, it turned into a sigh, surrounding the hall.

"Is there no other choice?" Yudi's voice was dull.

"This is the best result." When Emperor Wu said these words, he seemed a bit old. Over the years, he had already lost his ambition to be promoted to a god-level civilization. The reality is too cruel.

Because Wuxian civilization was suppressed by the White Star Civilization and Giant Civilization at the time, it almost reached the point of difficulty.

Later, the White Star Civilization split, and they thought they could take a sigh of relief. As a result, the Xiao Clan took half of the White Star Civilization's star field and power to form an alliance with the Black Eye Civilization. After that, Wuxian Civilization was jointly pressured by Xiao Clan and Black Eye Civilization, in order to let them be pawns and besiege the marching ant group.

In order to live better, Wuxian Land would rather fight against Xiao Clan and Black Eye civilization than provoke marching ants.

They have been in contact with the marching ants, the only force in the universe that has super-powered armor, and the black pupil civilization dare not head against it. They go, and it is no different from looking for death.

After years of war, the Wuxian Land has been consumed to an extremely serious level.

So they must not find a way out.

"Contact the two of the Thousand Star Empire." Emperor Wu opened the agreement in front of him.

"Hey!" Wei Di sighed and was silent.

...

"These three Wuxian emperors are still very knowledgeable about current affairs." Wan Tianxing received the agreement and smiled softly.

"In this era, those who don't know the current affairs are all dead." The poisonous girl said lightly.

"That's right, do you want to announce this news?" Wan Tianxing asked.

"Of course." Poison Skin Woman said: "The news of Super Battle Armor has also been announced, telling the cosmic forces that now is the stage of the universe and we are one of the overlords."

"Okay, Jie Jie Jie Jie Jie..." Wan Tian Xing let out a happy laugh.

At that time, he accepted the suggestion of the Poisonous Woman, and the Thousand Star Alliance joined forces with Chaos Land to form the Thousand Star Empire. They became a first-rate power from a second-rate power, and then successfully resisted the Thor civilization. These years of chaos and battle, their power has become more and more powerful. Come bigger.

Today, the Thousand Star Empire has long surpassed the glory of the previous Thousand Star Empire and become one of the overlords of the universe.

The girl with the poisonous skin said to him that they might not be able to compete for hegemony in the universe.

Now, they have accepted the land of Martial Immortals and successfully researched the Super Battle Armor. Their territory and strength have improved to a higher level. It is already a matter of surpassing Thor's civilization.

The poisonous girl looked at Wan Tianxing with a smile and said: "Can't be too happy too early. Now Marching Ants, Black Eyes, and Endless Sea all master the Super War Department. Needless to say, Marching Ants are the strongest at present, those old-style civilizations, The strength should not be underestimated, the big battle is coming."

"A decisive battle?" Wan Tianxing murmured, an unprecedented possibility appeared in his heart.

The next day.

The two leaders of the Thousand Star Empire jointly announced the news that Wuxian Land joined the Thousand Star Empire and announced that the Thousand Star Empire had successfully mastered the super armor technology.

For a while, the forces of the universe were in an uproar.

chapters.title: Chapter 1113: : Crusade Against The Dark Forest
chapters.body:
Chapter 1113: : Crusade Against The Dark Forest

After three months of taking over the arrangement and personnel transfer, endless sea was officially controlled by Chen Mo.

In the general headquarters of the endless sea, all the stars and managers gather together. This is the first time that the new prophet has convened a meeting between the military and administrative core leaders.

This is the largest high-level meeting in the endless sea in nearly ten thousand years.

Everyone on the field is a powerful figure in the endless sea, who can shake the starry sky by stomping their feet.

The former prophet didn't like disputes, so except for the regular meeting once every ten years, there was almost no large-scale high-level convening at other times, and all high-level officials in both military and political circles were not anxious.

The new prophet has only been in power for a few months, and it has convened such a large-scale meeting, and the core high-level officials have known some news in advance.

There was no sound in the meeting room.

They were waiting for the prophet to speak.

Chen Mo swept the high level of endless sea sitting on the court, and said flatly: "This time, you should have heard some wind in advance."

coming!

All the endless sea high-level leaders were suddenly shocked and straightened up.

"We are about to conquer the dark forest star field."

As soon as these words came out, the generals of the endless navy were okay. Three months ago, when the prophet took office, he told them about the crusade against the endless sea. The people who are surprised are the top executives in charge.

They knew that the endless sea might make big moves, but they didn't expect to conquer the dark forest star field.

After a brief silence, the meeting room suddenly exploded.

There are excitement, calmness, worries, surprises, and different moods, but judging from their facial expressions, more people agree. Their old grudges between the endless sea and the dark forest have always been there. They have been bullied until they are angry, and now they finally have a chance.

After the noise, the conference room fell into dead silence again. Chen Mo is the new prophet. At this time, they dare not question the prophet's decision, otherwise it would be asking for trouble.

"At the same time, I will tell you a good news. Our endless sea also masters the super armor technology. This time the conquest of the dark forest star field, a super war department will be formed."

When Chen Mo said this, the entire conference room exploded.

Not only the top executives, but also the top military.

Before, they all suspected that the Prophet’s guard was equipped with super-powered armor, but they did not confirm it. Now the news is confirmed from the Prophet, and they are not happy.

The most feared thing in war is technological backwardness. The history of the development of cosmic civilization has already explained that a generation of technological backwardness means being crushed.

Before, they were worried that the marching ants, the black eyes, and the Thousand Star Empire mastered the super-power armor technology, which would pose too much of a threat to their future, and now they too.

This surprise came too suddenly.

Even the commander-in-chief White Sea General and Black Sea General were astonished at it and turned into ecstasy.

They are top generals, and they know what this technology means.

"I have arranged all the crusades against the dark forest. The White Sea will be the commander-in-chief, and the Black Sea and the Purple Navy will be the deputy commanders. They will command the warhead of the endless sea. The endless sea has entered a state of war. All administrative departments and logistics, In the future, we must be prepared for wartime. I don’t want any logistical problems during the war."

Chen Mo's voice was cold, but with supreme majesty, which made the entire conference hall feel a pressure. The senior management of endless sea was secretly surprised and did not dare to disobey.

He Su, who had just served as the chief maritime officer, had a more serious expression. He knew what it meant. He was promoted by Chen Mo. Naturally, he did not dare to neglect Chen Mo's orders.

Isolated from the world for many years, they replenish their energy, and as long as they don't go to waste, they will not have much problem with their endless sea attack on the divided dark forest.

Endless Sea declared war on the dark forest without warning.

As soon as the news came out, the whole endless sea boiled.

Bai Hai will not disappoint Chen Mo. In the next second after the declaration of war, he will not give the Dark Forest time to react, and will move his army into the Dark Forest Star Region.

The Ninth Great War Department, the Three Thousand Legions, and countless armoured regiments, divided into three armies, attacked the dark forest star field.

Bai Hai will take advantage of the contradiction between the two brothers in the Dark Forest, instead of choosing two simultaneous attacks, but attacking Dinan Miro in the Black Forest first.

Because Dinanye joined forces with the White Star Civilization to attack the marching ants. Since the split of the White Star, he has been a deadly enemy of the marching ants. They have been defeated by the marching ants. Therefore, they chose the relatively peaceful Dinan Miro first. It is impossible to support each other.

The dark forest star field nowadays is no longer as powerful as it used to be, and their endless sea will not give up such a good opportunity.

The people of the endless sea were first astonished at this war, and finally turned into a carnival. They endured the dark forest as a bad neighbor for too long. For tens of millions of years, they had been contradictory. The arrogant and defiant faces of the dark forest beasts had long been unaccustomed to them.

In the past, the prophets always chose to forbear, but they didn't want to. As soon as the new prophet came to power, he declared war on the dark forest.

This is a proud war.

For a time, countless people from Endless Sea signed up to join the army.

This is the endless sea of peace. In tens of millions of years, the greatest enthusiasm for joining the army, the warlikeness of the people of the endless sea, who has always been gentle, surprised Chen Mo. This situation shocked the surrounding forces.

This is like a blowout effect that has been held back for too long.

Endless Sea has officially joined the chaos of space war, and the forces of the universe are looking at it.

...

Black pupil civilization.

Hitomi's temperament has a lot of convergence, and it doesn't seem as oppressive as before.

In the small conference room, there were only a few high-level generals and think tanks, such as Tongqing, Yan, and the Red Army. They all looked bad.

One big event is rapidly changing the situation of the universe, and the speed of change is very fast.

"What do you think of the endless sea and the Thousand Star Empire?" Tong Qing asked.

Several people looked at each other.

Yan pondered a little, and said, "Unexpectedly, it is not a small trouble for us."

The others nodded.

It is indeed a lot of trouble.

The two announced that they have super armor technology, which is big news. Stronger than them, these years have only touched the threshold of super armor technology, and they must use other means to enhance their individual capabilities.

According to technical progress, their black pupil civilization does not have much advantage over the two, let alone marching ants.

"After the Endless Sea has dealt with the Dark Forest, it will definitely deal with the Black Forest. The two are very exhausted, and there are marching ants nearby. It is almost certain that they will not escape the attack of the Endless Sea. After all, the Endless Sea also controls the super armor technology. "Chi Jun interjected.

"It is really a headache for the two companies to master the super armor technology, but it is at this time." Tong Qing said with a sigh.

At this time, Yan interjected again: "The new prophet of Endless Sea, I am afraid, should not be underestimated. When he grows up, he is definitely not weaker than Chen Mo's existence. Moreover, his origin is mysterious. Before he appeared, we didn't even have any of the other party. Information, we can see how high the degree of confidentiality of the endless sea. It is said that the prophets of the endless sea can predict the future. Maybe they have foreseen the situation up to now, so they will change the leader and change the strategy at this time."

Tong Qing agreed with Yan's words.

The super power of the endless sea has always been the most mysterious existence among the several god-level civilizations, and has been closed for a long time, and their understanding of the endless sea is not as deep as the others.

"We should think now, if the endless sea swallows the Dark Forest Star Territory, what plans will it have next? And the Thousand Star Empire, will they die with Thor Civilization in the next step." Red Army said.

Tongqing and Yan glanced at each other, both lost in thought.

After a long time, Yan said: "If the endless sea captures the dark forest star field, they will border us, marching ants, the Thousand Star Empire, the Ziwei civilization, the Thor civilization, and the original white star field. Only then will they choose which one they choose. One.

The marching ants are the strongest, and they have not contradicted the endless sea over the years. Strictly speaking, the two sides still have friendship, and the possibility of fighting first is unlikely. There is a certain possibility to deal with us, and there is also the Thousand Star Empire, this newly emerging power also has a great threat. The Ziwei civilization does not have a super warhead, and may withdraw from the battle for hegemony in the future. Thor civilization also has a lot of trouble. We can use this time to strengthen ourselves first. "

"How do we fight?" Hitomi asked.

Yan thought for a long time and said: "Ziwei civilization, Baixing civilization can be both. Now the Baixing civilization is the weakest and it is not enough to prove it. Let the Xiao clan deal with them, and we deal with the Ziwei civilization."

chapters.title: Chapter 1114: : Tell You A Top Secret Message
chapters.body:
Chapter 1114: : Tell You A Top Secret Message

Hu Bingxin was a little lost, emotionally and not very well.

The White Star civilization has reached a very critical moment.

With the support of the Black Pupil Civilization, the Xiao Clan is counterattacking the old part of the White Star Civilization, and Gou Xuan cannot resist the joint attack of the two.

The Xiao Clan is too familiar with the White Star Civilization, and under the long-planned betrayal of the Xiao Clan, many talents and technologies in the White Star Civilization were taken away by them, and many resources were destroyed.

Now Goxuan is fighting alone, and it is difficult to support it alone, but the Xiao clan is strong and strong.

Without the core, the old part of the White Star Civilization was also emotionally disoriented.

In recent years, the marching ants, the Black Eye Civilization, the Xiao Clan, and the Dark Forest have all been dividing the White Star Domain. If this continues, I am afraid that the White Star Civilization will be destroyed.

Hu Bingxin is currently under house arrest on the earth, and it is impossible for her to contact the outside world. From the outside world, she is now dead in the eyes of the outside world.

How to do?

Hu Bingxin looked at the information in a hurry.

Suddenly, seeing Xiao Yu coming in, Hu Bingxin's face receded and returned to his indifferent appearance.

This Chen Mo's woman looks ordinary and nothing special, but she is always so calm, like her man. What surprised her even more was that this woman possessed incredible abilities and actually locked her superpowers.

No matter how powerful she is, she is locked in super power, and she doesn't have a battle armor. In this territory, she can only stay quiet.

"How are you thinking about it?" Xiao Yu asked.

Hu Bingxin looked at her straightforwardly: "I still have the same conditions."

Xiao Yu looked at her flatly and shook his head: "That condition is impossible. You don't need to tell me those truths. If you drag on, there will be no chance for Baixing Civilization."

Hu Bingxin was silent, drinking tea to herself: "It's still too stiff."

"He doesn't lack women, and I don't stick to any morals, but I will not allow a woman who has no emotions and is all for profit to stay with us. He does not lack interests, and hegemonic power is not so for him. Important." Xiao Yu said.

These days, Hu Bingxin has the same conditions every time. She has to stay with Chen Mo and become Chen Mo's woman before choosing to subdue the old part of the Baixing Civilization.

She knew the thoughts of this Fox Bingxin, and hoped to be by Chen Mo's side, and then to fight for more benefits for the White Star Civilization. Even if the old part of the White Star Civilization was merged into the Marching Ant, the White Star Civilization would still have the opportunity to enter the core of the Marching Ant.

She didn't want this kind of unnecessary internal faction struggle for power in the army ants.

Seeing that Hu Bingxin didn't speak, Xiao Yu continued: "I can see that your mind is restless. You should be aware of the current situation. The White Star Civilization will either be destroyed or the fire will remain."

Hu Bingxin, who was holding the tea cup, shook his hand, his pupils shrank, but the surface remained calm.

Xiao Yu took a deep look at her: "Also, let me tell you a top secret message."

"what?"

Hu Bingxin squinted. She didn't think Xiao Yu would tell her the top secret news about the marching ants so easily. What she thought was what kind of conspiracy Xiao Yu had, and what news she wanted to use to persuade her to surrender.

"The new prophet of Endless Sea is Chen Mo." Xiao Yu said lightly.

"Impossible." Hu Bingxin exclaimed.

As soon as she spoke, she calmed down.

In Chen Mo, nothing seems impossible. She suddenly understood why Chen Mo was clearly alive, but the marching ants had not announced these times, and they were still in the endless sea.

The Alliance of Sauron and the White Star Civilization were all put together. Who said that the endless sea could not be put together?

Moreover, there is no need to do anything, just quietly control the old prophet and the previous prophet, and then go to power smoothly.

"You think about it."

Xiao Yu stopped speaking, turned and left the room.

...

Zi Yun put the information on the desk and rubbed her eyebrows.

"Black Eye Civilization has done it to us." Fatty Luo frowned, with a little worry.

The war has been so long and the consumption is extremely serious.

Their crape myrtle civilization has not yet developed a super armor, which is very troublesome. The reason why their disadvantages are not obvious in recent years is because the marching ant group has not attacked them, and the black pupil civilization has not yet mastered the super armor.

Now in a short period of time, the three powers have successively announced the mastery of super armor technology, which is very passive to the powers with backward technology.

This means that Ziwei civilization is about to leave the category of super first-line forces.

Over the years, the black-eye civilization has marching ants watching, and has not dared to move too much, but now it is finally done.

Their super power armor technology and super power development technology progress is not fast, and the current Ziwei civilization is indeed weaker than the black pupil.

"Can you handle it?" Zi Yun asked.

"It can be dealt with in a short time. After all, their Super Armor is not equipped with large-scale equipment. It is still possible to hold them." Fatty Luo said: "But if our Super Armor technology does not break through, we will inevitably eat it in the future. defeat."

"Try to deal with it first, notify the research institute, and speed up the research on the super armor." Zi Yun said.

"It has been accelerating. The researchers told me that only by contacting this technology can I know the difficulties involved in this technology." said the sleepy man Zizhong.

"What's the difficulty?"

"Ethereous matter, defined by the technical standards of the marching ants, must be made of ethereous material. Let alone the material formula, there are two barriers to the extraction and mass production of etheric matter. But one of the most mysterious matter in the universe."

Zi Zhong said the researcher's words, and after a long pause, he said.

"So, at present, apart from the marching ants, whether the other companies really master it is not necessarily. The prophet guard group exposed by the endless sea is real. They may master it, but the Black Eye and the Thousand Star Empire may not be, even if they are mastered and mature The degree has yet to be tested, and the possibility of bluffing is not ruled out."

Zi Yun and Zi Luo thought about it and nodded slightly.

"First, fully resist the offensive of the black pupil civilization, as long as you can stop it," Zi Yun said.

...

Chen Mo went out with the army.

The White Sea will have a steady style, he will coordinate the war, and the Black Sea will assist with strange tricks and aggressive style. Everything goes well.

As for the black pupil civilization, Chen Mo didn't have much scruples.

Constant star superpowers may have caused a little trouble before, but they are not qualified now. He doesn't care if the Black Eye Civilization really masters the super-power armor technology, they now occupy absolute strength and are not afraid of any forces.

The distribution of strengths and weaknesses in the universe is now clear.

After joining hands with the Bai Xingxiao clan, their strength is indeed strong. The Ziwei civilization and the old part of Bai Xing are not rivals, but it is still possible to hold him for a while.

When the black pupil civilization swallows the old part of the white star and swallows a part of the crape myrtle star field, the star field they occupy will be terribly large.

But the big territory does not mean the strongest.

Regardless of technology, superpowers or star talents, they are not weaker than the black pupils.

The speed of war in the endless sea is quite astonishing.

In just one month, the main force of the endless sea officially invaded the dark forest star field. The army attacked the dark forest without warning, it was almost a full-scale attack, and there was no intention to keep its hands.

To deal with the dark forest, the enthusiasm of the soldiers in the endless sea is unprecedented. They have been fighting since they were young, but that doesn't mean they hate war. War is commonplace in the universe, it's just the scale.

This time it was to deal with the enemy of the endless sea, the endless sea star who held back for too long, could not give up such a good opportunity.

When the main force of the endless sea formally plunged into the dark forest star field, the entire dark forest fell into panic.

Countless fleets besieged the stellar fortress on the border of the star field, and before the arrival of reinforcements from the dark forest, the stellar fortress turned into space ruins.

Their first goal was the dark forest civilization splintered from the original dark forest under the jurisdiction of Di Nanye.

chapters.title: Chapter 1115: :Compromise
chapters.body:
Chapter 1115: :Compromise

The powerful invasion of Endless Sea did not give Dinanye much reaction time at all.

Their main battle department, the star field that is still in the border with the marching ants, and the war department on the border with the endless sea, are some ordinary elite war department.

The menacing endless sea triggered panic throughout the dark forest. The forces in the dark forest star field are all on the verge of an enemy, and regardless of the contradictions between them, they dispatch the warhead to block the endless sea.

The appearance of the endless sea brought unprecedented unity to the Dark Forest Star Territory, which were fighting each other. Even Dinan Miro surprisingly gave up his grievances and stopped attacking Di Nanye, letting him send troops to stop him.

They all know that the warhead that can't stop the endless sea, the dark forest will no longer exist.

Dark forest, black forest, as well as the empire of wild beasts, the alliance of beasts, and the civilization of beasts all sent the most elite warheads to form the dark forest coalition.

The six main defensive constellations of Black Rabbit, Red Fox, Green Eagle, Little Pig, Blue Cat, and Crane are connected in a line and are the main constellations at the junction of the dark forest and the endless sea.

Once the Warhead of the Endless Sea has captured the Six Beast Constellation Line of Defense, it will be able to easily pass through the 2 billion light-year black rat cavity and enter the core star field of the Dark Forest.

At that time, the warhead of the Endless Sea will sweep the entire dark forest and pull this star field into the flames of war.

The six beast constellation defense line is the key position that the two compete for.

Dinanye’s ghost and fox command the dark forest warhead, defending the black rabbit and red fox, Dinan Miro’s Zhihou is responsible for the blue cat and the sky crane, the green eagle and the little pig The Three Beasts Empire, the Allied Beasts and the War Beast Civilization jointly defended.

In the Six Beasts Line of Defense, half of the Dark Forest's generals and warheads gathered. Over 100 million soldiers, countless warships and war machines gathered here, Stellar Fortress and Battlestar are intertwined, echoing each other.

The two sides confronted each other across an endless starry sky, and a large-scale space war was on the horizon.

...

Although endless sea announced that they have mastered the super armor technology, they have not yet mass-produced and armed war department. So in this war, endless sea is strong, but the strength of the war department on both sides has not reached that kind. Unsurpassable point. The coalition forces in the dark forest have the advantage of a large number of battlestars, and they are not afraid.

If the two sides head-to-head, the casualties and losses will be enormous, and at the same time, this star field will turn into a cosmic ruin.

Some Jiangxing proposed to head-on, but Chen Mo vetoed it.

The forces of the Dark Forest Star Territory gave up their hatred and united together. This was unexpected, and Bai Hai would not expect it.

The atmosphere of the war department is very solemn, and the pace of the war cannot be stopped. The next key is how the war will start and how much losses will be caused to both sides after it ends.

The war didn't start. As the generals, they had to think about the future. If they care about their immediate victory, it won't last long.

This war is mighty, and their endless sea must win.

If they do not win, they will not be able to explain to the people of the endless sea. The most important thing is that the prestige established by the new prophet will be disintegrated in an instant, and it will be the endless sea that will be in trouble.

"If you don't have a countermeasure, take it easy first. Head-to-head will definitely not work. There is really no better way. You can stand by for a while and wait for the super armor to be produced and installed." Chen Mo saw everyone looking at the star map frowning, and said Tao.

The resistance of the Dark Forest was so fierce that they actually gave up their hatred of each other, and Chen Mo was also surprised at this.

But thinking that the endless sea and dark forest had historical grudges, he was relieved. If the endless sea comes in, the entire dark forest will suffer. This is the reason why the dark forest gives up contradictions and unanimously outside.

It is a matter of time to take down the dark forest. It is really impossible. Let Lan command the marching ant warhead into the dark forest from the other side.

Chen Mo didn't do this. If the outside world sees that the endless sea and the marching ants are united, they will definitely unite to deal with them, and his hole cards will be exposed.

What he is thinking now is how to win the dark forest with the least cost, so he will reject the idea of head-on.

Although the generals on the field stopped, they were still silent, thinking about countermeasures.

Suddenly, Black Sea flickered his eyes, somewhat uncertain.

Perceiving the strangeness of the Black Sea general, Chen Mo looked at him, and all the eyes of the stars gathered on the Black Sea General: "Black Sea General, what do you think?"

"I dare not say this, it's too risky." Black Sea will shook his head and said.

"How to say? It is not a practice. If you say it, you can study it, maybe you can learn from it." Chen Mo said.

Heihai will look around for a week and see that all the generals show hope. After adjusting his mood, he said: "Prophet, how large is your superpower range? How many types are there?"

"Do you want to use my power?"

"I think so. Chen Mo used this method to get the Sauron Alliance and destroy the senior level of the White Star Civilization. If the Prophet has the ability to match his, there may be shortcuts, but the danger is too great." Black Sea General said.

"If you want to use my abilities, it's not impossible," Chen Mo said.

"No." Bai Hai will immediately oppose: "Prophet, no matter how powerful you are, you can't take risks."

Other generals nodded in agreement with White Sea general's words, they couldn't take risks in such an important battle. Once there is a problem, it is a problem of morale on the front line, and it will be endless trouble.

"Listen to me first." Chen Mo pressed his hand, and the battle room returned to dead silence: "The Black Sea general's idea is really good. My super power range should be no problem to control a galaxy that is 100,000 light-years away. It will be more and more in the future. The stronger."

The battle room was full of silence, and the generals opened their mouths, and they were speechless for a long time, leaving only shock.

...

Hu Bingxin compromised and took the initiative to find Xiao Yu.

The news that Chen Mo became the new prophet of Endless Sea completely defeated her last fluke.

She originally thought that marching ants wanted to dominate the universe and needed to constantly absorb power. The old part of the White Star Civilization had a good power, so Chen Mo would keep her, especially after Black Eye, Thousand Star Empire, and Endless Sea successively announced their mastery of the power armor technology. .
