But after Xiao Yu told her that Chen Mo was the new prophet of Endless Sea, she realized that the marching ants had already controlled the situation.

The two most powerful forces are actually one.

She didn't know whether the marching ants were supported by the endless sea or the endless sea was controlled by the marching ants, but it didn't matter.

The old part of the White Star Civilization is not so important to the marching ants. The real decisive battle is coming, and the White Star Civilization is only the result of the death of the race.

"You won." Hu Bingxin said towards Xiao Yu.

"Tell me your thoughts." Xiao Yu was not surprised by Hu Bingxin's compromise.

"I can include the old part of the White Star Civilization and let them submit to the marching ants, but I have a few conditions. After the war, White Star can have autonomy, and at the same time, you must treat the people of White Star equally and treat them equally."

Hu Bingxin looked at Xiao Yu directly, regaining his former calmness.

"I have read the history of your hometown. In ancient times, there were fiefs, and there is also autonomy in modern times. This is not a condition for you."

"These are not problems, but White Star cannot recruit the war department, cannot have diplomatic power, abide by the laws and rules of the marching ants, and accept our education and standards. Your leader can only be assumed by us after being elected." Xiaoyu said .

Hu Bingxin was not surprised by these conditions, and made sense.

The bargaining chips in her hand are pitiful, and Bai Xing is now being besieged by the Black Eye Civilization and Xiao Clan. She refuses to agree, and sooner or later she will die. Instead of making the Black Eye Civilization and Xiao Clan happy, it is better to give all this to the marching ants, at least they can keep the fire.

It's just that she still wants to fight for some power.

"Can you keep the warhead?"

"No, you have read the history of my hometown. You should know that the king of the fief has military power in his hand, so that the dynasty will fall apart after a while." Xiao Yu shook his head and said, "Since you want autonomy, you must be accurate. Observe this set of rules. You should know that if you don’t join us, you will be completely swallowed up by the Xiao Clan and the Black Eye civilization within a few years. At that time, even the most basic population inheritance will be a problem."

Hu Bingxin fell silent.

Xiao Yu was right. This woman could see through her mind and pinch her most painful point.

"Okay, I promise your terms."

Hu Bingxin knew that there were no conditions to negotiate, so she didn't hesitate and agreed firmly.

chapters.title: Chapter 1116: : Disrupt The Plan
chapters.body:
Chapter 1116: : Disrupt The Plan

When the information reached Chen Mo, Chen Mo was stunned.

Hu Bingxin is willing to return, which is undoubtedly good news for the marching ants. He had contact with Hu Bingxin several times. That female life was very cunning and smart.

It is not surprising that Xiao Yu can subdue her. If Xiao Yu chooses to be tough, she can control Hu Bingxin's consciousness at any time and make her a puppet, but Xiao Yu did not do this, but chose to persuade her to surrender.

When he finished reading the information, he showed a relaxed smile.

History tells them that no matter how powerful a dynasty is, once it falls into civil strife, it will surely flourish and decline, and even a god-level civilization cannot escape this law. In the past, the White Star civilization was almost the number one power in the universe, but now, it has fallen to rely on them for survival.

Hu Bingxin is willing to surrender, so the maneuverability of this matter is much greater.

However, he doesn't need to worry too much about the layout of this kind of thing. The marching ant combat team led by Lan will definitely not give up such a good card. Originally thought that the White Star Civilization would be annexed by the Black Eye Civilization and the Xiao Clan jointly, and then he led the endless sea to destroy the Dark Forest Civilization, so that he could join forces secretly to launch a full offensive against the Black Eye Civilization.

It now appears that the full-scale offensive of the marching ants and the black pupil has come early, and his side may not be able to conquer the dark forest before the two collide.

The war between them and the black pupil is inevitable.

Chen Mo wants to complete his mission, and Tong Qing is driven by his hegemonic ambition. The goals of the two overlap, so there must be conflicts.

...

Gou Xuan looked at the star map frowning.

She is now the commander-in-chief of the old division of the White Star Civilization, and they now only retain less than one-third of the strength of the peak period of the White Star Civilization.

It is very difficult now. The Xiao Clan and the Black Eye are stepping up their offensives, and some general stars may betray and throw into the Xiao Clan at any time. This threat is great.

As a diehard of the White Star Civilization, she was very anxious, but could do nothing.

A chain reaction triggered by the collapse of a dynasty will inevitably turn the once glorious buildings into ruins. The ‘building’ is as tall and brilliant as it is, and the moment of decline will be tragic.

Now they have no ambition to fight for hegemony. The only thing they have is to keep the fire of the White Star civilization and wait for the arrival of peace. At that time, even if the White Star civilization is not as powerful as before, at least there will be a place to survive.

But the Black Eye Civilization and Xiao Clan obviously don't want them to live in peace.

Head-to-head with them, even if they win, they will suffer heavy losses. They can't spend with the two families now.

She was looking for a better countermeasure, but she couldn't do anything.

Suddenly, looking up, she saw the reminder of the holographic platform, and the light curtain in front popped up.

Are there any beings who can connect to the communications of their war department without authorization?

impossible.

In the entire White Star Civilization, only two have this kind of power. One is the old chief, who died in the battle with Chen Mo, and the other is his wife, who has disappeared with Chen Mo for five years, and neither lives nor dies.

However, when he saw the face in the light curtain clearly, Gou Xuan was dumbfounded and almost lost his attitude: "Madam!"

When the Operation Department was discussing tactics, Jiang Xing heard the voice of Gou Xuan's loss, and turned his head to look over. But when he saw the figure in the light curtain, all the stars were stunned, and many lives burst into tears.

"Madam, is it really you?" Gou Xuan's voice trembled slightly, for fear that it was a phantom.

"Gou Xuan, long time no see." Hu Bingxin said, his voice trembling: "Everyone, long time no see."

"Madam, are you still alive? Why don't you contact us? The White Star civilization is ruined, and I didn't take care of it." Gou Xuan said reproachfully.

The other general stars lowered their heads, a little ashamed, and looked at his wife with no face. They were all general stars brought up by the wife in one hand, and they were loyal to the civilization of the white star, but after the disappearance of the wife, they did not protect the white star, and they were ashamed of her.

"I know everything." Hu Bingxin said with a sigh.

"Madam, what happened? Why did you disappear for so long?" A general star couldn't help but asked excitedly.

"At the beginning our plan failed. Chen Mo was stronger than we thought. He read my memory, found the small universe, and found the planet where the old chief and the high-levels are located. In the battle, the old chief was defeated and ended his life in the black hole. Weapons, I want to die with Chen Mo. Neither Chen Mo nor I escaped and fell into a black hole. I was in the black hole, and it felt like less than half a minute had passed, but five years have passed since I came out.” Hu Bingxin said sadly.

"So, Madam, where are you? We Baixing needs you now." Gou Xuan said.

"I'm on my way back."

...

"It's almost time, it's time to announce it." Lan looked up and said to Zhao Min after receiving the news.

"Okay." Zhao Min nodded heavily and turned to leave with the documents.

Since the matter of Hu Bingxin is resolved, they can't neglect here. The news that Chen Mo came back safely is currently only known to the high-ranking army ants, and no other life in the army ant group knows.

Within the marching ant group, no matter how they prohibit discussion, there are still more or less lives discussing about the new leader.

People's hearts are floating, and the news of Chen Mo's return is announced, so there is no hidden danger in the marching ants.

They can start any plan with confidence.

Chen Mo came back safely.

The news was released from Zhao Min and Xiao Yukou, triggering a stormy carnival within the marching ant group. For the marching ants, this news is the biggest surprise.

Not only was it a sensation for the marching ants, it also shocked the forces of the universe.

The man is still alive and will return soon.

At first, some lives questioned the authenticity of the news, believing that the marching ants were looking for a stand-in to stabilize their internal military spirit. However, when another news came out, they had to accept this fact.

Mrs. White Star Civilized Fox, who disappeared with Chen Mo, returned to the old part of White Star Civilization and revealed the reason for the five-year disappearance.

They fell into the black hole weapon detonated by the old chief, and the velocity of time and space was different, making them feel that five years had passed when they came out in less than half a minute.

All logic is reasonable.

The Fox Bingxin who was weaker than Chen Mo was alive, and Chen Mo was even less likely to die.

However, when the cosmic forces had not completely digested the news that Chen Mo was still alive, another even more shocking news came out, the old part of the White Star Civilization, integrated the whole and put it under the command of the marching ant group.

This news made the forces of the universe shake three times.

The once glorious White Star civilization actually chose to surrender to the marching ant group, their former enemy, but also the driving force of their decline and division.

Half of the star map and talents of the White Star Civilization are included in the marching ant group system. Whether it is the occupied star domains or the talents in their hands, the marching ants are not weaker than the black pupil civilization. Even in terms of the star, the marching ant group seems to be stronger Top one.

Moreover, the marching ants also have the strongest super warhead advantage.

Now that the leader returns safely, the military is stable, there are countless talents under his command, as well as the strongest super warhead and countless legions. This kind of strength makes the entire universe look at him.

No matter from any aspect of comparison, the marching ants are not inferior to the black pupil civilization.

The outside world knows that the strongest marching ant group has appeared.

Chen Mo returned safely, and Hu Bingxin led Bai Xing's former ministry and joined the marching ant group. This news shocked the black pupil civilization.

The marching ant group is a strong leader, and Chen Mo returns. This problem will no longer be a problem. The people's minds of the marching ants are quickly stabilized, which means that the biggest shortcomings of the marching ant group have been filled.

Moreover, the old part of the White Star Civilization was also incorporated to make his own strength stronger on the original basis.

This incident completely disrupted the original plan of the Black Eye Civilization.

The most uncomfortable thing is naturally the green pupil, even if he is calm, he still feels uncomfortable at this time, his face is gloomy as water.

I thought Chen Mo was dead.

The marching ants lack a leader with enough courage, and now they realize it is a fantasy. Being trapped in a black hole, and being able to come out again without the help of technology, his strength is definitely not weaker than him.

Falling into the black hole, if the other party comes out ten or eight years later, the situation will not be so passive to the black pupil civilization.

The all-out war started, and their plans had just begun. As a result, Chen Mo gave them such a big surprise and made their original arrangements safely invalidated.

There are two wars before them now.

The war of the White Star civilization and the war of the Ziwei civilization.

Stop or continue?

If you continue to fight the White Star Civilization, the marching ant group will not hesitate to start a full-scale war with them, and the Ziwei civilization on the other side will never give up such a good opportunity to delay their warhead. At that time, it will be extremely uncomfortable.

But what if you don't fight?

Do not hit? The two companies may not be as they wish.

The war unfolded as they imagined, but it may not end as they imagined.

Their original plan was to annex some forces next to them, and then explore and upgrade the super-power warhead they had just mastered in the war. But now, everything is not as they wanted.

Everyone's eyes focused on Tong Qing.

Tongqing's gloomy expression gradually dissipated, and he knew that his next decision would be related to the future destiny of the black pupil civilization.

"Before the marching ants have completely integrated and managed the old part of the White Star, concentrate their greatest strength and use the shortest time to annex them. Even if they cannot be annexed, they will occupy as many star fields as possible. There are endless seas and the threat of the Thousand Star Empire behind them. Attack us with all your strength."

chapters.title: Chapter 1117: : Battle Of The Mustangs
chapters.body:
Chapter 1117: : Battle Of The Mustangs

Various rays of light exploded in space, and the rays of light pierced the skyline, submerging the planets one by one. The planet of the steel fortress broke into fragments in an instant, and all life on the planet died.

The once Battlestar has become the ruins of the universe.

Under the shock of space weapons, the entire star system turned into cosmic dust, and the exploded fire cluster was still lit up in space not far from the star system.

Her eyes were cracking, she clenched her fists, her lips closed.

This scene is what happened in one corner of their white star field.

The flames of war broke out in every corner of the White Star Territory, and most of their space defense lines suffered the strongest attack ever.

After the space interferometer of the defense line lost its function, it was as fragile as paper paste under the space weapon.

These space defense lines were constructed by their White Star civilization consuming resources, but they did not want to, but they still failed to experience the trampling of war.

They misjudged the madness of the Black Eye Civilization. When they learned that they had joined the marching ant group, the Black Eye Civilization and the Xiao Clan launched the most terrifying offensive against them.

Even the warhead that was originally sent to deal with the Ziwei civilization turned around and entered the White Star Region.

The offensive came so fiercely.

The line of defense of the White Star Civilization had suffered heavy losses due to the betrayal of the Xiao Clan. In recent years, it has been besieged by the Xiao Clan, Black Eyes and Marching Ants. It is already very difficult for them to persevere.

Now facing such a domineering offensive, she can only watch some relatively fragile lines of defense being destroyed.

She was also waiting for the opportunity, and the marching ants sent instructions to give her the greatest command, and at the same time sending the war department to support. She must buy time for the marching ant group reinforcements.

With such a big offensive, the war machine and weapon consumption must be very high.

Waiting for the opportunity, they are brewing a counterattack.

Over the years, the war has honed Gou Xuan very heavily, and she has brought into full play the tenacity of the female star. If it weren't for her tenacity, the White Star Civilization had been destroyed under the siege of the major forces in the universe over the years, and even the current old ministry could not be retained.

Suddenly, seeing the changes in the battlefield data in the light curtain, there was a slight change in Gou Xuan's coldness.

The opportunity is here!

"Ghost, Ursa Minor, White Dog, start to fight back."

Gou Xuan gave the order without hesitation.

Their current warhead is less than a quarter of the peak period.

But their offensive is still very strong.

At the moment when Goxuan ordered, the warships inside the defense line started and quickly moved away from the defense line. Numerous war machines were thrown into the battlefield and flocked to the nearest battleship group.

Almost at the same time, the space interferometer in the line of defense closed, and the speed of light weapons were all aimed at the warships of the black pupil civilization, and the light suddenly lit up.

This is what she has already preset.

If the enemy seizes the gap closed by the space interferometer and uses space weapons, this line of defense will be instantly destroyed by the opponent's space weapons, so this method is rarely used and the cost is too high.

Space-based weapons light up, and the war in space is heating up to its craziest stage.

Countless battleships and war machines turned into fireballs to light up in space, and turned into fragments to fly into space.

The sudden counterattack caught the Red Army's warhead a bit by surprise.

For a time, the battleship opened the energy shield to resist the attack of the speed of light weapon, but some of the slow response, the battleship turned into nothingness.

After experiencing the initial chaos, the fleet of the Red Army War Head began to gradually react.

They realized when they were about to fight back.

The war machine is insufficient.

Just now they frantically attacked the line of defense, and now they are exhausting their old power and new power is not yet successful.

As their fleet fell into the encirclement of the opponent's war machine, the Red Army finally changed its color.

He was a little upset, and was still anxious to deal with Gou Xuan.

He underestimated Gouxuan.

After experiencing the split of the White Star civilization and the perennial siege, and the shortage of various resources, he thought that Gouxuan did not dare to attack rashly, but did not want to make the counterattack so sharp.

The old part of White Star joined the marching ants, but all of the battle ants of the marching ants have not yet entered the White Star domain. He has some abilities, but he still doesn't care.

Gou Xuan is a top star, but the opponent is a female streamer and has no record of victory in a big battle. He is just mediocre. The forces held by both sides are not equal.

They are much better than the other, whether it is war machine or other resource talents.

If it weren't for the other party's sudden announcement to join the marching ants, they thought that it was only a matter of time before the white star was annexed.

But Hu Bingxin packaged the White Star and gave it to the marching ants. They had to speed up their actions to occupy the star field, forcibly attack the White Star's defense line, and win strategic depth for future wars.

Insufficient weapons and war machines made their engagements quickly fall into a disadvantage.

In space, weapons and war machines are the best.

After a huge group of war machines surrounded the battleship group, they began to launch crazy attacks.

At all times, battleships are broken into pieces in the explosion.

Careless.

He made a low-level mistake of underestimating his opponent.

The Red Army's expression was gloomy, but soon returned to normal.

"retreat."

The order fell, and the attacks of the black pupil civilization in the three main galaxies began to retreat and left the battlefield. But the warships and war machines left behind as cover were all destroyed in the war.

The results were good, but Gou Xuan did not have much joy.

This victory is only a small victory and has little effect on the overall situation. When the Red Army will no longer underestimate the enemy and come back after preparations are complete, they will be very troublesome.

This time will not be too long, just a few days.

Now the main constellations are organizing the migration of the people of the White Star.

This is Fox Bingxin's request. The White Star Territory can be lost, but some of the main orc tribes must be transferred and transferred to the Marching Ant Star Territory for temporary settlement, and then go home after the war ends.

Spatial connectors play an important role in the transfer.

Countless transport ships shuttle between the space connectors.

Each galaxy has a space connector, which is activated by Hu Bingxin with the highest authority to connect the space connector to the space connector of the marching ant group star domain.

The huge fleet is in space, like ants marching in formation.

A few days, enough time for a large number of outstanding ethnic groups to transfer.

In an inconspicuous space connector of the White Star Civilization, battleships appeared in an array, facing the sign of marching ants on the battleship, and there was also a sign of blood blade.

The major forces of the universe are very familiar with this sign.

Ming Tu War Department.

...

All the endless sea stars were stunned by the prophet's ability.

In the Infinite Naval Warfare Department, every general star has a solemn expression, and some general stars breathe heavily.

"The prophet holds superpowers above the galaxy level. This is unprecedented and our greatest advantage. If used well, this is much more terrifying than a reorganized top war department.

In the six beasts defense line, they belong to three big forces, and there are countless small forces. They have grievances and conflicts with each other, and they will not be too strict in concerted efforts and tacit understanding. These constellation lines of defense must have weaknesses.

If in ordinary space wars, they have time to transfer from other galaxies to support, but the prophet has galaxy-level superpower, this is the most terrifying, and also our biggest trump card. "

Black Sea will analyze the advantages and pros and cons among them, and his sharp gaze sweeps the generals of the war department.

The abilities of super powers are beyond the imagination of all life, even if the defenses of the Six Beasts are perfect, they cannot cope with this ability.

It takes 100,000 years for space weapons to destroy a galaxy, and even a large-scale space weapons bombardment at any cost will take one or two days. And for a super-powerful person like the prophet, it only takes a moment.

If you don't know the specific coordinates of important people, they will be bombed by space weapons, and the opponent can easily escape.

But super power is different.

Super power can instantly cover the entire galaxy, without giving the opponent time to escape.

No wonder the marching ants can easily take down the Alliance of Sauron and the White Star Civilization. This is the horror and unsolvable existence of the super power.

"We started with a point and gathered 50 million warships to the periphery of the Mustang Galaxy to create an illusion that we are going to attack the Mustang Galaxy. The purpose is to put pressure on them and attract large-scale military support from the other side in this galaxy group.

When the opponent's support is concentrated on the Mustang Galaxy, the Prophet takes action to destroy all the warheads and warships of this galaxy, and a force vacuum appears in the Mustang Galaxy Group. "

Heihai will tell his combat deployment, his expression is a little crazy and eager to try.

The generals on the field know that his fighting style is bold, but this idea is too scary.

"The Mustang galaxy group is breached, and Red Fox's defense line is quite open to us. With the Mustang galaxy group as a jumping point, the team can enter the Red Fox constellation, which forms a semi-encircled situation.

The Tortoise Galaxy, the Mole Galaxy, and the Red Fox Galaxy are the main defensive galaxies in the Red Fox constellation. We are quite embedded in their defense lines, limiting their support to each other to a certain extent. Our forces are several times stronger than the opponent, and with the help of the prophet, when the red fox is taken down, the six beast defenses will survive in name, and the hinterland of the dark forest star field is just ahead. "

Following the guidance of the Black Sea general, all the stars' eyes fell on the star field that emerged on the holographic star chart.

The war department was silent.

Some of the stars looked crazy.

The feint attack of 50 million warships attracted reinforcements from the surrounding galaxy groups and then annihilated them in one fell swoop.

Only the Black Sea can think of this kind of tactics.

"But the Mustang galaxy has space bubbles and space connectors. In this case, will something happen?" You Jiangxing asked doubtfully.

"It was chosen because of the space bubble and the space connector. The galaxy covered by the space bubble and equipped with the space connector, its defense strength is several times that of other defense line galaxies, and it is also the most difficult line of defense of the galaxy. This kind of galaxy is generally a galaxy where stars are stationed.

It is precisely because of these that the opponent's reinforcements can rest assured to support and can easily enter the Mustang Galaxy. We have super super powers like prophets, these are not limitations, super powers are not affected by space interference. At that time, they were like bugs entering a bag, and we crushed the entire bag. "

The Black Sea will make a metaphor.

Jiang Xing on the field was cold.

I saw the Black Sea sweeping the generals and said coldly: "Don't say cruelty, there is no mercy in war. In space war, life is more dusty. If we don't take down the dark forest, then the life of our endless sea will be the casualties. If you can't see this, you will be in vain.

In this way, we can save time to look at and retain the strongest combat power. At the same time, it will give the opponent a shock. In the future, we will attack and defensively. They will not dare to brazenly reinforce them. It will also be a fatal blow to their morale. Our resistance will be much smaller. "

The star on the field remained silent.

As the commander-in-chief, the White Sea general did not speak against the Black Sea general.

The Black Sea will look at Chen Mo and calmly said: "The horrible superpower of the prophet is our advantage. If this advantage is left unused, it will be a waste, and it can also increase the prophet's influence and deterrence in the entire universe. "

Chen Mo nodded lightly and pressed his hand to stop Xing Shengsheng who just wanted to speak.

"Just use the black sea general's tactics, you arrange the details of the battle, and when the ministries are in place, start planning."

His words are undoubtedly the final conclusion.

The Black Sea general's tactics are the most suitable method, bold enough, crazy enough, and unexpected.

Knowing how to take advantage of all one's own side, this is the basic quality that a name will have, as for the means, no one cares.

The best method is to win the war regardless of the means.

This method of tactics can gain time and space and has the highest benefit. Chen Mo also wants to quickly end the war.

"Leadership."

There are many generals in the war department.

"The Mustang campaign is commanded by the Black Sea general and the Purple Navy coordinated and commanded. The White Sea general will command the main force in the rear and reinforce at any time. Those who do not obey the order will be killed without mercy." Chen Mo's voice was serious.

"Understand." Many will see the star wars.

They still don't know that the Battle of the Mustang will be a legendary battle written in the annals of the universe's civilization. In this battle, the Prophet of the Endless Sea, and Chen Mo, who was also deciphered by later generations, became the first person in the universe myth.

chapters.title: Chapter 1118: : One Person Breaks One Galaxy
chapters.body:
Chapter 1118: : One Person Breaks One Galaxy

"What are they doing?"

The Ghost Fox frowned and looked at the battleships appearing outside the Mustang Galaxy.

Nearly 50 million warships, a warship of this size attacked a galaxy, is this crazy for the endless sea?

In space, battleships surround the prey of the Mustang Galaxy like a pack of wolves.

Not only Di Nanye, but other general stars in the Dark Forest, were all startled by the scenes that appeared in the holographic video. Endless Sea concentrates its forces to attack one of their galaxies. What kind of conspiracy is this?

Fifty million warships besieged a defensive galaxy, and they have seen each other for the first time since they were generals.

Guihu looked uncertain. He couldn't judge the endless sea's tactics, but he didn't dare to despise it. What he couldn't understand was the most terrifying. He doesn't think that the star of the endless sea is so stupid, there must be some conspiracy in it.

In other words, this is the most obvious conspiracy.

Fifty million warships were placed on ordinary lines of defense without space bubbles, and those warships were dropped one by one with light-speed weapons, and the planet of life in the entire galaxy was almost extinct.

The key is that the number of battleships in the Mustang galaxy is only two million.

Twenty-five times the enemy.

Thinking of this, Ghost Fox's face turned blue.

A galaxy protected by space bubbles. This kind of galaxy has great value or extremely important location. Generally, only a few space ports are open to the outside world. The purpose is to force both sides to use positional offensive and defensive warfare.

It is very costly to break through a deployed space defense line.

But now they are now passive. If the enemy's 50 million warships besieged the entrance of the galaxy, their forces would not be able to cope.

"Look at what's the situation in other galaxies?" Ghost Fox asked his subordinates to call up the military map of the entire Red Fox.

After seeing the deployment map, Guihu was even more confused.

The entire red fox constellation has endless sea warhead pressure, but the number is different, and there are only quite a few other places, only their Mustang galaxy.

The Mustang Galaxy seems to be used as a breakthrough by the opponent.

If the Mustang galaxy group is taken down, it will radiate the entire constellation of Red Fox. Once the constellation of Red Fox falls, the six beast defense lines will be useless.

This is the advantage of the endless sea that has blocked the star field for many years.

With 50 million warships assembled, the main force is not yet empty.

This time the endless naval regiment has prepared at least more than 300 million warships.

This is still the main force for invading the dark forest, excluding the reserve force and various supporting forces.

They have fought for years and consumes a lot of money, especially war machines and various space ships, which are almost produced and delivered into the battlefield. Endless Sea blocks the star field, does not participate in wars, and there is not much war. They retain the most complete war mechanical force.

Guihu's face became more and more gloomy.

The forces in their hands are also strong, but the forces they want to defend are also marching ants, which is a stronger opponent than the endless sea, and they cannot mobilize the war department to come to the Red Fox for reinforcement.

The dark forest, which was already difficult, is now more passive.

The war of attrition initiated by 50 million warships, they really can't afford it.

A trace of bitterness flashed in the ghostly fox's expression.

"How to do it?"

Di Nanye looked at the ghost fox, he kept his usual calmness.

"Concentrate the defensive force of the Mustang galaxy group to the Mustang galaxy. The Mustang galaxy cannot be lost. There are space connectors and space bubbles, which are of great value. Once lost, the Mustang galaxy group is gone, and it also threatens The entire Red Fox. The opponent is attacking, we can at least spend with the opponent, time can be delayed, and the warheads of other galaxy groups can come and support."

...

In the outer space of the Mustang Galaxy, there are many warships, and every warship is waiting.

In one of the battleships, Chen Mo stood in front of the battle platform, looking at the Mustang galaxy in the holographic projection.

The scarlet mark is an important star fortress position.

As for the galaxy in front of us, red marks can be seen everywhere, especially at the location of the space port outside the space bubble.

From the holographic star map, the tension between the two parties can be felt, and the murderous intent is pervasive.

The most nervous is the generals of the endless sea, the prophet himself went to the battlefield, this is incredible. In the history of endless seas for so many years, there has never been a precedent for a prophet to go to battle.

This is the supreme leader of the endless sea, and the supreme leader will be on the battlefield, which means that the power of the force is exhausted.

If something goes wrong with the prophets, then they are sinners in the endless sea.

But when they saw the prophet calm down, they felt a lot of peace in their hearts. Many general stars are suggesting that the prophet thinks that he is a super power person and there will be no problems.

"Prophet, the increase in the dark forest has arrived." An intelligence officer hurried over and reported.

At this moment, the spirits of the many generals far behind were all in full, and the fighting spirit burst into their eyes.

The critical moment is coming.

All generals understand that this battle is related to the beginning of the endless sea to conquer the dark forest. This is the first battle between the two sides.

If it fails, the spirit of the endless sea will be severely frustrated and morale will be greatly damaged. If it succeeds, the endless sea hegemony will be in sight, and it will change the structure of the universe.

Compared with the nervousness of many generals, Chen Mo is calm and composed.

The battle that was about to begin did not give him the slightest sense of tension and was extremely calm.

Since becoming a quantum life, his vision and mind are getting wider and wider. What he sees is the survival of the cosmic dimension, not the struggle of a galaxy. The difference in realm made him more calm when facing these things.

"Then start!"

Chen Mo gave the order lightly, ordinary, not as if he was deciding a historical moment.

He was the only one in this battle.

After taking a step, Chen Mo disappeared in place, and when he appeared again, he was in space, everything quietly.

The gaze of almost the entire Infinite Sea Operation Department was on him, and his figure was broadcast live and projected onto the holographic projections of all battleships in the Infinite Sea.

In an instant, inexplicable fluctuations enveloped the Mustang galaxy.

All will change star's face.

The alarm sounded.

An amazing energy wave appeared outside the Mustang Galaxy.

This ability fluctuates wildly, surpassing the detector's energy detection limit. This is many times higher than the energy of space weapons, and it is still growing, as if there is no end.

What energy is this?

"what happened?"

Hearing the alarm from the Mustang Galaxy, Di Nanye was not calm.

He is not in the Mustang galaxy, but he is always watching.

"Who told me what's going on? Why is there such a big energy fluctuation?"

Di Nanye looked at the frantically increasing numbers, his eyelids jumped, he knew what these numbers meant, that energy was skyrocketing every second, and it had already exceeded the limit.

"Maybe the other party has some secret weapon." An intelligence officer in charge of the radar started operating on the technical stage and soon locked the radar to the source of huge energy.

All the stars grew their mouths and their bodies trembled involuntarily.

Enough energy to destroy the galaxy is emitted by a life.

This is impossible.

"He seems to be the prophet of the endless sea." A dark forest general screamed.

Di Nanye's pupils shrank, his face changed drastically when he thought of something.

"Let all the stars of the Mustang galaxy withdraw."

Di Nanye screamed, but it was too late. As soon as his words fell, something happened in the Mustang Galaxy.

Boom boom boom! ! !

Tens of thousands of meters of fireball exploded in the space of the Mustang galaxy, and a battleship instantly shattered into fragments, like an opening, the dark forest civilized battleship waiting for its surroundings exploded like firecrackers, forming a string in space.

Before the fireball extinguished, the space-based weapons and space fortresses within the defense line exploded like balloons. The light spots rained, fragments shot, and then were submerged by the fireball and turned into nothingness.

No one has experienced such a weird war.

No enemies, no weapons.

The soldiers in the space fortress did not see the enemy's shadow until they died.

Not a battleship or a fortress, but all the war machinery of the entire defense line. The frenzied explosions formed into one piece, like festive fireworks exploding in space.

The space defense line of a galaxy was instantly shattered.

Black Sea will be shocked, and his clenched fists can't help shaking, not knowing whether it is excitement or fear.

He woke up suddenly.

The moment the explosion stopped, he knew it, and handed it to him next.

He smashed the button beside him hard.

attack.

...

When Ming Tu saw Gou Xuan, he nodded slightly.

In terms of dealing with a series of battlefields, her ability is not bad. In the past, she lost some important battles mainly because of bad luck. In the case of Gulu Hongqiao, if it were not for the super warfare, Chen Mo would not be sure to take the Gulu Hongqiao.

White Star Civilization has experienced such a catastrophe, this woman can still hold on with the remnants for a few years. It has to be said that her toughness is definitely among the top players.

Gou Xuan was tired, but Ming Tu did not see depression or depression on her face. Looking at the general star next to her, although there was sadness, her eyes remained firm, with hatred and anger.

This hatred and anger did not come from the marching ants, but the Xiao clan.

The marching ants were once their enemies, and they had nothing to say about what they did. They could only say that their skills were inferior to humans, but the betrayal of the Xiao clan was the main reason for their almost extinction.

This is an iron army.

Even though Ming Tu is reticent, she has respect for Gou Xuan.

"Leave the defense to us. You can fix it. When the warship and supplies come over, you can replenish the team's organization first." Ming Tu said lightly. Whether it is an opponent or a friend, a warhead with a soul is worthy of respect.

"Aren't we unloaded from the armor?"

Gou Xuan looked up at Ming Tu, her voice a little lonely. Once the White Star Civilization was second to none in the universe, but now it wants to submit to their former opponents.

From peak to decline, no one has more profound experience than them.

The wife agreed to the conditions of the marching ants, and they no longer retained military power.

Ming Tu glanced at her, took out a document and handed it over: "This is the appointment document given to you by the boss, the general of the marching ants, and commanding the tenth battle department of the marching ants. Baixing did not retain the military power, but you can Continue fighting. If you don’t want to continue fighting, you can submit an application for retirement. The treatment is in accordance with our marching ant standards. All soldiers are the same. If you don’t want to continue fighting, you can retire."

Gou Xuan stared at the document in Ming Tu's hand, gritting his teeth.

"If you trim enough, you may be able to participate in the big counterattack plan, and you make your own decision." Ming Tu put the document in front of Gou Xuan, speaking coldly from beginning to end.

"grown ups."

All the stars around Gou Xuan surrounded them with desire in their eyes. They wanted to fight, they wanted to counterattack the Xiao Clan and the Black Eye civilization.

"Go to fix the supplies and prepare for the next battle." Gou Xuan took over the appointment document in Ming Tu's hand.

"Yes."

All the stars retreated, their fists clenched tightly, they all knew that the next battle was very important to the White Star's position in the marching ants, and it was their only chance to avenge the Xiao Clan.

"Thank you." Gou Xuan said to Ming Tu.

"I will be a comrade-in-arms in the future." Ming Tu cast an admiring look at Gou Xuan. At least she did not give up fighting because Bai Xing joined the marching ants: "You come to the war room and tell me about the situation of the black pupil civilization and the Xiao clan. You also need to know the deployment of the next battle plan."

The Ming Tu War Department entered the White Star Region, and did not take over the defense line defense, but began to look for the traces of the Red Army War Head and Xiao Clan War Head.

Soon, with the help of Gou Xuan, Ming Tu grasped the general situation of the main force of both parties.

And the Red Army quickly knew that an unfamiliar warhead appeared on the white star's defense line. He subconsciously thought of the reinforcements of the marching ants. Sure enough, after the intelligence department responded, the name of this war department quickly surfaced.

The strongest battle department of marching ants, Ming Tu battle department.

Upon hearing this news, the Red Army's expression was extremely solemn.

The marching ants move too fast.

chapters.title: Chapter 1119: :Urgent
chapters.body:
Chapter 1119: :Urgent

The panicked wild horse galaxy life, standing trembling warlord.

The explosions of battleships, the end of the planet's destruction, the screams mixed in among them, the panicked and fleeing ships. A picture is formed in the Mustang galaxy, filled with horror and despair.

Overwhelming battleships jumped through the harbor and appeared in every corner of the Mustang Galaxy. The wild horse galaxy that has broken through its defenses is like an unsuspecting beauty, exposed to a hungry wolf with green eyes.

The surviving soldiers chose to escape instinctively.

The scene just now was too horrible. In front of such super-powerfuls, they were as small as the dust in the universe, weak-willed, and had a mental breakdown just now.

Superpower.

Galaxy-class superpower.

This is an unprecedented ability, the power of a single life, which can destroy the defenses of a galaxy. This fact makes them unable to resist.

In the warhead of the endless sea, the blood in the body felt like it was burning, they were crazy, they shouted, they could even fight desperately.

The prophet is terrible.

Their prophet is the strongest being in the universe.

...

The defense line of the Mustang galaxy collapsed instantly, and there was hardly any obstruction to the endless sea. Even the fleet that went to the Mustang galaxy for rescue in advance was buried in it.

The Prophet of the Endless Sea uses his own power to release terrifying superpowers and destroy all warships and space-based weapons in the Mustang Galaxy.

Neither Di Nanye nor Guihu expected that endless sea would use this method.

They actually have such a means.

A person’s superpower envelops a galaxy. Their generals and soldiers, even invisible to the enemy, even the enemy's weapons, are destroyed in the explosion, mercilessly.

The ghost fox encountered this kind of super attack tactics for the first time. Seeing the major fleets of the Mustang galaxy lose contact, look at the explosion photos and the endless sea swarming into the Mustang galaxy. Slumped in a chair, there was no more calmness in the past.

When he recovered from the shock, he found that other subordinates were all looking at him.

From the eyes of his subordinates, the ghost fox could read the confusion, without fighting spirit.

They desperately learn tactics, command, and the layout of the war. However, in front of the Prophet of the Endless Sea, they are as vulnerable as paper. Everything they did was useless in the face of this power.

As a top star, Guihu followed Di Nanye to launch a coup in the dark forest. He had a natural temperament. After seeing the appearance of his subordinates, he realized that the impact was heavier than he thought.

The battleships and space-based fortresses of the Mustang galaxy were destroyed, and under the iron armor of 50 million enemy battleships, it looked like a newborn baby. When the battleship enters the Mustang galaxy, it jumps to the defensive lines of each star and starts the occupation plan.

The figure standing in space, the terrifying energy fluctuation disappeared, but it still cannot be ignored.

The Mustang Galaxy has fallen.

Di Nanye clenched his hands and stared at everything that happened in the star chart.

"Is there a way to counterattack?" Di Nanye's general in the war department roared, unable to see the calmness of the past.

This battle hit him too hard.

He obtained the best technology and talents in the dark forest in a coup, and exhausted his efforts to build a warhead. He has his ambitions. But this battle, the elite warhead that he is proud of, seemed so vulnerable.

His pride and dignity seemed to be severely torn off by the prophet of the endless sea, and he threw it on the ground and stepped on it several times.

Two warheads, three hundred legions, millions of warships and space-based fortresses were all burned. The Prophet of the Endless Sea stepped on the corpse of their warhead to make a god, and their dark forest became a total joke.

...

This is the first time that Chen Mo has used such a wide range of super powers.

The feeling of controlling everything, the moment he entered the state, he awakened from the depths of his consciousness. In that state, he felt that everything in the galaxy was insignificant.

This is the power of life in the fourth dimension.

The rules of the universe are just a toy in his eyes, and there are no secrets.

In the face of this kind of superpower, ordinary life is like dust, and no life can have the courage to resist in the face of this kind of power.

The dark forest civilization turns the stars and warheads into pieces in the Mustang Galaxy.

This battle caused endless sea to tear open a door in the Red Fox Seat.

No one thought that this war would be so easy.

This battle made the Prophet of the Endless Sea famous in the universe and it was daunting.

Outside the Red Fox, the hinterland of the Dark Forest Star Territory is right in front of them, and no one can stop their offensive.

...

Commander Yan's Black Eyed Warhead entered the abyss of space that bordered the Ziwei civilization.

His mission is very clear. He must destroy the crape myrtle civilization in the shortest time possible, start the annexation plan, and prepare for the battle against the marching ants and the endless sea.

Ahead is the Blackstone Galaxy. This special galaxy has a special history.

The famous Black Rock War was started in this galaxy, and the war ended in the victory of the Ziwei civilization.

After the victory of the Ziwei Civilization, it continued to erode the surrounding starfields. The starfield adjacent to the Thor Civilization and the Black Pupil Civilization became an isolated island. Eventually, the galaxy next to the Thor Civilization Space Abyss was sold to the Black Pupil Civilization, and it had its current pattern. .

The Blackstone galaxy is located in the center of the space abyss. The space abyss is a strip-shaped cosmic hole that traverses the star field, surrounded by cosmic holes without galaxies and no supply points.

Large-scale war starts here, the defender can easily obtain supplies from within the galaxy, but the attacker needs to transport resources beyond the abyss of space, which is costly.

This is quite a strategic commanding height.

The crape myrtle civilization occupied the Blackstone galaxy for nearly 200 million years, and it was almost turned into an iron barrel by them.

Before the change, Yan did not dare to attack rashly. Even if it was an ordinary high-ranking general, he would not get any benefit, but now it is different. In the Black Eye Civilization, the Super War Department is formed on a small scale, and they have a chance to win Black Stone. galaxy.

Yan chose a different way to build a space stronghold outside of the Blackstone galaxy, and then build a space connector to replenish it through the space connector.

It consumes a little bit more, but it is more reliable and safer than the supply from jumping outside the hole.

This time, Yan was ready to take down the Blackstone Galaxy in one fell swoop.

This kind of war is not exhausting and must be done in one go, otherwise it will be even more difficult to capture the Blackstone Galaxy in the future.

He wanted to attack here while the Ziwei civilization was concerned about the war in other directions.

They have a small-scale super warhead. Although the Ziwei civilization occupies a favorable geographical position, they are not completely disadvantaged.

If it was before, they could slowly look for opportunities, but not now.

Chen Mo is still alive and he is back.

That man was very hostile to the black pupil civilization.

In addition, an endless sea prophet and a thousand star empire emerged, no matter which one, it was a threat to the status of Black Eye.

Now is different from the War Armor era.

They are already behind the marching ants in the super power era, and they can only trade space for time in future wars by expanding the star field defense.

The most important thing is that marching ants still have the advantage of generals.

Aside from Lan and Ming Tu, there are Ling Xi from the New Five Cities Alliance and Ming Feng from the Nebula Alliance. After taking refuge in the old part of the White Star Civilization, there were top generals such as Gou Xuan and Tukanan.

On the black pupil's side, in addition to Yan and the Red Army, the other young generals are a little good, but they have not yet reached the level of top generals.

The Xiao Clan, the Xiao Clan is regarded as their franchise force, not really surrendering them.

First delay the time to grow up, wait for the black pupil civilization to completely control the super armor technology, establish a large-scale super warhead, and then head-to-head with the opponent, this is their current strategy.

Suddenly, a message came, causing Yan's brows to move slightly. After seeing the information clearly, his face melted, clenching his fists.

The Mustang Galaxy has fallen.

The entire universe is paying attention to the war between the endless sea and the dark forest, especially the First World War.

He knew that the Dark Forest might not be able to withstand the offensive of the Endless Sea, but he did not expect that a large-scale battle would start in this way and end in this way.

One person conquered a galaxy.

They couldn't believe what happened, but the facts were before them.

The mysterious prophet of the endless sea, with terrifying superpower, destroyed the defensive power of the entire galaxy.

What kind of power is this?

No solution!

Yan first came up with an idea.

Can't delay any longer.

Yan realized that time was more pressing now, and their strategy had to be quickened, to get the biggest result before the endless sea swallowed the dark forest.

"Preparation for the Battle of Blackstone."

Yan waved his hand, causing Jiang Xing of the War Department to suddenly become serious.

The war department of the Black Eye Civilization operates like a precision machine.

They must make a little record in the direction of the Ziwei civilization. The Ziwei civilization currently does not master the super-power armor technology and does not have the super-power war department, which is their best goal.

chapters.title: Chapter 1120: : Ming Tu Vs Red Army
chapters.body:
Chapter 1120: : Ming Tu Vs Red Army

"Stick to it."

Zi Luo took a bite of the thigh meat of an unknown animal, staring at the star chart intently, only two words came out of his mouth.

The offensive of the black pupil civilization is very strong. In the super armor technology, the black pupil civilization has improved. Although not as good as the marching ants, the threat is enough. The current offensive against the Ziwei civilization at any cost made him smell dangerous.

"There is no other way?" Zi Yun asked coldly.

"No, at this stage, the Super Warhead is a dimensionality reduction attack against the ordinary warhead. Unless they accurately set traps and kill them before they have time to escape, there is no solution. But this method can be done once and twice in general. It's impossible."

Zi Luo took a napkin, wiped his mouth, and began to concentrate.

"The only way for us now is to stick to it, stop them by any means, and stop them from invading the crape myrtle. Then break through the super armor technology as soon as possible, otherwise we will be eliminated, it is only a matter of time.

Judging from the movements of Yan and the Red Army, the Black Eye Civilization is very anxious now. They urgently need to go deeper and expand urgently. When the marching ants return to Chen Mo, the momentum has come and the time is ripe. They are now facing the pressure from the marching ants, and the Red Army is uncomfortable. And we only need to delay, when the marching ants and the black pupil civilization are fighting head-on, we can get more breathing time. "

Zi Yun nodded slightly.

"What's the progress of the super armor technology?" Zi Luo continued to ask.

"Still not working." Zi Yun shook her head.

Just the extraction of ether is enough for researchers to have a headache, let alone use ether to make a formula that meets the power armor.

"This is the consequence of ignoring top scientific research." Zi Luo sighed.

After the Ziwei civilization became a god-level civilization, the internal life began to become complacent, thinking that it was superior in the universe, thus neglecting scientific research and only caring about enjoyment. This began to corrode from the grassroots culture. For hundreds of millions of years, an atmosphere of enjoyment has long formed, especially inside the Ziwei star.

Although on the surface they have not lost to other god-level civilizations in terms of battle armor and space weapon technology, they have fallen behind in the most cutting-edge research and development in the subdivision field.

This ethos began to ease after Zidi cleansed the crape myrtle star and Zi Yun took over the crape myrtle civilization, but the cutting-edge scientific research and development of the essence of the universe will not be able to catch up in more than ten or twenty years.

"The next war will be particularly tragic. Marching Ants, Endless Sea, Land of Thousand Stars, Black Eye Civilization, the future overlord, must be produced in the four houses. No matter which one it is, it will not be a good thing for us. There is no super armor technology. , Our most veteran god-level civilization has left the team contending for hegemony." Zi Luo sighed.

Zi Yun was silent and had nothing to answer.

They are god-level civilizations with incomparable pride. Although they are unwilling to admit that they are pushing the scope of the universe's first-line forces, this is the truth.

They are no longer the empires of the past.

"We should think about the future in advance. If we get there, what should we do." Zi Luo sighed and reminded.

The court fell into dead silence.

...

The Red Army War Head is very troublesome.

The Red Army did not expect that Ming Tu's offensive was so terrifying and intense.

Gou Xuan suffered a loss before, it was caused by underestimating the enemy, but the problem was not big. They only lost part of their battleships, and after they were re-supplied, they were still full of blood and resurrected.

That incident gave him a warning not to despise any opponent.

But he paid enough attention to Ming Tu, but he felt unprecedented pressure.

The super warhead of the marching ants shocked the universe in the war five years ago. The marching ants say that they have the deepest and most mature research on the super warfare. The outside world has said that the super warfare of the marching ants is invincible. He has been indifferent. Now when he encounters Ming Tu, he really realizes the horror.

Chen Mo has disappeared. Over the years, the marching ants have slowly expanded in a steady and steady manner. They have never failed in major battles. You know, in the extremely complicated space war, it is very terrifying to maintain undefeated results in several years of major battles.

The most advanced super army, plus the top generals of the marching ants, combine the two to have the current power of the marching ants.

Ming Tu is a very special top general. He is the ‘failure’ that accidentally succeeded in the special experiment of the meditation civilization. He is also the only life in the universe whose life consciousness is transformed into life consciousness after being shaped into intelligent consciousness.

His special experience is not a secret in the intelligence of major civilizations.

It is such a fateful general star who has now become a top general in the famous universe. Ming Tu's style has been studied by countless generals. It is cold, ruthless, and precise in calculation. He is like an opened magic knife, cold and compelling. It is very uncomfortable to deal with such a general.

In those years, the slaying of the small universe of the underworld civilization and the capture of the Gulu Hongqiao, these years as the marching ants fighting from the east to the west, the reputation has long been out, and the tactical application of the Super War Department is also very mature.

Nearly 10,000-organized Super Warhead easily captured Gulu Hongqiao, and now the Mingtu Warhead is fully staffed, with more than two million Super Warheads, how terrible is the combat power?

Chi Jun squinted, trying to find Ming Tu's tactical laws and loopholes from the layout.

However, it remains the same, as sophisticated as supercomputing.

Ming Tu did not give them a chance to prepare, and started a multi-line war.

For the Super War Department, multi-line warfare can maximize the destructive power of their combat effectiveness.

Ming Tu destroyed their Red Army Warhead in one fell swoop.

Thinking of this, Chi Jun's face was cold.

He was afraid of Lin Han, but he was only on guard against each other among the top generals, and was not afraid of Lin Han. As top stars, they must have strong self-confidence and determination to win.

Suddenly, a message flashed on the screen, and then a light spot on the holographic star chart changed from blue to red.

Another Battlestar was taken down.

The red army's eyebrows twitched, and the cold light in his eyes shrank: "According to the order, the third, fifth, and twelfth legions turned around, attacked the number star Nanhu 19, and destroyed it by all means."

As soon as this remark came out, the murderous spirit overflowed.

On the holographic star chart, the change between red and blue dots is proceeding rapidly.

Soon after the order was issued, the three light spots disappeared in place and appeared on the numbered star Nanhu 19 that had just turned red. The battlefield in the stellar battlefield is open again.

Ming Tu's expression did not fluctuate.

It was expected that it was starting, and the Red Army and Xiao Clan joined forces to set up a battle in the white star field, where the two sides collided.

The Red Army is a veteran star of the Black Eye, the former commander of the First Army, after Hitomi took power and was reorganized, he became the deputy commander of the Black Eye Operations Department, and his warfare methods were sophisticated.

This kind of opponent is very strong, but Ming Tu is not a vegetarian.

The stronger the opponent is, the more excited Ming Tu is, and it has been a long time since he battled an opponent who was also a top-level general.

The holographic star chart in front of you is floating, the color of each punctuation is changing, and the blinking dots indicate the position of the fighting. And beside the star map, various battle reports are flowing fast, even if you are slightly distracted, you may miss important battle reports.

In the past five years, Ming Tu has been studying the tactics of the Super War Department day and night. Among the marching ants, Lan has the strongest strategy and various tactics, which everyone knows. But only a few people know that Ming Tu, who is also a top star, is not bad.

He is talented, hardworking and talented, he is few words, but he has terrifying energy in his dormancy.

Five years of research on super-power tactics, now is the time to truly let go of fighting.

bring it on!

...

The Mustang Galaxy fell, and the Six Beast Line of Defense was basically opened.

The dark forest civilization in the red fox wanted to fight back, but the final result was failure. Inside the Six Beasts Line of Defense, people are panicked, especially near the line of defense around the Mustang Galaxy Group.

Chen Mo's shot made the entire Six Beasts defense line chill.

That is beyond the scope of normal life superpowers.

On the other hand, the endless sea, morale has never been higher.

Their new prophet, leading them, is becoming one of the strongest forces in the universe. The people of the endless sea began to yearn for how powerful they would be when the dark forest was conquered.

Successfully occupy the Mustang galaxy group, they are like piercing a dagger in the heart of the six beasts defense line.

Suddenly, the line of defense that was solid and golden was in jeopardy.

Chen Mo burst into action, and after completely controlling the Mustang galaxy, he waved his hand and waved out again.

One is the high morale, and then there is Chen Mo's terrifying superpower.

The super power covering the galaxy has been passed down as a myth by the outside world. Countless lives watching this war believe that the prophet of the endless sea is beyond the scope of existing life and should belong to the mysterious fourth-dimensional life.

All kinds of rumors made the Dark Forest Star Territory panic.

With this advantage, in the main galaxy battle behind, Bai Hai will let Chen Mo start and destroy the defensive forces in the galaxy.

There is no solution for galaxy-level superpowers at this stage.

The effect of this tactic was so good that even Chen Mo was surprised.

After he was super able to destroy the defensive power of the galaxy, the warhead of the endless sea occupied the galaxy almost effortlessly. Some general stars directly chose to surrender after Chen Mo appeared.

The war of the Red Fox is very smooth.

In this way, the endless sea quickly attacked the main galaxy defense line, forcing the warhead of the dark forest to retreat, and they frantically annexed the red fox star field.

The red fox constellation fell, the dark forest was destroyed for half of the war, and the six beasts defense line was broken.

Almost at the same time, the Black Forest civilization, the mad beast empire, and the Allied Beasts gave up the defense of the Six Beasts line of defense, and the entire army retreated.

The endless sea army invaded the hinterland of the dark forest star field without resistance.

Lost most of the elite warheads, and under the siege of marching ants, the dark forest star field under Dinanye's rule, under the battleship of the endless sea, there is almost no resistance.

The forces of the universe are just like that, watching the endless sea and the army of marching ants crazily sharing the dark forest star field under the rule of Dinanye.

Dinan is finished.

chapters.title: Chapter 1121: : The Madness Of Dinanye
chapters.body:
Chapter 1121: : The Madness Of Dinanye

The woman with poisonous skin sits with her **** upright, her expression as before.

Wan Tianxing is full of spirits, and his ambitions are getting stronger and stronger these years, completely different from before. There is a little more majesty between the eyebrows, quite the temperament of a generation of heroes.

He has grown from a second-rate power leader in just a few decades to become one of today's cosmic superpowers. Leaders of the same level as him before, now face him respectfully and politely.

Over the years, they have teamed up with Poison Skin Girl to build the Thousand Star Empire into an iron bucket. To annex the surrounding forces and continue to strengthen itself. Now the Thousand Star Empire is one of the giants who master the super armor.

The Thor civilization that had oppressed them before, retreated steadily under their battleship.

All kinds of battle reports made him look like a different person, smiling all day long.

"The endless sea invaded the dark forest so quickly!" This news made Wan Tianxing half of his good mood.

Since becoming one of the oligarchs, he began to dream about the future of the universe, subconsciously treating these god-level civilizations as opponents. Now that the endless sea showed such terrifying strength, he would naturally not be too happy.

"Their prophet has galaxy-level superpowers and does not rely on superpower armor." The poisonous girl replied coldly.

"A super-powered person who does not rely on the power armor." Wan Tianxing's eyes burst with desire. He also wants to have this ability, but it can only be a luxury: "What should we do?"

Wan Tianxing subconsciously asked the poisonous girl.

Over the years, he looked to the outside world as the leader of the Thousand Star Empire, but Wan Tianxing himself knew that there was a second leader in the Thousand Star Empire, the poisonous girl who had proposed their alliance.

With regard to the development of the Thousand Star Empire, the Poison Skin Girl put forward more ideas, which is why it has the current situation.

Even the Super Battle Armor was developed by the research team of the Venomous Girl, and the mainstay of the war department was also Carrie and others. So he has the current situation, and this woman takes a large part of the credit.

"After the endless sea annexes the dark forest, there is a possibility that the muzzle will be pointed at us in the future, so it must be arranged in advance."

The poisonous skin goddess is still cold.

She is one of the few people who knows that the Prophet of Endless Sea is Chen Mo, and this news is very important. As a dark hand planted by a marching ant, the outside world still does not know until now.

Over the years, Wan Tianxing thought that the Thousand Star Empire was under his control, but he didn't know that the true core of the Thousand Star Empire was still in her hands.

Wan Tianxing is the number one person, and she is the number two person. She is in charge of half of the military warfare and research and development departments, as well as the intelligence department. The foreign policy has always been Wan Tianxing.

Over the years, the Thousand Star Empire has been united and thriving.

On the one hand, the pressure from the outside has kept them from paying attention to internal struggles, and in recent years, the poisonous girl's opinions on Wantianxing have been fully respected and obeyed. The two discussed with each other and there was no conflict, so Have been in peace.

Therefore, over the years, Wan Tianxing has never doubted what is weird about this comrade-in-arms who played with him in the world.

"How to arrange?" Wan Tianxing asked.

"It is better to have the combat department under the unified command, because I am not a professional general, so I can't say anything. Intervention by laymen may cause more flaws," said the poisonous woman.

"Yes." Wan Tianxing nodded in agreement: "However, in the battle of Thor Civilization, the offensive needs to be increased. Judging from the actions of the Black Eye Civilization, they are very afraid of the marching ants. We and the marching ants have a lot of grievances. The marching ants are too. Stronger, Chen Mo returned again, his cohesiveness increased, and he also annexed the old part of White Star. It can be described as unstoppable. We focus on the Thor civilization, which can make the marching ants and the black pupils reduce their attention to us, rest assured that when the battle is defeated and both lose , We have a big chance."

"This decision is wise." The poisonous girl nodded solemnly.

Hearing the praise of the poisonous girl, Wan Tianxing smiled.

Today's Thousand Star Empire is magnificent, morale, equipment, resources, technology, and talents have reached unprecedented levels, and it is still growing at a high speed. The black-eye civilization and the full-scale war between marching ants are definitely a rare golden period for them.

Seeing Wan Tianxing's proud appearance, the poisonous woman sneered.

In the eyes of those who know the inside story, the situation in the universe is already very clear.

The boss holds the big killer of marching ants, and at the same time the prophet of the endless sea, and the dark chess of the Thousand Star Empire. The power has already become the first of the universe, and the strength is unprecedented.

The only opportunity for the Black Eye Civilization is to unite with such forces as Thor Civilization, Thousand Star Empire, Ziwei Civilization and Black Forest, and then connect with other second-rate forces to have a chance to compete.

Now the endless sea and the marching ants are eating the dark forest star field. When the dark forest is finished eating, the general situation is gone.

Poison Skin Girl knows instructor Lan very well, instructor Lan is as good as a fox, with such a good hole card and card surface, she will never give other forces any chance.

As for the Thousand Star Empire...

...

The atmosphere of the War Department in the Dark Forest was extremely depressing.

Under the offensive of the endless sea, the warhead of the dark forest retreats steadily, and the warhead is seriously worn out. In addition, the marching ants are also waiting for the opportunity to launch an offensive, which is the last straw to crush the camel.

The already weakened dark forest was flanked by two super giants, and the situation collapsed instantly.

The hearts of the stars and the soldiers were distracted, and there was a phenomenon of defecting, but they could do nothing.

Their current situation is the real scene of the collapse of the dam.

Many generals know the situation, and their current situation has no resistance. The marching ants and the super warhead of the endless sea are eroding their defense lines.

What they have to face is the ‘dimensionality reduction blow’ of the two giants.

The devouring of the two sides made their defenses fragmented, completely fighting on their own, and scattered.

When the snowball rolls up, no one can stop the avalanche trend. This is the ‘potential’ of war and can be changed without human power. Panic and panic spread in the heart of every life in the dark forest.

"Is there any chance to counterattack?" Di Nanye grabbed the ghost fox and asked grimly.

Guihu was silent, and shook his head in loss.

They have no chance. Regardless of resources, generals, technology, strength, morale, superpowers, or leaders, they have no advantage. Now that the line of defense is torn apart, and the hearts of the people in the Dark Forest Star Territory under its jurisdiction are shattered, how to counterattack?

Battleships and war machines used to deliver food, while soldiers passed and died in vain.

A miracle may appear and it may be possible to save the dark forest, but looking forward to a miracle of war is as small as looking forward to the big bang tomorrow.

Di Nanye glanced at the general star of the War Department, looking extremely unwilling.

Morale here is low and there is no fighting spirit.

From the coup d’état to the present, they have occupied the best resources and talents in the dark forest, but after years of operation, they did not expect the situation today. He once thought that the dark forest they ruled could replace the original dark forest civilization.

However, looking back now, that was just the beginning of the end of the empire.

He admitted that he was not wrong, it was the fault of Dark Forest.

The previous dark forests had serious martial arts, serious internal struggles, serious struggles, grievances and hatreds between various orcs, and old-fashioned. They ignored the development of technology and unity, and Dinan Miro was also weak and incompetent.

Therefore, even if the life of the dark forest is generally higher in the personal strength of the battle armor, they are also the most combative, but in the god-level civilization, their strength is also the inverse.

Over the years, he wanted to change. After the coup, he cleaned up many ethnic groups and concentrated power in his hands. It's just that he never expected that the space war would begin without waiting for them to catch their breath.

Super power technology appeared, super power armor appeared, super power became the mainstream.

The successive technological changes have left them completely behind.

In front of the endless sea of unity and the super giant marching ants, they are as weak as babies caught by two giants.

"The messenger of the marching ants contacted me." The ghost fox lowered his head, his voice lonely.

"What did you say?" Di Nanye turned to look at him.

"Persuade them to surrender, they are willing to incorporate the dark forest, put aside all previous grievances, and give equal treatment and policies to all the people of the dark forest. They only need to surrender." Guihu said.

"What do you think?" Di Nanye looked at the others.

The star on the field was silent.

Di Nanye looked at a thin life beside him.

He is the life of the Monkey Clan in the Dark Forest, Huli, and Di Nanye's powerful brain-tank in internal affairs.

"Surrender, the marching ants will help us block the endless sea. If we don't surrender, the two families will eat us, and the endless sea may kill us." Hou Li whispered.

There was no sound in the war department.

"Is there no chance for our troops?"

"No." Ghost Fox poured cold water.

He is the star, his heart is in the dark forest, but at this time, he has no need to lie. This fact is also difficult for him to accept.

"What if we ambush with black hole weapons and use space weapons for space bombing?"

The temperature in the War Department instantly became cold.

Many staring faces looked at each other, and they all saw the shock and hesitation in each other's eyes.

"In this way, the entire dark forest will become a dead place. Once the space collapses, it will cause a chain reaction, and the entire star field will become a world of black holes and spatial turbulence." Ghost Fox retorted shockingly.

"For this kind of result, they want to destroy us, and they have to die together and go to **** together." Di Nanye's eyes were extremely crazy.

"The White Star Civilization chooses that path, and the ethnic civilization can be preserved." Ghost Fox said.

"If there is no dark forest civilization, what kind of ethnic civilization is there? Why do you want the dark forest star field? Why do you want the universe?" Di Nanye roared: "We still have a small universe hiding in it, and it will not be us who die. "

He stood in front of the battle platform, staring at the star map.

"You're crazy." Guihu shook his head and said, "I can't give that kind of order. Let others be the commander in command."

He was extremely disappointed, and his loyal leader actually looked like this. Under the gaze of everyone, he took off his chest badge and communication device, placed it on the battle platform, and turned to leave the war room.

Di Nanye's face was extremely gloomy.

The other Jiang Xing was cold, staring at each other, all lowered their heads, their eyes flickering constantly.

chapters.title: Chapter 1122: :News
chapters.body:
Chapter 1122: :News

Guihu took a sip of water and wine, his eyes were extremely lost, his eyes were out of focus. He didn't stop until the water wine bottomed out, sighed, and grabbed another bottle of water wine.

The next moment, I saw a middle-aged man knocking on the door and coming in. It was not someone else but Hou Li, Di Nanye's chief think tank.

Glancing at the person, Guihu ignored it.

"Can I have a drink?" Hou Li said.

Ghost Fox did not speak.

Hou Li ignored him, sat down opposite him, took a bottle of water and wine, and took a sip: "How long have we been with the adults?"

"Three thousand six hundred and forty-three years."

Guihu raised his head and took a sip, laughing at himself.

"When I first met him, he was full of spirits and ambitions, and he was about to change the decay and conservativeness of the Dark Forest. At that time I was just an ordinary command student at the War College. Later, he saw my talents and made me plunge into the Dark Forest. The military starts with the team leader.

Along the way, for more than three thousand years, I have been the deputy commander of the Dark Forest Operations Department, and accompanied him in the coup. He has been fighting for his goal, he did it, and I did it. But he didn't expect that after the success of the coup, he began to change. "

"Hey!" Hou Li sighed, did not refute, and seemed to agree with Guihu's words. I don't know if it is because of too much pressure or because after becoming a leader, power and other things are involved too much.

"If you are here to persuade me to go back, you don't have to." Guihu said disappointedly.

The war failed. As the commander-in-chief, he suffered more than anyone else, but knowing that it was irretrievable, he had to pull up half of the star field to bury him. Di Nanye was crazy, for his power, crazy.

After being silent for a long time, Hou Li took a sip of wine: "I really came to persuade you."

Guihu glanced at him and raised the wine bottle. It was self-evident. After touching this bottle, they were all set well.

"Listen to me first." Hou Li sighed and said, "Levin, Asa came to me and let me think about whether there is another way to preserve the last fire in the dark forest."

"Shrink in a small universe?" Guihu said mockingly.

Before the change, the tortoise was in a small universe, which seemed to be very safe from the outside world, but now it is different. There are not many secrets in the universe. Chen Mo alone abducted Mrs. Fox and entered the small universe of the White Star, bringing the white star civilization into a nest. .
