The little universe has long been insecure.

"No, they asked me to think of other ways. The dynasty change is a rule. The dark forest we used to be built on the ruins of other civilizations, the adults still can't see it." Hou Li said.

"What do you mean?" Guihu took a sip of water and wine and looked at Hou Li.

"Levin and Asa approached me and let me persuade you to go back."

Guihu frowned and looked at Hou Li puzzledly.

"Don't look at me like that, the adults are crazy. They asked me if they could persuade you to go back and take charge of the overall situation and deprive adults of their power. Just like the white star civilization, throw in the marching ants and at least preserve some autonomy. If you don't go back, they will leave Go far, find a safe and remote planet for the elderly, and I will also go far."

Hou Li raised the bottle, laughed at himself, and took a sip of water.

"The marching ants and the endless sea are afraid of even the Black Eye civilization. We have no chance to be attacked by them. Although they were once opponents, we have to say that they are much better than us. Especially Chen Mo, just a few dozen short Years, such an achievement, I didn’t even dare to think about it before. But the world is so fast. As long as we take a nap, we will be eliminated."

The eyes of the ghost fox are as deep as an abyss.

"I didn't think I could get this far. This may be a betrayal. We have betrayed the dark forest civilization once. But this time is half the life of the dark forest. Our ethnic group and our family are also in it. I have to choose this way." Hou Li laughed wildly, with unwillingness and sarcasm in his voice.

...

Yan looked coldly at the star map of the Blackstone Galaxy.

The miniature of this star map with a range of one hundred thousand light-years is so small in his eyes.

The battlefield is very tragic.

Warships are continuously thrown into the battlefield of the space port. Because it is a strategic location, the Blackstone Galaxy is wrapped in space bubbles, and only the space port is open to the outside world, which naturally becomes a battlefield.

The battleships of the Ziwei civilization have also been continuously sent into the Blackstone Galaxy through the space connector, and immediately put into the battlefield.

This is a terrifying large-scale battle.

In the hundreds of millions of years after the establishment of the cosmic god-level civilization, there have been very few wars between such god-level civilizations. They are all trying to consume, hoping that they will be the last to laugh.

Yan stood in front of the combat platform, allowing all kinds of information to change.

The war in the Blackstone galaxy is coming to an end, and countless war machines of the Ziwei civilization are densely packed like rain, surging toward the space port.

However, in the face of this offensive, Yan did not have much face fluctuations. The two war machines collided in space, with only explosions and debris. The small ignition group was inconspicuous in the boundless space.

A wave of offensive ends, and then a second offensive is brewing.

"It's now."

Yan's cold voice sounded, and he waved his hand gently.

Huhuhu!

Hundreds of spacecrafts that have been ready for a long time started to jump and appeared at the space port. They were neatly arranged, spaced the size of a planet, and formed a net in space, seeming to seal the space port.

Immediately afterwards, a figure flew out of the spaceship, and one armored division stood on it.

Seeing this scene, the face of Zi Luo Rourou, who was far away in the base camp of Ziwei civilization, trembled, with an ominous premonition.

Sure enough, the next moment, he knew that his premonition had come true.

I saw the armoured divisions in space, open their arms one by one, and an invisible wave shrouded the space-based weapons in the space port. I saw the space-based weapons and battleships in the space port, slowly disintegrating and exploding.

Planetary superpower.

Thousands of planet-level superpowers.

"Is this Black Eye's Super Warhead?" Zi Yun saw her battleship explode, and her cold face finally changed color.

Zi Luo looked at the disintegrating space-based weapons and war machines in the video with a dazed expression.

He hasn't fought with the marching ants before, but he has seen the tactics of the marching ants in the movie. The super-power warheads of the Black Eye Civilization are obviously jerky than the marching ants, and the range and strength of super powers are also worse, slightly immature.

But even so, it forms an advantage for them.

It was the first time that he encountered the Super War Department. Although he had been mentally prepared for this, he was still a little dazed by this moment.

The form of the war suddenly became different.

"At this stage, the mechanical warfare can't make up for the shortcomings of the super warfare." Zi Luo sighed and said, "I'm afraid the Blackstone Galaxy cannot be kept."

"This range of super power will consume a lot of money." Zi Yun said.

"It's useless, the black pupils have come prepared. Several regional fleets around them have been dispatched. It happens to be in neutral now. Our defensive fortress and space-based weapons have been destroyed. As long as their warships rush into the harbor, they will even break through the line of defense. Entered the interior of the Blackstone Galaxy."

"What to do?" Zi Yun returned to her former coldness.

"Retreat, let the warhead retreat before they enter the Blackstone galaxy and destroy the space connector. We need to retain our troops and defend the line of defense on the space abyss. Our goal is to delay time." Zi Luo said.

"You call the shots." Zi Yun said without hesitation.

Zi Luo's chubby fingers bounced flexibly on the combat platform and issued a command.

"retreat!"

Almost at the moment the command was issued, the general star in the Blackstone galaxy immediately issued an order to retreat. Covered by the unmanned fleet in the space port, other warships passed through the space connector and left the Blackstone Galaxy.

Sending out the retreat command, Zi Luo rubbed his fleshy face and sighed.

Suddenly, a message sounded...

Yan smiled slightly when he received the news of the abnormal movement of the garrisoned warhead in the Blackstone Galaxy.

He and Zi Luo are both smart people and old opponents, and both understand each other's plans. Ziwei Civilization currently does not have a Super War Department. Their Black Eyes paid a huge price. The Super War Department has just taken shape. He has a slight advantage on the two cards.

But he also knew that Ziluo's purpose of delaying time.

"Increase the offensive of the Blackstone Galaxy." Yan waved his hand, giving orders to the general star next to him.

I saw thousands of transport ships full of war machines, one jump, appeared outside the space port, and countless war machines were thrown into space and swarmed into the space port.

The forces of both sides, which were originally evenly matched, increased and decreased, and the balance began to tilt.

Dididi...

Before Yan had time to be happy for breaking through the Blackstone Galaxy, a message reminder sounded, and his slightly smiling face froze when he saw the content above.

chapters.title: Chapter 1123: : This Is A Well-Planned Conspiracy
chapters.body:
Chapter 1123: : This Is A Well-Planned Conspiracy

The Red Army Warhead was defeated!

The offensive of the Ming Tu War Department was more violent than the Red Army expected. They originally entered the White Star Territory to encircle and suppress the old warhead of the White Star, and suffered heavy losses. In this battle, he was beaten out of temper.

Ming Tu is much more advanced than him in the tactics of the Super War Department, and most importantly, the Super War Department of the Marching Ants is much stronger than them.

Their super war club, in front of the super war club of the marching ants, is like a boy scout holding a big knife. The two sides faced off against the key galaxy line of defense, and as soon as they started their hands, they appeared to be defeated.

In the face of absolute strength, the tactics recognized by the Red Army were useless, and could not cause much damage to the Ming Tu battle department.

He felt so weak for the first time.

The battle of Bai Xing failed, the Xiao Clan and the Black Eye allied forces, under the pressure of the Ming Tu War Department, steadily retreated.

The Red Army couldn't believe that his warhead would have suffered such a big failure in the White Star Domain. This is the biggest failure of the Black Eye civilization since the space war.

When this news spread, it was undoubtedly a huge blow to the vigor of the Black Eyed warheads.

The plan to annex the old part of White Star failed.

This means that the plan with the White Star Civilization as its depth goes bankrupt.

The Red Army realized a more serious problem!

The Ming Tu battle department won a big victory and successfully took over the White Star Domain.

The marching ants, together with the white star field that they swallowed before, are now connected together, occupying most of the star field of the white star civilization. Moreover, the white star field borders the black pupil star field, and the marching ant's offensive against the black pupil civilization will officially begin. There is no longer a need to eliminate the five cities on the ten city alliance star field.

The war between the marching ants and their black eyes is about to begin.

How can marching ants be so powerful?

The news spread in the universe and caused an uproar.

Black pupil civilization is in danger!

This is the conclusion reached by many general stars after research.

This so-called the strongest god-level civilization ushered in a major crisis.

In the past, the black pupil civilization and the marching ants did not border on each other. The two sides started a proxy war through the ten-city alliance star field. Although the three cities that joined the black pupil alliance were weak, with the support of the black pupil civilization, and after Chen Mo disappeared , The marching ants' offensive slows down, and there is no problem persisting for a while.

But now, the white star field and the black pupil star field have a long star boundary line. The marching ants can pass through the white star field and enter the black pupil star field from any place, bringing the flames of war into the black pupil star field.

Everyone can see the power of marching ants.

They had never seen the first legion of the Black Eye Civilization, and now the Red Army Warhead was defeated so easily, and it was still a big defeat.

The fangs displayed by the Ming Tu War Department made them realize that the army ants' nurturing energy in the past few years is more terrifying than they thought, and the background is more abundant.

Almost every soldier is a super power, equipped with a super power armor of constant star.

This is the invincible warhead!

The news of the great defeat of the White Star poured cold water on the head of the black pupil civilization that had been morale high after taking the Blackstone galaxy.

"What to do?" Tong Qing looked at Yan, who had always been calm and calm, frowning at this time.

"The current way to deal with it is a misaligned attack. The marching ants also have a weak line of defense. We use these weak places to contain and harass them, delay the pace of war, and enter a state of protracted war."

Yan stared at the star chart and analyzed seriously.

"We are weak now, and protracted warfare is in our favor. This will give us enough time to improve and develop super-powered technology, and strive to catch up with the army ants. This has another advantage, that is, waiting for the endless sea to swallow the dark forest, the endless sea and The marching ants will border each other, and if two giant beasts are close, they will contain each other."

"What else?" Hitomi asked.

"There is also to seek cooperation. We propose cooperation to Thousand Star Empire and Endless Sea. Their super armor technology does not seem to be weaker than the marching ants. Let them sell their super armor to our equipment army to temporarily relieve the cutting edge. The pressure of troops." Yan said.

"They may not sell it." Hitomi shook his head and said, replacing it with him. If their potential opponent wants to buy top technical equipment from him, he will definitely refuse.

"They may not refuse." Yan said: "Because we and their two families have a common potential opponent, the marching ants, and the marching ants are the strongest of our families, and they may not be able to join hands against him in the future."

Tongqing frowned for a moment and nodded gently.

At this moment, the female assistant Tara knocked on the door and entered Hitomi's office, looking hurriedly, with a document in her hand.

"What's the matter?" Tong Qing turned to look at Tara.

"Something happened in the dark forest."

Tara handed the information in her hand to Tongqing, and now the black pupil was ruined in the white star domain, and the situation was not optimistic. She could not judge whether the news was good or bad for them.

Tongqing and Yan glanced at each other, hurriedly flipping through the documents, and then, a hint of joy appeared on their faces at the same time.

...

Another coup in the dark forest!

The war started in a way they did not expect, and ended in a way they did not expect.

The trend of the battle was beyond the expectations of all lives.

The Prophet of the Endless Sea displays terrifying superpowers without any solution.

The Dark Forest Star Territory was split due to Dinanye's coup and has been fighting all the year round. The consumption of various resources is amazing, but the strength is not weak.

Among the various forces, there are powerful generals and warheads. In terms of resources, the endless sea is stronger, but the war department of the war department and the dark forest star field are united and definitely stronger than the endless sea.

Unexpectedly, Endless Sea did not choose to die with the dark forest, but chose this almost rogue advancing method, coupled with the marching ants waiting for an opportunity behind, the dark forest civilization under Dinanye's rule collapsed.

When the dark forest is eaten by the endless sea and marching ants, the dark forest's rout is a foregone conclusion.

The dark forest civilization is over!

Di Nanye wants to bomb the star field, throw in countless space weapons and black hole weapons, pull up the endless sea and the warhead of marching ants to bury him.

The news came out and caused a sensation in the universe.

Everyone in the dark forest was terrified, and almost qualified life, all took spaceships, and their families fled the dark forest star field and surrendered to the endless sea and marching ants.

However, before Dinanye launched a space bombing, the ghost and fox led the star to declare a coup to seize power and control Dinanye.

Di Nanye was irritated and went crazy.

Hearing this news, the leaders of the major forces were silent for it, and felt sad. They think that if they put them in Dinanye's position, they would be worse than Dinanye.

The news followed.

The ghost fox succeeded the temporary leader of the dark forest.

Soon, the ghost fox announced that the Dark Forest had unconditionally surrendered to the marching ants!

Chen Mo appeared in public, accepted the ghost fox's surrender, and signed an order to grant autonomy to the dark forest. Hou Li organized the dark forest's autonomous team to manage the dark forest under the law of marching ants.

Houli became the first governor of the dark forest.

The ghost fox resigned from the army.

The Supreme Command of the Marching Ants announced that they would give the ghost fox the necessary resources and support in accordance with the retirement benefits of the Supreme Commander of the Marching Ants.

Wang Hai’s Sea King War Department took over all warheads in the Dark Forest, reorganized the warhead, and in the dark forest, began to select special superpowers to enter the super warhead reserve camp.

Soon after he took control of the dark forest, Chen Mo announced his occupation of the dark forest and publicly requested the endless sea to withdraw troops and leave the dark forest star field.

The Prophet of Endless Sea also publicly refused the request of the marching ants.

There was a quarrel between the two sides

The situation in the universe is tense. The two are currently recognized as the strongest forces. If they have a war, it will be the most terrifying collision.

The omnipotent Chen Mo vs. the young and mysterious Prophet of Endless Sea.

One was a man who dared to break into the white star small universe by himself, and swept all the senior members of the white star to destroy the white star civilization. A man who controls a galaxy with his own power and accurately destroys all warships in it.

All have fabulous records.

This strong collision has become the collision that life in the universe most anticipates and fears.

The outside world does not know that the two are actually the same person, singing the double reed.

This is a well-planned conspiracy!

chapters.title: Chapter 1124: :Transaction Terms
chapters.body:
Chapter 1124: :Transaction Terms

"The endless sea and the marching ants are about to start a great battle. 》

"Black Eye Civilization Red Army War Head defeated! 》

"The endless sea confronts the marching ant warhead in the air, and the battle is about to begin. 》

"The Endless Sea will launch an offensive against the Black Forest. 》

"The marching ants once again issued a warning, demanding the withdrawal of troops from the endless sea. 》

...

All kinds of news circulated on the Universe News Network, stirring up stormy waves. The major forces are looking forward to the start of the war between the marching ants and the endless sea, and on the universe network, these things have been noisy.

The warheads of the two sides did not withdraw their troops, and stationed in the star domains they occupied, establishing defense lines, and could clearly smell the smell of gunpowder.

As opponents of the two families, many forces wish them to go to war immediately and relieve their pressure.

Chen Mo, who was sitting in the headquarters of the endless sea, showed a faint smile on his face when he saw the direction of public opinion outside.

What they want is this kind of effect, which can paralyze the enemy, and when they finish cleaning up the dark forest star field, they will return the carbine, and the overall situation will be set.

This is Lan's plan, which can reduce a lot of resistance.

If they succeed in deceiving their enemies, they will succeed more than half.

"Prophet, the messenger of the black pupil civilization is here, hoping to see you." Shuiling walked into the office and said to Chen Mo who was looking at the light curtain.

She glanced at Chen Mo's holographic light curtain, and she understood.

After Chen Mo became a prophet, she was next to Chen Mo as an assistant. Because there are many things about endless sea, she knows better, and her ancestors also told her to follow Chen Mo.

She is one of the few beings in the endless sea who knows Chen Mo's true identity. It is obvious that the power in Chen Mo's hands is enough to unify the universe.

Unify the universe!

This is something she couldn't even think of before.

The situation in the entire universe is now being led by marching ants.

The outside world is spreading that endless sea is going to war with marching ants. She sneered at this kind of remarks.

Fighting with yourself is impossible unless Chen Moxian gets sick.

But this kind of remarks can paralyze the enemies of the endless sea and the marching ants. When the outside forces discover the truth, it may be too late.

She is almost certain that when the truth is announced, the real overall situation of the universe is set.

"Bring him in." Chen Mo closed the holographic light curtain and waved his hand.

"Okay." Shuiling touched the communication device in his hand.

After a while, a life covered with black pupil magic patterns, led by the guard, entered Chen Mo's office. This is an ordinary life, without super power, enough to express the sincerity of the black pupil civilization, and can avoid unnecessary trouble.

"Prophet, Jiu Yang, I am the messenger of the black pupil civilization, the speaker asked me to come and discuss with the prophet." The black pupil messenger spoke humbly, and secretly looked at the changes in Chen Mo's expression.

If he hadn't seen it with his own eyes, it would be hard for him to imagine that such an ordinary sea-like life was actually a young prophet of the endless sea, and possessed the terrifying superpower to destroy a galaxy alone.

"Does the pupil of the pupil come here?" Chen Mo asked lightly.

As soon as he said this, the black pupil envoy's body shook. He was a little angry and Chen Mo said that he was a young man, but he did not dare to show it. His face was still smiling: "Prophet, the speaker let me take charge of this cooperation."

"Talk about it." Chen Mo said.

"Our speaker wants to buy the super armor of the endless sea, the conditions are up to you." said the black pupil messenger.

"Buy our super armor? We don't have enough super armor." Chen Mo waved his hand: "Go back, don't sell it."

The black pupil envoy said in a hurry: "Respected prophet, now the marching ants are strong, and the aura is soaring. Our black pupil has super-powered armor, which can restrain them, and it is also very good for the endless sea."

"What if you use these armors to deal with our endless sea?" Chen Mo seemed to smile.

"No, the super armor of the marching ants is too strong, and there are many soldiers, if the endless sea fights with the marching ants, I am afraid it will be uncomfortable. The speaker told his subordinates, as long as the endless sea agreed to sell the super armor, we can When the endless sea is at war with the marching ants, choose to help the endless sea to deal with the marching ants." said the black pupil messenger.

"It sounds tempting, but how can I guarantee that you will send troops?" Chen Mo asked back.

Hearing the loosening in Chen Mo's tone, the black pupil envoy was happy in his heart, and his expression remained calm: "This... we can sign an agreement."

"Agreement? In the war years, agreements are waste paper." Chen Mo said with disdain.

"Then what are the conditions for the prophet? What our black pupil civilization can do must satisfy the prophet." The black pupil envoy said respectfully: "As much money as the prophet needs."

He knew that it would definitely not be so easy to get the Super Armor. Before coming, he was mentally prepared.

"Money? Are you kidding me?"

"What does the prophet need?" the black pupil envoy asked embarrassingly.

"We need planetary resource territory, I want Devil Xingyuan, Devil Xingyuan will return us the endless sea, and then talk about the purchase of armor, otherwise we will not talk about it." Chen Mo said.

"This……"

The black pupil envoy's eyelids jumped, he heard this condition for the first time.

Devil Xingyuan is too important, and there is a piece of history behind it.

Back then, the then-chairman of Black Eye Civilization and the then-prophet of Endless Sea had conflicts because of the issue of the ownership of Devil Xingyuan.

At that time, the magic crab civilization fought with the black pupil civilization, and finally defeated, the black pupil civilization occupied the star field of the magic crab civilization. Afterwards, the Devil Crab Civilization throws its clan into the endless sea, and together with the inhabiting Devil Xingyuan also declares to be included in the endless sea.

But at that time, Devil Xingyuan was occupied by Black Eye Civilization, and it was a strategic location, so Endless Sea asked Black Eye Civilization to return Devil Xingyuan.

After that, the two sides confronted each other by force.

After the old prophet of the endless sea came forward, the endless sea agreed to abandon the Devil Xingyuan.

The reason why Devil Star Abyss is important is that there are more than two thousand **** holes distributed around it, and the rest of the space is mostly spatial turbulence.

The periphery of Devil Xingyuan is one of the forbidden areas of the universe, but inside is a cosmic ‘outdoor peach garden’.

Devil Xingyuan has only a few entrances, but it was also disrupted by the black pupil civilization with space weapons, blocking the entrance, leaving only two galaxy springboards as entrances.

There is a natural cosmic barrier, it is a super battlestar, which can store a lot of resources, easy to defend and difficult to attack, and most importantly, it is located at the junction of the two sides, adjacent to some prosperous constellations.

Using the Devil Star Abyss as a springboard, it can radiate the surrounding star field. Whether it is for the Black Pupil civilization or the endless sea, its strategic significance is very great, and it is a strategic pass between the two civilizations.

"You can ask your speaker, and if you agree, you can continue to discuss the terms of the transaction, or you can go back."

"Please wait."

Hei Tong pointed and hurriedly spoke, dialed a number, said a few words softly, after a long pause, then looked up at Chen Mo.

"Dear Prophet, the Speaker wants to chat with you."

"can."

Obtaining Chen Mo's promise, the black pupil envoy turned on the communicator to release a green pupil projection.

Just like this, Chen Mo and Tong Qing looked at each other through the quantum network. Chen Mo can change any structure and parts of his body at will, so Tong Qing can't recognize it. The sea-like life in front of him is his biggest opponent, Chen Mo.

"Long admiring the name, respectable prophet." Tong Qing said first.

"Long Yang, Chairman Tongqing." Chen Mo responded lightly.

"The prophet is very similar to a person I know."

"Really? It's the first time I heard that I am like others, not others like me." Chen Mo curled up a smile: "I want to know, who is this person?"

"Chen Mo." Tongqing looked at the prophet in the holographic projection, and said without concealment: "If it is not for war, each is the master, I would like to make friends with him. But the prophet and I can give to friends, I don't know. Is there such a chance?"

"Haha!" Chen Mo smiled, a little admiring Tongqing, and through a holographic light screen, he can have this intuition: "Now it's about trading, not about feelings. My condition just said, you agree, we can Keep talking, if you are not satisfied, there is no need to waste time."

"Can you change the conditions and change the red cloud constellation next to Devil Star Abyss?" Hitomi said: "The red cloud constellation is three times larger than the range of Devil Star Abyss, and it also has abundant resource planets."

"I refuse." Chen Mo said, "Everyone understands and understands the importance of Devil Xingyuan. If you don't change it, there is no need to talk about it. Besides, Devil Xingyuan should have been an endless sea back then. It’s not too much for you to come back after occupying it for so many years. You don’t have any sincerity, so don’t talk about cooperative transactions."

"This……"

Tongqing's face was condensed.

As Chen Mo said, they all know the importance of Devil Xingyuan.

"Let me think about it."

chapters.title: Chapter 1125: : He Has Another Identity
chapters.body:
Chapter 1125: : He Has Another Identity

The Dark Forest unconditionally surrendered marching ants, which everyone in the endless sea did not expect.

Now the generals of the endless sea are considering how to deal with the marching ants. Although they have not participated in the space war in these years, they are paying attention to the situation all the time.

Marching ants are currently the strongest force, especially after Chen Mo announced his return, his momentum has changed and his low-key style has changed.

The Ming Tu War Department defeated the Black Eye's Red Army War Department, attracting the attention of the entire universe, as powerful as the Black Eye civilization, and also defeated by the marching ants.

Especially the opponent of marching ants, everyone is in danger.

The only exception is the endless sea. Their prophets also gave them super armor technology, which is completely unafraid of the super warhead of the marching ants, and their super super powers, also have prophets, are not afraid of the marching ants to take their high-level Catch it all in one go.

The powerful prophet is their greatest pride in the endless sea.

The dark forest is destroyed, their next goal in the endless sea, in addition to the marching ants, there are civilizations such as the dark forest and the beast empire in the dark forest star field.

When the outside world was watching the movements of the endless sea, the prophet of the endless sea made a decision that made the outside world puzzled.

Endless Sea publicly announced that it had reached a deal with Black Eye Civilization and sold the Super Armor to Black Eye Civilization.

This news caused an uproar in the public opinion of the universe.

Originally thought that the endless sea and the marching ants confronted, the relationship between the two parties was tense enough, but the prophet of the endless sea added fuel to the fire and sold the super armor to the march ants' biggest enemy.

Will Endless Sea and Black Eye Civilization join forces to deal with marching ants?

Next, the big move of the endless sea is even more puzzling.

After announcing the sale of the Super Power Armor to the Black Eye Civilization, the Prophet of the Endless Sea ordered to continue to reorganize the army and attack the remaining forces such as the Black Forest and the Beast Empire.

This decision made other forces in the Dark Forest Star Territory look like enemies.

All decision makers are extremely confused.

The Dark Forest unconditionally took refuge in the marching ants, and the marching ants publicly declared their sovereignty over the dark forest star domain. Now that endless sea continues to start war in the dark forest star domain, it is undoubtedly provoking the authority of the marching ants.

The Prophet of the Endless Sea is not talking about it.

The Headquarters of Endless Sea, with the White Sea commanding the main army and the Black Sea commanding the deputy army, began to march towards the Black Forest. And Zihai general, as the deputy to guard against the marching ant war department, stationed in the dark forest star field to confront the marching ant king sea warfare.

It seems that everything is not out of the control of the Prophet of Endless Sea.

From the outside, the dark forest star field will start another terrible war.

The war of marching ants against the endless sea.

"Prophet, why sell the super armor to Black Eye? In this way, the contradiction between us and the marching ants will intensify." Bai Hai asked puzzled.

The Black Sea General and the Purple Sea General beside him nodded in agreement.

No matter how you look at it, this is a bad move.

To help Black Eye, you have to offend the army ants and find them the most powerful opponent, and the Black Eye civilization may continue to grow, and the future may be their opponent, and they were once opponents.

It is not in their interest to rescue the black pupil civilization.

"We have reached this point. You need to know something." Chen Mo glanced at the three of them and said calmly.

Bai Hai stared at each other, not understanding what the Prophet meant.

Does the prophet have other important things to hide from them?

Chen Mo stretched out his hand, and a space door appeared in front of them. After a while, two figures came out of the door of space. It was the old Prophet Endless Sea and the former ancient prophet who went out to wander around.

Seeing the old prophet and the ancient prophet, Bai Hai gave a solemn expression to the three of them and saluted them solemnly.

This is the highest etiquette of the endless sea.

In their hearts, the old prophet has always been their faith.

"Old Prophet, why are you here?" Bai Haijiang said.

"Some things are better for me." The old prophet glanced at a few people in the office, then hobbled into a chair and sat down: "It's time for you to know the truth."

Bai Hai looked at each other, but they all stood solemnly without making a sound.

"The prophet standing in front of you, he is my student." The old prophet said.

"Old prophet, we know this." Bai Haijiang was full of doubts, and did not understand why the old prophet said this, because in the history of the endless sea, all the current prophets are students of the old prophet.

"He has another identity, Chen Mo, the leader of marching ants."

The expressions of the three people froze on their faces, like being struck by lightning.

...

"Black Eye Civilization sent messengers to buy Super Armor, and I haven't agreed yet." Wan Tianxing held up a glass of drink, with a slight smile on his face: "What do you think?"

"Me?" said the poisonous girl: "You can make up your mind about this."

"I personally think it can be sold, but you still have to listen to your opinion on the super armor technology." Wan Tianxing said.

"If you sell it, you will have to commit a crime of army ants, should you consider it?"

"Yeah." Wan Tianxing nodded slightly: "That's how I chose to sell. The marching ants are now strong. They are facing the endless sea, and the endless sea will sell the armor to the black pupil, and we can do it naturally. Let the black pupil and The marching ants are consumed by the battle, which is good for us. The An's Transcendent Galaxy Cluster and the former Sauron Alliance belonged to the marching ants, now they are next to us, and the pressure on us is also great."

"Then sell it and contain the marching ants. We can deal with Thor Civilization with peace of mind. However, the conditions should be bigger, so that the Black Eye Civilization cannot get our super armor so easily."

The poisonous girl sneered, which was exactly what she wanted.

When the Black Eye Civilization knew that they were using equipment provided by their enemies, it was too late.

"The condition they offered is a galaxy and a suit of armor." Wan Tianxing laughed.

"No." The Venomous Girl shook her head immediately: "One galaxy for a set of armor? It's too cheap. At least three galaxies can get a set of super armor, and it can cost five galaxies a little higher."

"Will it be too high?" Wan Tianxing paused, questioning.

"Not high, the star field is the most indispensable thing for the black pupil civilization. What they lack is the equipment that can withstand the marching ants. He trades 30 million galaxies to us, and he can get 10 million sets of super powers. Battle Armor, they can initially equip a super warhead to relieve the pressure from the marching ants. Thirty million galaxies are not many for the black pupil civilization. Moreover, the black pupil is also our potential opponent, we do not Reason not to earn more."

Wan Tianxing was taken aback, and after thinking about it, he nodded in agreement.

"Then talk to them on your terms."

"Would you like to schedule that meeting?" The poisonous woman asked.

Now Wan Tian Xing trusts her unconditionally. In the Thousand Star Empire, she can take charge of most affairs, but she still has to ask Wan Tian Xing’s opinions, which can reduce Wan Tian Xing’s defenses against her and not do things to her. Suspicious.

"Yes." Wan Tianxing nodded gently.

He feels very comfortable since working with the girl with poisonous skin.

At least in his opinion, he is making up his mind on some important matters.

He is the leader of the Thousand Star Empire pushed to the front. Although they are of equal status inside, his position is half a level higher than that of the poisonous girl in the outside world, which does not affect his vanity.

From the outside, he is the king of the Thousand Star Empire, leading the restoration of the Thousand Star Empire.

The situation in the universe has changed too much.

The two former god-level civilizations, White Star and Dark Forest, took refuge in marching ants.

The endless sea invades the dark forest and confronts the marching ants.

The war between the black pupil civilization and the marching ants was beyond the expectations of all forces. The Red Army Warhead was defeated, and the Black Eye civilization fell into crisis. Now Black Eye Civilization has joined the collaborator of Endless Sea.

Everything is changing and dazzling.

The black pupil civilization once was the strongest god-level civilization they could not achieve, but now, the black pupil civilization has fallen to the point where they buy equipment from them.

No one knows what will happen next.

The terrifying combat power displayed by the super warhead of the marching ants made the Thousand Star Empire feel great pressure.

The two god-level civilizations that once dominated the universe, Ming Body and White Star, were directly or indirectly destroyed in the hands of marching ants. Chen Mo also included half of the dark forest's power. No one dared to question the power of marching ants.

The marching ants that have only appeared for a few decades are stronger than any civilization in the history of the universe, and their influence surpasses the crape myrtle civilization at the peak of the history of the universe.

Now the marching ants are confronting the endless sea, and they are at war with the black pupil civilization. This is undoubtedly what they want to see most.

They will not participate in this war, but it does not prevent them from stumbling the marching ants.

Since the emergence of self-propelled army ants, they have always shown an extremely strong desire to expand. Waiting for the marching ants to calm down within the territory, does not rule out the possibility of their expansion into the Thousand Star Empire, after all, they are here as a side bed for the marching ants.

The current marching ants, after Chen Mo returned, their cohesion reappeared, and it was their strongest time.

The Thousand Star Empire arranged this highest-level high-level meeting to discuss how the Thousand Star Empire should go next, which is related to the future of their Thousand Star Empire.

chapters.title: Chapter 1126: : The Crisis Of The Black Pupil
chapters.body:
Chapter 1126: : The Crisis Of The Black Pupil

Bai Hai will listen to the old prophet's narration, as if listening to an incredible story.

Chen Mo was a student of the old prophet as early as his ordinary life.

If this news were told to them by anyone else, they would never believe it, and would only think that Chen Mo controlled them with super power to say so.

But these words came from the mouth of the old prophet, and they believed it.

In the endless sea, they have the supreme belief in the old prophet. The old prophet has lived for hundreds of millions of years, leading the endless sea to grow step by step and has been strong ever since.

In their eyes, the old prophet was omnipotent and omniscient, and he was not surprised to teach Chen Mo this student to create such a miracle.

After experiencing the initial shock, Bai Hai looked at each other and saw the excitement in each other's eyes.

Now Chen Mo's identity has not been made public, they know what it means.

From the outside world, the confrontation between the endless sea and the marching ants is nothing more than a blindfold thrown by Chen Mo. Chen Mo and himself publicly sang a double reed, deceiving the entire universe.

Selling equipment to Black Eye is just a round.

If Tong Qing knew that the equipment he wanted to buy was provided by Chen Mo's technology, he would not dare to buy it if he was killed. In this era, buying equipment from the enemy is self-defeating.

The marching ants in Chen Mo's hands also have the endless sea in his hands, possessing the two strongest forces in the universe.

They have the capital to unify the universe.

The supreme hegemony of the unified universe!

Bai Hai will wait for people to think of this, and their blood boils. They will be witnesses and participants of this unparalleled historical moment.

"Next, we will maintain a confrontation with the marching ants, so that the outside world thinks that our two are guilty. In addition, we will advance to the Black Forest and take the entire dark forest in our hands." Chen Mo said.

"understand."

Bai Hai solemnly nodded the three.

They all know that this situation is very big, and once it succeeds, the war will end soon.

...

Ming Tu looked at the space ruins in the light curtain, without the slightest mood swing, and issued a retreat command to let the warhead evacuate the battlefield.

This was the victory of the 2755th war. In the hands of the Black Eye Civilization, they destroyed countless warships and warheads, and took away more than 2,000 galaxies and 120,000 ordinary galaxies.

The War Department of the current Black Eye Civilization did not dare to head-to-head with the Ming Tu War Department. Almost all warheads at the border of the star field, after Ming Tu’s invasion, only chose to symbolically delay the time, and quickly chose to evacuate.

The long border of the star field cannot stop the warhead of the marching ants at all.

With the joint hands of top generals such as Lan, Ming Tu, and Gou Xuan, the super warhead of the marching ants can almost easily break through the border of the black pupil civilization. The vast star field of the black pupil civilization is like a tortoise with an open shell.

After entering the Black Eye Star Territory, the first goal of the Ming Tu War Department is to destroy the defensive heavy star.

His task is to destroy.

Like the most powerful magic knife, the Ming Tu warfare points directly to the galaxy with the strongest defense of the black pupil civilization. After destroying these defensive centers, it indirectly destroys the defensive forces of the surrounding galaxies.

Choose to occupy the warhead behind to reduce resistance.

The cohesion of the black pupil civilization is very strong, and the resistance of some stars is not small, but it is useless in front of the Super War Head.

Controlling the dark matter and antimatter reserves of the galaxy, the interstellar spacecraft are like scrap iron. The planets are in the vast star field, and the spacecraft without space jumping are like isolated islands. The life on the planets is only for human slaughter.

Wherever the army goes, if it does not surrender, it will directly destroy the interstellar spacecraft and return the planet to the era of low-level civilization.

There is really a stubborn resistance who directly destroyed the planet.

Life becomes worthless in the face of cosmic war.

After experiencing a little resistance at the beginning, the more obvious the effect will be the later.

The defensive stars were captured one by one, like silver needles piercing the huge body of the black pupil civilization, not fatal, but extremely painful.

The further behind, the weaker the black pupil civilization will be.

After they successfully controlled most of the star field of the White Star Civilization, Lan began to concentrate the warheads of the marching ants.

The Night Xiao warfare, the Kunpeng warfare, the Watmu warfare, the Qushu warfare, and the Great Demon warfare are all top warheads with super-powered legions. Without exception, Lan was thrown into the Black Eye battlefield.

Together with the New Five Cities and the Nebula Alliance, both attacked the black pupil at the same time.

They all know that this is an excellent opportunity after the defeat of the Red Army Warhead.

Before the Black Eye Civilization can't deal with the Super War Head, do your best to weaken the strength of the Black Eye Civilization.

The marching ants have many general stars. After Chen Mo disappeared, he was suffocated for five years. After re-entering the battlefield, he was like a wild wolf who had been hungry for five years, looting, biting, and destroying wildly on the black-eye star field, day and night. .

For a time, the star field on the border of the Black Eye Civilization and the entrance of the Hongqiao Bridge to the White Star Civilization were all caught in the flames of war.

The main battle department was defeated, the super war department was slaughtered, countless planets were turned into smashed pieces, and the black pupil civilization seemed to become vulnerable in just a few days, as if it had a dead end.

The flames of war spread to the hinterland of the black pupil star domain, and fear also spread within the black pupil star domain.

...

Hitomi Green looked extremely ugly.

The way the war evolved was beyond his expectation.

The black-eye civilization wailed under the iron armor of the marching ants, and their strongest civilized image collapsed under the armor of the marching ants.

In the face of all this in the battlefield, he can do nothing.

War is not a play, it is not that he stood up and shouted slogans to reverse this disadvantage.

In terms of technology, although they have successfully developed the super-powered armor, the super-power technology of the marching ants is stronger than them by a whole generation. This is an irreparable gap.

This is a war of unequal technology.

In the face of absolute strength, no matter how strong tactics are, it is useless.

In just a few days, Tong Qing's face became exhausted and a little lost.

The failure of the Black Eye civilization came so quickly.

The great hegemony ideal in his heart was shattered at this moment.

"Has the super armor of the endless sea and the thousand star empire arrived?" Tong Qing looked at Yan.

"Endless Sea agreed. Three galaxies have a battle armor. We need to officially hand over the Devil Xingyuan to him before giving us the super armor. The Thousand Star Empire is negotiating, and they are asking for a battle with five galaxies. A, they are taking advantage of the fire to rob." Yan said calmly.

"For them, it doesn't matter how expensive they are, I'm afraid they won't sell it." Tong Qing said.

What they lack now is the means to resist the marching ants, which can delay time, which is the best. And the super-powered armor of the endless sea and the thousand star empire were undoubtedly their only means to delay time.

The black pupil civilization has reached its most dangerous time.

Either he can, like the Prophet of the Endless Sea, possess the superpowers to control the galaxy, so that he can deter the marching ants in front of the super warhead and resist the opponent's steps, otherwise he can only watch the black pupil civilization be eaten a little bit.

"You call the shots about the war, and I will go to the super experimental base."

Hitomi got up from her position and left the office.

chapters.title: Chapter 1127: : Closed
chapters.body:
Chapter 1127: : Closed

The senior management of the Thousand Star Empire is actively discussing the next decision.

The aggressiveness of the marching ants towards the black pupil civilization, and the big action of the endless sea against the dark forest star field, caused quite a stir.

Their Thousand Star Empire, their actions are relatively small compared to the two, and they have been dealing with Thor civilization.

Their war in the Thor Territory has achieved a lot of results. With the technical advantages of Super Armor, they can easily conquer the galactic fortress of Thor civilization.

The confrontation between the endless sea, the black pupil and the marching ants attracted most of the attention of the universe.

In the past five years, the marching ants have acted in a low-key manner, and their strength has not been fully revealed, but now it is unimaginable.

This giant standing next to them made them feel extremely pressure.

In the huge conference room, there are arguments.

It is said that the united black pupil restricts the marching ants, while using the endless sea and the black pupil to deal with the marching ants, they participate in the siege of the marching ants and destroy the strongest opponent. Some say that they are focused on Thor's war, and some say that they must be alert to the endless sea.

Wan Tianxing sat in the first seat with a calm expression. Beside him, there is a woman with poisonous skin, who is also sitting indifferently.

The Thousand Star Empire has no obvious advantage over the Marching Ants and the Endless Sea, because they do not have super powers like Chen Mo and the Prophet of the Endless Sea.

Super powers are more terrifying than a super warhead in terms of top combat power.

It can be said that at this stage, there is no solution for the super super.

Suddenly, a cold voice interrupted them.

"Well, stop fighting."

This sound was not loud, but it made the entire conference room hear clearly. The originally noisy meeting room quieted down instantly.

The top of the Thousand Star Empire looked at the source of the sound, and it was the poisonous girl sitting next to Wan Tian Xing.

Obviously, no one expected that the girl with the poisonous skin would speak, and even the Wan Tianxing beside her was a little surprised: "Queen, what's the matter?"

"It doesn't make sense to argue about what to do next, the matter is finalized." The poisonous girl stood up and said lightly.

"What do you mean?"

Wan Tianxing's expression changed slightly, and he had an ominous premonition.

"literal meaning."

The poisonous girl didn't even look at him, but turned around.

I saw slight fluctuations in the space in the meeting room, and two figures appeared in the meeting room, it was Chen Mo and Mo Nu.

Their current appearance is the appearance of the Prophet of the Endless Sea.

"Hello everyone."

An ordinary greeting made the meeting room silent, and there was no response for a while.

"Prophet of the Endless Sea? Why are you here?"

A high-level confidant of Wan Tianxing took the lead in filming the case, glaring at Chen Mo, and when he wanted to do it, he found his body froze in place, no matter how hard he struggled, he couldn't move a bit.

The meeting room was occupied by an invisible wave. Everyone felt their own consciousness, being pinched by an invisible big hand. The horrible pressure and strong sense of crisis made their consciousness blank.

As soon as a super-powered guard next to Wan Tianxing took a step, he felt his body stiffened, and he fell straight on the ground with no vital signs, and his death was silent.

At this moment, the complexions of all the seniors of the Thousand Star Empire changed drastically.

That's it!

They thought of the fate of the Sauron Alliance and the White Star Civilization, and were found by the super powers, and they had no chance to resist.

You know, the guards of Ten Thousand Stars are first-class masters in the Thousand Star Empire, and they are also equipped with super-powered armor, so there is no chance to even move them.

The fear of death surged into my heart, and everyone was sitting in place, timid and high-rise, their bodies trembling.

They wanted to inform the high level outside the Thousand Star Empire, but they couldn't.

"Don't worry too much, I haven't introduced myself yet."

Chen Mo walked alone to the seat opposite Wan Tian Xing and sat down, Mo Nu and Poison Skin Girl followed behind him, separated on both sides.

The meaning is already obvious.

"I am the prophet of the endless sea, and I also have another identity, the leader of the marching ants, Chen Mo." Chen Mo smiled slightly, only seeing his face change, returning to his original human appearance.

At this moment, all the seniors of the Thousand Star Empire looked pale.

The two super powers that are widely rumored outside are actually the same person, and Chen Mo controls the two families of March Ant and Endless Sea.

In the conference room of the Thousand Star Empire, the breathing became heavy.

Now they know a very scary fact.

If the outside world knows that the marching ants and the endless sea are actually one family, they might cause a major earthquake.

Wan Tianxing's expression was cold, falling on the poisonous woman, her eyes were splitting: "Poisonous woman, you are fine, I didn't expect that you would choose to betray the Thousand Star Empire."

Now the girl with the poisonous skin is standing behind Chen Mo, as long as she is not blind, she will know what is going on.

This meeting was initiated by him and the girl with the poisonous skin, and the location was only known to these high-level people on the court, just because they were afraid of being confused. As a result, this scene appeared.

This meeting is a conspiracy.

"I was not the life of the Thousand Star Empire." The Venomous Skin Girl said coldly: "From the very beginning, I was a member of the marching ants. Restoring the Thousand Star Empire was just raising the chess pieces."

Wan Tianxing's face changed dramatically.

He understood that the poisonous girl asked him to alliance and restore the Thousand Star Empire. From the beginning, it was a conspiracy, a game of chess played by the marching ants.

As the restorer of the Thousand Star Empire, Wan Tianxing never thought that the Venomous Girl would be a marching ant.

He looked at Chen Mo and said coldly: "The marching ants are really bold and good layout."

Chen Mo smiled lightly, not caring about the hatred in Wan Tianxing's eyes.

At the beginning, Lan dispatched poison-skinned girl He Hui Twenty-one to the chaos, and he formed an intelligence organization to collect cosmic intelligence. After a cosmic war broke out, they let the Venomous Girl incorporate the forces of Chaos Land by the way.

But I don't want to, a chess piece once laid has grown to this point step by step.

"Without the help of the marching ants, do you think the Thousand Star Empire can get to this point?" Chen Mo put a hand on the conference table and tapped his fingers lightly: "The cutting-edge technology that the poisonous girl gave you, including super warfare. A technology, general star talent, these are all marching ants, otherwise you think that with the strength of the Thousand Star Empire, you can crack the super armor technology in five years?"

Wan Tianxing's pupils shrank greatly.

"I won't waste everyone's time. The Thousand Star Empire will be controlled by the Poison Skin Girl."

"Idiot talk about dreams." Wan Tianxing said coldly: "We won't obey your orders even if we die. There is a way we fight head-on."

"Speaking quite ruthlessly, I still say this kind of thing now, no wonder it will be this step today." Chen Mo said nonchalantly: "I am telling you a notice, not soliciting your opinions."

"If you want to control the Thousand Star Empire, you have to pay a price. We would rather die, don't think we can control like the Sauron Alliance." Wan Tianxing said coldly.

Chen Mo looked at him.

He understood Wan Tianxing's hatred, and finally became the overlord of the universe from a second-rate force, but now he was going to disappear overnight, and it was impossible for another person to accept it.

He waved to the poisonous girl.

The poisonous girl will take a step forward and look into the meeting room.

"Kaliyi, Hong Xu, Inagi, Cheng Luo, Ya, Liuliu, Zhi..." Poison Skin Girl said a bunch of names, all of her original team, and the people in charge of the Thousand Star Empire Important location.

The person whose name was pronounced loosened his body, with a complicated expression, stood up from the position and walked to the poisonous girl.

They don't know that Venom Skin Girl is a soldier ant, but they don't reject it.

They used to know that the queen had a backing in the chaotic land, but they didn't know it was a marching ant. Now the truth is clear. After all, they are all cultivated by the resources of marching ants.

"You control at most half of the power of the Thousand Star Empire. Without us, the Thousand Star Empire would also fall into civil strife." Wan Tianxing said unwillingly.

"You really value yourself." The poisonous girl shook her head and looked at the other seniors in the meeting room and said: "Do you think their group of wine and rice bags will accompany you to death?"

The poisonous girl showed a cold smile.

In her opinion, all the high-levels mentioned in Wan Tianxing's statement are all useless. If her team hadn't supported the Thousand Star Empire these years, the Thousand Star Alliance would have long since existed.

"They have been in a high position for so long, and they have many enemies. They die and lose power in their hands. Their ethnic group and family will be torn apart by former enemies. They are more afraid of death than you." said the poisonous girl.

As soon as these words came out, the eyes of the high-level Thousand Star Empire on the field flickered.

A word from the poisonous girl poked their minds.

"Now is the age of super powers, do you think we have no way to control you? The super war armor is still the technology of our marching ants. With the touch of your finger, the super army can be controlled by us. What bargaining chip do you have?"

At this moment, Wantianxing's heart is ashamed.

He felt a sense of powerlessness for the first time.

It turns out that everything is an illusion. It's not how strong he is or how majestic he is. All his achievements are arranged by the army ants.

The truth is so cruel.

"Now give you a chance to surrender yourself, or do we use coercive means to enslave you or die?" said the poisonous girl indifferently.

"I...surrender." A senior veteran of the Thousand Star Alliance raised his hand and gritted his teeth and said with difficulty.

The first domino fell, and then the second...

Wan Tianxing sat slumped in the chair, eyes blank.

He is done!

chapters.title: Chapter 1128: : Mingpai
chapters.body:
Chapter 1128: : Mingpai

The Dark Forest Starfield was ousted by a coup in Dinanye, and the ghost fox turned to the marching queen and became fragmented.

Dinan Miro was frantically resisting the offensive of the endless sea and the marching ants. However, under the siege of the two giants, he ignored them and could not survive.

Two months of stubborn resistance eventually ended in a disastrous defeat.

From the outside, it is a miracle that Dinan Miro has resisted the endless sea and the marching ants for two months without the Super War Department.

The Black Forest was declared dead.

Since then, the dark forest and the black forest that split from the dark forest civilization have all been destroyed.

Dinan Miro led a small team to escape the dark forest star field, whereabouts are unknown.

Another god-level civilization is destroyed.

After experiencing the initial shock, other galaxies in the Dark Forest star field fell into panic.

However, the endless sea and the marching ant group are like two hungry wolves, devouring the fat of the dark forest frantically.

Soon, the mad beast empire and the beast alliance were destroyed in the two offensives, and the dark forest star field was divided and eaten, and all fell into the hands of the endless sea and the marching ants.

...

On the other side, the internal changes within the Thousand Star Empire were happening quietly.

Lan's layout and the operations of Poison Skin Girl made it easy for them to capture the entire high-levels of the Thousand Star Empire.

The meeting became a discussion about how to deal with the affairs of the Thousand Star Empire.

The consciousness of Ten Thousand Stars is controlled, and the consciousness of other high-level members of the Thousand Star Alliance is also controlled. Next, the poisonous girl will be given the original layout, so that their manpower will gradually replace the high level of the Thousand Star Alliance.

The changes in the Thousand Star Empire are not known to the outside world.

For decades, the girl with the poisonous skin has laid out according to Lan's intentions, plus she is at the top, knowing how to handle the weaknesses of those high-levels. The original Thousand Star Alliance team of the Thousand Star Empire was completely cleaned up in the hands of the Poison Skin Girl.

The person in charge of the original family of the Thousand Star Alliance changed.

In the face of the venomous girl's fierce methods, all the high-levels of the Thousand Star Alliance were treated well and docilely. As soon as the rebels appear, their race and family will be washed away overnight.

Turnip and stick, do both.

In order to prevent the outside world from seeing the drastic changes within the Thousand Star Empire, Wan Tianxing is still the leader on the bright side, but only a puppet, whose consciousness is manipulated like a puppet.

In the eyes of the outside world, the centralization of Wantianxing is constantly increasing.

In just two months, the Thousand Star Empire was cleansed quietly and was firmly controlled by Chen Mo.

...

In the conference room, poisonous women and a group of stars.

The generals headed by Kaliyi know their true patrons. They didn't object, they were originally talents excavated by women with poisonous skin when they were at the bottom.

And in troubled times, their backers are the strongest, the safer they are and the higher the upper limit.

Carrie and Hong Xu are all aware of a terrifying fact. Chen Mo controls the three strongest forces. The three giants are condensed into one. Who else is the opponent in the universe?

Many stars have been silent for a long time.

"The first batch of 10 million sets of super-powered armor has been transferred to the Black Eye Civilization." Zhi said, with a faintly excited voice: "There is also news from my hometown. The super-powered armor of the endless sea has also been sent to the black. Pupil civilization."

They participated in a peerless project.

As conspirators, there is nothing like their success in conspiring to win enemies and a sense of accomplishment.

Today's Thousand Star Empire, except for its name is Thousand Star Empire, all other inner parts are controlled by them. They are actually one family with Marching Ants and Endless Sea, but they have not yet revealed their cards.

Once this hole card is played, the universe may be unified.

The hegemony of unifying the universe is the supreme achievement.

"My lord, what shall we do next?" Carrie looked at the poisonous girl.

As a top star, no one knows what the current situation means better than her.

It won’t be long before the Black Eye Civilization fully accepts their Super Armor, and the Marching Ant, Endless Sea, and Thousand Star Empire complete the integration, the universe will be one word.

"Increase the supply of Super War Armor for Black Eye, Karly, you lengthen the battle line with Thor, and create the illusion that we have no time for him. At the same time, Hong Xu leads the Super War Department to take over the Black Eye civilization trade. The galaxy that came over, then deployed and stationed, waiting for orders."

The poisonous girl has a serious face.

This is the layout that Lan explained.

Before long, everything will be a foregone conclusion.

...

The Black Eye civilization urgently needs the equipment to resist the super warhead of the marching ants.

As soon as the Thousand Star Empire and the Endless Sea Super War Armor were sent into their hands, large-scale equipment began to enter the Super War Department.

The warhead of the marching ants, as if smelling danger, retreated like a tide, and the galaxies that gave up their occupation retreated one after another.

effective!

It was determined that the warhead of the marching ants would retreat, and the generals of the black-eyed civilization were like chicken blood, driving the newly equipped super warhead to carry out a major counterattack against the marching ants.

With the superpower warhead as the vanguard, the warships in the rear followed up, and countless warheads began to counterattack.

In the past few months, they have been crushed and beaten by the marching ants, and they have been very aggrieved, and now they can finally exhale. Under the same equipment, their black pupil civilization is not afraid of any forces.

At the time of the Black Eye Civilization's counterattack against the marching ants, the endless sea and the Thousand Star Empire issued a warning to the marching ants.

The strongest marching ant group has become the target of the siege of the great powers, and the endless sea and the Thousand Star Empire, which seem to have the title of giant, are extremely afraid of the marching ants.

Encouraged by the two declarations of war against the marching ants, the offensive of the Black Eye civilization suddenly increased, and with the blessing of the super armor of the Thousand Star Empire and the Endless Sea, Hitomi sent almost half of his troops to fight the marching ants star field The front line.

And the instigator of this layout, Lan was laughing wildly in the marching ant headquarters.

Now the super-powerful elites of the black pupil civilization are all equipped with super-powered armor, and the warhead that they are looking at is sent to the front line, this is undoubtedly a death.

"What do you do next?" Wang Hai and other generals asked.

"How to do it? Mingpai, tell them that I don't play anymore, and my hands are all Wang Fu." Lan's smile was sinister, and the feeling of leading the enemy's nose was extremely refreshing.

It's up!

Ming Tu and others knew that this war was about to end.

In this layout, the winner is already obvious.

"Tomorrow at 12 o'clock earth time, we will launch an offensive against the Black Eye Civilization. In the current Black Eye Civilization, the Super Warhead uses our battle armor. With a single button, the entire warhead will be destroyed. It is not a problem."

Lan's eyes were shining, and he was trying to suppress his excitement.

"After controlling their super warhead, Ming Tu jumped into the core area of the black pupil civilization, don't give them any chance. Destroy the spacecraft, control the dark matter, antimatter storage galaxy. Use super warhead to destroy their defensive heavy stars , Let the subsequent warhead occupy. This time, don't give them any chance."

"Endless Sea can start from Devil Star Abyss and control the surrounding core star field."

"Don't keep your hands in other directions."

"Remember, the action must be fast, do not give them any time to react, destroy their confidence and trample on their dignity."

"This is a decisive battle."

"This battle will set the situation of the universe in one fell swoop."

The stars on the field are all top tactical masters.

Now the cards in the hand are all Wang Jian, even a pig can easily win the Black Eye Civilization, not to mention the Black Eye Civilization is still in their calculations.

After Lan arranged the general direction, many general stars began to refine their tactics according to their own tasks.

Seeing that the ministries are busy, Lan smiled with emotion.

Never thought that a young life encountered in Shi Ganxing would have such an achievement.

"Victory is here." Lan said impassionedly.

"understand."

Wang Hai and others shouted with red eyes, extremely excited. They can feel every cell of their bodies trembling. As people on earth, their experience is the most profound. They have gone from a low-level life step by step to where they are today.

They are about to complete an unprecedented cause and be included in the epic of the universe.

chapters.title: Chapter 1129: : The Highest Courtesy
chapters.body:
Chapter 1129: : The Highest Courtesy

The space port is full of warships.

Almost every thousands of kilometers, there is one, a small space port, almost showing signs of space congestion.

The war department was dispatched.

"Everyone obeys the order. Once you start, please jump according to their predetermined coordinates, and then destroy the target." In the communication channels of the warships and battle armors, there are all serious voices: "Please remember your mission."

The warships in space are floating, without orders, they don't move, everything is in order.

"I don't know what the outcome of this battle will be?" A soldier looked at the deep universe full of stars and said with emotion.

"I have a hunch that it won't be long before we can go home to have a barbecue." A small captain beside him smiled, his voice with unparalleled confidence. "

"I hope your hunch is right."

"Nonsense, we are the strongest now, and the boss is back. Under this kind of offensive, no one can resist our Super War Department." The team leader said proudly.

This is not his own thoughts, but the thoughts of the entire marching ant war.

They trust Commander Lan very much. Without absolute certainty, such a big move will never happen.

The decisive battle is starting.

Lan's offensive plan has been well implemented in all major war departments. The marching ant group is like a huge machine, in which every precision part is operating at high speed and efficiently.

Countless warships, transport ships, super warheads and ordinary warheads, as well as all weapons, have been continuously sent to the frontline galaxy through the space connector.

Such a large-scale warhead mobilization can't hide from the Black Eye civilization.

The same big action is also performed in the star domain of the black pupil text.

The Black Eye Civilization sensed the abnormal movement of the various warheads within the marching ants, and was unconsciously vigilant, and also mobilized all warheads to prepare to resist an attack of this scale.

As for the big moves of the endless sea and the various war departments of the Thousand Star Empire, the Black Eye Civilization also thinks it should be.

Because marching ants are their common enemy.

...

The Black Sea will receive instructions from the Prophet.

Seeing the content of the instruction, he knew that the time had come to determine the fate of Black Eye civilization. Under this layout, Chen Mo has taken control of the situation, and no one can shake it.

Not only the Black Sea will realize, but Shui Ling and others will realize that the prophet now has the power to control the life and death of the universe.

After knowing that the prophet is Chen Mo, their mood is complicated, but knowing that Chen Mo is a student of the old prophet, they are naturally extremely happy. This means that Chen Mo is a person of their endless sea, representing their interests in the endless sea, and will never treat them wrongly in the future.

These things can be seen since the prophet came to power.

Clean up the representatives of ethnic interests, promote the super power academy, and introduce various policies that are beneficial to the ordinary life of the endless sea, and hand them to the endless sea super power armor, leading them to become cosmic giants in one fell swoop.

The endless sea now is the strongest time in history.

However, what will shock the Black Sea even more is Kaliyi's connection.

According to the instructions, he dialed the communication, and it was Kaliyi of the Thousand Star Empire who appeared in the communication video.

The Black Sea will be shocked once again. In addition to the marching ants, the Prophet also controls the Thousand Star Empire. It suddenly occurred to him that some time ago, the intelligence said that the Thousand Star Empire had made large-scale personnel transfers.

He thought of a possibility that the Thousand Star Empire was also the dark chess of the prophet.

This can explain why the Thousand Star Empire can have a super armor so quickly.

This time it was a joint operation.

The siege of the three giants, this is the prophet's highest courtesy to the black pupil civilization.

Black Sea will discuss the plan of action with Kaliyi, and both of them know how important the next big action is.

Sitting on the marching ants, in charge of the endless sea and the Thousand Star Empire, swallowing the White Star Civilization and the Dark Forest, if you swallow the Black Eye Civilization, Chen Mo's hegemony will be unstoppable.

Kaliyi suddenly remembered the scene of being defeated by marching ants when she was in Shepherd City.

That war changed her destiny. She opposed surrender. She was revoked by the lord of Shepherd City from the position of general star, waiting for work at home, and then forced by her opponents. She accepted the invitation of the poisonous girl and joined the chaos before she had her. present day.

Now when I look back, I find that the army ants recruited her.

Maybe this is fate.

A thought flashed through her mind, but these were not important anymore.

She is now realizing her value, and she has also successfully promoted to the top ranks. The people of the tribe are living well, which is enough. And now, she is also participating in this epic war.

In retrospect, Carrie focused on the discussion of joint actions.

"You start from the Devil Star Abyss and directly insert the Red Cloud, Oriole, and Lantern of the Black Eye Civilization. I am in charge of the direction of the Thousand Star Empire. I cut in from the Traveler, Warrior, and Singer, and then in the Rainbow. Meeting, the home side has attracted most of the black pupil's forces, and the interior is empty. We need to use the fastest speed to destroy the resistance of this star field. Then point directly to the core area of the black pupil, the black pupil."

Carrie points to a sign in the star chart.

...

The final battle is about to begin.

According to the actions of major civilizations, the intention is obvious.

Yan also noticed that the marching ants' big moves were aimed at the black pupil civilization. Similarly, the Black Eye Civilization got the information here, and the War Department of the endless sea and the Thousand Star Empire was also gathering.

Thinking of the grievances between the endless sea and the Thousand Star Empire, Yan showed a smile on his face.

As long as you do it, the endless sea and the Thousand Star Empire will attack them. The marching ants have three heads and six arms, and they can't take care of the war in three directions.

At that time, they can dismember the marching ants.

Thinking of this, Yan couldn't help being excited.

They are equipped with 20 million super-power warheads, hundreds of millions of warships, and countless war machines and weapons. This is the largest war mobilization they have launched, an unprecedented number.

Yan himself felt extremely excited for such a large warhead.

Commanding such a large-scale war force is the lifelong dream of every general.

All the generals in the combat department are standing by, waiting for the marching ants to move. As long as the marching ants move, the other two will directly dismember them.

This big battle naturally shocked Hitomi who was training at the super base.

The progress of super power is not great. In just a few years, he has a constant star super power, which is already a very terrifying achievement. Now that he wants to reach the height of the galaxy level of the Prophet of the Endless Sea, he can only rely on the breakthrough of super power technology. .

Hitomi was relatively calm about the intelligence of the marching ant battle.

For some reason, he had a not-so-good premonition, but he just couldn't tell what was wrong.

Things are going too fast, too smoothly.

This makes him feel unreal.

But the arrow is on the line, now it is the marching ants who are going to fight the battle, and the initiative is not here.

"here we go!"

"Yeah." Tong Qing nodded calmly.

The war has begun!

As the marching ants began to attack, the alarm spread.

To these alarms, Tong Qing seemed to be accustomed, and he did not hear, but the anxiety in his heart lingered, instead, it became stronger and stronger.

Oh oh...

An even more rapid alarm sounded.

"President, the major event is not good, something has happened." An intelligence officer rushed into the war room, crying.

Tongqing's face changed slightly, and the anxiety in his heart seemed to appear.

chapters.title: Chapter 1130: : Surrender In Disguise
chapters.body:
Chapter 1130: : Surrender In Disguise

The war started.

Zou Ge quickly put on the super armor and headed to the combat position, ready to fight at any time. The powerful strength made him full of confidence.

This is a super armor imported by the Thousand Star Empire.

He is an ordinary member of the Black Eye Civilization Super War Department. During the development of super powers, he was fortunate to develop the special super power of the control object, so he was selected and trained in the ordinary war department and became a member of the Super War Department. Member, one step to the sky.

The treatment of super-power war soldiers is a thousand times better than ordinary soldiers.

Those who have almost entered the Super War Department, even if they leave the army in the future, their lives will be unmatched by ordinary soldiers.

Have great power and status,

During this period of time, wherever the super warhead of their black-eye civilization passed, the warhead of the marching ants retreated.

This virtually increased their confidence.

Information from the general headquarters spread to every soldier in their warhead. The next war is crucial and they must win.

Now the war has started.

As the super warfare, they are the vanguard of the war, and the front is full of crisis. Although they are strong, their opponents are equally strong, and they dare not neglect.

All super warheads are waiting for combat instructions in the battleship.

Suddenly, Zou Ge felt something was wrong.

There is something wrong with the Super Battle Armor!

Without his instructions, the Super Armor seemed to operate on its own.

The next moment, Zou Ge only felt a slight pain in the back of his neck, and his face changed suddenly.

Before he could react, his body froze, his consciousness became uncontrollable, everything in front of him became blurred, and there seemed to be a voice constantly echoing in his ears.

There is a problem with Super Battle Armor!

This was his last thought before his consciousness fell into darkness.

...

The Ming Tu War Department, like a magic sword out of its sheath, disappeared into space at the moment the war started.

The warhead turned into tens of thousands of teams, scattered all over the star domain of the black pupil.

This is a decisive battle.

The moment the signal of war goes, the solution is doomed.

All the super battle armors sold to the Black Eye Civilization were countered, and the Super War Head of the Black Eye Civilization was quite intact.

The Warhead of the Black Eye Civilization fell into an unprecedented panic. They didn't understand until their deaths why their Super Warhead would attack their own people.

Ming Tu turned a blind eye to this.

When Black Eye Civilization chooses to purchase Super Battle Armor with Endless Sea and Thousand Star Empire, the end is doomed.

All the super armors sold have backdoors.

The marching ants and the black pupil civilization that control the three giants are no longer the same.

The boss has too many cards here, and every card is a trump card. It is a nightmare to be an opponent with the boss. He also felt lucky that he met the boss at Mu's Tianxing.

Unknowingly, the boss has changed from a small power leader to today's overlord of the universe.
