Throwing away unnecessary thoughts, Ming Tu focused on the war.

There are no accidents in this war.

In order to cooperate with the so-called Endless Sea and Thousand Star Empire warhead attack, the Black Eye Civilization concentrated the warhead on the front line in an attempt to give the marching ants a fatal blow. After the Super Warhead rebels, the warhead of the Black Eye Civilization looks like a slaughter Lamb, only despair is left.

"Speed up the advancement and destroy their warships, and then the next target. No need to rest or wait for support." Ming Tu kept issuing instructions to the front.

Without the resistance of the Super War Department, the Ming Tu War Department entered the rice field like a harvester, sweeping all the way.

...

Yan was sitting on a chair with cold hands and feet, his heart was ashamed, and his mouth was trembling.

The Super Warhead of the Black Eye Civilization was completely counter-controlled by Super War Armor at the moment when the war started. All of this made them unexpected.

"The marching ants, the endless sea, the Thousand Star Empire, the joint siege, the scam, everything is a scam." Yan's voice was crazy, and tears fell unconsciously.

After a lifetime of strategy, he was finally calculated plainly.

In the War Department, all the black-eyed civilized generals hung their heads, and they knew what the consequences would be this time.

They are doing their best in the direction of the marching ants, they are not afraid to head-on with the marching ants, because behind the marching ants there will be endless seas and a thousand-star empire, so that the marching ants will suffer from the enemy.

However, when they recovered, they realized that this was a conspiracy against their black pupil civilization.

The super-power armor sold to them by the endless sea and the thousand star empire counter-controlled the super-powers, and the super-power warhead of the black-eye civilization reversed.

The most frightening thing is that the spearheads of the two families of Endless Sea and Thousand Star Empire are pointed behind them.

In order to cope with the decisive battle of the marching ants, all the warheads behind them were transferred to the front line. The warheads left in the inner star field were pitiful, and there was no super warhead. For the two powerful giants to join forces, they could only be slaughtered. .

The most terrifying thing is the panic within the Black Eye civilization, and their frontline, there will be no support.

"I am a sinner with black eyes, and I am a sinner." Yan lost her former composure and knelt on the ground, crying and laughing madly.

No one laughed at him.

As generals, they know how heavy the blow is and what it means.

Everyone looked at the pupil in the first seat.

At this time, Tongqing also had a dejected look, but he didn't have the gaffe of Yan.

The holographic light curtain occupied the entire holographic light curtain one by one, and he ignored it.

Suddenly, Tara came in with a sad expression. She walked to Tongqing and handed Tongqing a piece of video information. Looking at the information, Hitomi was silent for a long time, and finally turned into a sigh, and slowly stood up from her position.

"You all go back, it's a holiday." Tong Qing waved.

All the stars understand that everything is over.

The black pupil civilization has no chance to resist.

All the truth about the video information sent by Tara just now became clear. The prophet of the endless sea is Chen Mo, and behind the Thousand Star Empire is Chen Mo.

The three giants' joint layout calculations gave them a fatal blow at the most critical moment.

"When the warhead of the marching ants comes in, don't resist, just increase death." Tong Qing said calmly.

This sound made all Jiang Xing's bodies tremble slightly.

This sentence is not surrender, it is better than surrender.

Hitomi's pride did not allow him to end in surrender.

...

Chen Mo is the prophet of the endless sea; Chen Mo is the king behind the Thousand Star Empire.

Two messages were released by marching ants and swept the universe.

Even the inside of the marching ants were shocked by the news. After the shock, it was a carnival. In charge of the three strongest forces at the same time, after annexing the black pupil, they will occupy most of the stars in the universe.

This news is undoubtedly a fatal blow to other forces in the universe.

At this point, the force of the marching ants has become unstoppable.

In response to the long-planned calculations of the black pupil civilization, in one fell swoop, the black pupil civilization, which had only a little resistance, collapsed, leaving only fear and despair in the entire black pupil civilization.

At this time, the marching ants chose the bright card to reduce the resistance within the black pupil civilization, and similarly, to reduce the resistance for the future conquest of other forces.

Chen Mo gave Black Eye civilization hope of victory, and then personally extinguished this hope, without even having the opportunity to resist.

Panic, despair, sadness, and chaos are full of the black pupil star field.

The Super War Department was counter-controlled, the defense line was in vain, the War Department was disbanded, and the entire Black Eye Civilization War Department did not show much resistance.

The once glorious black pupil civilization, in a day, sunset.

Hitomi gave the order to disband the star, and the warhead did not resist, it was a disguised surrender.

Wherever the marching ants, the endless sea and the warhead of the Thousand Star Empire passed, the warhead of the Black Eye Civilization dropped their armor and weapons, did not resist, and did not surrender.

The black pupil civilization is over!

chapters.title: Chapter 1131: :Season Finale
chapters.body:
Chapter 1131: :Season Finale

In the black pupil universe.

Tong Qing sat in an ordinary small yard, he poured a glass of wine, it seemed extremely comfortable.

In this small yard, there is no other life, only him.

In front of the small yard is a field, with lush plants of various colors, the sky is blue, endless and beautiful. Life seems to be very peaceful, there is no war, no gunpowder, no death.

Suddenly, in the small courtyard, a door of space opened.

Chen Mo walked out of it and glanced at Tong Qing who was sitting on the wooden chair.

"Sit down." To Chen Mo's appearance, Tong Qing was not surprised, and pointed at the opposite chair: "Drink a drink?"

Chen Mo didn't hesitate, sat down on the wooden chair, picked up his full drink, and drank it all in one go.

"It's you, I'm convinced." Tong Qing smiled freely, looked calm, and drank the wine glass without seeing the defeat of the loser: "This day has come so quickly."

"Yeah." Chen Mo put down the wine glass and responded lightly.
